comment_text:
Bee's place is great. Very comfortable, clean and located. The building is nice and modern, there is a pool and a workout room.

It's located within a 1 minute scooter ride to Saphan Taksin BTS station making it easy to get to other areas of the city.

All in all, Bee's place is an excellent to set up as a home base while you explore the city. To top it all off, Bee herself and her parents are awesome! They really showed me they cared about my staying there and were very helpful in every regard.

I can't recommend this place enough. Awesome!

I have stayed in many hotels all around the world ranging from the French-brand, Accor, to Starwood and Hilton Hotels Worldwide. This being said, my very first experience using airbnb.com and choosing this lovely, modern, spacious, clean, well-appointed, centrally-located, comfortable, spacious, spacious, spacious, and spacious apartment hosted by Bee really made my very first time in Thailand TRULY ENJOYABLE and of THE BEST VALUE!!!!! I arrived in Bangkok Suvarnabhumi Airport just after midnight and arrived at Bee's Apartment around 2 a.m. and was met by her friendly and welcoming father without any issues! He is very friendly and he took the time to show us the amenities such as FREE WI-FI, FULL KITCHEN (with several bottles of water!), lots of clean towels, toilet paper, extra pillows! The shower pressure was very nice and the shower is separate from the toilet so everything stays nice and dry in the bathroom! She even provides complimentary train maps, city maps, and tourist information. There is also a swimming pool and a gym and laundry facilities, too! The building is very secure! There is a security guard 24 hours/day, also very good air-conditioning. Also, there is lots of room for two adults and also an additional sofa-bed for additional guests! There is also a vanity area for ladies to apply their make-up and plenty of books for reading and lots of seating, too! Bangkok is warm in September so the air-conditioning can go as cold as 16*C!!! Everything here is so perfect! Neighborhood is very safe and restaurants and shops are very inexpensive because you are not in the tourist area. The BTS Sky train stop is Saphan Taksin, so you are only minutes away from Siam Paragon Shopping Complex, Patpong Night Market, Chao Phraya River Taxi is only 5 minutes away by tuk-tuk/metered-taxi/local bus - very convenient! There is a local massage shop only 5 minutes away by foot and you can get a 1-hour massage for only 120 Thai Baht, or 4 American Dollars! Can life be any better??? Also, Bee's father brought Thai Milk Tea and Thai Sugar Doghnuts and showed us around the neighborhood one morning! I also met his wife and I immediately felt part of the family! Bee and her father and mother are so warm and welcoming and I will definitely come back to Thailand and book again with Bee!!! I am writing this review from a hotel in Kata Beach near Phuket and I wish Bee had another apartment here because her apartment is so much better than my hotel in Phuket! I will miss her wonderful apartment, but I PROMISE YOU, I will be back!!!!! If you have any questions, I am happy to answer them! I really really really had THE BEST EXPERIENCE!!!!

And also, if you are an English-speaker, there are no worries! Communication with Bee and her family are very easy, clear, quick to respond, and very helpful!!!

This experience is truly Thai Hospitality at best!

This was our first time using airbnb and we couldn't have picked a better apartment or host!
We arrived at the condo, met by bee's father who is a very friendly man and nothing was too much trouble, he gave my husband a lift to the shops and was always happy to help out. Bee phoned and emailed during our stay to make sure everything was ok and was always on hand if we needed anything.

The apartment is so lovely, it really felt like home. It is very comfortable and well looked after. Well stocked with kitchen utensils, bedding and towels plus very good A/C.
There is free wifi and free use of the fitness center and swimming pool on the 5th floor. There is a shop and laundry service on the ground floor of the building and is generally in a good location. Not far from Silom Rd where there are some great places to go out of an evening. Street venders are plentiful and there is a good coffee shop a few mins walk away called Zucre, fantastic cakes!
Very close to the river and a short songthaw ride to the central plaza shopping mall, also a 20 min walk to the asiatique boutique night market.
Taxis are easy to come by from right outside the apartment. (our taxi back to suvanabhumi airport cost 250 baht + 100 baht highway tolls, takes just under an hour)
The building is secure and we felt very safe there.

There is a great view over Bangkok from the roof too! ;-)

We really enjoyed our experience and we will definitely stay again with Bee, much better than staying in a hotel! Can't recommend this apartment enough - we loved it!

Bee was the best host we ever had. The communication was absolutely perfect. She was telling us everything what we have to know about our first travel to Asia. Almost every day we stayed in contact with Bee and she told us what we should do in Bangkok. Even after our stay in Bangkok, Bee gave us very nice infos about Thailand. She was absolutely fantastic and a great help for us. Her father came to the condo to show us everything. He's very friendly and can explain you all things. The condo was very clean and perfect for a stay in Bangkok. There is also a nice pool for a swim. The condo is maybe 500 meters from the BTS station. From there you can go everywhere within a couple minutes.

When I booked this studio , Bee make me feel she is a friendly lady , she try to help anything about Thailand .
And about Bee' family , them also warm and welcoming too, make my sister and I feel we are family . we are very happy met Bee and her family
About this studio , its lovely , safe , comfortable and really felt like home .there have a swimming pool and a workout room Convenient to everything, near the BTS and express boat , and the important thing it security place

This is my first choose in Bangkok and we will definitely stay again !!!

We loved it

Bee es una excelente anfitriona, siempre muy preocupada de que todo este en orden y mas que eso es una persona cálida y muy dulce. El lugar es exactamente como se muestra en las fotos, muy seguro y muy bien ubicado con muchas cosas interesantes para hacer y visitar muy cerca.
Los padres de Bee son un apoyo muy grande para cualquier persona que viaja, tienen siempre la mejor voluntad de hacer la estancia de uno placentera y segura. totalmente recomendado!!!

My stay at Bee's condo was just perfect !
Just after I booked, Bee sent me an email with a lot of explanations about how to get there, and responded very quickly if I had any questions.

The condo is nicely located, near the river if you want to take the boat taxi, and next to the metro which is very useful if you want to avoid the traffic to go to Siam :)
It's clean and nice, and the swiming pool can be very useful in Bangkok !

Bee's father welcomed me the night of my arrival, and he even brought me some breakfast the next morning. It was really nice to meet him !

I definitely recommand Bee's condo :)
Pleasant stay in the room with extra sofa bed just nice for my daughter who is traveling together. Available facilities for cooking & washing if needed. Host's father is helpful with information.

We stayed at Bee's apartment 2 separate times - 2days when we first got to Thailand and last 2 days before we were leaving Thailand.  What a wonderful start and a great end to our 2 week Thailand trip.  Bee has made the process so easy and nice with sending me emails of suggestions of where to go in Bangkok, sending me names of dishes written in Thai and English to show to restaurants since I have diet restrictions.  Upon arrival, Bee's father met us at the lobby of the apartment building and showed us to the apartment which is fabulous!  You have all you need at the unit including wifi, many TV channels (in English, Hindi and Korean for us!), coffee, water, even a spare phone for use.  Bee's father brought us soy milk and Thai donuts the next morning and told us about Hindu goddess street festival nearby that was happening that night, and oh my goodness, we had an incredible time.  My boyfriend is Indian so he really appreciated that.  Bee's father went out of his way to make us feel comfortable, leaving fruit in the unit for us to enjoy during our stay.  The apartment is a 10 minute walk from the central pier and the skytrain station which is super convenient.  We took motorcycle taxis to/from the stations which cost less than a dollar.  There are food stalls on the street of the apartment building and restaurants/shops on the main street a block away.  I can't say enough good things about my experience!  Would definitely stay there again on my next trip to Bangkok.  Bee, thanks to you and your father for your hospitality!

Bee was fantastic. She coordinated our stay from afar but I don't think I have felt as looked out for as we did with Bee. While we did not get to meet Bee in person, her father was her point person at the condo and he was fantastic. Super helpful! Greeted us on arrival in the lobby with the keys and gave us all of the information we needed for our stay. When our stay was over he met us at the condo and even helped us get a taxi, going up to main street to hail the taxi and send it down to us so that we did not need to walk to the corner with our luggage. Great Family, super hosts.

The condo was perfect for our stay and as described. Highlights include access to pool; short distance to Asiatique night market, BTS, and tourist boats on the river; and option of doing your own wash for 40 baht per load for wash and 30 baht for dry using buildings washer and dryer or what we did and pay 300 baht total to have 2 loads done for us by the laundry in the strip of stores at the bottom of the condo building.

I looked at over 600 apartments on airbnb for Bangkok, I read many reviews and spent hours assessing the various options. It was to be a romantic few night for myself and husband. A week before departure unforseen circumstances prevented my husband for joining me. I relayed this to my hosts who assured me they would collect me from the airport, via email I was able to ask many questions relating to my ongoing journey now alone to which my host answered just like an expert concierge.  I arrived at the airport, my plane was delayed, however my host was waiting just where she said she would be. She assisted me to get a 'sim' card for my phone at the airport before leading me to the awaiting car where I meet my other host. The car was extremely clean, cool and luxurious, the trip was not long and the apartment as you see in the photos is exquisite. I was offered an evening meal, there was fresh juice, milk and cold water in the fridge, yummy fresh fruit also. Highest quality cotton sheets, truly a beautiful room with antique furniture, divine oil paintings and fresh flowers, the surrounding balcony has many green trees, vines and potted plants most mornings a little squirrel or two could be spotted in the trees or running along the balcony 'country in the city'. A coffee machine with lots of options, a breakfast menu also with many options. The breakfasts were beautiful presented and the hosts extremely approachable arranging train tickets to the north, safe van transport to the south and writing translations for late night taxi drivers. The apartment is within walking distance to MBK centre which is huge and has almost everything including many great restaurants/food outlets. Also walking distance to the art gallery, and BTS. The room is made up daily and washing returned ironed. I felt very spoilt, very safe and very refreshed waking up in such surrounding. I am sure there are other things I have forgotten to mention you must appreciate them for yourselves, you will not be disappointed the room looks just like the photos, the hosts 2 woman were on call literally, kind and more than helpful, the breeze on the second floor is seemed fresh as the home is not on a main road its tucked in a short side street, the shades of green are many from the outside balcony. I would defiantly recommend these hosts. 6 stars. A real pleasure.

This apartment is fantastic!  Tucked away in a quiet alley (that's actually easy to find once you know it's there) is a slice of paradise that is walking distance to Siam paragon, night markets, great food, and the BTS.  Out host was fantastic, leaving us little personal gifts every day and made snacks available if we happened to be home mid-afternoon.  We had a wonderful stay!

The host is so wonderful. She picked me up from where i was to her house and also provided me delicious breakfasts, information about the area and also the laundry services. The space also has a very nice cozy garden next to the bedroom. I had an amazing stay here and I can't say enough good things about the space and especially the host. I would recommend this place to everyone!

This stay was a delight from start to finish! We were picked up from the airport by our friendly and very helpful host, Khun Nong. She made us really feel at home in this beautifully furnished apartment. Access is up two floors via some nice wooden stairs, and once inside the feeling is of being in a charming home, with many nice touches from an experienced interior designer. The large kitchen / dining area is well equipped, including an excellent coffee machine. This leads into the living room / sleeping area, which is another very spacious and comfortable room. The building is a little old, which adds to the charm, as it allows a large balcony / terrace which increases the living area substantially.

The location is a few minutes walk from the nearest Skytrain station, and very close to a large Tesco/Lotus superstore. However we really didn't need to buy much food due to the generous stocks of provisions (bread, milk, coffee, fruit, etc) which Khun Nong kindly provided.

I would highly recommend this apartment to any couple seeking convenient, comfortable, spacious, charming and quirky accommodation in this area.

Lovely host and the space is very pretty. Host P Nong was very kind to allow us to set up a Airbnb Bangkok hosts dinner event in her house and to have her friends cook us very tasty dishes. P Nong provided us great hospitality and we all very appreciate it. Being a guest in P Nong house, you will get more than what you expected.. nice space, great people, delicious homemade breakfast every morning, free laundry service and free pickup service from the airport. Thank you very much for being a great host!

Nong est venue nous accueillir à l'aéroport avec toute la gentillesse dont elle fait preuve
le quartier est au centre de tout, les tchuk tchuk nous accompagnent comme nous le désirons,
le logement est très spacieux et très agréables, les attentions de Nong sont sans limites , du petit déjeuner au diner, en passant par la garde de notre chienne et l'accompagnement à l'hôpital le plus proche pour obtenir des médicaments ... nous nous sommes sentis chez nous et nous y reviendrons dès la fin du mois ..

Loved the location of the apartment,close to everything.
Apartment was as described, quite quirky and stylish,would stay here again if in Bangkok.
Good breakfast,fresh fruit every day.Coffee machine a bonus!
Did not see much of Nong but she did leave me the ingredients to make Pad Thai.Very nice touch, much appreciated.

Wonderful little apartment. Amazing bed and bathroom is very nice and clean.
The host is top... the girl at the flat were nice and a complementary pick up is much appreciated.
Well done...
Extraordinary experience in this house! If I come to Bangkok again someday , I will defiantly live in this fantastic house again.

The apartment was fantastic- spacious, nicely decorated, nice balconies with lots of plants, lovely wooden fittings, and the location was quite handy with supermarket, shopping malls and cinema nearby as well as easy to get to the tourist attractions by taxi. It is not far from the BTS. The pickup from the airport was much appreciated, as was the fruit, lovely breakfast, drinks in the fridge and a coffee machine! The girls at the place tidied up every day and helped us with laundry and getting a taxi to our next destination. Unfortunately we didn't get to see the host in person but we were in contact by email and she made sure we were well looked after. The only problem was we didn't want to leave! A great experience - would definitely come back.
Not a horrible place, but the picture of the bed is deceiving as it takes up the entire room.  Many other places nearby that give you much more for the same price.
many animals, cute dog
The price is right. The neighborhood is nice. Evan is nice.

The room was extremely open and nice, very clean as well,  with lots of windows. It was in a great location, easy to walk places and catch a taxi. Evan (and Kim) were awesome hosts who were very welcoming and gave great advice on local places to visit, eat, etc. I definitely would recommend staying here and already want to come back!

I arrived with Evan and was kind enough to take my big bag upstairs to the room. The room is exactly as it is in the photo excet there is a table that you cant see and the room is not much bigger than the Bed. The Bed is very comfortable I cant complain. There is no window so if this freaks you then... also take ear plugs because you can here the person in the room behind.  Personally I was cool with this room, it was clean and the facilities where clean. The neighborhood for the price is good. Its good to be so close to a great park (with massive Monitor Lizards) and the Lumphini Metro line is brilliant. the Metro and train system in Bangkok is not on every corner like in London or Paris so this is a bonus.  The building is a shop you take clothes to for mending and altering which i found useful also. Evan has 2 gorgeous dogs and was taking care of a tiny baby squirrel when i arrived.  Nice chap!

Evan is very friendly and helpful, the location of the apartment is so good to catch restaurants, bars, 7-11, and of course, the public transportation. It was a shame that i can only stay few hours there as i had to catch my flight in the very early morning, but it was very cheerful to talk to Evan!  Say hi to your lovely Huskies~~

It is a good place for such a price. Evan is a helpful person ad he advised us in many issues about bangkok and thailand in general. We got there with 2 bikes and it was not a problem to find a place for them at the site.
The best price in whole Bangkok!

It was great, the neighbourhood is exactly what we expected from Bangkok, and Evan's room are good. Spacious, very clean and nice looking. Plus, we booked for the tiny room in Evan house, but ended up in a really big one without even asking. Thanks a lot Evan!
A decent place for little money in the heart of Bangkok !

The building and the staff were really nice and friendly. The apartment was also nice, but nothing to do with the one on the photos. It is a service apartment, not a private house. Although the place was very clean, the bedsheets were old and dark, so they didn't give a very good feeling. The building has a nice and convenient Tuk Tuk service, and it is five minutes away from Sanam Pao BTS station.
Fantastic location and very nice apartment/hotel. We were even given a baby bed to use for our 2 year old. Fast communication and easy check in/check out!

Location is very convenient, as very close to BTS station. Apartment was clean. Beds were comfortable. Bathrooms were clean. Kitchenette was nice to have and furnished with enough utensils.
All in all, would definitely recommend to family and friends, and also would stay here again.
Great place to stay. Tuk tuk is provided as well for free to the closest BTS. Responsive receptionists.
great value

Suchada is an excellent host! She is so kind and hospitable. Any time we had questions or concerns, she was quick to answer and always had our best interest in mind. The apartment was clean and spacious. We bought groceries at Big C to make meals throughout the week. There were a few complimentary snacks and many bottled waters provided by the host when we arrived. We had peaceful rests each night-even daytime was peaceful. The shower water gets hot quick and soap, shampoo, and plenty of towels are provided. There’s always someone at the front desk to help with anything you need and even arrange the free tuk-tuk when you need it or a massage service at Sabaya (really excellent place, btw!). Just a tuk-tuk ride away to the BTS to get around or even use a taxi. It’s well lit at the entry and we felt safe during our stay. There’s even security cameras and a laundry room available for use. Take advantage of the pool, sauna, and steam rooms while here :) we would stay here again!

Appartement spacieux et très propre. La piscine top. Proche du BTS (métro). Navette gratuite jusqu’au métro. Possibilité de se faire livrer de la bonne funk food Thaï. Laverie à disposition. Excellent rapport qualité prix
很好的住宿，下次會再次入住
非常感谢patio 酒店很棒 有免费接驳车送我们去bts和市场 位置很不错 去哪个商场都很近房间很大 也很干净 可以做饭冰箱也可以用 空调也很好 水温水压都很棒 两个房间各有一个卫生间 主卧特别大 东南亚装修风格总之是物超所值的一套
My friends loved the place. Would recommend this place to everyone.
Room was nice and cheap. Evan met us and was very helpful.
Room was nice, clean, and quiet from traffic, which is something nice in BKK.  It's also a good location - not too touristy, easy to get a taxi, and in the center of wherever you want to be.
Room was ok, map needs improvement as its nowhere near the google map pin so a little frustrating
We stayed at Evan guesthouse 5 nights. The price is ok, the place is ok and evan is a nice person.
Bangkok est une ville très chaude et fourmillante, il faut trouver des petits coins de repos pour y survivre plusieurs jours, mais cette euphorie est enivrante et sympathique :)

nice and lively location ... near the metro station and easy access to the airport (via metro and train) The room is spacious, clean and there are plenty of bars around ...  last but not least ... nice people :)

Didn't enjoy our stay. The host wasn't interested in us being there and the room was not good. The bathroom was also disappointing and the electrics in the room and surrounding corridors are terrible and look dangerous!!

What you see is exactly what you get. We stayed in the room pictured in the profile. The bed is huge and comfortable. The AC a relief.

We didn't mind the shared bathrooms, which were every basic and could use a little paint. The toilets were western style which we appreciated.

Overall this guesthouse is simple but good for the price you pay.

The location is in a great little corner of Bangkok - a great mix of Thais, expats and fareng. Lots of restaurants that we really liked. Try Kenny's or Trajai for dinner (the later a little more pricy but great steaks!). There are many small Thai eateries tucked along the street, more affordable and delicious.

We also enjoyed the Thai massage places that are everywhere nearby. Namely Magic Hands was great.

If you want to relax head to nearby Lumphini Park where you can ride a boat or watch big lizards on the lawns.

good location, really quiet at night for sleeping or relax in a nice but caothic city as bangkok. see you soon my friend,.. ...

say hallo to the huskies...

I enjoyed my stay at Evan's hostel. Not too far from the Lumphini Station and far enough from the main road to be able to sleep well. Evan answered any questions I had and helped me with my laundry too. Cold a/c and relatively easy access to the rest of BKK make this hostel good for the independent traveler.

Evan is a great guy, extremely flexible and thoughtful. I arrived late at night and he was waiting for me at the door. Though I decided to find a bigger room, he was very accommodating and allowed me to change the reservation with minimal advance notice. The rooms are nice and worth what you pay for.
Very nice room, and Evan was very helpful, I recommand it !

Nice and spacious room, clean and sunny. Owner friendly and
helpfull . Good district, not so busy elsewhere there are nice bars very close.raccomended.
Evan is really friendly and his location is pretty central in BKK. I'd stay again.
Evan's place is well located, centrally but quiet. Liked Evan's quick and precise responsiveness about availability, how to get there and other sorts of how's, when's and why's.
Most air flight arriving in BKK are very late. Evan is very nice for midnight check-in.

We have very convenience times staying on the top floor of Evan's place. In the morning lots of sunshine to wake us up and it's useful in the daytime for me to dry up our stuffs. Evan and Kim are very understanding and helpful. They're kinda know what we need before we asked them. They are also genuinely fair with the accommodation and facilities rate.
Nice basic room in a lively area.  Evan is a very good host!

Great place to stay with tones of animals in the house. Good place for animal lovers but bad if you dont like animals. The 2 tame siberian huskies are roaming freely in the house, so for those who are allergic to dog fur etc should reconsider again... anyway, it is not exactly a busy tourist spot and a little bit hidden along the side streets, so you can rest quite well at night (without noises!)... good place for tourists/couples who want to chill and relax~ :)

We were generally very satisfied. Evan helped us a lot with our travel plans. The only little objections would be the shower which doesn’t look very nice and the room doesn`t look the same like on the pictures. However room is very spacious and everything looked quite clean which is important. We also  appreciated working AC and fridge in the room - great for Bangkok weather. I would also recommend for travel from airport to take public transport instead of taxi - it is faster during traffic peak, and cheaper. Thanks a lot.

Evan is a good and easy guy.
Was nice staying there. Thanks man!
See you again and good luck to you
and your 2 lovely Huskies!
Accommodation as described, near to Lumpini park and boxing stadium.

The guesthouse was a wonderful refuge during my stay in Bangkok. The neighborhood is lively during the day and peaceful at night. There are a variety of options to choose from if you're looking for food in the area and location-wise, it's easy enough to get anywhere using the Lumphini MRT station. If you're interested in Muay Thai, the stadium is incredibly close by.  The hosts are patient, helpful and kind. The two huskies as well as the menagerie of other pets were a pleasure to come home to. The room is spacious and clean. The shower and bathroom does the job. On the whole, I'd recommend the place to anyone.
The room is really clean and the huskies are adorable;)

GREAT STAY FOR WEEK, CLEAN ROOMS, NICE PEOPLE AND EVAN WAS FANTASTIC WITH HELP AND ADVICE. GOOD PLACE FOR THE MONEY, YES "THAI STYLE" BUT CLEAN AND COMFY.  I WOULD RECOMMEND IT AND WILL DEFINITELY RETURN.

Second time staying with Evan.

The stay was good, the place is basic, but definitely sufficient for your needs when travelling, especially when you set your expectations for what the price is.

Overall, I would recommend staying here if you are looking for a good local area that is not too touristy. The proximity to Lumpini Boxing Stadium (within walking distance) is good too if you are there during one of the show days. The street food along the main road is also very convenient in the morning and lunch times.
Thanks for staying from me and Tatiyana. I felt the rythm of big city. Owner is very friendly and tolerant. A lot of good Thai-food cafes and food-court near. Dogs are nice :)

Great value!
In terms of transports is a perfect place: walking distance to the tube.
Busses available too and very cheap!
I do travel by bus around the city...
You also get a good WiFi connection.

Evan and Kim just friendly and happy to help you at any time! :-)

It's me again! :-)
It is so lovely this location that I did decide to extend my stay...

This place was inoffensive and mediocre for the price compared to other places nearby. It's a fine place to stay if you're looking for a bed - clean, spacy and air-con. Ten minutes from the subway. 2 things: the directions given to arrive there are nonsense - there are much quicker routes on the subway and from the airport. The place is a nightmare to find because its road doesn't exist on most maps, including Google maps. And although the hosts were pleasant enough, they were not very helpful in terms of tips for places to eat, things to do, or where to go, and contrary to other reviews, did not express any interest in getting to know us or making our stay feel special. Also, this is a place with many rooms to let, not just one.

This place is fine as a place to stay - but think cheap motel, definitely not personal experience staying with friendly local people.
Good location.. Great apartment. Excellent host. Thank you!

Our hosts John and Bon were very nice and helpful. The apartment was clean and welcoming, situated on a quiet street 5 minutes away from the metro station. If you want to visit Bangkok you will find a good accommodation at Sanctuary House.
A great place to stay, secluded and very user-friendly: a wonderful bed, a great working table, fast Internet, a cosy kitchen. Thanks a lot!

Absolut empfehlenswert!
Großes Bett, sauber und relativ ruhig.
Eignet sich auch für längere Aufenthalte.
Lage ist perfekt, wenn man zur Botschaft (egal welcher) muss!
Netter Kontakt und sogar Lonelyplanet und Stadtkarten liegen bereit.
Vielen dank, ich würde wieder kommen!

I stayed here for a month during March 2014, with my cat, and I highly recommend Sanctuary House. It's quiet, well-kept, and comfortable. The bed was big and soft, the cable TV and wireless internet were clear and fast, and the air conditioning was super cold when I needed it that way. Everything is managed to a standard that westerners have come to expect. They provide information on local shops and restaurants, so it's easy to get a good breakfast or pizza or steak...or a simple thai meal, if you want to eat like a local. The Lumpini MRT (subway) station is about a 10 minute walk (mostly in the shade, not in direct sunlight), so it's easy to get around the city from this location, too. If you prefer to take a taxi, you can take a bi-lingual map and simply hand it to the taxi driver, and you'll never have problems getting back home after a long night out on the town. A clothes washer is provided (free of charge) on the roof, with enough clothesline and clips to dry everything you have. This place was clean, safe and comfortable. If you're thinking about staying here but have questions, send a message to the owner. They were responsive and knowledgable, and I have nothing but good things to say about my stay.

Had a great experience here, Bon always replied quickly to any questions I had before arriving and was there waiting for us even though we got there very late at night. Extremely helpful and nice.
The room was nice and quaint, the A/C worked great (and was greatly needed) and the bed firm and clean with several nice food options near by. Great experience overall.

Great apartment in a very safe area. Meet all my basic needs and very clean. 15 minutes (slow) walk to either Lumpini or Klong Toei MRT stations where fast, super cooled trains will whisk you to either a close BTS skytrain station or many other places. There is a handy 7-11 store on the corner. For the price, highly recommended.
The manager of the apartments (there are a few in the building) is friendly and very helpful.

The location had an awesome local feel yet was very accessible and close to the centre with cabs and scooter taxis at its door step. Room was great service was great... Great host also and they let me check out late which meant I could get 1more day out!! Awesome :) Definitely recommend this place and these guys

My hosts John and Bon were great. I was arriving on the late night flight and they were willing to meet me late at night but even better they were willing to allow my friend who was already in Bangkok do the checkin. Both John and Bon were quick to respond to emails and they even allowed us to stay an extra day. The only difference between the pictures and my actual apartment was that my Apartment had an upgraded TV from the picture. Overall the apartment was great. It was very quiet and I would stay here again. I never used public transit, because I could take a taxi almost anywhere in Bangkok for under $3.00 US.

As has been confirmed by other reviewers Sanctuary House has nice quiet apartments in a central, interesting neighbourhood of Bangkok with good close-by options for shopping for food, sampling the famous street food and eating out, catering for any kind of budget. It’s not too far from the underground on foot, the apartment and house are clean and there’s everything you need, a kitchen, free wifi and a washing machine (also for free) on the rooftop make staying there very convenient. Manager Bon was always very friendly and helpful, before and during our stay. The only slight disappointment for us revolved around electricity. I’d asked beforehand for ballpark figures and was told around $30-50 per month, depending on use of course. Having arrived we asked about the price per unit as we had heard that the electrical company apparently charges 4 baht per unit - and so does the next Airbnb landlord we’ve moved to in a different neighbourhood of Bangkok by the way -  but that some landlords charge more than the actual cost for electricity, up to 8 Baht per unit. We didn’t really get a clear answer at the time. When the final bill arrived we were charged 9 baht per unit, which added up to around $50 per month although we had been relatively careful, only using the air con for less than an hour on average each day. Not a massive issue but worth keeping in mind if you are staying for longer and have to watch your pennies. Overall we certainly did enjoy our stay.

I stayed at this condo for 6 nights with my family and it was a wonderful experience. The unit is nicely decor, with great view to the river. For an adult, it was not too far a walking distance to either the pier or the Skytrain station, but if you have 2 kids liked I did, it was quite a struggle. The owner did not provide any shampoo, soap, toothpaste, or any personal amenities, so bring your own or you can buy it at the downstairs supermarket. As mentioned before, the location is not ideal for travelers with kids because there is some walking distance to public transportation.  The property itself is very nice, and well maintain. There are limited restaurants within walking distance, and the streets are really not built for walking, especially with young kids. The property manager was very nice, she went to the airport trying to pick us up but my flight arrived an hour earlier, so we missed each other. I gave her an "A" for effort. The owner was very responsive, offering help as soon as possible, and emails was replied immediately. If you preferred this side of the river, this property will not disappoint you.

This place is AMAZING!!! We stayed for 10 days it was simply a slice of heaven. After a hot long day its a perfect quality retreat high above the bustle of Bangkok. From the hospitable HOSTS Donald & Kenn, their very comprehensive communication, to their lovely warm efficient Caretaker Mas, to the wonderful accommodating friendly apartment security and staff - our expectations of reception and care were well exceeded. TRANSPORT is EASY. I don't know why the other review from 'Clement' addresses disdain in regard to kids, I would rather like to suggest that kids need the exercise (!) or pack a pram (?) it really is only an easy 7 minute walk to the skytrain (we timed it!) accessed through the small laneway that runs along the side of the building. particularly on lazy days for less than $2 jump in a taxi right outside, takes you to the skytrain. the walkways around are all paved, just take care in general crossing roads or use the foot bridges. walking to the river is easy again, exercise is good! you get to take in the curiosities this whole city is teeming with, dont come to thailand and be an ignorant tourist. Common sense will get you far! we caught a taxi across to the pier (cost $3) and jumped on a free river boat to the new Asiatique where that ferriswheel is. highly recommend visiting! it shuts at midnight. some quality stalls and awesome restaurants. picked up some great spoils there. $8 taxi will get you across town in any direction. APARTMENT was a home away from home. Infact probably better than home! :) Comfortable, convenient, modern, quality, stylish, clean - like a hotel but much more spacious and without the tourists Toiletries were provided, soap, shampoo and shower gel etc. The kitchen was well loved, a true chefs kitchen with sharp knives! I was impressed, it begged to be cooked in! theres a 24hour convenience mini supermarket for all the basics. and for the midnight snacks or cold drinks is handy! FOOD is everywhere, the recommendations from the hosts were perfect, also across the road a few minutes walk down toward the hilton, there is a laneway (where the school is) where a regular fruit stall operates daily, delicious fresh fruit, mango, watermelon, thai pears, pineapple, all cut on the spot, so convienient. next to them is another guilty pleasure, mega tasty thai style donuts. mon-fri at 4pm they are there. food is so affordable! there are some quality small authentic thai restaurants and street food in short walking distance. general rule of thumb for food: fresh is best. OVERALL a brilliant beautiful space with all the conveniences. Thank you for welcoming us into your home D & K! We downloaded a few movies over the wifi and kicked back at the end of the day and watched on that awesome TV on that very comfy couch!Your place will be missed! will be back without a doubt. MUCH LOVE

Une de nos plus belle halte dans notre voyage autour du monde...l'appartement est superbe, la vue époustouflante, les fournitures, décorations, électroménagers, sont parfaits...un moment de délice et de grand luxe dans notre beau périple...merci Donald

Hi, we were five adults staying during four days in this condominium. It is well located and closed to subway. Donald and Mas have been very kind in preparing our journey and very professional. We could check in earlier than planned and do also late check out. Their suggestions for visits, restaurants, etc. are very useful! The flat is great and large enough for five people. You have a marvellous river sight from the flat! Definitely a place to be recommended to my best friends!

A Delightful Week in Bangkok!

My best stay ever in the city of angels. Awesome is the word to describe this luxurious apartment. Imagine living a two stories penthouse lifestyle on the 30th floor of a building where the views all around are breath taking, imagine having your own roof top to enjoy a cocktail and create images of Bangkok at night, imagine all this in a finely decorated and perfectly equipped residence.

The location is ideal, just 30 minutes away from the center of town by sky train. We are grateful for the many enjoyable moments, for the useful information provided, for the assistance of Miss Mas, for letting us live a one-week city vacation! If you wonder, don’t hesitate, go ahead and live this fantasy.

Thanks Donald for sharing your amazing place on airbnb…
Definitely our new way to travel!

This is an awesome place in Bangkok! Everything perfect in this flat. Miss Mas and Donald were very responsive and always helped us out if there was a problem!
The only negative point have been the neighbours of the flat as they are very sensitive to noise, which made it hard to listen to our music on Donald's amazing musicsystem.

Donald's apartment is really nicely decorated. He has certainly put in alot of effort to ensure you get whatever you need when you stay in his apartment.

Assure that you get one of the nicest view around in Bangkok
Really good place to stay...especially for small group of 4-5 people!

L'appartement est vraiment très agréable, bien équipé, très confortable et avec une vue extraordinaire sur la ville. Le condo est également très bien situé, desservi par le métro aérien et par les bateaux à proximité pour rejoindre le quartier historique rapidement. L'accueil sur place a été très chaleureux et très arrangeant. En outre, les propriétaires ont préparé un document très appréciable avec de nombreuses informations précieuses sur le quartier et Bangkok. Nous recommandons vivement ce logement et nous y retournerons avec plaisir si nous en avons l'occasion.
We had a fantastic stay in the apartment. A great space with fabulous views and everything we needed.

We stayed in room 8 at Evan's B&B.  The flat was spacious, clean and had AC!  Overall, we had a great stay.  The location is quite close to the train station (less than 100 baht taxi ride) and close to lots of local eats.  Love the two huskies they have who are always hanging around the lobby!
Super location/area, clean room and very kind host! We enjoyed our stay!

We stayed here for 4 days (and returned later again).
The apartment we got is really nice. A/C, FAN, cable TV, great Internet speed. Neighborhood is also nice (very quiet so good sleep is guarantied). We asked for blankets/towels and we got them (you have to ask in advance).
Evan is also a great host, he helped us with advice about everything we needed.

Note to budget travelers: Between this street and 7-eleven store, there is a small restaurant (with accommodation) where the food is really nice and really cheap compared to other restaurants we checked. You can find a decent meals for 35/50/70 (and more) BAHT.... In the same entrance is a hair dresser

My husband and I stayed in this room for 3 nights. Evan described the room and area exactly how it is!

The room and bathroom are very very clean! The shower was nice and warm. The bed is a bit hard, but I guess that is according to personal preference. The room has a fridge, towels and two bottles of water. The room is pretty quiet. There is not really a common area, so it's not a place to meet other travellers. Evan replies to emails very fast and friendly and is happy to help out if you have questions.

The area is very nice - a very nice alternative the overcrowded Khaosan Road. It's not a neighborhood to go partying, but it has some very good Thai and Western restaurants, it's next to a park and the subway so very conveniently located. If you want to have an amazing Western breakfast, head to The Corner or Hansaah nearby.
Great place to stay in Bangkok - good host, convenient location and still quiet at night. I recommend.

Looked for a way to stay in a more Thai neighbourhood and environment, rather than in a luxury hotel away from the Thai people.
Stayed in this room for 4 weeks, and the room is exactly as descibed and pictured. There really was nothing to complain about and Evan is wonderfully helpful.
A/C (yes, with remote control) , bathroom and shower are well functioning and as described.
Laundry service is abundantly available for just a few dollars.
Toward the end of my stay, I wanted to stay in a more luxurious environment, but that is my desire changing.
Nearby is a great restaurant (Hansaah) serving western (French) breakfast. Many people, including myself, have a difficult time to adjust to Thai style breakfast. Next door is an Italian restaurant (Lido) serving excellent dishes, when I needed "comfort" homestyle cooking. There are many other restaurants, go try them all.
Thanks, Evan for the wonderful experience.

Clean and simple room for the budget conscious traveller who doesn't care about frills. Closest subway station is Lumpini (~12 minute walk). Lots of massage parlors close by.
Evan was very accommodating and let me check in early. He shared tips on what areas of Bangkok to see and which ones to avoid. When I was checking out he let me store my bags in his office area during the day.
I wish him luck with everything.

The room is clean and comfortable, spacious and has a small outside seating area with a fridge. It is basic but has everything you need and the bathroom is ensuite. The location is 15 minutes' walk from Lumphini MTR station (not super convenient for the touristy area by the river but convenient for getting round Bangkok in general) and there are a few restaurants nearby (mostly western), massage parlours and places that provide cheap laundry services. Evan was a pleasant host and we enjoyed our stay, thank you!

The room and amenities were great! The bed was big, there is closet space, a TV with one channel, air conditioning and a nice-sized bathroom with a refrigerator. Also, Evan was a big help and a really nice guy.

Evans place was great! If you are looking for cheap, clean, friendly, and centrally located to almost everything then you should stay at Evans. There are many tourist around so it is easy to make friends. Next time we are in Bangkok we will no doubt stay there.

I booked this apartment for getting rest during last 4days of my journey. It was a great choice. I invited my new friends and spend a great time. If u stay this apartment including weekend, u can go chattuchak weekend market by apartment private van. I think this apartment is much much better than hotels in same price. Actually, better than hotels that are much more expensive. I recommend u travelers this great place!
It was my pleasure to stay ur residence. There was a fitness room at the same floor. Also, it was good that I could buy some food at tesco lotus near this residence.
Nothing more to say than: the best place you can stay in Bangkok. Host is perfect, room is perfect, interior is great, stunning view at the balcony and pool. Clean and lovely apartement.

Enjoyed my stay at Nokiko's place for 5 days. The condo is very beautiful and comfy with the most amazing view of Bangkok on the 23rd floor. Much better than staying in a hotel. It is also very convenient. Tesco Lotus supermarket is just next to our condo, Central was just opposite tesco lotus. Union Mall and the MRT is also a walking distance from the condo. I will definetely stay at Nokiko's place again during my next visit to BKK.

Nice & newly build apartment, comfort, great view, clean, and is an ikea furnished home. Location is good. Tesco Lotus Just 5 minutes walk, Central Lad Phrao 10 minutes walk. MRT a bit far need 20 minutes walk. Overall is ok. Food is really not a problem. You can find the food stall in shopping mall or can even try street food near Tesco or Central Lad Pharo. If you carrying big luggage, you might need ask the help of the host to book a taxi for you.Cause the lobby receptionist don't speak English. Otherwise you just walk to the Tesco Main Road and wave a taxi. Definitely will stay again on my next trip to bangkok.

Nokiko's apartment is a great place to stay in Bangkok. It's well decorated. I really feel like to be at home. The rooftop pool is perfect after a discovery day. Very close to big supermarket and malls, but also to delicious street food.
A little bite far from city center but with the MRT it's easy.
Nokiko is very helpful and easy to contact.
I will definitely recommend Nokiko's place.

Nokiko was a very kind, friendly host. The apartment was very cosy and nice. I felt like it was my home once I stepped into it. Everything felt new and clean. The "Ikea" decor was cool and well thought out by Nokiko. I am looking forward to my next stay there.

sorry reply for comment ... i stay at 9 days for there. Nikko is apartment is a great place and Very close to big supermarket and malls.Room is perfect, interior is great, stunning view at the balcony and pool. further i will come again .

Nokiko is very nice and helpful that she patiently answered all our questions. The apartment is very comfortable and there are a lot of facilities we can enjoy in the condominium. The view from the apartment balcony is fantastic. We enjoy the stay at the apartment very much!

Nokiko is prepared that everything you need in living. So apartment is very comfortable and condominium is very good place. Tesco(super market ATM, massage shop too), Mtb,bts(subway,trail) cinema complex and shopping-mall(bookstore too) And garden is very good jogging course.
^^

What a wonderful stay we had!  Thank you so much Bee and Pimone, for making us feel so welcome!  We were the first to stay in this particular condo.... 8 minute walk to the train and down down the street from several markets.  Pimone spent an afternoon showing us the ropes of the local markets and Even took us to one of his favorite places to eat in the the market.  On top of that, we were waiting on our international travel phone to be delivered and it never was- but Pimone saved the day! After our departure from Bangkok we headed here to Hua Hin, Pimone got a notice of our phone delivery and picked it up for us!!  These hosts go above and beyond the call of duty and we are forever grateful of their generosity and experience they provided for us!  Highly recommended  by Steven and Alexis!!  Thank you!
Cozy staff, comfortable apartment and nice design. Recommended :)

We stayed at Bee's place just one night, it was short but great! Her flat is not only clean but also very well furnished and convenient (7-11 shop just around the corner).
The pool is just amazing, we had a bath at night and it was a great experience!
Bee was very helpful she sent us everything we needed before our trip. Her father was really kind, he arranged pretty much everything for us to get back to the airport on time and was full of great advices to visit Bangkok.
We definitely recommend this place.

I feel so lucky that we found this place!!! It's clean, it has everything you need even travel guide books, great internet connection, friendly neighbourhood.  There's an amazing local noodle soup place just around the corner, and it's only walking distance to the Saphan Taksin BTS station. Last but not least, Bee and her father Pimon are definitely one of the most considerate hosts We've ever met!! Hope to see you again!!!

I had a wonderful stay at Bee's condo in Bangkok. It was easy to get to from the Airport ,very clean and functional. Bee's father who received me is fantastic and very helpful. I strongly recommend this place and I would stay here again if possible.

Bee was a fantastic host. Her father picked us up from the airport and gave us a quick tour of the neighborhood and the apartment. The studio apartment was beautiful and well furnished. It even came with fresh fruit, water, several DVDs, and guidebooks. She answered any questions we had very quickly and both her and her father were incredibly knowledgeable.

I would highly recommend staying with Bee. Her apartment was one of the nicest experiences I have ever had on air BnB.

Bee's flat was fantastic! It was in a great location (short walk to both the Skytrain and River boat terminal) and had everything you could need (the swimming pool was awesome after a long day out in the Bangkok sun!). It was very comfortable and we really enjoyed feeling like we were experiencing the 'real' Bangkok, as opposed to staying in a big secluded hotel/resort. Plenty of nice cafes and restaurants around, and both Bee and her dad were lovely and incredibly helpful with any questions or queries we had. It was very easy to get to from BKK airport via the Airport train/Skytrain), and Bee's dad drove us to DMK airport on our departure (much easier than trying to get a taxi!). Would definitely stay here again on my next visit to Bangkok!

We had a fantastic stay at this studio apartment. The studio is as it appears in the photos, the location is great, easy walk to transport, lots of great food available right outside.
We enjoyed using the pool to cool off and the gym equipment is reasonable. The bed is so comfortable, shower is hot and kitchen is functional for what you need.
We used the laundry place on the ground floor and the clothes returned to us beautifully.
Finally Pimon is such a kind hearted person, he took us to a great restaurant and organised the taxi for our departure. Bee was always available by message to assist us and checked in that we were ok.
When we return to Bangkok this is where we will stay.
Thank you Bee and Pimon.
Polecam. Doskonała lokalizacja. Mieszkanie bardzo czyste i dobrze wyposażone. (Meble i sprzęty zgodnie z opisem). Bardzo mili i pomocni działający na miejscu  rodzice właścicielki mieszkania.

It was great to stay at Bee's apartment at Sathorn... relatively easy to get taxis and a nice walk to the Saphan Taksin BTS. Apartment was comfy and suitably equipped ! Being away from the protest areas is always wonderful but if u want excitement, just about 5 BTS stops away will get u near the action!
Great to meet Khun Pimon, Bee's dad.... kind n gentle man... big thumbs up!

Huge apartment, 3 bedrooms as promised = furnished with Queen/King size bed in each room.

There are essential amenities such as water heater, fridge, oven, stove, dish washer, washing machines and air-conditioned.

Bee and Benjamin are incredibly helpful host, helping me as much as they could, they really made it easy for me to navigate around the neighbourhood.

Keep up the good work!!
The apartment was fantastic. Very friendly host and spacious apartment. Would recommend families and big groups. Walking distance to Chit Lom BTS Station too.

Communication with Benjamin was clear and swift. The flat was easy to find. We were very well received by the reception staff. The space is enormous and very well lit. We appreciated the full kitchen as well. Benjamin was very accomodating in affording us a late checkout. We'll definitely be back!

Benjamin's apartment is really big and clean and comfortable, the location is great, you can walk to the BTS station Chit Lom, and about 15 minute walking to the Central World and Siem. My friends and I spend a great time in Bangkok while stay in Benjamin's apartment, I will recommended this apartment to all my friends and I will come again when I go to Bangkok next time.

The apartment was very lovely and spacious. Everything was working fine and the beds and linen were really comfortable.
It is about 10 minutes walk from 2 BTS stations so it is convenient to say the least.
The staff in the lobby also kindly provided us with take out menus and a little sheet of paper with the address written in English and Thai.
All in all, the stay was very much a pleasure.

The Ton Son residence is really well placed in Bangkok, the flat was really spatious and clean. The staff was really helpful and available to help. Unfortunately even if the apartment was equiped with several bathroom and a kitchen, it was also totally empty from basic equipment : no sponge, no broom, no salt and pepper / oil or any basics to cool. As traveling with two kids it's complicated and we had to buy all that for just 4 days.

Benjamin's Tonson Residence was a great home for us to explore BKK from for a few days. Benjamin was out of the country while we were there, so we didn't get to meet him in person, but his hotel staff were very accommodating and friendly and he was very responsive to our questions via email. Tonson Residence is in a great location, close to Lumpini Park with good places to eat a quick walk away and public transport close by. The ongoing construction is loud, but Benjamin put us in a room furthest from it so it was never a disturbance to us. His rooms are a great value for the money - tons of space and all the basics you need.

Bee, who answered all of our emails before we arrived at Tonson Residence & also works at Tonson Residence, went out of her way to help us during our stay. The other staff members were also very helpful.

The apartment shown in the pictures was not the apartment we were given. The apartment we were in was fine, big & clean but it was just a little bit weird i.e no pots, pans or utensils in a big kitchen, no tea towels, no hand towels, basically the bare minimum of everything. We had to ask for a lot of stuff & the kitchen had nothing in it, i.e no salt, pepper, oil, sugar etc so if you wanted to cook, which we did with small kids, it was just a bit tricky.

The location was good, close to Lang Suan Road & not too far from the Sky train & Villa Supermarket. There is a great Monday-Friday lunch market further down Soi Ton Son Too
Its a really nice apartment, very good location and quite big space. Me and my family had a good time there, best choice~
This apartment is a lot larger than the picture suggests. Lits of places to eat in close proximity. Stay was great. Tgnx

집크고 3층임 좋음. 1층에 화장실 1개, 주방, 조금한 거실 2층에 방하나 화장실 1개 3층에 방 2개 화장실 1개. 남자 4명가서 놀았는데 방음도 잘되고 재밌었음. 위치도 나름 나쁘지 않음. 택시도 길건너서 타면 나름 잘 잡힘. 딱히 안좋은점이 있다면 3층 수압이 약한거?ㅋㅋ 아 옆에 오후 3시까지하는 누들집 있는데 방콕 길거리 음식 체험하기 좋음. 입맛에 맞아서 매일 아침마다 먹음ㅋㅋ

The three storey house is so beautiful and so warm and with all kinds of equipment. It’s not far from the city center，so it’s quite convenient. After all day having fun outside,it gave us a feeling of being home. And of course ,the host is very nice. We love it very much!!!
Es ist sauber, sehr gepflegt und die Klimaanlage funktioniert top! Alles wie angekündigt, wir waren eine große Runde - 6 Leute und VeeZaa war SEHR hilfsbereit und bemüht.

Veeza's place is highly recommended. A very affordable price for quality accommodations.

The spacious house has three well-furnished floors, enough for our group of 10 to have a comfortable 3-night stay. It is a home away from home since you have access to various amenities - TV, Blu-ray player, big ref, laundry, dryer, microwave, toaster, water heater, a 6-seater dining table, and fully air-conditioned rooms, including the living room. Veeza even prepared complimentary water, coffee, and tea for our group's use.

Location-wise, Veeza's house is very accessible to public transport. Hailing a cab can be done a few steps away from the entrance. There's also a bus-stop a few meters away but we didn't get to ride one. In term's of dining choices, you have easy access to restaurants, a few street food stalls, and a convenience store. I recommend the small food shop right beside the house for authentic, affordable, yet savory meals. You can't miss it! Too bad the shop's closed on sundays.

To top it all of, Veeza was very accommodating to our group even before we arrived. He patiently replied to all our questions and gave clear instructions how to get to his house from the airport. He even suggested the best place to have your money exchanged, and from my research, it really was. Saved our group a few hundred baht as a whole.

A memorable Bangkok trip for our group partly due to Veeza's hospital house. Again, a highly recommended listing when you're in Bangkok. To my fellow Filipinos, "sulit na sulit talaga ito!"

An excellent house in an amazing city! Our stay in the WOW house was great, it is so much nicer after a long day visiting the sites coming back to a very comfortable home.
The house is fully equipped and VeeZa was kind enough to leave tea and coffee, plus fresh clean towels. You really don't need to take much luggage to Thailand, as the clothes are cheap and you can use the washing machine and tumble dryer in the house.
Great location, most of the taxi drivers knew the area and if they didn't, we showed them on a map. (plus VeeZa provided some instructions in Thai for us to show any driver). Will definitely return in the future.
Many thanks

WOW house was great. In a quiet but very safe neighbourhood next to the royal palace and the zoo, with some great street food next door too. Host was very attentive to all our needs and made sure everything was fixed straightaway.

first of all, the house was very clean and tidy, enough beds for our go if 7 people, the washing machines is very nice , we can wash our wet clothes after we wear it in pattaya, it really give a big hand for us.
mr. VeeZa has been very great during the whole 4days no matter what problem, u can contact him.immediately by whatsapp. when we first getin the house,mr veeza has teach us how to use the facility of the house and kindly wirte down the address which helps us a lot when we find taxi to go home, also, during the 4days mr.veeza has been keep chatting our siuation , ask if every being ok. It really warm action.
the house place as a convenient place which near the bts station, but here is a little tips if you went bk with the group i stronly recommend you guys take the taxi rather than bts. cuz i was supeised buy the taxi price which charge me for 71b to jj market from the house , and it really fast. or others place like Saim Paragron.
thank you for mr.veeza take care and hope that we will not make messy for u and your wife.
Great place to stay with a group of any size and the host is extremely responsive and helpful!

Host is excellent and explained properly on how to go to the place. Even write the address in Thai just incase the taxi dont understand what you said in english.

Place overall is in good condition and also was well furnished. Everything seems so new! For those that want to rent this place, do go ahead! The place makes you feel homely and very comfortable.

Will certainly go to the same apartment again when I am in Bangkok.

Photos on airbnb really 100% shows the real thing so what you see is what you get.

If there are any questions regarding the house or if you need to go anywhere, you can even ask host and he will reply quite fast. Please be considerate too if it is not that important. Host also have a life besides attending to you and also you can always access the internet to do your own research.

Veeza was really really nice! There are 10 peoples in my group and we have the same thought with the house: AMAZING & AWESOME!! I really recommended you this place to stay.
First, house. The house is really beautiful (same as photos), have a lot facilities that will make you easy (washing machine, dry (very usefull! We don't have to bring dirty clothes anymore) They also have rice cooker, toaster, refrigerator, we had cook some food because the house even have pan, plates and many many coffee+sugar+creamer+tea. We are really surprise to found the house prepare some water+red bull+ramen etc in their refrigerator. (We thought that we will be pay for that but no, thats all for us). Very clean. The house is really really good!
Second, location. Location is good. Quite neighborhood in a great location. Taxi and tuk tuk everywhere. And close to every place. 7-eleven, even traditional market; (5-10 minutes from house) and some halal food. Security and safe place because it's close to king palace (we rent a van during our touring and our van driver said this is a very safe place in Bangkok).
Third, the owner (Veeza). Veeza is really really nice. My friends and i really thank you to veeza. We planned to check out in 19 august and then move to another hotel but due to bom my friends are a little bit afraid to stay in hotel and decide to stay one more day in the house. Veeza agreed and ask us if we're okay or not and we keep making contact via whatsapp. He even helping us found taxi to airport. He is respon our questions really quickly and describe it really well (like how to find halal food, market, how much taxi cost to JJ market etc etc), friendly, helpful, nice, nice and nice. We love you Veeza!
Fourth, check in and check out. Very easy and flexible. We can check in & check out anytime we want. And the last, peoples living around the house was also friendly. When we are waiting for taxi they came to us and helping us describe the place that we wanted to go in thai and have taxi meters for us (because some taxi drivers in thailand can't speak english and some drivers don't want use taxi meters for tourist).
After all, this is a AWESOME place to stay. I'd recommend this house for sure! Thank you to make us feel homey and comfortable. If we come back to bangkok we will definitely stay in this house. Better than any hotels. 6-stars, 10 thumbs!

Check in was pretty fast. Apartment is as described on Airbnb. Furnitures are well maintained. Clean and very spacious accommodation. Really worth it considering the rate charged by owner. Location is quite convienient. It is near bts and taxi stand.
The Room is VERY BIG! The location is okay n easy to find. Overall it was great. Me n my friends enjoy very much. Thank you for making our trip more memorable:)
Great apartment.  Very large and spacious.
Ben's apartment is spacious, tidy and perfect for big family. Excellent location which is very close to shopping area and restaurants.  Recommend to all visitors.

My family and I have a great staycation in Tonson residence. The staff is really accommodative and fast response time. Most of the taxi in Bangkok know the location so I do not need to explain too much. If given to score Tonson residence, I will give a 9 out of 10 because the walking distance to BTS is really quite a distance away.

Thank you for our stay. The apartment was HUGE and clean. Checking in was easy
Clean towels and bed sheets were all provided
Highly recommended and will use again for sure

This apartment was just what we were looking for! We were traveling with a party of 8 people, and although there were only 4 rooms, the host did not hesitate to fulfill our request of adding 2 extra beds at no additional charge. The staff were always accommodating to all of our requests. We were even allowed to check out pretty late on the last day since some of our flights did not depart until the evening. The only minor inconvenience was getting to the train. The trek to the closest train station was a good 10-15 minute walk, but there were always taxis available a block or two away from the apartment. We always had a little bit of trouble getting the cab drivers to know exactly where Tonson Residence was located, but once we got them to go to Lang Suan street (they all knew where that was), it was easy to give them directions from there.
The e- mail service was prompt and correspondence with Bee was simple. We met Bee and she was lovely. The rest of the staff were very professional too.

The listing was 100% true to pictures. Extremely huge living space for 8 pax. Love the house. However, building is quite far from BTS. Walked about 10-15min out to main road. But as we have 7pax, we often took taxi, so it wasnt really a issue. Overall, I would recommend the place if u have a big group!

Host was contactable and helpful. The unit is much much bigger than expected! Nice 4 bedders all with attached toilet.

Toiletries are refillable upon request. Very well maintain and we had a blast staying there.

Only downside is that the place is a little bit of a walk to the BTS - approx 10 mins.

We had a delightful stay at Sitara place and will make it our regular place when visiting Bangkok in the future.
The room was clean, well furnished and comfortable. The staff were friendly and helpful and the local area had some great food (especially Saladburi - we are there 4 times!)
Thank you to Sunil and the team at Sitara Place
Comfortable, clean and pleasant stay. A little bit of a walk from MRT, but good value for money.

Sitara Place was the perfect place for my stay while I was 3.5 weeks in Bangkok. Sunil and the staff at Sitara were very welcoming, helpful and always on hand to assist. The building is well secured and apartment was well spaced, comfortable & cleaned daily well maintained. Bottles of water was provided in the room each day which was a nice touch . The  location is ideal and only a 10min walk to the local shopping precinct and MRT subway Or there is a complimentary tuk tuk from Sitara to take you there. Staying at Sitara , gave me the opportunity to experience living in a Bangkok neighbourhood with easy access to where you need to go and also a nice quiet area as well. I highly recommend staying here when visiting Bangkok - Thank you Sunil .
酒店型公寓，苹果地图定位不对，打电话联系房东，他特地出来接我们，公寓在巷子里面。公寓还提供矿泉水、筷碗碟、电水壶、微波炉、冰箱等。靠近中国大使馆，附近有几家711，走十多分钟有中国银行Band of China 、公交站、购物中心central plaza、地铁站Phra Ram 9。最近的机场快线是Makkasan站，要坐地铁到phetchaburi站或坐公交过去。
Good location and reasonable price. The manager respond fast whatever I ask.

I had a good stay in an area I am familiar with.  All facilities are available in this well run family owned block. Free tuk tuk to the station is great when checking out with luggage. Not much flexibility when I wanted to change dates but otherwise great. Would stay again.
good condo！
i hurt my back and couldent move, they carry me to taxi and helped me to get back home.... thank you
A great place to stay.Big clean rooms many places to eat in a really good area
Great place. Great value.

I stayed in this apartment for a month and absolutely loved it! You will not find a better price for the location, and the apartment has all the amenities you could ask for in Bangkok! Close to a ferry, the BTS, and great shopping, I was easily able to explore the city and all it had to offer. Honestly, I absolutely fell in love with the place and was heartbroken to leave it!

As a host, Sujira was prompt and accommodating and made everything easy! She was a joy to work with and I was very grateful she let me enjoy her place during my stay in Bangkok.

The host, Sujira, made everything easy.  The listing is accurate and the flat is outstanding (great location, only a ten-minute walk to the Sappan Thaksin BTS Skytrain station, which one can use to connect to both the underground rail line in BKK--the MRT--and also, of course, to the other Skytrain line in BKK).  The wi-fi in Station 2 condominium, in this building, works in the lobby for the Station2 wi-fi connection (does not work in the flat).  Both gyms are adequate and the pool is excellent.  All in all, thanks to the help of Sujira, staying here was a great deal and I highly recommend it.  It's also close to two riverboat docks, and you can take a riverboat from Sappan Taksin dock all the way to Nonthaburi, should you want to see the temples of Bangkok and Thonburi from the water.  Long life and blue skies, Mike Tucker
sujira  made me  feel  very  welcome  before i  even  got to  bangkok. her  directions  were  spot  on and the  description of the  apartment  was  just  right.
Fantastic.    Loved it , I highly recommend staying here.  Quiet , cosy and homely. The host Sujira  was super helpful and friendly.   All the other positive reviews left are all true! Stay here !

Отличная квартира для длительного и краткосрочного проживания. Чистая, удобное месторасположение рядом с метро (7-8 минут пешком). В квартире есть всё необходимое для проживания и всё это работает. С балкона 15-го этажа потрясающий вид на центр Бангкока!!! При заселение меня встретили и всё показали и в дальнейшем помогали консультациями и рекомендациями.

Location,Location,Location
Cute little condo in the vibrant city for the right price.
Short walk to BTS skytrain system dont forget to buy Rabbit Card would take you anywhere on Skytrain System grab free map at station.
Right behind BTS is Chao Praya ferry , boats would take you to most attractions, you can get daily pass or pay per trip.
7 min walk from condo to Starbucks located in Chatrium Residences
20 min walk to Asiatique to Cabaret Calypso to see famous Ladyboys in Excellent Show .
17 min walk to Lebua Tower to Sky Bar on 64-th floor must dress up for priceless view and expensive drinks.
Anywhere you go it seems close, short trips to Shopping Malls.
I really enjoyed the stay in the City of Angels.
There was no problem to communicate with Sujira, she always respond right away.
Thank you Sujira

Sujira's place was absolutely amazing and even though we never met Sujira, she helped us a lot making our stay perfect. Her apartment is just a short walk from the sky train and the river boats, which makes it easy to get around in Bangkok from her place.

I totally recommend it!!
Just like you read in the previous reviews below, well connected (central pier, bts, Charoenkrung rd, shopping at Robinson, street food area, 7 eleven, etc) and in the coziest and quiet studio with all the trimmings at an unbeatable price!!! Not to mention the friendly host...
Thank you Sujira! See you next time in Bkk!!

De comunicatie met Sujira was vlot ,zij bracht U duidelijk op de hoogte van de regels en de omgeving waar het appartement is gelegen.
Het appartement is nieuw en zeer verzorgd en goed onderhouden.
Het is zeer aangenaam om er te verblijven.Je zit er ook midden in Bangkok en als je een beetje thuis bent kan je heel de stad gemakkelijk ontdekken.
Bij een volgend bezoek aan Bangkok zal ik zeker terug naar deze plek gaan.

Sujira was a wonderful host and made us feel welcome and at home. She provides a lot of information to help you navigate and get set up in the city, and her place is in a great location with lots of food options and friendly faces. It was fantastic that she had a washing machine that we could use for very cheap! The space is cozy and comfortable. It is best for 1-2 people (a couple). We would definitely stay at Sujira's place again.

Mam and her husband are very charismatic and accommodating people! They will make you feel very comfortable and do everything in their power to make all your wishes come true at Wish@Samyan!

HOST:
Phenomenal! Mam ensured that everything was perfect before my arrival and during my stay. She was extremely flexible with check in and check out times which made my trip worry free, a blessing given my constantly changing schedule. If I needed anything like directions Mam and her service support team replied with haste. Otherwise, everything you can imagine from iron to extra pillows are stocked in the apartment. I had dinner with Mam and her husband and the food was to die for and the conversation even more delightful! Most importantly, Mam and her husband are vibrant people who have an amazing sense of humor and they are always around to help you with anything! I can guarantee my stay in Bangkok would not have been as memorable if I had not Instant Booked with Mam!

APARTMENT:
Luxurious! Imagine a 5 star room in a USA hotel. Actually, you are in a recently purchased and fully equipped condo (washer, SMART TV already Youtube connected, stocked fridge, micro fiber towels, and more). The luxury doesn’t stop in the condo, you have full access to the fitness center/gym and a ROOFTOP INFINITY POOL over looking Bangkok! Now you know you are staying some place CLASSY :) Everything is spotless/organized with security guards downstairs to hail you a taxi at a moments notice. Oh did I mention, your condo has keyless entry so you never have to worry about losing keys! Truly, you getting a deal of a lifetime for a relatively inexpensive rate. I have paid 5 times the nightly room rate in 5 star hotels and never received access to such a luxurious space INCLUDING the level of hospitality from Mam and her husband.

LOCATION:
Convenient! The apartment is in the center of Bangkok! You can find a peaceful Temple down the road, the Temple is so sacred it's not on any map. You can find chain restaurants nearby, but there are many delicious local food around the corner (Mam has personally made a guide book to quickly select and locate your local dining experience). Major shopping centers are a few blocks down the road and popular tourist attractions are within 15-20 minutes via Taxi or metro. Samyan Metro Station is 4 minutes walk. Thailand'a TOP ranked University is a couple blocks away making the community even more vibrant. There’s so much happening nearby you need a week to explore it all let alone see the rest of Bangkok’s attractions.

Lastly, I want to take this opportunity to personally thank Mam and her husband for sharing their amazing home with me. Can't wait to come back!

Great place to stay in Bangkok
Apartment furnished fantastic
Mam with her husband where perfect hosts
I would definitely stay there again when going to Bangkok

I would like to echo exactly what Zubair has reviewed, everything mentioned in his detailed review there was spot on. Mam's Wish@Samyan is truly a 5 star accomodation. The place is exactly as shown in the pictures, so it is really as luxurious as it looks. The interior design is very tastefully done with gorgeous full length mirrors and classy wallpapers.

Her profile might seem quite empty now but their place and actions give the impression that they are very experienced in being a great host. She does the introduction to her place professionally and her guidebook to local attractions and nearby streetfood shows their thoughtfulness and experience.

Firstly, the place is spotless. Everything looks brand new. It is well stocked with almost everything that you will need, scissors, electronic safe, nailclipper, torchlight, first aid kit, swiss army knife, bottle opener, umbrellas, complete dining and utensil sets, chopping board, fancy water filtering thingy, laundry basket, and many more. All these are in addition to the standard hotel amenities like toothbrushes and toothpaste, face and body microfiber towels, soap and shampoos etc. You can see they have put quite some thought to include these multiple small touches.
In terms of devices, they have 2 large Smart TVs (living and bedroom), a Soundbar, washer, microwave, water heater, iron and board. The mattress was even better than any of the hotel mattresses I've ever tried along with their down feather pillows.

The location is very near (`5 mins) the Samyan MRT station and also a local shopping center with the Tesco Hypermarket and many restaurants. We even walked back from the MBK shopping mall one night but it was quite a walk. Her guidebook helpfully shows you all the wonderful street food nearby thats within walking distance. For even more convenience, there is a 24 hour convenience store at the ground floor.

My girlfriend noted that Mam and her husband are such a cheerful and happy couple! Very pleasant indeed and extremely accommodating. They really went the extra mile for us and we appreciate their kindness and flexibility.

Thank you Mam and Louk Mee!

I stayed in this condo for 4 nights. It was such a wonderful place . I like the condo so much ! It is new , very very clean!and luxury decoration . The condo just looks like the profile picture but far more comfortable to live in . Also great location , 5mins walk to MRT Samyan station .I especially like the Pioneer speaker with the Bluetooth, I can play my own song from my iPhone , pretty cool !   On my last day I met Mam and LM for dinner , they are just so nice ,  a very happy couple I would say . I enjoyed the moment with them . Anyway Mam's condo is really highly recommended! I would stay there again next time .  Thank you very much  Mam and LM !

It turned out that the apt is even more amazing than i'd expected!! First of all, it's located on the 24-th floor of the building, and so it has a great view on a city from livingroom, bedroom and balcony, through bottom-to-top windows. Mam and her husband were a very friendly hosters, they assisted and gave advises each time i had any questions. The another great thing is that there is a possibility to set up your own music using apt's soundsystem via bluetoothconnection. The apt is very cozy, clean, and had all things that (turned out) were very useful for me and my girlfriend.
