We've even preferred to stay in the apt rather than exploring Bangkok's sights first day-two :)

Great place to stay in Bangkok
Apartment was very clean and nice
Mam was a perfect host 24 auer service
I would definitely stay there again when going to Bangkok

Best Regards Laura

Super séjour à Bangkok. L appartement est parfait, neuf, très bien aménagé,bien placé ( près du quartier Pathong) et plein de petites attentions qui sont très appréciables. Merci beaucoup à Mam qui nous a beaucoup aidée pendant le séjour. Le plus la piscine au 19 eme étage. Je recommande vivement cet appartement
Mam was super friendly and helpful. The place was really nice, comfy and clean
The condo was the same as you can see on photo.

Accommodation was very good, everything we needed.
Location isn't the best but we knew that before we booked.
Would have been nice to meet the host on arrival to get first hand knowledge of the area.

My stay at Bee's studio apartment was among my best Airbnb experiences. The apartment itself was comfortable and quiet - it faces another building so there is no traffic or street noise. Though fairly compact, the use of space is really good and makes the apartment seem bigger than it is and you feel as though there is plenty of space for what you need. The location is great and really convenient for getting around to the main tourist sites - about a 10-minute walk to the BTS station and the public boats to the Grand Palace and Wat Pho.
Best of all was Bee and her parents! Even though she's in another country and a different time zone, Bee replied to all messages and emails quickly and with lots of helpful information. Her parents manage things on her behalf and treated me as if I had been a friend of the family for ages. Her dad picked up some cough syrup and lozenges for me since I was sick, and also offered to go get some dinner for me on one of the evenings. But the biggest help was when the whole family pulled together to help me out when a local tailor tried to scam me and Bee's parents stepped in to prevent me from being ripped off. They totally went above and beyond the call of duty and really helped me out!! I highly recommend staying at one of Bee's apartments. You will have a great experience and be really well taken care of! I would absolutely stay there again the next time I'm in Bangkok.
Bee responded to enquiries very quickly and we were met by her father who was extremely friendly and helpful. The apartment is just as described.

Bee gave awesome customer service. Her father was so helpful also. This apartment is in the most convenient neighborhood to get around Bangkok. I would definitely stay here again. The pool is awesome also!

Bee and her father made me feel very welcome in this lovely condo. If you want to experience the real Bangkok away from all the tourist spots this location is ideal though you can easily get to those tourist places by train.
The studio has everything you need for a comfortable stay.

The apartment was cosy and clean with good facilities like swimming pool, convenience stores and laundry facilities/shop. What stands out was the personal introduction of the apartment by Bee's father who was accommodating and helpful in many ways. The place is a short walk to Sapan Taksin BTS, which is also where the Sathorn Pier is located. From the pier, we could take a ferry to major attractions such as the Grand Palace and Wat Po that can otherwise only be accessed by car/cab with the risks of heavy traffic and touting by cab drivers. Bee provided us with very useful travel information in Bangkok, which we used to plan our itinerary and choose the tour agencies to go to. Our experience in Bangkok had been wonderful thanks to Bee and her father.

There is no other way to experience Bangkok like a local than to stay here!!! The room was EXTREMELY clean, trendy decor, very safe/modern apartment building in an amazing neighborhood feeling community. But the gold star undoubtably goes to Bee and her father Pimone. Without them our stay would have been a completely different experience. From the beginning Bee was there to answer ANY questions including questions about our travels to other parts of Thailand. She gave us detailed info regarding any transportation, food, or tourist sites we wanted to see and was very prompt with her responses. Also as an option Pimone can pick you up and drop you off from the airport if you like and I highly recommend it. Pimone is wonderful and so helpful at knowing some incredible restaurants you never would find by yourself. Bee and Pimone went so above and beyond what we ever expected. Their hospitality remains one of our most memorable experiences on our three week trip to Thailand. Do yourself a favor, take advantage of this diamond in Bangkok!!!

Bee was outstanding with all the information provided. My train was late and I didn't want to disturb her family. I contacted Pimon and the site to inform but since I new didn't really know how to operate this system I should have cancel. All my fault I'm sure she is great host.

If you want to get a true Bangkok experience Bee's place is the one to book. The Airbnb is super clean and cosy. You have everything you need. Perfect for two maybe a little tight for four. Everything is pretty close or at the least a quick boat ride away. The best part is her family, very helpful and friendly. They want you to experience the famous Thai hospitality. What was also great was that Bee always responded right away, day or night. We highly recommend the place!

Really great pre-arrival communication, and excellent help and communication onsite! Very warm and friendly: like visiting family. Place was as advertised: clean and comfortable with all amenities. Great location, near train, markets and stores, and on direct bus line (#35) to Grand Palace area. Definitely recommend!

We stayed at Bee's for 3 days. Thr room was clean and comfortable and had everything we needed. Bee's dad met us late at night which was so kind to give us the key, hr e also showed us a great place to Eat.
Bee was super helpful and gave us loads of brilliant tips.
Felt a whole lot less scary being in a strange city and having a phone and people to call if we needed help.
I cant recommend Bee's place enough and we cant wait to come back again.
Wonderful experience！I show the pics for my friends，All my friends will book here，awesome environment！！

A really nice place where it is easy to feel welcome. The family that owns the place is very helpful with organising things around your stay. Not unimportant is the truly amazing design of the whole place!! Would definitely stay here again when we are in Bangkok.

The place and hosts (the Pakasit family) were fantastic! The decor is laid back like European country style, and chic like modern uptown city lofts. At some times in the afternoon or late at night with the incandescent lighting that make it look like the 40-50's setting. Picture the movie Captain America and you will get a clearer picture. The whole family speaks English so don't worry about playing charades to get what you want. Mere 10 minutes walk to Krung Thonburi BTS station and nearest attraction would the Asiatique. Breakfast is home-cooked style, just the way my girlfriend and I prefer, I'm guessing this works for most of you here. I'm sincerely recommending J. No. 14 to my fellow travelers here in AirBNB and beyond this site. Cheers.
Fantastic and beautiful place. Pakasit and his family are wonderful and offer a true gem !
Amazing place! I really like all the decorations of this wonderful house and the homemade breakfast was great! Looking forward to see you again.

J. No 14 is a really amazing place to stay.  The rooms are very comfortable and the hosts are most helpful.  highly recommended.  I stayed for just one night, but loved the building and decoration so much that I stayed there for much of the afternoon after I had checked out.  Thankyou!

It is a building with the classical and modern twist and the family is very friendly, the address should be corrected: when you turn to Krung Thon Buri soi 5, just go to bottom at 7-11 store and turn left forb about 100 meters then turn right to alley 16 and you can seethe nice building on the left.

J.No 14 is one of the most beautiful accomodations we have ever been in. Apart from that we were also warmly welcomed and really enjoyed talking to Viranond family. We wish them all the luck with their new project as well!

We booked in at no 14 for our last night in Bangkok and wished we could have stayed for a week.
What a beautiful home/hotel they have!
So tastefully and thoughtfully designed throughout. The rooms were spacious and very comfortable.
The family were so welcoming and felt like you were staying with extended family.
The breakfast was delicious and extra special to enjoy it in the large atrium.
Such great value for money, Central and only a 5 minute walk from the bts sky train, so easy to get around.
Not in the usual tourist area where all the big hotels are but I think that's a good thing.
We will definitely be going back and staying again, and this time for more than one night!

I arrived at J No.14 in the afternoon ,26th, Feb. The place is located nearby the sky train only taken 2 minutes to the skytrain. So convenient. And when my friend and I went into the hotel, it strongly attracts me because it's specially decoration made me amazing. Afterwards, the whole family are patient to every customer and full of love. We become friends with the family rather than the host and the guests. So I decided to come back in March 8th, the day I came from Samui to go back to china. It's yesterday actually. We have dinner with the cute family and I already told my friends if they will come to Thailand, the J.No14 is a must choice for a part of Thailand journey. Last but not least, best wishes to the adorable family.
Demi is waiting for you in China.

We were a 5 people's group. Katy is very nice and prepared lovely welcome message and snacks for us. She can provide important information for your trip. The house is decorated with love and art, and you can walk to BTS by 7 minutes; 7-11 by 5 minutes. The room we stayed, is big enough and comfortable. We cannot forget the delicious Thai breakfasts and the lovely cats, and that was a kindly gifts when we left.
The room is very big and comfortable. The 7-11 is very nearly the house. We can walk to the BTS station about 5 minutes.

The first time got bnb experience,quite amazing,Katy and her family are friendly,we had kindly welcome note,fruits and gift when leaving,the house is grand and cozy,from home to home,that's why I chosen bnb and far from tourist center.Thanks Katy,we will visit again and miss delicious breakfast,plenty fruits and the cats.

Katy and her family are very nice and easy- going. They always smile to you and give you quite useful guide about my visit in town. The room is awesome! It is super clean and big. You can sit at the tatami beside the big window in the room and read magazines.Magazines and books are everywhere in the house including my favorite one like Kinfolk! The house is close to BTS station Ari and Sanam Pao,and only 2 stops to the famous weekend market Chatuchak. I highly recommend Katy's house!

fabulous~I have a wonderful time staying with katy,she not only offered a comfortable place to live,but also gave us a lot of good advice.The breakfast is also amazing,and I love the handwriting note that Katy left us,it is very warm.Next time when I go to Bangkok,I will stay with her again!!
超级喜欢的地方！房间很舒服色彩搭配很漂亮，充满东南亚的感觉，房东很贴心，准备了精致的早餐，并且为客人留下了很贴心的手写的小字条，房东还会帮忙推荐交通方式，我不会使用泰国手机卡也是房东帮忙的，居住的这三天给我留下了很好的体验，强烈推荐~

Kathy's home is a wonderful place, espacially to start your trip in Bangkok, as you can easily reach her house from the airport and get in the inner city, she provides free maps and will answer all your questions! The breakfast was delicious and the special shower really nice. we would highly recommend Katy's rooms to everyone! :)

I was really happy to be able to stay here in Bangkok! This room is very convenient, and Katy and her family (including cats) are all super kind and sweet. I'm sure everyone can relax at home!
Additionally, every morning meal was awesome. I recommend that you stay here if you will come to Bangkok!

Katy's house is very good.  The location is good where it is easily reached.  The room is very comfortable. Katy and her family are very nice and warm. Katy is lovely and helpful. She assist to arrange a taxi to airport for us. The breakfast was delicious.  We would highly recommend Katy's room.

We were very impress with a very nice, generous, courtesy and friendly host. This was our first time ever to use airbnb accommodation, and we found ourselves falling in love with the host services.  The house is not difficult to find at all! We just told the taxi drivers with her instructions with a good observe of the traffic sign and coordination. It is accessible through a 24 hour taxi-meter and only spent about 5-10 mins walking distance to and from the nearest BTS station. There is a 24 hours convenient store operating just 3 mins walk from the house. Also, we found abundant chain-restaurants nearby. We had great burgers and beers at the mall complex located 10-15 mins walking away from the house. The host provides a great accommodation and a nice bedroom in a big family-house. The services exceed our expectation above all. The host and atmosphere makes us feel like visiting the family of a long-time friend. You can imagine of staying in a big-bedroom equipped with big private bathroom, and the host furnished you with all personal care needs. The house is located in a small garden with tress, so you will find a cool climate in the middle of Bangkok in the evening, and in the early morning, you will enjoy birds signing to make your morning more beautifully. Then, the host provides you with absolutely delicious-healthy homemade breakfast. We were really enjoyed with our breakfast on the menu served that morning. There are also friendly dog and cats to welcome you to make you feel like you are visiting your family and friends. We will definitely go back to stay at this place again when the opportunity provided. Nice and friendly atmosphere is a great distinction from others!

Katy was a great host, my husband and I were both pleased with our stay. We felt very welcome in Katy's home and noticed her attention to details. Plus we loved having a yummy Thai style breakfast each morning.
We found the room to be just as posted online, large, clean with a private bathroom and AC. We were happy to be in this neighbourhood near Ari instead of being in a crowded tourist district, and due to its proximity to the BTS train we could easily access all the sights we wanted to visit.
We would love to stay with Katy again when we return to Bangkok.

Suttinee gave directions to the taxi driver from the Intl Airport, and I was there in 20 minutes.  Great location, safe, friendly and good food. Room is fantastic, clean, aircon, big bed and room to spread out. Suttinee took me for a tour of the local district and even bought a bag of mangostene - my favourite fruits.  The villa is Zen... even bfast was provided, fruits and English bacon and eggs.  Thanks Suttinee for your awesome hospitality.
非常舒适有格调的小木屋，很热情的房东女主人，也有可爱的小狗陪伴

Очень классное место, рядом с аэропортом. Прекрасная хозяйка.
Вы почувствуете себя как дома.
Все удобства, завтрак.
Как только мы приехали, нас принчли как родных.
Мы приехали в 03:00 ночи и нас ждали.
За время пребывания в Бангкоке, нам больше всего понравилось тут.
Обязательно вернемся сюда.

Even though we only stayed one night (and had to leave very early the next morning!), Suttinee was a gracious host, polite and friendly. Her staff all welcomed us warmly and showed us around the property. The cottage was perfect size for us and I greatly enjoyed the personal veranda with the view of the garden. The entire property was beautifully maintained.
The coffee shop was inviting and Suttinee makes wonderful drinks!
We enjoyed this little gem tucked away in bustling Bangkok.

This was a very convenient location for a 6am flight, but otherwise would not recommend the hostel location wise. It's a shuttle to the Airtrain, not walkable - and about 40min away from everything. If your flight is running during Airtrain schedule I would highly recommend staying near a BTS station. The hostess was sweet and the room nice but the mattress was also SUPER HARD. Not comfortable at all.
Trés bonne accueil par Suttinee. Typique et trés beau cadre. Je recommande ce logement. À trés bientôt j'espére pour une nouvelle aventure en thaïlande
Suttinee is a wonderful person! She is very friendly and helpful. The breakfast and coffee she serves is delicious!

Suttinee's place is a hidden gem!!! The hut is exactly as it is described in the listing & photos. The listing is about 30 minutes from tourist attractions but I didn't mind. It's only a short taxi ride away. Suttinee is there upon arrival and during the trip to help out in any way she can. The daily breakfast is good, with a variety of foods. She is accommodating to any food allergies I had during my stay. She even had her staff do my laundry for a nominal fee. I can't say enough about this place.  I'll be staying there when I return to Bangkok.
My host was gracious and accommodating.

Beautiful space and very comfortable.  Close proximity to the airport which was amazing for us.  We didn't get to stay too long since we got in late and left early in the morning, but Suttinee was easy to communicate with the entire process.
I really liked the location of the apartment, it was central but tucked away in a quite street.  We spend two nights there and would recommend it to others.

Evan is an extremely nice guy, he helped me bring my luggage up on the first day and everytime we chatted he seemed very nice. The description is accurate. It's in a place that is nice and safe and not too touristy, convenient to local transportation. For the price, honestly, I'm sorry I can't, in good conscience, recommend it for a long term stay. The bed is hard, there's a pronounced smell, the curtains don't shut all the way, the back windows don't close all the way... I left after a week. I feel bad saying so because Evan is a really nice person. I would absolutely recommend him as host but he has work to do on this particular room. There are just too many extremely nice hotels for the same price around here.

Evan is approachable and handled all our queries promptly (regarding the facilities, check out options, and even for an extra roll of toilet paper at night). We needed an extra room urgently for a night due to change in our plans and Evan was accommodating and flexible enough to host us on another floor.

Lumphini homestay is a 10-15min walk to Lumphini MRT plus 21BHT to Sukhumvit BTS (u can take the motorbike to BTS for 10-20BHT/pax if u can speak Thai & possibly bargain down the price; foreigner price was 40BHT/pax). The area around the apartment is sprinkled with streetcart stores (the food differs each time of the day and varies every day as well) selling delicious food for only 30-40BHT, washing&drying facilities on the parallel street across, "reverse osmosis" water dispenser costing 1BHT for around 800ml water, and 7Eleven just 5 mins walk away. We didn't try the bars, massage and various eateries around though. Wifi was reliable, aircon can be adjusted to suit your temperature, bed, pillows and blanket were good for great night's sleep.

Do note there are several floors of rooms; try asking for the lower floors if you don't fancy climbing the steps.

In room 7 we felt the toilet could be less porous so that we didn't have to keep smelling each others' poop. It was fine though as the ventilation took care of it within minutes of flushing.

All in all, a great stay and we would love to be back when we return to Bangkok!
Очень гостеприимный хозяин Evan

Very good experience.Evan is very
kindly host .Apartment is located in centre of Bangkok-and I got high level service

Evan was very welcoming and provided a good, clean place to stay, just as described online. The neighborhood is quite nice, and very friendly, with lots of massage shops, laundry places, a 711 on the corner and some restaurants. It's just a short walk from the MRT and a central location near the park and Silom area, so that saves a lot on transportation.
Great host, nice to talk to. House is perfect for the budget-minded traveler. Clean. Cool bars, street food and restaurants in the neighborhood. Close to the center.

Very clear instructions on how to find the place, check in late and early check out wasn't an issue. We didn't stay in the room pictured, but in a room with the same inventory. Bed, towel and floor were clean and everything worked as expected.
There are a few restaurants and massage shops close by, the closest MRT station is about a 10 minutes walk away

Very clear instructions on how to find the place, check in late and early check out wasn't an issue. We didn't stay in the room pictured, but in a room with the same inventory. Bed, towel and floor were clean and everything worked as expected. There are a few restaurants and massage shops close by, the closest MRT station is about a 10 minutes walk away

I stayed at Evans place for two day's. I came erly in the morning and it was no problem to let my staff there and take a shower. Everything worked perfectly. Room was also totally ok. And the area is also great. He is a very relax host, who was a lot of tips what to do in Bangkok. I would come back.

The location is very good, as is size of the unit. Certainly anyone needing two bedrooms and especially if they are staying a week or more it is perfect.
The Hosts are new to AirBnB but there was nothing in their effort that gives me concern, they seem to be on the right path. Even better they own a small business on the ground floor so communication/results are swift.
The gym is very good.

Very convenient and cozy condo! Walkable distance from BTS or MRT station. Clean and tidy. The apartment is exactly the same as the photos. Nice host with quick response to our concerns. We love this place. Best experience from Airbnb!
nice person and beautiful house，convenient and clean. We like this house, and hope next time still live here
They took care of our needs and were available to answer any questions all the time

Vasant's apartment can only be described as an oasis. It is centrally located and close to many majors forms of transit. 25 minute cab from the airport. Large shopping and cheap eats can be found a block away at Terminal 21. The apt is beautiful.  You won't need to worry about Bangkok's heat with such a comfortable place to return home to after a long day.  With two bedrooms and two full baths it's perfect for a group of 2-4. Full kitchen was great and washer and dryer in unit made laundry very easy. There is also a pool on the 6th floor. Very safe. Vasant runs a shop on the ground floor of the building and was available all day to answer questions and give us recommendations and directions. They also provided us with the best latte of the trip when we first arrived. I cannot recommend their place more and would certainly stay again if I find myself in Bangkok again.

Great location. Walking distance to two of the well known shopping malls, many restaurants and parks. Right by the skytrain station. Easy to access for taxis. The rooms and bathrooms were spacious and the living room/kitchen area very practical. Nice deco. We went with toddlers and we could go to many places with the stroller. Would definitely stay there on our next visit to BKK

Everything was perfect
Very recommended
Great place!!!!!

We had a great time in Diow's place
Very comfortable apartment, we felt immediately at home

Diow greeted me with a warm Thailand smile when I first arrived @ condo. From then on, I knew my stay was going to exceed my expectations. Upon entering the suite, I was instantly fulfilled and gratified. There was a minor issue with the living room AC but Diow knew about it and resolved the issue immediately. Overall, I could not have asked for a better host. My experience was truly amazing. I suppose this is one reason they call it Amazing Thailand. I would recommend this condo for anyone wanting to stay in the Sukhumvit area. Thank you Diow ! You were awesome. Sawadee !

What a splendid place to stay!!
This modern luxury private condo is very brand new!
Great location! Only 3-5 mins walk from BTS nana, surrounded with shopping street (nana3,5,11), street food, 7/11, and night life!!!
The room is exactly the same as shown in picture.
Clean and comfortable room with amenities, bottles of water, microwave, stove, even the laundry machine are provided.
Beautiful swimming pool and gym on the roof top.
Simple check in and check out.
Thank you for an easy stay!

The room is located just right behind Nana BTS station (less than 3 min walk) which makes it very accessible to all places like Asoke, Thonglor or Siam. The night market is just next door and offers a variety of local food and fruits. But the best was the host (Ekaphap). He was very accommodating, engaging and amazingly friendly. He even took me to hangout at a very highly recommended Blue and Jazz Pub&Restaurant, Apoteka, located in main area of Sukhumvit 11. Lots of very high quality live bands and guest musicians which very close to Ekaphap's place.
Very new and spacious room. The room got big comfy bed, one huge UHD smart TV in living room, very high speed WIFI and cool & modern look decoration. Kitchenette with pots, pans and utensils were also available for easy breakfast.
Overall we very enjoyed our 2 nights stay in Ekaphap' place. With the price we spent, Ekaphap's place exceeded all our expectations. Highly recommended

Great place to live. Nice host. Quiet neighborhood in the heart of Bangkok, New furnished condo, Convenient location. BTS station is at the front door. Starbucks are just around the corners, short walks to restaurants, too many to choose from fine dinings to street venders. Definitely recommend for anyone who visits Bangkok.

房间很干净舒适，配套设施齐全。床很舒服。
感觉超棒。性价比很高。
出行很方便，巷子路口就是nana station。
周围好几家7-11便利店
但是深夜还是不要乱跑，尤其是独行客或者几个女孩。周围貌似有个很有名的红灯区。
Ekaphap's condo is very modern, big and cosy.  It is 4 mins walk to Nana BTS station. It's located in Soi 7 but you must tell taxi driver to enter by Soi 5 as Soi 7 is one way traffic.
The room is very comfortable, clean with a great location, we have also enjoyed the pool and the playground. Next trip to bkk likely we will book here again.

Ekaphap was nice, very patient with my late arrival. He was welcoming also very easy to talk to. I love the high qulity bed there. It's very comfort,perfect fit, not too hard not too soft. The place was very nice as on the photos. The location was perfect. Really easy to connect to trasportation as he said. Center between Terminal 21 and Siam Paragon. Even Soi 5 is quite like a night life bustling area but when you get into soi 7 its become to placeful, quite and feel like residential area. I loved everything about that place and will stay there next time!

I had a great time. The location is very near to Nana station, just need a few minute walking. The house is very new, clean and convinient. The host is so kind! Sure l'll stay here next time in Bangkok

This place was spotless! A great spot in a great location - just what I needed. The host arranged for an airport pickup and drop-off for me as well which was very convenient. As well, he was very patient with me and answered all of my questions in details as to how to use the TV, the washer and dryer, etc. Much appreciated!
The location is very convinent and it is very clean and comfortable.

Clean and accessible, Evan's directions were helpful as we made our own way there. It is a 10 min walk from Lumphini MRT station, making it convenient to move around Bangkok. (Sidenote: it takes about 80 min to get to the Suvarnabhumi airport via the airport rail).
Evan was also very helpful and quick to respond to our queries before and during our stay. Would definitely recommend for budget travelers looking for a no-frills stay.
Evan was friendly. The room is exactly as advertised. Easy to get to and not overprices. Thanks! I would recommend staying here.
The listing description are accurate. It was a plus to have the beautiful Lumphini park withing a walking distance from the apartment. Evan is a friendly host

The apartment was clean and comfortable and in a neighborhood that had a lot of stores, massage parlors, restaurants and food stalls. There is also easy access to public transportation. I had easy communication with Evan.

There is no way you could get lost looking for Evan's apartment. The direction Evan wrote was very detail.

The location is strategic because it is near to many touristic spots such as Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Wat Arun, Chao Praya river, etc. It is also near to MRT which would easily connect you to other part of the city. The room was clean and the surrounding was quiet.

In summary, i was satisfied with my experience staying at Evan's apartment.
No pudimos quedarnos a dormir porque se nos iba el tren a ko phagan  pero pudimos ducharnos y Evan nos ayudó con todo lo que precisamos.  el departamento parecía lindo y cómodo en relación al precio.

Place where we were staying was nica,with all amenities you need. Kettle was given as soon as we asked. It was close to Lumpini MRT and Evan's given directions how to get from MRT to apartment was precise and easy to understand. Neighbourhood had a few places to sit and eat but also there were a lot food stalls if you go to the left feom the small street.
Good value for what you get.
We enjoyed our stay :)

Evan is an excellent host, very helpful in all aspects, many thanks Evan!  The room is  small and cozy but a great value for the price, and you won`t find a better location in Bangkok.  Highly reccommended!

Мне понравилось как за такие деньги. Раен не депрессивный, улочка тихая, чистая. Дом ЖБ, чем-то напоминает советский пансионат.
Комната чистая, техника работает. Минут 5-7 от метро.
Но 4- й этаж по винтовой лестнице. Может быть тяжело пожилым.
Хозяин приятен и говорит по русски.

The directions are excellent and makes navigation BKK easier than its airport. Its a perfect airbnb host if you want to have privacy and do you own things, but is still available for questions.  Close to the nightlife in Silom. Good overall stay!

Très bonne expérience. Merci beaucoup à Kathy et à Benz qui sont disponibles et attentionnés. Ils nous ont beaucoup aidé ! Et ils ont eu la gentillesse de nous accueillir en pleine nuit, à 2H30 du matin.
La chambre est bien, dans un quartier calme et proche du centre.
Le petit déjeuner est inclus, c'est thaï et c'est bon.
特别棒！！！房间比你所看到的图片更好 里面生活用品准备的很充分 主人也非常热情～轻轨站和711都在旁边 很方便！下次来曼谷的话还会住这里的～
Katy is a very lovely host.

The place is exactly as described. Our room is huge and has all the necessary amenities. Katy replied to all of our messages within minutes and were extremely helpful during our stay. Her cats are so cute, the dog is shy which is even cuter! Katy and her mom also prepared delicious Thai breakfast.
The house is in a quiet and nice neighborhood, perfect to rest after a day exploring the city. Meanwhile it's only five minute walk to the Sanam Pao BTS station for fast travel to city center.
Definitely recommended and would stay again next time we are in town!

距离地铁站比较近5分钟路程 在小路上第一次可能不太好找 房子非常漂亮 卧室很大 很干净 很有家的感觉 早餐很好吃 房东很热情 下次去曼谷还会去住的
Distance from the subway station is nearly five minutes in the path may not be good looking for the first time. Houses are very beautiful, the bedroom is very big, very clean, very feel at home. Breakfast is very delicious, will go to Bangkok to live again.

房东好好人!!!特别是女房东，好美好可爱呀，每天回家房东都笑着迎接我们，最重要的是我们钥匙丢了超级不好意思，想赔偿，可是房东超级好人的就说算了，太感动，然后走之前把想行李暂时放在他们家，他们一下子答应了，人太好了。房间很漂亮，很大很宽敞，和图片一样，还有一个小房也可以睡人的，4个人来住也够。家里的猫都好大只呀，好有特色。房子很大很漂亮，里面装饰很温馨，去的时候在装修小院子，应该现在也弄好了，弄好肯定更漂亮。离地铁站有大概五分钟的路程吧，有7-11，路边也有几家卖水果，烧烤小吃的，蛮好吃的，主要是摊主都好热情，买过一次他们都记得我们了，每次路过都对我们笑笑，哈哈。

It was the second night which I were in Bangkok. It was funny room. I could take pictures in room. But the first room which I lived in was the best one. If next time I go to Bangkok, I will live Katy rooms again! And thanks for Katy' breakfast which was good for my mother who could not eat any sea food, ports or spicy food. Thanks!
非常好的住宿体验！我和朋友五个人泰国自由行在这里住了四晚，房主Katy是个娇小可爱的人，每天会为我们准备早饭，帮助我们订机票、租车、规划路线。最让人感动的是我们为了赶早班飞机凌晨四点去机场，而Katy一家还一起送我们，真的真的很值得！
非常好的住宿体验！我和朋友五个人泰国自由行在这里住了四晚，房主Katy是个娇小可爱的人，每天会为我们准备早饭，帮助我们订机票、租车、规划路线。最让人感动的是我们为了赶早班飞机凌晨四点去机场，而Katy一家还一起送我们，真的真的很值得！
房东真的超级好！我们晚上12点才到机场，过海关什么的 折腾到两点才去到这美丽的民宿，房东夫妇一直等我们。还给我们准备小礼物。房子有三层楼 我们住三楼 ，三楼是两个大套间。一共见到3只猫一条狗，超级有爱心的一家。每日早餐很当地。靠近BTS站 出行方便，附近就有7-11便利店 我总跑去买牛奶喝。房间比想象中还要好 中总之就是好好好。

Alexis was a really helpful host. He met me and helped with directions when my taxi driver got lost. He gave me a great tour of the building and had lots of advice on the offerings of the area that suited what I was looking for.

Although Alexis was away from Bangkok while I was in town, he was always easy to contact via AirBnb and he made sure to have someone who could help me organise cleaners and came to see us when we needed some assistance.

I wouldn't hesitate to recommend Alexis as a host.

Très bel appartement, avec superbe vue, proche de toute commodité, situé à qq mètres du métro, au sein d'un condomenium avec 2 piscines et salle de sport. Alexis est un hôte très attentif, faisant tout pour rendre le séjour facile et agréable, et disponible pour répondre à tous nos besoins.
Very nice apartment with beautiful view, close to all amenities, located few meters from the Metro (MRT), in a condomenium with 2 pools and gym. Alexis is a very attentive host, doing everything to make it easy and enjoyable, and available to answer all our needs.
Note the location because another condomenium 2 metro stops away almost the same name.

Truly a fantastic stay. The place has 2 pools, a gym, sauna, a 24 hour store right next to the building and above all - a stunning view of Bangkok. The metro station is also right besides the condominium. What more could you need?
Alexis himself was very helpful - he gave great advice on what to do and what not to do in Bangkok.
Highly recommended!

In this travel, I am so lucky can stay in the wonderful house. The house has nice view. During the day can see the beauty sky. In the night has perfect night view. Let me in this house can be completely relaxed. This community has a strict security control. Take three steps to the MRT station, very convenient. Alexis was very friendly host, give me the helpful. The next time I go to Bangkok, I would choose here again.
amazing view and friendly landlord. because of the delay. alexis waited us for 5 hours. He also recommended good places for travelers.
Alexis communicated well, met us at the condo before showing us around. Great apartment, beautiful views over the city. Would stay again.

"We stayed at this Rhythm appartment in September. We were four, three adults and one child. The welcome from Alexis was very nice: he waited for us to hand over the keys (we were late as we were driving from other side of Thailand), and then he showed us the appartment and the building facilities. He even took us to both of the swimming pools and showed us where the gym is. The appartment itself is very nice, the kitchen was full with items that Alexis said we can use (eggs and milk in the fridge, coffee... amazing!), and the master bedroom has an amazing glass-walled bathroom and even more amazing view over Bangkok city. Rhythm building is minutes away from the MRT station, and close to several shopping malls of Ratchada. All in all, it was a wonderful 4-day experience and we will definitely keep in touch with Alexis for our future stays in Bangkok."
Pretty nice place and convinent traffic. Also the Alexis is great and kind to answer you all questions. I will live it again next time

The condo was absolutely stunning and the view outstanding. We had a late arrival and he was there to not only receive us but to show us the property as well. We were given many suggestions for what to do in the Bangkok area. Considerable time was spent going with us to the store in order to get sim cards for our telephones, mind you it was nearly 130a when we parted company. I would definitely stay here again, unfortunately we were not there long enough to make full use of the amenities like on property store, pools or gym.

Nice clean place in a really impressive building and yes, the views are spectacular on the 35th floor!  The pools are great too…salt water (no chlorine) and really lovely design especially the one on the 32nd floor which is virtually empty all the time.  We also loved the convenience of having the MRT (subway) line right outside the front entrance.  Ratchadapisek used to be kind of out of the way when I lived in Bangkok years ago but now with the subway it's only 20 minutes from downtown.  Met Alex only briefly but he is a really nice and helpful guy.  I can't wait to go back!
Great location. Close to nightlife/restaurants/shopping/public transport. Apartment was as expected from the photos.

It's a very spacious place for a group of 6-7 pax. The place is extremely clean and is situated right in the middle of all excitement in Sukhumvit area, although a little walk require. You can always take a tuk-tuk to save you from the walking. Owner has been very friendly and accommodating to our needs and it always reachable. Highly recommended!
It is an awesome house. Clean, Big, Cool interior design, Nice furniture, Nice host, Good swimming pool. I cannot believe I use this room at this cost.

This is a great place and a good value for a large family or group. We had 5 adults and 2 kids and room to spare during our December 2016 stay. Well equipped kitchen with pans and utensils, working WiFi, satellite TV.  Master bathroom has a tub (nice for those of us traveling with small kids.) Many of the other residences are under renovation, but there were no loud sounds of construction.  Supot is a great host who is easy to reach and responsive. One of the A/C units began making a noise one evening (10pm), we sent him a note and he had it fixed the very next day while we were out exploring the city. Be prepared to walk 10-15 minutes to public transportation and shopping, there are many taxis on the street but most will not agree to use their meter. We would definitely stay here again.  Supot appears to manage several residences in Thailand, we would definitely stay at another of his places if the opportunity arises.

Excellent two-story condo located off of busy Sukhumvit Rd.  Soi 15 is relatively quiet, and the apartment is very quiet.  Perfect for a small group or large family traveling together.  Supot's (Bob's) communications were great, as was the check in and over-all experience. Highly recommended.
The host is very friendly and the place is very nice.
位置靠近中心，适合家庭入住，房东好沟通，但是第一天我们到达住处的时候12:30进入屋子，非常凌乱，阿姨正在打扫，却还没有打扫好卫生，之后我们放下行李出门了，晚上才回来，当退房时请求能够一点退房，房东同意了，却打扫卫生的阿姨不同意，郁闷！
房子很宽敞，也很干净，唯一的不足就是离地铁站有点距离，还有我们check out 寄存行李的办公室没有人，打电话给房东让他找人帮忙看一下也一直没来人，只能委托门口的保安代劳，还是有一定的风险的，希望房东以后能改进，谢谢
超级棒的房子，楼下楼上各两个房间每个房间都有独立的卫生间，每个房间都很整洁宽敞，一楼有独立厨房及现代化设施，二楼打开门可以直接走到泳池及健身房 从胡同里走出去就有地铁站，附近有很多餐厅及7-11便利店，离商场区走路5分钟，特别方便，房主人特别严谨仔细，下次来曼谷还会选择这里。
We enjoy our stay in Bangkok. The appartment was very nice, clean and comfortable with all the amenities. Supot was a perfect host and we would defenitely recommand. Thanks Supot!

Host was very accommodating to my troublesome request and im really grateful that he hosted me in his new apartment with my hectic schedule :D Everything is as listed in the page. Access to rooftop garden, superb view of Bangkok, swimming pool... what else can you ask for?

He will walk you through in person during the check in and out processes.

Did I mention the apartment has 2 aircons? I only used 1 to cool the entire apartment :D

This is a small cosy one bedroom apartment with condo facilities like swimming pool and gym facilities. Great location, easy access to bts station and has lots of shops near by to get some basic daily needs.
Is located in a neighbouring area, so if you want to experience a local Thai lifestyle, this is the place!
The host, Nui, is very friendly, helpful and informative. A great host to introduce some of the places to explore in Bangkok and how to navigate around from the condo.
Near by the condo, there is a big supermarket and some cheap and good eateries with live band on Friday and weekends.
I will definitely stay here again for my future trips to Bangkok!

The appartment is exactly as in the description/pictures: a nice appartment on a good location.
Communication and check-in with Saroth went perfect.
Wifi only works in the lobby downstairs and quite slow. Kitchen is not equipped for cooking, but you shouldn't cook neither, food market just next door.
Very nice room with a good location. Best recommend

I met Mr. Nui at the condo, a young looking and helpful guy who always keeps smiling. Very good impression at the first.

The room is on 22nd floor (executive floor), very clean and everything was in order. Very good view as the room is on the corner of the building. Room's looking is exactly the same as the pictures showed. There is also a swimming pool on 5th floor, but it's a pity that I didn't have the time to try. Had a very nice stay and will definitely choose the place again when next time visit.

Location is good, near by BTS On-Nut, where has everything around, 7-11, family mart, Tesco Lotus and Big C. You will never find hard to get things to eat and buy.

Great host , fantastic location , nice and clean room !
I will be back soon here !
Thanks
Love this place ever. Clean and awesome view with very good location. The Host very helpful. Best recommended !!!
Great apt. Clean n cozy n Host was helpful and prompt in response. Convenient.. about 500m walk to BTS.  Will stay again:)

My first experience to stay executive condo.all is clean and spacy.mr nui very gentle and take care his place so nice. All have in condo except wifi .who know this area and know how to catch bts very easy and 100 of food point near around . Overall good one and lovely place. Mr nui always ready to help

Good location just minutes from the sky train and a great 45th storey bar. The flat was clean and had a good view. Nui was a great host - very welcoming with lots of advice about places to go. Thanks to Nui for a lovely stay.
wow what a great apartment so perfect i was with a friend and for the price of one hotel room we got a huge apartment it was perfect thanks so much,
Nice stay and location. Surely recomended
Edwards place was terrific!  It was large, perfect for large groups, and in a very good location.  Edward was very nice, and responded very quickly.  I'll definitely stay there again in the future!

This place is a great deal, since the apartment is very spacious, and is very convenient to lots of street stalls for food, restaurants, and shopping. Citibank is also very nearby. Though the infamous Pat Pong district is right there, red-light establishments are on the side streets and not on the main street--you can feel comfortable being here even if that's not your thing. Note: if you plan on using the basketball or tennis courts, make sure yu have your own equipment.

Unfortunately, when we arrived the staff didn't know about us. So we had to wait in the middle of the night for 2 hours to get into the apartment. Therefore we had to discuss a lot and wake people up. Edward wasn't there at that time, so he couldn't help. Furthermore we got for that night the wrong apartment, which was quite dirty and the beds were already used etc. At the next morning we got the right one, which was nice and clean in the end. But it was still not the best experience in total.
房东虽然从开始到离开都没有看到，但是他的团队非常专业，虽然是apartment但是也能够保持每天清理房间，房间非常大，和描述一致，有两个双人床和一个大的queen床，方便的是有烘干机，我们需要什么东西给前台说后很快就能够送过来，，出门2分钟就是BTS非常方便，下次还会住这里

Logement correct à la description.
Communication efficaces avec le locataire.

the host provided great instructions and offered assitance if needed. The apartment was just as described and had an outstanding location. Really you are I the best location in Silom. The staff and host were. Responsive to all requests and the apartment was large and well law out giving privacy to the guests. The views were nice and my family enjoy yes our stay. It will be our 1st choice for future Bangkok stays
很干净的房子，配套设施齐全，位于曼谷中心交通方便，非常好的一套房

This is a wonderful location. Good food all over the place.
Very Near to BTS. feel very safe.

we are so lucky to met aunt suttaporn，it was really a wonderful experience. She was very kindness and warmly always a smile on her face，treated us like family let us feel warm(●'◡'●)ﾉ♥ The house location is very convenient,the house in between airport and downtown. To go to downtown can take a public transport or take a taxi .very convenient. from her house to the airport only need half-hour.surrounding her house, there are many shopping mall、convenience stores、night market. we love her amazing house with a large cosy garden,All sorts of green plants,like a forest.have a cup of coffee and soak up the relaxing atmosphere of her garden，enjoy it:) The room was very warm,clean and comfortable. I will definitely come back your garden house,and i will learn from you how to cook local cuisine,hang out with you,etc. miss U and Love U very much,keep in touch and welcome to China Chengdu，look forward to meet you next time (♥◠‿◠)ﾉ
very good place and very good nice person，we have sweet dream in there. the garden house so beautiful so comfortable stay there！i promise we will come back again～

Thank you Auntie Suttaporn for the very warm welcome and for driving with us to the nearest night market right after we checked-in to your place given that its already midnight. The reason why we chose this listing were - value for money and location. if you are in a budget this is the perfect place to consider.

During our stay, We enjoy the Wifi of course and the awesome thai massage near to her place its half the price compare to downtown bangkok.


Thanks!

亲爱的SU是一个伟大的、平易近人的、为朋友着想的泰国好人。她有一个很大的家，在一个小区里，很安静，院子里有很多的花草树木，很干净和漂亮，这是我见过的最漂亮的家。出租车到达时，她已经在她的家门口等候了，好像在等一个很久不见的老朋友，让人觉得很亲切。她为我们准备了丰富的早餐，当她得知我的母亲想吃稀饭时，她专门买了绿色蔬菜，做了好吃的粥，让我们很感动。她还亲自开着小车带我们去参观了美丽的大皇宫。这是一次难忘的异国体验。谢谢你，SU。我们会再次回来的。

Auntie Su's house is well-designed, simple and clean with a very beautiful garden and comfortable bedroom. I really love it so so so much. Auntie planted organic mushroom. We had it for breakfast and the taste is really good and healthy. Auntie speaks fluent English. She is a very kind-hearted woman. She treated us like family, helped us arrange our schedule, brought us to have yummy typical Thai food, guided us to the bus station. Especially when my friend got a fever, she gave her some medicines. After took the pill, my friend got recovered. I like her and her place, it's just like a home in Bangkok. May her family live in a happy life forever. I will definitely come back and visit her in the future. Thank you very much, Auntie. All the best!

Sutta has been an extraordinary host in every aspect. She made us feel so welcome - like a member of the family. She helped us whenever needed - be it calling taxis, showing us the neighbourhood, finding an optician for contacts or a supermarket to buy certain things we wanted. Her sister cooked for us the most authentic Thai meals one can imagine. Her garden is a refuge after the huste and bustle of a day in downtown Bangkok and having a breakfast on the veranda is a treat and a beautiful way to start a day. after a good night's rest on the great guest beds she offers.
So if you want to be part of a Thai family and like a quiet, natural green spot while staying in Bangkok, then Sutta's place is a must go to!

Suttaporn Shinawatra is very accommodating, directing us to local attractions and restaurants, and in fact driving us to a few area spots and/or arranging for taxi service.  She keeps a very clean and spacious house, and it is a delight being out of the downtown area for a more quiet and peaceful stay in Bangkok.  I will stay with her again when I next travel through Bangkok.

It was really an unforgettable experience for our 2-night stay at Sude' s house. Sude treated us like family and it made us felt at home. I have several stories to tell. When she knew one of my friends was suffering from a heavy cough, she drove us to a drug store immediately and made the soup especially for my friend. Everytime before we   went out, she wrote an instruction in English and Thai(for taxi). The house was clean and tidy, well decorated. We enjoyed sitting in the balcony and having the homemade delicious breakfast, with a good view of the beautiful garden. When I have left the house and arrived at the airport, I received a call from Sude, asking if I forgot an ipad in her house. I was just looking for it! She sent someone to deliver it to me immediately. She was so kind and considerate. The service was about 5-star hotel, maybe even better. I wish I could stay a little bit longer. I will definitely choose the same place when I go to Bangkok next time.

As the first Belgian Family -my parents, daughter of 2,5 & myself, we had a wonderful time at Aunti's lush Villa complex!

After travelling non-stop for 3weeks to Vietnam, Cambodja and Thailand this was the best end to our holidays.

Staying a bit outside the heart of Bangkok, surrounded by a lush garden, and Su's personalized suggestions on what to do/ what not to do.. was a great way to enjoy our stay to the fullest!

Starting with a delicious home made breakfast in the garden, and ending with a good night sleep/rest in a well designed /clean / user friendly/ bright interior - with lots of natural lighting!

What more to say? Thanks for everything! And looking forward to come again!!! (with the family!)

Suttaporn was a very nice host. We stayed two times one night and enjoyed the huge garden, the included breakfast and her knowledge how to get from A to B.
Its located in a really quiet and secure area where there is not a lot of traffic. (Note: On rushours it could take more than an hour to the citycenter.)
The rooms are very clean, with AC and everything you need.

I have been to Bangkok three times now and Pao's place has definitely been my favorite. I was only there for a one night lay over and got in late in the evening. I had my taxi driver call the phone number Pao gave to me and he was waiting for me on the street when I pulled up. His place is in an authentic Bangkok experience away from the hustle and bustle of the crazy city. Clean, charming and quiet. Pao and his family when out of their way to make me feel comfortable.

What an experience! We had a really good time staying in Paos guest house! It's a really nice and authentic area with a feeling that not too many tourists have been there. The location is very close to the airport, so it's the perfect way to ease into Thailands life after the long flight. Pao was a great host, very helpful and accommodating, showing us around and taking us to his restaurant for dinner, or even to the art university I was interested in, which lies very close. He even arranged a taxi for us on our way to Bangkok. There is a nice restaurant and a cafe just next to the guesthouse and of course his own very cozy bar/restaurant just under the the sleeping rooms (closing already at 7pm, so it's not loud) Would happily stay there again! Recommend it to any one, and especially the ones, who wants to see a Bangkok beside the parts, tourist are usually able to reach. Thank you for everything, Pao!

Pao is a great host who took us to his favourite food stall when we arrived hungry.  His waterfront accommodation is comfortable and full of character. He must be the countries foremost collector of coca cola paraphernalia too! We will be back!

Pao is very flexible, understanding, righteous, down-to-earth and great host! This guesthouse is situated in rural area of Bangkok which is very close to Suvarnabhumi airport and it is very secured. It's a retro cafe/guesthouse with awesome view. I love my room. Pao brought me to eat many local cuisine, which was delicious till I bought one dish as takeout to eat in the airport and he even gave suggestions to visit (non-touristy place). This cafe is located inside a community which I felt hard to navigate at first, fortunately Pao gave clear and simple instructions (in both English and Thai) so I had no problem locating the cafe. It may get noisy in the late evening as motor boats passes by and morning market is just opposite the room, so bring along ear plugs if you have it. I booked for a night but my flight was in the evening, Pao was so kind to let me have the room till it was time for me to leave! He even sent me off to grab a cab with my belongings. This place is a great opportunity to experience Thai community. I will be back to stay for more nights.

Really enjoyed staying at Pao's place. As if like magic he met me from
my taxi. It's a little tricky to find so very happy he met me. The taxi from the airport was easy. The room was great and the whole place has so much character. Definitely recommend it !!

We spent only one but extremely nice night at Pao's. Our host waited for us and made us feel comfortable despite our long travel. The dinner was an excellent introduction to thai food. Concerning the room, it was clean, cosy and very typical with a nice view on the canal (and an impressive collection of Coca Cola's items !). Thank you again Pao !
Pao was a lifesaver and came to find me on his bike as my taxi driver was somewhat confused, and the guided me to his exotic river-side place. Close to airport, recommended

Pao was very kind with us! It was great to stay at his house. It's a beautifull cafe next to the water, in a very local environement.
We arrived late and he waited for us in the street. He also helped us to buy some bus tickets. So, he was very helpfull!
We would love to come back, Pao!

We had a great stay at Pao's place! It's very close to the airport (150 thb taxi drive), so convenient for a first or last night in the country. The place is located in a small community near the canal, which gives it a specific, non citylike, atmosphere.
Pao was a very helpful host. We didn't have a plan yet for the next days and with all night trains to the South fully booked, he helped is figure out other options.
Would highly recommand the place to anyone!!
Pao was really nice! And his place was so cool! Although we just stayed for hours, we enjoyed everything there. It was a place that I would definitely recommend to others.

My wife,  brother and sister in- law and I visited Thailand for a couple's trip for 2 weeks.   We stayed in this beautiful high rise building at the very top of the building in a beautiful cozy 2 bedroom 2 bath condo. Vittavas, (or as he became more of a friend than a host, Vit) was extremely warm,  welcoming and fully prepared with any details we needed to make our trip a successful one.   From understanding and using the public transportation systems to the best and safest places to visit in and around the city,  Vit was on top of it all.  His condo was fully equipped with all the modern functionality needed in today's world. The building is extremely modern with a full gym and a beautiful swimming pool that.... yes is clean and very well maintained. The climate in Bangkok is extremely hot and sticky and we so much appreciated the fact that both the condo and the building where fully air conditioned.  We've learned over our years of travel that if you have a wonderful space to stay in when you're traveling it makes your vacations so much more beautiful and so much more enjoyable... this condo became more of a temporary home in Bangkok and because we were able to have that luxury we didn't have to worry about our stay... our belongings or our safety so that we could enjoy our vacation worry free! Thank you so much Vit for all of your attention to detail, your joyful personality and all of your help wish you  great success!

Vittavas on erittäin ystävällinen, mukava ja huomaavainen. Hän tekee kaikkensa, että vieraat viihtyisivät ja tuntisivat olonsa kotoisaksi.
Asunto on todella viihtyisä ja jopa hienompi mitä kuvat antavat ymmärtää. Siisti ja puhdas.
Meillä oli ikimuistoinen vierailu Vittavaksen luona. Hän huolehti meistä kuin omasta perheestään ja teki kaikkensa, että meillä olisi hyvä ja turvallinen olo. Vit on todella täsmällinen ja kaikki mitä hän sanoi, hän myös teki niin kuin oli sanonut.
Vittavas on tehnyt vierailun todella helpoksi eikä vieraan tarvitse murehtia oikeastaan mistään. Jos on jotain kysyttävää tai haluaa neuvoa niin hän etsii vastaukset jos ei niitä jo tiedä.
Lähellä oli kaikki palvelut mitä tarvitsimme.
Uima-allas oli mieluinen lapsillemme.
Menemme varmasti uudestaan!

We stayed at the apartement for 2 days.
2 adults and 2 children. Our 3 year old slept in the small bedroom and we slept with our 10 month old in the masterbedroom.
The place is really nice. Its not huge, but its very well distributed, and has everything you need.
The apartement is on the top floor of the building (37.) and has a super nice view of Bangkok. We also really enjoyed the swimmingpool. Clean and refreshing.
Vit is such a nice guy, and he has thought of every little detail. Map of the area both in thai and english, water, fresh fruit in the fridge, airport pickup and drop off!!
We didnt go to the city center, since we have been many times, and we where just here to relax between 2 flights, so didnt have the need to go sightseeing. So I dont know how the place is located if you have to go downtown, but for us the area was great. Theres a huge shopping mall close by, and there was also lots of little street food places right next to. And also the usual 7-ellevens and familymart. So you have everything you need.
All in all a very good stay and good value. We have already booked the place again for when we come back to Bangkok ;-)

Vittavas was an extraordinary host! He picked us up at the airport, drove us around Bangkok, helped us get groceries and a SIM card.

His apartment was very clean, had more than just the basic essentials, and had a great view of Bangkok. My kids loved the fact that the condo was on the top floor. They liked having a pool too.

What a great introduction to Thailand. I highly recommend staying here.

The place was nice and clean, located high up in the development offering a great view of the city. Host graciously provided drinking water, snacks and fruits to refresh ourselves upon checkin. Friendly and flexible arrangements were also accommodated. Highly recommended!

Vittavas is a very friendly and helpful host, we enjoyed our stay at his apartment. We arrived in bangkok in the evening and he gave us a pickup from the airport, we even made a short stop for dinner. Apartment was clean and we had everything we needed, he even offered some snacks. location near airport, pretty far from citycentre, but convenient for us. GREAT HOST, Thank you so much!!

It is an awesome experience living in this condo. First of all, there is very good view on the top of the building with a garden. You can enjoy sunrise and sunset here. And you also have a garden on 22nd floor. Besides, there is a swimming pool and also a fitness center on 8th floor. You can use sauna as well. The apartment is well decorated. There are six people in our group and we live comfy. Apart from the living environment, the best part is the landlord. Vittavas is super nice. He prepared rose apples, bottle water and many snacks in the apartment before we arrive. And he even showed us around the city. He picked us up everytime we needed. I will definitely recommend this condo for my friends. :)

Second time here, and just as good as the first stay.
Nothing more to say - just book it before someone else does!! :-)

Vittavas was such a great host!
Thanks to him we saw so much of Bangkok in our 1 week stay, had great local food, boat trips and some other attractions.
He was always there to help us , he was also always available for us if we needed some help or if we had queastions.
The apartment looks exactly like the pictures, has aircondition in every room and warm water if needed.
In conclusion we just had everything we needed and we would always come back
Totally recommendable!

The host Vittavas helped us a lot during our stay and it was so helpful in some unfamiliar situations. He provided free drinking water, fruits and some snacks. Also, he prepared enough bedclothes for those who might have slept on the floor and even tablewares for my little nieces. He picked up and dropped off when we went to an airport, Safari World and a mall. So we didn't feel any inconvenience about the location of this accommodation.
He must be one of the most helpful and considerate hosts.
The house is on the top floor of the condominium building of which security seemed pretty tight. My little nieces loved swimming in the indoor pool and the other family members enjoyed using the gym and the sauna. The best part of the house was absolutely the great view from all the rooms, even in the bathroom..:)
At night, we could see and feel the life of the locals by getting out of the building and walking along the street on the left-hand side. There were 3 convenience stores and lots of stores and street vendors within 5 minutes.
We strongly recommend this accommodation!!!!!
Great spot, perfect for a small or large groups. Amenities were a big sell point. Location is prime. Felt incredibly safe in a doorman building. No complaints!
Beautiful apartment. Good location. I will choose it if we (at least 3 people) go to Bangkok again.

Had a great experience staying at Inthanom's. Very pleasant guy, flawless communications, willing to go beyond to make sure you have a comfortable stay. Apartment was spacious, spotless, amenities provided as advertised. Location was within walking distance to everything you need. Lots of restaurants and convenience stores nearby. Reception lady was nice to make sure that our apt was cleaned on time. Security was also very kind for getting us a taxi and alerting the hospital of our arrival when we had a little accident. Would definitely stay here again.

Spacious apartment in a great location. It's a few blocks from several good restaurants, BTS station, and night markets. While a bit hard for some taxi drivers to find, it was a great location and close to other city sites. We stayed with our four young children, and had plenty of space for everyone. Compared to regular hotels, it was a fantastic value and much more comfortable. Spotlessly clean and 24/7 concierge desk for easy check-in. Thanks!

We stayed for 4 nights with 4 adults and 2 kids. The rooms were spacious and clean, especially the master and the room with the two twin beds. The third bedroom was a bit small. The AC all worked great. The condo had enough bathrooms for all of us. The master bath has a switch to turn on for hot water-FYI.
Inthanom or Alfred (not sure which person we dealt with lol) helped us arranged an airport transfer when we got in for about $50 one way. He also helped with a van and driver for one day to explore on our 3rd day at the last minute. That was extremely helpful.
The location of the condo was great for shopping and eating. The day market right outside the condo was a pleasant surprise for us. Lots of food and souvenirs to offer. There was a small food court directly across from the complex which served delicious food for a very reasonably price. The supermarket was also just a step outside which made it convenient. The staff was also very helpful (especially Yi). They recommended a tailor shop for us down the street. My husband had 3 suits made at a steal of a deal. Overall, we had a good experience and this was our first Airbnb and we will do it again.
Thanks we had a great stay. The place was perfect and the location was a short taxi drive from a lot of tourist attractions and fun food/drinks places.

The apartment was perfect, spacious and very clean, ideally located near the BTS and all the shops needed for shopping. Inthanom gives great advice and knows the neighborhood perfectly. The recommended restaurants are excellent! I would recommend to everyone and definitely will book again for my next trip. Thank you Inthanom.
very nice
Good place and location.
非常不错的一个apartment，价格合理，在市中心。以后来曼谷还会选择

My stay here was fine. I didn't realise it was more a guesthouse than a home and as a result didn't get to meet the host which is something I prefer when going with Airbnb. The location is OK. It's fairly central but not on public transport routes which is a little awkward. The room itself was nice, clean and comfortable.

This is a hotel actually just listed on AirBnB.

My stay was actually quite pleasant. The rooms were clean, theres 24 hour front desk service and Narinyaporn was very accommodating with us and making sure we knew how to get there and was there to answer any questions we had.

The location is a little out of the way of main attractions and you will have to take a taxi around, but I feel thats the way for most of Bangkok anyways.
Really good :)

We really enjoyed our stay in this hostel. The room was clean and and we have got an air control in it.
The charwoman comes every day if you want. We get water and fresh Towels every day.
At the receiving you can get cold water or beer and its a 24h service at the reception, so you can come and go when ever you want.
Everybody is very kind and will help you if you have a question.

酒店位置不错，干净卫生。
前台热情，能用英语给你提供各种旅游，腐败等建议。
This is a hotel actually.But my stay here was quite pleasant. The room was clean ,tidy and quiet. A little far away from BTS,but still worth living here.

This is a very interesting location. Within walking distance to the mall avenue and MBK.
Its an hotel that has rooms, the beds were very comfortable. The staff was friendly
We had a really good stay . it's very clean and the staff is friendly and helpful !
位置在小巷里面，有些的士司机都不知道地址。但是房子蛮干净的，要注意的是晚上太晚不能使用洗衣机，洗衣机是公用的，要给30B。房东很好人，有什么问题可以问前台。房子其实离SIAM CENTER 不远，但是最好是搭TAXI，不然走路会很累。
The house is so clean,and the front desk staff is so nice!You can ask them the information about BKK.
Location, accommodations, and service all added up to make a wonderful stay. We consider this listing to be our home in Bangkok.
Fantastic place to stay.
good value

The apartment is so very spacious and my friends all like it might much.
The location is great, 3 min to Chong Nonsi station. And Inthanom arranged a van to pick us up at the airport and was very helpful throughout our stay.

We have travelled all across the world and always liked staying in apartments more than hotels because of places like this. Location is perfect, apartment is huge with comfortable rooms and a great common area. Inthanom will be always at your disposal ready to help. Absolutely top knotch. Look no further and make this your home in Bangkok like we did.

We stay at Inthanom
He was an excellent host
Te apartment is beautiful clean and well located
He help us a lot to go to ayutthya and recommend a van for our family
Everything works and we had a easy and fast answer wherever we need
I definitely recommend this place this apartment and this host
Thanks a lot we loved bangkok
A nice place to live while discovering Bangkok. The apartment was super clean and you have a lot of space. Highly recommended!

Super appartement très bien placé calme propre
Excellente adresse
Wonderful place! You can find anything you need in minutes!

Inthanom's place was the definition of immaculate!! The place was amazing! Clean and looked even more gorgeous then the pictures. I would highly, highly  recommend this place to anyone who is wanting to stay in bangkok for long or short time. The location was perfect with walking distance to numerous cafes and restaurants. It was also a short taxi ride to all the nightlife. The staff in the lobby was very friendly and extremely helpful as well. Anytime I go back to bangkok I will make sure to stay at inthanom's residence!

So appreciate Mr.Tor's warm reception, he replyed our booking instently and always reply msg quickly. We are honored to be his first guests. He is the best airbnb landlord we met and house Fantastic 44 is most prefect house we book too. The house is designed by Mr.Tor his own, whole space is decorated by adorable vintage style furnitures. It locates in a quite area, easy to call a taxi or to get MRT. Living supply is available nearby the house (7-11 and Family Mart, markets ect.). The outdoor space is also enjoyable. Very big living room and strong air-conditioner, the kitchen has everything you need. Two bedrooms in upstairs are competely individual, comfortable and quite.Convient shower rooms in both toilet. The most amazing part is the maid's cooking，we enjoyed different Thai traditional home made cooking every morning without going out anywhere., so we have been put on weight surely. It is unforgettable experience in Fantastic 44，thanks again to Mr.Tor for take good care of us！Looking forward to live in here again！The dog named Krating is cute tho！plz ask dog food frm the maid. Thanx.
谢谢 Mr.Tor 的热情招待，我们很荣幸成为第一任房客。这是我们在Air Bnb 上遇到的最完美的房子和房东！Fantastic44 是Tor 自己独立设计装饰的南洋复古风格是我们特别喜欢的，闹中取静的位置，出行很方便，门口可以买到各种生活必需品。房子室外花园很舒服，我们每天都在享受室外阳光，你想得到的和想不到的，房子里面一切应有尽有！一楼客厅非常大，冷气很足，厨房设备齐全，楼上的房间是独立的互相不打扰很安静，两个卫生间很方便，冲淋水流很大；特别要说是Tor的佣人太会做饭啦，住了13天每天早上的早餐都不带重复的，足不出户吃遍了泰式传统美食，我们都吃胖了，住在Fantastic44 特别难忘，关键是，连狗狗都超级可爱，记得问佣人要狗粮立刻和狗狗变成好朋友！下次来曼谷还要住这里！

Our stay with Tor was incredible. He was very welcoming and helpful throughout. The house is wonderfully appointed, very contemporary but distinctly Thai, with beautiful open spaces and stylish furnishings.

Its location is just outside of bustling downtown Bangkok, in a neighborhood serviced by a rich and dynamic night market, where all manner of authentic Thai foods are available. Turn off onto the street the house is on and the visitor is welcomed into a quiet sanctuary, a middle-class Thai community with wonderful architecture and neighbors.

There is a household maid who cleans the house daily, as well as providing delicious breakfasts each morning. Our favorite was rice porridge, although the grilled pork skewers (moo ping) with sticky rice were also delightful.

Tor was consistently available to provide us with advice, directions, and other necessary explanations regarding life in Bangkok, and also has a library of tour books that were very helpful in maximizing our experience. His background in architecture and design contributed greatly to having put together such a wonderful space. We would stay again on any future trips to Bangkok.

I have a fantastic time in Fantastic 44 with my family. From booking to checkin to the stay to checkout, The host -Mr. Tor remained engaged,friendly and helpful to us, serves us like VIP (even draw us a map by hand, that's lovely! ), we appreciate everything at here!

The house was cozy and had everything we needed. Clean and big enough for three to five people. Decoration is quite cool with style. It mixed with some vintage furnitures. We enjoyed watching NBA live games & Movies. The bed was super comfortable. Highly recommend this!

It's also provided free Thai traditional breakfast, it's really yummy and we never tried before!

Fantastic 44 is located near Huai Khwang MRT station. It's just one station away to Train night market Ratchada. Fantastic 44 is surrounded by interesting local culture, would be a great experiences for tourist.

Hope to come back again!

Nous avons passé un super séjour à Bangkok, grâce au formidable accueil de Tor, dans sa jolie petite maison, à la décoration raffinée (nous sommes chez un artiste !) et à la propreté irréprochable.
De plus, le petit déjeuner, soit local, soit continental, à la demande, est remarquable.
Nous recommandons vivement cette adresse, très pratique, proche Chatuchac (marché du week end) et du métro pour découvrir Bangkok.
Tor est une personne charmante, vraiment très sympathique et aux petits soins pour ses hôtes. Sa maison est grande, avec un grand espace pour le salon, la salle à manger et la cuisine, et de belles chambres avec de belles salles d'eau.
La maison est climatisée, ce qui, pour nous est très agréable.

The experience of staying with Tor was in any way so pleasant. We could not have met a better place to stay in Bangkok and not a better host. It started with having nice conversation before we arrived, we were equipped with a precise street map in English and Thai (note that most cab drivers will only be able to read Thai), which brought as directly to the small side street, where the appartment is located. Although close to a main road this little hideaway is perfectly private and quiet. It is actually an independent small two story house in the yard next to Tor's house, trees and flowers in the yard. The pictures showing the house interior are an exact description of what you will find, there is a spacious kitchen corner/living room, which occupies the first floor, comfortable seating, wide windows on either side. All of the furniture is chosen with a real sense of taste, all the decoration items and art pieces (some are Tor's own paintings) are carefully placed, nothing odd. The two bed rooms upstairs are really cosy, bath rooms on each floor are spacious with rain showers and style and technique on the level of a well equipped 4star hotel.
Every morning started with a nice and extensive breakfast provided by Tor's Birmise maid, very individual, always something different on any of the days. Tor sometimes sneaked around the corner before he left to his office or after he returned, always caring, never to pressing. We could even leave some of our suitcases in a storage room, while we travelled other places in Thailand.
Or in a brief sentence: we felt like home in the best sense of the word. So, if you want to stay in a good area of Bangkok, being able to calm down from the city noise after a busy day this may be (no, this is!!) your best choice.

We had a fantastic stay at Tor's place. We arrived extremely late, literally in the middle of the night, but Tor waited for us and welcomed us still. We left before dawn broke and Tor not only booked us a cab and also walked us out. The driver is his neighbor, also a very nice guy. About the house, the decoration is very unique, with many vintage stuff, which I love. There are also many paintings, which I also love. The beds feel like heaven, nice sheets, soft pillows, very comfortable. The location is also perfect. Hidden in a small alley, it's very quiet, but when you get to the main road, there are so many to do, massage places, night market, so much fun. Don't worry about not being able to find it, Tor prepared detailed map, both in English and Thai, which you can show to the taxi driver. And most importantly, it's close to MRT, amazing, right? All in all, great place, highly recommended!

这绝对是一次无与伦比的居住游玩体验，毫不夸张地说因为这个房子我爱上上了曼谷这座城市。房东人不仅热情谦和还会在很多游玩方面给你非常细心的建议。房子的地理位置也处于老城区去哪里都很方便，坐凸凸车一人10株就可以到mrt（地铁），临行时房东还开车送我们去地铁站。特别要说的是房主除了在房子装修方面非常有品味，在家具用品等选材上也是选用高档用具，床垫是记忆棉的，给游玩一天的我一个舒适的睡眠，每天房东都会问想要几点用早餐，对了！住在这里是会得到免费的地道的早餐，食材是每天选用新鲜的食材。入住第一天我最大的感受就是后悔只预定了三天，我简直想在这里住上一个月。硬件方面，设施齐全，连急救箱都配置的非常全面，总之，来曼谷住这里就没错了。

Coming back to this lovely place and I even enjoyed it more. The night market is so much fun to explore. And fresh vegetables and seafood are also available here during daytime. Since Tor has everything in the kitchen, you can cook some delicious dishes if you are good at it. Sitting in the yard, playing with the cute dog, is so relaxing. Tor prepared different breakfasts everyday when we were here. He also gave some really good advice about what to eat and what to do. We really appreciate it. Wish I could stay longer:)

Fantastic44 is a kind of brand for me, they do have their own logo, T-shirts, even nail clippers. Host Tor is one very friendly man. And fantastic44 is super tidy and clean! I'll say it's a paradise for Virgo.

Tor是我见过最好的房东，他真的让我爱上泰国，他是真心在关心并且希望帮助你，刚下飞机去Tor的房子，竟然发现他早就在大门外等候，进门就送上来冰镇好的新鲜椰子，因为坐飞机很累还带着孩子，Tor帮我们买了非常好吃的晚饭，并且种类特别丰富，还帮我们买了冰镇汽水，第二天需要早晨三点多赶飞机，Tor三点多就起床跟我们道别，帮我们搬运行李，真的不知道说什么好。房间整齐又很有气质，真的很享受在里面的每一秒，我觉得能在千里之外感到真实的温暖，还有就是Tor真的很帅！！！已经期待下次的泰国之行了！

Both, the apartment and the host were excellent. We arrived late night and Wuttiphon was very flexible in providing us the key. The apartment is top notch, very clean and everything is in place. Would recommend anyone to stay there.

This is a really nice place to stay. Only take 10mins taxi from airport. The room is brand new and clean with a big balcony and very comfortable bed. Wuttiphon and his parents are the best host, and i really regretted I just spent one day here. I will come here again.#BKKdeservestay#

房子非常棒！曼谷最后一天住的，离机场和周末市场十几分钟车程，是房东在自家庭院建的木房，自带独立小庭院，干净舒服颇惬意。房东的热心让我们老感动，亲自接待，提供免费零食咖啡茶，临走还帮我们叫车和买早餐，一举一动都特别绅士~The house is very good! Is an independent garden log cabin, room is very clean and comfortable we relax here. House close to the weekend market and the don muang airport ~ Wuttiphon is in Bangkok this time we ran into the friends of the gentleman and friendly, he personally to greet our arrival, check in time help us a lot of, also call a taxi for us and buy breakfast when we leave , we are very moved.（I m not  good at English, is Google translate these words ）
离廊漫机场，周末市场近，曼谷交通不好，所以赶飞机还是近点好，房间很棒，房东随时热情沟通，还推荐我们去了一个小岛，很不错
很棒，离机场很近，房间很干净，可以叫房东推荐附近玩的，附近一些吃的也不错，推荐体验一下这样的生活。
房间非常好！在泰国市中心打车司机不打表很近都要150-200泰铢，在这打车去市内虽然有十多公里，但是也只要170泰铢，这样的民宿更能体验当地生活

We only had one day staying at Bangkok, and Wuttiphon and his family gave us a very warm welcome. His mother even drove us to the main road to take a taxi to Central Plaza. The room is cozy and the garden is very lovely. The room is just about 10mins drive to Don Mueang airport. We had a flight at 6:45am in next day. Wuttiphon called a taxi for us and get up so early to say goodby to us. Thanks to Wuttiphon we had a good time in Bangkok.
我们虽然只有一天待在曼谷，但是房东Wutttiphon和他的家人都非常照顾我们，他妈妈甚至载我们到马路边大出租到central plaza。房间很整洁和舒适，外面的小花园和可爱哦，我们拍了不少照片。到廊曼机场质押o0fenzhong的车程。我们第二天是6：45的飞机，房东帮我们叫了出租，而且还在5点钟起来跟我们道别。非常感谢 Wuttiphone，我们在曼谷的一天过得非常愉快。

The house is very a very good place to have a rest for you . It's about 15mins to get to there by the taxi. And the household is very friendly and would like to help me with my plan to travel. Good place

We had an amazing time here. The host was very friendly and accommodating, even booked a taxi for us to the airport. And woke up early to say goodbye. Airport is really close by so it's perfect if you're looking for a place to stay before your flight. Lots of markets and things to see nearby. Quiet neighbourhood so we got plenty of rest. Room is as described, modern and clean.

I had a wonderful stay in Wuttiphon's cottage. I had only one night in Bangkok and an early flight in the morning, so needed something close to the airport. The location was perfect -- only 10 minutes to the airport. The space was clean, quiet and cozy. It was close to a vibrant night market. Wuttiphon was very helpful. He booked at taxi for me and even got up at 4 am to see me off.

Mong and Mon provided a lovely homely environment in a wonderful local neighbourhood easily accessible to Bangkok. The self contained house was presented really well, delicious traditional breakfast was supplied and Mon was never short of being extremely hospitable and helpful with his excellent english.
