Mong also. I really enjoyed my stay in this quaint charming and friendly neighbourhood. It was really easy and surprisingly cheap to catch a tuk tuk to the center also there are many songtaews that can take you to Krung Thon Buri station. There are several markets nearby as recommended by our hosts.

Momg is a great host and a very kind lady! One day we went out in the morning without knowing that almost all roads would be closed for the event of "bike for dad". When we came back we had to take train. But once we got off the train we totally got lost. Momg drove to the closest shopping mall, walked 10 minutes to pick us up. The next day we left at 6am. She walked us to the gate and even packed breakfast for us and the driver. A very warm-hearted host with lovely nature garden and delicious breakfast :)

All the best!

Mama's Garden is a little slice of paradise! The house itself is beautifully decorated and very comfortable, and the garden is wonderful.
The Thonburi area is on the west bank of the Chao Phraya and is wonderful. It's quieter than on the east bank, more relaxed, has less tourists and locals are invariably friendly. Like many places in Bangkok, the streets are a sort of open air kitchen/restaurant crammed with delicious delights.
There are some nice sights to see in Thonburi (Wat Arun, the canals, markets, ...) and the other districts are easily accessed by cross-river ferry (at Khlongsan market, just a short walk), Skytrain, meter taxi or tuk-tuk.
Our host was amazing, she fulfilled our every wish so we are already looking forward to staying at this lovely place again.

Mama garden is a very nice and quiet place to stay, easy to move
everywhere in Bkk...Mong is a really sympathic person who we ll help you and any case...for this time meditation will be in "prathat doi suthep" for another experience...thanks a lot and take care...Christophe & Sylvie

Mama Garden is a great place to stay in Bangkok, away from the craziness of the big mango. A little house in a nice garden, close to the Chaophraya river, very convenient to go to the main touristic places on a slow pace with the locals. It's also only 100 baths from Khaosan road by taxi.
Mong is a very hospitable host, helpful and always willing to do best. She prepares very good breakfasts that you can eat in the garden.
We really enjoyed our stay and plan to stay a few more nights on our way back.

Mama Garden实在是太棒了，很有泰国的风格，很可以airbnb不能上传照片，房子很漂亮，早餐很好吃，很丰盛。我们凌晨1点半才到曼谷，mang很好人，一直等到我们3点半，告诉我们房间一些东西怎么用，然后确认我们明天几点起床，想吃什么口味的晚餐，以方便给我们准备早餐。房间里还有免费的水、茶、咖啡提供。住了两晚，早餐都是不一样的。我还发现一个很贴心的地方，mang把我的照片打印出来放在相框里，放在书桌上。房间2张床，如果挤一挤，可以睡4个人，然后地板可以再睡2个人。哈哈。地板很干净。
再说周边环境，附近有2家7-11，都是在路口转角位置，所以很方便我们确认位置，早上和晚上，靠近mama garden的那家7-11附近，有几家卖烧烤，或者水果，都很好吃，也不贵。总之，附近有很多好吃的。>_<哈哈。这里在2个BTS站的中间，B6和B7，走过去有些远，大概1.5公里，如果觉得远，在第二个7-11附近有公交车或者写着BTS的tutu车都可以到达，一个人大概几株左右。B6站可以换乘免费的渡轮到asiatique夜市，所以逛完夜市回去很方便，不远。
总之，好喜欢mang，好喜欢mama garden，下次来曼谷，一定还会选这里。
mang，如果我有哪里做的不好，请多多包涵哦。^_^
忘了说，mang很热情的问我们会去哪里玩，然后告诉我们怎么去，谢谢您。

Mong est une hôtesse fantastique elle a était aux petits soins pour nous
Elles nous a guidée dans nos visites à bangkok
Elle nous a concocter de délicieux petits déjeuners
Toujours soucieuse de notre confort et bien etre

We had a delightful stay at Mama Garden's! Madam Mong went out of her way to make us feel at home and to make sure we were having a pleasant time. She genuinely hosts from the hart and that was tangible and visible in everything! The beautiful cottage is decorated with a charming eye for detail and even the delicious breakfasts she makes are plated up with great care! Before we even arrived she offered to contact our former host to explain the best way to travel to find her place. The neighbourhood is friendly, the Chao Phraya river is practically around the corner and it's a perfect base to explore the city of Bangkok. On our last day Madam Mong's son took us on an impressive and very much appreciated walk along the hidden treasures of the West Bank, which is still quite undiscovered by tourists. Thank you all ever so much for an exquisite AirB&B experience! We can't wait to be back!

MAMA GARDEN is so good that we really do not want to leave Mong's house. It is more likely your home in Bongkok and Mong is your aunty. They took good care of us and offered different kinds of king size breakfast everyday(The breakfast tasted so good and honestly, it was much better than my mom's cook,hahaha). The house is independent and very quiet at night, so don't worry about the noise and you even can hear the croak of frogs. The location is so good, you can find two 7-11 shops nearby and there are a lot of local food around their community. It is easy to get to the pier and the BRT station.

Mong and her family are so nice. They helped us a lot and wrote down my destination in Thai language. They were very thoughtful in every little detail. You can find everything you need in your room and we feel so comfortable. The decoration of the house is old-Thai style and everywhere in the garden is vey clean and beautiful. We really love it very much. Mong sent my mom and me two different flowers and gave us a lovely gift.

We thank you for everything you did for us. Living in your garden left a really good memory in our life and we do miss you so much when we come back to China. Give you my best wishes and we will see you again when we come back to Bangkok.
Nice commendation, mama gave us lots of help

Toni was an amazing host and helped us with all requests we had. We arrived at 9 pm in the evening and he was already awaiting us with all information we needed. He even helped the taxidriver to find the exact place. Awesome in a really buzzing city like Bangkok. The appartement was more than perfect for us. As we were traveling with our little daughter the two rooms made it easy to relax at night even when the baby was sleeping already. The pool and gym on the top roof are wonderful to relax after a busy day in the city. As the BTS station is just in front of the condo traveling through the city was really easy and comfortable. We did like the flair and people of the area a lot. We hardly met any tourist but rather enjoyed a real Bangkok life with amazing street food, business people, outdoor aerobics and lots of other interesting stuff. We highly recommend this place for sure. Thanks again Toni.

Tony was very repsonsive, friendly and accomodating!
Appartment was exactly like described and on Pictures with the magnificient pool:)!

Tres bonne experience a Bangkok. L appartement est neuf et tres propre. Il est bien place et juste a cote d une station bts. Nous n avons pas rencontrer tony mais celui ci repondait a nos mails tres rapidement. Je recommande cet hote.

这间公寓在BTS的saphan kwai站口，非常好找。虽然挨着城铁但因为位置好，屋里完全听不到任何噪音。

位置相当便利，从市中心的四面佛打车过去，在大堵车的情况下，花了当地币200株不到。如果去考山路的夜市，晚上打车回来也十分的便宜。白天不建议打车是因为曼谷四处都很容易堵车。

打车的话，给司机看The editor condo这个公寓名字，大部分司机认识。但如果不认识的话，告诉他你去saphan kwai就行了。

公寓出来走几步就有7-11和各种小超市，还有个大超市叫bigC.
楼下路边摊极其多，各种当地小吃。距离乍都周末市场也不太远，可以溜达过去。

公寓挺封闭的，大门口永远都有门卫，大厅也有工作人员，只有一个入口，进去要刷卡，电梯也要刷卡。安全很有保障。

顶楼的泳池白天几乎没人，午饭后的时间会偶尔有外国人游泳，但也很清静。我和朋友都非常非常非常喜欢那里，差不多每天都上去泡一会儿，拍了很多超棒的照片。

房间很整洁，布局也很合理。洗衣服晾衣服十分方便。房东还准备了很多餐具，可以买点儿简单的东西来做早饭。床不是那种软软的床垫，是硬一点儿的，但我和朋友完全能接受。

房东Tony人很热心，一直在信息里关心我们的状况。
总之这个公寓我们非常喜欢，以后还想要再来！！

This apartment is very beautiful, very quiet, convenient location, swimming pool has a beautiful view,Tony is very nice，
We all like the apartment very much, and I hope we can come back again.
Very nice and clean little place in an excellent building with great facilities.
房子就如图片中一样的干净整洁，大楼的保安设施非常好私密性非常强！门口一分钟就是skytrain，非常非常方便！步行5分钟就可以去周末集市逛逛！非常愉快的入住体验，希望下次可以有机会再次入住！！！

1. swimming pool/library/executive lounge/gym facilities: this is the reason why I chose Tony's apartment. Interior of this condo is spectacular. Swimming pool looks as exactly as the picture from 10 a.m.- 4:30 p.m. (so amazing to lie down at the pool cabana) In the library, you can read all the trendy books in a quiet atmosphere (great work environment). Lobby/executive lounge/gym/library is all air-conditioned. Amazing facilities. really.

2. Tony is very responsive and willing to help me no matter what. I requested so many things such as providing towels at once for a month/ clearing the clogged drain / providing small pots /asking so many small questions about apartment. He was willing to help me every time that I ask something. And I think he has a great system to manage his condos that he own.

3. The room is very spacious (big closet/ spacious living area). Also the room is very quiet.

4. location is quite far from the city, but you can take BTS. 1 min to BTS station. (I never take BTS, so it takes an hour to go to sukumvit by taxi after 4 p.m. / 20 min to Sathorn / 20 min to Asiatique / 20 min to Siam) I heard JJ is really close from here. one stop away.

5. cleaning was not perfect at first (bugs in the toilet I was really scared), but as I requested, Tony's people came the next day and cleared it. (My second room that I'm staying at Tony's was spotless. very clean.).

All in all I'm very satisfied with this condo, enjoying my stay here at the beautiful swimming pool during the day. I strongly recommend Tony's condo.

Everything was great. The flat was very clean and super close to the skytrain station. Unfortunately we didn't meet Toni but he was responding to our messages really fast and so everything worked out perfectly. I would definitely recommend staying there.

The Appartement was wonderful. We had everything we needed and Check in, Check out worked out fine. Especially the Pool area on the 23rd floor was a great place to relaxe after a hot day in Bangkok.
We didn't meet Tony in person but he immediatly replied when we emailed him.
good condo！

Pupe is a fantastic host,
This little gem in the heart of china town is very simple to get to using the rail from the airport!
The street it's on is very up and coming with some great little bars and restaurants with live music!
A fantastic spot to start travels or a holiday in a Thai traditional home with aircon
Can't wait to visit again
Stuart
Very lovely acoomodation. Charming original. Its definetly worth the price. Good experience and very convenient location. The host is open eyed and helpful. We wiĺl come back with chance.
Lovely and well decorated place. Very cool and local feel. Love the place.

Pupe and her husband Victor are very welcoming. They take their time to present the house, the facilities and give tips about the neighborhood.
The house is in a good location, 7min walk from the train station. It's easy to find. The shophouse is superb, decorated with vintage furnitures and accessories. On the ground floor, there is the Spanish bar they owned. Then, on the first floor, there's a nice living area with the bathroom. On the second and last floor are the bedroom, a living room with couchs/beds and a nice terraces. Every room is clean and nicely decorated.
I strongly recommend Pupe and Victor

Our stay at Pupes Place was really nice! She was helpful in any way possible. E.g. Guiding the taxi driver to her home. Communication before arriving was easy and very quick. The house was very nicely decorated and pupe really showed a great sense of style. Location is also very nice! All in all we had a wonderful stay and me and my friends would recommend pupes place!! Thank you again for everything!

Great Place, very well located, close to Metro and Train Station, Easy to find. Even close to Chao Praya Express boat if you can walk 15 min. In addition Pupe and Victor are very welcoming and helpful, answering within minutes to all our questions. Good advises for food, massage, and enjoy Sonkran Festival!! The house is as described, beautifully decorated. Very unique home I guess. We loved discovering the inside of this old house.

The airbnb is in a wonderful location to see china town. It is a beautiful vintage style Chinese home. Also, great air conditioning and the beds were hard but not a problem for us. It is above a very cute and stylish bar!

We had a wonderful stay at Pupe and Victor's. The apartment is beautiful and the location is perfect if you want to get off the beaten path a bit. Pupe and Victor were very helpful and welcoming -- they gave us some great recommendations on places to eat and drink, and they also have a cozy restaurant and cafe downstairs if you're tired and don't feel like venturing out. We will most definitely be back :)
Wonderful, flexible host in a beautiful apartment! Pupe also had wonderful local recommendations that made our trip easier.  Loved the neighborhood.

The shophouse is in a great location - quite close to MRT station (about 5 min walk) and located on a nice, quiet street with some good bars/restaurants. The apartment itself is very spacious - and is nicely furnished exactly like the photos. There is good balcony upstairs to sit outside in the evening. Pupe was very welcoming and hospitable. Highly recommended!!
That was very good Apartment:)

とても良かった！
丁寧にかつ迅速に対応してもらえました。
また必ず伺いたいです。
Unbelievably nice people who care about your comfort and well being. If you are to visit Thailand, I highly recommend this place
Chalermvut is very hospitable ready to help out in any way possible. The place is great and I will definitely stay here again during my next visit to Thailand.
They are really really so kindness, helpful, perfect services, friendly and house was apsolutely perfect!!

여행내내 여기서 머무르실게 아니라면 이곳을 여행 마지막 숙소로 잡는것을 추천합니다. 왜냐하면 공항에서도 가깝고 미리 머문다면 그 뒤에 숙소들을 이곳과 비교하게 될 것 이기 때문이죠.
어쩌면 호텔보다 났습니다.
Quartiere molto calmo, appartamento molto ben fornito, accoglienza e assistenza nei giorni seguenti splendida. La mamma di Chalermvut, signora Pim, e' stata utilissima. Tornerei senz'altro
非常感动能够入住这样的民宿 Pim接待我们 还带我们去吃早点 晚上又开车带我们去夜市。房东在我们没有来之前就给我们很多有用的建议～都非常有耐心，房间非常惊喜 很干净 也很漂亮 感觉比图片还要漂亮 非常非常满意
A very lovely place with so kind persons. We are very happy (and lucky) to began our trip with Pim and Chalermvut. Thanks a lot for your kindness and your help ! :-)

Chalermvut and Pim were the perfect hosts, our arrival to Bangkok was a little late and they accommodate to that, the ride from BKK is a very short one. The apartment is a real beauty, great mattress with potent a/c, a well stocked kitchen, water bottle refills. the area is a quiet neighborhood with good Thai local restaurants, some cafes, halal eateries and more stores with everything you need.
Transportation around is by car or tuktuk but thanks to the cheap fares this is not a problem at all. Pim was nice enough to give us rides to Hua Mak airport link station, which connects to phaya Thai station for a 30 baht fare, when we arrived late at night, the taxi ride was 50bath (around USD$ 1.50)
Overall our expectations were exceeded and we are happy to start our Thailand journey at Chalermvut's apt. Thanks again!

Beautiful, clean and cost-effective apartment with brand-new furniture, located in a convenient area of Bangkok, easy to find and close to BTS.

Pim has been very friendly and check-in and check-out were nice and fast.

The only problem was with the wi-fi, however, Pim has been available immediately to help with that.

I'm fully satisfied and I would definitely come back: highly recommended!

A very good place to stay betwen ari and sanam pao stations, new and clean, with a small balcony but a very quiet flat even with the AC on.
Pim and her husband was very kind and helpfull.
Just at the corner of the street there is a 7/11 and a good street food.
Perfect place to stay in Bangkok and we recommended it.

When I arrived Pim's house she was greeting me with smile even though I went there earlier than check in time. Room was really clean and cozy. Everything was almost new. And the blanket was so nice. I couldn't help over sleeping. She and her husband are very friendly to me. It was easy to take BTS sanampao, aree station. And there are nice cafes and reataurants near AREE. Quiet neighborhood , felt safe. If I go to Bangkok again, I wanna stay her house for long time. Thanks Pim

Very nice welcome, they gave us the keys to the room and showed us how everything works. Always smiling, very friendly!
Area is quiet and nice, BTS is just 5 minutes away.
The room is really clean and beautiful.
When we left, they even offered us a ride to the airport rail link station, which was super convenient!

Had an awesome stay! The apartment was clean and spacious, very quiet at night, can sleep in peace, definitely the same as seen in pictures. It was very convenient for us as it was just few steps away from convenient store 7-11 and BTS Sanampao.
Pim and TK offered Everything we need when travelling in Bangkok! From free laundry to calling a cab for us to the place that we don't know how to communicate with the drive, they even offered to send us to the airport when they saw we had too much luggage to carry!
We even had dinner with them and talked about our different culture and lifestyle. This trip to me I've not only tried good local food recommended by Pim and TK, but I also meet a good friend. Now I know where to go to when I go to Bangkok again. Highly recommend this place to anyone who wants to go to Bangkok!
Very nice apartment! Clean and furniture is great. Pim is also very helpful and very accommodating to any special requirements. Thank you Pim!
房间干净整洁，房东很热情，棒棒哒！

It's really a good experience to stay at TK's house. The room is clean and comfortable. Only a few minute's walk to both BTS station，quite easy to access to each scenic spot. And Tim is so helpful to send me to the airport the day I leave. Really enjoy the stay at TK's house. 房间很干净也很大，离轻轨很近出行方便，房东人超好，下次来还会选择！

Wonderful place to stay in Bangkok. Close to the BTS and great neighborhood. Pim and T.K. Are super friendly and accommodating. Do take advantage of the laundry service because it's a really cool perk. Thanks, Pim!
The room is clean and new as the photo. Tk and Pim are nice. Tk waited us to check-in at 4am. The house is nearby the BTS station and 7-11. Thanks for serving us in these days.

If I had to raté my expérience on 1 to 10, I would give them an 11. They were very welcoming and the place is very clean and confortable. Because of chalermvut and his mother our expérience in Bangkok was amazing!
Very welcoming home :) The house has everything you need. Everything is clean, plenty of space. The most important: owners of the house are very good people and help in any matter. :)

This place is so great!
I have been to Bangkok many times and it was so fun to be in a different part of town.
The apartment is very nice and the lady who runs it is the most lovely lady and so helpful!
I'm going back the next time I'm in Bangkok.

This place is absolutely amazing for the price. There are two separate rooms with a total of 3 beds all with AC. The place is very clean and quiet at night time. Chalermvut was extremely responsive to all my messages and wanted to make sure my friend and I were as comfortable as possible. Pimm was also amazing. She drove us to the night market and also took us on a walk down the canal. We will definitely be back, thanks!

This was one of our best airbnb experiences in all the years we're travelling... A very quite and save area, with all the comfort you need. The studio is beautiful, very clean and you can feel the love for the details :) You feel at home from the first moment, and you don't wanna go away anymore :D We had the luck to meet Chalermvuts' wonderful mam, which was more then just helpful and kind to us... We've been sad about leaving, but I'm sure we'll come back soon :)
Recommended to everybody, probably you will not find another place like this... A big thank you for having us :)

We decide to stay more then planned because of our more then positive experience, and for sure we'll come back when we are again in Bangkok :) More the recommended! Can't find the 6th star, otherwise we would rate with 6 stars :)

This was one of the best AirBnb experiences I've had. The house is exactly as in photos and very clean and well kept. Pim (host's mum) is extremely welcoming, helpful and a great source of knowledge for recommendations on activities to do and things to see. I highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Bangkok.

I tries Airbnb for almost 2 years, and this is the best place I have ever experienced. The lovely house is totally beyond expectation(Sososo
Cute )and located in a quiet region. Host is super nice and really helpful. Whenever there are some problems he is always ready to help. So do his kind mum and sister. So pity I can not meet Host this time, Just for this reason I will absolutely back Bangkok for one more time.
The apartment was lovely. Clean and cosy. Would definetely come back! Host was also super nice and so friendly. ++++++

The host are very kind, lovely & helpful.
But the place is far away from the main road & a bit difficult to get to the main road.
If you have transportation, this home is suitable but if not, you have to ask the host to help you to send the main road or you may need to walk about 15 to 20 minutes to get to the main road, such us to get the taxi & food.

Max is kind and offers a pleasant room.
Quick reply ^^
房东特别友好，很热情，房间很干净，虽然不大，但是什么都有，非常适合留宿的地方。离Nana很近。下次来曼谷还是会住这里

Max and his girlfriend are really friendly and helpful. I sprained my ankle upon reaching Bangkok and they sent me to the hospital for xray.
Max's place is really comfortable and cozy. There are quite a few convenience stores around the area so getting necessity is not a problem. There are also quite a number of restaurants and bars nearby.
This place is wonderful, the whole building is new and very close to sky train and so many restaurants and convenience stores. Will stay here again!

Phasute condo is probably the best place I never stayed in my life. Walking distance from asoke and Nana but really quiet at the end of a dead alley. Brand new, spotless clean, beautiful apartment, a lot better than a 5 stars hotel. And what about Phasute? He and his girlfriend are ones of the best hosts I never met. So kind and helpful. The pool is beautiful, the gym has everything you need. It s a pitty come back home :)

This apartment is a super find! Booked it last minute for the end of our Thailand trip and don't regret it one bit. This building is brand new, the place was immaculate and the roof top pool was a great escape! The area was perfect with a bit of everything, plenty of places to eat and drink and close to Nana BTS for access to the city. Phasute was a pleasure to with, quick at responding and he even booked a taxi to the airport for us. Would happily stay here again.
Clean, new, comfortable and consistent with the pictures,especially the swimming pool:) Max is very considerate as well!

The room is so so so perfect, very new and clean, all the things inside are perfect. And the one thing more important is not the room, is Phasute and his girlfriend, I think everyone who take this condo will become friends with them. The first day is Phasute girlfriend meet us at the lobby, she lead us to all the condo and introduce all the things clearly, also the place around the condo, like where we can go for shopping or for food, and the condo just at a good location, you can go to the bar or restaurant by walking.
And just need to remind all the people who will travel Thailand, it must be careful, the thief is everywhere, they will grab your bed when riding the motorcycle or just steal your things, because this terrible things is happened to me, the most luckily things is we didn't get hurt and we meet the good people like Phasute, after this hole thing happened he come to the condo to help us at once, drive us to the police station, call to his friend ask for help and keep help us translate with the people. All the things that he did for us just can not tell how thankful we are. We appreciate all the things that he did. If I go to Bangkok next time, I own you and your girlfriend a dinner and your condo must be our only choice in Thailand. Thank you, Max.

The host is super friendly and also so professional with all the tours about how to discover Thailand. We had dinner BBQ together, out communication was super smooth. I will definitely choose to stay here again if I go back to Bangkok.
Very knowledgeable, clean apartment close to everything and overall Max was a great host and he was very helpful. I would recommend this place!

Newly studio unit with fully furnish and full of facility in the condo, close to on nut bts station with walking distance. Very convenient with 24 hours max value at downstair and Lotus supermarket just opposite the road.

Kittipong was really helpful and considerate. He helped me to check in early. Moreover he picked me up at the hotel where I stayed before I moved to Kittipong's studio. Which I really appreciate. He helped me to plan where to visit and how to go there. I had no problem in communication with him.
The location is great to reach BTS and the area has small market and massage street( Sukhumvit 77/1) so I enjoyed getting massage after I finished the day. The place has nice and big pool and garden and a convenient store and coffee shop.
Only thing I got bothered a little is traffic noise at night. It is on 9th floor but not perfectly calm. However, from my experience it is quite a common feature in big cities in Southeastern Asia like Hochimin, Bkk. I had the same problem while I was staying in a hotel in Bkk. In Korea, there are double windows which block noise and cold wind but I guess in a warmer country, they don't have it.
Great condo, the host was very gracious and welcoming. Perfect location, close to Bts and markets. Building has many amenities. I highly recommend Kittipong.

great place to stay. the room is clean, bed is comfortable, i also like the idea with the washer there, it will save much money for the laundry. Kittipong is the best host, he is kind and very caring. gave us many good advices for the trip. recommended!

The problem with writing good reviews is that this accommodation might not be available when I want to make a return visit. This place is close to perfection on many levels.
Kittipong contacted me on my check in day to ensure everything went smoothly. He met me, explained how everything worked and where all the local facilities and attractions are. I get the impression his aim is to be the perfect host.
The apartment is as per the photos posted. It is new, clean, has a good view and everything one could ask for. Everything works flawlessly. Perfect for the solo traveller or couple. 2 large bottles of water in the fridge, nice shampoo, conditioner n soap. Fresh towels for a couple. Comfortable bed n clean sheets.
Nicely furnished as per photos. Not large but a comfortable size for travellers. Kitchen well equipped. Good electronic keycard security for apartment and lifts.
Building lobby was nicely furnished as was the garden. Swimming pool is brilliant. Beautiful to cool off after sightseeing.
It is located at one end of the On Nut bts station so you cannot get much closer than this.
In summary: A perfect home away from home. I will be back.
Thank you for being a gracious host, Tek.

We had a great stay at the condo during our recent visit to Bangkok.  It is very well located next to BTS station which has easy access to major attractions of the city. Kittipong and his wife had been very helpful and giving us tips on how to go about during our trip. It is a recommended stay for couple or solo traveller.

Kittipong and his wife met me right outside of the apartment very late at night. Such great people! The apartment was amazing with a great view of Bangkok!!!! I loved the pool and how comfortable the bed was. Thank you again!

Best ever host i have experience with Kittipong. Always eager to provide me with information that i need.
Nice apartment, good view, perfect pool, clean and comfortable room, well-equiped kitchen. if need something else? no worries, minimart at just below, tesco opposite, few hundred meters u find 7-11 and food lanes, still not enough, walk further few minutes u find a Big C.
And... indeed 1 minute from BTS.
security guard helped with finding taxi, when many rejected to bring me to tronburi railway station(very out of place area), greatly grateful on that.
thanks for hosting Kittipong.
hope all is prospering for u n ur family.

First of all, thank you Kittipong for the place it was amazing!

Kittipong welcomed myself and my partner into the flat. He met us in the lobby and showed us around the flat and to all we needed. He kindly provided us with bottled water which was a really nice touch! Very kind man who was there if needed, fortunately we did not have any issues at all.

The apartment is exactly as listed, very clean and modern apartment. Good view over the city from the 9th floor, kitchen was great to have as it mean't we could cook for ourselves and also washing machine in the flat meant we could do all laundry inside! Bathroom was also very good with a spacious shower.

The pool was amazing at night, we normally used it around 8pm to chill out as it was very hot and humid out. We did not use the games room or gym though.

Local area is very nice, was extremely close to the BTS literally a minute from the stairway. Small shop just outside which had all the little things needed but Tesco and Big C are not a huge walking distance away if you wanted to do a larger shop.

On the BTS the big shopping malls are about 10-20 minutes away.

Overall was a peaceful stay in the apartment and would definitely stay there again!

We booked this accommodation at the end of our 3 month travel, we wanted to treat ourself to a bit of luxury. It was the best decision we made. It was gorgeous! It's so cosy and so clean. we also felt so safe. I would definitely recommend this to anyone. The pool was lush and the apartment was just like an ikea show house. We didn't want to leave!
Tony was a great guy and even let us stay a while longer as we had a very late flight on the day of check out.
Thanks for making the end of our travels so perfect!

Tony was an excellent host and always there for any question to be answered not only for his residence but anything in Bangkok.
The flat is extremely tidy, comfortable and the perfect place to get out of the chaos with a nice swimming pool.
I shall go back on my next opportunity i have to visit Bangkok.

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour chez Tony. L appartement est tel que sur les photos, très moderne, très bien équipé. Sdb moderne; machine à laver et balcon pour le séchage. wifi, tv, nombreux rangements;la résidence luxueuse ; la piscine et les salles communes (sport, squash..)sont vraiment superbes. Le train aérien se trouve au pied de la résidence ( 5 à10 mns de siam); supermarché, restaurants à proximité. Le marché de Chatuchak à 5mns à pied.
Nous n'avons pas vu Tony mais il est très disponible pour répondre à nos questions avant et pendant le séjour et toujours très rapidement. Par contre le sofa n'est pas convertible , convient juste pour un enfant.
Je recommande vivement cet appartement qui est très agréable et qui nous a permis de profiter pleinement de bangkok!!

Tony is a helpful and immediate response's owner, and the house unit is just beside BTS train station , is very convenient and can faster reach home have a rest after a day shopping. nice pool and gym facility.

Tony was always very fast to reply, usually within minutes. After my booking I immediately got all the information regarding check-in procedure and internet.
The apartment was as shown on the pictures, it was clean and new and quite well equipped (hair dryer, cutlery, washing machine…).
Wifi was fast and reliable and I needed to log-in only once.

The apartment was lovely and cosy. It is a very new building and we did not see many people in the building during our stay. Would be perfect for 2 people. The couch was a little bit of a squeeze for the 3rd person. However, the pool was amazing and empty (amazing sunsets too!) . There was also a gym that we did not use unfortunately. Getting around was a Breeze with the BTS trains. Perfect if you want to get away from the bustle of the Siam/sukhumvit area. The Internet connection was great as well. Would highly recommend Tony's place!
Very welcoming condo, easy to check in, nice, clean, close to BTS but not loud.

j'ai passe quelques jours a BKK dans cet appartement . Tony est effectivement très disponible et très réactif . il m'a également rendu un bon service pour mes bagages . l'appartement est bien situé dans un immeuble moderne et bien gardé , très confortable, propre et avec tout le necessaire pour y etre independant . le pool au dernier étage est un plus tres agreable apres une journee de ballade. bon, les gens que l'on croise sont peu communicatifs, mais ce n'est ps grave . il fait aller chercher les sourires dans les rues de cette ville attachante . le BYS est au pied de l'immeuble et vous conduit en moins de 10 mn au coeur de la cité . bref, un excellent rapport Q/P et un hote tres attentif . merci a Tony
雖然沒有見到房東，但根據指引，很容易就拿到鑰匙，房子就在BTS旁邊，但晚上睡覺很安靜，公寓的安保做得很好，周末旁邊就是一個臨時市場，有很多東西看，7-11走幾步就是，生活也方便！

I had un second stay in this appartment. always so confortable, quiet, and clean . Tony help me for my bagages while I was in an another country between the 2 stays . location is very good. we can go and come from  BKK airport in 45 mn easely with BTS and express train . better and cheaper than taxi . I recommand very strongly this Airnb  in bangkok .
住宿特别棒。什么都有 东西很齐全。房东也很棒。离地铁站特别近 周边设施也很齐全。amazing 特别棒

Wir waren 5 Tage in diesem schönen, super eingerichteten Studio. Wir haben die Wohnung genau so angetroffen wie es auch von Tony beschrieben wurde. Der Swimmingpool im 23 Stock ist "outstanding" und man kann sich sehr gut ausruhen. Wie eine OASE. Sehr gut gelegen ist das Editor Condo. Skytrain liegt vor den Füssen inkl. Supermarkt und vieles andere. Tony ist ein perfekter, liebenswürdiger Gastgeber. Wir kommen wieder..... Herzlichen Dank für ALLES Uschy & Arnold

Our stay was for sure relaxing.
Location was great, apartman was like described. It was clean and nice view on Bkk. Bts is just two steps ahead.

No luck to see Tony in person but he arranged everything well before our arrival.
Location is good, just a minute to BTS and bus stop nearby. Easy to get to the place by airport link.
The place is clean and tidy, exactly what U see from the photos.

It has been a great stay at Tony's place, the condo unit is as what is shown in the photos, simply awesome. Clean, posh and conveniently located I would say of the accomodation. Tony is very responsive to enquiries and would ensure that you're comfortably settled in, thumbs up for his level of service. Given such great qualities, I'll book this listing again for sure, thanks Tony!

it was an excellent stay!
the room was clean, the pool was warm and tony was very nice.
great location, very calm, just few steps from saphon kwai bts.

The appartment was tidy an clean. We had drinking water aviable, which was very nice. The rooftop pool was amazing, hardly any people where staying there.
Tony was very responsive and answered all my questions very quick. I enjoyed my stay in his appartment. I will book it again for my next trip to Bangkok. Thanks Tony
Perfect experience.  Everything was as described and shown in the photos. We will come back.

Extremely loved the apartment. Less than an hour from DMK airport. It's clean and comfortable. Didn't meet Tony but he was very helpful with anything and everything. Train station is literally outside the apartment which makes it really easy for travelers. Chatuchak weekend market is also a 5-8 minute walk which is awesome! Will definitely come back.

The apartment is very nice located. Although it has been very clean and in a very good condition. I really enjoyed my stay at Tony's apartment. He has been a very nice host. The location is great and very close to the BTS station. For my next stay in Bangkok I'll defiantly book Tony's apartment again :)

It was such an amazing stay at Tony's condo. I stayed for 4 nights with my husband and we enjoyed very much. Very convenient location and the place is so neat! The roof top pool and gym was excellent. Tony was very helpful. I definitely recommend this place and will come back to stay again.

The owner Auttapon is really nice and helpful to us.  As our flight is early in the morning and Auttapon came to the airport to pick us up and help us. Nice that he even didn't the early check in fee. When we arrived at his house, to our surprise, his room is very new and tidy.  He arranged the 2nd floor to us and the bed is comfortable,it is including the bathroom and bedroom inside. Though it is late, Auttapon gave us many ideas for travelling.  He gave us the address and map, told us how to take a bus and taxi. Giving us the most convenient way to travel. He is really nice guy. As the skytrain hasn't been completed,so it us a little far away from the grant palace. But that is no problem, because Auttapon always gives u a good idea. So if u go to Mangkok, just book the room here as it just needs 5 minutes from the DMK airport by taxi. The owner will give u comfirtable room.       如果你是自由行，又想找到一间离机场比较近的旅馆，我强烈推荐这间，环境舒适，干净整洁，房东是泰国人，为人细心热情，英语沟通没有问题，房子是新建的，很漂亮，里边还有自行车借用，旁边就有一间7-11便利店，所以很方便，下次来泰国，我还会选择这里哒，大爱。
Very excellent experience. A great host, close to donmuang airport, drop us off ithere 6am. Thanks for take care us so careful

Auttapon的家是在一个高档小区里面 小区门口有711 我们晚上10点多到的廊曼机场 提前微信联系并预定了AuttPon的接送机服务 价格不贵 还方便 到达机场指定的出口给他打电话 他几分钟就到了 因为还有别的朋友住的别家民宿 多加了50泰铢 他把我朋友们也送到他们的民宿 这点非常感谢他 Auttapon是一个非常细心的人 我们出发前把电话号码发给我 还备注了泰国应该拨打的号码(很多人出国都不知道当地电话怎么打 因为有国家和地区的区号啥的)
房子在机场附近 非常非常干净 小资 小清新 总的来说我个人非常非常喜欢 大家可以看看他图片哈 缺点的话：房间我没找到吹风机(已个人建议他增加) 房子位于飞机起飞降落的航道附近 有时候会有点噪音
Auttapon也是个非常喜欢旅行的人 非常健谈 给了我们不少当地的旅行信息
总的来说 我个人很推荐住他家噢 除了睡眠比较轻的人士需要慎重点 其他真的很推荐

第一次用airbnb，一眼相中Auttapon的房子，尽管中间遇到一些误会，手一滑点错了取消，但是最后还是继续定他的房子，只想说幸好坚持了开始的选择，第一天到曼谷就遇到这么好的房东，觉得一个人来到这个陌生的地方也是暖暖的。机场接送服务简直太棒了，房东热心，善良并且尊重房客，住得舒服舒心，以致住到后面定到酒店还会时时想起他的房子。房子干净整洁小资，因为是新房所以设施都很新，有一种住在老朋友家里的感觉。想到Auttapon就会还想到曼谷再住他家。房东太太也是既善良又温柔，自己做手工结婚请帖简直不能再可爱了。房东为我们的曼谷自由行提供了很多建议，甚至开车送到大皇宫，还为我找回丢失的手机。只能说很幸运选了他的房子，住酒店从未有过的体验，爱上了airbnb，爱上了民宿！

It is really a wonderful living experience with a great,beautiful and comfortable house.The host is so friendly and welcoming and really helps me a lot. It is my first time to Bangkok and I didn't plan it before, But the host Duck told me lots of important things and recommended some interesting places.He provided airport pick up service and gave a bike to me for going outside. I really have two enjoyable days in Bangkok. Thanks a lot for everything!

Auttapon and his wife were both very helpful and friendly. Beginning with the very first messages, he sent all of the useful info of how to get to him and sent lots of additional info.
Upon arrival, this family met us with an open heart and warm smile. We loved our stay and chats with both of them and would recommend this place to people who want to stay at a comfortable place very nearby Don Mueang airport. If you don't mind the noise of aircrafts early morning, starting at 6am, you will be fine sleeping through the night.
Only wishing well to this family and all the best.

我感觉自己很幸运能够找到这么好的房子和遇到脾气好又有耐心的房东！房子很整洁很干净，非常适合有洁癖的人，因为你根本找不到任何不满意的地方。一开始还担心遇到不好的人，但是当你看到房东后完全放下戒心，我们飞机晚点过关用了很长时间，房东竟然等了2个钟。房东是国际大学教师，他的太太是护士，他们也非常喜欢去旅游，你可以跟他好好交流，只要您有不明白的地方，房东会图文并茂告诉你，你完全不用担心任何事情，而且给我们最好的旅游建议。帮我们安排行程，订酒店，还送我们去坐vans，去吃当地好吃的食物，还帮我们解决很多语言上的问题，的士杀价等等，是个有非常好的人，只有有朋友到泰国，我一定介绍她去这里住。他还有微信，我们是通过微信交流。到了当地就是打电话。很高兴我们能认识到这么好的异国朋友！
超级舒适的体验，房东人超级好！

房间很赞，房东很热情^_^
位置虽然在机场边上，但是机场很长还是需要乘车到机场登机口。房东还特别抽出时间送我们到机场！
下次需要住机场附近，还是会选择这里！

The room was big and nice. Shower water was just hot as it should be.
The place is a little bit tricky to find though, even after 7eleven you need to turn left and right before finding the house.
Plane are a bit noisy in the morning, but it does help as we needed to catch a plane in DMK.
The trully Chinatown experience. Amazing hosts, great location, apartement full of personalaty and confortable. I recomend it.

Pupe and Victor are fantastic hosts. They were there to help with anything we needed. They even allowed a late check In and spoke to our taxi driver to give him specific directions. We loved the flat we stayed in on the 3 rd floor. The shophouse has been beautifully restored and decorated ever so thoughtfully. We loved the vibe of this place and it was exactly what we were looking for. The wifi worked great. The Shower had good pressure. The Ac worked great and we slept very well. We will definitely Come back and can't wait to stay a few more days there.

Thank you Pupe for everything !! That was an amazing experience. We all loved spending time at your place. You and your husband were so nice and helpful !
The flat and the place were authentical and lovely.
We definitely recommend this airbnb to everyone who wants a true Bangkok experience (plus it's very well located near the train station and chinatown main road).
We hope to book again at your place and to see you all soon (maybe in Paris!) !!
It was really great to stay with Pupe and Victor! :-) we felt like at home. The room is beautiful and they were so friendly, nice and helpful. We definitely recommend their place to stay in Bangkok.

Con lo a gusto que estuvimos la primera vez, no podíamos hacer sino repetir en casa de Pupe. Además de que la casa es preciosa y única, el lugar para quedarse en Bangkok es perfecto. Y cómo siempre nuestros anfitriones encantadores y dispuestos para aconsejarnos sobre lo que necesitasemos. Se lo recomiendo a cualquiera que vaya a Bangkok y quiera disfrutar de una forma única del viaje.

The location was extremely authentic and accessible to different forms of public transportation like the metro, ferries, etc. Convenient location to get food, and near convenient stores. Pupe was a very good host. She was able to direct my taxi upon arriving when my information wasn't working. She also was allow to dispose of my dispose of my suitcase as it did not handle the flight well. Overall a great place to stay slightky out of the tourist areas.

We were so lucky to find this gem for the weekend in Bangkok. Pupe was extremely warm and welcoming, meeting us on arrival and happy to suggest places to go in the neighbourhood. As written in the description, staying here is an experience in itself. I loved the interior design of the whole house, which includes walking though the bar on the ground floor, and up into the house spilt on two levels. We had delicious dinner and drinks in the Spanish tapas bar below which she also owns with her husband. I hope to get the opportunity to stay here again and definitely recommed staying here if your looking for an authentic experience.
very nice house in china town near to MTR station.love thailand people very much.

The accommodation was good, comfy bed. Pupes communication was great. Pupe was away at the time but she had organised a friend to wait for us which made things easy once the cab pulled up (we weren't sure were we where but seeing someone waving us down was reassuring). We had one of the front rooms and unfortunately you can hear a lot of road noise all through the night even though it is a small street. Basic accommodation but we enjoyed it.

An excellent spot, home away from home, close to the trainstation and metro, and in the middle of Chinatown.  With some trendy bars around and tasty designed interior. A friend of Pupe took good care if us!

本次泰国行，在WM3住了三个晚上，感觉非常好，非常干净，地理位置也不错。尤其要说的是老板特别好，在我没去之前就给我微信聊聊去曼谷可以玩什么吃什么还有办电话卡等方面的事情。还发我了他们PS后的地铁图，告诉我们到了曼谷怎么乘地铁游玩，到了曼谷后我们在游玩的过程中老板也给了我们很多指导意见。我们还专门去了几个她推荐的地方比如吃自助海鲜烧烤和逛夜市都很不错。总之是非常好的公寓和老板。备注：老板是个大美女！
房東非常體貼，位置也近地鐵站，而且便利店就在樓下，非常方便下次也會再住。
房间真的太温馨了，一看到鲜艳的色彩，就开心的不要不要的，哈哈：）房东人特别的好，刚开始预订的时候就各种信息攻略齐奉上，非常的有耐心，有问必答，很NICE。房东和她老公俊男美女太配了，而且还很贴心的帮忙拿行李还有换泰铢，哈哈，太感谢了！住所安全系数特别的高，附近还有家超级不错的按摩店，整体感受都棒棒哒，谢谢！ 以后有机会再来入住，哈哈！ ：）
图片和实际很相符，老板娘很热情，第一次来泰国，出于担心语言特意找懂中文的房东，果然不错，出发前就发给我很多实用图片，超方便，老板娘很漂亮，来曼谷住这里很方便，出门右拐走10分钟左右就是地铁站，晚上安静，下次来还会住
因为第一次和朋友自由行，英文也不是很好，于是想找一个会中文的民宿，事实证明我选的是对的
安静，舒心，房东人好。
有在家的感觉，屋主很亲切。有问必答，下次还会再回来住。
Friendly host. Provided some information on getting around the places.  Very near convenient store and train station. Great place to stay in.
公寓就在MRT.（huai khwang）惠恭王站1.出口上来向右走大概5分钟就到了,很方便。房间很舒适, 房东人也nice.. 下去泰国还会选择这里的！
房间很nice 房东人也特别好 给了我们很大的帮助 交通也很方便 推荐大家住这里哦
老板很热情，房间很整洁，交通也很方便，离mrt很近。
房间清洁很好，很有家庭的感觉！而且能提供一些旅游信息

Michelle is very helpful and provide us a lot of info even before we confirmed the booking. The place is close to Huai Kwang MRT Station, easy to find if you follow the direction given by her. Although there are not much (foreigner-friendly) restaurants nearby, but there is a 7-11 just below the place which is very convenient.

A little bit frustrated because I can neither speak thai nor chinese and Michelle speak English very little. The location on the map is not exact. However the place is nice. It's 500m from Huai Khwang MRT station. There is 7/11 downstair.
房东人很好，住的那附近挺多好玩的地方的，去之前房东也发了很多有用的信息过来，总之这次旅行很愉快！
交通方便就在地铁站附近，楼下有711，房东人很nice，沟通无障碍，有问题都回复得很快。房间很干净，和图片一致，超赞的
和闺蜜两个人自由行～房东姐姐特别好特别好～一直关注我们的行程～一直关心我们～给我们细心指路～还提醒我们晚上出门要小心，最好不要背包～姐姐也特别漂亮
地理位置好，交通便利！楼下隔壁的奶茶店好正点！
房间空间不大但很干净，在路边的房间有些车辆的吵闹声。楼下的洗衣机很方便。主要是房东有问必答，给出的提示很实际可行，还会中文对我们来说太暖心了，大赞一下
Tidy Room. Within walkable distance to Mrt. Quite convenience as there are 7-eleven downstair and quite a few food stall from breakfast until supper. Value for money.

I and my friend stayed 4nights.
Rebecca was a great host and very accommodating.
Rebecca was a helpful host and quickly responded to all of my questions.
The house is super amazing too!!!
Her apartment was exactly as advertised; very clean, comfortable, with great pool and new furnithres.
And comfortable with great amenities (Shampoo,laundry soap, toiletries, ,tv, and wifi in the house, restaurants and stores downstairs). True to the pictures shown on the site.
The metro is a short walk away which provides access to all that BKK has to offer.
Check-in and Check-out procedures were simple and quick
I love the house very very much and will live in this house next time I come Bangkok.

Chanced upon Rebecca's while searching for a 3-BD apartment. Decided to give it a try even though she doesn't have any review yet. To my surprise , she handed my case well like any other professionals. She communicates well in English and Mandarin. Apartment is big and clean . What you see in the description is what you get. She even went the extra mile by changing the single bed to queen size bed for my friend. Location wise is good. Less than 5 mins walk to central plaza or MRT station. If you are feeling lazy , you can always take a free complimentary shuttle bus . Besides that, you can have have local delights just a stone throw away.

Condo's security is at top notch as well. A constant 24/7 guards attending your needs. One thing to note that if you are traveling late at night , Do have uber/grabtaxi apps as the condo will be barricaded from public.

I will highly recommend to book this condo if you want to stay in this area. Price is reasonable for that location. You cant find a better deal anywhere. i will rate my experiences with Rebecca 6 out of 5 stars. If chance permits , i will definitely come back to the same condo.

Cheers

如果可以，我真的不愿你下榻此处。
因为5天下来，我们已全然习惯了把这里当作家。所谓安土重迁，真 的好不希望它又成了别人的家。。。so sad...
然而即便留念，我也不能矢口否认这恰如其名的Belle Condo为我们的几日曼谷之旅增添的精彩：
房子是精心布置的。从准备齐全的餐具厨具，到垃圾袋衣架空气清新剂都满是生活气息。甚至从柜子上摆放着的一顶帽子、一朵花也可以看出Rebecca精致的生活态度。这样的体验绝非是哪怕一家只管出售几小时使用权的五星级酒店可比拟的，因为在这里，你是主人公，你和你的家人朋友就是是这场美妙生活的主角。
其次关于Belle：景观或设施，不如真实场景万一的照片上已有大概，不必多言。我想说的是Belle的人性化，当然不止局限于帮你打开小区大门那么简单。就像工作人员帮我们打车后，我们看到她立刻拿出了本子记下了出租车的车牌号；看到我们购物后提着大包小包出现后，立马帮我们提东西开门。。。这些人性化的细节体验真的不同于纯属形式的几句您好，再见。是真真切切的生活，体贴入微。
如果您不辞辛苦地将这条review看到了最后，感谢你，我还想谈谈生活。和中国包括首都在内的许多一线城市不同，曼谷真的是个适合生活的城市。如果可能，我真诚地建议你省下一个晚上，去楼下的小超市买点零食，然后去p层的花园走一走，踩踩水或者只坐在躺椅上吹吹风。曼谷是个有星星的首都！
真的是个很适合“像个当地人去旅行”的好去处。希望曼谷的summer breeze也能抚平你内心那一点点小焦灼～
房间很大很新，非常干净，厨房用具也非常全，交通特别方便，就在市中心，离两个机场也不远。小区环境好，泳池很大，楼下就是一个商场，吃饭很方便。
小区离地铁站很近 交通很方便 而且房间超棒 什么都有 楼下还有泳池空中花园！希望下次有机会再去这里！

此次的泰国之旅令我最惊喜的地方就是能住到这个公寓，里面啥都有，十分方便。而且室外的景观也炒鸡棒。站在阳台就能看到泳池，相当于做了一个带泳池的空中花园。而且步行5分钟左右，或者坐接驳巴士两分钟就能到一个商场，想吃DQ就能吃DQ。哈哈哈...楼下还有一个泳池和健身房，在离开前的一个晚上去那里感受了一把“奢靡”的生活，这个公寓真的很棒！房主也是特别和蔼热情的中国人，还经常给我们推荐哪里好玩，遇到问题问她的时间，她都会认真回答。我真心推荐。

Very nice Apartment :-) very Close to trainstation.
Just 5-10 min fare from Station.
Very clean !
Good location and very friendly housekeeper.
Thank you very much.

The belle condo is so so new, it is fully furnished, with a big swimming pool also although I didn't have time to swim. Security is so good and very friendly and helpful, they would call taxi for u and with good uniforms in a very hot day. Restraints are very close by and central plaza is 5mins walk. Here I have to say the landlord and her friend is so so so helpful with direction of tour advise. Even they r so busy they also spent time answering questions. We had excellent experience staying in belle condo. Would def stay again when we r in town.

房間的環境是很不錯的，有漂亮的游泳池，也有接駁車到地鐵，空間也非常的寬敞，唯一讓我們覺得不太愉快的是聯絡上的細節，屋主的回覆都非常的快速，但我們去的時候屋主人不在請助理幫忙，助理只能說非常的兩光，電話常沒接，很多事一問三不知，第一天入住因為塞車，所以比較晚一點，但也才6-7點左右，助理一下要去吃飯一下要去健身房，感覺好像我們耽誤到她的時間，當然這些都跟房間的環境沒有太大的關係，屋主人還是不錯的，只可惜沒有遇到。
good place. kind host.
good

1. Good place to stay near disco Mansion 7. Some times a bit noisy.
2. Shower curtain should be installed soon.
3. Aircon are water leaking a bit. But will be solved soon.
4. Otherwise very clean and newly designed modern room.
5. Very close, like 250m, to MRT Huai Kwang exit 1.
6. Located next to street food vendor, Korean restaurants and bikers taxi station. And at the ground floor there is a 7/11 store. So very convenient.
7. Building has good safety features and laundry service/room.
8. Madame Michele is friendly and serving you as fast as she can. She love her job and services. Her English is very advanced for local. She answer your txt message very fast.
9. New building, with good and new top of the line elevator.
10. Her unit is good for short and long staying guests.
11. Free complementary high speed internet.
Enjoy!
房間可能是因為新裝修的原因 味道挺大的. 對於我這種有鼻炎者的人來說挺不舒服.而且wifi入住第二晚開始就一直臉不上.其他都滿意.雖然是公寓的位置離地鐵比較近點，但是離市中心還是蠻遠的.有廚房但是沒有任何廚具.另外房間隔局還不錯.乾淨.
Michelle非常非常热心，到曼谷之后给给了很多帮助，有你的帮助 让我少了很多迷茫。 房间很温馨很漂亮，楼下的711很方便，几天下来收集了很多萌萌哒贴纸
Very nice
非常棒的居住经历。

房东超级nice！从订房当晚就加了我微信，给我发了很多图片，包括怎么坐车去民宿，还有曼谷的交通路线图等等。超贴心，尤其感谢她给我发了一个酒店的泰文地址，让我一下飞机可以给机场工作人员看到我要去的地方然后顺利坐上的士。在旅途中遇到很多问题，经常打扰小雪，但是她都会很 nice帮我。民宿虽然不在市区，但是离地铁站超近，走路不到五分钟，出行很便利。楼下就有7-11，东西好便宜。房间跟图片完全一样，而且很干净。可惜这次休假因为要赶着回国考试，只住了四晚。泰国真的是一个值得去几次的地方，这次旅行虽然很短，但是却意犹未尽，泰国人很nice，小雪也很nice，这几天住的很开心，希望下次有机会再去^_^
房间和图片一模一样，非常整洁干净，住在这里十分便利，买东西打车都很方便，房东是台湾人，会说中文，人非常好，加了微信，有什么不懂的，可以随时问她，态度超赞！
挺好的，比较方便，环境整洁。小雪夫妇非常nice
如
因为第一次到泰国 曼谷 自由行所以找了一个会中文的民宿 老板娘很好帮助我们很多 因为订的时候没看清楚到了才知道没有早饭
很好
从芭堤雅回到曼谷，可惜北京的雾霾无法落地，索性我就改签了机票，在曼谷多住两天，毫不犹豫就选择了之前住过的WM民宿。来自台湾的房东小雪人很nice，房间整洁，地理位置优越，后来才发现，这里离象神庙超级近啊。华人朋友们要住的话，推荐！
後來續住了兩天，太喜歡這裡了！價格實惠又方便！房東人真的很好！
以后朋友来也可以推荐给他们的好民宿

房东姐姐人很好，很热心。由于我是第一次出国，自由行，还不会英文，所以特意找会中文的房东。这次就入住这家酒店，从订房前到我离开后，我的所有问题都帮我解答了，非常贴心。而且还叮嘱我一些注意事项，很暖心。房源地理位置不错，楼下有71便利店，我跟我哥出去玩累了回来，就直接大包小包买上去吃，很方便。旁边还有火锅和泰国小餐馆，味美价廉。地铁就在附近，步行5分钟就到了。房间很干净舒适，有阳台，设计风格很适合年轻人。楼下有饮水机和洗衣机，超级方便。总之，第一次出国旅游，没有我想象中那么麻烦，不懂需要也没关系，自由行也不在话下。谢谢房东姐姐的耐心解答，赞👍🏻
小雪人超级好 帮助了我很多 非常感谢！房间设施卫生还有地理位置都是相当不错的  下次来曼谷的时候还是要来你们家住当然也还要推荐给朋友们啦！
房东很热情，房间也很干净
房间很温馨～连续住了几天～因为朋友先来～所以很遗憾并没有见到Michelle～感觉还会来第三次～
Tidy Room. Within walkable distance to Mrt. Quite convenience as there are 7-eleven downstair and quite a few food stall from breakfast until supper. Value for money.
It was a good experience to stay in your hostel. Nice receptionist and comfort place. I and our friends very enjoy to stay here.

The staff made me feel very welcome.  Almost all of them speak Thai and English.  Sleeping in the small, tightly enclosed beds was kind of hard to get used to.  The bathrooms are shared and kind of reminded of my college dorm but this place was much more clean.  I love the decorations and the furniture.  Lots of restaurants nearby.  Also great location to a BTS train station.
nice place for everthing help
overall it is well worth its value. however it supposed to be mentioned on the airbnb page that there is deposit for key card.

Great location to see around the city and easy access from the Don Mueang airport by shuttle bus and  BTS. The lounge/cafe on the first floor is very useful and relaxing. I liked that they had 3 shower booths, toilets, and 4 sinks in the bathroom. It was very convenient.
还不错

优点：
跟曼谷所有的青旅一样很干净
日本人与韩国人偏多
1楼的公共区域小清新装修风格每天都有很多人坐在下面用笔记本电脑！
2楼有个可以半躺在地上的沙发看电视可以认识新的朋友在这里懒着聊天
提供免费的咖啡、茶包、小饼干
缺点：
前台给我安排了这里的4楼房间
玻璃靠近马路的一间白天晚上都会很吵
我从素可泰回来吃了不该吃的食物上吐下泻浑身无力软在房间里结果两夜一天太吵了
如果你想好好休息
一定要告诉前台选择不靠近马路的房间
每天几乎8:30-9:00左右开始还有有装修的声音
总之除了吵其它没什么不好的
第一次住民宿 感觉还不错吧 离暹罗广场很近 步行十多分钟就能到 但是定位不是很准确 来的时候司机找了很久都没找到 最后是我自己拖着行李步行过来的 现在是淡季 住的人不是很多 所以也不算吵 只是如果睡眠质量不好的人慎重选择 靠近街边的房间真的噪声很大
地点非常方便 走路去MBK15分钟左右 ，房间很干净，休息区还有泡面和咖啡可以享用，装修风格很喜欢，简约，时常有泰国淘宝店家拍照

This is an Instagram-worthy place.
I had a good experience shere in Movy Lodge as I experience good and bad.
Good:
- Instagram-worthy for OOTD or blogger
- You can wash clothes as they have washing machine and dryer
- Locker is very secured
- Many Cubicles inside the toilet
- You can put food inside the fridge and heatbit using the microwave provided
- They sell Thai Milk Tea and other beverage
- Near BTS station
Bad:
- Smelly corridor because of they toilet
- Noisy guest inside the room
- Smelly Toilet
P.S.
Upon check-in, they will ask THB500.00 for key deposit.
房子干净整洁 房东人好到没话说 非常好的一次住宿体验
The place was great, reflecting Paul's good taste as an interior designer. Right in the center of Silom and walkable to Sky train station. Paul was super nice and we will come back staying again.

It's a lovely welcoming home with everything u need ...even small details like pens ,lighter, trash bags and much more that shows the host really care about every detail in his house and for his gusts
房东人真的超级好 晚上到的泰国 房东一直在酒店门口等我们！还在国内时房东就超级热心推荐我们曼谷好玩的地方～因为英语差房东不厌其烦给我们用翻译软件沟通！超级善良！还开自己的车送我们去 siam！家里很舒服什么都有…真的良心商家 ！来了才知道有多好！走几步路就是最有名的建兴酒家…房间很新很干净！两个空调一个电视独立卫生间独立厨房独立卧室！性价比很高

The apartment was really nice and located close to a very lively street. It was really easy to communicate with Harnpon. We had a great time. The little drawback is that the place is on ground floor, next to the garage so it was really noisy.
The house was tastefully decorated and super comfy. Paul was very responsive and accommodating. Check in was very smooth although without the host presence. Great stay!

Harnpon's place was amazing! Really cute and air conditioned and very clean. A little tough to find at night and taxi drivers had a little bit of a hard time locating it, but once we found it everything was great!!!
Harnpon's place was great! It's a little tucked away so it was a little tricky to find at night, but Harnpon himself was very helpful! Super modern and a great spot!

The house is on the first floor. Not far from the bts station. Although the house is not big，the space is very reasonable. It's very suitable for friends to stay. Harnpon is very nice. He recommended delicious crabs for us . A very happy experience.

Paul's place is beautiful, just as what you see in the photo. We fell in love with the interior design once we saw it. It's studio like apartment situated in local neighbourhood. A downside is it located at Ground Floor which is next to the carpark, like car parks right out of your door. This is a minor issues for me coz I can't open the window to air, unless you want some waste gas. Anyway, it was a good experience staying at Pauls place.

房间格局是和图片一样的，但是床、电视机、窗户、空调都与网站上的图片不一样。洗衣机在最顶层是投币式的，这种事居然不说清楚。空调很老旧等很久房间的另一边才两块，而且晚上会自己开开停停。电视机也不是图片上的液晶电视机是那种很老旧的小电视。图片有窗户的地方也没有，感觉上就是房东把自己最漂亮的那一间照出来，但我们入住的根本不是订的时候看到的那一间。第一天早上起来居然还停水！虽然和房主联系后很快就来水了，那就是说是房主停的？用得着吗...要是我半夜起来上厕所怎么办？吹风机也是和房主联系后才才叫人送过来的。床上没有被子只有那种珊瑚绒的毛毯，感觉很不舒服。总的来说，性价比真不高。

Love it so much. The place is so Clean and spacious. We dont expect much but it was good.
It also had a basic amenities and kitchen equipment. Because I came with my mother, I am a bit worried. But, she was really happy to live there

My family 3 persons had a pleasant 2 nights stay in this comfortable apartment. Host offered to help us correct message while we arrive at here early morning.
My wife and my son satisfied with their first outboard travel living in Alamenda.
Thanks.
不错的房子，适合一个家庭。安全度高，房顶上有洗衣机和烘干机，不过要收费。

Great apartment, big space with lovely wood floors, comfortable beds, good a/c, shower and handy kitchen.
Good location to get to Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Golden Mount. Also 5 mins walk to ferry (by golden mount) so fast, fun and cheap to get to Siam Square, only 8 bt per person, 10 min ride!
Thai food places 10 mins walk near the Democracy monument.
Atchara was very helpful in booking and the reception downstairs were great during stay with suggestions and booking taxis.
Great place, authentic area! Recommended:)
very nice

The place was really comfortable and the tenant is able to provide relevant information around bangkok . The apartment might be a little remote from cities but it is adaptable through the 4 days . Great place and highly recommended !

Отдыхали в апартаментах 5 ночей в сентябре, прекрасные апартаменты по разумной цене! все соответствует фотографиям, оснащены всем необходимым. Удачный район: тихий и в центре города, легко добираться до основных достопримечательностей. Прекрасные хозяева, большое спасибо Ачаре! решала любые проблемы по первому требованию. Спасибо большое за прекрасный отдых!!)
Очень рекомендуем!
Decent hotel for the price.

Well located, clean and big flat.
Communication was easy and all of you guys are very nice and helpfull.
THANK YOU VERY MUCH!
Stayed here for 1 night on a short notice. Good location and spacious room. They charged us extra for 1 extra person when the listing said no extra charge.
这应该是一个酒店式公寓。。属于酒店统一管理。从商场里面进去。就在HOLIDAY INN对面。出巷子就可以坐天铁。很方便。周围很多吃的。很便宜勒。房间很大很大。感觉有点空。。卫生间很多。。看夜景很不错。

The flat is great and we got a lot of place to live. The A/C is really nice, and needed for Bangkok staying.
Thanks to the lobby for keeping our keys and giving all the help we need. The pool is so cool and very large !
If you want to stay in BKK, dont hesitate to go at Albert's place, you will be glad !
服务态度真的太棒了 语言不通是个硬伤但他们很有耐心的用翻译器跟我们交流 环境也很好 房间也很干净 阳台的风景很好

Very nice and huge apartment. Just as in the photos. Clean with good facilities for short stay. The lady receptionist is also very friendly and helpful. Very convenient, 2 min walk to BTS. Lai Lai sap market, 7 seven eleven  all within walking distance. Albert even had our apartment and garbage bin cleared up on our 3 rd day stay. Thank you Albert.

The place is really spacious, very clean and the host is great at talking to the taxi driver to help you arrive safely at the apartment from the airport.
it is somewhat close to the places you want go, if going in a group, it is sometimes cheaper to just take taxis instead of using the different train lines.
Security guys at reception very friendly and funny.
Overall, good stay. But not much talk from the host, so if you want reccomendations, contact him a lot or just go to the main road and mingle with the locals.

Also great sports bar across the road which has buffet breakfast everyday 250 baht.
Albert's place is very convenient to access to city area and the room is very spacious to stay comfortably.
This is a really cool place, and it is everything its profile promises.

房子非常不错！就在市区，bts站只要1分钟就能到达，坐两站到siam商业区    公寓的工作人员都比较和蔼亲切，泳池是在9楼露天  挺不错的  只是正午到傍晚会很晒   房子很宽敞  有三间房  三个卫生间  一个大卧室（含一个卫生间）一个双床房（较小）一个标间（较大且有梳妆台穿衣镜 适合女生）  其中一个卫生间就在后两者之间  很方便  最后一个卫生间在进门的右拐角处  紧挨着厨房  值得一提的是还有一个婴儿房  真的很贴心  总的来说 位置佳 环境好 价格也美丽  下次还会再来
Very clean and convenient, we all enjoy a nice holiday in Bangkok.

This may have been one of my best stays ever.  I completely enjoyed the entire experience at Nui's place.  He was the perfect host, from before my arrival until I left.  Very good communicator.  The apartment was above and beyond nice, clean and had everything I needed for a great stay.  The view was great, the room was professionally decorated and I especially liked the TV, which had plenty of stations and movies.  I come to Bangkok often and definitely want to stay here again.

he was very kind even i was late about 10mins, just smiled and welcome me. every facilities he describe was exactly same. there is an statue always welcome me with his shy face every time i came back to this room :-)
and welcome drinks and snacks was soooo good. really enjoyed it.

nice view, building, internet-TV, wi-fi, security, location. i loved it.

some negative lists:
no shop in the same building, have to dress-up to go 7/11(only 1 min by walk but its near nice night market and main road, so i could't go there without taking a shower lol)
no smoking even at the balcony (strongly not allowed, i want to smoke!! :-p)
hard to find a laundry near (the host can help it, but i didn't want bother him with this. so i didn't try the service from him)

those negatives are not real problems there, but i noted it for the real and honest review.

i loved here and his room, hope to come bangkok again and stay there longer :-)

hope this review to help your decision to stay his room.

and thank u Nui for ur kindness and allowed to stay here.

Nui is a highly accommodating and dedicated host who ensured my stay was smooth and hassle free. The entire stay was pleasent and the residence was a new residence which was secure, modern, comfortable, conveniently located and well furnished. Nui also ensured that i was able to access the residence with ease by providing a comprehensive guide. Keep up the good work and thumbs up.

The host was very easy to contact. The place was the nicest place I've stayed in Asia. very new facilities and modern decor. I was a big fan of the air conditioning and the location next to the subway.

I stayed at Nui's place for two days. It was my first time traveling to Bangkok as well as using airbnb. Nui made me feel home at his place. The place was very clean as the pics and the pool was nice as well. I highly recommend this place to everyone who visits bangkok it is pretty quite place but not far from famous attractions. Nui will give u a map and some advice for ur traveling. Real nice and kind guy. Thank u Nui!

I arrived with a car on the 2nd floor parking lot, then I found Nui came to welcome me and provide me a card key for the elevator!  He checked my arrival from the lobby and followed by walk!  I really felt welcome.  Both the condo and his room are luxuary and you can enjoy the stay as if you are living and working in Bangkok.  Nui provided all you would need during your stay including a light snack and plenty of bottled drinking water.  I suggest you to bring your blanket, hair conditioner, tooth brush & paste and room slippers.
房东很好人很细心。帮我们解决了很多问题。房间适合情侣或者闺蜜住。离夜市很近，交通很方便。

I stayed in Nui's place for 3 nights. The place is really convenience if you like to travel with BTS skytrain and it has all those 7-eleven, cafe and restaurants nearby. The room is clean and comes with everything you need for the stay. Besides, our host Nui is awesome. He's really kind and reply pretty fast. Thank you for our nice stay !!

This place is AMAZING. You can't find any better place in Bangkok. The apartment is new, luxury, and very close to BTS Phra Khanong Station. You can go to many places in Bangkok easily, even if you're using taxi/uber, the fare will be very cheap, since it's in the center of Bangkok.

The room itself is very nice, clean, tidy, and looks as the same with the pictures on Airbnb website. The host prepared complete amenities, we also can use a microwave to heat the foods.

Nui (the host) is very helpful and nice. Before the arrival, I had so many conversations with him, and he always responded quickly in less than 24 hours. On our last day, he came and we took photos together.

I would love to come back again to this place and I highly recommend you to stay at this place.

If you're looking for an apartment in Bangkok through Airbnb, look no further. This place is amazing! It is situated in Phra Khanong which is not very far from the central district. But the twist is that you will not find as much foreigners which gives off a very local feel.
BTS Station is Super close from the apartment and convenient stores are at a walkable distance. The apartment is super cozy, and the high speed internet is to die for. Cleanliness is top notch and Nui make sure he does everything within his capability to make you feel welcome. He even offered to send us to the airport despite the traffic, so sweet of him.
Everything looks hella fine from the gym to the public living room. The view from the bedroom is unbelievable. It really feels like home in the apartment and we couldn't bear to leave the place because we grew so attached to it within a week.
This is my second time staying at Nui's apartment and it just get better and better with time. There's always a constant communication between us and he will make sure that everything is okay on your side. if you need help, he's always there to clear your doubts. I truly enjoyed my stay and I'll definitely want him to host me again if I'm heading to Bangkok.

The apartment ideal location close to the Onnut BTS station. It was perfectly clean and well furnished, very comfortable stay, very clean and spacious, comfortable beds, kitchenette equipped with pans, utensils, stove, fridge, washer, dryer, bottle water, etc.

Kittipong is a nice host, we are stay at this apartment for 4 nights and enjoy very much !!!

Kittipong's apartment is clean & well equipped. We simply felt it is absolutely value for money. On Nut bts station is barely 5mins walk away. A 24hrs convenience store is just right below and a Tesco hypermarket is right beside the bts station. Kittipong offer to fetch us from Tesco as it was pouring when we arrived, we really appreciate his quick response & highly recommend it to everyone.
Great spot for skytrain travel and shopping !!
The apartment is great, so close to BTS on nut, and Tesco nearby.   Washing machine is really convenient for the traveler who didn't carry much clothes.

Staying at this nice apartment was a great experience. It is absolutely clean and located directly nearby BTS, grocery stores and restaurants. Kittipong and his family are so friendly and helpful, they even took care of our luggage after check-out. I can definitely recommend this accomodation to anyone and would love to stay there again.

The apartment is great. It's clean, and just as described in the listing. The location is great: moments away from the BTS station, close to a couple of supermarkets, and with lots of street vendors. Kittipong and family are wonderful hosts. They did everything he could to help with our arrival and made us feel very welcome here during our stay. I'd definitely stay at his place next time I have a chance.
良かった オススメ！

the house is near to the BTS and there are Thai massages nearby the BTS .The
house is clean and comfortable. I have a nice trip^_^

Kittipong is a very nice host.  I made a last minute late check out request and he approved it without additional charge.   The condo is very nice On Nut bts and is very clean.  What you see in the pic is exactly how the condo looks like.  Besides providing the basic amenities,  I was also surprised that he provides water too.  This is very much appreciated.   Thanks Kittipong. I will contact you the next time I visit Bkk.

よかったです.
BTSから 歩いで 1分ほど、一階に IEONがありますから、めっちゃくっちゃ 便利な場所です.

Good size, comfortable condo in very central and convenient location near Nana BTS and Sukhumvit underground.
Tuktuk available from the building if you don't feel like walking to the end of Soi 11.
Many eating/drinking options on Soi 11.
Tops and Foodland supermarkets nearby. Avoid Villa as its more expensive.

Really simple check-in with full instructions from the airport. Clean, spacious apartment with a huge bed, a great view over the city and toiletries provided. The pool and jacuzzi were great for cooling off after a day of touring the city.
Amazing location with tons of local and foreign bars and restaurants within walking distance, from cocktails to street food, various Thai, Asian and international cuisines.
Walking distance to Nana BTS to go further afield for sightseeing, and great advice from Andy on where to go and how to get there.
Next time I visit Bangkok I'll be staying here again!

We stayed at Andy's apartment on our way back from the south.
The highlight of the place for us was the location: walking distance to the BTS, plenty of bars, restaurants, street food, shops and 7/11's but yet it manages to be far enough to be quiet at night!

The apartment's rooms are spacious and comfortable and the condo has 24/7 security, a perfect pool for swimmer and a Jaccuzzi for sunbathers. We did not have time to try the gym but it was well equipped.

I stayed in Andy's place in the past and, as usual, communication and check-in went all well. I will stay here again next time I visit Bangkok! Highly recommended!

Andy is an absolutely awesome host. He provided really clear instructions about how to get to his place in advance and had the flat stocked upon arrival. There was drinking water, beer in the fridge, notes left on stickies, toiletries, all the necessities and more. Flat was really clean and very comfortable for two. Shower water was a bit on the cool side so if you like hot showers, just be prepared. I didn’t actually get to meet Andy during this short stay, but he was really accommodating and let me check out later than the advertised time because of a late flight. Really convenient location to BTS - tuktuk recommended.
Great place with a great host!
Great value! Great host! Very good location

N'Dee was a very nice host with a great apartment. He made sure that we got everything we need from the moment we booked until we left again.
The apartment is in a 10 min walking distance from Nana Station in a very quiet area. On your way from the station you pass a lot of restaurants and bars where you get plenty of choices for food. A supermarket is also close by.
We will definitely come back when we are visiting Bangkok again.

Saying my Ndee apartament experiece in one sentence could be, simply the best. Nice cozy apartament, excelent comunication with Ndee, amazing situation in Sukummvit Soi11 close to BTS and everything you need. The building and the apartament are fantastic place with 24 hour security, Gim & swimming pool & jacuzzi. 10/10. Thank you Ndee & see u soon.

NDee is a fabulous host. His place is spacious and clean, with taxis and tuk-tuks right outside if you don't fancy the 10 min walk to the BTS. Several 7elevens around, a bigger, well stocked supermarket (Villa Market) before you get to the BTS. Thai street food and international restaurants all around you. Bumrungrad hospital 7 mins on foot.
The wifi worked well as did the air con, although the one in the lounge is a bit on the noisy side. The bed is huge! Although firmer than what we're used to, we slept really well.
The only downside for us was the lack of cooking equipment. Only 2 small saucepans, one of which had a broken handle. A bigger sauce pan, and things like a wok and a toaster would be welcome additions.
Also, the window in the bedroom doesn't shut well, so although the place is generally very quiet, if you're a light sleeper like me you will hear the rooster (and the occasional koel) outside waking you up in the early hours of the morning (but then, this is quite common in Bangkok) - bring earplugs! ;-)
All in all we very much enjoyed staying here and would definitely be happy to return and recommend it to others visiting Bangkok.
Great place, a very accurate description. Very nice place to stay.

I loved staying here. Kevin and his family were incredible hosts. Kevin finds the right balance between being helpful and friendly and giving you space when you are tired or have plans. His mom, Apple, is a fantastic cook. Seriously, among the best Thai food I've ever had.
The room is directly behind their restaurant, which is super convenient if you want the option of eating an absolutely delicious meal then relaxing at home. There's not a lot of separation between the restaurant and the room during the daytime, but the place is cozy and feels like your own, especially at night.
Kevin was the most helpful host ever. He even took my girlfriend and I to the airport. We wouldn't have made it on time without him.
We got to be pretty good friends actually, just by virtue of this Airbnb. Highly recommended.

We had a good time at K and Apple’s(K’s mom) place. On that day our flight was delaid, K was worried about our traveling and tried to help me even while I was in the airport. He has fluent English. And as he described himself. He loves meeting new people and share travel experience. The house itself is a nice cosy home just like we expect. Located in quite street. Close to DMK airport 20 mins taxi.  It was a shame we didn't have enough time to stay there. But if have next chance to visit Bangkok will be back there.

Apple's home is a sweet home，and a friendly environment，very thai style，it's close to the metro，a quiet community，it is a pity that we just stay here for one night，K is a nice guy， full of energy，it's amazing staying with this happy family，we would stay more days if we come to this city, Apple is a great chief,by the way.  :-p
除了离市区有点远，其他还是不错的，如果去廊曼机场距离还可以。很别致的咖啡馆

We had a really good stay here. K and Apple are excellent hosts. They made us feel very welcome in their home. The feel of the house is just as its shown in the photos and more. We really enjoyed the personality of the place, with its relaxed atmosphere. Apple is an excellent cook. Delicious Thai food! We loved spending time with K. He is very friendly and willing to share his knowledge of Bangkok and Thailand with his guests. Communication was not a problem - K is fluent in English. The room is great, air conditioned, and very comfortable.

It's a warm house ,
And very warmth host
房东K和他的家人很友善，很乐意帮助我们，给我们介绍去哪里玩，还开车送我们去weekend market. 很别致的一个咖啡厅，neighborhood 也很local很有生活气息，有很多当地人开的小店，商业味不会太重。
私人民宿，房东K人很好，英语很棒。虽然位置有点偏，但房东送了周边地图当作小礼物，很有心。附近有7和莲花。走路去最近的MRT14分钟，房东有时间的话会开车送。房间干净整洁，住着很舒服。

Nice stay with a very kind family!
K is an incredible host and we had a lot of fun. He loves to learn about different cultures and is very interested. You can learn a lot about Thai culture!
We even stayed in touch during the rest of our Thailand trip and he gave us a lot of nice suggestions and recommendations on what to do and where to go to.
Apple is a very nice and warmhearted person and a fantastic cook! Try her Food! And book that Place!
We'll definitely come back!

I had a great time staying at K's cozy cafe and home. His mom is the sweetest and K was so helpful taking us to the International grocery and wandering around with us at Chatuchak market. K speaks excellent English and I loved getting a local perspective on life in Bangkok. Hope to see him again in my travels and wouldn't hesitate to stay in his neighbourhood again. It's got a great local feel to it while being close to the MRT to get around the city.

很谢谢房东夫妻的热情招待
地理位置有点远 但是就近就有BRT 出行方便 整个居住感觉温馨舒适很惬意
Best Homestay ever! Very warm welcome, very nice coffee-ceremony and a beautiful house. Just bock and get to know a different part of Bangkok!
房东非常好，非常耐心，给我们地图指路，住的地方非常漂亮，除了离市区有点远，一切都很好
Ohhh my gosh ... thank you so much for everything. I come back for sure.

Natiya非常仔细地用英文描述了乘坐BTS orBRT的方式。BRT出口的右边下去，旁边有一条小街，一直走，看到711时往右边一条小巷走，一百米之后有一条河，左转进来五十米就到了。虽然有点偏，但感觉非常非常的棒！每天早上会有僧人来接受她家的布施，然后会给我们介绍生咖啡到熟咖啡的制作过程。他们是一个与王室有渊源的家族 ，保存了几间房间上几代人留下的物品，离这些东西这么近，你会了解感受到许多故事和与其相关的历史。如果你不仅仅是看著名景点的，我强烈推荐给你这家，它可以让你更接近泰国民族和历史。
由于大巴的缘故 我们很早就到达住宿 但是房东一家特别热情 并且同意我们提前入住 每天都热情的为我们讲解路线 房间干净而且特别漂亮有特色 房东一直有邀请我们一起DIY咖啡 由于时间紧迫 非常遗憾 希望下次 最重要的是Nitaya的厨艺真的很棒！ 谢谢你们！下次来曼谷一定再次入住

Nous sommes arrivés assez tard dans la maison de Nitaya. On se sent comme chez soi. Ils sont d'une extrême gentillesse. Rarement été reçu comme ca par des hôtes, avec autant de générosité.
En ce qui concerne l'emplacement, C est effectivement excentré du centre ville mais le bus express (couloir dédié) vous dépose au brt en 10 min.
Il ne faut surtout pas hésiter à venir chez eux. C'est une expérience très enrichissante culturellement (vous comprendrez après la visite des lieux et l'atelier café) et humainement.
Un vrai havre de paix dans Bangkok.

We really enjoyed our stay at Fahsay homestay. Nitaya and her family were warm, kind and welcoming. Her place feels like a little hidden oasis in Bangkok.
It was a truly unique experience staying here, some highlights of our stay were seeing the families antique collection, making diy coffee in the morning, eating mangos (that Bob's father picked for us from the trees in the garden), feeding the monks and eating Nitaya's thai breakfast. The breakfast was one of my favorite parts, Nitaya made something different each morning during our 3 night stay. My personal favorite was her rice porridge, which is absolutely delicious.
When you look on the map, it appears as if this place is really far from the center of Bangkok but it is really well connected and we were able to get into town quickly and easily with the BRT and BTS. On nights when we were out late we simply took an uber home, which cost about 150-200baht which is very affordable.
The bed is quite firm but comfortable.
Also definitely check out the Wat Pariwat Temple on the other side of the BRT station, very unique and not crowded with a bunch of tourists like other temples.

The Fahsai homestay is a pristine, welcoming hidden gem within the greater Bangkok area. Both Nitaya and husband were helpful in terms of local sites, adventures and near by restaurants.

If you're looking for comfort and tranquility Fahsai Homestay is definitely the place for you!

Staying at this place was the most fun we had in Bangkok and it was Bob and Nitaya that make all the difference. Bob taught us how to roast coffee in the morning,  then showed us their beautiful house and their museum. Nitaya was more than helpful with finding us taxis and directions. On our last night, we hung out with Bob and everyone else staying at their home stay. It was exactly what we had hoped to find when booking with them, and the memories that will last a lifetime. If we're heading back to Bangkok in the future, we hope to stay here again. We highly recommend them to anyone considering staying here.

This was the most amazing experience for my wife and I. I can't even begin to tell you  how happy we were staying here. Bob and Nit and their family are some of the nicest people we have ever met and we were really sad to leave. we love their little quiet  Oasis among the loud busy streets of Bangkok. Bob is so excited to show you his home which has been in his family for 150 years, it also includes an amazing museum. Nit makes some amazing breakfast and is a wealth of knowledge about the city. Also she speaks really good English to which was a plus for us. thank you thank you thank you Bob amd Nit and we hope to see you again.

Nitaya is the most friendly landlady I've ever met, she and her husband have this incredible house, it really amazed me. I stayed there for 3 days, and she cooked breakfast for us every day, and the breakfast is really delicious. She also has the best family vibe , two kids are beautiful and cute, her 84-year-old father can climb tree and pick mango. She is making Bangkok even more beautiful city, next time if I travel Bangkok again, definitely I would stay at her's.
