myself and my wife stayed in this home, we had pleasant experience, host and her husband care us like their family member. they also have very old thai hand made craft items, which gave us pleasure to see. it was good pleasant stay. thank you host Nitaya and her husband.
very safe and secure place for family's....
thank you...
太喜欢Nitaya和Pop了  当然还有他的家人和狗狗 特有味道的泰式小木屋 体验最纯正的泰国本土人情风味 在这里你还能认识来自世界各国的朋友 每天早上会有额外早餐提供 离快速公交BRT超近 你要知道这个城市公共交通工具比出租车还快 太舍不得他们一家了

Our stay with Nitaya was lovely. Her home is beautiful and she made us feel at home. The rooms are pretty and clean and the breakfast she prepared for us was awesome. We loved to prepare our own coffee and have a tour around her home and history. I highly recommend this place.
a very nice, beautiful family home, the place is very clean, I recommend it to everyone via Bangkok

Ich hatte ein paar sehr schöne Tage bei Nitaya und ihrer Familie. Sie haben mir sehr viele hilfreiche Tipps für meinen Bangkokbesuch gegeben. Man fühlt sich gleich Zuhause, wie in einer Familie. Und das ist super wenn man alleine unterwegs ist wie ich. Die Zimmer sind praktisch ausgestattet und sauber. Kühlschrank und AC funktionieren perfekt. Bei den Temperaturen hier stört es nicht wenn die Dusche nur kaltes Wasser hergibt. Die Verbindung in die Stadt ist mit Bus und Skytrain völlig unproblematisch. Es hat mir gut gefallen und ich würde jederzeit wieder zu Nitaya kommen.

Our stay in Bangkok was amazing thanks to our lovely host and beautiful home stay! Our room was great and had everything we needed! But the kind homey feeling we received from the moment we booked until now is outstanding. Fashai homestay was unique and relaxing, the DIY coffee and the historical wooden them was extras that we did not expect to experience in busy Bangkok.
Nitaya's breakfast is heavenly and by far the best meal I had in Bangkok!
We would love to go visit again and will recommend to anyone!

Wonderful Host, great location and clean and nice place.
Nice and true people

Fahsai Homestay is a bit out of the way but entirely worth it for a unique Thai accommodation experience. There are a few guest rooms separate from the main house in their lovely garden courtyard, each with a bathroom, AC, mini fridge, TV, and queen bed. There's a bug net if you want to keep the room open but we never had a problem with things closed. You can hang out at the courtyard table and so will the family and friends if they're around. When I arrived there was a soccer game on TV and we drank beer and ate street food + fruit together. In the morning Nitaya serves various delicious breakfasts and then her husband does the DIY coffee with you. The beans from their farm are roasted (by you if desired), ground and made into little cups of fresh bitter coffee. They have local honey to sweeten and also tea from coffee flowers. There's also more coffee available earlier during breakfast. Then the best part: they show you around the antique part of their house that is a little personal museum. This is when I thought, "This place is totally worth it." It's a beautiful Thai home with teak wood and lots of antique items like suitcase trunks, functioning old phones and clocks, photographs, whiskey collection, shrine, etc. When it took my first cab driver a phone call to get there I was unsure, but it ended up being the best AirBnB experience I've ever had. After you know where it is, it's easy to get to. Cabs are cheap to the center parts of Bangkok for doing stuff during the day, and subsequent cabbies knew where it was. There's a 7/11 + street vendors right around the corner from the quiet canal that it's located on, and a main road nearby for catching taxis or taking the bus. Don't let the initially intimidating location put you off, this place is a true gem and authentic friendly Thai experience.
Nice clean flat with Internet and a great view, host is very helpful and quick at replying.
房子很不错 住起来很舒服，只是头两天不太清楚位置的士师傅也不太清楚，后面直接说Central ram9 就知道了，房子就在这个商场后面步行5分钟，房间很舒适，房东人很nice,和我们联系的另一个姐姐很客气nice!如果下次来还会选择～
房东和房东助理都是中国人，交流无障碍，助理还算热情。公寓房间也不错匆匆住了一夜就走了
房东很周到给我们提供很详细的攻略，房间干净整洁交通超级便利，附近的大商场都够逛一天完全不用去免税店了.超级推荐！

very new and International condo, with new and good furniture. The host is very nice and friendly, and gave us great support, so that we can easily find the room at late night.
Great!
Great stay and convenient. :)
短暂住了3天 交通生活十分便利，床品非常干净，房东回复很迅速 下次还会选择这里
这次五个人的行程，住宿的地理位置非常方便，离地铁很近，而且购物，美食，Spa都在附近就有很多不错的选择，房东非常好，知道我们颈椎不好还特地送来乳胶枕，很周到，下次还定.
真的很不错，高大上的房子，交通便利，对于爱购物的我来说，太方便了！房东姐姐超级nice
房东很热情～给我们提供很全的攻略和建议～房间也不错～适合一群朋友一起居住～楼下711很方便～强烈推荐
这是一次很愉快的旅行，住的很好，这套房子最多能住6个人，我们住了4个。房子内部准备了常用的洗漱物品。距离地铁站不远，还有班车接送。房东这次不在，接待我们的人很耐心，很负责，对我们帮助很大。提醒大家的是曼谷高峰期堵车厉害，地铁很挤。建议上下班高峰期挤地铁，平常打出租，这样最合理。

The appartment was located above a shopping mall which was convenient. The residence was nice with a good size pool. The appartment itself offered good space. We did a last minute booking and rebecca was very promp to reply. That is as far as the good experience goes unfortunately. The place was very dirty, greace all over the kitchen walls, all the light switches were darkened by long term dirt. Bathrooms had hairs all over the drains etc. Obviously it had not been cleaned properly for a very long time. The cable tv is there but actually we found out from the host after check in that there was no international channels available.
This could be a good airbnb appartment unfortunately it is not up to standard of cleanliness as such not suitable for short term rent. For these reasons i do not recommend this place.

Rebecca was a super host! Everything was as shown in the picture. Smooth check in and late check for free was a great help for me! The swimming pool area just awesome! 7/11 and grocery store just downstairs! Walking distance to the nearest MRT pura ram 9. Only little thing I had was making the taxi drivers understand the address as I couldn't speak any Thai. So it is better to have a card from downstairs for showing to the taxi drivers. Great place A+++*
屋内设施超级棒，也很干净，地理位置特别好，出门地铁一家人玩的特别开心

The room is with high quality cleanness, with new wallpapers in the kitchen and all well maintained rice cooker, pots, and also silverwares. Both bathrooms are polished clean. The host has provided all towels, shampoos, and shower gels , etc.
房间非常干净整洁，厨具齐全，可以做饭。卫生间打扫得也很干净，还提供了洗发水沐浴露，和干净的毛巾浴巾。
The condo is in very good location, which is 5 min's walk to MRT subway stations. Shopping mall is nearby.
房间靠近地铁站和大型购物中心，走路不到五分钟。
This community is very safe, with 24 hours security guards.
小区很安全，有24小时保安。
第一次租airbnb 超级好的体验~ 房东很赞。会提供给我们很多旅游有用的信息，房间也超级干净 设备非常全。因为行程太紧了也没能去游泳池体验一下~
非常满意
非常好的房东！很热心，提供了很多帮助。房子也很好，干净，设施齐全，洗衣服，洗澡都很方便，交通也很便利，楼下是7-11，楼前就是购物中心，需要出行时楼下保安还帮助叫出租车，去哪里都很便利！强烈推荐大家入住！
A great place to stay in, host was very friendly and helpful.

The place is lovely. Fit us with 7 adults + 1 kid. Thanks Rebecca for the extra mattress prepared and her fast response. Shuttle bus to Phra Ram 9 are quite frequent, less than 3 mins waiting. Her place is suitable for family&big group of friends. Con is not easy to find breakfast nearby but easy to get instant noodles at downstair 7-11 :)

超级喜欢这间民宿啊！！墙裂推荐！！由于之前在曼谷住了三天的民宿没房间了，意外的发现这家，看着环境不错就订了一晚过渡。需要提前入住，Nitaya立刻就答应了。交通还算方便，下了快巴走几分钟就到。庭院超级漂亮，跟照片一样，房间也很大，设施齐全。Fasai家有间隐秘的“博物馆”，摆满了各种古董和装饰，Nitaya和她老公热情的向我介绍家族历史和每件古董。第二天吃完早餐带我制作diy咖啡。恰逢周末，Nitaya一家开车带我们这些住客去附近的周末市场感受当地气氛，带我们品尝各种美食   真的是超级好的host，家里的两个宝贝也都好可爱！！由于行程安排，只在她家呆了短短一个晚上，但是以后有机会一定还要再来！

This guesthouse is a real gem just outside Bangkok centre. It has great transport links to the main areas of Bangkok (20 min by by bus gets you to all train links).
The family are just the nicest people you will ever meet, helping us with finding the guesthouse and answering any questions we had.
The room was very clean and the same goes for the whole area outside as well!
The DIY coffee was a really great touch in the morning.
Would recommend staying here for a relaxing time and also to go off and see Bangkok. Great street food a short walk away as well!

This is definitely a hidden gem. If you've found this listing on Air BnB you need to book it now! Fahsai and the whole family were absolutely wonderful. We couldn't have asked for better hosts. The home is steeped in history and culture, the diy coffee was great, and the museum was amazing. Yes, their home has a museum. Our room was large, clean, and just what we were looking for - a very unique experience in Bankok. We'll definitely be staying here when we return.

Da uns unser erster Aufenthalt bei Nitaya so gut gefallen hat, sind wir auf der Rückreise gleich nochmal dort untergekommen. Obwohl wir diesmal nur eine Nacht da waren, war unser Aufenthalt genauso gut, wie beim ersten Mal. Alles sieht sehr neu und sauber aus, Nitaya und ihre Familie sind sehr herzlich und zuvorkommend. Ich kann außerdem ihren Kaffee und den 'Coffee-Flower-Tea' wärmstens empfehlen!
Nitaya and her family are extremely kind and generous. I had a wonderful stay and would highly recommend their hospitality..

You will love this family!
They gave me an authentic and one of a kind experience and therefore I would highly recommend you to stay in Faishan homestay. Regards, Arnout

Nitaya's place is very charming, she and her family are all very warm and friendly. Our driver initially had difficulty finding where to drop us off but we used a map and we're there in no time (just follow the water). The DIY coffee was fun and tasty, as was the breakfast we enjoyed for two mornings. The mattresses are a bit firm so if you are used to a very soft mattress (like my friend) it might be a surprise but that's individual preference, not a negative. We also enjoyed the tour of Nitaya's home, a true piece of history. Overall a fantastic experience and one we'd enjoy again and highly recommend. The neighborhood is very typical for the area, Nitaya's home is not. Enjoy!

We loved staying here! Nitaya and her husband are really friendly and fantastic hosts. He showed us his antique collection and we even made our own coffee to bring back home as special gifts. The rooms are clean and so nice! We recommend this place for sure!
my host made me feel very welcome. i liked the room , and having morning coffee with bob. it was very close to the bus and i enjoyed having breakfast every morning

Everything was wonderful nitaya and bob treated me like family, very helpful , very friendly, great breakfast, I enjoyed making coffee with bob and talking with nitaya. Two wonderful people. I recommend that everyone who comes to Thailand should stay there. Thank you nitaya and bob. Hope to see you soon. Rick

Everything of the house was good, and I'm appreciate that the house owner. M was very friendly and easy to communicate with. This house was very suitable for a big group cause there are 2 rooms with king bedrooms, 2 rooms with queen bedrooms and a lot of space. The kitchen and dining space in the back of house provided and interactive area to eat and drink. Recommend for big family. It's just take 5 - 10 mins walking distance to Lotus supermarket and BTS on nut station which make it convenient to buy some food or anything and get to anywhere in Bangkok. Overall, My family had a really nice stay and would highly recommend this place and we will definitely stay in this place again without no doubt! :)

M was a great host. Always responding asap and was super helpful. Also,this place was perfect for me.
The house is exactly as per picture. Great hot shower and kitchen was really good. Also this place is located in convinient area, around 10 minute walk to go to bts ON-NUT and you can go easily to the central of bangkok (SiamSquare and Siam Paragon etc.) Moreover, i love traveling around ekkamai and thonglor which only 7-10 minutes by bts to go there.
In addition, there was a supermarket (tesco lotus) around bts ON-NUT that you can pick some food or necessary stuff before going home. This was so useful.
Overall, Location was definately fantastic. the house is very clean with super convinient facilities. I would definately come back and stay here for sure. :)
Very accomodating host, helped us with everything we needed and went above. No faults at all. Highly recommend 10/10

Had a wonderful stay at Anupong's property. The home was very big and spacious with nice modern fixtures. It was very clean, great air con, and in a very good location. All the necessities you need are available in the home. Anupong was great with communicating both before and during the trip which made check in and out stay very enjoyable. I would definitely stay at this property again. He helped to make this a great trip.

Anupong is the most helpful landlord that I have ever met, he arranged vans for me to take me to the house, and prepared some food and drink for me. The house is very clean and quiet, and the distance between the house and the airport is about half hour drive. Last but not least, it's not so expensive :)
房主人很好。知道line在国内不能用就加我微信。也专门出来接我们。家里的东西也都免费。不错
一共三层楼，一口客厅和厨房，二楼三楼分别有2个卧室，一共是4个卧室，适合大家庭出行和朋友集体出行，房间设施齐全，房东是个年轻帅哥，帮我们出行预订出租车，给我们提供了很多帮助。如果自己出行，需要步行大概15分钟左右到轻轨站，总的来说还是值得推荐！

第一次带父母来曼谷玩，一家六口住这里正合适。图片和实际情况完全相符。住所离曼谷两大机场都在半小时车程左右，房东还帮助定了接送机的车，非常贴心。
中途还给我介绍了一些人不多但是非常local的景点，一家人过得很开心。我们在曼谷度过了非常愉快的几天，下次来还会住着个地方。
这套房子很干净，装修温馨大方，家具都很新。离天铁站很近，走路十分钟，坐tutu车5分钟，附近有一个大超市、曼谷汽车东站。我们一家7口，在曼谷过得很愉快！另外房子的主人热情大方，到车站接我们，走的时候帮我们订好出租车，我们迷路耐心的帮助我们，熊孩子不小心把水阀开关关了，把房门反锁一大清早、大半夜打扰房东，真是不好意思😌
เดินทางง่ายค่ะ ที่พักสะอาด มีที่จอดรถ กว้างขวางดีค่ะ
如果是6个人随行的话，这个河边别墅非常赞，整栋全包啦，房东和她的哥哥都很好相处，家里人说都不想出去景点玩了，就想待在院子里喝茶聊天，可惜老妹早把行程都定好了，几乎没时间好好享受河边别墅的良辰美景。我们住了四晚，期间做了顿大餐，整个过程住的很开心，深刻体验到了泰国人的友好，下次如果和朋友一起去的话还会住这里，PS目测她家还可以BBQ哦。

Sirichan and Sorakit were very friendly in helping us get to the house from the airport, as well as in helping us arrange for transportation to wherever we are going on a day-to-day basis. They were very kind to help us buy miscellaneous items that we needed so we did not have to find them ourselves.
However, it would be good to note that transportation costs may be incurred staying here as there may be traffic jams, especially over the weekend.
Overall, the stay was pleasant and the house is as the picture shows. Would definitely recommend families to stay here over the week
房间是我们喜欢的风格，床也特别舒服，我们6个人，有3个卫生间非常方便。Sirichan非常友好，在周末还抽出大半天时间陪我们乘船游览了运河人家以及一座好大的寺庙。特别感谢Sorakit,他的厨艺高超，每顿早餐都是他亲自准备的，也很热心为我们介绍周边的交通情况。街对面的那家餐厅超级好吃，值得一试！
房子在河边，绿植很多，非常美，房东热情周到，出行还算方便

The place was amazing and very comfortable for our group of 5. May host more people actually. The host is very friendly and attentive. The house is charming furnished with great attention to details. I warmly recommend it

谢谢这一次的行程
很难忘
清晨在大鸟的呼叫中湄南河岸醒来
管家很可爱 好吃的早餐
Thank you very much for this trip. It's a great honor. I woke up early in the morning on the Bank of the Mae Nam River in the call of the big bird
We are good friends. In mind

房子很漂亮，环境也很好，屋主一家都很好，晚上可以听到小鸟的叫声。不过早上7点开始就会有船经过，声音比较大。入住的旅客习惯晚起的记住带耳塞！主人很花心思的为我们准备早餐。服务很好！居住环境很安全！
House is very beautiful, the environment is very good also, house advocate a are good, can hear the birds cry at night.But begins at 7 o 'clock in the morning, there will be ship noise is larger.Check-in passengers used to late remember bring earplugs!Master very effort to prepare breakfast for us.Service is very good!Very safe place to live!
在曼谷转飞机是订的一晚住宿，屋子在河边，美呆了，装修每处细节无不透露着房东的用心。打扫得超级干净。后悔没多住两晚。房东做饭一流，收费公道，还免费提供了早餐。帮我们预定去机场的的士，预定游船服务等。全五星。
房东非常的热情和负责任，详细的介绍周边情况。让同事们有了一个愉快而难忘的假期，为了不辜负房东的私家花园，还专门安排了啤酒宵夜！感谢能遇到这样具有当地特色的家庭。

我没在旅程，是我父母和他们的朋友一共八个人。但是他们出发前，sirichan就加了我的微信，各种周到，我父母的两个朋友单独从台湾出发，他们想搭公交去别墅，我请sirichan告诉我坐车方案，她提供了六七种方案告诉我，真的很感动。她非常耐心且热心，所有的困难和难题，只要告诉她她都会帮助解决。我父母发给我的别墅照片非常美，精致，卫生也很好。小院子很温馨，有家的温暖，每天早晨的早餐也很丰富。下一次我去曼谷也要住在这里！

It was a great experience. The house was perfect!Tony is very nice and helpful.
这套房子非常得完美！这是我们在曼谷住的最后一套房，朋友们都开玩笑说想永远住在这套房子里。房子很新很干净，设计的很好看。房东人也很热情，从来之前就一直热心的在联系我们，确认我们入住没有，还给我们发了附近可以去玩的地方！说真的如果不是机票定了，真是还想多住几天！

This is an amazing airbnb place to stay in Bangkok. The place is big for 4 people. Host was really friendly giving us recommendations to go to. The apartment is near a great food store and 7-11 at the entrance of the alley. Despite the slightly isolated location which can be look pass due to affordability and convenience of grab and Uber in Thailand. I highly recommend this place. You won't be disappointed.
Fab new apartment in Bangkok Tony very helpful

房间很新很整洁，跟照片基本一样，床单也很干净，淋浴设备使用起来很舒服，浴缸是按摩浴缸。我们4个人住感觉刚好。Tony很热情，告诉我们很多实用信息。
公寓在小巷的最深处，离BTS站步行距离还是挺远的，至少走20分钟，坐突突车就很快了，5分钟到N7站，价格在40-50฿左右。公寓离JJ周末市场很近，距离大皇宫、考山路、暹罗商圈还是有点距离，人多的话其实坐出租车比坐BTS更划算，到暹罗商圈不到100฿。小巷入口处就有7-11，到了晚上路边的小吃摊也挺多的，靠近N7站的地方有Big C、Boots以及各种小吃。总体上除了离市中心远一点其他都很好，推荐大家入住。

Tony was very helpful in providing all the informations that you need to get by. Getting to the place might not be easy for a first time but you won't go wrong if you follow Tony's instructions closely.

All his informations given were accurate and I managed to bump into him on my arrival day.

The apartment was great! I love how neat and clean the whole apartment was, especially the toilet. Definitely has that homely and Cosy feeling through out the stay in the apartment.

Location is easy to get by and not very far from popular shopping places.

Overall, it was indeed a very good stay in the apartment and a recommended place in Bangkok.
The house itself is clean and nice design . But the location is a bit remote actually . Not easy for calling a taxi or other transportation especially during the traffic hour .
tony的房子很新很漂亮！一家人住的很愉快！他提供的信息很好找！安全性很好！周围邻居也很友好！离周末市场很近！建议来住的朋友用 tony建议的打车软件“grab"，非常好用！
全家都很满意的民宿，打破了家庭成员入住酒店的思想。值得入住！

Super appartement pour 4 ou 6 personnes. L'appartement est recent et possède 2 SDB, la literie est plus que correcte, une machine à laver le linge récente est disponible au RDC et gratuit assez pratique, il n'y pas vraiment de quoi cuisiné mais Il y ades restos sympa et pas cher au alentour. Le seul petit point négative est qu'il est un peu loin du BTS. La station la plus proche est à environ 20 min a pied (station Saphan Kwai).
We really enjoyed staying in this peaceful, local neighborhood. We found the accommodations modern, comfortable and as advertised.  Tony was helpful and very prompt with communications.

My experience at K's place was very delightful and pleasant. The place was clean and cutely decorated. K was more than helpful and even invited us for new year's eve countdown. I would highly recommend anyone who wants a new thai friend or just want to experience bangkok how a local does. Happy New Year K! See you soon

We had an AMAZING stay at K's house!! K is an awesome host; fun, informative, professional and genuine. The house itself makes you feel very much at home with it's quirky decoration and little touches like bean bags on the balcony, a swing and if the occasion arises beer pong. The room was spacious, super clean, complete with a mosquito net.
K took us out for lunch with the other guests and was very generous with his time. K's mother is very sweet. She drove us into the main strip and ensured we had a legitimate taxi using the meter- saved us much hassle and some baht. When you stay at K's you don't feel like you're at an airbnb, it feels more like a sleepover at a mates place. We would definitely stay with K again!!!

It's the perfect vocation here.We really enjoy every moment ！This is a place with a retro dining room and a lovely garden.The most important of all, there is an angel!K gives us unforgettable memories and good time.It's a absolutely great journey full of surprises.If you are a foodie, it really comes to the right place.Here has Thai traditional flavor.K's Mom is so kind～
All great surprises are in K home!

This is a really unforgettable living experience. Lovely house, sweet mom, funny host-K. We just stay here for one night, but the clean, tidy room, delicious dinner, conversational host are really over our expectation. We will recommend this nice house to other guest.

This place was a total gem! The people, the food, the atmosphere, and the best-of-both-world location - all 5 stars. Upon check-in, a handmade envelope with a handmade map around the neighbourhood was given by K and it came in handy on my adventure into the city! The room is very spacious and is full of cute decorations like a world map with messages written by the precious guests and polaroids of each of them. I can really tell that K cherishes every memory made with his guests and he sees them as his friends, if not family! It even came with a generous-sized balcony with bean bags to just chill after a long day of exploration. All in all, a great experience! Definitely coming back again to hang with the fun-loving, accommodating K, aka the best Airbnb host I've ever come across!!

Dies war bereits mein zweiter Aufenthalt bei K und seiner Familie und wie beim ersten Mal, war alles perfekt. Schönes traditionelles Haus in ruhiger Umgebung und trotzdem nur 15 Minuten zu Fuß von der Metro entfernt. K und seine Familie sind super freundliche und herzensgute Menschen. Die Kommunikation ist 1a und sie finden für alles eine passende Lösung oder Antwort. Sie sind in der kurzen Zeit wie eine zweite Familie für mich geworden und ich würde niemals woanders hingehen, wenn ich wieder in Bangkok bin. Ich kann diese Unterkunft jedem empfehlen, der Wert auf Kultur, Herzlichkeit, Komfort und Spaß legt. Eigentlich jedem, der sich weit weg von Zuhause ein klein wenig wie Zuhause fühlen möchte. Danke K & deiner Familie!
k是个大帅哥，热情服务，很耐心讲解一些注意到的问题，房子也很温馨。是个不错的选择！！

our stay at K's place was amazing. the house is beautiful and has something I would call a "soul" you can actually sense the spirit of this place.
K as a host will help you understand everything what you should or should not do in Thailand, he will help you speak Thai or explain their traditions or habits, just to get familiar with the culture. The best host I could have ever imagined, so while being in Bangkok staying at his place it's a must!

K很好啊 ，超级无敌贴心哈哈哈哈就像一个随时随地都可以查询的泰国字典。我的意思就是不管什么都可以问他，他都会为你解答。收获一个朋友吧。King
you know what I mean，hah see U Nov,emm maybe Christmas🎄 miss U
A cosy place with vintage feel!

Tony is a very nice host, he can always respond us instantly. His advices for transportation and shopping are excellent, very clear and useful.I love this house which is suitable for people who are seeking for a peaceful environment. I've already recommended the house to my friends.
Very nice and cozy big enough for more than 5 person  clean have everything ur need  highly recommended
Tony was very helpful. The apartment was really nice and clean. Highly recommend for family trip.

House owner is kind and nice
Location close to chartucak market. But it's quite far away from Pratunam or clubs (RCA, insanity)
The host is very kind and the room is cozy. But it's a little far away from the BTS station. You'd better download uber app. A wonderful experience in Bangkok.
Things are brand-new and Tony is very helpful. It was a really comfortable experience living in the lovely house and we did enjoy a really good time.
The apt is super clean and cozy. Tony is very helpful and considerate. It a good place for family to stay.
Clean place.

Have stayed with Tony for almost 3 times now and as always, apartment is well maintained and accurate to what is shown in the photos. Location is fantastic with great local food just directly opposite the unit. Tony is also very thoughtful to have in the unit international adapters for his guests. Highly recommended to stay with Tony!
这是我旅游住过最好的地方！设备非常齐全～比住酒店舒服多了！性价比非常高 四个人以上。房东很贴心很热情 强烈推荐这间屋子！给我一次很好的泰国体验
离huaikhwang地铁站很近，属于华人居住区。到廊曼机场也方便...总而言之，蛮不错的。房东台湾人，很nice，沟通方便并且超热心，有问必答。
非常不错，房东人特别好，提供了很多有用的建议
挺近车站的，还不错。

sorry,i must give my true feeling.
the host is very nice.without him,i will give the room just one star.
i have spent two nights in here,after the first night,i wake up and find other room.
there is too much noise here.the cock will around you all the time.and air condition very loudly,make us cannot sleep,else,the air condition is cold for a while and hot for a while,i have to put on and put off the coat all night.the frozon make big noise too...i don't want to talk anymore...
ps.i cannot connect to wifi,i try a lot of times,but it does'nt worked.
it is a awful experience,i must to say.there is just a hotel,a normal hotel,even worse.
we try to change room,but host told us other room is full.
the only good point is the host.
真的超级赞的房东哟。人特别好，会热心地询问时间然后也会一直等着你。我和我朋友都住的很开心，洗手间很宽敞，晚上也很安静。他们还可以帮忙引导游玩路线，真心赞的。
very clean, no problem, 100% satisfaction :)
房間乾淨、設備齊全(冰箱、吹風機、熱水壼、衣櫃…等)，房東非常熱心，積極協助我訂購車票的問題，非常推薦！
因為行程有些變動，臨時決定多住一晚，感謝房東協助才不致於流落街頭。房東是台灣人，中文溝通非常方便，有任何問題直接連繫很快就會獲得幫助，可以說是有求必應，是我初次到訪泰國的一個美好住宿體驗。
房間很光良 很寬敞 還有房東大哥 人好好的說 溝通完全沒有問題 距離MRT也近 住的樓下附近就有7仔和全家 馬殺雞也有 額 詞窮了～最後再次衷心讚揚房東大哥！！！！！⊂(˃̶͈̀ε ˂̶͈́ ⊂ )
两房东都很棒！问啥都回答的清清楚楚，我问题很多超耐心。房间也很棒，就是阳台没有晾衣服的架子什么的麻烦点。出去也挺方便的，从地铁口出来第一次找感觉有点远，认得路了不远，拐两个弯。房间还配有小零食哟。
The hosts are very helpful and welcome. Their room is very nice with a great decoration and the bar downstair is also very cool. They serve a very tasty Chinese food!
The owner was very welcoming and took very good care of us.

Location is not easy to find, but the host is very handsome and very warm, beyond expectations! Tell us how to use the room and living room here, the first floor is the bar, the second floor living room, third floor room, experience good ~

K. Karnchanit is a super great host. Very nice, active and helpful when we ran late due to Bangkok traffic. The place is beautiful just the like the photos suggest. The location is superb; locate right in the soi Nana - a very hip street with great food and bars. You won't be disappointed staying at Karnchanit's place.

We had a really nice staycation here!
The room is very lovely and the whole building gives off really good vibes. It is located in a more quiet and peaceful area of China town, only a short walk to the famous busy Yaowarat road (10 mins). There are also lots of cool cafes/ bars nearby.
The hosts were very friendly, helpful and attentive, though we probably didn't have so many questions as we were locals ;)
Amenities provided include shampoo, shower creme, towels, slippers and hairdryer. Pretty much all that you need.
The first floor is a bar and the music was played until late evening but it wasn't too disturbing.
The second floor is a common lounge where you can watch TV, hang out, eat (snacks, fruits provided, and drink coffee.
We love this place and it was perfect for our short getaway weekend!

This airbnb is really cool and the hosts here are very enthusiastic and friendly, the decoration is also very vintage. We are from Shanghai, so when we heard the background music from the Shanghai Restoration Project here, we were fall in love this place. Here on the second floor there is a large TV, and all the electrical appliances can be shared very conveniently. The breakfast here is also very delicious. One thing have to mention is that the shower water here can be instability in midnight, so one have to take a shower early. But besides that, we are still very happy to stay here, we have received good services as friends, everyone are very nice and they will smile to you. We really recommend to stay in this airbnb, the next opportunity to come to Bangkok, but also want to come here to stay a few nights.
I love Ba hao! Was perfect !
Love this place. Very nice host.
Beautiful vintage decorating style. The breakfast was great and unique. Staffs are kind and helpful. I got some homy time on 2nd floor watching tv with dad and incredible chinatown night experience.

It was nice place to stay.
the room is cozy eough just lik picture.
there is China town near my loft, so I hang out with my friend often.
And they offer excellant breakfast everyday.
I was touched their hospitality.
They are so kind , help me whenever I ask sth.
They introduce me good restaurat, great cooking class that I love so much.
And the location is conviniet to move everywhere.
It was so worth to stay this place.
And I recommnd definitely.
the host makes my trip happier.
hope to stay here again^^

I loved my stay with Guang's family, that I am actually extending my time in Thailand and chose to stay in the same house. The family is friendly and lovely. Everything was exactly (and better) than what I was expecting. Mum's food is delicious. The room is a good size, the neighbourhood has many food areas around and a shopping plaza. You can easily cross the river to the more busy area of Bangkok by different means of transport. All was just what I was looking for. Enjoyed my stay and staying longer for another month here (Thailand and in Guang's house)

We stayed at Guangs home for 2 days. Awesome family, very friendly, very helpful, very kind, nothing but good things to say about them.
We had our own room and shared a bathroom but everything was as we expected it! In the morning Guangs lovely mother made us a thai breakfast and it was very good too! Guang and his family gave us some information whenever we needed and we felt really well in his home, like at our own home.
Location not far away from everything we wanted to see. Quiet, not a lot of noise.
It was a pleasure to meet his family and to stay in his place. Thank you :-) if we come back to bangkok, we'll definitly come back to your place!
All the best for you!!
Salomé and Fabio

This airbnb was amazing! The whole family is very welcoming, friendly, and available. I was lucky to be visiting during Chinese New Year. The family graciously include me in their ceremony. An amazing experience!
Every morning there was a yummy thai/chinese food breakfast prepared by Guang's mother. She was such a sweet lady and went above and beyond to make me feel at home.
The airbnb is located near the BTS and ferry stations, making it easy to explore Bangkok! The neighborhood is very residential and has lots of yummy street food. I enjoyed feeling like a local and look forward to my next visit!

We loved our stay at Guang's place. It is very accessible, comfortable and family-like.
It's near coffee shops, sidewalk eating at a cheap price and convenient stores.
His mother's cooking for breakfast is superb! We love how his Mama always takes time to get up early and cook for us.
They are very good in talking in English which is the reason why we did not have a hard time communicating with them. They provide tips on how you will enjoy your Bangkok stay and find you places to go to.
They were very accomodating. The rate was so budget-friendly but does not lack in amenities. We were given towels and toiletries, daily breakfasts, an air filter in the room, hot & cold shower, and friendly smiles!
Can't wait to be back!

Guang and his family were all smiles! The room was huge with great A/C and WiFi. Our only regret is that we left too early in the morning to enjoy his mother's home cooked breakfast! Highly recommend.

Wir waren nur zwei Nächte in dieser Unterkunft. Es ist wirklich sauber und das Zimmer hat eine gute Größe, wir haben uns wohl gefühlt. Das Frühstück der Mama war großartig! Und allgemein ist die ganze Familie total hilfsbereit und lieb. Wir würden wieder kommen !
这家民宿超级好哦，我英文比较差，不过交流没有问题。Guang的妈妈对我们很好，像妈妈一样，做的早餐很好吃。房间很大，睡得很舒服，很喜欢。下次还要再来住～(*^ω^*)
房东好人！有早餐，早餐挺好吃的！离saphan taksin近，想去grand palace和asiataque的人可以考虑这里。房东会中文和英文，沟通便利。附近有个family mart。

We absolutely loved this place. Guang and his mother were so nice and so friendly. She cooked us the most delicious and filling thai breakfasts that we had in Bangkok! The room was just what we needed, nothing fancy but very comfortable. They were very prompt with service even offering advice of places to check out. Towels, soap, toothbrush & toothpaste, shampoo and water all available upon arrival which was SO much appreciated as a back pack traveler. They were excited to hear about our travels so far. Very charming and engaging, we would definitely stay here again. The price is beyond worth it. FIVE stars all around!!

We absolutely loved staying at Guang's place. Guang and his mother are so kind, fun and friendly, and we loved the amazing food she cooked for breakfast every morning. There wasn't anything we didn't like, and we were full for hours afterwards! The room was very comfortable with everything we needed, plus great air conditioning and even an air filter. We loved the location of the house because it's in an area where there are more natives and less tourists, which makes it a more authentic look at Thai life. We really enjoyed exploring all of the nearby restaurants and walking past the beautiful wat nearby every day. It's also perfectly located for crossing the river (a ferry is just 5-10 minutes' walk away, although a little hidden) and the BTS (about 10 minutes' walk). This is the perfect place for those who want to get a feel of what Bangkok is really like without the clouds of tourists on the other side of the river while being close enough to everything and plenty of awesome places to eat. We highly recommend it, and can't wait to go back!
The host is a beautiful girl, she is so nice, and really helps me a lot, when we left Bangkok, we left sth in the room, She post it to me. and the house is quite good as well.
位置还不错
Lovely house, lovely host.
It's a very modern and well furnished house. Extremely clean and very accessible. The host is very helpful as well. 10/10 experience.

Cozy, convenient and clean. City location. Very near by terminal 21 shopping mall. There is a convenient shop right out side the house. About 3km away from Siam paragon. But u can choose to travel by grab car. Definitely a high recommended home stay.
很温馨的家，适合一家人或朋友入住，周边环境人不多非常清静，交通非常方便。房东还是个大美女！赞
離市區近 周邊生活機能好 晚上不怕沒東西吃及娛樂 值得推薦！
房东非常热情，早早加了微信便于联系，位置不在市中心，但是给了微信定位又打了电话还是一下就找到了。门口有餐厅和便利店以及马杀鸡店，都很方便。房间很干净，风格是我们很喜欢的。一次很棒的体验
好
Все очень понравилось

Small but a nice and comfortable room, newly remodeled. The host is so nice, he showed us exactly the way to get there and some food court near by. Since Bangkok is hot, so we turned a/c on the whole night.

We loved the place. Very clean,comfortable and well-decorated. He also has a housekeeper there most of the time, eventhou she doesnt speak any English, she was very eager to help you with all the needs. The house is in a condo/townhouse type so it can be noisy at certain but it was nothing bothering at all. The room was great and very well-kept, we sure did enjoy staying here and definitely recommend everyone else. On the side note, it'd be easy to put in the road name Soi Phraya Si to take uber or taxi as your location.

Phil's place was great; very clean and new with a very spacious bedroom and private bathroom. Phil was a great host, easy and open lines of communication and even went above and beyond when our flight was delayed and we didn't arrive at his place until 2 in the morning. Would recommend his place to anyone interested!

It was very nice to stay here. They(Phil and his wife, and maid) were very kind and helped us to find there(It is not that easy to find in the very middle of the night) Anyway,because of the exact and perfect instruction to fine there, we could check in at 23:30. He and his maid waited for us.
The accomodation is not located very center of the city but easy to access public transportation, so there were no problems at all.
Anybody stay here can feel local life in Bangkok.
I would like to recommend!

The place was great! Everything was like in the pictures. The bed was comfy and large enough for tall europeans. Nervermind the first impression on the alley, the location is quiet and the neighbours are friendly.
房东会中文，沟通无障碍，离大皇宫很近哦
Great stay, very clean and perfect communication. The place is in the heart of the old city and nearby some sights.

Everything was great!! The location was awesome the main sites are in a walkable distance yet the neighborhood is not touristy at all!
Phil and his maid were really helpful and nice, special thanks for the laundry it was life saver!
We recommend it to anybody!
和泰国当地的居民在一个小区里，特别local，离大皇宫也很近 过一条河就到。房主人很好 私信每次回超级快，而且还准备了水饮料在冰箱里。床特别大 也蛮高的 睡的很舒服。唯一一点就是坐bts可能不太方便，我们每次出行都是taxi。

What a delightful place to stay!  The old city is such a great location, with the intimacy of the neighborhood, closeness of so many beautiful and significant sites (Grand Palance, Wat Pho, etc.), and ultimate walkability - and so many great good and coffee places to choose from.  The house is very tastefully set up and decorated with every amenity you could need.  Would come back in a heartbeat.

It is a great place to stay if you want to travel around old town Bangkok. The Grand Palace and the surrounding temples are only minutes away and walking distance which saves on transportation money! Great views from the balcony too. The host is very responsive to any questions you may have 😊
This is the perfect place to stay if you want to be close to temples and downtown Bangkok, the place is great completely renovated and the staff is super friendly, I highly recommend staying here!!

Phils place is beautiful. It's close to all the major attractions in town in a little side walk where you'd never expect such a lovely house. It brings you closer to the Thai culture but at the same time it's perfect for European guests who want to enjoy European standards concerning hygiene.
I can only recommend you to stay here!!

Great clean place, comfy bed, super close to Wat Pho and a bit of a walk to Khao San rd.
Would stay again.

非常完美，房间很温馨舒适，很现代化，价格也公道。房东人特别好，还会说一点中文，虽然不住在这里但是有问必答且还特意赶过来看我们一趟，住这里的是他阿姨和佣人，也十分热情。
步行可以去大皇宫卧佛寺考山路，711也在附近，地理位置极佳。推荐。
it's convenient to everywhere even by walking, super cozy bed and super friendly hosts. great experience here:)

We really enjoyed our stay here. Great helpful communication from Phil although we never met, the housekeeper was waiting up for us when we arrived late. A couple of little bugs (looked like flying ants) in the room but except for that it was large, clean with a good sized private bathroom. Kitchen facilities are small but clean and tidy. Location is pretty good too, close to the Grand Palace and a 20 minute walk to Khao San Road.

Great place, hidden among cheaper residential homes, but host has remodeled to give it a hip homey feel.
Conveniently close to old city sites
Host was reachable and maid can also help if any questions
Great location close to temples and a great park. Walking distance to Wat Po. Tucked away location on a residential alley - very quiet and a real look into Thai living.
挺不错的  ，房东人很好 ，房东家里人也很热情 ，很多问题房东都很详细回答我 ，距离大皇宫和考山路很近，
Great location, nice place and top notch communication!
Overall experience was great. Great location and great value, just the check out lady was extremely rude

We liked staying at another of his units so much that we came back for this stay. I'll repeat the same from my other review: "Spacious apartment in a great location. It's a few blocks from several good restaurants, BTS station, and night markets. While a bit hard for some taxi drivers to find, it was a great location and close to other city sites. We stayed with our four young children, and had plenty of space for everyone. Compared to regular hotels, it was a fantastic value and much more comfortable. Spotlessly clean and 24/7 concierge desk for easy check-in. Thanks!"

Very close to BTS, comfy beds, very spacious and good view. Even has a bathtub in the master bathroom! Communication was easy. A little tricky to find, so pick up a directions card from the Holiday Inn across the street to help the taxi drivers when you're trying to get home. Great little western style supermarket down the lane too. Everything you could need including wine and cheese!
Great place to stay and near to the sky train. The place was clean and the room is big .
房间实在是好大好大间～干净～舒服，在预定时才知道这个是新的房间让我们很开心～预定过程中的小插曲也不影响我对你们的满意度～下一次我们会再跟你预定回和介绍更多朋友你们的房间哦

Muy bien ubicado y muy espacioso
Todo estuvo excelente

Love the place. It's enormous especially the main hall.
Good place for family vacation or event for Group tours.

Thanks for everything and good arrange to this house. Very nice house even that's classical inside.
I would like to live this house if come back Bangkok again.

The space in the Trinity Complex was phenomenal! We came as a group of five, and there was more than enough space for everyone. The location is great, with a lot of convenient shopping close by. The fast access to a BTS station made transportation fast and simple. The room itself was clean and spacious, with very effective air conditioning that gave us all great relief from the sweltering heat outside. The staff was always friendly, and we felt very welcome using the facilities. Would absolutely rent this space again.

Smoothly check in, staff is kind and friendly.
The house is bigger, clean and the air condition good function. The water supply ok, provide towel and shampoo.
A silent road during night time. If want night activity have to go Sala Daeng (next station Chong Nongsi). There have massage shop, restaurant, night stall, night market and pub.
Overall ok and good, Inthanom allow us late check out on 12.30pm :) well communication and friendly :)

The condo is brand new, very clean and comfortable. The pool is fantastic both for relaxing or swimming laps (approx 25m), nice gim in pool area too. 5 min walk to bts and lots of street food nearby. Great place!

Nui was a great host, very helpful.
The place was new, nice and comfortable, well equipped.
Nice outdoor swimming pool.
I enjoyed my stay
Very nice condominium.
very nice comfy firm bed, nice deco condo with reasonable price. great communication with owner friendly Nui.  5min walk to phra khanong bts.. many eatery along the road at night. great location

I have used Airbnb quite a few times on my trips to Thailand, and all of them had superhost status which after my stay i really didnt think they deserved.
But what i can say about my dealings with Nui, is that he really does deserve superhost status, always very friendly to talk with, and always answers my messages quickly.
The condo is in a modern building, nice pool and gym, condo is very neat and clean, good size for 2 guests.
Being the first guest to stay in this condo, there was a few issues like no pan or pots for cooking, but after a msg to Nui, he supplied me with some the very next day, which was great. And the bed cover was fine for me, but to thin for my gf, which Nui supplied me with a new quilt the next day, he was always happy to help in any way possible.
At check out time, my flight was a late one, so Nui offered to store our bags in he's car so we can spend some time in Bkk, when ready to pick our bags up Nui went beyond he's duty of care and offered to drive us to the airport, which i thought was very kind and thoughtful, we had a very nice chat on the way.
If i had any complaint, which i have found with every Airbnb host, is that booking through Airbnb is sapposed to give us that home away from home experience, i assume that most of the guests are foreign which is why i think satellite tv should be supplied for English speakers, so can watch some movie when at home.
But as foe Nui and his condo, i really have only good things to say, great location, great price, comfortable bed, close to BTS, W district right next door which has very cheap and tasty Thai and Western foods.
No outside noise when in condo, which makes for a good sleep.
I would recommend anyone to book through Nui, from now on my stays in Bkk will be with Nui, a great host!

Place was really new, clean and as described. Nui was really nice to meet us at the apartment and give us a quick orientation around the area. Really convenient to get around as train station was just a 5min walk away.
Nui's place is near to a night market and a lot of street food. Room is comfortable

Nui is a great man. I booked this condo for my friends, and Nui is so helpful to suggest the transportation infor and help plan for their Krabi trip. unfortunately, the wife got accident when crossed the way, Nui spent a night in the hospital to be the translator for them also almost went to the hospital everyday to communicate with doctor and police offer. besides, he offered a lot of suggestions and reminders abt claim process... Truly millions of thanks.  So lucky to have Nui, otherwise, we can not image what the situations would be... Millions of thanks...

Nui is indeed a super host in every way - making his best effort to make me feel welcome, it felt like a service apartment with water, snacks, coffee and extra toiletries and towels available. He speaks perfect English and makes great recommendations for sightseeing in the city. I will definitely look for Nui's apartments again for my next trip to Bangkok! Thank you, Nui:).

We stayed 2 nights in Nuis apartment which is located right next to the W district where we had some great food and drinks. Convenience stores are only a few steps from the lobby as well massage places. My personal favourite in the apartment was the rain shower! I would highly recommend this place and will be back again!
房间特别赞，虽然我们是三个人挤了一张床，房间干净整洁，房东特别热情，主动为我们提供帮助，而且还在我们到来之前打开空调，特别贴心

The room is clean and spacious. There were a couple bottles of water in the fridge and the ac was on when we arrived (in the middle of the night but Frank makes it easy to check in during such times) . There is a nice local restaurant on the ground floor of the building and many more located within walking distance. Frank is a great host who is personable and helpful. Photos and description are very accurate.
房东超级热心肠，我们入住期间她不在曼谷 一直发消息帮助我们。房子位置也便利，出门有很多吃饭的地方，便利店也就在附近。房间是小巧的公寓型。非常适合旅者入住哟！
房东很热情，但是客栈位置有些偏，离各种有名的景点有点远

非常好的房子，跟图片一样整洁明亮，房东frank非常热情，去的时候和的士司机不太好交流，就打电话给他和司机说，很容易就找到了地方，进去房间准备了出行攻略美食攻略和房屋地址的泰语卡片方便给司机看特别详细，特别贴心，房子的位置不在市中心，但是出行很方便，门口坐35路公交到saphan taskin轻轨站，然后去siam也很方便，我最喜欢的是房子靠近学校，周围有很多小吃和烧烤，斜对面还有一家华裔老爷爷开的中国餐馆，很爱这里~超级好评

Frank's place has everything a traveler need. Nice and clean room, we'd enjoyed every single corner especially the convenient kitchen. The area is full of delicious local street food, you would not need to worry about food. We highly recommended a traditional street food called 'Hor Mok Pla' which is sold by an old lady at the entrance of the local market just 2 mins away from BZ27. Besides, Frank is very thoughtful in every details of the arrangement. We enjoyed his hospitality very much.
Frank is really a nice host. He helped us a lot with the check in and check out. the room itself looks exactly like in the picture.
房子距离曼谷中心有点小距离，不过坐uber出去也不是很贵，民宿旁边有人多当地饭店，还有市场，很接地气，很适合居住，房间干净舒适，有公共洗衣机和晾衣服的地方，适合住两天以上，一楼就有吃的，Frank 和一楼小吃店的奶奶都very nice.
Bz27简直太棒了，frank人非常好，完全不用担心任何问题～曼谷的旅程打车也很方便，住宿干净卫生，楼下吃的又便宜又好吃，旁边就是711，我们的毕业旅行非常感谢frank～^_^
この部屋に4泊させてもらいました。内装がおしゃれでとても綺麗な部屋で本当に住んでるかのような感覚でした。近くにスーパーもあり買い物も出来ます。スーパーへ行く途中にある地元のパン屋さんもおすすめです。通りにはタクシーもトゥクトゥクも走っていて利用しやすいです。

Tongpong's place is one of the most meticulously put together airbnb properties I have stayed in thus far. He was very helpful with checking us in, providing a handy manual, and great with checkout too. The house itself is beautifully designed, and comes fully stocked with any amenities you'd need. He's clearly put in a lot of work in making the experience comfortable!
It's centrally located, and is a stone's throw away from major backpackers' haunts. It's great for young couples, or friends in town for the nightlife.
I'd definitely recommend this listing!

This place is absolutely beautiful and is one of the best places I've ever stayed. Upon arrival, Tongpong's friends were waiting for us as we arrived at the place to give us the keys. This place was newly renovated, and on our arrival date there was a storm and the bedroom was slightly leaking. They were very accommodating and provided us with a hotel room right across the street, but also let us keep the keys to the Airbnb. My friend ended up staying at the hotel and I stayed at the Airbnb and it was just fine. Location is good with many restaurants and cafes nearby. It was close, yet far enough from Khao San road. It was easy to hail a taxi. Everything is provided for you. The space is absolutely beautiful. The only con I have is that it does get a bit loud with the street traffic sometimes, but that problem is easily solved as Tongpong provided us with earplugs in the room. Thank you!!!!
My friends and I had a great time staying here. Really good location, secluded, cool 2 floor setup, and great AC. I would recommend this to anyone!

A nice place to stay over old town area of Bangkok. Very close and walkable distance to many tourist attraction.
Good local food around and most of all pubs and bars !
A very fancy but cozy decoration, resonable price if you come with a group of friends or family.
Warning ! Don't get too drunk 'cause you may find it difficult to reach the bedroom lol.

Adorable Place , better than pictures
Close to many great restaurants and Cafe'
Will recommend to everyone :-)
Was a great place to stay in. Great vibe and better in person than photos
Perfect place to explore khasan road and also go around. It gets noisy at night but the ear plugs provided do the trick.

This is THE place to stay in Bangkok. Between three people, the price was more than reasonable. It's private, which is worth a little more money than a hostel to me. The location is choose for being close to other backpacker destinations.
Very tidy.
Great air con unit upstairs.
Great kitchen for cooking.
Great community space.
Very safe.
Very central.

是一间非常有趣的民宿，房东TongPong人非常好而且热心，房间有House Menu非常详细的写了怎么找路 Wi-Fi密码 周边的好吃的好玩的，很贴心。
我们全家都住的很开心，唯一的问题就是噪音很大，一定要戴耳塞，房间也有准备.总之是非常愉快的住宿体验
Beautiful home, carefully and lovingly decorated and furnished. A relaxing respite from the chaos of Bangkok. Thank you!

The apartment is exactly what is said in the listing.
The room is brand new and spotless. Location is most convenient with easy access to the freeway to and from airport. I enjoyed the river cruise ( 50 cents ) that took me to the bustling Chinatown, the Grand Palace and the numerous temples. CNN ranked Bangkok as the top of street food and that's five minutes walk from the apartment and available 24/7!! The BTS skytrain is five minutes walk taking to you ultra modern shopping malls and more international cuisine than I imagined !!
Sutatt speaks faultless English and helped me plan my itinerary after my Pattaya visit.Great stay and my thanks to Sutatt and his family!!!

My own best AirBnb experience ever. I would have so much to say about my stay... First of all, Sutatt and Annie are absolutely adorable, helpful, but also perfectly easy to contact. They are always available to help you, advise you, and we can share beautiful moments together. I will remember and miss them...
Concerning the room, it was even better than what we actually expected! It was full of delicate things to make our stay comfortable and pleasant. We also slept extremely well... (I will miss these beds too!)
The location near the river is ideal to visit the temples, but also to reach the BTS (5 min by walk) and the local authentic Bangkok.
I advise you millions times to book more than a night in this location, in order to have a perfect sleep, being sure to be well located during your stay in Bangkok, and above all, to meet such wonderful persons.

The space is private, clean, cozy, and very comfortable. Despite the highway being directly adjacent, the room is very quiet. The shower gets nice and hot, and the bathroom is nice in general. Kitchenette is a nice bonus, and it is possible to do some microwave cooking and to make coffee in the morning.
The area is charming-- In the morning right outside the front door there is a street food market, and actually all around the area there are tasty bites to eat in food carts and in restaurants.
Suttat is very kind, informative, and available-- with lots of knowledge about local landmarks, and . He is also very responsive and accurate with answering questions. I wish we had had more time to see the historic neighborhood, but there was some paperwork to take care of, so instead we made use of the very close, very convenient BTS line, which took us everywhere we needed to go.
We'd stay here again for sure!

Suttat ist ein sehr netter Gastgeber und stand bei offenen Fragen immer zur Verfügung. Das Zimmer war ordentlich und es war alles da, was man braucht. Die Lage war perfekt, da man alles in kurzer zeit erreichen konnte. Alles in allem war das preis-leistungsverhältnis optimal und der Aufenthalt sehr angenehm und unkompliziert.

Really a good place. We enjoyed the surprise Thai desserts, too. Easy walking to Robinson's (pronounced Nobison) mall, where food court has yummy Thai food selection! Get on a boat cruise or hop on a boat going to Asiatique for free!
convenient place to stay.
The appartement is fully equipped, clean and nice. Suttat has been an incredible host, very nice and kind !  We really appreciated our stay.

APARTMENT
The uploaded pictures represent the apartment exactly like it is. Everything is clean and pretty new. It contains: two comfortable single beds (a double bed can also be chosen), a fridge, a microwave, cold/warm shower, a small kitchen and more.
LOCATION
The place is located in a calm side street. BTS station Saphan Taksin and a 24/7 McDonald's are in 8-10 and the ferry in 5 minutes walking distances.
OWNER
Speaks excellent English and helps with everything you need. He brought us breakfast even if it was not included in the deal!
We can definitely recommend that place and will come back!

Words can't be enough to describe the great host Sutatt is.
He took the time to walk with us to see the area and we felt like we were with a family member.
The place it's big, clean and with all the necessary for a couple of days ;)
It's really near of public transportation, and for us was useful to take an Uber from the airport to get there.
If you like street food, you can try a lot of options near by.
And there's a 7 eleven on the corner of the block.

Great host & location!
Sutatt is really friendly and welcoming! He surprised us by leaving breakfast for us from a local bakery :)
Location of this place is pretty good, it's near State tower & some shopping malls. The place was clean and well equipped. Only drawback is that the place is near busy street, so it can get a bit noisy.

Love the place, especially the balcony! Neighbored to some of the nicest bars in town, about fifteen minutes walk to Yaowarat main road. Overlooking both a church and a wat, guarantee to meet all your desperate spiritual need.
Oriental sunny chilled vibe, nice host, locally local. Just ditch your Shangrila and Sheraton already.
P/S: A hairdryer would be nice. Plus if you are a snack human who can't stop chewing, stock some up since 7/11 is about a sweaty mile away :))

Lovely design; breathtaking views; a lot of creative energy!
Loved the bar on the first floor, but not too many options.
Overall was good! Would love to come back again. The hosts were super friendly and kind.
Lastly, a bit secluded and hard for taxis to find.

The rooms are a few floors above the new Ba Hao cocktail bar in Yaowarat / Bangkok Chinatown, which is an excellent place to visit for cocktails and traditional Chinese comfort snacks. There is a shared space to hang out with friends and other guests, separate from the bar below. The hosts were really friendly and gave me a lift from the nearest BTS station. The room is clean and lovely and has a nice balcony, though it was a bit hot to spend much time outside! I'll stay here again next time I'm in Bangkok.

What a wonderful place! Right in the heart of China town, surrounded by the best food and bars in the area. The rooms are beautifully designed with lots of character + the common room is truly stunning. Host and staff are super nice. I'd move there in a heartbeat :)

Excellent hosts with great english skills who showed me good places all around chinatown. Top notch people. As for the apartment itself: it looks really good, quite the unique design. The living room area might be how I want to decorate my own living room, and the bedroom is spacious and elegant with an excellent view.
If you are having troubles walking in stairs this might not be for you, but if you don't mind a few steps then I highly recommend this place. Also: try the pudding with the gojiberrysauce in the 1st floor bar. Amazing.

Ba Hao was the perfect home base for our visit to Bangkok. Karnchanit, Note, and their partners were extremely welcoming, friendly, and helpful. The beautifully renovated shop house had comfortable rooms that were uniquely decorated. It was wonderful to start our days with breakfast brought in from local vendors and end the night with delicious drinks downstairs. Great addition to a really neat neighborhood. We wish you all the best!

We arrived to such a warm greeting from our hosts and knew instantly this was going to be a great experience. The fourth level room was spacious, impeccably clean and super-hip with stunning views from the private balcony over this exciting part of Chinatown.
The location was simply exhilarating with a mix of old and new Bangkok on our doorstep. Our hosts were able to provide a wealth of tips and recommendations that made us feel like locals. Ba Hao, their Chinese-inspired bar located on the ground level, was a very cool and friendly place to hang out and savour exquisite cocktails and bar snacks. Our breakfast was delicious and a great insight into local flavours.
I can't recommend this place highly enough. Without doubt one of the greatest travel and accommodation experiences my partner and I have had the pleasure of enjoying. We will certainly be staying here on our next trip to Bangkok.
We left with a tear in our eye. Thanks again to Bua and the whole team.
See you next time.
Zenon and Kitty

What an awesome space! We were treated like old friends. Great communication, great recommendations and great breakfast. We stayed in the private room at the top of the building. Very clean. The restaurant on the first floor is a great spot to meet for a drink/food before you head out to explore the city. The street has a few great bars as well.

Nice spot :)
Top Place to Visit in Bangkok!

Folks: i only have few words JUST GO THERE, this was so strategic right near the very heart of China Town with easy access to everything, the bar and the restaurant were so good that you do not even need to leave if you do not want. Or just order a Thai massage at your room and relax..!
Thank you for the wonderful hosts and especially for the cleaning lady Phai, she was so kind and attended to each and everyone of our requests. TRUST ME & JUST GO THERE YOU WILL REALLY LOVE IT..!!

The place is close the department store-central rama9 and MRT you can walk just 3-5 mins. The room is so wide there are 3 bedrooms  2 bathrooms and very comfortable,cozy  if you would like to relax you can lift down to p floor, there is a large swimming pool and gym for free

Great place to stay in Bangkok with a family. The modern apartment is very spacious and easily fitted our family of 4 adults and 1 kid. Located in an upscale condo just behind Rama 9 Central department store. Huge open space with a few pools and a kids playground on the territory. Definitely recommend to all!
Can't think of a bad thing to say. Just book it and you will be happy you did.

The house was amazing and so magical. My whole family loved it.
Host is simply amazing. 5 stars are seriously less .. I wish I could give 7 stars.
just as described, the condo was perfect, ample space for myself and 3 friends to comfortably stay, everything was clean and perfect when we arrived, Rebecca keeps a wonderful place!

此次带小朋友到曼谷的中国大使馆换旅行证，位置很近，步行可到达。没有尝试公共交通，据说很便利。
公寓位置不错，面积大，有4张床哦！ 我们一家刚好够用：） 主卧的房间最舒服，哈哈。这个百丽是现代化的购物广场美食广场（为啥我会想起国内那个百丽鞋哩？）吃的喝的不贵，楼下还有家比较好的超市。
房东姑娘很热心，提供各种攻略。入住的程序非常清晰。值得体验！
This is the first stop of my Thailand trip! Recommend this to all my friends!They have a clean kitchen ,I wish I could use it.

Very family oriented, very hygienic. The apartment is spacious and could accommodate more than 6-7 people. There is a shopping mall underneath with several restaurants. There is also delicious street food right at the corner. The swimming pool is very nice. Highly recommended to those who travel with family.
屋子不錯的。這次不是第一次預訂房東的屋子，方便，快捷，漂亮。東西齊全，也很大很舒服。附近也有很大shopping mall，方便旅客買東西和吃東西。下次希望也可以再次入住。

We are very pleased and satisfied with our stay at Rebecca's unit. It is clean, tidy and spacious. Great for family or group sharing of 7-8 pax.
It is centrally located with convenient store, eateries and shopping mall. Rebecca is also very responsive and fast in attending to our needs, she even prepared a clear details of all the check in/out procedures, house's rules and map (all written in English, Thai and Mandarin).
Definitely a recommended host and accommodation to stay in!
与房东联系沟通都很顺畅，回复很及时，公寓的位置就在地铁口附近，出行很方便，楼下和旁边就是大商场这两天正在年中大促，买买买非常方便。公寓内设施齐全，厨具餐具齐全，我们还煮了方便面吃。洗衣机、电视机、网络设备都很新，全都附有中英文使用说明，很贴心的，洗澡水大很舒服。楼下的泳池不错可惜没有时间去游。对了，枕头很舒服哦，乳胶枕头呢。特别适合团队家庭出行，下次再来曼谷依旧会选择这里哦！
Harnpon's condominium is near Saladeang BTS and Silom MRT, where near the night market, but it's amazing quiet in the room. The Club is nearby, walk there might take 5mins.

일단 위치는 괜찮아요. 어느 한쪽에도 편중되지 않은 중도의 길을 가고있다고 볼수있어요. 숙소에서 서쪽으로가면 왕궁등 유적지볼곳이 나오고요, 동쪽으로가면 좀 트렌디(?)한 수쿰빗지역이랑 시암쪽이에요. 또 bts역에 가까워서 좋습니다 (도보로 5분정도) 수영장이랑 헬스장시설은 일단 사람이 거의 안써서 좋습니다. 전용수영장느낌이 많이드네요.
애어컨은 빵빵하고 뜨거운물도 콸콸나옵니다. 굳이 단점을 뽑자면 숙소내 와이파이가 잘안되고, 약간 숙소가 어두운 느낌은 있습니다. 또, 남자2명이상이 쓰기에는 조금 비좁아 보입니다.
하지만 전반적으론 아주 만족스러웠습니다. 굳!
Highly recommend this place. Host was extremely helpful, accommodated early check-in and patiently answered any query we had. It was a very pleasant stay.

房子和照片一模一樣，房子非常乾淨漂亮！ 房子的主人也很細心的回答住戶問題。
房子的位置如果能在更明確的標示或形容會更好找。
Very clean and accessible by public transport. 7-11 is just downstairs so it's also convenient. Would stay here again. Thank you Harnpon

That apartment is convenient and it's near the downtown in Bangkok，especially there has a 7-11.The room is nice .we have 4people and it's totally sufficient.but the Internet there is not really good.In a word,i think it's a good choice to choose.Thanks! (＾▽＾)
More spacious than I expected. Good location and wonderful host. Checking-in was very easy and the office was open for 24hrs. Security was tight and it was very reassuring. Thanks!
Good room！Convenient and clean.
Clean and spacious apartment close to Silom nightlife. Harnpon is a very helpful host and we loved the swimming pool on the roof!

Great place. The gym wasn't in a decent condition at all but you can't complain for the price.
If I have to say anything about it, was that I t was hard to spot from the taxi, you should look out for the seven eleven instead.
If you check in late, the security guard might be asleep.
Despite those, I would still stay again.
房东真的超棒，从订房间到最后，每一步都能很仔细的为我们考虑到。从机场到酒店，打车的话房东会告诉你大概的价格，坐地铁的话房东把从上车到下车再到酒店的每一步都会配图，真的超级仔细超级赞。酒店下面就有711和饭店咖啡馆。很方便。一个字，棒！
非常好👍就是小了点照片看着大很多 交通方便在bts旁边 楼下就有很多吃的用的 还有超市。谢谢🙏回复也很及时
房东台湾帅炸的哥哥，自认不如，哈哈哈，VX给的如何到达，换钱，吃饭的地方真的太细心，太贴心，就像那句口号一样，第一句话听到中文，真好，安全感倍增。
非常愉快的一次入住！老板人非常nice！之前加了老板的微信，各种信息都介绍的非常全面，很细心，有任何问题都耐心的回复，比心。酒店的位置靠近MRT，餐饮，水果，超市楼下都有，非常方便。房间整洁干净很温馨！
老板服务非常好，人很热心，中文特别好！酒店温馨干净，交通方便！
很可爱的单身公寓式的房间，干净温馨。楼下有7-11，隔壁有小吃摊，离地铁站大概4-5分钟，也近。遗憾只住了1夜，附近的地图还没摸透😬😘。。下次去曼谷还会入住的
房间地理位置很好，而且靠近地铁，附近就有7－11，但又不失安静，房东很热情，一开始就把想问的东西，全发过来了，清晰，明了，总之，很愉快的一个旅程，还遗憾才住了一天
ใหม่ สะอาด อาหารสะดวก เดินถึง MRT สะดวก คุ้มค่ามาก
去地铁站蛮方便的，虽然说我们出门都是坐taxi🚕。附近的火车夜市真的超级棒，吃货们的天堂。去大皇宫那边可能就稍远，我们当时打车没有司机愿意带我们，只好去坐地铁了。房东都超好的，中文交流特别爽哈哈~在入住前给我们的干货也特别足，帮到了我们不少~
老板很亲切，房间很干净，入住跟舒服
It is good and value for money.

Very good value for money. We also visited the neighbourhood and found a night market, a river and a temple. Lovely to cool down in the pool.
In the airport I discovered that I had lost my bag. What a nightmare.....
I tried to stay calm and called the hotel. When the driver returned to the airport a second time, he brought my bag. What an excellent service. I got everything back, my passport and my purse.
Except for noise from a neighbouring air conditioning, everything was excellent.
Good.

near airport with free airport transfer, which is great. swimming pool is clean and view outside is good. there is a night market nearby with 10mins walk and a massage just out of the corner. it's a cozy place to stay.
great
Cool place, close to the airport
Ich erreichte das Hotel 1 Stunde vor der Check-In Zeit und bekam problemlos in 5 min ein Zimmer, auch wenn dies nicht den Fotos auf AirBnB entsprach. Trotzdem super Aufenthalt!
服务特别的好，位置也方便，干净整洁，是一次很棒的体验
Place was small but very clean, great value and close to airport.
Sutatt is the perfect host- available, friendly and exceedingly gracious. Highly recommend this cozy stay in a great neighborhood. Will not be disappointed.

Best host ever, kind and friendly, it is like visiting family. The studio is clean and quiet in a lively neighborhood with a convenient store at the corner, a big mart one block away, Street Food stalls outside the building and restaurants. It's 5 minutes away from the pier to take the boat (cheap and quick) to access wat arun, wat pho and the palace. Many bus stops around and bts too. Definitely the best place to stay in Bangkok, wouldn't go anywhere else if we come back here. Thanks to our great host.

The room is big and comfy. Nice to stay for 2 person. Have webTV for use if you need some in house entertainment. Host is nice and feel free to ask for travel tips. Note that the exact location and address is differ from AirBnB official address, do communicate with host to avoid lost in BangRak ( i personally wasted 2 hours plus to look around the exact destinations).  Overall is a comfy place to stay, do bare in mind the bed is slightly dusty and i got bite by dust mite, do take note if you allergy to dust mite.

This was our first stop in Bangkok and after 30 hours of travelling we were ready for a good rest. Prior to arriving the communication was fantastic and very prompt. We were upgraded to a bigger room so actually stayed in Bens Place. On arrival we were met promptly by our host, Ben. He was very kind leaving water and fruit for us and gave us advise and recommendations throughout our stay, the perfect host. He lives on the fourth floor and said he was available should we need him throughout our stay. The room is modern, clean, well equipped, spacious and the air con is amazing. Very comfortable beds and hot shower. We found the location to be very good, a short walk to the market in Bangrak with wonderful street food and covered food hall. It felt like a local neighbourhood, rather than a tourist trap, but altogether very safe and easy to navigate.
Over all we felt this was a very good price for a very nice room in a great spot. Thank you Ben, if we are in Bangkok again, we will be back at your place!

Well, there were so many great things I have experienced during my stay at Sweet Home. First thing first, I really appreciated on how responsive Suttat was when I needed to ask some urgent matters.
The next thing was when he picked me and my friend, Nitya, avoiding the chance for us to get lost. That was a very kind of him. The room itself was actually way way way beyond my expectation for such extremely affordable rate. It was also equipped with microwave, a fridge, and the epic one: a rice cooker!
The location is very strategic: close to a shopping mall called Robinson which is only few steps away to Saphan Thaksin BTS, while the closest Pier from Suttat's place is the Oriental Pier. There are two convenient stores (Seven Eleven) within walking distance about 2 mins from Sweet Home. Oh and the Lerdsin Hospital is located just across the nearest Seven Eleven in the neighbourhood (in case of emergency :p).
On the top of everything, Suttat and his family were such super generous persons I have ever met! Definitely will stay with them the next time I visit Bangkok! :)

Ben was the sweetest and best host i have ever had. He went above and beyond to help us get accustomed and familiar to the area. He bought us food and coffee and even let us use his washer. The room was spacious and clean. Very cozy and provided us with everything we need to have a nice stay. I would definitely recommended Ben’s place.

Sutatt was a perfect host, who arranged everything in house for our stay. He was very kind and helpful. The room was clean, cozy and included everything what we wanted. It was located near the river, in a very convenient district. I really recommend this place!:)

Sutatt’s place is very clean and perfect for a stay in Bangkok. He was a very thoughtful and informative host who gave us tips which were useful...in the morning he dropped off little treats...There was coffee and tea in the room and a fridge microwave and kettle...The market is outside and the street food was very tasty..There were a couple of nice restaurants one alley up where we enjoyed dinners and coffees...The bed was as new and comfortable....we felt very safe and secure....I would recommend this place. Its central to everything by river or bus or train...Sutatt kindly had his daughter meet us at the BTS train exit when we arrived after a very long flight...and she showed  us the way home. We emailed from the airport as arranged...it was an easy check in...Thank you...

Ben’s place was great! Big comfortable bed, hot shower, toilet had a fantastic bidet sprayer (we need those in the US!) Great kitchen amenities such as a refrigerator, microwave and sink, and it was in a great location! It was an apartment that’s close to Silom area and Patpong night market by taxi (maybe 20 minute walk) Ben was very fast with his responses and he was very accommodating as well! And what’s best! There is a market right outside of his apartment! Phenomenal Thai food that’s extremely cheap! I would definitely stay at Ben’s place again!!!! Thanks so much, Ben!!

The hosts were lovely. Really kind and helpful, even offered to meet us to help us find the place. My only complaint was it was at ground level and we had no outside window. The window was onto an entranceway which had a bright light. You couldnt open the window and the room was dark. You didnt know if it was night or day.

新装修的房子我们很荣幸成为第一个住客，房东很贴心，从旅行前期就为我们安排好一切并及时关注我们，给了我们首次曼谷旅游很多推荐，房子很干净，除了门禁以外还配3把锁这让我们很有安全感，我很看中这个，另外屋内装修的很时尚，一应俱全，拎包入住哈哈哈，这房子地处闹市区，我们打Taxi去大皇宫，摩天轮夜市和central world都是100泰铢内（有时候司机见到外国游客会说很堵车可以适当加点钱因为泰国实在太便宜了不论吃的还是打车），楼下出门走路10分钟有好多吃的特别推荐奶酪巧克力饼和烤虾，再走5分钟是巴蓬夜市逛完夜市出口就是美食一条街，推荐starbursts斜对面一家吃咖喱蟹的很不错，我们在泰国只呆4天5夜，前2个晚上定在皇后公园的万豪，后来3天住在房东这，强烈推荐这个小家庭，特别适合像我们这样一对夫妻或情侣入住，外加一两个小宝贝也够住，沙发直接拉开也可以当个床，贴心！ We are honored to be the first guest of the newly renovated house, and the landlord is very sweet. From the early stage of the trip, we have arranged everything and paid attention to us in time. We have been given a lot of recommendations for our first trip to Bangkok, and the house is very clean. In addition to the entrance guard, there were also 3 locks that made us feel very secure. I was very attracted to this. In addition, the interior of the house was very stylish and everything was available. The bag was in haha. The house was located downtown. We went to the Grand Palace by Taxi. The Ferris Wheel Night Market and the central world are within 100baht (sometimes drivers who see foreign tourists say they can get a little extra money in traffic jams because Thailand is too cheap to eat or take a taxi, and there's plenty to eat when you walk downstairs for 10 minutes. Cheese chocolate cakes and grilled prawns, Another 5 minutes is the Bhapong night market, the exit of the night market is a gourmet street. It is recommended that a house across from starbursts eat curry crab very well. We only stay in Thailand for four days and five nights, and the first two nights are set at Marriott in Queen's Park. Later 3 days living in the landlord this, strongly recommended this small family, especially suitable for a couple or couples like us to move in, plus one or two small baby also enough, sofa can also be opened as a bed, intimate!

The apartment is located in a very strategic place. Public transport was very easy as it is close to BTS station Salaedeng and Chong Nonsi, MRT station Silom was also nearby. The unit is very clean and stylish. The building itself is a bit old but was very well maintained and clean. The unit has all the amenities that you need. It was also very spacious. Check in and out was very easy as there is always a person at the building's reception. Harnpon is a wonderful host. Very fast to response to any question. He even let us check in early as the unit was not in use the day before. We also used Grab for transportation besides the train system. Try to avoid using taxi as they are very reluctant in using the meter. I would definitely recommend this place for those planning to go to Bangkok.

親切でとても良かった。
お部屋もおしゃれでgood！
