The apt really cold design and location are the best. Host with a quick response which very helpful to help the guest. Thank you for the wonderful trip.
Location is very good. Close to BTS and metro. Apartment is clean. If I will be back to Bangkok, I would choose this apartment again.

Perfect location near BRT railway and the bangkok centre.
Cosy flat with all you nead
Wonderful place to stay in Bangkok!

The best place to stay. Stylish condo with a balcony and a fully equipped kitchen. Big and comfy sofa in the living room area that can host 2 more people. Harnpon is lovely and very communicative. There's a pool and a small gym upstairs. An elevator for an easy access with luggage. 7/11 is just across the street, it's so convenient. 2 minutes walk from Silom. Absolutely perfect stay. I've already booked it for my next trip. I honestly recommend this condo.

Lovely place in the heart of Silom. Harnpon is so sweet, he did everithing to make me feel compfortable in his place. The place is int he center, 7/11 is just outsid the door, there's an elevator, a swimming pool, little gym. Electronical lock on the door (and a regular lock to feel the safest you can), s small porch; kitchen' working space; living room for hosting and a dining table. GREAT aircon. So stylish, so thouthfull.  It's my second stay and I'll definately will choose this place for my next visits.

感覺非常好 房間各樣跟照片相同 交通方便
房主 好有耐心 有問必答 回覆速度快！
房子真的很大很干净，离各个地方都很方便。

Anupong’s place is very good value for money.This house is so comfortable and nice for big group or family. Anupong is also a fantastic host and is very helpful. He took care for us so much. Although our check in time was so late at night, he contacted kindly and told a taxi driver how to go to this house.
Location wise is good as it is nearby to On Nut BTS station with 10 min walking distance. However If you don't want to walk, He can arrange a tuk tuk for pick you up from the house to the BTS station. And it is quite easy to book either Uber or Grab to anywhere in Bangkok. There are a lot of nice street food along the street and there are convenient store nearby just as 7-11 and Tesco lotus.We want to stay in this house again when we go to Bangkok next time.
特别棒特别适合一群小伙伴去旅游 出门离轻轨特别近！旁边有711！值得入住！！！

장점으로는 숙소가 크고 깨끗한 편이며 주변이 아주 조용해서 잠을 방해하지 않습니다. 또한 침대도 넓고 에어컨도 잘 작동되어 쾌적하게 지낼 수 있었습니다. 단점으로는 위치가 처음에 찾기 애매한 곳에 있으며 택시를 잡으려면 핰 5분~10분정도 큰길까지 걸어나가야 합니다. 또한 지내는 동안 부엌에서 바퀴벌레가 나와 그거 잡느라 좀 애를 먹었습니다. 이점만 빼면 참 좋은 숙소입니다.
房子很干净，很舒服，值得一家老小过来住
The house is tidy and clean. The host Anupong is helpful and friendly!We will definitely come back again when we visit Bangkok next time:) Thank you Anupong!
Well maintained and a neat place. The host was very responsive and helpful. I would recommend this place for a family vacation.

The House is very nice and tidy, there have 4 bedrooms, good for a big friends and family.  Bed and pillows are very comfortable, all furniture appliances a new.  The description is the same.  Anupong responded very quickly.  And he also arrange the van for us.  I am highly recommended his house for everyone.
Great house to stay with a group of people. Very spacious and comfortable. Picture is accurate and near to bts onnut.
We had a very good time in this big house, really feel like home. There are 4 rooms for 7persons to sleep. Very clean and quiet，the host is very helpful!
Sehr schöne Designerwohnung in guter Lage! Sehr empfehlenswert!!

Appartement situé à 500 mètres de la gare Hua Lam Phong, et de la station de métro du même nom, dans une impasse très calme, avec pour voisins de très gentils habitants de Bangkok. Proche de MBK et Siam Center... Appartement ancien, mais rénové  avec goût, très bien équipé à neuf.
Great place in Bangkok

That is an amazing place! The house is exactly as described! Super clean, very nice details in the interiour, great TV (with worldwide channels), nice table, a rooftop terrace, very nice bath (actually two of them)! It´s located quite well, so all the typical destinations can be reached easily (by bus or taxi or walking, if you like to walk a bit, like me :-)). The hosts are very welcoming and helpful, too! So, there´s really nothing to complain about! :-) I can absolutely recommend this place.

Napa's place is down a short alley (soi) in central Bangkok. It is on two floors , the first floor up one flight of old stairs, beautifully restored, is a sitting room with large television and tea/coffee facilities. Upstairs is a beautiful bathroom and a large bedroom with a balcony looking out at trees. Napa is very helpful and has a lovelymanner.
.
Sharon Blaikie

The apartment was located about 10 minutes walk from Hua Lamphong MRT station, and there are taxis and buses nearby, so getting around is very easy. There's lots to see around Chinatown nearby and its easy to get to all the major tourist attractions, like temples and khaosan road.
It's on a very Thai soi, a small backstreet where other locals live, so you get a real experience of how Thai people live their lives, which was really great.
It's an older building that's been renovated and has a really hip/cool style, with has a nice private roof terrace which is good for a beer or two in the evening.
Napa was a great and friendly host, gave us tips about the area and recommended some cool bars to check out nearby.
Really enjoyed our stay here and a slice of Thai life, great place!
5* Napa’s place is beautiful and she is a wonderful, accommodating host. If you are planning to stay anywhere in Bangkok, stay at Napa’s place!

Appartement parfait, très joli, grand, dans une impasse calme, confortable (air climatisé et 2 terrasses) très bien situé, tout prés de la gare ferroviaire et metro MRT de Hua Lamphong, du quartier de Chinatown (accessible par plusieurs bus), du quartier National Stadium. Napa est très prévenante, pleine de bons conseils et attentionnée. Séjour parfait
Best Airbnb for the value. Napa is nice and communicates quickly. 5 Stars when you consider price to value.

Excelente lugar para quedarse! Muy limpio y cómodo.. Napa es muy atenta, nos dejo un mapa con los buses y lugares para comer cerca del departamento. La estación Hua Lapmpong queda a 10/15min caminando
El lugar está bien equipado. Volvería sin dudas!
Superior location, beautiful environment and high security

Wow!    Great place!    Super clean, modern, great fitness center and pool, bottled water......can't rave about the amenities enough.    Conveniently located to the SBS Train.....Tremendous hospitality!!    I loved it so much, I booked another stay while there!
like

Beautiful apartment - I would say even nicer than the photos can show. The room was clean, minimalistic, spacious - it was everything we were expecting and more. A washing machine (plus detergent) is offered, which is great. Bed and pillows were extremely comfortable. In terms of extra amenities, there is a beautiful pool and a massage place downstairs (which, surprisingly, was not extremely expensive and had prices on par with most others I've seen in Bangkok).
The location is close to the BTS station but is tucked into an alley, allowing it to remain quiet. The property itself offers a free tuktuk to the BTS station or to the nearby market where you can find lots of street food vendors.
Suchada is extremely quick with responses and very helpful. Checking in was a seamless and easy process.
Would definitely recommend this property and will choose this place for future stays in Bangkok (if it's available)!

Great helpful owner,
Nice and clean.
Happy stay!

We were warmly received by Suchada & Tik upon arrival. The place looks exactly like what was described - stylish, clean & spacious. The place has everything required for a good stay. The place was a 5 minutes walk to Sanam Pao BTS & there is also complimentary in-house tuk-tuk service to and fro Sanam Pao station. Sanam Pao Station is a good place to begin exploring Bangkok city as it is only a few stations away from Chatuchak weekend market and Siam. We would recommend anyone visiting Bangkok to consider Suchada’s place for a stay!
Cost and place very reasonable, helpful staffs, clean and very comfortable

Great place and amazing host with local tuk tuk service. It is a difficult location for Uber drivers to find sometimes. But overall the place is great and trendy with a convenient massage shop right downstairs.
Great place, will stay again

Great place! It's part of a hotel with 24 hour check in too! The room is very clean and very well located (easy to call a meter taxi from the front desk, and located very close to the sky train public transportation) Thanks!

We spent a lovely week in Max's place. Stylish and spotless, with great WiFi. We loved having a rooftop pool to lounge in and a washing machine that we could use (after 3 months travelling this was a godsend). Max was always super speedy with his communications and willing to help. Our only suggestion would be to add a few more utensils to the kitchen to make it top notch (knives to accompany forks and spoons, a chopping board to save the sides and a coffee press for your morning caffeine hit).

I recommend strongly this place . Warm welcome and very responsive to any questions. This place is really nicely set up and convenient. Host was great. Quiet and safe place . Feel like home . Many thanks to my host .
房东人很好,有问题咨询他都会迅速为我们解答，并且为我们解决问题。房间也很不错,就是位置有点偏僻，但是楼下都有免费的车接送，总之不错吧。
Phasute's place was absolutely beautiful. We loved everything about the place... the pool was gorgeous and had an awesome view! It was in a great location as well. Definitely would stay here again.

Lovely place, great location. We did not need the host in person, but Phasute was very quick to respond to any query and extremely friendly.
He even allowed us to check out late on the final day as our flights were later in the evening. Would return to stay any time !
Thanks u very much to Max for a great service, your place is amazing and him make feel us like home ! 100% recommended .

Max and Nam were great hosts, she was waiting at the condo when we arrived and walked us thru the place and even suggested places to see and things to do.  The building attendants were very attentive and friendly and would take us where we wanted to go (locally).  I highly recommend the location, as it is nearby everything.  One drawback is the noise once the commute got started in the morning and afternoon.  Overall, a very pleasant stay and would definitely stay again.
Great rooftop pool!
Clean and nice place

The place was nice and clean, 5 min walk from the train station.  Max was great and communicated instantly. Would definitely stay again.

Lovely place. Not too far away from bts station walkable distance.  Nice view at night from the balcony.  1-2 station away from siam/centralworld malls. Big and spacious rooms. Tv with cable channels. Comfortable sofa.  There's everything you need. Makes u feel just like home when you are there.  Max is fast in responding. Great host. Thanks max! for the lovely stay =)

Meet Phasute, who is pleasant and friendly. The whole apartment is clean with complete amenities. Phasute has sent us the ironing board & also kettle after requested. Very fast respond & communication is good. If you are travelling in big group (max 8 pax) recommended this apartment. It's close to Ploen Chit BTS station just 5 min walk. Thank you Phasute & Mac for offering a good place to stay.
Awesome house, will book again next time!
Great apartment with lots of space. Mac has great communication and was able to accommodate my late night check in and provided clear instructions. Location is central as well
The room is very comfortable！

Mac was an amazing host and quick to answer any questions. This was an extremely nice apartment in a great location. Everything was as expected and the home was very comfortable. Definitely would stay here again if I visit Bangkok again!

Nice and clean apt
Good for big family
Close to MRT
MAC is awesome. He is helpful to near perfection with arranging for transport and even late night request. We are warmed by his hospitality and would definitely return soon.

This is very good and suitable place for family and friends. The house is big, clean enough for many people. They also provide a lot useful thing such as shower essentials etc. Moreover downstairs have shop so u can buy something in there. Safety environment with guard and need to tap card to access the build. It is a high class condo for staying！

The unit us in a very large condo development with lots of high end features. Nice secure lobby, huge swimming pools, gym, kids playground sitting areas. The condo has a mall right below it with restaurants well priced coffee and a supermarket. The unit itself is homey snd has what you need including a washer. Checkin is super easy and straightforward

在airbnb上反复比较，最终选择了Rebecca的酒店式公寓，总体感觉很棒，性价比非常好。沟通方面：房东是中国人，沟通起来非常方便。房东很nice，回复询问及时又很有耐心，并给了我们很多宝贵的攻略和建议。住宿方面：房间整洁，配套齐全，有一种异国居家生活的美好感觉。公寓位置：位于繁华的拉查达路，楼下有7-11（24小时）、特色餐厅、boots等，P层有超赞的热带空中花园，两个游泳池和健身房非常棒，其中一个非常适合小孩子玩水。步行5-10分钟可到达Central Rama9（尚泰百货）、Lotus超市和MRT（Rama9站）。距离机场高速也很近。总之，下次来还会住这里！

Rebecca's place was a great stopover for our family of five. The apartment was very clean with what seemed to be many brand-new or barely-used furnishings (glassware, appliances, etc). Comfortable beds and a very nice shower which we appreciate. We enjoyed the location (five minute walk to the subway, very convenient) and the convenience of the grocery store downstairs. Also can't fail to mention the relaxing pool and small fitness facility which were nice to utilize a couple times. We feel we got good value for our moment and we're glad we stayed there.
Everything is good^^
超高的性价比，热情的服务，便利的交通，整洁的屋子，乐于助人的助理，干净的露天游泳池，最主要的是有全自动洗衣机免费使用，住了十几个guest house，第一次遇到这么齐全的家用电器，感谢热情的你们
Bel appartement. Belle piscine. Bien situé.
兩房一廳的確非常的超值！非常適合家庭住宿，外面客廳還有一張床可以睡，公設的游泳池也非常漂亮，飯店式的管理和住戶水準也高，非常推薦一家人入住~~
非常好的体验，交通便利
Great place to recommend. The swimming pool is amazing
Yim is wonderful , and very helpful, the actual spot is great close to a vibrant street , yet far enough away to be peaceful , and wonderful garden , and cafe right on your door step,
My second stay at Yips place , made me appreciate how special the whole package is, Would highly recommend to all
yim的房子看上去很很新。非常漂亮，地理位置很优越。出行也很方便。yim是个非常漂亮的房东也很热情。房间很大，最多可以入住四个人。性价比在曼谷市区算是很高的。推荐大家去入住。来了几次曼谷这一次是最满意的。
Yim was a great host who was quick to respond with any questions or queries.  The accommodation was great with all necessities and the local area was close to travel links and things to do

Very very very wonderful experience staying in Yim 's place. The decoration of the house makes me think that the host is a talented designer.   Surely that I will stay there many times when travelling to Bangkok.
房子在市中心，走路到地铁站2分钟，交通非常便利，室内很干净卫生，很舒服，泰国2家人出游的不二选择！
很干净，很整洁，在市中心的边上，很安静，非常适合家庭出游，交通方便，离轮渡和轻轨很近，步行就能到，门口就有一家餐厅，很小资的感觉，里面还有一个帅哥，周围有吃的和便利店，很方便！强烈推荐
close to Surasak station,  very friendly host.
性价比很高，房东很年轻，沟通很方便。离公共交通好近，去各大商圈都很方便。
Fantastic location. Very nice apartment. Good communication. We had a really great stay!

Pai and Poony’ place was incredibly cozy and well decorated. A nice duplex room with fully equiped. Pai and Poony had organised everything agreed beforehand such as late check in. The place is clean with a good location( neighborhood area) and few mins to public transportation. Everything is perfect. Would definitely recommend!!
The landlord was very friendly and the room was good.I love it,!

Pai's place was the perfect way to end my 2 week trip in Thailand. The loft was so comfortable and cozy, and it was close to the airport for my flight out the next morning. I loved the train night market- the stalls were much more unique than what I saw at the Chiang Mai Night Bazar and Bangkok Khao San Road. There was also a small hole in the wall roasted duck noodle soup stand nearby. It was hands down the best duck noodle soup I've ever had, and was a very authentic experience. Overall a fantastic experience, I wish I could have stayed longer.
Nice little place close to the airport.

Leider waren wir nur eine Nacht in dieser Unterkunft, weil wir nächsten Morgen wieder nach Deutschland fliegen mussten. Die Unterkunft ist nagelneu, wir waren bestimmt erst die 4. oder 5. Gäste. Die Unterkunft sieht genauso aus, wie auf den Bildern. Sehr schick eingerichtet. Pai hat uns beide sehr liebevoll persönlich empfangen, uns Tipps gegeben und uns alle Gegebenheiten in der Umgebung erklärt. Die Unterkunft hat 5 Sterne verdient und wir würden jederzeit wieder hier buchen. Nächstes Mal aber mindestens eine Nacht mehr. :)

HCube was stylist and comfortable. Pooney let us in and showed us our room even when we arrive super late the first night. Great suggestions and a map to help us get around. We were able to use Uber and flag down a taxi easily. Highly recommend staying here especially if you’re looking to be close to the bkk airport while still being close to the city. (15 mins)

Thanks P'Pai and her team, they very nice and helpful!
The house so good and convince to airport link, but at night, I prefer by taxi or motorcycle when go back the house, because around the house is quiet.
Its abit far from station. Can be search in google map by name "hcube bkk"

Really enjoyed my stay at Poony and Pai place. Very close to public transportation to and from the airport and downtown Bangkok (15 mins)
close to local night market and walking distance to 53rd sol restaurants. Looking forward to staying here again.
Absolutely fantastic place
The space is really awesome and it fit 5 of us super comfortably. Could have added more. It’s a really modern design and great location... right next to a seven eleven and easy for taxis to find.
Great room with large space and host always responds quickly. We could have great stay in Thailand.
Nice apartment
I would recommend a stay here for anyone coming to Bangkok.
Apartment was as I we expected. Really close to the old town.
침구랑 테이블에 먼지가 좀 있는거 말고는 좋았어요:)

The description is very accurate, basically you get what you see in the profile. The place is super clean and spacious. Personally I love the artsy touch of the hanuman picture on the headboard which taken from the original mural in Grand Palace.
However, as explained in the profile, the apartment is not in close proximity with public transport access (eg. BTS/skytrain) so Grab or taxi would be your only option; and some drivers were struggling to find the place.
But other than that, the apartment is uber nice: highly recommended! Especially Angela is easily reachable and will reply to your message in a blink ;)

The place is very strategic, close to Phan Fa pier if taking canal boats, also close to major buses route. From DMK, take bus number A4 to King Prajadiphok museum, then walk 3mins to reach the place. Walkable distance to many tourist attractions and to Khao San road. The place is actually facing Nang Loeng district police station, so it feels pretty safe. There is tourist info center just opposite, so you can enquire about other tour packages. 7 eleven convenient store is just around the corner. For authentic local thai food, you may walk to Nang Loeng market, 5min away, which is truly a hidden gem. The hawkers may not speak much English, but they are very accomodating. The room itself is new and well furnished, clean and feels spacious.

Estancia muy agradable, lo que ves en las fotos es lo que es. Nosotros nos hospedamos 2 noches en el apartamento 2 que está en la primera planta, los escalones son altos pero al estar en la primera planta no se hace pesado. Las cama son un poco duras, pero ya es gusto de cada uno. El apartamento se encuentra muy cerca del templo Golden Mountain que se puede ir andando y para ir a resto de templos o al centro puedes cogerte un Tuc Tuc o un Taxi. El baño olía un poco mal a desagüe, pero me ha pasado en otros sitios y por lo que se paga no le daría mucha importancia. Nada más salir de la puerta del edificio tienes una oficina de turismo/agencia de viajes que te pueden ayudar con información y venderte algún tour que quieras hacer. En general muy contento con mi estancia.
Wonderful location, clean, tidy, well stocked, non invasive host, all around great place!!!
一个超棒的民俗体验，房东热情好客，特别会照顾人，能满足你的他们兄弟两人都会满足你，还带我们去参加他们宗教聚餐，玩的超级开心，大家都很照顾我们，房东也会帮忙给你指路带路去附近的佛寺游玩，总之，绝对不会让你失望的，简直世外桃源，房子的风格我好喜欢，下次来泰国会专程来这里很惬意的住一段时间来。
在曼谷第二次入住了，第一次住就深深的喜欢上了那里，去普吉岛玩了几天回来后我又预定了那里，房东人很赞，来曼谷体验这里肯定没错了

This place is absolutely incredible. You stay right on a khlong, getting views that tourists are paying 1000 baht an hour for, with a wonderful, knowledgeable and enthusiastic host. It does get a little bit noisy with the boats sometimes, but only during daylight hours, and why would you be sleeping in late with Wat Arun a 10 minute stroll away? Book this place if you can, you won't regret it.
非常棒的房东！非常热情，有接送服务，会带你到处去玩并给你许多当地游玩的建议！同时家里的房间风格非常特别！下次还会入住
非常棒的一套房子 一半在水上一半在岸上 木质的房屋 很有特色  水里有很多大鱼 水出乎意料的一点都臭 而且没有蚊子 很奇妙的一次住处体验 真的不敢相信   房东ohm特别热情 英语非常好 他和他的朋友title 都很热情 带着我们去周围转 请我们吃了当地特色小吃 还一起干杯

The house is in a lovely local area with easy access by ferry to Wat Po. Ohm is wonderful and is doing tours of the area which I highly recommend. His hospitality and local advice made our stay in Bangkok super enjoyable and the house is a cute wooden traditional building built right over the water. I would highly recommend staying here.

The Canal Boat House experience has been nothing short of the best time I have ever had in Thailand.
The rooms & facilities are clean and the balcony is the best place to relax. Watch the boats go by during the day after you catch the sunrise or just rest there while the sun sets and feel the cool breeze calm your senses. You will get to taste the history of Thailand right there in the community.
The location of the boat house is extremely ideal if your plan is to try the good and cheap local cuisine. A good restaurant is just ONE minute away on foot. The temples worth visiting are very nearby and the rest of Bangkok city can be easily and cheaply accessed by the nearby river crossing(boat) or taxi.
All adventures start with a "Yes", so say yes to Canal Boat House and let the magic begin.

Definitely wonderful experience !This place do add up the attraction of Bangkok,one of the most unique places that you can find!Ohm is such a sweet host,showed us around the neighborhood,helped us to get a taxi,gave suggestions on different places.Believe me,this is what u want for Airbnb
ohm非常热心，邀请我们参加朋友的生日party，非常开心，吃到当地比较正宗的泰国菜，邀请我们唱歌，玩的也很开心，非常当地化的体验。回程遇到一些小麻烦，ohm非常热心的帮助了我们。下次去泰国还会订ohm的房间！非常推荐朋友们去！THE BEST!

Ohm’s house was absolutely amazing. Ohm was the perfect host with great knowledge of the local area and Bangkok itself. It was an absolute pleasure meeting him and staying at the house, I wouldn’t stay anywhere else in Bangkok. The area was beautiful and there was a great restaurant very close and shops were very accessible. We will be staying here next time we visit! Thanks Ohm! :)
7楼的房间性价比不错，很好
We have stayed with my daughter.  It's very comfortable and very clean. 7-11 is just 2 mins walk. Many attractions around the place and  Khaosan Road is just 15 mins walk.
Perfect place to stay in Bangkok on a budget! Super comfy, safe, and clean!
位置挺安静的，室内空间也够宽敞，而且还有烤箱、冰箱、餐具什么的挺不错。但就是没什么户外风景，因为是在一层，打开窗户就是两堵墙。附近没有地铁站，打车去21购物中心也就三四十块钱，用Grab 软件打车。

El alojamiento tiene una buena  calidad por precio pagado, 27 €/noche por un apartamento con dos camas de matrimonio. Se trata de un bloque de apartamentos gestionados por Ángela. El nuestro estaba en la planta baja y aunque era espacioso, una ventana daba a un parking y la otra a un muro.La limpieza no era perfecta en el baño pero en general estaba bien.
Alrigh. We weren't able to close the Door.
房间很大也很干净，就是出门基本只有打车，附近吃饭也不太方便
Great stay! Everything as described. Thanks for having us!

What you see is what you get. The place is very clean and quiet so you can sleep comfortably. It's also a 15-min walk from Khaosan road if you want to go on a night out. There are a lot of bus stops near the place but we didn't get a chance to take a bus. It is easily located by grab and taxi drivers. It is not near any train stations though.
Great location. 7-11’s nearby and easy to locate. Would stay again.

Aim,  is a great host,  he takes time to greet us before he leave  bangkok,  just to make sure that we reach his place safely. His house is very clean, amenities is good, aircondition and electricity worked find,   location is close to platinum mall,  many street food around the house.  As we are muslim we can find many halal food, 10 minutes walk from the house. We'll stay here again when we back to bangkok, thank you

Aim est très sympathique et serviable.
Logement propre, très bien situé à deux pas d’une station BTS, et 10 min de marche du terminus du train qui desserve l’aéroport international. Les principaux centres commerciaux pour faire du shopping sont à qlq minutes de marche.
Je recommande vivement le logement de Aim.
It’s a great room and the equipment is nice and complete. Really close to BTS. Easy to go to Siam or Asok those highlight attractions. Also Aim is a great host, he is kind and helpful.
Good location to the city centre and good amenities. Aim is responsible and quick reply. We had great times when staying there. Recommend it to all of you.
干净而且整洁的房间，地理位置也很优越，靠近商区，我们都是步行去逛街的，Aim人也很好，会给我们一些好的建议，总之是值得推荐的！

Merci pour tout Aim,
Un emplacement idéal pour visiter Bangkok, proche du BTS et aussi de la station du train qui mène à l’aéroport. Les temples et les rues touristiques sont à qlq minutes en taxi, comptez environ de 100 et au grand Max 200 THB, c à dire 3 à 6 euros.
Rapport qualité/Prix excellent. Je recommande +++

The apartment is clean and great value for money! The flat is excellently positioned for sightseeing and shopping around the city streets ! Aim is very kind and helpful He will give you of very good advice! The apartment is a little bit small for four people but for 2 people it’s perfect!

I booked Aim’s place for our family vacation and I must say the place is perfect.
1. Warm and helpful Thai hospitality
Aim has been very helpful from the moment I booked the place all the way up to checkout. We greatly appreciate that Aim and Lux personally welcomed us to their place. They’re very friendly and easy to communicate with. The tips and recommendations they provided us were very helpful
2. Location
The place is easy to go to from the airport. You just need to take the airport link and BTS and walk a bit and you’re there!
The best part is that the Aim’s place is just a few minutes walk to the Pratunam/Siam shopping area. You can shop then bring your stuff back home and go out again and tour the city
Touring the city is easy from Aim’s place. The BTS (which also links to the city’s MRT) is just nearby.
The place is near 7-11 and food places.
3. Clean, Quiet and Great Place
Aim’s place is nicely tucked in a few meter into an alley from the main road. The place is quiet at night and you can relax well from a day’s shopping and touring.
Everything in Aim’s place is spot clean.
For a group of five, the place is spacious. We like that it has own its kitchen with all the essentials. The place is complete with amenities and even the little stuff such as shampoo and insect repellant.
And, of course, the place has very good wifi
I will definitely book Aim’s place again when I visit Bangkok. So to those planning to head to Bangkok, this place is highly recommended!

Great location if you're planning to shop a lot. Pratunam Market and Platinum Fashion Mall are only a short walk away. There's also a 7-Eleven in front of the house. Easy and cheap transport to a lot of places. Amenities are well provided.  Place is clean enough and spacious enough for 3 person.
The host is very friendly and very helpful. The place is very clean and well maintained. Very near to Platinum Mall and Siam Paragon.

Khum Aim was an excellent host and a great human being . His English is so much better than any normal Thai and he understood our family like as if we knew each other for ages. Anyway the 3 bedroom apartment was value of money . We enjoyed the location, the security and the amenities that were placed for us. It’s a great simple mix of ikea , index and home pro products and  gracefully placed for our needs. We connected well during our stay and would always want to come back in future . Thank you for being a great host .
Host was very thoughtful and quick at replying messages, making sure we were settled comfortably into the house. Definitely worth the money and would choose his Airbnb if I travel to Bangkok again!

Aim is awesome host!
He responsed my all question very quick. He also gave me many recommendations about the places to visit & to eat.
His house is wonderful which have all amenities that we need. The space is big enough for my whole family . The location is a plus that is in the center of Bangkok, just 10 minute to walk to
Platinum shopping mall
I & my family was really enjoy & love this place. We definitely will be back here if we have a chance to visit Bangkok in the future 😊

Aim was a TRULY GREAT HOST! He was super fast in replying my text. He checked me and my family in himself and showed us his charming house. The living room was very cozy and homey. All the bedrooms on 2nd floor were even better than the pictures. Each room had its own style snd decoration which was very thoughtful of Aim. The house is located right in the middle of Bangkok which makes it very convenient to get around since BTS is only at a corner. Great host with great house in great location! Strongly recommend!!!
首先，位置是真的很棒！临近轨道交通，去暹罗和各大夜市也是超级方便！房间隔音很好，空调给力。还有个小厨房可以烹饪美味。房东人真的超级nice，各种问题都可以问他！超级耐心，又很幽默！
Aim是一个热情好客的房东，他会亲自迎接你，给你介绍游玩的地方，如果你找他也会很快回复你，这些天帮助了我很多，房间的床很大，可以睡两个人，唯一不好的就是枕头对于我们几个来说有点高。如果下次再来曼谷，还是会选择订Aim的房子。

It’s located in the perfect spot in the city, very close to Ratchadevi BTS station and not too close to hear the rail noise. The house look very private. The host, K.Aim, is very kind & supportive, he always offer his helps during the trip.
The house is very clean and looks Thai traditional style. I can reach many famous restaurants and go shopping at Platinum or Central World by walking and just one BTS station to Siam Paragon.
It’s a perfect choice for somewhere in the middle of the city and worth the money.
房子地段很好，去景点购物中心等都很方便。房东非常热情，会提供许多帮助和建议
The location of the house is good and the landlord is warm and patient, which is the best experience we have
Aim人很好，一直等到我们入住，很耐心详细的给我们介绍房间设施的使用方法，入住第二天还会关心我们的入住感受。回复问题速度很快。

The house is really nice and tidy.Paw is very friendly ,always reply at first time. And the location is good ,just opposite the King Power Duty Free shopping mall,walk 3mins can reach BTS station. Very worth the price.

A cozy place for 2 person stay with great quiet place to relax after the crazy shopping / walking around in Bangkok. The location is great as its near BTS station, many food stall and malls as well as supermarket nearby. The walk along the alley is safe. The room itself is new and comfortable. Both host were great and fast in responding. Overall a great stay !!
地理位置很棒，靠近王权免税店

Really nice place to stay, nice location, easy to travel around, room is so clean and so comfortable, free snacks, drinking waters and instant noodles
We are so happy staying here.
Thank you so much.
Amazing place thank you!

Had an amazing experience during my trip in bangkok. Paw is very helpful.
Location so great just walking distance to BTS. room so clean and organised properly.
will back definitely.

Great place, 5 minutes from the station and surrounded by restaurants, very responsive host, check-in at any time. And extra points for offering me snacks and teas on arrival! Would definitely recommend!
Although we never met Ling or Paw, everything was perfect. Place was very nice and we felt like at home. They made sure we had everything during our stay. If you chose it you won´t regret it.
The room was very nice a super clean. It is very close to train station and it is easy to get from/to airport. Thank you very much for your service!
Very nice place to stay, looks as is the photos.

we had a wonderful weekend hideaway at this lovely newly opened apartment, right in the heart of Bangkok. easy access by all public transport.
the friendly-host is very professional. he extended us a warm welcome and kind hospitality. the room is spacious, airy and clean with stylishly minimalist design. homemade food at their "cute corner cuisine" were also yummy with mamy selections.
we definitely will come back. highly recommended for family or group of friends.

My partner and I have been lucky to stay at some pretty amazing Airbnbs but this was the best yet. The apartment was absolutely gorgeous, even nicer than the photos. We ended up finding it hard to go out exploring every day because we felt so at home in the apartment. The apartment is in a perfect location a stones throw from public transportation, terminal 21 mall and a plethora of lovely restaurants and bars. I was worried the apartment would be loud because it is so close to the main road but it was really quiet inside. He best part about this apartment was Diow and his wife who were so kind and attentive. They constantly went the extra mile with a homemade delicious breakfast and coffee every morning, early check in, local tips and help getting us access to a nearby pool/gym. Really couldn’t recommend this place any more highly and definitely hope to return.

Easily one of the best Airbnb experiences I've ever had. I spent two weeks at the Cocoon space, and wished I had more time there.
- The room was large, very clean, modern and stylish. I felt very comfortable.
- Diow, his wife Tomm and son Atom were all very friendly and I'll never forget them.
- The restaurant downstairs had the best mango sticky rice I've ever had, and I ate there daily.
I have nothing bad to say - I will be staying here the next time I come to BKK. Diow went above and beyond to make sure I was comfortable!
Everything is great ,nearby the subway and 7-11 just next to the apartment

Cute Cocoon is a great place. Convenient as there is a 7 eleven just downstairs and a few restaurants nearby. BTS asok is just 5 mins walk.
Cute Corner Cuisine’s food was also good. All in all a good and enjoyable stay. Would recommend to stay at Cute Cocoon.

그냥 킹갓제너럴 오지고 지리고 레릿고임
고민하지말고 강여기 가셈 최고!
위치는 아속역에서 도보3-5분내에 하고싶습니다있어 아주 좋습니다. 몽키트래블이용시 집결장소가 아속쪽이니 더욱 좋구요. 호스트 diow부부내외가 매우 친절합니다. 새벽도착이였는데도 게스트가 숙소에 잘도착할수있게 도와주었습니다. 방은 사진에서 보는것과 일치하고 매우깨끗하며 잘 관리되어 있습니다.
그리고 아침에 브런치를 준비해주는데, 너무너무 좋았습니다 대접받는 느낌.
가족여행으로 다녀왔는데 제가다녀본 에어비엔비중 단연 최고라고 !
장점만 늘여놓은거 같은데 단점은 엘리베이터가 없다는점, 나머진 매우 만족합니다!
Nice Room condition, kind host, nice location.

Stylish and modern apartment, with great amenities. Perfect for a small group of friends to chill out before a night in town. Instagram worthy space, easy on the eye, clean and definitely a plc I would recommend. 5 mins to Asok station, with a 7-11 right beside. There’s a cafe right below also owned by the host and breakfast is provided there. Speaking of breakfast, food quality was above expectations and they very willingly prepared a latte for us to take away when we had an early pick up. Can’t say anything more about the hospitality except for “thumbs up”. Overall highly recommended.
Only thing to note is there is no elevator so carrying the luggage up is a challenge, if not for the fact that they invented a very clever pulley system to hoist our luggages up!

Fantastic host!
Husband n son fell ill one after another, Diow n his wife helped to keep an eye on them while we were out. Tomm even cooked soup for them which is out of her menu!!! Diow even helped to buy some medicine for my husband
Breakfast is good n healthy, walking distance Asok BTS, apartment is clean
So glad that we had chose this place!
I highly recommend Diow’s house . The place was gorgeous, clean and tidy with modern design. Well located to transport, restaurants and shopping. Definitely will rebooked  again .

Aim was a truly fantastic host. Communication was seamlessly perfect. He was super fast in replying my texts most of the times it was ‘instantly’. He also provided a clear check in guide and related info/tips. Bravo!!! Thanks, Aim! You really made my trip a lot better and much easier!
The place was strategically located in a city center. It’s only a few mins walk to BTS and Airport Rail Link at Phaya Thai station. It was surrounded by local shops and restaurants. 7/11 and supermarket were only around the corner. Siam and Platinum were in a walking distance.
The master bedroom on 3rd floor had a nice small rooftop garden .. Love it! Living room was spacious, comfy and cozy. Everything at Aim’s looked exactly like in the pics. The place was sparkling clean and tidy too!
I WILL certainly stay here again when I am in town and definitely recommend to all my family and friends!

Aim's place is brand new, sparkling clean, well decorated and very conventiently located.
It has a big living room, two bathrooms, and lots of BIG comfortable beds.
Beside that Aim is a terrific host. He traveled 30 km through thick traffic to greet us. He's super fast with his replies and gave us loads of tips (with location markers).
The location is in a small residential area, at less than 5 minutes walking from the airport express train and the sky train, at 1 minute from great local food streets, and some nice coffee places.

Aim helped us with our customs entry issues when we called him, and was waiting for us when we reached the apartment. Place was 5mins away from Payat Thai BTS, and was extremely clean with the exact view of how the photos looked on the website! At night , the place is quiet but not dangerous, still feeling safe when we came back 1-2am to the apartment. Place is about 20 minutes walk to platinum mall, which we followed by Google maps. Convenient stalls was aplenty too!
Aim even allowed us to extend our checkout time by awhile when we had some last minute packings.
All in all a great stay in Thailand and its extremely worth it if u have lots of people to accommodate!

GREAT Location with a FANTASTIC host!!! The place was a hidden gem in Bangkok. It was located centrally with 2 BTS stations and Airport Link station in a walking distance. It was very easy and convenient to get around. Convenient stores, supermarket, street food vendors and nice restaurants were literally everywhere. Shopping malls like Siam Paragon, MBK Center, Central World, Platinum were 10-15 mins walk or only 1-2 BTS stops. I just couldn’t ask for more.
Aim was very very fast in replying my text. I was stunned by his hospitality in which he went over and beyond for me and my family during the stay. He was nice, polite and super friendly. He gave useful local tips and everything in the place really reflected his thoughtfulness. No wonder why he has many great reviews!
Some place/hotel didn’t look anywhere near in the pics but definitely not this one! The place looks exactly like in the pics (even better and bigger). That big living room on the 1st floor was cozy and homey. Many HUGE comfortable beds, 2 toilets and that small rooftop garden was perfect for a can of beer! The best part: it was well hidden in a nice, quiet and safe residence area/alley and away from a noisy main road but not too far to reach out. Truly remarkable!!!
Without any doubt, I WILL definitely stay here again and recommend to all!

We had a late night flight and arrived in Bangkok late still Aim was waiting till we arrive to help us check in. The neighborhood was very peaceful despite being in the city we hardly heard any noise from outside though it was a challenge on our part to keep the noise down since we were traveling with little kids ;). Would recommend the place and definitely stay again. Thank you Aim

Very responsive and helpful host.
Cozy place suitable for family with kids, quiet neighbourhood, location very near to BTS.
Excellent hospital service! Definitely will come back again. Highly recommended for those 5-8 pax.
很Nice的房东，沟通很顺畅而且也很贴心。房子地理位置很好也很漂亮。

很棒的地點，離地鐵站大概5分鐘步程，附近也很多便利商店還有超市，去鬧區或是一些景點也很方便。
居住環境很安靜，室內裝潢很溫馨。也有一些餐具，如果要自己煮也很方便。
房子地理位置很好，很干净，环境很舒适。

wonderful clean and comfortable room with its own bath and hot water. close to the airport with the picked up no matter what time. the airplanes may become a problem for light sleepers but did not bother me. Many convenience stores around and the neighborhood was quite nice and clean. water and breakfast or offered each day and I had to extend my trip for almost a week and prefer to stay right there and then try to find something else that was not as comfortable.

comfortable and convenient place to stay if you're coming in on a flight or waiting for a flight out. I never planned to be here 6 days because of flight problems getting out but even for a long stay it's wonderful to have such a lovely couple host you. One day I was taken to a nearby Village where I got to see things that I probably would never have seen and took some amazing shots of the people and théorie Dwayne off life. it was wonderful to learn a few more words in Thai and also teach and help out with some English. thank you
The place was so neat and very relaxing.  Nut was very friendly and even offered to pick and drop us at the airport. I highly recommend it!
房东真的很热情，免费提供接机服务跟送机服务，我们下飞机都12点了，房东男朋友来接，离机场非常近，推荐刚下飞机跟隔天要赶飞机的来住这家，真的非常感恩，里面设施也很齐全，只可惜已经没有泰铢了，不然很想给小费
哇比我想像的要好很多 房间也挺大的哈哈哈 房东超级好看中的真的不要犹豫不然就没得订啦 离机场很近 下次肯定还要来住

Very kind and helpful owners.
Went out of their way to pick us up after a late flight, and the next day drove us to the train.
If you are looking at only staying in Bangkok for a night, I highly recommend this cute Airbnb!
Nice and clean. Very helpful and reliable. If you are in hurry this is a very good place

This is a great location for a flight to/from BKK airport. There are food stalls and a few shops near the room too, including a Family Mart and Seven Eleven. The rooms were clean, hosts lovely, and it’s amazing value for money!
房东超级好，专门开车在轻轨站接我们，晚上还送我们去机场！
Very conveniently located and exceptionally clean, has lots of place to eat nearby which was my main concern.

Excellent location..!
A stone throw away from the shopping mall/ bustling street and night market.
However you have to be physically fit to request for high floor as property does not have a life
半夜定的房间，房东反应很快，就是我们到的是半夜前台小哥哥不懂中文，翻译软件也让我们沟通有障碍。房间挺好的干净卫生！房间不大，但也够住！前台有提供打印的服务，帮我打印了急需的资料，总体来说是一项比较满意的体验
价格不高，性价比不错。不过房间是没有窗户的，很封闭，没有电视，住了三天也没有人来打扫过。不会再次入住
性价比很高，去BTS大概十分钟。附近有一个水门市场，水上观光交通工具。推荐坐一次。房间没有窗户，但是还是不错的。
位置还是比较不错的，位于水门，去四面佛和大型商场还有big c都非常方便，都可以步行10多分钟到达，出门2分钟就有一个大型夜市，夜市过天桥就有公交车站，这条街有几家出名的水门鸡饭可以试试。性价比很高了，毕竟价格便宜
位置是比较靠近中心商场的，走十几分钟到central word，很便利，就是房子指示不是很明显，招牌之类的，司机找很久，但是这里靠近中心但是又不吵，所以很不错，店员是不会中文的，房间虽然小，但是很温馨，该有的也有，其他饮水机微波炉等在一楼也有，房子是没电梯的，所以太多行李的仙女就要找人帮忙了，总体来说，在这住挺好的，位置靠近中心，走一下就到了，住得很愉快。
good location and good price reasonable
Thank you for tour kindness and hospitality. I would certainly recommend the red pin inn to other travelers. Would like to stay here again when i’m in Bangkok.
2nd time stay. last day in Bankok for shopping. good location. around 240baht by taxi to airport! clean and cozy.

房间的公共空间非常好，热水，微波炉，冰箱一应俱全，服务人员也都热情周到，只是房间几乎为全封闭的，只有上面的两扇非常非常小的窗户，空气不能顺畅流通，对于曼谷这种比较热的地方，确实入住体验不佳，地理位置比较优越的，出去不远就是水门市场，离商业街做tutu也都不远，只是当地的tutu对待外地人要价太高，要狠狠讲价，不能纵容，不然就下grap叫车，曼谷很堵车，要提前叫车，曼廊机场打车过来240泰铢，包含了50的机场费，到曼谷汽车北站，司机要了300铢，走快速路又交了50，没办法，grap很堵车，迟迟没有来接，只能叫taxi

The room has an original design and is very clean. You get much value for your money. Breakfast is included (Thai or American), served in a special way. Oaklek responds very fast to messages and is always willing to help. The shower is large and is separated by a glass wall from the bathroom. Very nice place, would stay again!

the location is Perfect. right in front of the bus to go downtown(10-15min). walking distance of the temple's, khao san road(nightlife) and right next to chinatown. the room has highend looks to it. jasmin essential oil and unique soap and shampoo from a collab they did with an organic farm. tv has netflix and the wifi works great. breakfast is served fresh every morning at the time you want and made to eat in your bed.(i loved it). the only issue was noise but we had really annoying couple that argued all the time next to us. i dont think oak could of done anything about it. im sure he will soon become a superhost for the high quality of hospitality. would go back anytime.
住的很舒服，房东很温暖

Yeast & Yawn is a little gem in Bangkok's old town. We've stayed for a longer period of time and we've felt at home right away. The interior is minimalist and stylish, with a nice bakery/cafe downstairs that will be opened soon. The location is a bit off the beaten track, but still close enough to public transport and nearby bars, cafe's and restaurants. Oaklek and his wife provide utmost care with an eye for every detail. Recommended!

We had a great stay here. The room was spotless and the location is walking distance (30 min.) from some of the major old town attractions. Not close to the BTS train line but It’s easy to grab a cab. Oaklek is also very easy to communicate with.

What you see is what you get. I really like the design of oak’s place. Everything is fine. The place is not far from the Grand Place and shopping malls, 711 is in the meters. Quiet convenient to go out by Grab car or tuk-tuk car. Oak and his wife are very kind, they responds quickly. Btw, the welcome drinks and breakfasts are so nice. I really recommend to stay here in Bangkok.

Very nice place to stay , 7 eleven just opposite , very friendly and helpful host, worth every penny , will go back and stay again
Delicious breakfast is provide too.
房东人特别nice！有任何问题都可以找他～房间设计很简洁 很干净 床单很舒服～每天还有美味的早饭可以选美式或泰式送到房间门口 马路对面就是711 打车去市区的商圈都不贵 推荐！
oaklek is very kind ! give us lots of help！in a word nice i will be back！！thankyou for your help!! 真的特别特别好，位置好，房东也好，很热情，推荐大家来～ 위치도 좋고 집주인이 친절하고 좋아！！
위치도좋았고 소통이잘되어서 너무좋았습니다 덕분에 즐거운여행하고 갑니다

Wow! Seriously. I have been traveling through Southeast Asia and staying at Airbnb’s for the past 2.5 years and I can honestly say this was the BEST experience that I have ever had. I was a bit hesitant because I saw this was a new listing but my entire stay was flawless. Oaklek and his wife clearly put their heart and soul into everything. From the little accents throughout the room to the customized breakfast delivered to my door every single morning, this felt more like a 5 star hotel than an airbnb. I was blown away. First the room. It is just as beautiful as the pictures! Identical, which is rare for most Airbnb’s. It felt brand new, was extremely clean, very well designed, and even smelled great. The sheets were high-end insanely comfortable cotton and they even had custom made organic soaps and shampoo! Oh yeah, and a delicious jar of welcome tea waiting in the fridge prepared by his wife. The communication with Oaklek was always quick and very polite. Each evening he would confirm my breakfast order and the time I would like it delivered to my door. I am vegan so I thought there wouldn’t even be options but they went out of their way to make it work! And the breakfast was amazing! Things like sautéed mushroom and onions on homemade toast, overnight oats with granola, and even avocado toast. And each breakfast was presented with a cup of delicious hot tea. Seriously I was blown away. Also the location is just a 5-10 minute cab ride to the center of the city and all the big malls. This was an incredible experience and I will absolutely stay again the next time I am in Bangkok. Thank you to you and your wife Oaklek for making my stay so enjoyable and comfortable. If I could give this a 10 star rating I would...and that is saying a lot because I am very picky!

Oak, is the best host I ever met. Nice, gentle and helpful guy. Oak and his wife are both designers, so they made the place very stylish and cozy, make me feel like sweet home.
Whenever I went to Oak with any requests or questions about Bangkok or Thailand, Oak always provides all kinds of help and assistance. He even found me five alternative options how can I travel from his place to another city I was going to.
Awesome hosts, awesome place, awesome room, awesome service, awesome location, plus unbeatable price, I will definitely stay in Oak's place again when I go to Bangkok next time.
7 Stars !
깨끗하고 차이나 타운근처라 놀러가기도 좋다 앞에 세븐일레븐이 바로있고 똠양누들맛집이 일품입니다 ㅋㅋ
非常棒的一次体验，早餐很好吃，房东很贴心，到曼谷的那天，还专门准备了茶水，性价比也很高，就是临街晚上有些吵，不过房东有准备耳塞

I felt in love with the minimalist style of the place. Oaklek’s place is near KhaoSan Road for those who like partying, near Chinatown for those who like eating, and near bigs malls for those who like shopping. Oaklek is really available and kind and I had a really great time.
Thanks and see you next time

Oaklek’s place was great to stay at. He was very accommodating and answered all our questions promptly. Check-in was easy and oaklek was there to greet us when we arrived even though it was late. The place was clean and provided everything we needed. The included breakfast was good, with two different options to choose from, and was delivered to our door each morning. Good location, with many attractions close by, although nothing really within walking distance. Public transportation was easily available though, with a 7-11 right across the street. The bed was a little stiff, but not uncomfortable. There was also no elevator, so take that into account if you have trouble with stairs. Overall I enjoyed my stay here and would book his place again.

We had a really wonderful time in Bangkok with Oaklek’s home. Our room is very clean and the service is good. We get breakfast every morning from Oaklek ，He would leave the breakfast at the door every morning.And the reply is always fast when we have problems.
Overall, it was a good experience,and hope to see U again
房间很干净 装修很好 入住也很方便 房东回复很迅速 地理位置很好 靠近很多网红餐厅 房东很热情 送早餐的小饭盒太可爱了!
房东很热情，很好的体验
Very clean private room with amazing breakfast. Although it was a little bit loud outside at midnight but I highly recommend to stay here!

Best place to stay in Bangkok! My partner and I stayed in Title’s Airbnb for 3 days and our only regret is not staying longer. The place is so lovely, clean and decorated beautifully and you feel like a local since you arrive until you leave. The place is located inside a beautiful temple in a really quiet and nice part of Bangkok that is walking distance to almost all the best attractions and a few steps away from an authentic and amazing Thai food restaurant. Title is the most thoughtful and awesome host I have ever met and we are beyond grateful for all the recommendations she gave us, for showings us around and always be willing to help us with anything we needed. We were so lucky to experience flying ice cream and to meet the local monks, thanks to Title.
I would really love to come back, thank you again so much for everything!

第一次来曼谷，入住这间公寓让我们体验到了当地民众的生活，装修也很有自己的风格，不是冰冷冷的酒店。虽然不在市中心但出行很便利，游玩一天回到干净舒适的房间很重要，这让你可以得到很好的休息。楼下餐厅有非常地道和好吃的泰国菜，价格也很实惠。附近稍微走几分钟就有一个当地很地道的餐厅，我们很喜欢吃那里的泰国面条。房东是非常有耐心并且非常热情，交流起来也不难，为我们提供出行建议和帮助。我们和房东像朋友一样交流，如果大家想体验当地民众生活，和泰国朋友多加交流，这里是非常好的选择。我们很高兴在这里度过三个晚上。谢谢房东TT！

The apartment is in a local area of Bangkok, very much away from the main tourist areas. However, do not let this put you off, within five minutes you can walk to Wat Arun (Temple of the Dawn) and from there you can also take a ferry across the river to other famous attractions, such as Wat Pho and the Grand Palace. There are also a host of other boats to take you up and down the river.
You can also take a grab to Wongwian Yai BTS station and this will take you all over the city. I walked to the BTS station – if you don’t mind the heat but would like to walk through some truly local areas then I recommend that you do the same. On the walk (2 miles) you will find lots of local coffee places, shops and eateries.
The host, Title, is very kind and welcoming. I know Bangkok well but if you don’t then Title will help you in any way that she can to ensure that you have an excellent stay.
I recommend this place for anyone looking for a true taste of Bangkok, a little window into local life in this great city.
TT家的房子在曼谷的老城区，在这里你可以感受当地人的悠闲，真心的zai yin yin,下楼就是餐厅，餐厅里的泰国菜是真的比我在外面吃的都要好吃～TT非常热情好客，推荐了我们很多本地人去玩的市场，以及出行线路，房间非常干净！超高性价比，郑王庙走路就可以到，还会再来的！
房子在湄南河边，附近有便利店711。离郑王庙步行十几分钟可到达。去卧佛寺和大皇宫很方便可以坐轮船过去。只要四泰铢。打出租车及grab都很方便。最重要的是房东小姐姐很漂亮。

Title is a very nice host and the place is very stylish. Easy to use ‘Grab’ to get a vehicle with a few walk to the main street.
The place is easy to find stuff to eat（local thai food）.
Title also gave us very helpful guides around the place and Bangkok. Plus the culture explanation from Title is impressive.

We really enjoyed our stay in Title’s place. It’s very well located where you can reach many iconic places easily. Title is a very nice person and we were very touched by her warm hospitality. She was always ready to go an extra-mile when we requested anything. We especially liked the special bathroom and cosy decorations of the room. Indeed I recommend her & her lovely place!!

Highly recommend if you want to experience local life
and get a true feeling of the old city of Bangkok.
The house is located at the Great location in a short walk/ferry to
the top Three famous temples (grand palace, temple of dawn, and WatPho)
Here is also easy to use "Grab" to take you around!
Title, the host,is a young and enthusiastic woman.
she's so kind and helpful to answer my questions and help
us to plan the trip!!
Thank you!
Our stay at Title's house was perfect.  The host is kind and helpful, the location is amazing and everything was beyond our expectations. I do recommend this place to anyone.
地理位置真的很好，几个热门景点寺庙都非常近，主要房东TT真的超级nice，给我们安排了接机服务和帮忙做了泰国攻略，带我们游玩了水上市场，真的开心！
This house is very wonderful and clean. Especially host is very good person.
这家公寓超级好，交通方便，而且房东超级无敌热情，房间很干净，还有无边泳池，性价比超高！应该是住过最满意的酒店了
房间很新！装修风格也很现代化！特别喜欢！距离terminal21几步之遥。酒店在巷子里面，特别的闹中取静！要是有机会以后还会入住！
非常愉快的居住经历，从入住到退房都很方便。位置方便出行，安保系数高，配套齐全，房间也很干净，房东Luke回复及时，有问题及时解决，是泰国之旅最舒适的居住经历了。
位置很棒 就在Asok站附近 换乘公共交通挺方便的 出门巷口就是711  离Terminal 21也炒鸡便利的！ 房东Luke人很好的～ 屋顶无边泳池也很棒～有机会会再来的～
will choose next time
非常便利的位置，房东人超好，给了不少建议和帮助，跟家人一样，很赞！另外，楼顶的泳池很给力，很完美的一次入住，好评哦！
公寓非常的高大上，房间也是非常的舒服，什么都一应俱全。房东小哥哥真的是相当的好啦～提前一个月就给他发信息问这问那都会耐心的回答。露天泳池也没什么人，可以尽情去玩耍。下次去曼谷还会回来住的

Great place, easy check-in, and quick communication with host throughout the process. Luke even arranged an earlier check-in for me which is much appreciated. Unfortunately the pool was closed for most of the stay, but that wasn't Luke's fault.
Would choose again.
及时安排入住，交通非常方便，我们是挡车去的，直接到了楼下，公寓非常新和干净.安全性也超好，有游泳池和健身房，小巷出去有类似韩国🇰🇷一条街的商铺.房东给力，给了很多建议，还推荐了美食，房间里面很干净和图片是一模一样，大厅我还拍了照片，完美...下次我还来（居然还动了要和房东抢生意的念头哈哈哈，想要也来一套，结果都没有房源了.总之真的特别赞）很贴心
公寓地段在城市中心位置，房间干净整洁，设施齐全，房东很热情，下次会继续选择这里入住。
Nice apartment & the pool. Excellent location. So close to BTS sky train, easy to go anywhere. Luke is also a wonderful host.

首先整个公寓和房间都特别漂亮，走几步路就是那个大游泳池 房间里还有浴缸 还特别干净 整个装修简直完美戳中我的审美!!!然后 房子的位置特别好 就在中心闹中取静的地方 旁边就是terminal 21。交通的话不管是出门坐BTS还是地铁都特别方便。最重要的是 房东人特别好!!! 提前就告知了抵达的路线和如何获取钥匙，有什么问题沟通回复也特别快。还会主动关心玩的是否愉快 可以给出游玩的建议。下次有机会希望还能住房东先生的房呀～
地理位置不错，出行方便，公寓配套也很好。房东人nice
除了走向bts的巷子太长了也没什么毛病 但是曼谷那么热真的有点痛苦 永远忘不了因为没法存行李提着大箱子走去T21的痛苦ㅠㅠㅠ 主要是民宿这边过到T21的天桥没有扶梯只能爬上去 太惨了ㅠ 打车也不太好打

The apartment is excellent! The location is perfect. It is right downtown and there are food options everywhere. The room is very clean and comfortable, and the pool and view on the roof are fantastic! I look forward to staying here again!
Very modern, new and spacious apartment with great rooftop pool.

这栋公寓比图片上看起来还要新！超级棒！房东人很好 会给各种旅游建议和问题解答，回复速度超快.房间里面物品一应俱全～公寓楼上的健身房和无边泳池也很干净 晚上在上面躺椅上吹吹风很舒服！
地理位置也很不错 走路到asok站 大概五六分钟. 走到terminal21商场也就10分钟之内. 很方便～下次来还会定这里
离21号航站楼较近，韩国，日本人较多的区域，相应饮食也较多
房间很干净 也很温馨 情侣朋友出行最适合不过 公寓旁边有吃饭的地方 还有商场的7-11 特别适合自由行 房东真的是有问必答 特别贴心 很暖和下次还会去

Kevin's place was awesome. They were very accommodating in every aspect and helpful when I needed something. The place is very clean and all the appliances worked as per requested.
They do offer cleaning of the room whenever I needed it to be, good advice when I wanted to know about anything.
I would highly recommend Kevin's place for any new or old visitors to Bangkok. Definitely a one of a kind place and service.
Great place and would highly recommend it
Kevin’s place was perfect! It was so cute and clean. He gave quick responses to all my questions. Thank you for a wonderful stay!
ดีรวมๆ มีลิฟ ใหม่ครับ

Kevin's place was absolutely fantastic. Brand new and spotless with 2 air con units and everything you need for your stay. His staff was also friendly and very helpful during my stay. Highly recommended.
房间干净
Very nice
公寓很新很干净，距离素万那普机场和BTS地铁站也不远，附近有711。住着很舒服，很安静。
房东很热情，退房的时候还去花园摘了两个芒果送我们
房子的位置非常宜居，性价比非常高，东西都很完善。感受得到房东想要做的优质民宿的想法，房间内干净整洁，还有一本攻略。工作人员热情耐心。可以说非常用心了
Very good location.Near by bts.Free Tuktuk to bts and season mall.Local market not far from apartment.Easy pick up key. I will choose u next time
Все было отлично. Приветливые девочки на стойке. Все оперативно помогали решать вопросы.

Location was great!! Very near with the BTS. The place also offers free tuktuk rides to the nearest station. Huge place, really clean, comfy beds, nice pool and they even have complimentary cup noodles & drinking water :) :) :) will definitely stay again, worth your money! ❤️

If I could give it a value rating of 6 out of 5, I'd give it to Suchada. Everything is great -- the vicinity walking distance from the nearest transport hub, the distance to some tourist spots, the service, amenities, etc. Very great value for money - you get what you pay for, and more.
Great place to stay. It’s clean and very well furnished. We would really advise it for a family to stay.
是一个很专业的团队酒店化感觉的民宿。设施完备，不过我们入住的时候有点晚，只是第二天早上去游了泳。地理位置很方便，离bts很近，有免费的tuktuk车前往。

Good location, just ard 5-10 minutes walk to the BTS station. The place is clean and good for family to stay. The staff at the reception are friendly and helpful. They also provide cup noodles and water for our stay which are very handy. Thanks a lot!!
Very good apartment near the metro station! Very clean!
部屋は広々としていて快適でした!プールやサウナなどの設備も整っていて、価格以上の体験ができました!
good value.
Kevin and the staff are so nice. No delay for answering our questions.

How should my review about this property? Well, I am quite reluctant at first to write the review but I think it is important to share my experience with the rest. Read this before you book!
1. Location. It is located deep in the alley and far away from the main road. The nearest convenient store (7-11) is located about 7-8 minutes walk.
2. Property. The building is located next to Sirat Expressway, so you might feel the building go shaky when there’s lorry or bus passing by the road. The ground floor is still under renovation, hence, during the day you might get the noise and drilling.
3. Flexible check in. Utter nonsense, I arrived at the property at 10.30am only to be told I can’t check in until 2pm. I had to go somewhere to wait because there’s no place nearby for me to wait
4. BTS shuttle. Don’t believe them, I went downstairs at 8am to get my transport only to be told there’s no one could pick me up to the BTS. The host replied me after 30 minutes after I left as I was running late for my meeting.
5. Room. Overall, that was the only compliment i give because it was really up to standard and cozy. Everything was sparkling clean and tidy. The worker who helped me to check in was kind and friendly despite they can’t speak English very well but good enough to understand
房东非常好客热情，还让我寄存了两天行李，还派车送我们去bts.非常感谢。
服务很棒，位置也不错，去BTS也会有车免费送过去
Really nice

因为是个新房源，去到的时候还不是完全装修好的状态，有几个需要注意的事项：
1.这个民宿是5分钟坐车能到达bts，而不是走路5分钟才能到bts
2.这次去的时候大门口没有密码锁，门是敞开的，最好问清楚房东现在是否装好大门密码锁
3.房间内的门锁仅仅有密码锁
4.位置处于比较偏僻的地方，晚上不适合步行回去
房间装修非常简约好看的，也有免费的接送bts的车，房东是女生，十分热情好客

Kevin was a great host! Provided lots of information as soon as the booking was confirmed. My flight to Bangkok landed around midnight but we were still able to contact him to be let in when we arrived at almost 3am! Super clean and chic place too.
房间性价比很好，干净整洁，空间够用，是比较新的建筑，装修风格属于那种暖黄色调。虽然位置不好找，当地taxi开错了两次，比较不好的一个体验，但是会安排免费的车送我们去附近的地铁站。
房间很好，很整洁，服务特别热情，解释的很到位，就是位置有点偏僻，离主干道有点远

Kevin is a very very good owner, he helps us a lot in us trip. I would like to give him a BIG THANK YOU here . I am no doubt to live in his guest house again. His guest house will be my first priority in Bangkok. Thanks again for the Mango, very delicious.
I love the loft design of the rooms and dinning room table. Clean place and very new.
Location is very easy to go any place in Bangkok.
Kevin speak very good English and easy to communicate.
Kecin and his staff are very professional.
Kevin 的屋子非常漂亮非常整潔, 地方十分之方便也有專車接送去附近的bts站. 屋主十分熱情提供很多當地 有用的資和服務。 他的房間是我去曼谷的必然首選！！
非常非常超值的住宿！每个房间都非常大，安静，虽然五楼但视野非常好，住过Kevin的房子感觉其他800人民币的房子都没有这个划算！超推荐

Kevin's place was excellent! My family (of 5) and I had a most wonderful time. The place was beautiful and huge! Everything was provided for. The staff were very attentive and responded very promptly to our requests. Kevin was a very gracious host and was very quick to respond to messages. Location was good, it wasn't too far from the BTS and Kevin provides a free shuttle going there. I loved how the place was very meticulously built, materials used were of excellent quality: the tiles, the sofa, the kitchen appliances, the furnitures and fixtures. It was elegantly styled yet really cozy at the same time. Beds were really comfortable. Wifi was very fast. It was such a haven to come home to after a long day out. Thanks so much Kevin and to your entire staff for a wonderful week staying at your lovely place! Should we have another trip to BKK, we would definitely look you up again!
装修非常棒 感觉比五星酒店还要好 推荐！
这是我见过的为数不多的房子比图片好看的民宿，装修非常豪华。唯一不足的地方是位置略有些偏僻，需要自己驾车会比较方便。

优点：1.非常大！！！！！！大到有三个厕所，走着走着就累了。
2.设备齐全，电视很大很大可以看netfelix很爽，还有阳台晚上可以坐着喝酒。浴缸可以泡澡，厨房也设施完善：烤箱微波炉面包机咖啡机搅拌机冰箱全都有。
3.超出预期，比照片更好看，呆这里舒服的一天都能不出门。
但是，不出门也是因为——
缺点：
1.位置偏僻，每天基本上出了门没有想回来的，去bts要两公里左右，最近的711都要500m，而且晚上最好不要出门，有很多狗。出门全靠打车，虽然回家看到这么好的房间会宽慰，但回头想想每天的车费抵得上住更好位置同样硬件的房间了。所以下次应该是不会回来了。
2.没有健身房，看描述是有的，实际上并没有。
In general，如果你想四处逛，感受曼谷城市游乐的，还是好好考虑选择这里，因为位置不便真的是很大的缺陷。如果你想度假，纯粹舒缓身心，想起来再出去出去的，就住这里吧。硬件绝对不会让你失望！
房东人很好，回答很及时，房间真的很大很大，很漂亮，细节方面需要再改善一下，比如晾衣服的地方不多，风吹过来阳台很舒服，但是离市区远缺点。房东可以免费送你去Bts 也比较方便

Room was big and spacious very modern looking however it’s just abit too far from City area however you could just book grab. Would come back again, good for large groups. Thanks Kevin we hope to come back to the same pent house again.
Host was very blunt and slow to reply. Average stay

Everything in the room is new.  I'm grateful to be Lara's first guest.  The topper on the bed was so comfortable and the Netflix was perfect.  The airport line is within 10 minutes walk.  711 is also in the apartment complex.  Quiet located on the top floor.  Lara is a friendly and caring host.  I would like to stay again next time.  Thanks Lala~

LALA's house is so new and clean.It's the best house I've ever booked on Airbnb! Also the price is just very reasonable.I had bruch at Deano cafe  downstairs in the building every morning, they have good coffee and yummy food. The most important is, LALA is so nice to treat her guests as friends. This house is definitely the first choice for the next trip in Bangkok.

A very lovely and welcoming apartment, the landlord sister is very beautiful and friendly, the apartment is very clean, the equipment is very complete, and it is very comfortable to live.  I want to live here next time in Thailand.
Excellent place to stay in Bangkok. Wonderful apartment with perfect way to airport. You should check this place!
地理位置还行，附近有地铁，环境整体蛮干净的，楼下有洗衣机，房间内有介绍泰国文化和艺术相关的书，电视可以看奈飞和YouTube等，蓝牙音响音质还行，房东小姐姐挺热情的,体验很好😊

Lalana is an excellent host. You gave us good addresses. Your studio is absolutely charming, a cozy little nest :)
We really recommend this air-conditioned place, close to public transport and quiet!! You'll spend a peaceful night there. Lalana is very helpful and attentive.
We thank you for driving us to the station, it was a great attention. We keep your address precisely for a future trip and will give it to those around us. Thank you again for all !!!

Had an amazing stay in her place. She replies fast and recommends tourist spots. Just ask her. She is so nice to answer all your inquiries. Her place was so clean and nice. Fast WiFi connection and a Netflix too. There is also a nice coffee shop downstairs where you can eat. The Thai food that I’ve tried there was delicious 😋. 7/11 is just downstairs too. The complimentary choice of coffee suits my taste so well. 😊Will definitely recommend to family and friends. Airport Rail Link (The Curve Station)  is about 5-7mins walk away. It is 20-30 mins away from the airport. She even got me a taxi going back to the airport which is way cheaper rather than booking through Grab. I will definitely come back and stay at her place again the next time I visit Bangkok.
This apartment is the best one in Bangkok. Host lalana is the kindest host I have ever met. have the highest caustic ratio
Great environment and neighbourhood. The room is so comfortable and clean. Lala is very responsive and helpful. Thank you!
Amazing place！Close to the metro station, very very clean and full of lots equipments. And thanks to Lana again, it's much easier to settle down with her help. The apartment is spotless！
房子很新，干净，楼顶无边泳池漂亮。房主小姐姐给我很多曼谷推介，微信秒回。房子位于市中心区域，无论去哪个商圈都很便利，5分钟到达天铁和地铁，附近有terminal21商场，美食购物于一体。

So nice with me,my host is so kind when i am late for check out.

Staying at Shin’s flat is akin to staying in one of the 5 star hotels located in the same neighborhood. It is incredibly clean and luxurious for the price you pay to stay at Shin’s flat. 当天晚上预定房间， 房东并没有主动告知如何寻找地址， 根据地图地址找到了泰国文化中心站， 已经晚上23点， 问周围当地人都不知道如何到地图的位置，期间联系房东不回复消息， 前后花了快一个小时时间， 最后通过电话才联络到房东。 入住估计已经十二点多。地图显示位置和实际位置不符， 前后大概有七八百米，在一个小巷子里。

Nice place. I like what was done with the bathroom and interior of the room. It should be noted that this is a small hotel and not a private home. I got the impression that it would be Roy's place, like a single apartment but it wasn't. The lady who helped me find the place and check me in was very nice.
Good room and good location.
Great space to relax after a long day traveling, clean and comfortable. Thank you for hosting us!

The host is really kind-full and respectful , therefore the next time I visite Bangkok I will be willing to book this place.
性价比极高，空调有点冷，床很舒服，景观台非常好
good location 24h reception is very convenien for me there is lots of delicious food around the hotel

Agréablement surpris, très propre, conforme aux photos, personnels très agréables et petit déjeuner excellent ! On reviendra :)

Très bon endroit pour visiter Bangkok, c’est à 10 min à pied du Wat pho et du Grand palais. Parfaitement propre et on est très bien accueilli. Le seul bémol serait la toute petite douche, il n’y a pas de porte à la salle de bain donc on doit se déshabiller dans la douche et ce n’est pas très pratique.

Nice hotel near BKK.

Nice Hotel!

Kevin’s airbnb was sparkling clean and beautiful; it was exactly the same as how it was showed in the pictures. On top of that, it’s located in a very nice and quiet neighbourhood.

Everything about this place was great. The main highlights have to be the location and the amazing swimming pool overlooking the city. I would definitely stay here again.

Very good venue, beautiful pool - much recommended!
nice spot

First of all the good things: the listing is between Asok station and Nana station which places it really in a good location. It’s a 3 or 4 minute walk to a small Korea town, with numerous Korean restaurants. The gym was nice and had most of the equipment I needed. The AC worked very well (not too cold, not too hot), washing machine was really nice to have and the Internet gave me no problems. Curry was swift to respond to my questions or problems.
As for the things I disliked: the room was smaller than I’d imagined and very dark (it received little natural sunlight). That, combined with a dark decor gave it a bit of a cave feeling. The road that leads to the condominium was rather annoying to walk down for me (very dusty, with cars and bikes going two ways on a single lane path), and I sometimes dreaded waking to the nearby 7-11 just because I disliked that street so much.
Decent value for money but due to how dark it was, I didn’t have a great feeling just staying in the apartment.

I’ve stayed in several places all over Bangkok, and all over the world. I usually use Airbnb especially for trips 5+ days. Lalana’s place is by far the best I’ve stayed in Bangkok, and definitely in my top of all Airbnb’s
Amazing stylish space with all the amenities you would need for a long or short term stay. But this spot you’ll definitely want to stay long term.
Super clean, and the bed is amazingly comfortable and big. Lala has provided everything that you’d need to be self sufficient like a fridge, and water heater. Plenty of towels, and water, and toiletries. Bluetooth speaker & television with Netflix.
The best is the free laundry service, after traveling for so long this was like heaven sent. They clean and fold your clothes, finished in 24hrs. Amazing.
The location is super nice, local & modern: there’s a really good café right downstairs, right next to 7/11.
Additionally the location is easily accessible to everything. I used Grab the entire time and never waited more than 3mins for a ride to arrive.
The best part is Lala is an amazing host, she was super quick with responding to me when I inquired about the space, she answered all my questions and wasn’t quick to just accept my request to stay. Instead she ensured that the space was right for me before accepting.
Was fast with all communication & even allowed me to check out late because of late travel plans. She gave amazing recommendations & is a genuinely sweet person. She also has amazing style +
This is Airbnb Standards.
Loved everything about this place.
Thanks Lala!!! Will be back soon ☺️

Looking forward to returning next time I'm in Bkk.
Clean apartment and thoughtful host!
Lalana responded very quickly each time I text her. Very helpful and reliable. The place is clean and comfortable. A cool new restaurant with live music on certain days is just 6 minutes walk away.

This flat is beautiful. It looks exactly like the photos. I would defiantly recommend this place to anyone. It even had shampoo conditioner, body wash and bottled water. Lalana was an amazing host and help us out with everything.

Lala place is clean and comfortable that you can feel like home. Also, Lala is so helpful to provide travelling tips and recommendations to us , she responds very quickly.  So much thanks to Lala and glad to live in her place during my trip.

My stay at the condo was fabulous. The interior has a distinct style and is a great place to enjoy with friends considering the view which as previous guests have said is beautiful at sunset and night.
Joy was very accommodating and quick to arrange the place for me. The location near the river and some nice little places to eat make it well worth considering.
Lastly id just like to say how clean the place was. Joy kept it immaculate.

Joy's place was nice. She provided all amenities for a comfortable stay. Our 2yr old kid enjoyed the stay too. This place has a baby cot, a high chair, a baby bath tub and even Lego toys for him to play with. This made our stay very memorable.
She arranged an airport pick up which was very convenient as we traveled with kid. It was helpful and hassle free.
Our favorite part was the beautiful view from the balcony. It's perfect at sunset.
Also, her house manual and guidebook was truly helpful. We really enjoyed our stay!

By far the best place to stay in Bangkok. We really had a great time. Everything was perfect from the view to the location. The view was breathtaking. The neighborhood was full of streetfood and nice bars and restaurants. Thanks to Joy's recommendations, we had a chance to try 3 restaurants which are in Michelin guide's. We wouldn't have known they are there! Make sure you read her house guide. It was very useful.
The check in process was seamless. Joy arranged a pick up from the airport and she gave us clear instructions on every step.
Highly recommended and def come back here again next time. It's hard to find such a perfect please.
It is a very nice place, good location! So clean and joyce’s helper were so nice too! And the sleeping bed is very comfortable !!love it :)

Joyce's condo was outstanding. The unit has great views and located in a very happening area with Michelin star restaurants and local street food. We really liked the condo and would come back next time we visit Bangkok
房子非常干净，舒服。房东回复很及时，而且还特别照顾我们，因为我的孩子很小，航班是晚上六点，所以房东免费让我们晚两个小时退房。太好了，期待有下次相遇👍👍👍
Great place situated perfectly down the riverside of Bangkok. Be sure to check out Sarnies when in the area, best coffee in Bangkok!! Thanks for the recommendation Joyce

From the driver picking me up at the airport everything was flawless
Stunning apartment amazing views
Modern and comfortable furnishing
Great location and fabulous street food below
Communication was impeccable before and during my stay
I would not hesitate to book again xx

Perfect place right in the heart of most attractions. Joyce was a pleasure to deal with and went above and beyond to make our stay great and help with bookings for us during our stay.
Her thoughtful touches and information provided for the stay were outstanding.
Joyce’s place was easy to access, clean and very comfortable. Oh and the view was amazing!!
We would not hesitate to stay here again or recommend this to any of our friends. THANKYOU for a wonderful stay!!!
Stunning place! Would definitely stay here again. Not only is the apartment clean and really cool, but it is in an amazing neighborhood/location for enjoying the Thai culture. Thanks Joyce
Takumi’s place was extremely clean. Everything in the room seemed to be brand new. The location is perfect for those who have a late/early flight. I would definitely recommend this place.

Takumi and Fon’s reply are quick. And can accommodate my late check in and early check out! I like the self check in and check out process, saving some time for my short stay.
Room is clean, ac is cool and there is a fan too. Showering is good too. And great thing is there are bottled water. There are shampoo,body wash lotion and clean towels.
As for reminds to Airbnbers,
I’m female bag-packer, no suitcase, it took me 15mins walking to airport Gate 1. A bit farther than my expectation. WiFi is not working that night.
It is very close to the airport. Since we need hot water, also sent a water heater to us.  Very good transfer

Very close to the airport took us 10 min to walk with suitcases. The room is average with no tv and wifi was cutting in and out. Mosquito everywhere and the bed is like concrete. I only stayed 1 night as we had an early flight. It's good if u have a short time between flights but would not recomend a longer stay.

Everything was great. Exactly what I was looking for after a passport issue that resulting in me missing my flight.
Pretty much exactly as described.
只是转机临时住一晚，比想象中好很多，虽然周围房子的外观不好，可是房东的小黄屋外墙用心的刷得很棒，很亮眼，定位很准很好找，屋里也很干净，特意选的二楼比较安全，如果行李很多建议不要选，因为楼梯很陡，房东贴心的准备了矿泉水，还有很好吃的糖，去机场非常近，过天桥就到了，走大概5-8分钟
Very strategic place if you need to stay in Bangkok for 1 night or if you arrive late in the city and you need a rest , very close to the airport and train station , very clean and easy to find.
Great location 10 minutes walk to the station. Very clean and comfortable and easy to check-in. The WiFi didn't always work very well, but everything else great!

Good place i will go back there again.
The location is perfect, near bts. The room is clean and comfortable. I love that they have refrigerator and microwave. Staff is very helpful and polite.

New apartment and Great location. Would recommend.

The stuffs are great. The room is very new and clean, comfy bed, great rain shower, nice internet TV and free wifi. Amazing location. Near the sky train Sa Phan Khwai Station (not more than 5 mins walk) and there are many street foods around there.
I really like this place.
However, the construction area is very close to the hotel and they worked all day and all night (I stayed in Oct 2020 and the room is near that). If you have a sleeping problems, you should tell the stuff before check-in for avoiding that zone.

This apartment is one of a kind. Super modern and luxurious style. Very clean, comfy and it has a great balcony with a breathtaking view.
Located in the heart of Bangkok, very close to attractions and shopping malls. I would recommend everyone who is in Bangkok to stay in Mayurees place because it is simply the best!!!!

My wife and I stayed here for a month and I was so pleased I picked Khun Mayuree’s apartment for our long stay. The apartment itself was immaculate. It was on the 36th floor with spectacular views across the city and on a quite few occasions a very picturesque sunset from the spacious balcony.
The decoration of the apartment is very classy and modern with a great bathroom that has fantastic water pressure for showering. The kitchen is well fitted and plenty of room to cook at home.
Khun Mayuree is a wonderful host, she met us upon check in and explained everything to us regarding the car park and WiFi etc. I can’t really fault the apartment in anyway and have not really had to bother khun Mayuree at all but she is always available if needed.
I would highly recommended staying here and I will certainly rebook upon my return to Bangkok.

It's certainly a pleasure to say how wonderful our stay in the State Tower apartment was. It turned out to be exactly as described on the website, with a wonderful view on Chao praya River (a pleasant part of our stay was exploring the Bang Rak area so close to the apartment).
The living room and dining room were large and comfortable, the kitchen well equipped, the bedrooms luxurious, the building well maintained and quiet.  Everything was spotlessly clean and the linens and towels were generously supplied. Cleaning was an unexpected bonus. The apartment couldn't be better located and your suggestions in person and in the apartment binder provided an insider's view of the city of Bangkok. Thanks again for always being available, and responding our texes and emails at the time. This was not our first experience with Airbnb, but me and my family felt spoiled for the first time. Our only regret is that our stay was too short!
Thanks again,
See you soon, Mayuree.

Fantastic view to wake up to. The room is very clean with stylish interior and the bed is so comfortable. It is close with BTS, close with Pier, easy to go around using public transportation. There are many food stalls around the corner as well as big mall Robinson and Tops supermarket. Mayuree, the host, was so responsive and helpful.
Comfortable staying in good location. Very private and the view is stunning. Host responds the messaged quickly and helped is throughout our stay. Highly recommend this place and host!

From checking in up till the very last moment of staying there, Khun Mayuree has been nothing but an incredibly loving host. When we arrived, she’s proved to be very professional with a human touch, understanding what we need even if you don’t ask for it lol. 房间很新，刚装修好那种，附近也很热闹，房东回复信息比较慢，还没有通电梯其他还好，热水也方便
