Nice apartment; same look in the photos. Good location

Great place, simple and just what you need for a short trip to Thailand, placed in a local area so not as many tourists which was nice because it meant better food. Only issue was we couldn’t work out how to turn the air conditioning on for a while but it did work eventually :)
非常好的住宿体验，刚开始订了三天，后来增加到了六天，每天下楼工作人员都在用心打理公寓。附近有乔德夜市，两个大商场走路就能到，楼下50米就是711，生活的非常方便。价格实惠，这是我理想中的房间。让我的泰国曼谷行非常开心！我会推荐我的朋友来这里

很不错的入住体验。位于BTS nana站旁边的巷子。步行几分钟即可到达nana最繁华的商业街。乘坐地铁也很方便。不临主街，没有轰鸣的汽车声音，很安静，房间也很大。免费停车，很好的入住体验。
I like this place.
Great host, clean place, totally recommend
Always great staying at one of Lucas’ places, he’s a great host and I would recommend a stay in one of his places. Thanks!
My stay at Agris and Rogers place was very nice, I enjoyed the welcoming atmoshpere and the wonderful breakfast, and the fresh fruit from the garden. I def would stay there again!

Our stay with Agri and Roger was a high point of our twelve days in London. The Fords are a live, outgoing and interesting couple. Agri spoiled us daily with home baked scones and many choices such as fresh fruit and yogurt for breakfast.

The setting is quiet and convenient, about a five minute walk from the East Finchley Tube station. The back yard is an oasis of beautiful plantings and flowers.

The days at Blenheim House were a cultural experience in themselves. In addition to us North Americans we interacted with South Americans, Asians and Europeans. One day we were treated to an impromptu harp concet and on another evening we walked into a rousing group of fans watching a championship soccer (football) game.

Any return visit to London will certainly include time with Agri and Roger.

My girlfriend and I stayed with at Agri and Roger's house for almost two weeks and I can honestly declare that each day was wonderful. Our hosts were extremely kind and always there to help if needed. The double room that we stayed in was quite spacious and very clean (this holds true for the whole house). The wi-fi connection was good.
Every morning we were offered a rich breakfast (Agri tried to satisfy the preferences her guests as much as possible). The breakfast was a pleasurable experience not only because of the delicious food but also because of the lovely view towards the garden (a true masterpiece in my opinion!). Also, there are two lovely cats in the house which are absolutely adorable and contribute to the cozy atmosphere. We highly recommend everyone who is looking for a place to stay in London to choose this house!
Agri is a wonderful host.  She was extremely helpful and helped us get around.
A great location about half an hour to forty minutes from the centre of London by tube. Excellent host, very welcoming and open. The room was large and clean. Would definitely stay there again.

I had a wonderful stay with Roger and Agri at their lodge. First of all, their communication was very good. They had given me easy directions to the lodge from the Underground and had even offered to pick me up. I decided to walk since the lodge was so close. Roger and Agri are a very nice couple. They made sure that I felt safe and comfortable during my stay in London. They also offer their help to guide one around London if necessary. Agri's sister, who happened to be helping out when Agri was away, was very nice as well. Breakfast was served in the dining room, where you could see out into a beautiful large garden area. Make sure to step outside and view it even if it is cold outside.

I stayed five nights in two different rooms. The first was comfortable and there was sink in the room which made it easy to brush my teeth without leaving the room. There is a desk, television, lockable storage, closet and a bed for two.

The second room, which I'm guessing is the suite, has the same amenities as the first room, plus a sofa (big enough to sleep on), a separate kitchen (that includes a washing machine for clothes) and a television with premium channels.

Both rooms are very warm, so there is no need to bundle up. The toilets, showers and bath are shared facilities, but they're very clean.

I would stay with Roger and Agri the next time I am in London and would recommend that you do the same.

Note: Agri was away on holiday for most of my stay, but she was nice enough to go out of her way to say hello when she got back. They are very nice people. Treat them well.
Fabulous home and hosts - warm and engaging, interested in everyone

Agri and Roger were the perfect hosts. Agri even picked me up from the station!

First class breakfast and big bedroom made my one-night stay very easy and enjoyable. Only wish it could have been longer.

I can see why Agri & Roger consistently receive great reviews.  I stayed at their adorable house with my boyfriend for 9 nights and had an absolutely amazing, stress-free experience.  Their house is conveniently located near the East Finchley tube stop on the Northern Line which takes you everywhere--Camden Town, Old Street, Leicester Square, etc.  I would often head back to their place midday to take a quick break or rest and would look forward to doing so.  They have a beautiful home, and every morning we would have breakfast overlooking their pretty yard.  If I ever return to London, I would definitely stay with Agri & Roger again!

Agri and her husband were such great hosts, and their home was lovely. Their cats are the sweetest animals ever! Everything was comfortable, it was super easy to get into London from their home, and they were very helpful with any questions we had. The breakfast was great too! And there were plenty of places to eat and hangout nearby. We miss them already! Thank you Agri!

Apartment in perfect location, just couple minutes walk from Waterloo station. Windmill house locates near famous Young Vic theatre and trendy Anchor and Hope gastropab. Donovan is amazing host, flat is awesome. I highly recommend it for easy going persons.

Donovan's apartment is located minutes away from the Waterloo tube station, a great location for anyone exploring central London. Donovan is nice and attentive and determined to make your stay pleasant and comfortable. The room is a nice size and very clean. It looks onto the private gardens of the apartment block so it is also very quiet.

I will definitely stay with Donovan again.

Donovan is a wonderful host! The room was perfectly clean and organized. The bed was very comfortable. The location is great - very close to Waterloo which is a main enough station to get anywhere else. Couldn't have asked for more really - I know where I'll be staying next time I'm in town,.

We had a great experience staying with Donovan, he was very kind and flexible with our schedule. The location was perfect for exploring the city by foot or by train- a quieter neighborhood with some nearby restaurants and pubs . A very charming flat- clean, quiet and extremely comfortable room and bed. We would definitely recommend Donovan's place to others and would stay there again when traveling to London!

Great stay. Donovan was very accommodating (and we shared some enlightening conversation). Our room provided ample sleeping arrangements for two adults and a 2 year old, and we had free use of the kitchen. We didn’t bring our laptop or any bath towels (traveled very light); Donovan was only too willing to allow us to use his computer, and he provided us with bath towels. All of these things made our stay very pleasant, but the greatest benefit was the location. From Donovan’s place, and using a stroller for our son, we walked nearly everywhere (London Eye, Palace of Westminster/Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Buckingham Palace, Tower Bridge/Tower of London, St. James and Green Parks, Trafalgar Square, Piccadilly and Regent Street). Other than traveling from Stansted Airport to Donovan’s place, and the return trip to Stansted, the only time we used the Underground was to travel from Tower Hill to Camden Town. We did a good deal of walking but never noticed because there was always something else to see (plenty of places to stop to rest and have a cup of coffee or tea along the way). Donovan’s place is also very secure and the general area was very safe as well. We would absolutely stay with Donovan again and enthusiastically recommend it to others.

AWESOME!! Loved staying at Donovan's place, well loved it so much that I ended up staying longer. I am still here :). Great apartment, very clean, safe and central area. Great host and we have certainly become friends.

Thanks to Donovan! Great room, great flat! We were thoroughgoing contented!
We walked nearly everywhere - just because the location is really central! Everything you need is nearby: Restaurants, supermarket, Railway or Tube station - and it's only 5mins of walk to the river Thames.

We strongly recommend this location!

Donovan is very nice!
He is available for any questions, but if you want to be on your own, you feel almost like being in your own flat! It's really quiet in the room for a downtown location!

All in one: a**** :)

Thanks once again!

Donovan has perfect geust room. The bed was clean and closet in the room was empty for guest. Me and my mother had great time in his apartment. The ktichen was samll but well equipped. When we arrived, he gave us useful information about London. Everything was well organized and clean. Communication with Donovan was perfect! Highly recommended!

Great  location:The flat is less than 5 minute walk from Waterloo Station and less than 10 from Thames river and the suggestive Queen's Walk ! The room is a good size, clean and confortable.We didn't meet Donovan in person but he gave to us a lot of information on the place and what to see in London,where to eat and shop! Thank you so much! I would definitely recommend!!
Donovan is very friendly and polite.Cozy flat,very good location of the house,very clean.I would stay there again!!

Antonia is fantastic. She was kind and gave of herself to make us feel at home. Her flat is very clean and is decorated well. We loved every moment of time spent there. When we arrived we were given oyster cards so that we could get around more easily. The flat is a 2 minute walk to the tube station that takes you into the center of the city. The park across the street is nice for a walk if you want to feel like you are out of the city for a bit. Breakfast was set out for us each day and was always great. We highly recommend staying here!

dear antonia we had a wonderful time with you hostess you are a dear and have us prepare many small joys and cares for it, we would like again to thank sincerely say pressing your apartment is entranced bernt and stylish our room just to feel good especially after long london walks, we have It made ​​us comfortable bed in the sky thanks you again for everything, it was an unforgettable time and love greeting tanja miri
Antonia was a gracious host.  The property was clean, pleasant, reasonably priced, and close to transportation and a lovely park.  Highly recommended!

Great hostess! Very helpful, attentive, and accomodating. We were very impressed with the level of privacy, attention to detail, cleanliness, and hospitality. Location was wonderful, easy tube access, beautiful neighborhood, and great local food and drink. Would definitely stay again if in London.

Antonia's place met our needs very nicely. It is in a good location, very close to the tube, next door to a large park, and just off the main road. Our room was accomodating - Antonia had information on the area waiting for us, as well as our own keys, travel cards and a computer in case we needed it. We were very grateful to have been able to drop our luggage off at the apartment before the official check-in time! Antonia is an extremely warm and interesting person. She made us feel very much at home.

Antonia was the best host ever! First of all, she had a quick responding time. And although we arrived in the middle of the night, she still was up to welcome us. She was well prepared for visitors, had reloadable Train tickets (Oyster Cards) ready to go, knew everything about the area and did recommend great places in the city. Everything was clean and the atmosphere was nice and cosy and we felt as if we were home. We would gladly stay at Antonias again on our next visit to London. Thanks a lot (again) Antonia!

The room is great as you can see in the pictures. The apartment is very clean and well decorated with personal touchs of Antonia. Is very close to the city and it is very cool if you want to be out of touristic places and see the life of the british people.
Antonia is a great host, the ones that is not easily to find everywhere. She waited for us late night in our arriving, she invited us with a glass of wine and took us to the roof to show us the city at night. Great host and I truly recommed this place.

Antonia was a very good hostess and welcomed us as friends.  She had the room well prepared, the location was great with the park across the street. and just a short walk to the Kennington Tube.station.  We felt our money was well spent.  Thank you, Antonia.
Cnveniently located and clean.  Antonia is very gracious, helpful.  Her breakfast  included whatever one might want, and the coffee - very good.

Antonia's room was great, looks just as beautiful as the pictures show it. Lovely view of the apartment gardens and park across the street. She provided lots of options for breakfast in the morning, and was kind enough to meet us at the Kennington tube station when we got in, which was only a block and a half away. 30-40 minute walk to Westminster Abbey/House of Lords, etc. Very helpful in suggesting things to see, and even helped us with printing out our return flight tickets. She does have a roommate, which I don't think was listed in the posting, but it wasn't a problem at all, as she was very nice, and there was never a wait for the bathroom. Would stay here again if we ever find ourselves in London in the future.

Daniel is very kind and super helpful. His place is very clean and nice and in a wonderful location (very close to the Camden Town Underground station). I highly recommend staying with Daniel and I will certainly look to stay with him the next time I am in London.

I had a lovely time at Rocco Boni, it was very boni indeed. Daniel is the best host you can imagine. I was picked up at Camden Town by him within 5 mins of my arrival. The bedroom which he rents out is large enough for two people to move around in. Everything was super clean. It was great to wake up to the smell of fresh coffee every morning. Daniel was respectful of my space in his apartment. I could cook and use his dishes which saved me money. He gave me a map of London and even lent me his private umbrella when I realized I forgot mine. He gave me tips to get around London when there was a tube strike. He looked on the internet for me to find the best connection to Gatwick airport. In one line: This is a great guy at a great place to stay in London. I am looking forward to stay at Rocco Boni again!!!
very nice person, very confortable bed... in  a step you are in the city....

very good and friendly host, room and bathroom are so clean (!!!) and comfortable. a big and great bed, very nice seen through the window. lovely very silent apartment. highly recomended. thank you daniel.

I am writing this review for my mom who stayed at Rocco Boni for 4 days. "Daniel has a friendly guest-room with a great view on the London skyline, with a generous, great quality bed. The room is very clean. Daniel cooks his guests fresh tea or coffee in the morning. He is a fabulous host, very helpful. He went out of his way to make my stay very pleasant. Thanks again, Daniel!" Wil from Holland

Daniel was a great host!  He was very helpful before I arrived and had loads of information on London and the Camden Town area.  The flat was nice, very clean and near a tube stop as well.  This was my first time using airbnb and if this is a general example of how the site and flats work, I will definitely use it again!!  Thank you, Daniel!

Daniel provides an artfully designed, spotless flat in a fun and convenient neighborhood. He's a very accommodating host; both a knowledgeable Londoner and great conversation partner.
**
The room: Larger than expected, with a large bed, work desk, table, and occasional chairs. The provided linens were great.
**
The flat: Thoughtful design and immaculately clean. Take the lift to the top floor of the tallest building in the area. Through its many windows you'll have unobstructed views, fresh air, plenty of light. I managed to snap one of the clearer London sunrises I've seen.
**
The neighborhood: You'll be on the block with 24-hour buses to most major areas, and it's a 3 to 5-minute walk to the Camden Town tube on the Northern line. I never waited more than 10 minutes for any sort of transport (but I might have blacked out that one night, so while it might have been longer, I'm none the wiser), so it's equality suited to leisure or morning commute. The immediate surrounding area has a supermarket (Sainsbury's); grocery and convenience stores; bars, cocktails lounges, and nightclubs; pubs, restaurants, and fast food, and cafes; at least one hardware, home, and paint store; the Odeon movie theatre; jazz and other music venues; mobile/cellular retailers; wine and booze shops; and apparel/shoes, including H&M and Gap. If you need anything else, get it from Camden Market, especially if you need it in leather.

Daniel is a perfect host! He's super nice, so as his apartment. On the day we checked in, another guest just left. Daniel managed to tidy up the room in a very short period of time and let us in. The room is very tidy, modern, and facing a great view-we've lived in London for 1 year before but we have never seen such a beautiful London! Will definitely stay in Daniel's again.

All in all a very positive experience. Everything is just as he describes in his profile - a very clean, neat and cozy place with nice views across London, a very comfortable and large bed and kitchen with all amenities at ones disposal. The flat is within easy walking distance of Camden Lock Markets and tube station (Northern Line), and excellent public transport to Liverpool St and Regent St (24hr bus service) right outside his house. Daniel is very friendly and helpful, knows heaps about the area and has lots of info about everything you need to know and to enjoy your stay in London. I have absolutely no hesitation in recommending you to stay at his place. Do not hesitate to contact me if you you would like further information.

I enjoyed my stay with Daniel, in his immaculate and well designed flat. I had plenty of room, a delightful bed in which I had my best nights sleep in a long time, and teh best shower, (once I had learnt how to use it) that I have ever had in England. We Brits I think don't like pressure, especially water pressure.

Access to the apt., is easy, (once again when past the learning curve), and is a doodle of a walk from Camden Town Tube station.

I would very happily stay with Daniel again, and heartily recommend him.

IanY

My stay with Elisabetta was my first with Airbnb and I am so glad it was! She called me prior to my flight into London to provide details of how to get to her home and to welcome me, which was incredibly comforting.

You get a lovely room with a single bed and access to the kitchen, living room, bathroom and an office space. The free wifi was a plus.

Elisabetta has a keen eye for beautiful furniture and art that translates to her hosting. You will have a very pleasant stay. Thanks Elisabetta!

I really enjoyed my stay with Elisabetta. Few days prior to my departure to London, she contacted me to give me all the directions to get to her house by the Tube. She even came at the tube station to pick me up and helped me with my luggages as I am currently pregnant. The room was very nice and very clean. The bed was so so comfortable ( I slept like a baby). The whole house was very tastefully decorated. The bathroom was clean with a working shower.
Plus, I had access to Wi-Fi connection from Elisabetta's house. Elisabetta showed me all the surrounding tourist's attractions and as well the supermarket nearby. I felt safe in her quiet neighbourhood. I will definitely recommend a stay at Elisabetta's house and the website of Air.bnb to anyone who are looking for an affordable way to stay in London. Thanks again Elisabetta.

This was my first Airbnb experience and my stay with Elisabetta was perfect. She gave solid directions from Gatwick, was there when I arrived sort of late and I felt very welcome. It was a short trip and I was quite busy, but I always felt, that Elisabetta was there to help with advice and such.

Very recommended.

Elisabetta is a wonderful host. When a booking elsewhere fell through just days before I arrived in London, Elisabetta was really quick to respond and gave me clear instructions for finding her place. From the moment she greeted me she went out of her way to make me feel at home, and even invited me to a dinner party. Elisabetta gave me some great recommendations on places to go and things to do, and came along on a few outings so it really felt like I was staying with a friend. I will definitely stay with her again if her room is free next time I am in London.

I had a fabulous time at Elisabetta's house! It is an amazing location - walking distance to Westminster. Elisabetta is a lovely host - very friendly, interesting, and with great taste! She answered all my questions about London and gave me some great recommendations. Two things really topped it for me, apart from Elisabetta herself, of course! First, the flat is in a great location for morning runs along the Thames - excellent. Second, the bed is SUPER comfy!

Elisabetta is a wonderful hostess -- friendly, discreet, and accommodating. The location was awesome -- just 3-5 minutes walk from the Thames, with a great view of Big Ben and Parliament, and 15 minutes walk from the Victoria Line, which can get you anywhere. Elisabetta was especially helpful at providing maps and tips on what to do and how to use the buses. She has a huge map of London in her study, and I loved to look at it to get my bearings for the city. I also enjoyed chatting with her about her research. Highly recommended!

Elisabetta is so lovely! You will absolutely love her and her beautiful home. The house is very clean and it is easy to get to get around London with Lambeth North and Vauxhall stations 10-15 minutes walk away (depending on your speed of walking). It is also very easy to walk across to Westminister where the Houses of Parliament, Ben Ben etc are. Maybe 15 - 20 minute walk.
The house itself is very clean, and I do agree that the bed is super comfy! It's quiet at night time so you can get a good sleep, and plenty of cupboard space to hang your clothes.
Elisabetta is very helpful, giving many tips of things to do and see in London, as well as the best ways to get there. Her recommendations are spot on and I enjoyed myself in London very much.
I have no hesitation in recommending her place to anyone!
This was a lovely and welcoming place to stay!

July '11. Have enjoyed a very pleasant stay with Elisabetta. It was my first experience with Airbnb and I found Elisabetta to be an excellent host. She was always accommodating and helpful. The accommodation is very well located with access to two tube stations and walking distance to the Thames and the Southbank restaurant precinct. The room was comfortable with good linen and everything was well kept and clean. I would be happy to stay again

Elisabetta was a lovely host, very helpful and organized.
Her flat is in a great place, very easy to move around the city.
we went to london 3 guys for shopping, Donovan was a greet host, the room and the apartment were so nice, we´ll come back there for staying again :)
stayed in donovans for six nights,better than any hotel,apartment was spotless,location excellent.the host,donovan could not have been more helpful or friendly
Comfortable room, great communication with host.

Though I did not get to meet Donovan, he was incredibly easy to communicate with and so very helpful. In his place was the house keeper, who was also very nice and helped us with anything we needed. The apartment was in the perfect location, and had every amenity we needed. Our experience in London was great, and it was very nice to have such a lovely apartment to come home to. I highly recommend!

This is the second time I stayed with Donovan. This time I came back for two months. He's a fantastic host! The area is really lovely. The room is cosy and has a nice closet, which i couldn't see from the pictures before I came. The apartment is perfectly situated and has everything I need. Really a wonderful find and I couldn't recommend it enough.

Very friendly host, very comfortable und clean room and apartment.
We slept 8 nights there and we can recommend to stay at Donovans apartment. It is very central and so we had more time for all the sightseeing-things.
Great place to stay - very close to Young Vic, Old Vic, and National Theatre.

Location, location, location! Donovan was super cordial and his pad was in such a great area of town. The space was a little cramped for 3 gals with all our bags in the room, but otherwise great. Very clean and Donovan was very accomodating. Definitely recommend.

We had an amazing time staying with Donovan. He was very friendly and welcoming and really went the extra mile with hospitality. We received a chocolate on our pillow, and a banana. In the mornings, breakfast was set out for us. We would definitely stay with them again.
We really enjoyed staying at Donovan s place, he was great, sweet person and help us a lot to find places at England. Thank you very much Donovan.

My girlfriend and I were Meg's first guests. The boat "Jessie" was built 2 years ago by a professionnal shipyard and Meg started renting it only a few weeks ago. It is very comfortable, clean, well built and well equiped. The kitchen is beautiful and very convenient. The main bedroom is incredibly cosy and there is a really nice atmosphere in the whole boat. The pictures uploaded by Meg show exactly what the boat is like; you just miss the swans swimming past in the morning... ; )

It was summer when we went so we could have dinner and enjoy a glass of wine on the deck at night. Which felt really good after a whole day exploring busy and noisy London.

The boat was moored in Little Venice when we went (close to Warwick Avenue subway station, 3 min walk). The location is very central and convenient if you wanna explore London. It is at the same time amazingly quiet and relaxing. It is seriously a little piece of heaven right in the middle of London.

We are already nostalgic of the life on the canal and will definitly go back as soon as we can.
If you are not looking for the standard Sofitel hotel room but for a confortable and quiet place with lots of character ; this is the perfect place for you.

I forgot to say that Meg was very helpful in organising the trip (before we arrived, she even filled the cupboards with enough to cook a nice breaky on our first morning)

To sum up...
Meg is an amazing host.
Jessie is an amazing boat.
I already miss the swans,

Thanks Meg and see you soon !

We had a really good time on the boat (Jessie). ! would give it a 5 start review had it not been for a little snafu at the start of our stay. We had to wait 5 hours while the boat came back from a "pump out" at an out of town location as the local maintenance depot was out of order. It was not Meg's fault but it was a huge inconvenience.

To Meg's credit she did offer us an extra day but that wasn't practical given our schedule.

The rest of our stay was delightful full of ducks, amazing views and great canal side walks. The boat is very comfortable and child friendly. It is in a great location and easy to reach other parts of London from (close to two tube stations and the national rail system.

You can also walk many places from the boat . Regents Park, The Zoo and Camden Lock are all within reasonable walking distance along the canal.

Jessie (the boat) is close to shops and some lovely pubs and restaurants. The fellow boat dwellers and other local people were all very friendly.

Meg was a great host and made sure we had all we need. I strongly recommend this for short and unique London vacation.

Jessie is an awesome place to stay while in London.  It's central and much cooler than staying in a hotel or apartment.  It's cozy but more than enough room for my husband and my 3 year old son.  Great area and close to transportation around the city.

I had my birthday on the barge with some fellow friends and it was an amazing experience. We cooked and ate together and each had a very comfy bed. Meg was very friendly and wonderful to communicate with and was there to help us when we needed more water etc. Great location and unique experience.
My family and I had a fantastic time aboard Jessie!!! We look forward to visiting again.

Our family had a wonderful few days on this beautiful boat. "Jessie" was moored a few corners away from Little Venice, but we actually preferred this quiet spot.
Naturally, our two sons really enjoyed this adventurous trip, but personally I have to say I'll have a hard time ever staying anywhere else when I'm in London.
Thanks, Meg, for this wonderful experience!

We had a great time staying on Megs barge Jessie.
The boat was moored in a beautifull and central location and has everything you could wish for.
Meg couldnt have been better as a host; she had the fire lit for us when we arrived, there were fresh flowers, all the maps and guidebooks we needed, tea, coffee, and the essentials for our first breakfast ....
All in all 10/10!
We are hoping to visit again soon.

What a fantastic location and the boat was a treat. Meg met us at the boat and took is through everything and it was pretty straight forward I just couldn't believe that our quiet location with ducks was only metres from cafes, pubs supermarkets and paddington station.

My boyfriend and I had a wonderful weekend on Jessie. It's beautiful, comfortable and offers all the amenities one could possibly need for a relaxing holiday in London (fully equipped kitchen, breakfast items, fireplace, t.v. and dvd player, hairdryer, iron, etc...) Waking up on the boat is magical, with the swans, ducks and neighbouring boat floating along, and the location is fantastic. I would recommend warm pyjamas and thick socks if you're coming in the fall, as it can get chilly in the mornings and night. Also, you do have to be conscious taking care of hot water and electricity usage, but that is part of the charm. We were moored in a commercial area between Paddington and Edgware Road, and we really liked this quiet and clean location. All in all, a highly recommended experience and we would love to go back.

Meg was a lovely host. She gave us a great directions on how to get to the canal from the airport and a clear overview of everything we needed to know to stay on her boat. I stayed there with my mother and found it to be quite comfortable with plenty of space for both of us. The canal is in a great location, felt very safe, and was peacefully quiet at night. The boat was clean and well maintained. Meg provided maps and restaurant menus for the area. She also allowed us to borrow two oyster cards (for public transit) so that we did not need to purchase our own. You add money to them based on your transit needs. The only slight issue we ran into was that you need to run the boat engine twice a day to charge the battery. We returned to the boat around 1130 one evening and proceeded to run the engine only to be scolded by one of our neighbors for waking him up. It was no big deal but if you are planning on being out late every day with no stop offs to the canal then this is something to consider. Overall both my mother and I would highly recommend this charming boat for your stay on your travels.
Julia is really nice and the place is cosy and very conveniently located.
Nice, comfortable place.  Definitely a good option to stay in London.

The boiler broke while I was there, so no hot water, but Julia was great and took me next door for a shower!  The bathroom could have used a deep cleaning but otherwise the room was lovely as expected, the location was great, and Julia was a friendly host!
Julia is a really nice person and the flat very lovely.
Fantastic host, great flat, very convenient to transport, grocery and nightlife.  Definitely recommend.
Great host, allowed me to book an extra night on incredibly short notice, wonderful flat, excellent location.  I'm running out of superlatives, so thank you, Julia.
Clean, simple room. Very close to a tube station, and easy to get to. Thanks!
Lovely room within walking distance of both Shepherd's Bush Market and Shepherd's Bush tube stations. Area is also interesting.

Julia was the perfect host and this crashpad is great.  The room is a good size, bigger than it looks in the picture, and very clean and comfortable.  It is literally a 1 or 2 minute walk to the Shepherd's Bush Market tube station, so it's easy to get to pretty much anywhere in London. Price includes linens, towel, use of dishes and pots/pans, tv in room, wireless internet, and a secure locked door on your room to which only you have the key when you go out. It was a very peaceful and quiet house and I really enjoyed my week there; it was the perfect place to come home to after a long day at work. Julia is a kind and thoughtful host and I absolutely recommend crashing here!

Julia is very nice and quite accomodating...The room is a nice size and quite comfortable.  The location is fantastic-- only a couple of minutes from the tube and right in the middle of everything.  it's a great value to stay here...
Welcoming host, feeling welcome right away, room is basic but spacious and a good deal for the price.
Hi, great please to stay. Welcoming, clean and friendly. Recommended.

Crashpadder is an amazingly useful discovery of a site, I look forward to using it again!
James Eadon, CEO Culica Ltd, Inventor of the Culica

Very clean room, bathroom, toilet. Comfy bed in a quiet neighbourhood with plenty of cheap food options nearby.

Would definitely stay again.
Welcoming host, room was very clean and comfortable - Highly recommended.
It was an absolute pleasure to stay with julie. She was very accomodating, location was excellent and a great room for business travellers. thanks so much julie i hope to stay with you again.
Clean and comfortable room, plenty of space, close to transport and shops and courteous host.
Julie's flat was very clean and very comfortable and close to the tube too. A great Crashpadder experience. Thanks!

Julie's place is great.  I have stayed with her a few times for fairly long stays.  It is perfect for my needs as I need to be able to get out and about using public transport which is just a stones throw away!  The room is large and comfortable which is important if you are staying a while as I have been.  Thanks Julie you are a great host, I'm sure I'll be back.
Julia is great and the place was perfect for what i needed, simple and laid back and very clean.

Nice clean room, very quiet despite being in the center of the action, recently redone ensuit shower was nice.  This flat is a perfect jumping off point for taking in the sights of Soho and surrounds.  I paid the same price a week ago to stay in a hotel room that was not even half the size and not as well located.
Perfect Stay.  Location is ideal for seeing london nightlife, but the apartment is perfectly quiet for getting good sleep.

Helen was a great host. This flat was in a wonderful location, right in the middle of everything. It was very clean and secure. Helen was easy to get in touch with, was very kind and helpful, and genuinely seemed like a lovely person. She has auto book on the room and someone swiped it while I was emailing with her, she went out of her way to get me another room in her building which was very kind. I would definitely stay here again. Highly reccomend.

We stayed in the twin room with own bathroom and it was a pleasant experience. The location is the main benefit - right in the center of Liecester Square and everything; an extremely short walk from Piccadilly, Soho, Big Ben, etc etc.

Our room did not have any loud noises at night as it was not towards the front of the building I assume so that was nice. The hosts were very organized and someone was there at check-in and check-out.

This place is great! Right on the doorstep of  Liecester Square! I think you literally could not get a better location. The room was very clean,  comfortable and quiet and I thoroughly enjoyed my stay here. Would recommend to anyone

Das Zimmer ist zwar einfach, aber zweckmäßig eingerichtet. Nicht doll, aber vollkommen in Ordnung. Und die Lage ist großartig!!! Negativ war allerdings die mangelhafte Lüftungsmöglichkeit: Im Badezimmer riecht es über die Lüftung morgens nach Essen. Das Zimmer selbst hat zwar ein Fenster, aber wenn man es öffnet, brummt der Raum von den Ventilatoren im Innenhof und der Geruch nach Pekingente verteilt sich.

The location couldn't have been better...I was in town for the Frieze Art Fair which was a pleasant walk from the room. That being said, this is the kind of place you stay at if you don't plan to stay in your room a whole lot.

The free WiFi was a plus.
Very good location! And the place is clean. Hui is very kind and helpful~~ The rooms look better than the pictures~

Nice room, clean and Helen was very helpful for everithing, the area is nice, have pubs with life music close by.
Defenitely I'll come back next time!
Thanks Helen!
Great room, Great location and Helen is attentive to your well-being during your stay.

The flat is very nice and clean. Top location,safe, close to public transports, nice restaurants, shops. James is very friendly and will try his best to help with anything you need in the flat. I had a nice stay.

The accomodation was exactly as advertised and I thought it was a bargain considering the location, quality of the room and flat, and the fact that James is a very nice guy who was the perfect host. There is a Marriott hotel on the same street in which rooms cost several times the daily rate of this room!

I really enjoyed walking around Primrose Hill, Regents Park and Hampstead, and the Jubilee Line tube was just a couple of minutes' walk away.

The room has a comfortable bed, gets lots of sunlight and looks out over a lot of greenery; the flat was great with all the facilities James described.

Thanks James, I hope to stay again!
James is a magnificent host, the apartment is comfortable, and the proximity to Swiss Cottage and Primrose Hill make the location perfect for visiting those parts of town.

I have had the most wonderful stay here.  James is a fantastic host.  He was very welcoming and helpful.  His flat is lovely and the location is superb.  I feel so lucky to have had this experience and to have met such a special person.
Nice flat, biggest DVD collection I've seen. Location is convenient for a run or a walk on Primrose Hill. And James is a very sound guy.
Great location. Interesting and rather helpful host. Room a bit tiny, and packed with dvds, games, and shoes. Price paid may not reflect expectation for the room size...

It was a very nice experience to stay in James apartment! He was not home for the weekend but he took very good care of me, assisted with information about how to get there from the airport and prepared the apartment for my stay. The room was not so big, but the view from the window was fantastic. The area is wonderful, nice and quiet, with Primrose Hill and lovely restaurants and shops close by. I highly recommend this place.

I enjoyed staying in James' flat for 2 weeks. The place had a very good location that is near the tube, convenience store, supermarket, bus stops, and everything I needed. On a sunny morning, I even had a quick walk to Primrose Hill to see the lovely view of central London. James is very nice and helpful to suggest travel options to find his place as I arrived with many luggage and bags. The flat was clean, cozy, and comfortable. Internet was quick and reliable too. The bedroom has clean blankets and sheets too.

I had a wonderful experience staying in the flat. James is incredibly helpful and the perfect host. The apartment was exactly as advertised, and the location is superb with the Triyoga studio just around the corner. Will for sure return there on my next visit to London. Higly recommended.

James is a great host and instantly makes you feel relaxed and at ease! His bright, clean and spacious apartment is perfectly located 5 minutes from Swiss Cottage tube station and a 20 minute walk to Regents Park. The surrounding area has plenty of shops and cafes.  I stayed for a week and thoroughly enjoyed my time there.

Anne is a perfect hostess. I had to rush her into the booking as I needed a room immediately, but Anne was very calm and understanding. She is not at all interfering, in fact your hardly hear or see her even when she is in the house. She made me feel completely at home and the room and the bed was very clean and tidy. The flat is very well located in the centre of the city with easy commute options, yet away from the hustle and bustle - Right opposite Battersea Park which is one of London's best parks. I highly recommend this place would definitely stay again!!

Anne is a good host, very helpful and attentive, the apartment is in a great location, if you have some time its great to have a walk towards south kensington, Sloane Square as well as Battersea park, good bus service but not so much from the subway stations. Her dogs are nice and calm, but if you are not keen on dogs (and their smell) then might not be your thing as the place is a bit small and living room space is limited. Rooms are good size though, and well lit. Good value for money definitely.
Very nice room, walking distance from the King's Road.
Anne is a kind and gracious host and the room was superb. I felt right at home and couldn't recommend my experience more highly.
Anne is a most courteous & accommodating host - good value for money, access to public transport & central London entirely convenient. Would certainly recommend.
Great stay. Anne was always helpful and willing to answer any questions. The room was confortable and i was able to work and relax in there.

About accommodation, comfortable double bed, with tele in the room just in case. Great price for the location.  Almost attached bath room. ````good location, frequent bus service, nice restaurants nearby. Anne is a great host, ensured a comfortable stay, easy to contact and communicate and promptly replied to my questions. Flexible check in was added advantage.  Overall great stay.
Helpful, friendly and flexible.

My first experience with Airbnb was very good.
Mrs Anne guest me in a wonderful way.
The house was very cute and confortable.
Anne will be my future contact in London.
Thanks for the ospitality

Communication was a bit difficult (ah, the joys of international travel with a US phone I could not unlock), but once I arrived at Anne's flat all was good.  The room was cozy and warm and a great place to pass a rainy day with my book.  Her dogs were delightful to have around.  The neighborhood is cute.  The biggest challenge for me was that the internet did not work back in my bedroom so I always had to move to the living ara to use it.

Tim hosted us for one week in his apartment. Our stay has been really enjoyable as Tim's flat is well-finished, spacious and provided with any comfort. Furniture is brand new, neat and functional.
Tim has demonstrated to be a very nice and thoughtful host. We would like to thank him for his kindness
Roberta e Massimiliano

My parents stayed at Tim's Apartment in London for 11 days and they are all praises for him and his property. Tim was a great host and extremely helpful. The apartment is located bang in the center of the city, it was , clean, modern and well equipped with all modern amenities in place. I cannot stress enough how much they appreciated Tim's personal attention to everything they needed. I personally thank him for taking such good care of my parents and they would love to be back and stay at his apartment again.

Had a great stay in Tim's flat. He had chocolates for us when we arrived and the place was immaculate! Illy and Lavazza coffee options and choice teas as well. Kitchen in perfect working order so you can cook if you want to although we didn't. Nearest tube stop (Marble Arch) was 5 mins away and lots of inexpensive but really good Lebanese restaurants in the area. Our first airbnb experience and it was fantastic! Thanks, Tim!

We had an awesome stay at Tim's place. Tim's place was very conveniently located to discover london as it is central (in zone 1). His place was also very clean and tidy and has everything you need for your stay. He even gave us some chocolates for our stay. This was our favourite place out of all the airbnb places we stayed in during our recent eurotrip.

I highly recommend Tim's apartment to anyone considering it!

My wife and I were traveling to England for a tour in the countryside and had a one night stop over in London. Since we were arriving earlier in the day, we wanted to be sure we had a place as soon as we got in so we could take a quick nap and then head out to explore London. Tim's place was perfectly situated, a 15 minute walk from Paddington Station, and 10 minutes to Oxford Street and Marble Arch.

The compact apartment was all we needed (and more) for the single night. it has a compact but serviceable kitchen. The studio flat is quiet despite being on the second floor, street side.

It was very clean, and the bed firm and comfortable. Tim provided bottled water in the fridge which was very thoughtful, and though we didn't make use of it, there was coffee, tea, and the appliances necessary to prepare it.

If you are looking for an economical home-base for exploring London with convenience to Paddington (and the train to Heathrow) this is a great flat. If we were staying for a number of days and planning to cook more than a simple breakfast in the apartment, I might opt for something larger. For our trip it was perfect.

The apartment is really cosy and nice. Tim prepared every detail so we feel confortable and he succeeded. :)
The place is next to a lot of bus stops and Marble Arch underground station, so it's very easy to reach any point in London.
It is also surrounded by restaurants and shops (and a Tesco just on the street behind!). We were really happy with the experience so definitely we're going to repeat when visiting London! :)

Immaculately presented apartment in an excellent location! Tim was friendly, helpful, welcoming and professional. Overall, our stay was thoroughly enjoyable and we would highly recommend Tim's apartment.

Just stayed at Tim's apartment for 5 days and enjoyed it very much. The location is convenient, being close to metro and shops and not too far from the major tourist sites. The apartment is clean and well presented. Would definitely recommend.
We spent 4 great days, the apartment is great. Small but perfect for a couple. Tim very nice. A good host and a very nice little apartment!

The flat was just what was needed for a great week in London.  Clean and nicely appointed, you can tell that Tim really cares about his guest's comfort.  It is a short 5 minutes walk to the Marble Arch tube station, and from there you can get anywhere in London.  Tim also was so kind in arranging transportation to St. Pancras Station for a very early train to Paris.  He made sure that our stay was fantastic.  I can recommend the flat and Tim as a very kind and caring person.  Thank you Tim for a great place to stay (not to mention the fantastic weather we had for the week in London)!

Everything's perfect, Marie and Salome helped me with every question i had, they were also very patint with me cause i had many problems with british accent... ;)

The place is clean, the house is amazing, the neighborhood is quiet and really close ( 2 mins ) to Holloway road station, in picadilly line.
My short-stay was perfect, thank you very much, if i'm back to London, no doubt i'll contact you again.
100 % highly recommend HOST.

Marie's place was absolutely perfect for my short stay in London. It's located just a few minutes walk from Holloway Road tube, meaning you're close to Camden, Kings Cross and Soho.

Even though it's near the most bustling parts of London, the street and flat itself is quiet, which is perfect, giving you a bit of rest once your day is up.

The flat is very tidy, with a great kitchen and comfy living area with fast wi-fi. Marie was a fantastic host, very friendly and helpful, offering me tips and info whenever i needed it.

There is plenty of storage in the room, which is well lit, private and comfortable.

Couldn't recommend it more. If I come back in London, I'll be swinging by Marie's again!

Marie was a fantastic host for us at her apartment in London!  The apartment is just a few blocks from the tube so we found it quite easy to jump on the tube and be anywhere in London in minutes.  Marie gave us great suggestions and recommendations, and even let us borrow raingear, helped us ship some luggage to Spain and gave us an extra free tube pass!  Couldn't have asked for anything more in terms of a host.  The bedroom was quite nice and the shared bathroom worked out fine.  This was a great alternative to other much more expensive options in London. Would love to stay here again!!!

I really enjoyed my stay at Marie's house. You couldn't find a better hostess, who is warm, helpful and generous, making me feel very welcome and at home. The bedroom is really cozy and the house is very clean, tidy and has everything I need. It is perfectly located, just 3-minute walk  from Holloway road tube (piccadilly line, two stops from king's cross), several bus stops and the high street, where you can find Sainsbury's, costa and plenty of shops. However the neighborhood is really quiet, so you don't need to worry about the noise. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone

I had a really perfect 2 weeks stay at Marie and Sally! They are both really warm hearted, and helped me with everything I needed! The house is in a typical London street with beautiful houses in a calm street and it is only 3 min walk from Holloway Station so the location is really great!
You can join your hosts in the livingroom for a good laugh and a glass of wine in the evening or if you are lucky, for one of Marie delicious british dishes !
If you are looking for a very clean and tidy, calm room in a nice London house and just feel at home because the hosts are so generous and nice - this is the right place for you!

For me - London never again at another place!

Marie is an excellent host. Anything you need to know about London and Islington, she can help you out. You feel less like a guest and more like a friend. Her cat will also greet you after the second time you come in the house.

The location cannot be beat - you're very spoiled for location when you stay here. Close to everything from tube to international rail, not that long to Heathrow. Marie gives very simple, easy to follow directions to get to her place. I'm quite prone to getting lost and I didn't once.

This was an excellent first AirBnB stay and set the standard very high.

Marie and Sally are very friendly and helpful, all my emails and sms were responded promptly. Place was easy to find and its literally 5 min from Holloway Road tube station which is very convinient. Room is small, just to sleep, but exactly as per the photos uploaded, house is clean and tidy. The most gorgeous cat i have ever seen lives there as well;o) On the way to tube station there is sainsburys supermarket and costa coffee for an additional convinience. I will definitely consider this option if i will be coming to London again;-)

Beautiful and comfortable house in an excellent location - literally only 2 minutes walk to the tube. Marie and Lisa were both very friendly, accommodating and welcoming, which made my first airbnb experience very positive. I would undoubtedly recommend Marie and Lisa's house as well as happily use it again. And to top it off, the price was very reasonable and made staying here an excellent choice.

I had a really comfortable night at Marie's. I booked very last minute so she was unable to meet me when I arrived, but she had arranged for the keys to be with a neighbour.

The flat is great, very nicely decorated and on a quiet street very close to Holloway Road tube and Caledonian Road station.

Marie and Sally were very friendly and communication was great throughout.

I had a lot of fun staying at Marie's. It was my first AirBnB experience and I couldn't imagine it to be any better. I stayed there for a single night but got that at home feeling straight away. The flat exceeded my expectations, it was cozy and nicely decorated (I couldn't believe when Marie told me the work is far from done). Marie was wonderful, you can't imagine a better host. I felt like I've known her for years. We had a nice chat the next morning and my only regret was I couldn't stay longer.

We had the whole apartment to ourselves. They gave us a great tour of the apartment and made us feel at home. They provided TV, wifi, as well as many brochures about London, trains, buses, and the tube (also had written instructions about all the area information).  We recommend Jaz to everyone!

the apartment was like the pictures, and it was a good stay. but its a bit far from central london. so its not that central. jaz told us to contact er if we had any questions, and she did ( the most of the time.) we diddnt get to see jaz, it was her boyfriend who took care of us, but he was a good host !
so a good stay if you want to stay a bit outside from central london:)

Nice and cosy apartment. Conveniently located next to the National Rail, easily accessible to the City of London. Always good to check the full address with the host prior to departure. We were confused with the unit number and the block number.

Jaz and her husband Dominic were great! Jaz was super fast in replying and answering my questions. She made sure everything was ready for us when we arrived. Her husband, Dominic, was there to show us around and helped us settle in. The flat was exactly the way Jaz described. There were 5 of us and we fit comfortably in the flat. We had the whole space to ourselves and had a pleasant time there.

Very nice apartment and very comfortable!
There was 3 of us and we slept in one bed and two separated couches.
The price was very reasonable for the location.

Very well located (15 mins to waterloo by bus n° 1 every 10 mins)
Well equipped and fitted for 5 (2 ad / 3 children)
We were welcomed by Jaz parents who carefully explained the basics of the stay.
Worth recommending

WOW, what a fantastic experience we had during our short stay, I am so impressed :) Jaz is an amazing host - she allowed us a super late check in and check out, picked up us from the train station AND even took us to the nearest supermarket late at night, to stock up on some groceries - how fab is that?

The apartment is really cute and lovely - bright and very cosy, it looks even better in photos. Everything was absolutely spotless - clean, tidy and fresh. We were even supplied us with lots of toiletries, including creams, make up, etc.

There were 3 of us and we fit very comfortably, the bedroom is SUPER cozy, you just don't want to get out of the bed - it's one of the most comfortable beds I have slept in. The living room has a HUGE sofa bed plus another one, and my friends were very comfortable too. There is also a lovely dining table, which is not in the photos - which is great!

Location is absolutely perfect, away from all the hustle and bustle yet within easy reach of everything - London Bridge is less than 5 mins away by train, how fab! Train station and buses are directly linked to the apartment building via a pedestrian footbridge, so it's less than 2 minutes walk. At night it is very safe and well lit and buses run 24 hours!

Overall we had a fantastic experience and fell in love with the apartment so much, that we already booked another stay :)

Thank you Jaz for being such a great host and making our visit to London so enjoyable, see you soon! Highly recommended.

Decided to book this apartment after 2 recommendations from friends and had a wonderful experience.

Really nice apartment in a great location, less than 2 minutes walk to the station and bus and only 5 minutes away from London Bridge, which was ideal for our group.

Very comfortable, modern and clean - everything you need is provided and Jaz is super nice and extremely accommodating. Lots of space to comfortably fit 5 adults, without feeling cramped.

Plenty of shops and supermarkets in the area, and I would recommend taking route No 1 Bus, as it's super quick and easy and takes you to all major sights.

I would highly recommend Jaz and her apartment to anyone wishing to explore London. Will be booking on a regular basis, as it's very convenient for our needs. SUPER!!

Booked this apartment through recommendation from a work colleague and I am very pleased I did.

Great and clean apartment in a brilliant location, lots of space for 4-5 people. Everything is really close: train station is 2 minutes walk and lots of shops and restaurants in the area, including 24 hour supermarkets.

Jaz is simply fantastic and she provided us everything we needed - towels, bedding, toiletries, wi fi (it's a hot spot so you can use it all over London!!!) - even a great selection of DVDs and Playstation Games :)

I will be booking this apartment again, as it's very close to my London office and convenient to get to anywhere in Central London.

Highly recommended and you can't beat the price!

Had a great time at Jaz's place. We were on our way to Africa to do mission work in an orphanage and had 8 pieces of large luggage, she had her husband come and carry all the luggage up to the flat, since there was no lift.Love the location, So easy to get the train for a 5 minute ride into London Bridge and bus into the city. All of Jaz's recommendations for sights were great especially the Borough Market at Lunch time!! Jaz always answered calls right away and made sure we had what we needed.

Donovan and his family are so friendly. They received us and answered our questions with a big smile.  The place is vey good situated, close to the city center and the stations. The size of the room it's good for two people and the bed it's comfortable. I think the price is awesome if you compare with other rooms in London.
Donovan is a great host. We only spent one night here, but would have loved to stay longer. He was very welcoming, and made sure to make us feel at home.

Me and my boyfriend stayed in this room for three nights. Donovan and his family are very friendly and we felt welcome! The bed is a little creaky but comfortable and big. We had some problems with the warm water but aprt from that we had a good experience. The fact that we felt safe and welcome is a big plus. The walking distance to Shoreditch is another plus, as well as the price.

Donovan was very nice and helpful. Upon our arrival he made us dinner and also shared information about the area and London. The room was clean and comfortable as well as the bath area. The location is about a 10 min walk from the train, not too bad but ladies bring flats! :) You can also catch a bus which runs frequently. My only issue at Donvans is that I left one of my personal belongings in the bath room and when I went to retrieve it, it was gone and never to be found again. Not sure what happened. Also the construction was a early alarm clock. Otherwise, he was very accommodating  the location was very clean/safe and if there was a problem or concern, he was address immediately.

Staying with Donovan was great. He was an extremely hospitable and sociable host that made every effort to accommodate us, including letting us use his laundry machine. The location was very conveniently located near Old Street Station for getting around town, and very close to fun spots around Shoreditch, Hoxton, and Brick Lane. Overall, fantastic experience.
This was my first experiense with AirBnB , Room was as described, Donovan is very nice man with good sense of humour. I will still stay again.

Donovan is a very nice and caring host. He took his car to pick us up at the tube station to spare us the rain. He was always available to give us some tips and information. Besides, the location is great (good neighborhood and close to bus stops) and the room very comfy.

I recommend it !

We stayed at Donovan's for 4 nights ande enjoyed it. The room wasn't as big as it looked in the picture, but it was still good! Donovan is an open-minded lovely person whose knowledge about reggae is awesome! ;)
Donovan is a great host. He's very kind, helped us to find a taxi ride from his house and gave us precious informations. I would recommend him.
Donovan was very nice and accommodating with check in time. Would stay again.

Both Joanna and Marcus are wonderful hosts. They are warm and friendly and very eager to make your stay a plesant and fun one. As we arrived, Marcus baked a cake ( great cook!!) and we all sat around and got to know one another.

Besides being in a great location, the flat is very clean, spacious and has lots of light.

We highly recommend their place!

We enjoyed staying with Joanna and Marcus. The location is perfect, right on Portobello street. It is few minutes walk from the tube station. The room is nice, and we liked the apartment's design, but taking a shower was a bit tricky. The hosts are really nice and helpful. Overall, we enjoyed our time!

What a marvelous wonderful time!
Joanna and Marcus are such lovely & warm-hearted hosts that it just felt great to stay at their exciting house. The location of their trendy house is just perfect and makes it easy to feel the spirit of Notting Hill immediately. Joanna is more then fantastic. Her recommendations for everything we asked for like delicious restaurants, trendy shops, breakfast excitements, sight-seeing hot-spots were just great and made our trip to something special. Our stay was topped by a delicious three course dinner prepared by Marcus. He is a fantastic chef and we shared a wonderful & cozy evening together.
It was more then just a perfect London trip since we got the chance to meet a lovely London-couple that made us feeling happy and very comfortable at their exciting house...thanks for a great time.
We will come back!

Marcus and Joanna are warm and friendly. The location is perfect and
the room is nice and clean, we liked the apartment's design.
Perfect location, great hosts, very clean and stylish modern apt. What else?

Joanna and Marcus are thoughtful, welcoming, friendly and knowledgeable, but more than that they are great people who are fun to stay with. I am not usually happy settling into a B&B - it always feels like someone else's home and I try to be unobtrusive. But after I got over my shyness this couple felt like friends that I'd simply forgotten I knew for a while. I was even welcomed at Joanna's birthday celebration with her family.

The location is great and the room and bath are wonderful - I wouldn't hesitate to recommend to anyone to apply to stay in this home. But I do wish I'd taken more advantage of the friends I could have made in Marcus and Joanna - next time I'll make sure I have time out of my schedule just for them.

Ottima location, in Porotbello Road, comoda per la Metro e con i bus, bellissima casa, fantastici loro due!!! Consigliata :)
/ Nice location, to Potobello road, close to the Underground and the bus stop, nice hause, very very fcool owners! RECOMMENDED

We stayed at Joanna and Marcus' place for one night and had a really great time. Joanna and Marcus are great hosts. They are very friendly and helpful and their house is in a perfect location in Notting Hill. We would love to come again and highly recommend the place to others.

Wir waren vier Tage Gäste in England, London, Notting Hill, aber in erster Linie Gäste von Johanna und Marcus den wunderbaren Besitzern eines wundervollen, stilvollem und sehr sauberen Hauses.
Die Freundlichkeit, Hilfsbereitschaft und Offenheit der Beiden war allgegenwärtig und wurde mit einer solch lockeren Selbstverständlichkeit vermittelt, so dass wir uns von der ersten Sekunde an weniger als Gäste in einer fremden Stadt, als als Freunde gefühlt haben. Die Lage in Notting Hill ist einfach perfekt sehr multikulturell, voller Lebensfreude, unglaublich offen, lebendig und dennoch haben Johanna und Marcus eine Oase der Ruhe geschaffen. Ein besonderes high light und ein Muss für "durchgeshoppte" Knochen ist die wundervoll große Badewanne in der man nach langen Tagen und kurzen Nächten großartig entspannen kann.
Alles in allem kann man nur sagen großartige Menschen in einem traumhaften Haus, in einer grandiosen Stadt....DANKE

The place is perfect. Once you get there you realize that it's the home of an achitecture. Beautifuly designed, Good taste in every corner of the house. It's even much more better than the pictures. You have to be there. The neighbourhood is perfect, with all the markets, bars and shops.
Marcus and Joanna are flawless hosts. Very kind and helpful all the time. We had very nice chats. They make you feel at home.
We wouldn't hesitate going back there.
Extremely highly recommended!!!!

As the first official Airbnb guest to stay in this flat, let me just say that this place a GEM in the heart of the coolest neighborhood in London! The flat is perfect for 1-3 people and has all the amenities you would need or want. David has put endless effort into making it a unique and modern living space with all the comforts of home. The bathroom is entirely brand new and the shower is AWESOME, not to mention the built-in stereo system allows you to hear music not only in the living room, but in the bathroom and bedroom as well (if you want). The bed and sofa are both comfy and the kitchen is equipped with the stuff you'd need to cook a meal if you wanted (but there's so many good restaurants within walking distance, you may not get the chance).

What's nearby? You can walk to both the world-famous Spitalfields Market & Brick Lane Market in under 5 minutes. Thirsty? You've got a great pub across the street from the front door. Additionally, there are loads of great bars and restaurants and you're about a 2 minute walk from the overground station and about a 10 minute walk from the Liverpool Street tube station.

Overall, I'd say this is a fantastic space definitely worth booking for your stay in London!
Another great stay at David's awesome flat!  This place is going to be my favorite home away from home when I'm in London.  You can't get a better deal in Shoreditch.  Thanks again, David!

My two friends and I stayed for a Saturday night in shore ditch and it was fantastic. Cool, mimimalistic flat in the heart of the coolest place in London. David is incredibly helpful and can't do enough for you to make sure you have a comfortable stay. Only downside was the trip was too short, could easily have done another couple of days!!

As my first trip with Airbnb, I wasn't sure of what to expect of my trip to east London, but I couldn't have been happier and more impressed by both David and his home there.

The location is literally a stones-throw from both the lively Shoreditch triangle and the historic market at Spitalfields and couldn't be better for a first experience of East London or your hundredth time there for work.

The house itself is stunning - modern, high-tech and beautifully furnished, far, far closer to a luxury hotel than a house - I'd have been tempted to lock myself in there for the entirety of my stay were the location not so incredible. I'm a real sucker for a cool, modern bathroom, and I have to say I've been missing the shower at David's for a week since I left!

Past the location and the house itself, David's knowledge of the area was also a real help. The neighbourhood is packed with restaurants, shops, bars and clubs and David knew every one - I went for a steak just metres from the house on his suggestion, and it couldn't have been a better recommendation.

Thanks for everything David, I'll certainly be back!

Ted

David's flat was perfect - again!  I have stayed at this flat 3 times on business trips in London and its my favorite home away from home.  I highly recommend it if you are looking for a place that is close to Brick Lane Market, Spitalfields, anything in Shoreditch, and the Liverpool Street Station - which is only a few minutes walk and the central line takes you anywhere.  The amenities in the flat are so nice - and the shower is the best thing on earth.
Lovely, modern apartment in a great location. David was incredibly communicative and flexible. Such a pleasure to deal with. Highly recommended!

Although I did not get to meet David, the communication before, during and after the stay was impeccable - and he was incredibly caring as a host, following up fast during our stay.

As for the listing, the pictures doesn't do it justice. It's modern, clean and with a small, but very practical and modern bathroom - highly recommended! I was also really impressed by David's attention to detail (e.g. having extra towels,duvets,hairdryers etc readily available).

If you are looking for a great experience in the heart of London, David's apartment is the place to be.
The apartment is newly renovated, very clean, fully equipped and has an ideal location - situated on a quiet street in Shoreditch, just minutes walk to the City of London and close to all London's touristic attractions. Another thing worth mentioning is that the wi-fi connection is super fast.
David is a great host, very kind and easy to communicate with.
Can't wait to stay in this apartment again!

The apartment is absolute perfection and the location is fantastic. I really enjoyed my stay. David’s mom handled the check-in and she was so nice and had bought me milk for tea/coffee and gave great tips of what to do in the area :-) David is a great host and answered all my questions. The apartment has everything you could possibly need or want and it really felt like a home away from home. I would definitely go again.

David's apartment was very modern and clean. We had access to transportation lines, and were in a vibrant area of the city with plenty of shops, cafes, restaurants, bars. David is extremely responsive, ensured we had proper access to the apartment and checked in regularly to ensure we were doing well.

I would recommend this apartment for future stays in Shoreditch!

Great staying in London. Really nice street near Hyde Park, and close to almost everywhere.
Very clean room and private bathroom.
We are very thankfull to Robert for the staying, and we recommend this BnB to everyone who wants to visit this city.

The apartment is located in a cozy, nice and quiet alley, but in the center near Hyde Park and the underground. We slept in a new bed and everything was clean. Direct access to the bathroom through the bedroom. A super location! Robert is a friendly, good host and very helpful. He also knows a lot about the history of the place, nice to hear. Most of the time we were on the road, but overall we had access to the whole floor to ourselves. We had a great stay! I would recommend the location to each couple that wants to visit London. Thanks Robert!

Great location literally 200m from Hyde Park!
Bathurst mews is a lovely place with a great atmosphere. Having a glass of wine in front of the house with Robert is a Uniate experience.
The room and bathroom are clean and very practical.

Robert was a very useful host and helped us plan our visits.

We totally recommend to stay with Robert to discover London

Robert was a wonderful host! We had everything we needed and he provided us with lots of helpful info and maps for getting around. The location of this flat can't be beat!!! Hyde Park was a 3 minute walk away, we could have walked to many different sights but most time we chose to take the Tube. We had 2 Tube stations within 5 minutes from us. The accessibility from Heathrow was one of the main reasons I chose this location and it definitely paid off.

After a long flight from the US, we needed a nap. The bed was very comfortable and the room was very clean. Plenty of space for 2 travelers. We had the use of the living room and kitchen as well. Robert wasn't always home so we often felt like we had our own flat. The neighborhood/street was beautiful with lots of gardens and flowers. The neighbors were very friendly...including the Hyde Park horses! It was a wonderful London immersion. I would recommend this location to every type of traveler.

If my wife and I ever travel to London again we will not hesitate to stay with Robert a second time. He is extremely friendly and helpful with a lot of knowledge of things to see and do in London. He has taken meticulous care of his home and the room he provides. The bedroom, ensuite bathroom, and kitchen with living room upstairs are very nice. The location is very good for all the sights and access to public transportation in the city. I highly recommend this place if you are staying in London.

We had a blast and the location was absolutely perfect for first time travelers to London. Especially with ample access to the underground, airport and cafes in the area. A prized location!
Robert was extremely helpful, provided guides and magazines and privacy too. Even gave us a short tour of the area and where to head for a good coffee (which was rare for London).
Room was great for two of us, and facilities very clean.
We hope to return to Roberts place before we leave Europe.

Fomos muito bem acolhidas por Robert, que nos deu informações detalhadas sobre lugares a visitar, itinerários... Muito dedicada e carinhosamente, fêz pesquisas sobre nossos interesses!
A rua, a casa, o quarto, o ambiente todo é muito bem cuidado.
Hospedagem 5 estrelas!!!

We were delighted to stay at Robert's house in such a lovely and quiet neighbourhood. Robert was very kind and gave us a tour around the neighbourhood to a great cafe and some restaurants which we tried. It's only a few minutes away from Hide Park and the Underground station, so it was very convenient for exploring London. The room and the en suite-bathroom were very clean and comfortable. We hope we will have the opportunity to come back and stay there again.

Had a Fantastic stay at Robert's place! As soon as you get into the little ´mews' where is located the house, you understand that you could not find better. The whole place is cozy, very clean, quiet and restful.
Robert is a nice, helpful and friendly host. Very accomodating too ; helped me when I had to postpone a first travel (thank you again !!). Highly recommended...
Will be back for real!

Been many times in London, but never in such a fantastic place as Robert's house. Perfectly located in the city, right in the middle between (3 minutes walk) Paddington and Lancaster Gate tube stations and even less from Hyde Park, Robert's house stands in a marvellous little street, one the of most beautiful "mews" I've ever seen in London: quiet, full of flowers and with its own bench to have your meal outside the house, surronded by an amazing "London set". The house is comfortable and fully equipped and, well, Robert is extremely welcoming, pleasant and friendly. He will give you all the useful advices to stay at the best in the area. Absolutely worth the price, will surely be back!

Such a wonderful holiday! At this price, this flat in Central London is a bargain! The location is great - just a quick bus ride down thriving Edgeware Road to Marble Arch and in a quiet, residential setting. The flat is very comfortable and stylish with every essential convenience and plenty of space. The outlook onto the green lawned common area is delightful. Nearby walks take you to Little Venice on Regents Canal and beyond. Our host Jasmin was most helpful with plenty of tips and advice on the local area to make our stay easy and memorable. We had some great coffee, and great meals thanks to her insider tips! We highly recommend this flat and will certainly be back. Thank you Jasmin!

Jasmin’s flat is gorgeous! The whole interior is amazing and nice! It is very bright and even though this area of London is very urban, when you are inside the apartment you look outside to this lawn with the trees and it is very peaceful and tranquil. The place is very, very clean and nice. Perfectly located (4´ to bus stations 139 and 189; 7' from Edgware station)! In terms of groceries everything you could possibly need is available in the immediate area. There were 4 of us and the two double beds (one sofa pull out) worked well for us. Ewa also provided us with details on where to eat and visit. She waited for us since our flight was 2 hours late in the night, thank you . Jasmin went out of her way to accommodate us, which was great. We are hoping to come back to London and this will be our place of choice.  Jasmin was so helpful with us.  Highly recommended.Hope we can come back somewhen!
Excellent! Was great to stay in this great apartment (again!).

Great place, great location. Jasmin and Ewa go out of their way to make your stay in London the best. They are so organized and professional. They supply you with shampoo, conditioner, body wash, toilet paper, umbrella, raincoats, tea, coffee even electrical adaptors so you can use your appliances. They think about every single detail. The towels and sheets smell sooooo good not even in a hotel you get that. They are on top of things, when you arrive they make sure someone is there waiting to open you the flat. The flat is on the first floor so no problems with heavy suitcases. They setup this flat as if they would use it themselves and it shows.The metro station is not that far and you can be anywhere in London in no time. I strongly recommend their place. We traveled 2 months all over Europe stayed at other airbnb or 9 flats places and this one was the best. You may find a lower price in a hotel but the flat is so spacious and clean is worth it.
Excellence place! Quiet and family friendly location. Easy access via bus and tube to get around London. We definitely come back and stay at Jasmin apartment. Highly recommended.

The flat was great and Jasmin was very accommodating. Our flight into London was delayed by two hours and Jasmin was flexible with the check-in. The flat was easy to find and within walking distance from several Underground stations on the Bakerloo line.

Also, prior to arrival, Jasmin went above and beyond by providing great information on restaurants, coffee shops, pubs/bars, etc. which are near the flat and throughout the city.

We would highly recommend this flat!

My husband and I stayed 2 nights while visiting family in London. Jasmin's apartment is attractive, spacious, comfortable and very well equiped. Jasmin herself could not have been more helpful and had lots of local information. We had a lovely time there and hope to go back sometime.
