The flat was comfortable, clean, and secure, well-located for Tube transport, and convenient for grocery shopping, so gave us the main things we needed, providing us with a great base to work out of during our time in London. Jasmin provided lots of information about things to do and see in London which would be especially suitable for singles or couples. Very no-fuss, and good value for money.
Very nice and clean appartment. Jasmin was very friendly and cooprative. We could even check out later, we had a very enjoyable stay. Ik would come back to this appartment for sure.

Thank you Jasmin for a wonderful stay. The accommodation is super clean, bright and peaceful. A perfect haven after busy days in the city. Local amenities are excellent: parking, groceries, transport and playgrounds for kids. We greatly appreciated the milk and fresh juice in the fridge. We are a family four (with two small children) and found the apartment to be family friendly, safe and within walking distance to London zoo (bonus!). Jasmin's communications were professional and prompt. Really, couldn't fault a thing. We hope to be back again soon!

Kian was a great host!.. very friendly and flexible.
Communications were prompt and precise. Moreover he was very proactive, and ensured that my experience was great.
Stayed for two nights. Comfortable room and Kian made me feel most welcome. The situation is superb for the price. Right next to Farringdon station. Definitely stay again. Thanks Khian. Jules

I recently had a two week stay at Kian's place. You can't be any more central if you tried — just 2 mins walk from Farringdon station in a secure flat. Kian was a great host: He was very responsive during the planning stage, and very flexible to my travel. Though we didn't meet a ton in person, he checked in periodically to make sure all was well. I would note that the room is small, but if you're traveling alone, the convenience and kind host can't be beat!
Great stay at Kian's place. Surprisingly spacious and very comfortable. Kian was an excellent host and provided lots of information and was available to help with any matters.

I had a fantastic stay here -- First off, Kian's place is very well-located. Even though there was a tube strike while I was there, I was able to walk everywhere I needed to go. And when the tube is running, it's possible to change at King's Cross (just one station away) and then take the Piccadilly Line to the airport for a very reasonable fare. Second, his place is clean and well-appointed. The bedroom itself has big windows that let in plenty of light so it doesn't feel as small as it is. Third, Kian is a fantastic host and super responsive. He checked in regularly to make sure everything was okay and to give me recommendations.

I stayed in Kian's flat for one night, and whilst I didn't get the chance to meet him in person, he kept in touch and made sure I was settling in alright.  He was also helpful and communicative before my visit from the initial booking onwards, and was happy to accommodate my preferred check in/out times.  The flat is well located just a few buildings from Farringdon station, making it easy to get around at any time of day.  And even though the room is a single it doesn't feel cramped thanks to the large windows.  I would certainly stay here again and wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to others.

I stayed at Kian place for 3 nights, it was my first experience with airbnb and I was very happy! It is 2 minutes walking from Farringdon station in a very nice street. The room was very clean and comfortable and so the rest of the apartment. Kian was also very helpful: my flight was cancelled and I was till late at the airport, but he was able to accept my reservation at last minute. He also kept in contact to ensure my staying was going fine and I had no problems with the accommodation. I would definitely go back to Kian place! Francesca

I stayed at Kian place for 3 nights, it was my first experience with airbnb and I was very happy!
It is 2 minutes walking from Farringdon station in a very nice street.
The room was very clean and comfortable and so the rest of the apartment.
Kian was also very helpful: my flight was cancelled and I was till late at the airport, but he was able to accept my reservation at last minute. He also kept in contact to ensure my staying was going fine and I had no problems with the accommodation.

I would definitely go back to Kian place!

Francesca

I was in London for one night for training near Farringdon. This was my first airbnb experience and staying at Kian's flat couldn't have been a better introduction. He was quick to respond during the organising and although he wasn't there on the night, he was available if I needed anything. The flat is very close to the tube station and easy to find. Kian had left good suggestions about places to go to in the area and I was spoilt with some delicious goodies that were left in the room I that I didn't expect. The room and bathroom was very clean and comfortable. I would most certainly recommend to anyone to go stay in this room.

I spent a week in London in Kian's apartment and everything went very well.
The location is excellent. Very close to the subway.
The room is small but is pretty good.
The bathroom is clean, very roomy.
There are several shops and facilities nearby.
I loved the coffee that he kindly offered me of his new espresso machine. Great!

Dejligt sted med eget bad. Der var sørget for frugt, morgenmad og kaffe :)

Hjælpsom vært.

Laura is a great host, she puts a lot of thoughts in the room to make you feel welcome.  Really happy to see a bunch of fresh daffodils in the  bathroom.  There were cookies, tea and coffee in the room.  The bed was very very comfortable.  Laura is very friendly and easygoing.   Pub, fish and chips,  supermarket, newsagent and shops are all nearby.  Highly recommended.
Fantastic room in an ideal location for Twickenham. Couldn't have asked for more! Would highly recommend!
Great place and great host. Highly recommend

Clean & comfortable. Laura was helpful leading up to & during my stay. I wasn't there long but the coffee and biscuits were very welcome additions after a long day! Breakfast items provided were a nice touch, and a little cat visitor made me feel at home! Nice to have your own bathroom. Overall a good stay, I would use again for an overnight trip.

로라씨네 가족도 정말 좋고 방 안에 독립된 화장실과 샤워실도 있어서 진짜 편했어요~
좋은 향기도 나고 매일 우유랑 주스, 씨리얼 등을 채워주십니다~ 강추!!!
She is very kindly and friendly!
She take care about breakfast and our conditions everyday.
Also the room is really cozy.
We can take a rest well with cleaning and good perfume.
Their family also very kind to us with smile every times.
So we recommend highly this room!
Great location, lovely home, lovely host! Thanks Laura. Our stay was perfect for what we needed.

I had a wonderful stay at Laura's.  Her hospitality reached far above many "professional" B&Bs.  She anticipates the needs of her guest and everything I could want or need was waiting for me.  Very convenient to Heathrow, this will be my top pick of where to stay when picking friends and family up from the airport.  Thanks Laura, I look forward to seeing you again.
En-suite room was clean, tidy and perfect for our stay. We liked having tea facility in the room. we appreciate Laura's flexibility for our late check-in as well. overall excellent experience.

Laura was a great host!  She was very welcoming and very helpful, especially in regards to letting us know about transportation around the area and meal recommendations.  The room was very clean and nice as well.  I would definitely come back and stay if I ever visit London again.

Nous avons résidé dans l'appartement de Mark pendant 3 jours ce mois-ci. L'appartement vient juste d'être refait à neuf. Il est moderne et pratique. La cuisine est très bien équipée. ll y a deux chambres séparées avec des lits confortables. L'appartement est bien chauffé. C'est très propre. Il est placé à 30 secondes du métro Russel square et à côté de plusieurs commerces. Mark est un hôte très sympathique, il nous avait laissé un panier de fruit frais, du beurre, de la confiture et des bagels pour le petit déjeuner.
We have stayed at Mark's flat for 3 days in December. The flat have just been renovated. It is modern and practical. the kitchen is very well-equipped. There are two separated bedroom with confortable beds. the flat is well-heated. it is very clean. the appartement is 30 secondes far from the Russell square tube and there are many shops downstairs. Mark is a very nice host, he left us a basket of fresh fruits, some butter, jam and bagels for the breakfast.

Première et très bonne expérience sur Airbnb, le logement est spacieux, la cuisine est dernier cri et toute équipée, les deux chambres sont idéales pour un couple avec enfant.
La salle de bains est également bien équipée et l'appartement a été de toute manière récemment refait à neuf.
Sans compter la terrasse dont on a peu profité du fait du temps londonien, avare en soleil ;-)

L'emplacement de l'appart, à dix minutes de St Pancras Station, au pied du métro Russel Square et à cinq minutes du British Museum. Idéal pour ceux qui débarquent de l'Eurostar par exemple.
Le quartier est largement pourvu en supermarchés, pubs, restaurants, cinéma, etc. Tout est disponible à moins de deux minutes à pied de l'appart.

Bref, vraiment une adresse que je conseille, d'autant que notre hôte Mark est très sympathique et nous a conseillé sur notre planning et nos visites.
On sait d'ores et déjà où l'on s'installera pour notre prochaine escapade londonienne, merci pour tout Mark, pour ton chouette studio et pour ton accueil !

Very comfortable and spacious flat! i loved -- the kitchen which is so well equipped, nice view from the windows and the fact that the flat is so good located.There are many shops, cafes and supermarkets around.
Mark was very helpful and attentive. Absolutely would stay there again!

absolutely recommended flat for 4 people ! fantastic located near soho with underground station 50 m from entrance. new renovated !!!

thanks you mark

Nice, clean, and spacious apartment. We were 5 people staying together there, and with two bedrooms (and additional sleeping couch), and two bathrooms it was plenty of space for all of us. Perfect location in a safe area - less than 10 mins with the Tube to several central places in London. The host was nice, and explained everything we needed to know - like how to use the kitchen utensils. Recommended!
War sehr Gut.Danke Mark.

I am so sorry for the delay Mark! Took my a while to figure this out. But my friends and I had a great stay at his place. Very Beautiful and could not have been in a better area. Thank you so much for giving us fruit!! Will definitely stay there again! Thank you for everything Mark!

We stayed for 4 nights in the apartment. It was great. The apartment is well situated, equipped and organised. It is quite spacious and illuminated.
The contact with the landlord was most of the time efficient.

Nous sommes restés 7 jours dans l'appartement de Mark, très bien placé à 40 mètres de la station de métro Russell Square, et 100 mètres du bus. Appartement spacieux, confortable, avec toutes les commodités. Mark est un hôte accueillant et disponible.

Perfect location,clean nice flat for 5 people.
Full equipped.spacious.
Recommend for everybody.
Thanks Mark,see you agin.

Staying at this venue was brilliant! One could not ask for a better host tha Mike, who went above and beyond to make me feel at home, including making dinner for me (which wasn't included in the price), as I was too tired to go out for dinner the night I arrived. The bed was firm and very comfortable, and his two cats made lovely companions. I would recommend highly, and would stay again and again.

Even if we didn't have a lot of time to discuss, Mike was really a nice person. Always ready to help me or to purpose me to eat at home with him. In addition, he was discreet and respected my private life. His home is really close to the St Pancras train station  and the subway. The cost for one night was one of the cheapest purposed on airbnb for London. To sum up: a perfect deal.

Mike is a great host! First of all, before arriving there all the communication between us was easy and really quick answers!
He was waiting for me at the time we agreed and he also gave me his room to make me feel more comfortable for the two nights I was in his place (that wasn't included in the price).
He is an interesting person with who you can talk if you want to know more about London and other interesting topics he manages very well. (He also prepared some tea and toasts for breakfasts before going out to explore London.
The apartment is perfectly located, in the heart of London, really close to King's Cross station, from where you can move everywhere. It is clean and his cats are lovely.
I recommend this place and mike as a host based in my experience. It is a great deal between price, location, apartment and host!
Thanks for all mike!

It was a pleasure to be welcomed by Mike in his so well located flat in London. Warm and friendly host and dedicated to ensure you enjoy a great stay in London. I can highly recommend Mike to anyone looking for a good and affordable place in London.

Mr. Mike es una persona muy amable, muy platicador y todo el tiempo recibí apoyo de él. Inclusive me mostró dónde tomar el autobús para llegar a Gatwick station.  La habitación es muy cómoda y agradable, realmente me sentí como en casa. Sus gatos son lindos y tiene un lindo jardín, además,  en la parte posterior de la vivienda se encuentra el canal que desemboca en el River Thames. El barrio es muy agradable y seguro y muy cercano a St  Pancras International station, lo que te permite viajar fácilmente hacia el centro de Londres. También está muy cerca de varios restaurantes, cafeterías, bares, de la Universidad de Londres y de un super.
Mike is a fantastic host. Made me feel very at home and I will definitely look forward to staying with him again next time I'm in london. Thank you, Mike.. :)

Neighborhood is great & Mike was very welcoming.
Definitely not what I was expecting in regards to room, but it was fine.
Host stayed on couch and offered his room up.

Mike is a very nice host, everything was OK. The apartment is really close to king's cross station (undergroung) and St. Pancras Station (greatly connected with Gatwick airport by train 10£/55 mins).
The bed was comfortable and the room is perfect for a person.

I was extremely satisfied with my stay at Mike's apartment. It was so easy to get there from the station and the neighborhood was pleasant to walk through and easy to travel to other parts of London from. The bedding was incredibly comfortable and the shower was amazing. Mike served me french press coffee with milk and delicious cookies and he had a beautiful garden to enjoy. After my previous stay in a cheap tourist hotel in India, it was truly like heaven. Plus he was such a cool guy and very helpful. I definitely plan to rent from him again next time I'm in London.

I had a wonderful time during staying at Mike's place. He was very welcoming and we had a cup of coffee and a chat for a while when I arrived. He is very interesting person that you can talk about various subjects. He was busy with his fantastic(!) work but he always tried to help me and to make sure everything is ok. :) His lovely two cats are adorable that I had to say 'Awww' when I saw them first time. :) Don't worry about your room. He will make sure that they can't go to there. The room has enough space to put luggages and it was clean. Bathroom was also clean and shower has good pressure which I liked.

The location is super. I've been to London many times but it was best location so far. Many places are within walking distance and bus station which links to Notting Hill, Trafalga square and Covent Garden etc. is in front of his flat. Of course St. Pancras / King's Cross is very close to there. About 5 min to King's Cross and about 8-10min to St. Pancras to me and I don't walk that fast ^^; My eurostar departure time was around 12:30pm and I still could take warm shower in the morning, have a breakfast and go to Oxford Circus and Liberty for my last minute shopping without heavy luggages. Then I came back to the flat around 11:30 and checked my stuff then went to St. Pancras. All in all, a wonderful place to stay. I recommend staying at Mike's flat and I hope I can stay again when I go back to London!

This is a very nice apartment in a great location. you get the small town feel and charm of Greenwich but you are steps away from rail transport to Canary Wharf and London. The pictures accurately describe the apartment and everything on the trip was attended to; everything is within a short walk, including restaurants, butcher, fish monger, grocer and shops.

We really enjoyed our two week stay and recommend this flat for visitors. Thanks Angela and Paul for your hospitality.
A lovely and airy, if small, clean flat in a nice location. Paul and Angela were extremely responsive and helpful. We would happily stay here again.

No. 29 is a very cosy house right in the center of Greenwich. Just minutes from the center and all the visitor attractions and Bars/Restaurants/The Thames. It is easily accessible by all major transport. The owners (Angela & Paul) were very co-operative and helpful with Keys and access etc. I would highly recommend this house to anyone for a short or long term stay. Pat Kelly

We enjoyed our stay in Greenwich in a small but nice apartement containing all the conveniencies one would need. It's pratically situated in a nice neighbourhood close to the river and the Cutty Sark area. Lots of pubs and resturant closeby. Easy transportation to London bridge, 15 min via train. The host was very welcoming and eager to help us with anything we might need. Recommended!

We were met at Caradoc Street by Paul and he could not have been more welcoming & helpful. The house is both cute & stylish- exactly as pictured & described on the website, or possibly even better! We were left milk, eggs, croissants, butter & a bottle of red wine- delightful! The house was perfect for our trip to the O2(we walked & took bus back) & only 40minutes by tube & bus from Paddington. Towels & bedding were clean & of good quality. The whole experience - our 1st with Airbnb -was relaxed based on trust & respect. I would definitely recommend this property to anyone needing a retro, stylish bolt-hole in Greenwich. Thank you Angela & Paul.

We enjoyed a two night stay here to attend a wedding in Greenwich. Three of us  found Caradoc Street comfortable and in a convenient situation for the riverside. The beds were comfy and the host was really friendly and helpful, making sure we had travel info and  everything we needed before arrival. Now I've found it I would definitely use this place again when visiting the area.

Excellent experience. Matched the description although it may have helped that we were already familiar with the area. We were at an event The 02 for 5 days and it could hardly have been more convenient. Lots of buses to get there. Nice street with friendly neighbours and thanks to Angela we were able to park without any difficulty and at a very reasonable price.
The only thing to add to description might be that the stairs are a spiral staircase and perhaps to show a photo...it was OK for us but I can imagine some visiters who would have struggled to even use the stairs. We were made to feel very welcome.

Our 4-night stay at 29 Caradoc Street was absolutely delightful!

We were met on arrival and couldn't have asked for a better host. Paul was really welcoming and laid back, which put us at ease immediately. After a brief tour of the house and lots of really useful local knowledge about the area we were ready to set off and explore.

The house itself is lovely and even nicer than described; really comfortable beds and a fantastic monsoon shower give a real feeling of luxury. The whole house was immaculately clean when we arrived and the kitchen had everything we needed. The patio doors out to the porch are a lovely feature: sitting out in the porch in the evening sunshine was an ideal way to wind down after a hectic day in London.

We had let Paul and Angela know in advance that we had hired a car and they organised a visitor's permit that meant we could park right outside the house (a godsend after travelling from the airport with kids/luggage etc).

The location is perfect: a really quiet street but with amenities like supermarkets, cafes and delicious takeaways all within a 5 minute walk. We had our two children with us and they loved Greenwich - the play areas in Greenwich park are great for younger kids, as well as the boating pond and the views across the beautiful Naval College and Canary Wharf.

Thanks again Paul and Angela, we had an amazing trip and will definitely try to book this house again for any trips to London in future. We were made to feel really welcome and felt completely at home on Caradoc Street and Greenwich is the perfect location to base a family trip to London.
They contacted us before we arrived to make sure we had directions to house. They could not meet us, so they had a neighbor check on us to answer any questions.

Angela and Paul have the cutest house ever. The space in the house is just right for us and we will hope to be again next year. Great location and great house.

Thanks for having us.

Craig et Katherine ont été très agréable. Ils sont très gentils, attentionnés, accueillants ...(et nous avons apprécié la compagnie de leur animal "sausage").
Nous avons que des points positifs à dire sur eux et leur appartement. C'est un couple chaleureux qu'on recommande vivement.
(C'est notre premier séjour réservé sur le site airbnb et n'avons pas été déçus)

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié notre séjour chez Craig et Katherine, dans leur très bel et agréable appartement, spacieux, moderne et tout confort, idéalement placé dans un quartier rénové et moderne, empli d'histoire, offrant un calme bienvenu loin de la cohue de Londres, tout en étant proche du centre, à quelques stations de métro.
L'accueil et l'hospitalité de Craig et Katherine vont au-delà de la prestation, ils sont discrets et respectueux. Soucieux du confort de leurs hôtes, ils fournissent de précieuses et détaillées informations sur les lieux à visiter, les transports. Ils sont adorables. Tout comme la chatte Sausage.

Nous reviendrons !!!

Marie et David

Craig and Katherine are both excellent hosts and wonderful people. It was like staying in a 4star hotel, yet then with a fantastic personal touch. The room was great and equipped with everything I needed. The location was perfect for my trip; only a short walk to Mile End station, which connects to both district and central lines.

Unfortunately due to a mix up with my travel arrangements I was unable to stay with Katherine & Craig.
My correspondence with them was friendly and helpful and I would definitely book with them again.

Spacious, comfortable, bright room with a king-size bed and private bathroom - exactly as it is written.
Craig and Katherine were nice and so hospitable and caring couple.
I can recommend them without a doubt :)
Craig and Katherine are really nice and welcoming! the room is really nice, all is set to have a perfect stay in london, I recommend!

First time using airbnb and I won't be staying in overinflated priced hotels again. Stayed at Katherine and Craigs for one night and it was a great location near to my work. Extremely friendly hosts and I was amazed at how nice and very clean the room was, large comfy bed, great bathroom with all the hotel amenities. I didn't get to use them but there was a coffee machine, lcd TV and xbox. Thanks ever so much guys

Katherine and Craig was really friendly and nice, and the room was comfy and beautiful! The neighborhood was okay with good public transport. And Sausage (the cat) was lovely too! We had wonderful time, only regret is that we can't talk more with Katherine and Craig! :)

It was so fantastic and it cannot be better. That was the best living experience I ever had. The room is nice, clean and big. And the host Katherine and Craig are so nice and helpful. They are always happy to help me. I would strongly recommend this place for your stay in London.

La photo est la chambre ! propre, claire, confortable avec salle de bain et toilettes privés. Au regard du prix : excellent pour Londres qui est très cher ! L'immeuble, l'appartement sont neufs !
Très bon accueil avec un petit déjeuner servit. On se sent vraiment chez soi ! Même le chat est super gentil.
Bref on ne peut pas faire autrement que de réserver cette chambre qui de plus, est en zone 2 !
Je recommande chaudement car très bonne expérience.
The photo is the room ! clean, clear, confortable with private toilets and bathroom.
Excellent price for London as the building and the flat are brand new and clean and secure.
Katherine and Craig are really nice and helpful. Sausage the cat is nice and friendly. Even the breakfast is served.
If I could I would reserve again.
The best address in London which is in zone 2 !
I recommand as it has been a very good experience.

We've just had a very pleasant stay at Rajna's place with my 8 years old daughter. Rajna was kind enough to let us drop our luggage in the morning we arrived and also to leave it at her place the last day until we left. Even if we were out all day and did not see her (and her family) a lot, she's been a very caring host and even checked the trains for our return. The room was as cute as pictured, small but nicely furnished with comfortable beds and a large wardrobe. There were even some Easter sweets for my daughter! There were no other guest so we didn't have to share the perfectly clean bathroom. The whole house was very quiet, such as the street. Wifi internet was fast. Shepherds bush metro station is just a short walk and we could even take the overground from there to Watford Junction for Harry Potter's studio. I would definitively recommand this place and go back next time I'll visit London!

Nous venons de passer un très agréable séjour chez Rajna avec ma fille de 8 ans. Rajna a bien voulu que nous déposions nos valises le matin de notre arrivée et que nous les laissions le dernier jour jusqu'à l'heure de notre départ. Même si nous étions loin toute la journée et que nous ne l'avons pas beaucoup vue (ainsi que sa famille), elle a été très accueillante, a bien pris soin de nous et a même vérifié des horaires de train pour notre retour. La chambre était aussi jolie que sur les photos, petite mais bien meublée avec des lits confortables et une grande armoire. Il y avaient même des bonbons de Pâques pour ma fille! Il n'y avait pas d'autres locataires en même temps donc nous n'avons pas eu à partager la salle de bain qui était très propre. Toute la maison était très calme, ainsi que la rue. Le wifi était très rapide. Le métro de Shepherds bush est à 2min à pied et on a même pu prendre le overground depuis là pour Watford Junction / studios Harry Potter. Je recommande vivement cet endroit et j'y retournerai certainement lors d'un prochain séjour à Londres!

Me and my friend were on a business trip and we had such a pleasant stay at Rajna & Zika’s place. Our working days turned out late but fortunately it wasn't a problem for Rajna & Zika to arrive late in the evening/night. They are great hosts and were helpful. Zika even gave me a boost when I expressed my concerns on some business matters. The room is cosy, clean and comfortable. The area is full of nice restaurants and a tube station is nearby, which is directly connected to the city centre, Notting Hill, Bond Street and Oxford Circus. This house is very well located in London zone 2. Thanks and we would love to meet you again!
Very nice and pleasant place. Not far from London city center. Lots of buses close from Rajna's place. If we go back to London, we will go back there.

Had a pleasant stay at Rajna and Zika's place. The room was basic but clean and comfortable. It was just a 10min walk from Shepherd's bush station with a huge mall nearby and a smaller mall across the road.

Rajna and her husband are lovely people.
Very discrete.
Place very clean and basic. Just what we expected.
Nice neighborhood. Very practical for public transportation.

Rajna made special arrangements to accommodate our arrival time, which we are very grateful for!

The location is superb, as both Hammersmith and Shepherd's Bush stations take are only about a 10-15 minutes walk, and both stations are well connected to major attractions. The fish and chips that Rajna recommends is really the best we had in London too!

As for the room, it was small, but clean and well-ventilated. Clean towels were also provided, and Rajna made an effort to ensure that the bathroom was we--well-maintained even though there were a number of guests using it. Thank you for letting us stay in your lovely home!

We could not recommend Rajna and Zika enough. They are very hospitable. The room is perfect for two people. The house is a joy. The location couldn't be better. We really felt at our ease and so, we had a super time in London. Hopefully, we will be back to stay with Rajna and Zika soon.

We really enjoyed our stay at Ranja and Zika's house. Ranja is a fantastic host. When we arrived we felt so welcomed. As we were out of the house the most of the time we didn't seen them very often, but as soon as we needed some help, Ranja was here to help (Eg: print out some tickets I forgot to print before).
The room is nice. Its a small room like you have often in London. But as we could see, it was the smallest of the three rooms. And, most important: You have a cupboard for all clothes (two woman travelling). So you can store the empty suitcases on to of the cupboard and the tiny room is no problem at all.
The shared bathroom was always clean and the shower is really a gem.
For the location: I eanjoy it to stay at a qiuet place after the rush and huzzle in the center during our sightseeing. We did a lot of walk around Sherperds Bush and Hammersmith and we felt save even during our midnight walk. If you look for a lovely place for breakfast try Bill's at Hammersmith.

Good spot, we can get to the house easily by tube.
Rajna was very kind and willing to help us. The room was small but enough, we were just there to sleep.

The neighborhood was very nice and easily accessible via various public transits. Rajna was a very accomodating host. She had a fresh pitcher of ice water available on my arrival. There were also biscuits and tea. The room was clean and even had a lock on the door. It was a very convenient place to access from the airport. I would reccomend this place to other travelers passing through London.

Locationwise it's going to be incredibly hard to beat: 30 meters away from zone 1 and a tube station right around the corner. At first we were a bit afraid that noise might be a problem because of it, but with the triple glazing: not a worry to be had. The room is nice & spacious, and has a ton of storage - something most rooms will only have sparsely.
Last, but certainly not least: Chris & Leroy were very nice and accommodating from start to finish - one could not hope for better hosts. You really feel right at home from the moment you walk in the door - and isn't that the real reason why most of us use Airbnb.
So I'd wholeheartedly recommend this Airbnb!
Getting a room like this, in this location for this price - it's a steal!

First Id like to say that Chris and Leroy were the best hosts anyone could ever have! From before we even arrived up until the moment we left they treated us like family! From giving us directions and tips on what to visit, to offering to help wash laundry, to sharing the cupcakes Leroy made with us! They even had a different assortment of breakfast choices for us each morning! I have never felt so at home with people that I barely met! The room was great we had three staying in there so it was a little tight but perfectly fine for what we needed! Everything was very clean and put together nicely. There were plenty of towels and even shampoo and shower gel was provided if needed. The place was just a short walk from the White Chapel Tube station which would get you anywhere you needed! I would stay with them in a heart beat!  All in all we had a great time and were sad to leave! Thanks Chris and Leroy for making our first trip to London so great!

First of all, I would like to say that the flat is ideally situated.
Chris and Leroy were great hosts. They gave us really good advices and the house was clean and prepared for guests.
The breakfast in the garden was pretty good, and they were very amicable.
Definitely highly recommended ! I look forward to coming back in the future.

My 3-night stay at Chris's apartment was a great experience. Location is convenient. My hosts are great person whose passion to life is very inspiring (yes, I read the news clip in the kitchen about Chris riding bicycle traveling to Amsterdam with his tow dogs, raising money for charity purpose. And I talked with with Leroy who is an artistic person, who creates fantastic cakes). Chris is the best host I could ever expect. He bought two packs of coffee powder because as a coffee person that's the only thing I must have in the morning. And he also sent me great insiders recommendation of East London's street art. It was terribly warm in London when I was there but Chris and Leroy always turned on the fan in the room before we came back home. I didn't see Chris a lot but we always had good communication via email. I highly recommend this room, its host Chris and his partner Leroy.

Chris and Leroy are welcoming, endearing hosts. They make you feel at home in what remains very much their own home (this is about sharing the bathroom, the kitchen and the lovely but packed garden with ease and grace). They go out of their way to help you understand the area and to make the most of your stay in London.
The room itself is big and comfy, and the triple glazing does guarantee a quiet night in a very lively area. Whitechapel is both an ideal base for visitors as Central London is within easy reach, and a little world worth exploring in its own right.
All in all, a most enjoyable stay with most enjoyable people.

There are several reasons for recommending this accommodation. The location is well connected with all sorts of transport and within walking distance from several London highlights. Surrounding area is very quiet but only few minutes walking from Brick Lane and Shoreditch. The room is spacious with a lot of place for storage, very clean, accompanied with nice bathroom, kitchen and beautiful garden. But the main reason for this recommendation are Chris and Leroy. Their superb hospitality made our stay unforgettable. Starting from tea, coffee and breakfast we got each morning, through help with anything we needed (even washing our clothes),  to care that made us feeling like we are in our own home. We already miss our wonderful hosts, and certainly want to visit them when we will travel again in London. Thank you very much Chris and Leroy.

Chris and Leroy made us feel very welcome in their gorgeous home. We were offered a cuppa as soon as we arrived and shown where everything was whilst the kettle boiled. Chris came home from work and explained some of the local history and explained the best methods of transport to get around the area. We asked for a suggestion for having a meal out and he gave us good advise and also a great red wine to take and have with our meal. We all felt very relaxed and welcome in their home. I doubt you would get better hosts anywhere. Most impressed.

La chambre est bonne, la maison très bien tenue et Chris et Leroy sons très attentifs. Comme nous sommes allés pendant une semaine chaude, a été très agréable de pendre le petit-déjeuner et le diner au terrasse. Il est vraiment une bonne maison pour rester à Londres

Chris and Leroy were great hosts and made us feel very much at home with a chat, glass of wine, and help with all our questions! The flat is very comfortable and they even provided tea and coffee supplies in the room in addition to an amazing breakfast! The East London neighborhood of Whitechapel is vibrant, very convenient to the underground, and close to all the trendy cafes, restaurants, and shops of Brick Lane and Shoreditch. Awesome place and hosts! Highly recommended!

As a first experience with Airbnb I was overall satisfied. Good reception and treatment. Neighborhood pretty quiet and in a convenient location just minutes from the city center by metro, however, a few steps from the house.

Very friendly and helpful person.
Stylish, clean, newly built and quiet location.
Fully equipped bedroom (large cabinet, TV, dresser, chair)
Attractive view from balcony, and facility to eat/sit outside.
6 minutes to walk to Pratt Walk bus station.
Modern windows and full blinds
Gary's place is fantastic - very relaxing, very well-appointed, and very conveniently located.  The bed's comfy, and Gary's an easygoing host.  I'll definitely stay here again if I can.

The Gary' apartment is perfect to take some rest after the long working days. The neighbor is so quiet that you could enjoy the balcony.

Gary was a great host, we had very interesting talks and he would have left me alone if I wouldn't have come to him and talk (very much appreciate).

Finally, they are several good, fair-price restaurants around his apartment.

Thank you again!

Gary was an excellent host and his flat was in a great location. Very friendly, welcoming, and accommodating. He even provided us fresh fruits, croissants, tea, and coffee.

While we didn't get to chat for very long because of our busy schedule, you can tell how great of a person Gary is. In addition, his flat is impeccably clean. We were provided fresh linens, a closet, & TV, although we didn't need to use them that much.

Would definitely recommend Gary and his flat anytime
Very stylish flat. Nice view from the balcony. Only 15 minutes by bus from door to piccadilly. Gary was very friendly and helpful. He has our full recommendation.

Amazing host and amazing apartment.
So helpful and kind and really great to chat with (lots of laughs!), but still felt like had total privacy and freedom to stay in a a bubble if we wanted too. Lots of great advice for visiting london too!
Gary left the daily newspaper at our door and got us a converter for our camera charger when we couldn't find one!
We also really appreciated how helpful he was when we had to repack cuz of ryanair fiasco!
Thanks so much for a great getaway !!
We will be back!

Gary is very friendly host, despite we don’t had much time to chat, we fest very welcomed. Gary friendly offered for breakfast fresh fruits and croissants. It was very easy to communicate with Gary via airbnd.

Apartment has great location and great view from balcony to London eye, its perfect place for breakfast or just to chill outside in the evening. The bed was very comfee, whole apartment was very tidy and stylish and we feeling was like we are at home.

Would definitely stay another time and we recommend to others!

Gary is a really great host. His flat is very nice, super clean and stylish! He respects the guest's private zone. We had a busy schedule in London, so we couldn't talk with Gary so much, but he was always friendly and helpful. He gave us fresh fruits, snacks, drinks and newspaper.
His balcony is simply amazing. His flat is near to the Big Ben, London Eye, so almost every famous attraction is close.
Our room was very comfortable, we also got towels and shampoo too.

It was our first airbnb experience, and we are very satisfied. Everything was positive! Gary has our full recommendation.

Gary was perfect host. Very friendly and helpfull.
Appartmen is superclean, tidy and very modern (it actually looks even better than in pictured). Great view from the balcony for late evening tea or coffee. Towels, shampoo and free fruits and snacks in the morning.
Flat is situated in lambeth area. Great location not far from Big Ben, London eye, tube stations and nearby bus stop.
Everything was perfect! Would definatelly stay again :)
Thanks!

Gary was a good host. Received me very well and took all my questions with great tranquility. My English is bad, but even so he was patient and able to talk well.

The house is comfortable and beautiful. She is very well located. The room is great, I managed to get plenty of rest. This is very important, because I spent all day visiting many tourist spots in London and it is tiring.
During my stay I could not talk much with Gary was because most of the time away from home.

Ervaring was goed. Mooie ligging en uitzicht is erg indrukwekkend. Je moet wel 3 trappen op dus hou daar rekening mee. In de woonkamer is een halve etage ingebouwd waar een slaapplek (2 personen) van is gemaakt. Slaapt eigenlijk best wel goed maar je wel eerst via een trap naar boven.
Ligging is uitstekend. Dicht bij restaurants, winkeltjes, supermarkten etc. Als je met de auto komt kan je op afstand van ongeveer 5 minuten rijden gratis parkeren (als er nog plek is). De eigenaar legt wel uit hoe je er komt.
Lovely house, lovely views, we did't want to leave. Willing to come back soon!

Gemma was a lovely host. The flat was spotless and she left all the essentials, plus a few goodies for our stay. The location was perfect, on the river, and just next to all the shops and restaurants. Hard to believe, but the view of the river was even more captivating in person. It's the perfect retreat.

The house at 35 Petersham Road is very well located. Right in the heart of the town center, surrounded by lovely restaurants. Just 7 minutes away from the Railway station by walk, 5 minutes from Richmond Park, 15 minutes from Kew gardens. And the river Thames flowing right by the side of the house - the sight of the river from the living room window was wonderful. One could not ask for a better location.

Gem was personally present during the check in. House was very neat and clean. All listed items were available. In addition, a microwave oven was supplied on request the very next morning which was of immense help.

Considering that it was a new acquisition for Gem, it was admirable the way she made us absolutely comfortable with her helpful and non-interfering attitude. The family get-together at London after so many years was a satisfying experience due to this comfortable stay.

5 stars.

We enjoyed staying at Gemma's special apartment very much. The position is near to the river, nice pubs, shops and restaurants, and it is ideal to explore Richmond town and Richmond park.
Going up the narrow "English-style" staircase to this beautiful top floor flat was quite thrilling. I fell in love with this place at first sight.
As we are with a small child, Gemma provided us toys, baby bed and a lot of helpful information. We appreciate Gemma and her family's warm hospitality very much, Thank you!
Die Wohnung ist schön, mit dem wundervollen Blick auf den Fluss. Gemma hat uns sehr nett aufgenommen und war jederzeit hilfsbereit, so dass wir eine sehr schöne Zeit in Richmond verbracht haben.

We were Gemma's guests in August 2014 and had a great time despite the not very good weather. Though a bit far from London to commute everyday with two kids, it is a great location and a beautiful neighborhood. We loved it and wished to stay longer. The house was almost like on the photos, some furniture was changed. The kids loved the bedroom that was accessed by a ladder. The apartment was clean and so were the bed linens and towels.
Bus number 65 passes right in front of the door and takes you to the station which is also easily accessed by 5-10 minutes walk.
Gemma even helped us to arrange a babysitter for a night out without the kids.
Kind host, nice apartment, great location ! We hope to be back :-)

Perfect location, beautiful view.  Thoroughly enjoyed my short stay. Gemma was very organized, helpful and communicative.  Everything went very smoothly with the practical arrangements.  Oh, and did I mention the location and the view.  Recommended.

Gem was very accommodating and the flat perfect: spacious, luminous, and conveniently located just a 10 minute walk from Richmond station, which will get you anywhere. The view shown on the listing is exactly what you see, making for a wonderful ambiance.

Das Apartment entsprach genau den Angaben - sehr schöner Blick, gemütlich und sauber. Ideal geeignet für 2 Erwachsene und bis zu 2 Kinder. Schlüsselübergabe war ebenfalls problemlos. Alles in allem ein sehr schöner Aufenthalt. Vielen Dank.

Excellent place to stay in the heart of London in Soho. Very interesting and hip area, great restaurants and close to the best shopping in London. Christine is a very accommodating host who really goes out of her way. The place is very nice, though the bed is only a single (very comfortable, but is only big enough for one person. Definitely would return
Exactly as described and more. Great location, flexible check-in time, and a wonderful and friendly host. Would highly recommend. Thank you, Christine!

Christine is a great host and her apartment is just perfect to spend a couple of days in London.
I was there in August 2017. The apartment is very centrally located and within short distance of public transportation, restaurants and just everything you need. Although very centrally located, the room is really quiet and I could even sleep with open window.
The overall experience was just perfect. Very nice and clean apartment, perfect surroundings, and a very nice and approachable host.
Thank you very much Christine!

I stayed at Christine's place for four nights and would go back if I visit London again!
The location is superb, right in the heart of SOHO area and most of the sights (e.g. Westminster Abbey, Hyde Park, British Museum, etc.) are within walking distance. The Piccadilly Circus tube station is literally 1min away, which is on the same line as the Heathrow Airport and King's cross train station, thus very convenient for traveling to other cities. There are numerous restaurants, cafes, pubs and shops in the neighborhood. You'll have to carry luggage up one floor of stairs but that seems to be common for historic buildings.
The apartment is full of stylish, interesting antique furnishings. The bedroom is not big but enough for solo traveler. The single bed is super comfortable with soft linens and natural light from the window. The bathroom is right next to the guest room.
Christine is very welcoming, caring and warm-hearted, which made a real difference to my stay. She prepared a good variety of fruits during the day as well as lovely breakfast. She provided a lot of interesting ideas on what to do in London, and it was a pity that I did not have time to do all of them. I totally enjoyed talking to her and felt the genuine friendship with her.
Christine is a lovely lady who made me feel very welcome. She couldn't do enough for me. Thanks for being a great host. Will stay again for sure. Fab location. Lovely house too!!!! :)
Christine is an excellent, present hostess, and provided me with the privilege of staying in her beautiful, clean flat. I'll be sure to stay with her again.

This place is perfect for the solo traveler! The room was lovely with a lot of natural light and the bed was very comfortable! The flat was in a great location in a safe neighborhood with easy access to multiple tube stations. Christine was a wonderful host! I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and I highly recommend Christine's place!
Perfect Host,very friendly and communication was quick with a lot of information, this beautiful little flat is perfect for single person.

Really great host and lovely house and wonderful location.
I must stay here again if I would visit London again.
너무나 친절한 호스트이십니다. 조식도 제공해 주시고 편의도 많이 봐주십니다. 주인분과 함께 지내지만 불편함이 전혀 없도록 배려하십니다.
그리고 숙소가 런던의 가장 중심가에 위치했고, 고풍스럽고 사랑스런 집입니다.
강력히 추천 드립니다.

I stayed 2 nights at Christine's flat.  This was my first airbnb stay and quite positive.  She was friendly and accommodating.  Everything was very clean.  Chris even ironed my sheets!  The location was great and central to so much.  Even though you are staying in a busy and vibrant area of town, the bedroom is very quiet.   She was very good on communications, such as giving precise directions from the Tube to her place.  She was flexible about my arrival time, too.  Her apartment is charming.  I would stay again.

I made a booking for my parents. They stayed 9 night at Michaela's place. The stay was really enjoyable. The area is very quiet.
Michaela is really generous and helpfull. The room is lovely with the access on the outside.
They really recommend this airbnb !

A beautiful, clean and very well presented room, I was made to feel very welcome by Michaela who is a wonderful host.
The room had a coffee machine with ample supplies and there were DVD's available, the en-suite is lovely and the terrace is very cute. can't recommend it enough,
I will defiantly be back.
What a lovely oasis of tranquility just 10 minutes away from the buzzing streets of London. I highly recommend Michaela's en-suite.
Fabulous host
I had a lovely stay at Michaela! Highly recommended.

Michaela war eine tolle Gastgeberin. Ich kann sie nur empfehlen. Sie ist sehr hilfsbereit, zuverlässig und ganz unkompliziert. Ich habe mich bei ihr absolut wohl gefühlt.
Das Zimmer hat ein eigenes Bad und eine tolle Terrasse - wie auf den Fotos.
Islington ist ein tolles Viertel mit vielen Pubs, Restaurants und Shops.

Micci is absolutely wonderful! She made my first Air BnB experience amazing! She immediately made me feel at home and was so willing to offer advice, good conversation, an umbrella for rainy days, and a good cup of coffee or tea. I would definitely want to stay with Micci again. The room was just as promised: clean, cozy, comfortable. I loved having the garden patio to sit and relax in at night. The neighborhood was lovely: quiet, safe, easy to get to places from. I would highly recommend Micci and her wonderful converted dairy! I'm just sad I didn't have more chances to chat with Micci. But that just means I'll have to return to London in the near future!

Bonjour,
endroit agréable ou Michaela est a votre écoute. Idéal pour un couple souhaitant découvrir Londres. la terrace est super mimi, grande chambre et belle salle de bain.

This was a wonderful place to stay.  The room was clean, and bright with lovely furnishings.  The bathroom spacious and clean. And the terrace was absolutely lovely!   As was the host Michaela.  She was very welcoming and helpful.   We had lovely chats (she was so easy and nice to talk to) but she was also very respectful of privacy.  I also found the location perfect for my needs.  It is situated in a very quiet part of a great neighborhood (Islington--Upper St., Camden Passage, etc) with wonderful coffee, food, and shops close by.   Its also  close to Regent's Canal--I went for a run along the Canal out to Victoria Park every morning.  It was accessible by 2 tube stops, Angel and Highbury/Islington.  It was exactly what I was looking for.  I felt like I was part of a neighborhood and not a tourist.  I am super excited to have found this place and Michaela, and will definitely use this listing again the next time I'm in London.

J'ai été très bien reçue par Michaela et me suis tout de suite sentie à l'aise chez elle.
Sa maison est accueillante et la chambre correspondait parfaitement à la description.
Le quartier est résidentiel et tranquille, très bien desservi par les transports publics.

My stay in Leslie's house was just great. She provided me everything I needed, from a very nice breakfast, to a comfortable and cosy room, with ensuite!
She is really an extraordinary person, so generous and always helpful!
I definitely recommend to stay at her house, located in a nice and quiet area of Chiswick (beautiful area of London)!
Hope to see her soon again!

Leslie and her husband were very welcoming to their lovely house in Cheswick. The room is excellent and includes a private bathroom. The house is well located for numerous restaurants and pubs. Breakfast was with the family and an other guest. Good conversation!
I would recommend staying with Leslie :)

Quiet location, room perfectly outfitted with spacious en suite bathroom.  Leslie a gracious hostess, like having your own pied a terre in London.  Quiet, clean and close to transport.  Will definitely stay again

Leslie's home was absolutely beautiful. We couldn't have asked for anything more. The room was fabulous and the bathroom was so luxurious.
The bed was more comfortable than our own bed!!! It is walking distance distance to everything, bars, restaurants and cafes.

I had a wonderful stay with Leslie in her beautiful home. The room is wonderful and has everything you could need.
Leslie was always offering assistance with anything she could help with and it was greatly appreciated. I highly recommend staying here if you need to be in or around West London, the tube is very close by so you are very well connected to the rest of the city.
Thank you very much for making me feel so welcome during my two night stay Leslie.
Rhys :)

I'd like to thank Leslie for wonderful stay we had at her house. Leslie is an incredible host, generous and always helpful, and she made us feel very welcome. The house and the room is just great and has everything you might need. It is located in a quiet neighborhood and is close to the subway station, so can easily get around.

I highly recommend this place for anyone and will definitely stay there again next time I'm in London.

Leslie and her husband were perfect hosts. They have a nice house in a quite quarter of Chiswick.We felt more like old friends of the family than paying guests. Our room with ensuite bathroom was clean and fully equipped. Healthy breakfast with muesli and fresh fruit. We got perfect support and a lot of tips for our sightseeing in the town.
We can recommend the accomodation by any account.
Like having your own quiet pied a terre in Chiswick

Leslie, Ian and the fabulous 4 legged Bilbo were most welcoming hosts and their home is simply gorgeous. It's in a lovely area, perfectly suited for travel to London and surrounds, close to a  busy and vibrant shopping area with an abundance of restaurants, cafes and pubs. After five and half months touring the UK and Europe we were in need of a wind-down and this was the place to do it.  Mind you, we still packed in a lot of sightseeing including the theatre to see "The Play That Goes Wrong", just one of Leslie's spot-on recommendations.   We'll definitely use this one on our next European adventure . . .

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié notre séjour chez Leslie qui nous a accueillis chaleureusement. Leslie et son mari sont très sympathiques et très attentionnés, et leur jolie maison très confortable est située dans un quartier très calme. Un endroit idéal et que nous recommandons pour se détendre après les visites au centre de Londres. Anne (Paris).
Oleg kindly received me at his apartment and made sure I had the electrical adapters I needed.  The apartment was nice and quiet and right near the King's Cross Underground Station.

Oleg & Mel were great hosts. No hassle, great communication, nice & easy. The room was exactly as described & in a great location with bus stops right outside & Tube stop just down the road - we were in Camden town within 10 minutes! Very helpful, pleasant & friendly hosts - I would definitely recommend!

The directions Oleg gave were awesome.  The apartment is about a five minute walk from the Metro Station.  Oleg and his wife are very kind and open.  Though I only stayed for one night, it was very comfortable.  Great bed and great place to stay.  Thank you!

Bij aankomst stond de verhuurder en zijn vrouw ons op te wachten. We werden met open armen ontvangen, rondgeleid en naar ons kamer gebracht. De kamer was schoon, netjes en was vooral lekker rustig in de avond. Het centrum was goed te bereiken op loopafstand, maar er stopt ook een bus C2 voor de deur. Ik zou de kamer aanraden als je lekker budget wil zitten in het centrum van London.
Oleg's aparment is very nice: clean, cosy and great location.

Both Oleg and Vanessa were very welcoming and friendly. They are perfect hosts happy to share their kitchen. I had no problem going in and out at odd hours. My bedroom was very comfortable and clean. WiFi was excellent. Their baby is so adorable. For central London it is a perfect location.

A perfect solution for visit London for few days (for business or vacation). Oleg is a practical and discreet guy and really helpfull.
The entire house is REALLY clean and essential.
The position is awesome and the district is really peacefull.
What can I add? I think is the best solution quality/price that you can find if you've the intention to visit London for some reason.
Thanks so much Oleg!
Nice clean room and great location. Oleg's wife was very sweet and helpful. I am definitely coming back again!

I was very happy with my stay, and I liked it better then the hotel that I stayed on the first nights!

Oleg was very helpful!

I will fully recommend renting a room at this apartment!

We spent 2 nights in the room and we enjoyed it a lot. The room was perfect, clean and cosy. The location is very central, 15 minutes to Oxford Street, bus station for busses going to Victoria is right in front of the house as well. The hosts were very welcoming and friendly, everything was nice and uncomplicated.

What a lovely place to stay in.  Such a beautiful house and a lovely room.  Great to have additional places to spend time in as well.  Isabelle made us feel extremely welcome and made us an excellent breakfast each morning. Very clean and homely.  Quiet street in Fulham thats very close to local shops and transport.  Loved this place so much it was hard to leave.  A great london-life experience that can't be felt in a hotel .

Our experience in London was great! Isabelle has quickly shown its readiness and kindness by giving us detailed directions to his home. The house is very comfortable and is situated in an area of London among the most beautiful. In addition to being well connected, you can find nearby pubs, restaurants, markets useful and interesting. Every morning Isabelle prepared us the superb breakfasts! Our stay was surprisingly special because we were able to breathe and enjoy London, not as tourists, but as travelers,through the exchange of views and feeling with our brilliant host.
Thanks a lot Isabelle
Patrizia & Luigi

Nous avons passé un excellent week-end chez Isabelle où l'accueil était très chaleureux. Nous avions notre propre clé et nous sommes senti très libre. La maison est idéalement située, au calme à 5 minutes à pied de la station Fulham Broadway. La chambre est accueillante et lumineuse, et nous avions, si besoin, accès à un petit salon. A recommander !
Isabelle is such a great host. Thoughful, kind and willing to help. The house was charming and both bedroom and bathroom were undeniably confortable and clean. I will certainly come back.

I had an absolutely wonderful stay with Isabelle! Isabelle is so kind and welcoming, giving me lots of tips on getting around. The place really is more than just a room, with the use of a beautiful, artfully designed sitting room, dining room and kitchen as well as the bedroom. The place was spotlessly clean. The bed was super comfy, I had a great night's sleep. Isabelle serves a wonderful breakfast too. I was travelling for work so it was a very brief stay, I only wish I could have stayed to enjoy Isabelle's place longer. The location is fantastic, with lots of bars and restaurants and transport very close by. Highly recommended.
Good experience! Convenient location, clean and tidy room, and friendly landlord!! I will choose here again when I visit London next time. Very nice!!

Unfortunately I had to forego my place on this trip and my friend went with another friend instead. They were both thrilled with the Isabelle and the accommodation. As soon as they arrived they text me to say it exactly as shown in the photographs and later, that Isabelle was lovely. A hit and one I look forward to experiencing soon. Thank you Isabelle for looking after my special friends.

Isabelle is the most gracious and helpful host you will ever find. She is so friendly and able to help with problems and planning transportation routes around London. The flat is exactly as described...very spacious and tasstefully decorated. Isabelle makes it feel like a home away from home for a traveller. She is delightful to know and extremely tactful about visitors privacy. The neighborhoods of Fulham Broadway and Parsons Green are very pleasant and an important addition to a travellers knowledge of London. The flat is convenient by Tube and bus to all of central London. A bonus is that the Thames and riverside walks and historic parkland are a short stroll down Bishops Road. The location, the flat, and the caring host make this hard to beat.

Isabelle is a hospitality host. We had a quite enjoyable stay at London. Before the trip, Isabelle provided us many useful information. Although our flight was delayed and caused some trouble, Isabelle waited for us till late and gave us a warm welcome. The decoration of the house is nice and beautiful.  And it is very cosy to live in such a house. If travelled London next time, I would come back again.

My entire experience with Isabelle was phenomenal! Her flat was clean, beautifully decorated and spacious. Fulham was a great neighborhood (safe and easy to get around). I really appreciated having our own bathroom and living room, as well as getting breakfast each morning. Isabelle was very informative, offered great food and bar suggestions, and even showed me around the neighborhood. The best airbnb experience I have had. Highly recommended!
I saw Oleg only for a minute before I departed, but his wife,baby and the other guest staying there made me feel extremely welcome. It will be my 'first call' place to stay whenever I visit London.

Oleg, his wife Vanessa and their adorable baby princess are all happy people. In their presence you feel happy too. Oleg is always there when you need him. If you don't, you almost never see him. He is like a superhero! The house was beautiful, the room was tidy and clean. I never used a bus or tube from their location, cause everywhere I wanted to go or see was so close. Planning to book again when I go back to London.
Oleg was a wonderful host. It was a nice area and the room looks almost exactly as pictured.

This was my first time staying with airbnb so I can only compare to all the hotels. It was a great experience. The place is wonderfully central and close to beautiful Regents Park. Very quiet and the room was very nice, with a big comfortable bed. Oleg and his wife Vanessa are very welcoming and make staying there delightful and easy. Sehr zentral, direkt am schönen Regents Park. Zimmer und Bett sind sehr schön, bequem und absolut sauber, wie auch die ganze Wohnung. Nur zu empfehlen, auch wer wie ich dies noch nie probiert hat! Top.

Me ha encantado Londres! Ha sido muy poco tiempo pero ha estado muy bien! Oleg, su mujer y su niña encantadores! La casa está muy bien situada , muy cerca del metro... todo esta muy pero que muy limpio! Recomiendo esta casa a todo el mundo! Gracias!

Oleg was a great host, he really made me feel at home.
The room was spotless and so was the bathroom.
I would totally recommend it.

Oleg seems to be a nice, easy-going guy who lives with his wife and baby on the first floor while your room will be on the second floor with a separate bathroom. The room is clean and ok, the location good, the housing estate looked a bit rough to me at first and the apartment wasn't so easy to find but for a short stay it's absolutely ok and the price is more than fair.

I've been to Oleg's house just one night and I'm sorry I was in such a hurry because he's been an amazing host, kind and helpful.
The house is in a very good area close to the beautiful Regent's Park and to Camden.
It is also clean and so much comfortable.
I'm sure I'll go back there next time I'll be near

Oleg and family were VERY nice and accommodating.
The room was as advertised, comfortable and clean.
The location is excellent, within a few minutes walk of the underground, and the C2 bus (a few minutes ride to SOHO) is at their doorsteps.
A very positive experience. I told them I'll recommend them to my friends

Great host and location, loved my (short) stay here!
I definitely recommend it, especially if you enjoy running, Regent's park's right next door.

Jenny was very welcoming and provided us a clean, lovely room in excellent condition. The whole house is fully refurbished and very clean. Jenny has offered us a wide variety of breakfast like cereal, yoghurt, toast, orange juice, etc. I recommend staying here to everyone.

La habitación de Jenny es exactamente como publica en su anuncio. Aún mejor, porque dispone de un armario empotrado para poder dejar la ropa, dos ventanales geniales que dan a la tranquila calle en la que vive y mucho espacio vital. El lavabo está justo al lado, no hay que hacer ningún desplazamiento a otra planta. La casa está totalmente reformada. Es muy bonita y acogedora. Está todo muy limpio y sobre todo, sobre todo, la cama es de lujo total. El colchón es muy cómodo, de manera que se descansa genial después de un día de visita por la ciudad.
La casa se encuentra ni a cinco minutos de la estación de Victoria. La ventaja de su ubicación no sólo es que está muy céntrica, sino que además se encuentra en una calle muy tranquila, sin apenas tráfico, de casas típicas. En una de las esquinas hay un pub muy auténtico. Y en las dos, tres calles colindantes, hay todo tipo de servicios (restaurantes, supermercados, etc.).
Jenny es una gran anfitriona. Nos ha atendido muy bien, y nos ha dado siempre y en todo momento las indicaciones que le hemos pedido. El último día, cuando ya habíamos hecho el check out nos dejó la llave de casa para que pudiéramos volver a buscar el equipaje por la tarde. Su hijo es una monada!
El desayuno está bien completo: nespresso, tes, pan, mermeladas, cereales de todo tipo, fruta, zumo, leche, yogurt... genial para empezar el día.
La verdad es que ha sido una experiencia genial en todos los sentidos. Nos encantó que Jenny, el último día, nos sentara y nos preguntará qué mejoraríamos de su estancia. Tiene muchas ganas de hacerlo bien y eso se agradece muchísimo.
El precio de la habitación, con el desayuno incluido, está muy bien en relación a los precios londinenses y sin olvidar que está en pleno centro.
La valoración final general es de excelente.
Beautiful house in a great part of London. Jenny was welcoming and thoughtful. Comfy and quiet room, the chocolates on the pillow was a lovely touch.

Nous étions un couple à passer quatre nuits chez Jenny. Nous avons été accueilli comme si nous étions à la maison avec une petite attention à notre arrivée.

L'appartement est bien situé, à 5 minutes du métro ou du bus. Un supermarché est disponible dans les rues alentours ainsi que de nombreux restaurants et pubs.

La chambre dans laquelle nous avons dormi est spacieuse et le lit y est très confortable.

Jenny propose un petit déj avec un large choix (pain, confitures, beurre, céréales, fruit, yaourt) et est très agréable
Le rapport qualité/prix est parfait.

--------------------------------------------

We were a couple to spend four nights at Jenny . We were greeted as if we were at home with a little attention to our arrival.

The apartment is conveniently located 5 minutes from the metro or bus. A supermarket is available in the surrounding streets and numerous restaurants and pubs.

The room we stayed in was spacious and the bed is very comfortable.

Jenny features a breakfast bar with a wide selection (bread , jam, butter , cereals , fruit, yogurt) and is very nice to his guests.

The price / quality ratio is perfect.

Jenny was a lovely host and the room was clean and nice. She gave us a spare mattress so an extra person could stay in the room and was very helpful with advice of places visit. The house is nice and airy and the family made us feel very welcome and Jenny even went out and bought extra food for breakfast when we suggested it!

The house was really central and plenty of nice restaurants to go to nearby when we were too tired to search further afield.
We had such a lovely days stay with Jenny! Highly recommend her place!

I spent three wonderful days at Jenny's house. She and her parents were really wonderful with me.

Thanks a lot

Jenny and her family was the sweetest host I have ever had. Communication prior to our arrival was extremely smooth and she provided me with very clear directions to her house. Upon arrival, Jenny, her adorable son, and her parents greeted my friend and I with open arms. The bedroom is very spacious and the king-size bed felt like I was sleeping on clouds. The shared bathroom was very nice as well. In the morning, she provided us with breakfast (toast, yogurt, cereal) and tea/coffee. She made sure we were comfortable and she gave us suggestions on places to see in London. The location is very convenient as well as it is walking distance to Victoria Station. I recommend this listing to anyone looking for an enjoyable stay in London.

Jenny made me feel exceptionally welcome at her lovely home.  The room was large and very clean with a very comfortable bed.  There was plenty on offer for breakfast, including proper coffee!  I would very much recommend staying with Jenny.
The room is clean and cozy. The location is also convenient. I believe that i will choose there next time when i visit London.
Todo a sido perfecfo, el sitio muy acogedor y limpio. Seguramente voy a volver reservar la habitacion cuando vuelvo a Londres. Gracias por todo y hasta pronto.
Richard and Oakki were fantastic and we had great time together, the house was lovely. i strongly recommend it to everyone

Lovely house in a nice area. Very clean and tidy. The lock to get into the house is a bit tricky but was very secure. My friend broke her ankle while we were in London and they were very accommodating and helpful during this time. Oakki cooks really well and her and her husband are both lovely people. X

Richard was an awesome host. He was very detail oriented and focused on making sure our stay was comfortable. He was great in staying in touch as well leading up to and during the stay. Everything was as described. When it came time for us to leave, Richard gave us important tips on how to get to the airport in the early morning hours. If we go back to the London area, we would definitely like to stay here again.
Richard and Oakki were very friendly and a place was wonderful. Everything was clean and just as described. Recommended.

Being a guest of Richard and Oakki was very nice. The house was clean and in top standard. I only met Oakki and she was very kind and nice. Next time I will give priority to stay with Ricard and Oakki. It was very nice to receive a welcome card. Thanks:).
thanks to richard and oaki for your hospitality , you were really kind . the room although a little cold was cozy and clean . thanks for everything guys , I hope the next .

Richard made us feel very welcome! He decided to host us at the very last moment only an hour or so before we arrived and was very quick to respond; he was a real life saver for us! The room was very cozy and the bed was very comfortable. The room is just as it looks in the pictures and they had even put out 2 water bottles and candy bars as well as a small welcome card which was very thoughtful. We didn't have much time to chat because we arrived so late and left early, but they seemed like a very nice couple and we would definitely stay there again when we come back to London!
Richard and his wife was welcoming. They have a lovely home. The room was very comfy, nice and clean.

Richard and his wife are lovely people, very caring and very relaxed! As soon as we walked trough the door we felt at home. The room and bathroom are clean and comfortable. Is slept like a rose! The view of the historic school is super pretty. Going to Londen center is also very easy just take the bus 58 or 330 to  forestgate station and take the train and in 10 minutes your at liverpoolstreet station. I recommended this place to al my family and friends. Thank you so mush richard for making mu stay a lovely one

Richard and his wife Oakki was helpful whenever I needed. We had a nice Thai-level spicy dinner :) all together with other guests. The house is better than it looks on the photos, large, clean and newly furbished. Although the room is small it has everything you may need for a short stay. For travelers: It takes 10 minutes walk to nearest Upton Park tube station. No use of kitchen is allowed to cook.

Fantastic last minute booking  tha came to my rescue at the right moment! Immediate response, accurate description and directions and a very warm and friendly welcome from Richard and his lovely and always helpful wife :) I had a really comfortable, easygoing and fun stay! Quiet neighbourhood right in the middle of Forest Gate station and Upton Park station and buses like 25 tha takes you right in the middle of Oxford st. through Bank. Stratford station is not far either and it takes you almost everywhere!

Little quiet room in Forest Gate in a new refurbished house with bathroom as described. Not good for ones looking for something spacious or with big suitcases.
Bus 25 takes you to Oxford Street and the centre of London. Train station with trains to Stratford and Liverpool street.
No use of kitchen. In the area no good locations to eat. Several little shops for washing, cut hairs at affordable prices.

Due to my travel schedule, I didn't have a chance to meet Richard. However, his wife was very thoughtful and I appreciated her hospitality. It was great knowing that she was able to do my laundry while I was out and about. It saved me so much time that I didn't have. It goes without saying that the place was clean and organized. Thanks so much!

Very nice place where to stay...the house and the room were very clean warm and comfortable...Richard was very friendly and gave me a lot of suggestion on how to move around London...I would recommend to anyone

The hosts were very welcoming and kind. Due to our respective schedules we didn't get to talk much, but they were available in case I needed anything.

The place was spacious, clean and comfortable.

Thanks to you both!

It was my first exp with airbnb. And i had a great weekend in London. The apartment is situated near the bus stops and metro station. Its like 25 minutes to get to city centre.
Richard and his wife are kind people that always helped me when i needed. The room and a bathroom are clean and it's a quiet place, só nothing disturbs you when you sleep..

Richard and Oakki's room was exactly as advertised! While small (it is a single), everything was to a high finish, the room was warm and clean, and I couldn't have asked for much more for the very reasonable nightly price. The bathroom (downstairs) was clean and again to a high finish, and most importantly - the shower was great!

The area had a pub nearby (five min walk) where I could get breakfast and dinner each evening, and the quick walk to the bus stop meant Stratford, with its transport connections and Westfield shopping centre, was only a ten minute bus journey away.

Oakki and Richard even cooked me dinner one of the evenings, which was very generous and the food fantastic!

I would not hesitate to stay with them again - recommended!

Ollie

I stayed in this single room in East London for four nights, hosted by a good looking couple and their cute little dog. WiFi connection was great (about 20 Mbps of download speed), the room and the bathroom were both very clean and the hosts were very helpful. They did not impose any unreasonable rules, they let me stay out late and they were not intrusive in any way. The location was very convenient since there were overground, underground and bus stops and stations within a 15 minute walking distance and there was a 24 hour bus service to and from Central London. Overall experience was great and totally exceeded my expectations.

Nice, cozy, warm and extremely clean bedroom with a very comfortable bed. + separate bathroom for me personally. Water and candies were in the room upon arrival, which was very nice. Came late at night (after 11pm), nevertheless Richard gave me a warm welcome. There is a nice friendly small dog in the house. The house is in 5-10 min walk from subway station. Neighborhood is quite, Tesco, other shops and cafes are on the way from the subway station to the Richards house. In general I am totally satisfied with the experience. Thanks a lot!
I had a really good time in london and in the elisangela's home, it was really pretty and good located, in a word: perfect!
Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt bei Lisa! Die Wohnung liegt sehr zentral, es war sauber und in der Küche waren alle Küchengeräte vorhanden. Lisa hat auf Fragen immer sofort geantwortet.

Joli appartement, bien décoré et relativement spacieux.
Appartement propre et bien équipé.
Emplacement pratique (métro, bus et magasins 24/7 très proches)

Bien reçu avec les serviettes de bain et le savon à disposition.

conforme à la description

seul bémol, la pièce en facade (canapé lit) est un peu bruyante la nuit (mais çà doit être pareil partout dans Londres et c'est le revers de la médaille d'avoir l'arrêt de bus si proche)

merci pour le séjour.

Excellent accommodation.  Rooms are clean, uncluttered, and everything worked perfectly.  Location is 10 metres from Tube station, which makes extremely convenient.  Lisa was easily accessible, friendly and very accommodating.  I'll use this every time I come to London.
Great location, great flat, well furnished and perfectly clean. 4 adults and a baby. It Was perfect. I définitly recommand.

L'appartement est très bien situé, à deux pas du métro.
Tout est très bien expliqué dans l'appartement. Très propre et très bien équipé. Je le recommande fortement.

A estadia foi otima. O apartamento eh bem confortavel. Tudo estava bem organizado e limpo quando chegamos. A localizacao nao poderia ser melhor pois fica do lado da estacao de metro. Lisa foi bem atenciosa conosco. Recomendo este apartamento para quem esta em busca de um local ideal para se hospedar enquanto desfruta as atracoes que Londres oferece.

Appartement très bien situé à deux pas de la station de métro, a deux pas de l'arrêt de bus, a proximité de nombreux commerce. Appartement propre, bien agencé, agréable. Nous avons était bien reçu, l'hôte est très arrangeante, disponible.
Beaucoup de service dans l'appartement et d'accessoires.
Seul petit point négatif appartement assez bruyant, a cause des autres locataires qui se pense seul.

All during our stay was perfect; the apartment was spotless, with towels and gel for each of us. We had everything we could need.

The location of the apartment is excellent, barely 10 meters from the Borough station and 10 minutes walk from London Bridge. Right in front of Starbucks and two supermarkets, where you can do the most urgent purchases.

Ah! And next to a pub where you take the last pint of the day;-)
