Lisa has been very attentive to us, being an excellent hostess.

If I return to London, I will definitely contact Lisa.
Lisa estuvo atenta a solucionar cualquier requerimiento. El departamento muy comodo y lindo, tal cual muestran las fotos. Muy bien ubicado.

Caroline has prepared almost everything we needed for us. I can almost say her place is the ideal home for me!  I enjoyed our talks by the fire. The neighborhood was quiet, nice, with characters and convenient. I hope we could go back again. The best Airbnb experience I had so far. Thanks so much Caroline.:-)

Caroline is a very sweet person and she lets her guests very free and comfortable in her house. The house room/house description was accurate and it is less than 5 minutes walking from the Finsbury Park Underground Station.

Caroline est une hôte charmante et très accueillante.
Sa maison est ravissante et la chambre est très confortable.
Elle avait tout prévu pour qu'on ne se perde pas à Londres : Plan de la ville, du métro et Oyster cards.
Juste une précision : en arrivant du métro (Arsenal station) on tombe sur une autre maison numérotée "50" en début de rue. Ce n'est pas celle-ci,mais celle d'après, 5 minutes plus loin.

This room is cozy, comfortable and with a great garden view, just as the decription says. Really quiet as well, even considering its proximity to the tube. Caroline has been a wonderful host, available and kind, always going the extra mile to meet our needs.
The place is located in a quiet neighborhood, practically next to the Finsbury park station, meaning we would always be no more than 20 minutes away from whatever destination we fancied (zone 1 and 2).
It is also easy to reach from the airport, wether it's Stansted or the other international hubs.

We really enjoyed our 3-nights-stay at Caroline's house. She did everything to make us feel at home and was always happy to help when we had any questions. The room is really nicely furnished and even has doors to the garden, in which we could eat breakfast and enjoy the weather.  All in all, we can definetely recommend staying at Caroline's!!
I really enjoyed the house it was a lovely part off London and Caroline and her son were very welcoming

It is a pleasant experience staying with Caroline. The flat is small but the room is very comfortable and well-equipped. The towel feels soft. From every detail you can see Caroline is making her effort to make her guest at home.

It is nothing like staying in a hotel and that is exactly a B&B is about. Staying in someone's home makes your connection with the city more real.

The location of Finsbury park is handy. Caroline's house is very close to the tube.

Caroline was very nice, receptive and helpful ! We were very well welcomed by her !

The proximity with the tube was great and in about 15 minutes it was very easy to reach the city centre.

The bedroom was comfortable just like the photo shows and the bed was excellent !

However, we were somewhat disappointed by the overall cleanliness of the flat, especially the bathroom. There were many cats in the flat and the cat litter was very close to the bedroom. As a matter of fact, we were often bothered by the bad smells.
Caroline was a fantastic host. She was super welcoming but gave us our privacy. The room (and whole house) is gorgeous. We really felt at home. And the kittens were so adorable!!

Mi experiencia en casa de Caroline fue muy buena. La casa es muy rollo inglés, con comodidades y acceso a todos los servicios. Nos lo puso fácil desde el principio. Casa muy bien situada en zona 2 con fácil acceso al centro y a las principales estaciones de metro.
Disfrutamos mucho viendo jugar a los gatos pequeños y el jardín nos resultó muy agradable.

It's a really nice and beautiful house. Very quiet room. Good location and transport links.
Richard has always answered promptly to my requests.
Recommended!

Detailed information for public transportation.
Very clean and tidy single room.
Easy to find the house.
Nice couple : )

Richard was welcoming and helpful. The room was exactly as advertised, very clean and modern. The location was good as there are a few different stations to choose from. I would definitely stay there again

Comfortable  single room, easy walk from the tube station and good value. Was only there for one night and good for what I needed. Only little drawback is that you can hear the guests staying in the next room but not a problem if they're mindful not to talk til late!
I will definetly recommend this place. Comfortable room in a very nice house. The host, Richard was very kind and make me feel comfortable.

Decent location. Nice room. Great Price! Richard and his wife were super-friendly. The room was bright and clean with a shared bathroom. Overall, highly recommend his place for the price and helpful, friendly hosts.

Richard was a lovely host, very friendly and nothing is too much trouble.  He answered my queries quickly and made me feel welcome from the moment I sent my request.  The room is perfect for my needs.  Clean and quiet, with a lovely bathroom just across the corridor.  The tube is only ten minutes way and it takes approximately 20 mins to reach the centre of London.  The nearby streets have plenty of shops and takeaways if you fancy a bite to eat.  All in all I had a great experience and feel happy to return again and again.

Richard and Oakki were very accommodating of my check-in time, and their house was immaculate and comfortable. The neighborhood puts visitors between several transportation options for convenient access to different parts of London, too.

Nice place.
It was clean and very quiet.
Although I had issues for checking in (I got lost and checked in very late) Richard was still friendly and nice.

I felt with complete freedom, like being home.
Good

Once again it was nice to stay at Kian's place, I could prolong my stay and use house facilities as needed, Kian was always very kind, responsive and ready to help. The neighborhood has proven to be perfect for my business needs, well placed and reachable. The bigger room with double sized bed and en-suite bathroom was large and comfortable. A home feeling all along.
Only issue was airbnb that seemed not to realize I was prolonging my stay in the same room, forcing silly tedious steps before the booking was sent through while charging usual costs and compulsory exchange fee. So 1 star for airbnb this time but definitely 5 stars for Kian's hospitality!

Nous avons passé un séjour fantastique chez Kian. L'appartement est encore mieux que sur les photos, le quartier est génial (restaurants, pubs...) et quasiment au pied de la station Farringdon. Kian est très attentionné, nous ne l'avons pas vu pendant notre séjour mais il a toujours su répondre rapidement à nos questions et demandes.
Nous recommandons vivement ce petit coin de paradis au cœur de Londres!
Kian was welcoming and communicated well, the flat clean and well maintained.
Kian's place was really comfy and has a nice homely feel. Kian himself was really helpful and replied to my messages really quickly :) will definitely stay there again when I visit London

Kian was incredibly helpful. He responded very quickly to a last minute request. The bedroom is spacious, has natural light, a desk to work. The bed is big and comfy and the private bathroom is very convenient. The flat is nice and clean, and in a great location. Kian provided detailed directions to get to the flat as well as some recommendations for food in this nice, safe neighborhood. He also facilitated hairdryer, iron, towels. Definitely recommend it!

Spacious room and en suite, very conveniently located near the station and for buses. Kian was very helpful and communicative and there was easy access. Comfy bed with nice clean linen and a very handy Dyson fan which kept me cool during the hot weather.

The space was well located, within walking distance of most sites and great food and coffee options nearby. Room itself was clean and comfortable. Kian was very communicative, appreciated him checking in.

With the train and subway station 2min away from the apartment, Kian's place was perfect. Our first time in London so we wanted to see everything. Easy to move around with the tube. Cosy apartment and clean bathroom. Kian was very helpful and easy to contact. There was another guest staying in the apartment, but she had her own bathroom. Will definitely recommend a stay at Kian's!

Positive experience, the flat is really central and well connected. The room is big and kitchen is a true value added. Kian was also kind to provide me two towels set and precious advices about the neighborhood. Ps: pay attention to don't lock yourself out of the flat.

Space was exactly as described and in a very convenient, central location of London. Kian was always quick to respond to any questions and made us feel very comfortable.
Thank you!
Accueil chalereux

Diane is a terrific host. Nothing too much trouble. Especially when I checked out yesterday and left my phone behind. Had to take the train 100 miles back to London today to pick it up and was met with sympathy, a glass of wine and a warm hello from Diane's two dear little dogs - thank you!
I chose to stay at Diane's for my last two working days in London as her flat is near where I used to live and walking distance to our offices. The room is beautiful, luxurious, with two bedside lamps. A crystal water glass and fresh flowers were lovely touches. The (large) window looks over the gardens at the back so there's hardly any traffic noise, and the (double) bed is very comfy. Plenty of storage.
It's altogether a great base from which to see London - safe, central and a great local atmosphere. Lovely parks, pubs and restaurants and a cinema nearby. The Churchill on Kensington Church Street does very good Thai food. Only a few stops on the Central Line tube to Oxford Street, and the flat is right next door to the Notting Hill Gate Underground station.
I spent a lovely two days here. Diane makes a point of saying that the flat snd room are small, and it's not a big room, true - but it didn't feel small. Maybe because it was so thoughtfully set out. I would love to stay here again and would recommend it highly to anyone looking for a central place to explore from. Lovely!

Diane est très accueillante. La chambre est propre et douillette. Conforme à l'annonce. On s'est senti à l'aise et nous avons pu discuter un peu avec Diane. Le logement est charmant et très très bien situé.  Diane is very friendly and helpful. The room is comfortable and as the description. I recommand. Lovely flat ans very good place to move to London. Thanks Diane.
A supremely comfortable bed in a lovely and strikingly quiet room and a charming host. A very good night's sleep. Thank you.

Diane is a wonderful host, very welcoming and helpful - we felt quite at home right away! The room is small but cosy and the area is perfect for a short stay in London (the flat is two minutes away from tube station Notting Hill Gate).

Also, a very comfy bed and the room overlooks a garden, so it is rather quiet. The only drawback would be a low water pressure in the shower, which is not very convenient for washing long hair.

A perfect room for animal-lovers, in a beautiful area of London!

Diane is wonderful host;she is very helpful and very kind.
the very nice clean and comfortable accommodation to move to the city.
if I'll be back in London I will choose yet this place.

My daughter and I had a great time in London!  Diane is very kind. The accomodation is small but very pleasant, beautiful and nicely decorated. The location is absolutely perfect: only one minute away from tube station Notting Hill gate and close to Portobello Road!

Diane is a lovely hostess. Felt really comfortable and looked after. Very cute dogs too! Room is quite small, but wasn't a problem and was the easiest Airbnb flat to get too - amazing location. Thanks for a lovely stay!

Diane was such a fantastic host, really one of the best I have ever encountered.

I booked her place for my dad as we were unable to find a suitable airbnb together.

Firstly, Diane was extremely polite, welcoming and accommodating. She came down to meet us and brought us up, even offering to help us carry my dad's luggage. Upon arrival, she was extremely sweet, offering us drinks and most significantly, she went out of her way to help my dad book a cab to the airport the following day as he wasn't feeling well. She did this patiently and kindly, and even offered to help me book one should I need any help, despite me not staying at her place.

My dad also feedbacked to me how thoughtful Diane was to bring him an extra blanket as it was particularly cold that night, and even offered him a hot water bottle to ease his aching back. All that Diane did for us extended beyond the normal duties of a host and made us feel extremely safe and welcome. My dad and I were wholly heartened by her kindness, thoughtfulness and sincerity, and will definitely choose her place to stay again if we make a trip back.

Location-wise, Diane's home is literally a 1 minute walk from Notting hill Gate tube station and was extremely convenient. Her home was cosy and beautiful.

Thank you for your hospitality and help Diane!! We are so sincerely touched by your kind actions and definitely recommend your home to all potential travellers!!!

Diane welcomed us and was most conscientious about our prearrangements & during our stay. She accommodated in every way she could and even had a bouquet of roses in our small room,  with such a nice view! She is clean and conscientious and was located in a most convenient, yet quiet area, near Kensington Gardens. Diane is a special hostess!

Unfortunately due to a mistake on my part I did not get to stay at Irene's place :( However, the price was good and her contact was quick, friendly and super helpful. I'm sure she would have been a great host!

I had such a warm welcoming. Katia was so pleasant and helpful. She gave me great advice on how to use the tube and the bus system. Gave me can numbers just in case. I saw everything I needed to see on the list and found London to be a great experience. I would love to come back and spend more time there on my trip around London. And the ride from the airport to there place is very easy.  Convent location for anything and everything. Thank you so much for the stay.

This experience was lovely!  I needed a place to stay that was close to Heathrow as I had an early morning flight.  The gals sent me messages to make sure they'd be home to welcome me, and when I was delayed due to a passport crisis, were beyond helpful with that as well.  Offered me some food when I arrived since I hadn't had a chance to grab dinner.  Neighborhood was alright, but it wasn't a factor in why I was there.  12 minute walk to Hounslow Cental Tube Station.

Nous ne sommes restés seulement 2 jours mais avons passé un très agréable séjour.
Irène était là pour nous accueillir. nous ne l'avons pas revu par la suite par rapport à son travail dans la restauration, mais sa colocataire qui parle très bien le français a été super sympa, elle nous a amené boire une bière dans un pub et nous avons pu manger ce typique fish and chips.
Le logement est très bien placé à quelques arrêt du métro de l'aéroport de Heathrow et arrêt de bus à proximité. il faut environ 25-30 minutes en métro pour ce rendre à Londres.
nous remercions encore Irène et nous recommandons ce logemen.t

I stayed 3 months with Katia and Irene and I could have never imagined better hosts! The room is bright and you have everything you need. The hosts are very supportive and help you when ever they can. Dinner and chats, always a pleasure. But if you wish to be on your own, that's not a problem at all. Supermarkets and bus station you can reach in 5 minutes walk, tube station in 15. The tube takes you to central London in 40 minutes and to Heathrow it's only 15. But the plains are not very disturbing. I made friends in this house and will definitely come back to my home away from home!
Irene was very welcoming, friendly and made me feel right at home. The room was very nice, spacious and the bed was comfortable. All in all a fantastic experience.

My husband and I stayed with Irene for a week in Hounslow and we had a great time.  Irene provided us with tea and coffee in the room and it was very clean!  It's about a 15 minute walk from the tube and there are some cute pubs in the area.  Thanks Irene!
Nice apartment in excellent location near to airport. Friendly host and good facilities.

Irene is a very accommodating and friendly host even though I did not get to meet her in person. The house is very clean, which is very nice and also very near the airport, with a bus to heathrow terminal 5. Thank you for the stay Irene!
Very well furnitured modern house. Perfect location and surrounding area. Lovely welcoming host. I would be pleased to stay again one day.

Laura was an excellent host. Although my booking was last minute she was extremely helpful and friendly. The room was very comfortable and clean with excellent facilities. I felt very at home and was a lovely place to come back to after long days work.

Laura was a perfect host, very welcoming and warm and she radiated a lovely energy along with her beautiful home.
I felt total comfort staying there and the room was so peaceful and had a very relaxing and pure feel to it.
I felt all the little touches she added were great to assist a stay.
I would highly recommend her and her home to anyone looking for somewhere lovely to stay it is exactly as advertised and more ..
A pleasure ! And I look forward to staying again.

We had a lovely stay with Laura. She greeted us with a smile and made us feel very welcome. Flexible with last minute change of timings and never late to reply to any questions. The room itself is perfect. Self contained with everything you need. Thank you for a great stay.....fully recommended x

Laura was very warm and helpful, she is a wonderful host!
The place was exactly what you would expect from the posting.
Great neighborhood with its own "plastic pub" near by. 25 punds Uber ride to London Center.


We hope to be back soon!!
Great host, very helpful and friendly, lovely big room and 10 min walk to train station into the city.
Lovely but short stay with Laura. Bright, clean room and very well equipped. Great location - will stay longer next time!  Thanks for making me so welcome.

I had a fantastic stay with Laura, I have used airbnb several times now Lauras place is right up there with the best. The Double bed was very comfortable the room was Beautiful. Laura has made a fantastic effort to provide for her guests with Breakfast cereals coffee and tea all available. Laura has provided luxury accommodation at a very affordable price. I highly recommend staying at Lauras she has done a fantastic job
Laura was a wonderful host and we had a great stay. The room was lovely, well equipped and exactly what we needed for a weekend away in London. Thank you for a great first Airbnb experience!

Laura is an awesome hostess! She anticipated our travel plans from the airport to her place and gave excellent directions that got us there in less time and for much less money. The space is better in person, and is loaded with "creature comforts." Laura greeted us warmly and had lots of great suggestions for everything we wanted. The bed and sheets were incredible! We were only there for 1 night, but we awoke completely refreshed and ready for our 15 hours of travel the next day. In all, we had a very pleasant experience. Would definitely stay here again.

Excellent all round.

A warm and friendly welcome, after I got 'lost' - it's Runnymede Close, not Runnymede Gardens, just next door...

The accommodation is really very good, and difficult to criticise at all. A nice light and spacious room, though it would be crowded if the sofa bed was also in use. Everything was spotlessly clean, and in perfect condition.
Double bed comfortable and nice bedding.
Decent bathroom with good shower.
Kitchenette very well equipped, with breakfast essentials included.
And lots of little extras like a big bowl of fruit.

The best accommodation I've found, and at under £50, worth 6 stars out of 5.
The place was fantastic , walkable to tube station , great hospitality by Katherine, cozy room , spacious house .. Would revisit again and happily recommend to family and friends.

Our stay at Katherine place was a great pleasure. Such a lovely person who took really good care of us. Her place is just amazing. Such a great style, Cousy, clean and with a great character. We loved it the second we saw it from the outside! Thank you Katherine for being so nice, worrying about us arriving late and that we are save! We surely are coming back:)

Katherine is a super great host. She is so nice and caring. Just 2-3 mins walk from pimlico station. Very convenient location. I would definitely revisit here and recommend this spacious and cozy place to others.

Katherine is a lovely host, friendly, prompt to respond and provides everything you need- including fluffy dressing gown! Her house is very easy to get to, the bed was very comfy, tea & coffee  facilities available all day & a nice breakfast included. She will definitely be my first choice for future London stopovers. Thank you, Katherine.

Katherine has a beautiful place, spacious and a bath tub. She welcomed us with open arms and we were greeted warmly. The bed was comfortable, even for a tall person, the breakfast was a nice touch to the stay. I would definitely recommend Katherine and her place, I will choose her next time I am in London!

Staying with Katherine absolutely made our experience in London extraordinary. First of all she graciously awaited us for our 12:30 AM arrival. Her home was everything it appeared to be on the website and much more. The classy decor, comfortable bed, and robes made us feel so at home. Katherine invited us to help ourselves to tea, coffee, bread and jam, and fruit morning and night. She also warmly gave us suggestions for dining and feedback on our plans which was very helpful. She truly felt like a friend. In terms of location, ideal! Her home is located on a quiet street, a 10 minute walk from Victoria Station and a 2 minute walk from Pimlico Station. Katherine's home is a few blocks walk to many wonderful restaurants, and walking distance to Buckingham Palace, Westminster Abbey, St. James Park, and much more. We can only say staying at Katherine's elevates your experience of London!

Katherine's place was beautiful, clean, and cozy, and she was flexible and very welcoming. Breakfast and coffee were lovely and the location was great. Better than a hotel-- I'd stay here again in a heartbeat!

Katherine is a wonderful host. I felt like family. She has excellent communication and attention to detail. Wonderful home, great conversation, can't wait to come back to London to stay again. 100% recommend. Back to California for Now. Also great location to Underground and Central London.

Katherine was an excellent host!  Very responsive, helpful, and friendly!  Her home is beautiful, well-kept, comfortable, and in an ideal location for touring the city of London.  It's walking distance from many of the popular sights like Buckingham Palace, Big Ben, Parliament, and Westminster Abbey.  I had an excellent stay with Katherine and would recommend that anyone visiting London, especially if you're traveling alone, consider staying with her!  :)

My colleagues where very happy with their stay at Katherines, she made her beautiful home available and made them feel very welcome.
Thank you Katherine, I´ve bookmarked your place for future visits.

Ray is an absolutely fantastic host. He was very kind, understanding and great to chat with. Ray made our arrival and departure so easy for us and was just a pleasure to deal with in general. His home is really nice, clean and comfortable, and the location is one of the best in London. A number of tube stations are only a few minutes walk away and the area itself has loads of amenities too. (The bed was also very comfortable and the bathroom, shower were all very clean and really good too.) Thanks again Ray!

Ray's place is very nice and is in a perfect location to travel to the centre. It's comfortable and clean and Ray is very accommodating.
I would definitely go back

Staying at Ray's place was great! The house is located near two tube stations (arsenal and finsbury park), which was very helpful.
Ray was kind and nice every time we met (we even called him once to ask something!), Sabrina was cute - We will be back the next time we'll come to London!

Ray was a fantastic host, from nice little personal touches, to a warm, comfortable and clean space. We felt so at home! Ray was attentive and approachable and his house very homely. 10/10 will be trying to stay here again on my next visit to London!
Nice place to stay if you appreciate privacy. And a nice small garden to sit and have coffee.

Rays place is extremely close to Arsenal station (3-4mins walk). It's a nice room with two windows and Ray was hugely hospitable, nothing was too much trouble and that was delightful. Even had tea and coffee making facilities in the room!

Place ideally situated for visiting London transportwise. Nice, quiet neighbourhood. Shared bathroom as indicated, but totally separate bedroom, light and rather roomy for a couple, silent floors and doors. Very hearty, outgoing and helpful landlord. Overall, we can but recommend the place.
Margaret & Jean-Marc
Excellent place, just as described. Finsbury Park is handy for public transport. The room is clean. Ray is a super host and I look forward to staying again.
Great place

La casa di Ray è a due passi dalla stazione di Arsenal sulla Piccadilly Line . In poche fermate si arriva in centro. E' inoltre a 15 minuti a piedi dal quartiere di Angel,  uno dei più trendy di Londra, pieno di ristoranti e bei negozi.  Da vedere lo stadio degli Emirates e Highbury Park, incantevole in ogni stagione.

I highly recommend this property. It is a beautiful, modern and very clean news house set out over 3 floors. Rhian is a delightful host - friendly and willing to ensure you enjoy your time in London. It's a perfectly relaxed atmosphere and you'll have as much privacy as you wish. The location is ideal - close to Regents Park (great for runners!) and a short walk to Notting Hill. An excellent Air BnB experience. I have rebooked for my next stay in London.

The choice of living in a London Mews is a quiet and peaceful one, given London’s frantic, noisy pace – so Rhian’s 3 storey home offers great respite. Tucked away in Maida Vale Rhian runs it like a Lancashire clock. While it’s a healthy-hike to the nearest tube or overland, buses are bang on the doorstep.

The near by little Italian Da Daniela bistro and The Truscott Arms Hotel (run by theatre producers) are a short walk and v. good value. Further a-field is Notting Hill village, the ubiquitous Portobello and organic grocer at Clifton Gardens. If getting physical is your thing the Porchester Centre gym-pool is great value.

Back to the clock – Rhian’s a pro and will sort you out in no time – her dog which looks like a button, made of wool, is pretty cute to. Not sure if they are both Welsh but the Welsh are habitually friendly and accommodating. Plenty of guests blowing through to, who make it interesting if you enjoy a good conversation, so plenty of positives for the traveller.

The house was great and well located near a bus stop and an underground stop. The house was really nice, the room was spacious and everything was clean. The best part was Rhian the host. She made me feel at home, she was really warm and helpful with everything y needed. I would definitely recommend her and her place.

Rhian is a very good host with a lovely dog. Her house is exactly the same as you see on the pic. She provides a lot help during my stay, including showing me the underground station, Pottobello Market, taxi company. And she replies very fast whenever I need help and advice. Overall, staying with her is quite nice experience.
I appreciated the mews house atmosphere and the quiet neighborhood. I never slept so well. I will, for the next London trip, almost certainly decide for Rhian's house again.

A very welcoming host, a comfortable bed and a pleasant bathroom.  Coffee, tea, juice, milk and toast and marmalade all thrown in.  Close to shops and the canals of Little Venice.  The tube is a 13 minute walk...but trains come every couple of minutes to the West End on the Bakerloo Line.  Rhian is a delight and proudly shows off her work as a professional photographer.  Highly recommended.

Rhian was very welcoming upon my arrival to her home. I got a little lost on the way and she noted that she could have met me someplace to make it easier. I'm glad I made my way, but I thought what a kind gesture. The place is just like the photos. I was very comfortable and felt secure as there is a lock on the room door. You get access to a lovely kitchen and living space as well. The bathroom was great, big bath and glass shower. I really liked my time there and recommend it if you are spending any time in London. I wish I could have stayed longer!

Rhian was great! She came and picked me up, which was amazing. During my stay she was very friendly and helpful. The room was bright and comfy, which a really nice bathroom and shower. It was a very spacious place that felt very comfortable to be in. Rhian's little puppy was such a sweetheart too! It was very walkable to close food and bars, and easy to get to the bus and tub. stations. I would highly recommend staying here.

Lovely house close to Royal Oak, my bedroom was very comfortable and quiet, the bathroom with both shower adn bath was very good. Rhian is very welcoming, friendly, always ready to help and show you around in the neighbourhood. She drove me to an amazing bakery ! I highly recommend this place in London ! Thanks again Rhian, it was lovely to stay at your place.

Rhian is one of the most charming and accommodating hosts I have come across. She goes out of her way to make guests feel welcome, keeps and immaculately clean home, and provides everything one could need to feel comfortable. Little Venice is a lovely, safe area located near Paddington, with several tube stations nearby and a bus stop one minute away. A hidden gem!

J'ai été très bien accueillit :)
Yasmina est très sympa et l’appartement très propre,

Merci pour tout :)
The room and the rest of the house is very lovely. I felted like being at home. The host is very kind and frank. Definitely recommend this place to stay.
I had an awesome stay at Yasmina and Andrea's place! They're are great hosts (helpful and easy-going). Plus, their flat is lovely!

Yasmina was an absolutely great host. Herself and her boyfriend were very welcoming, relaxed and friendly. The room was perfect for the few days I was staying there. The shower was fantastic and location perfect. I would definitely stay there again.

I had a lovely couple of days at Yasmina's house. She and her boyfriend are very kind. The house is very nice, located in a quiet neighbourhood. Bed very comfortable ... There is a small yard too to enjoy sun. Lovely place and lovely persons!

I enjoyed my stay with Yasmina and her boyfriend Andrea very much.  Yasmina gave me accurate directions for reaching the house and waited for me at the front door.  She has prepared a tube map for me and explained me everything. They are easy to talk to and you can discuss a lot of things with them. Although I travelled alone, I did not feel lonely   at all because of them. The room was cozy and clean, furnished with wood,leather sofa and green colours. I have  access to the garden,kitchen and bathroom too. You could go out and come home freely wihout limitations. You have free Internet connection all the time. The neighboourhood is quiet and safe with a lot of places to eat. Yasmina is a great cook, too. If I have an opportunity, I will stay in their house again! Everything was perfect!

Amazing experience! I had a good time interacting with Yasmina and her boyfriend. They invited me for the dinner and I had the chance to taste their home-made bread. The room is as what you see from the pictures. Yasmina is a fun person. I enjoyed every talk with her. I never failed to laugh. She and her boyfriend are the sincere sort of person you can imagine.
Location wise, it's at the end of Victoria line and you can walk from there.

Yasmina made me feel very welcome as a first time Airbnb-er and I was interested to learn that I was her first UK guest. The room was comfortable and the house is in a quiet location convenient to shops and station. Wifi worked well.

I had a great stay at Yasmina's place. I felt really welcomed - the room and the whole apartment are great - just like on the pictures. Yasmina helped me with everything she could and showed me a bit of the neighbourhood. I can only recommend her place!!!

came down from Scotland for the day, everything was as described and was perfect for me, area was fine, access to central london was straightforward and quick and hosts were very friendly, it is a single bed which was fine and comfy for me as I travelled alone and slept well.

Katherine was a great host, she is warm, engaging and very helpful. Her home was very nice and charming and it's located just two minutes from the train station.

The bedroom I stayed in is a bit small and so is the bed but if you are there to get about the city then it's a good trade off for the location and host.
I picked this room based on price and convenience for work, but Katherine made me feel very welcome. A real home away from home. I liked it so much I booked again.

A small and cosy underground room was fine for what I needed - a crash pad.   A beautiful home in convenient and nice street close to local restaurants.   Great communication and good value.   Thanks.
Always a please staying in Katherine's lovely home. Great location, superb house, and friendly cats.

Katherine is a very kind person
She planned everything so it was easy for me to get the keys of her home without waiting fo her. The area of Pimliko is safe and very nice, quiet at night.
House is beautiful and Katherine is very delighted and up to answer to any of your request as she works sometimes at home. It's very clean and use of dining room and sofa is free except for cooking , nice for reading, tv i.e...
Concerning the room : it's little but ok and mattress is not so comfortable but the room is well heated (central heating) . The room is very quiet for sleeping at night, except if u want to wake up late in the morning as it is under the pavement and it can be noisy at this moment.
To summarize I would recommend Katherine's home !
NB : Notice that she's got two wonderful cats , if you don't like cats or experience allergies ..
Very nice and charming place. The situation is excellent and the neighbour is quite. Katherine is as charming as her place, also are her cats. Thank you for your welcoming.
Katherine is delightful and friendly hostess. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. The home was lovely and nicely located for walking to Victoria and many sites as well as close to an undergroumd station.
It was a pleasure staying with Katherine in her beautiful home, she made us feel very welcome. When visiting London we will be more than happy to return! Thank you Katherine
Lovely place,  lovely host. Fantastic area,  with amazing pizza directly opposite.  The cats are adorable too....  I would definitely stay here again.

Katherine was a wonderful host. She was friendly and accommodative, acceding to my request to check in and out at hours outside the usual timing. Katherine also prepared English breakfast, with the choices of juices, coffee and tea.
The apartment was lovely and cosy, with everything you need. The bathroom was more than adequate, with a bath tub for those who want to soak in a hot bath and a standing shower. Hot water was available, which is important for cold London. The 2 felines in the family were also very well behaved.
The apartment was near the tube, which is within 8 min walk. The tube connects to main attractions and main stations, making it convenient to get around.
Highly recommended!

Fantastic room, clean, spacious, safe and in a great location about 5 -10 minutes walk from Marylebone station pretty easy to find with google maps. Enrico is the nicest host providing all necessary for comfortable stay. Very good Wifi signal which extremely important. I would strongly recommend this accommodation and definitely stay here next time I am in London.

Enrico was a great host! I was surprised by his huge sympathy and openess. All of his house, which is in a good, quiet and well located neighborhood, was extremely clean. He was also really helpful! Always answered my messages very fast, giving me the exact information I needed, either about my stay or the city. I strongly recommend his place and will certainly contact him when coming back to London.

I'm very glad that I found Enrico's place.
The house was gorgeous. Enrico was a great host who takes a very good care of his house. The room I stayed in, the bathroom, the kitchen and the rest of the house were all very clean, tidy and very welcoming.
As a host Enrico is very kind and considerate to his visitors. I was also lucky enough to get a taste of his home-made delicious Italian dinner which was a lovely surprise!
The location was convenient - It is in central London and it also has good connections for the tube.
Definitely recommend!
Great location, 5 minutes walk from Marylebone Station and 15 minutes from Baker Street underground station.  The house is kept spotless clean and the host is very cordial and helpful.

I booked Enrico's place last minute was really happy to have the opportunity to stay there. Even though he wasn't around he made sure I was welcome and made sure access to the room was easy.  Even with unexpected requests like, where is the iron, Enrico made sure my stay was handled properly!
Enrico was very friendly and welcoming, the room was comfortable and the house was well appointed. Close to central London so a good location too.

Wonderful room in a very central location. Definitely cozy, but perfect for a solo traveler. Very easy to come and go. I was able to meet Enrico on my final night in London and he was lovely-- so welcoming! I'll be back for sure!

I was very comfortable during Enrico's house staying.Very close to central London.The Marylebone station is in walking distance to about 5 minute.The room is clean and peaceful.It is very useful that we have access to kitchen.I think I'd like to stay in Enrico's house again when i visit at London!
Enrico was a great host. He ensured I arrived without any problems and we had great conversations in the "italian style" living room of his house.
I had a great stay and Enrico was a wonderful host!

What a wonderful place to stay! I received a lovely warm welcome as I arrived, Enrico was the perfect host. The pictures on the website are accurate - the rooms are as gorgeous as they look in the photos! The house was lovely and warm and also very quiet.
The master bedroom is a very comfortable size and wonderfully clean and clutter free. I don't think I've actually stayed in an air b&b place before that was this clean! I felt very comfortable and at ease both staying in this bedroom and in the house. I love the luxurious bathroom!
I will definitely be staying here again and can highly recommend this gorgeous house as a very enjoyable and also convenient place to stay.

Hey Enrico is a really cool dude pretty chilled and interesting to talk to. The room I stayed in was perfect for me clean and safe and good signal for wi-fi which was important because this was a part business/pleasure stay.
The kitchen is well stocked and plenty of choice for breakfast with fruit available if required.
The bathroom was absolutely amazing very modern and contemporary very clean and extremely well maintained.
The location was about 5 -10 minutes walk from Marylebone station I used maps so it was pretty simple to find.
I stayed three nights at the accommodation and Enrico allowed me to leave my luggage on the Sunday which I collected later on in the afternoon meant I didn't have to carry it around on the Sunday.
I would stay here again and would highly recommend this a comodation. Thanks Enrico great value for money.
amazing and beautiful house with convenient location and a very friendly and helpful host. love my days staying here. very recommending :)
Enrico is a really nice person and his house is also wonderful. If I come to London again, I am sure I will live at his house!
Very nice host who makes you feel at home. The room was clean and comfortable. If I had to start over, I would do it the same way.
Accommodation was tricky to find but worth it. King size bed was most comfy and loved the adjacent washroom with great shower. Enrico was a pleasure to chat with and most hospitable.

Enrico is a very nice host who's very friendly and will make sure your stay is so good and worth it, he helped me a lot with my check out as i had to check out late, as for the house its amazing very clean, modern and even better than the pictures, very comfy bed calm area and walking distance to central london.
I would really recommend staying in enrico apartment.

The room and house is in perfect condition, and Enrico went a long way to ensure I was comfortable and welcome, down to the small details like providing an extra pillow for the chair when he noticed I spent hours sitting in the room doing my work. Internet was fast and the connection was always good. I felt that I had plenty of privacy even though the owner was staying in the house. I would highly recommend this listing.

Love everything about this room and experience. Enrico has been great about communication from word go, going above and beyond to make this process a breeze. The place feels like home from the second you walk in the door.

Enrico is the kindest, most gracious host. I was lucky enough to have an extended stay at this home and couldn't have been happier.  The room itself was perfect and comfortable. It was so nice to have full access to the kitchen as well, where there was always fresh fruit. I hope when I go back to London one day I will be able to stay here again!
brilliant suite will choose this one again next time
Place was fantastic! Great location, close to everything. Apt was clean and really nice! We were very happy with Lisa as a host!

- Gute Lage (direkt an der Ubahn-Station Borough, auch 5min entfernt von der London Bridge mit Direktanbindung zum Flughafen Gatwick)
- Schöne, saubere Wohnung genau wie auf den Fotos
- Die Gastgeberin ist sehr hilfsbereit und antwortet schnell bei Fragen
Wir können die Wohnung daher nur weiterempfehlen :)

This apartment was amazing! Lisa made it so easy for us to check in and out and the stay was so comfortable. We were 5 people and we fit more than perfectly. Lisa had everything in the apartment that we could possibly need and more. We stayed for for 4 nights and we were honestly sad to go. The location is amazing and you can easily walk to every attraction. If you're not up for walking (although I recommend doing the walk across London bridge and down the Thames toward parliament at least once!), the tube station is right outside your door! This was my first experience with airbnb and I'm absolutely hooked now! Such a good experience, I can't say enough about this apartment. I travel to London every year and I will base my next travel dates around the availability of this apartment, even if I'm traveling solo. Don't pass this apartment rental up!
A very friendly and helpful host and a clean, modern and spacious apartment right in the center of London made this a perfect stay for our family of 5. Highly recommended!

The place is lovely and clean  and spacious u feel right at home. Great location with the nearest tube is just few steps away. There's starbucks just across the flat which is always a plus point for a coffee nerd like myself. There are alao halal restaurants nearby. Will recommend this flat to anyone travelling with 5-6 ppl. Xoxo from malaysia

The location is great, it is very near the underground and the quartier is rich of point of interest: we really enjoyed much the Borough market! Lisa was a friendly host, all her information was accurate about check in and out.The flat is really cozy, roomy and full of supplies. Our stay was quiet and lovely, I hope to back again!
nice well located apartment . availability of Lisa
Everything was great. We had a very good stay. Would recommend this to any small group.
Very nice flat, clean, located right next to a tube station, exactly what we were looking for. All was as agreed, Lisa was very helpful, highly recommended.

We had such a wonderful time at Barbara's place! The location is amazing with great cafes and restaurants within a few minutes walk.  The room & bath are comfortable and quiet with a great separate entrance. Barbara met us and even helped find an extra cable we needed.  I would highly recommend their place!

We spend 3 nights at this beautiful Place. It´s a nice Room with a comfortable bed and a nice bathroom.
The area Kensington is great, and not far away from South Kensington which is beautiful and full of bars and restaurants.

You can start your daily tour by foot, a 5 minutes walk to Kensington Gardens and maybe 10-15 minutes to Hyde Park but
there are many busses and the underground at Highstreet Kensington. So its up to you ;)

Staying at Barbara's was even better than advertised! The room was beautiful and has a separate entrance, so it feels very private. The location couldn't be better. Barbara struck the perfect balance by checking on our needs but allowing us independence. We had a great stay!

Bel soggiorno in quei bei cinque giorni di sole di inizio ottobre a Londra.
La camera risulta essere come nelle foto del sito: accogliente e pulita. Quartiere elegante e munito di bar, cafè, pub, con metropolitana e bus vicino (5 minuti a piedi).
La camera, con l'ingresso esterno indipendente, riduce i contatti con la famiglia. Barbara comunque si rende disponibile per telefono o mail per ogni necessità.
Soluzione di soggiorno che consiglio a tutti.
Edna

Barbara a été très arrangeante quant à l'heure de notre arrivée et de notre départ. La chambre était parfaite, très propre, bien docorée, tout comme la salle de bain. Le lit était très confortable. Sa maison est bien placée : trois lignes de métro sont dans un rayon de dix minutes à pieds. L'accès à la chambre est privatif, ce qui nous a en plus permis d'être indépendant.

Barbara is a great host - friendly and very welcoming. We enjoyed staying in her house for various reasons: the room is exactly the way it appears to be in the pictures. The area is very posh, safe and everything (tubes, buses, shopping, parks) is in walking distance. I also liked the privacy we were getting as well as the feeling that Barbara would always be reachable. In addition to that she provided a lot of things (toiletries, tea, magazines, sky tv) which we did not take for granted - thank you!

All in all I would highly recommend her place and would love to stay there again!

We had a lovely time staying at Barbara's place! The room's location is great - in a classy and well connected area of London. You can even start your morning with a run in Hyde Park.
We absolutely loved the comfortable bed and high-quality interior. Barbara was kind and accommodating. We highly recommend this place!

The room was clean, tidy and exactly as what you will see in the photos. The experience of our stay was good. We felt safe and secure throughout the stay. The location was easy to locate, and within walking distances to the tube, bus stop and several museum attractions. Barbara was very friendly and provided us with clear and good info on how to locate her place on the first day. She even provided basic toiletries to us, fresh towels and a big tv in the room. Highly recommend for travelers who want to experience a Londoners house experience.
We had a great time staying at Barbara's place. The room is very well located, close to almost everything! The room is very clean, spacious, beautifully decorated. Will be back! Thank you Barbara!!!!

Barbara let us leave our luggage and refresh even before scheduled time. We felt very welcome. Nice spacious room with modern features. Small coffeemachine nice for waking up. Colorcoded towels in nice bathroom is a very smart detail.
Calm neighbourhood not far from the tube station.
Wonderful bed with fluffy duvet. Slept very well.
Day of departure we could leave whenever convenient for us. So, all in all: Thank you, Barbara for a very nice London stay:-).

Very friendly welcome ... Location location location ... Idea access for Covent Garden, Theatre Land and Leicester Sq. large bedroom comfortable bed with large shared bathroom that was always available very clean
Nice big basement Kitchen with everything available ... I must say I felt very comfortable and relaxed someone at hand to answer questions people around in the evening but I had my Privacy at all time.
Great internet bandwidth.
Thanks Robert .. I would love to return in November

A fabulous place to stay! Robert and David were very kind and extremely helpful. They made me feel right at home. The room is spacious, the bed is comfortable, and the bathroom is impeccable. I hope to be able to stay there again the next time I'm in London.
Robert has very helpful.  He bought croissants for the breakfast, for my biggest pleasure.  He gave me good advise to find  a restaurant

I was extremely pleased with this location. Robert made me feel very welcome and I regretted that due to my busy schedule that there was no opportunity to get better acquainted. I can highly recommend this accommodation to others.
Thank you very much for the hospitality! The location is fab, the hosts are excellent, the house/room is huge, spacious and clean! We will definitely stay again next time we are in London. :)

I absolutely loved this place.  The room is very spacious, bright and comfortable.  The bathroom has a large shower and the kitchen is large and homely. Robert and David were so warm and kind.....and the smell of David's cooking .....mmm. I even got to try his chilli which was delicious.   The house is within walking distance of where I was studying, in a beautiful neighbourhood. I have already booked for my next week in London.
Excellent hosts. Comfortable accommodation with ideal location close to University.

Wonderful hosts and excellent location. Very spacious room and bathroom. The bed is comfortable. I hope this review and those of others won't lead to this room being booked out completely, since I am planning to book it for my regular trips.
Robert was a wonderful host. He even organized an adapter for me because I forgot it. Five stars.
everything was in great order
We had a nice 4 days stay at the loft room.

Very well maintained house: very clean, very quite and very safe neighborhood. There are also a lots delicious middle eastern food within 5 min walking distance. The bus stop is less than two min walk. A great place with great value.

Really great host, very friendly and interesting person.
The room is really nice too. I think it is bigger than on the pictures.
The bathroom are also well designed by Enrico himself.

Et godt sted at bo, man følte sig hurtigt velkommen.
Enrico er meget gæstfri og meget betænksom. Lejligheden var i fin strand og den lå godt i forhold til centrum og offentlig transport muligheder.

Abbiamo ricevuto un'ottima accoglienza da Enrico che abbiamo scoperto essere Italiano, la sua casa è molto pulita e ordinata. Enrico è preciso, gentile e disponibile. La casa è in un quartiere tranquillo, silenzioso la notte, i mezzi pubblici raggiungibili in poche centinaia di metri.

Enrico is a great host: he makes you feel home while not being invasive. His house is warm, cosy and very clean. Very well located (10min walk from Marylebone trainstation), it is the perfect deal! Thank you again :)

Enrico a été très accueillant et nous a rapidement mis à l'aise. La chambre était comme sur les photos, tout était très propre, salles de bain agréables, accès à la cuisine et possibilité de se servir pour le petit-déjeuner ! Quartier sympathique et à proximité du métro. Nous sommes très contents de ce logement ainsi que de l'accueil reçu par Enrico. Je recommande

We four had a great experience at Enrico's place. The room is very clean and well-organized. Not far away from bus stops and Maryrelbone underground station. I think it has a good position in Zone 1, very close to a beautiful Regent’s Garden. The price is really fair. The shower is good. No matter the double bed or mats are comfortable to sleep on! Free milk, biscuits, cereals and fruits are provided. Most importantly, Enrico is a really nice person! My strong recommendation!!!

I would recommend this place to other people.
Our stay in Enrico's home was very good! The room is very clean with fresh linens,we sleept really well. The bathrooms are nice with a comfortable shower. The kitchen is clean, you can take cereals,fresh milk, fruit,coffee, tea......and you can meet other guests (when there are) WiFi is very good. The location was fine for us. We took a bus from Stansted to the nearest busstop which is a 10-15 minuten walk.
The nearest underground is just a 5-10 minutes walk away, and you are near all the attractions of London in a few stops.
Enrico is a very nice person who makes you feel at home..

I do recommend cosy stay at Enrico's place in the center of London. It's easy to get from there to every interesting place in London by foot, bus, train or underground.
Host is very helpful and talkative. Rooms are small, but very clean and warm. Large common kitchen allows to eat and sit with the people from all over the world and Enrico takes care about the nice atmosphere.
Both our children and we were satisfied with our stay at Enrico's place. We'll for sure want to stay there also next time when we come to London.

Chima was pretty easy going - as we didn't had a place to stay less then 12 hours before our plane was going. He confirmed - we arrived, and could check in. The apartment looks like what you see in the pictures. Really close to Tower Bridge, and perfect to walk into the city - also there is a underground station in 2-3 minutes walking distance. And if you don't like to eat a Restaurant you have your own kitchen to cook. If we had questions - he supported us with information in a couple of minutes. So he's really supporting with all issues/questions.
Had an overall awesome first experience now with airbnb. Thanks again Chima :)
Very warm welcome from a great host.  Chima helped make my stay here really comfortable. Simple studio - amazing location.

Chima is a really friendly guy, communication with him was fast and easy. Also he was totally flexible with us which was appreciated, as we weren't too sure of our exact arrival time.
The place was clean and tidy for our arrival. Comfy bed and modern appliances - washer/dryer combo is a nice touch.

The studio is literally 5 minutes walk away from a parade of shops where you can get breakfast and supplies, then the bus stop and Bermondsey station just next to the shops will take you anywhere in London you need to go. Great location for exploring.

Last but not least - the view of the river and London skyline is amazing, especially in the evening hours.

Chima is a nice guy. He responds very quickly to any questions and helps out, wherever he can.
The Studio he offered us is as nice as described in the advertisement, in a nice neighbourhood directly at the River Thames.
It was really nice to stay in the Studio and a great Trip to London.

We had a great time in London. The location is perfect just as described. Underground and some stores are just a 5 min walk away. Chima always answered within some minutes. Check in was possible although we arrived late at night. Can only recommend his studio.

My stay at the studio was very nice and the host was very accommodating. Any issues that I had were addressed in a very timely manner which made my time in the studio a comfortable one.

The studio was great for my time in London as I was there for over 2 weeks on a business trip. It was a short walk to the tube station which got me into central London quickly. The views of the river and Tower bridge were nice and right outside the door. The kitchen had the basic necessities which helped with saving money when not wanting to dine out. Also, the washer/dryer unit was clutch for my long stay.

The host was very friendly and offered me some tasty homemade carrot cake. I would recommend staying at the studio. Also, if you like craft beer the Bermondsey beer mile is a short walk away (or stumble back) which is a can't miss.

Chima was charming, friendly and very responsive. The property was as described. The location of the flat was perfect, 5 minute walk to the Bermondsey station and the Tesco supermarket. The studio itself was small but comfortable. The wifi worked easily, the tv was new, the kitchen appliances worked. There was a major plumbing issue, but the problem was fixed within hours. We felt safe at all times.

Really enjoyed our stay with Chima! A warm comfortable apartment with all the basics for our stay in London. Chima made us feel welcome from the start and left us to ourselves.
The apartment is a pleasurable walk to London bridge or 5 mins from the tube. We really enjoyed the area of Bermondsey, some cool places it's worth checking out!
We would definitely stay again, much more interesting than a boring hotel room.
Many Thanks :)
IT have being a good time living in Chima's studio . The vieu is the best in London .

Really nice comfortable place in a wonderful area just next to the river. Very beautiful skyline just outside the front door.
Nice little studio with everything we needed.

Chima was very welcoming and helpful every time we needed anything.

Staying with Farida was a total pleasure.
She is a perfect host most kind and welcoming.
Our room was private and had a nice big bathroom.
The house cat was adorable:)
The location is perfect close to Hampstead tube and all the superb local pubs and cafes.
I would thoroughly recommend.

Farida, her home and her cat are all delightful.  The room is very quiet and the bed comfortable.   Staying here made my visit to London special and memorable.  I spent the whole weekend in Hampstead and did not feel a need to go anywhere else.  The Lodge is an easy walk from the High Street and the Heath.
Great location, fabulous quiet room and a very lovely host. One of the best Airbnb experiences myself and wife have had to date. Highly recommended.
Hampstead for me is a dream-time, this place is a big part of that dream and Farida is a dream host, look no further you've found the right place and free parking
Farida was a most welcoming host and communication both before and during my stay was smooth.  Her house is in a beautiful location and the room is exceptionally quiet.

The room is a good size, very private, warm, and the quietest I have encountered in London. The double bed is very comfortable indeed. The Victorian style bathroom is large. Parking in a private road is a real bonus.
Farida, you are such a wonderful host. Thank you for making us so welcome in your lovely home.

Farida is so warm and friendly. Great prompt communication beforehand then she took the time to meet my husband at the tube and show him where her house was. The room was clean, peaceful (waking to birdsong in London!) and comfortable. Thankyou!

Farida was a great host and her house is lovely, set back from the road and overlooking a garden. It feels like the countryside (for London) but is only 200 yards from a pub and a very short walk from the centre of Hampstead. The room was en-suite and we had absolutely no issue parking right outside her house. Would stay again.

We really enjoyed our stay at Farida's. Hampstead is a charming and very quiet area and Gainsborough gardens are particularly calm and beautiful. The room we got was clean, light and nicely decorated, as the rest of the house. Farida is a sweet and considerate hostess. She made us feel at home till the first day. She also helped us to find a taxi the night. We highly recommand this location.

Nous avons vraiment apprécié notre séjour chez Farida.
Hampstead est un quartier charmant et très calme et Gainsborough gardens est un endroit particulièrement beau et paisible. La chambre où nous avons logé était propre, lumineuse et bien décorée, comme le reste de la maison. Farida est une dame adorable et très attentionnée. Elle nous a fait nous sentir chez nous dès le premier jour. Elle nous a aussi aidé à trouver un taxi pour la nuit de notre départ. Nous recommandons absolument cet endroit.
Fantastic beautiful location within a few minutes of the gorgeous Heath and the lovely lively Hamstead village. Fareda did everything she could to make our stay a good one in her amazing family home.

The apartment is brand-new and well equipped. However, beware of your head :). The description is very accurate, the place is near to Gants Hill underground station, very nice and cosy.
It has all the utensiles one needs and little surprises that make one feel home. We had a pleasent stay and Carl and his wife are very nice persons. Carl is always ready to help, provide any support and his communication was promt. I would recommend this Airbnb location to anyone!

Carl and his family were very nice and friendly, which made us felt very welcome. We had some accident on the way and delayed our arrival time, thanks Carl for waiting us. The studio was lovely and spacious. Everything is perfect. Studio was convenient and it was near the underground station. The room was much better than that of photo and out of expectation. Highly recommend it!!!

Carl and his wife were extremely welcoming, and it was extremely thoughtful that they stocked the fridge up with water, bread and other snacks. Their studio flat was beautiful, clean and modern. I will definitely be staying here again and would recommend Carl's place to any Airbnb'er! Cheers Carl!

Can't fault the apartment or Carl and his family's hospitality. The apartment is spotless and modern and had everything that we needed if not more eg personal touches such as a birthday balloon! Thanks very much Carl!

Everything was perfect about our stay!
Carl was an amazing host and attentive to all our needs. It was mine and my partners anniversary and despite booking last minute upon arriving in the room we had a balloon and bottle of champagne waiting for us! The room was clean, homely and cosy. It was the perfect place and had everything we wanted if not more and we would be over the moon to stay again at some point :)

Carls place was perfect. The place is brand new, and luxury is a fair way to describe the apartment. Thanks to Carl who made sure I had everything I needed, and for a very relaxing stay.

The only downside is the bed is super comfortable so you might have trouble waking up in the morning!
Wonderfull place to stay in :) all really tidy and clean...We definitly chose again...They are really nice and helpfull.

Absolute great place and very friendly hosts . Central to get to supermarkets and bus stations . The appartment is very tidy ,modern and definitely very welcoming . Will return here on my next London stay . Thank you !

Min 13-årige datter og jeg havde et rigtig dejligt ophold i denne nyistandsatte og nymøblerede, lyse og hyggelige lejlighed. Vi blev taget rigtig godt imod af værten Carl og hans kone, som begge er meget venlige og varme mennesker.
De havde sørget for nogle lækkerier, som specielt min datter var rigtig glad for :-)
Der var store, lækre håndklæder på badeværelset, og en god, stor og skøn dyne på sengen.
Lejligheden har seperat indgang, og ligger tæt på undergrundstationen. Her er der et mindre supermarked, restauranter, en iscafe, en kaffebar m.m. Men der er stille og roligt på vejen hvor huset ligger.
Carl's beskrivelse af lejligheden er meget præcis, og jeg kan kun varmt anbefale dette sted.
El Studio es perfecto para dos. Muy bonito y totalmente equipado. Ha sido todo un placer vivir allí durante nuestro viaje a Londres. Una y mil veces, gracias Carl.

Loved this room. The electric banket was very good for us as it was so cold in London. Clean and nice spacious room. Stayed here twice and would come back. I highly recommend this property! Thank you Wynn :)
The apartment is great located in the center of London, Wynn was very friendly and helpful.
Amazing location and lovely set up!

Wynn was not there while I stayed at his place but he was extremely helpful in every way by having his friend there to look over things. The apartment was large, clean and in a great location. I would definitely stay there again.

Wynns place was perfect in every sense! Very centrally located, a two min walk from Leicester square station. The room is big with a couch, tv, and cupboard for clothes. It even has a long mirror! The washrooms are clean and functional. Even though it's right on a busy street, you can't hear any noise at night which is great.. Would definitely stay here again!

Hemos pasado  unos días hermosos,  la habitación super grande igual a las fotos. Tenia todo lo esperado, Wynn super atento, nos brindó todo para el desayuno. Su ubicación es lo mejor nos movimos a todos lados a pie☺, volvería sin dudarlo
La ubicación inmejorable, cerca de todo. El anfitrión muy respetuoso y amable. El lugar está en excelente estado de limpieza

Wynn's flat is perfectly located by Trafalgar Square next to Starbucks, a couple blocks to SOHO and 10 minute walk to Picadilly Circus. Great host, great location, great room. Also wonderful restaurants and pubs on the street. Wynn arranged his schedule to meet our needs. Wonderful place! Next time we go to London, we'll try to stay here.

My stay with Wynn was flawless. Although I only saw him for 5 minutes the night before I left, he made me feel very welcome and the whole process was super easy. The room itself is large and comfortable and the location could not be any better! I would highly recommend this place if you want a comfortable and quiet room in the hear of London.
This is a amazing location that you can reach everything within 15 mins! It's quiet as well. Perfect choice for a short tour!

The property is lovely. The bedroom was really clean and I was impressed with the place overall. Great links to the buses and easy to get into the centre. It's a 20 min ride to London Bridge. It suited us that there was no curfew and Mohammed was very welcoming! Would definitely stay again.

It's cosy and not expensive ! The host is very kind and helpful !
The bed is veryyyyy comfortable, go here if you want to spend good nights !

Mohammad made me feel most welcome in his lovely home which is just as shown in the photos. My room was spacious with a comfortable bed and pleasant environment with a view over an amazing garden. Mohammad will give you plenty of privacy and he is also very helpful If you ever need anything. This is a perfect place for someone busy who needs to feel at home after a long day at work and/or tourism. Buses to all directions are only 3 minutes walk away. It'll take you like 30-35mins in heavy traffic to make it to The center of london and only 20-25mins in light traffic! Thank you.

I highly recommend

I think this was the best accomodation we have ever been in London. It was spacious, clean, modern, friendly, in good neighborhood, Elephant and Castle underground station is easily reachable by frequent buses, very late check-in was not a problem. We really liked that appartment.

I arrived after 2300 hours due to difficulties with public transport, yet Mohammad still welcomed me, which was above the call of duty! The house is very clean and well-presented and quiet for that part of south London.
The bathroom and bedroom were immaculately clean but rather impersonal - there was just one bedside table (which would make it more difficult for a couple) and no reading material. There did not appear to be any hangers in the cupboards and I had to throw my clothes on the armchair.

Host puntale e disponibile, ci ha subito accolti mostrandoci la casa e tutto il necessario. La casa è come nelle foto. Il quartiere è tranquillo, 5 minuti a piedi dalla fermata del bus e dal supermercato. Prima esperienza su airbnb, non ha deluso. Mohammad promosso!!

Mohammad was a charming host, very relaxed and available to answer any questions.  The room was bright and cleana and the bed was very comfortable. I could help myself to tea and coffee which was a real bonus.  Thank you Mohammad it was a pleasure meeting you.

Mohammad was a very hospitable host.  Due to changes with flights, etc. we got in at a very late hour. He was very understanding and welcomed us with open arms.  The location of the flat was good, it was close to many bus stops; we did not use the subway system very often as it was not as convenient.  The area felt relatively safe, and there is a very cute cafe right around the corner. We were not at the flat much but Mohammad was readily available whenever we needed anything, he still gave us our space.  Overall all we had a good experience.

MohaMohammad is a very nice host.  He described the way to get to the house by public transportation is accurate and simple.  The house is newly stylish decorated and the room, bath room and kitchen are clean and well equipped.  We are allowed to use the kitchen to make coffee and tea and heat some simple food.  The location is little far away from downtown, but it is very easy to get bus which take about 20-30’ to get into center.  We enjoyed our stay.  We would recommend staying there if you like to stay little away from busy downtown.

Fantastic stay, Mohammad met us with no problems, the room and house were very nice and very clean and the location is great both to get into central London and enjoy everything that the very nearby Camberwell offers

Paul provided a warm, friendly welcome and quick orientation. The rooms were immaculate and very comfortable.
South Ealing tube station on the Piccadilly line is just a 2 minute walk away so this is very handy for both Heathrow airport and central London by a 30 minute ride in either direction.

Paul's place is super clean and spacious. The room covers the top floor of the property with its own bathroom with access to the kitchen downstairs. Paul was super helpful and always on hand for any help. The house is also 2 min walk from the tube. Recommend.

I had my parents coming to visit me and thanks to Paul and his renovated house they could have a typical London experience staying in a Victorian house without sacrificing comfort and money. Paul is a lovely person very welcoming and flexible, my parents really felt at home thanks to him.

The room was on the third floor which was just for my parents, they had a private bathroom and a small rest area with some London guides, books, TV and refreshments. The only thing I must say is that during sunny days the room can get a little too warm but there are windows everywhere and a fan to fix the problem. All the areas were fully furnished with hairdryer, shampoo dispenser, towels and blankets for all types of weather. We haven't had the chance to use the kitchen but Paul didn't have problems for us to using it at all. There is also a really nice garden with a table to sit in the sunny days.

I leave in the area and I love it, it is perfectly connected with buses and the Piccadilly line (the house is 2-5 min walk from the station) and has really nice restaurants and parks near by.

I definitely recommend it and if anybody else will come to visit me I have no doubts I'll ask to Paul to host them.

Paul was great.  The room was very clean and I essentially had an entire floor to myself. He was helpful with suggestions of things to do around the area which is full of nice restaurants and such.  It is a reasonable walk to Kew Gardens which was a great place. Best of all it was close to the Tube station (<5 minute walk) that allowed me to get to the airport in the morning.

Paul's place was a little gem. Very clean, very sweet it looks like a hotel..:) We even had a bottle of water each by our bed.
He is a very kind guy we arrived quite late and he offered to pick us up by the tube station just to make sure that we wont be lost.
I would recommend his place to everyone!

PUl's was a great place to stay. It was very clean and well presented. There were lots of nice touches - bedside light, wardrobe with hangers as well as drawer space if I had needed it. A separate large study type room also in the loft offered a desk with a chair you could work at (as well as facilities for making a drink) and a separate chair. There was enough space for me to do my yoga practice!
Access from the South Ealing tube was easy and Paul was very welcoming. There are also cafes and convenience shops nearby.
Paul is a great host. He make sure I feel comfortable. Place very surprised me... Is better than I was expecting. Would definitely stay there again

Paul's space was an excellently priced room in a great location. Super close to Ealing High Street or a quick ride on the underground to Central London. Paul was very welcoming on arrival and I had plenty of private space to myself on the top floor of his house.
Excellent, everything as described.

The room was a surprise. I was merely expecting it to be clean and reasonably comfortable but what I got was amazing, the pictures genuinely don't do it justice. It's beautifully laid out, I've stayed in hotels that are nowhere near as nice.
Paul is a thoroughly nice chap too, I didn't see much of him as I'd had a long day at work & passed out around a hour after sitting on the comfy bed but I can't imagine any guest having anything less than positive to say about this host. In summation, Highly recommended.

Dennis was an amicable, attentive, and pleasant host, with a keen attention to detail, and a consistent vigilance to the comfort of his guests.
The flat was immaculate, and in a thriving side of town. I would definitely recommend him highly!

I knew straight away from the Grace Jones poster, that Dennis would be fantastic, and I was right! Dennis was the most gracious host, incredibly warm, super responsive to any questions or texts I sent, and very helpful with information about Brixton! He gave great care with directions to local cafes, restaurants and parks. His guidebook is chock full of amazing places to visit!
His place is a dream! Super beautiful, clean and quiet, made me feel so comfortable and at home. A HUGE plus is that his place is right in the middle of town! The Underground station, Ritzy Cinema and everything you could possibly need is just around the corner. Can't recommend Dennis and his lovely room enough! A true highlight in my visit to London!

A great place to stay, Dennis is really helpful in making you feel at home. The place is clean, tidy, relaxed and comfortable.
It has been a pleasure staying with Dennis and next time when I'm in London I'll definitely come back here.

Dennis is an absolute gem. The flat is in a truly amazing location as it is very central in Brixton. This means that you have unlimited travel options and are never too far from anything you could possibly want to see! This paired with Dennis' extensive local knowledge was a truly winning combination. Dennis was always more than happy to point me in the right direction and managed to give me an incredible amount of advice and recommendations. Throughout my time in London he went out of his way to make sure I was comfortable and happy in his room, which I certainly was. Dennis and his room are both fantastic, would highly recommend!

I had a great time staying at Denis' place in Brixton. The neighborhood is a 20 min subway ride to most major London attractions, very safe and has amazing inexpensive food options and Denis' place is just 3 minutes walk from the subway. Denis is a great guy, very polite, friendly, communicative and has a million tips and suggestions for off-the-beaten track explorations of this great city. The place is impeccably clean and perfect for sharing - I felt like I stayed there by myself most of the time. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting London!
I would highly recommend Dennis's place- just lovely!

I stayed at Dennis’ place for 10 days and felt very comfortable from start to end. He keeps his flat very clean at all times. The location is also superb, next to the Brixton tube station and its lively neighborhood. I can highly recommend staying at his place.

I only had a very short encounter with Dennis but he was very kind and welcoming to me. The apartment is beautiful, very artistic, and the room which I stayed was very spacious. I hope to return soon:)

I really enjoyed staying with Dennis at his flat / great location, stylish decor, cozy, convenient  - Dennis pays attention to the details to make you feel welcome. He's a really nice guy! I would happily stay here again and can confidently recommend Dennis and his place to the Airbnb community.
Dennis was a wonderful host! Very friendly and welcoming, also very lovely to talk to. Thank you for opening up your home to me and maybe we'll see each other again some day :)

Spacious room as adv, located in Zone 4 (London Tube). Surrounding environment is quiet and suitable for someone that looking for a getaway. 10-15mins walking distance to the centre where you can find shopping malls, restaurants, or even pub. Host and her friend were really helpful and friendly. The stay was excellent and room was really cozy and comfort like I was in 5 stars hotel.

C'était super, Rajni et sa famille sont très gentils ! La chambre et la douche sont grandes, lumineuses, bien équipées. Nous avons vraiment apprécié ce voyage. La cuisine était vraiment délicieuse :)
Merci à Rajni et sa famille.
Beautiful room on a lovely street only a short walk from Ealing Common tube station. The host was really welcoming, quick to respond to queries and very helpful. I highly recommend staying here.

我極力推薦各位想在London過夜的朋友們選擇這裡，這房間位於地鐵zone4的Ealing Common站，30分鐘之內可以到達London市中心。
價格實惠房間設備齊全，乾淨整潔，房東非常善良熱情，是一個非常非常適合各位的選擇：）

Rajni is a fantastic host. Property is clean and it looks like a 5* hotel. Property has a comfy bed, a microwave oven, refrigerator, work table, drawers, soft cushioned chairs, food table and complimentary tea coffee tray with kettle.
Property is just 5 mins walk from Ealing Common station.
Rajni also provide a vast list of breakfast, lunch and dinner options within a decent price range. Don't forget to enjoy real Indian - homemade food during your stay as I enjoyed my dinner a lot and even packed my lunch to work.
Overall - I am completely satisfied with the stay and would like to stay again in this property with my next visit to London.
I would like to recommend this property to anyone who would like to have a peaceful stay in London with a lovely, homemade delicious food all within a decent cost.'

I really enjoyed my short stay this week. I had a warm welcome from Roma and the room had everything I needed and more.
