The TV, microwave and tea/coffee facilities were a welcome surprise and the room is lovely and spacious. I thoroughly  recommend staying here and I look forward to staying again sometime soon.

I stayed in London with my Girlfriend from Canada as she has never experienced London before. Rajnis place was ideal as it was close to an underground station (Ealing Common) and competitively priced. It's only a 5 min walk (less than) to the station and is ideal because Ealing Common is on the Picadilly and District line which both have multiple tourist attraction stops such as Westminster/ Embankment/ Picadilly Circus/ Leicester Sqaure/ Victoria etc.
It's about a 30 min ride to the centre of London but it doesn't feel that long!
We didn't meet Rajni (poor timing) however she communicated with us throughout our stay. The housekeepers were there to meet us and show us the facilities.

The room is lovely and large, and just like the pictures, the bed is also very comfy! The bathroom is in a room right next door and was kept very clean and functions perfectly.

Rajnis accommodation was ideal as we weren't looking to be social as we were out doing touristy things. We just wanted a nice room and bathroom to ourselves for the morning and evening which is exactly what we had. The room is upstairs and out the way so you get your privacy.

Rajni was a great host and answered the few questions we had, and I'm sure if we had more she would've available to help. There is a breakfast and dinner room service menu which was great. The food is made to order just like hotel/ bnb.

Myself and my girlfriend had a great experience here, and if we ever find ourselves needing accommodation in London again, I would definitely stay here!

Thank you Rajni!

We had an incredible stay and would definitely stay again.

Very welcoming, and very helpful.

Lovely, clean room with comfortable bed and close to transport links.

Lovely spacious room, with a comfy bed! For us this was a great location, we travelled all over London with no trouble at all. It was really handy having somewhere we could leave the car that was off the road.
Rajni and Roma where incredibly accommodating and happy to offer any help we needed. They made sure we knew we could contact them if we needed anything but left us to our own decides to come and go as we pleased. Would absolutely come to stay again.

This was a really nice experience to begin my last visit to London. The place is so clean, spacious, modern, and cozy at the same time. Easy access and great communication with host. So sad I had only one night here, but definitely would come back.

Great location! The flat is completely newly refurbished, it is in great condition. I would like to note that the bed was very good as well. Something I find very important! Everything was spotless!

All arrangements went as planned. I was met at the flat as agreed. i was made to feel welcome.

I would recommend this property!

This was our first AirBNB experience, so we were a little concerned with how it would play out.
As it turns out, we could not have asked for a better flat and better host.
The location was great and the flat was comfortable, modern and in a great location to stay. We had everything we needed for our first family trip to London.
Our host was very responsive and very considerate.
Thanks for making our trip enjoyable.
The place was immaculate, right in town and good access to public transportation. Host was super efficient, constantly assisting and very accommodating. Would totally recommend!

Flat was as advertised...new, spacious and very clean.  The only negatives were little air circulation so it's a bit warm (even when mild outside) and a noisy seemingly permanent neighbor who watches a loud TV late into the evening makes leaving the windows open unworkable.  All in all a good experience and Pedro is exceedingly polite.

We had a great stay at pedro's flat. The flat is clean and confortable. The location is very central (close to central line) and very pleasant, close to nice restaurants etc. It is a perfect accommodation for a family trip in London !

The apartment was perfect, evrything is in excellent condition and brand new. Excellent location, tidy and georgina was very kind providing all the indications. I will recommend this place without hesitation and we will come back. Thanks Pedro for being a great host. Just a note on the side, be careful when walking because is wood floor and might be a bit noisy for the neighbors that live under the apartment.

We (My husband and I, mother, and brother) stayed for 10 days in this lovely apartment everything was as advertised and more. Communications with the host were wonderful and they were more than accommodating with all of our requests. they were even able to get us into the apartment early which was a godsend after our long flight. The apartment was very clean and they were gracious enough to leave us with some breakfast foods(coffee, muesli, biscuits...) that we did eat. The apartment is within a 5 min walk to Bayswater(Circle, District lines) which makes it easily accessible to get around the whole city. Grocery stores, pubs, shops are all within walking distance. The area felt safe and Notting Hill is beautiful.

Please be weary of stepping to loudly later into the evening the floors do creak and there is a very nice family that lives below. Also there is a lot of noise in the mornings with all the kids heading to classes.

Being that this is a city if the window is open you may here some TV sets, late night revelers, and the occasional cat meowing. Again this is a city and there are noised while windows are open.

All in all I would highly recommend this apartment(location, cleanliness)
Great location, recently refurbished apartment, fast response from host.
Very nice flat and close to bayswater dan queensway tube station. The host is very responsive and nice. Definitely will stay at this place again.

A nearly perfect base to explore London!
Great feedback and professional approach by the management company. Everything was smooth.
Very flexible, he found it ok we arrived late at night. Convenient location for Wembley Stadion. Safe neighborhood, though there is some distance to bars and sights.
Very clean and comfortable. Very close to Wembley. Highly recommend.
Spacious room more like a homely feeling. Comfortable bed and nice room. Host was very understanding and we loved our stay at Dariusz's place. Thanks for your hospitality.
Dariusz was very welcoming to his house. He was flexible with time and was very hospitable. The place was nice and clean and was close to wembley station.
Basic room but great for the price. Perfect location for a Wembley event and great communication from the host...
Very accommodating, convenient location
I stayed at Dariusz's apartment with a friend for just one night, but it is a really lovely place. Clean and with everything you need.
Everything was excellent. The only downside was a parking ticket having been there for 10 mins. Although it says free parking.
Two lovely rooms in this house. The landlord is very thoughtful. Rooms are clean. Location is great, near the downtown, bus and train station and a big park. Love it.
A very convenient place to stay in north London. Ver close to bus routes/train stations etc. Clean, functional, competitively priced.
A very lovely stay at this apartment. It locates so well and convenient, besides park and railway station.

The place is beautiful, clean, comfortable and in a good location. At night it's also very quiet which is great.
My one problem was that the wifi was not working for me, which was a disappointed since it was listed as having wifi and I really depended on it. The welcome instructions mentioned that they are "in the process of taking over a new line" and to use the building wifi in the mean time. But the wifi in the building was not reachable on my iPhone or iPad.
Hosts were helpful and responsive.

Amazing hideaway in the middle of Kensington/Notting hill. A short walk to Kensington high street and portobello market. Even in the middle of the carnival it was an oasis of quiet. Max and Billie very helpful to make sure our stay was easy and enjoyable.

It was a tiny but comfortable & adequately equipped little flat in a lovely quiet neighbourhood with excellent access to all amenities and transport links. The keys were kept in a secure box by the front door making the checking in procedure very easy and flexible. We appreciated that checking out was not until midday relieving time pressures. The mattress on the mezzanine was  exceptionally comfortable and cool.

very welcome as always ...i arrived late but easy to enter apartments

clean apartment ..all as aspected ..

great stay ..parking good

I had a great time at Max and Billie's place - Notting Hill is pretty central to a lot of London attractions, and the flat itself is quite close to the station. Lots of convenience stores and chip shops close by - there's even a Nando's for late night meals. If you're out to explore London as I did, this is a great spot to setup HQ at :)

Great location and smooth check-in.
Nice small studio, but it is more tired looking than appearance in photos.
Windows and small roof space nice features as expected.

Lovely little place, location couldn't be better. Great that keys an be picked up straight from the property and communication was swift and easy. If you want a pad to work from it's not the best (poor wifi and not enough desk space), but as a short stay place - great. Really fluffy towels also!!

Great location in Notting Hill, very well organised. Not suitable if you are suffering from vertigo, as you need to get up the ladder to the mezzanine, but in my case, perfect. I'll book again.
many thanks
H
Max and Billie were great at keeping in communication and helping out as we were travelling from Manchester. The listing was very accurate, we really enjoyed our stay at the apartment.

Beautiful location. Max and Billie were really helpful and easy to contact.
(Please do be aware that there are several flights of stairs to carry your bags up). But otherwise self sufficient and tidy.

Communication was very good! Location was lovely as well! The bed was arguably the best part of the whole studio; very comfortable to sleep in. Bathroom is small but serviceable. I will warn, however, that WiFi was dreadful -- either poor signal or just non-existent. This studio was also located near the top floor of the building and there was no lift. I had to carry a 20kg bag up 4-5 flights of narrow stairs! I'm not very strong, so this was difficult. I would stay here again (despite the bad WiFi), but only with lighter luggage.

Max and Billie's studio is for the most part, as described. I should note that while the layout is the same, the decor and some of the furniture is different from the photos. The studio is in a great location, just around the corner from an underground station and within walking distance to the portobello market and plenty of shops and bars. Overall, we enjoyed our stay, however I would strongly advise not staying here if you are at all dependent on wifi. We were traveling from over seas and only had access to our phones when we had wifi so booked our airbnb's accordingly. Their wifi was very in and out, mostly out. We were given two different networks to connect to throughout the duration of our stay and neither was very promising. We were also not told how to obtain the key until a few hours prior to check in.

Max and Billie were great hosts. We loved the location of the flat, with the park and various Tube stops so close. They were helpful and friendly in communication and even left some treats in the flat for us when we arrived. The only drawback was that the Wifi was not very good while we were there. They are working on improving the situation, though, so my guess is that is a temporary problem. All in all, a really great flat for the price and, to my mind, the location can't be beat.

Flat looked a bit tired compared to the photos but that was no problem. Lovely and clean, comfortable bed, great wi fi. Good location, close to shops, park and transport. Did not like climbing 69 steps to flat, would not have booked if I had known it was top floor. (Just don't like heights). Apart from that would recommend as good value for London.

Das Apartment liegt super toll, U-Bahn direkt in der Nähe. Schlüsselübergabe problemlos.
Das Zimmer war lieblos hergerichtet, alt und verwohnt, den Preis nicht wert. Ich erwarte keinen Luxus aber saubere und ordentliche Möbel. Bett ganz gut. Teppich total eklig. Um die Kloschüssel alles schwarz vor Schimmel. Klobürste eine Zumutung.Es war nicht möglich sich einen Kaffee zuzubereiten, die Küchenmöbel alt und abgeplatzt, spärliche Ausstattung der Küche.

My boyfriend and I stayed in London for a couple nights before heading to Iceland. Max and Billie's place was absolutely perfect. The location is amazing- very close to the Notting hill gate tube station. I highly recommend staying here if you're visiting London.

Nice and comfortable apartment. Very clean and tidy. Very close to the centre of London, with plenty of eateries close by and a tube station a few minutes' walk away. There's a bakery/cafe en route to the main road which makes a great breakfast location. Do bring earplugs though - if the person in the apartment above comes home at 3am, you're going to be aware of it.

우선 위치는 노팅힐역 정말 가까이 있고 시내에서도 멀지 않고 버스 노선도 많아서 여행하기에 딱 좋은 곳이었어요. 또 위치도 안전한 동네라 밤 늦게 다녀도 괜찮을 정도였습니다. 숙소도 후기 사진과 거의 흡사하고 ( 살짝 좁긴 하지만) 관리도 잘 되어 깨끗하고 침구나 수건은 만족 스러웠어요. 또 호스트분과의 연락도 굉장히 빠르고 좋았답니다. 처음 체크인할때 키박스는 한국인에게는 조금 어려울 수 있으니 꼭 호스트분께 어떻게 여는것인지 확인하고 물어보세요. 저도 지나가는 영국인이 도와주셨답니다. 그리고 위치는 좋은데 계단이 가파른 4층의 아파트인데다가 엘베도 없어서 짐 올리고 내릴때 너무 힘들었네요. 또 세탁기도 지하 4층에 있어서 빨래하고 오르락하느라 힘들었던 기억이.. 이런 점만 빼면 깔끔하고 안전해서 만족스러운 곳이었어요.
She helped a lot in everything, she is very kind host

Adelaide is a very nice and kind host. She helped me in everything I needed and also left some fruit and snacks in my room and in the morning she made breakfast to me. It was a real pleasure staying there. Moreover Zoe's place is 15 minutes far from the east Croydon Station by walking and the city center. I actually enjoy my trip also thanks to Adelaide. I recommend her house. :)

I loved my stay at Zoe's Peace House. The place is even better than described - spacious, incredibly clean, with easy access to the center of London by train, underground and bus. And for the first time in my traveling experience, the Internet was great! Adelaide proved to be the perfect host - nice, friendly, always ready to give you a hand with anything you might need. There are always fresh fruit and snacks waiting on the table, clean towels in the shower, and spare toiletries, in case you didn't bring your own.
I strongly recommend this flat, and I know that next time I need to go to London, this will be the first place I will look for.
Thank you, Adelaide, for everything!
Pokój był świetnie przygotowany. Adelaide jest bardzo pomocna, miła, usmiechnięta. Pokój był naprawdę w dobrej lokalizacji, świetne połączenia do centrum croydon, londynu, lotniska itd.

Really welcoming, took her time to show us everything and communication was really good. Fruits and drinks readily available.
Also helped us in locating things around the area and advised on getting to and fro our interested destinations.
Chambre très propre et très agréable séjour, très bien accueillie, on c'est senti comme chez nous.

We absolutely loved it at Adelaide's!

Adelaide welcomed us to her house amazingly friendly and caring even though it was already past 11pm!
She offered us drinks immediately, showed us around, told us we could help ourselves with drinks and food from the kitchen, she put a tray of biscuits & fresh food in our room and was just lovely all around.

We felt very comfortable at her place. She even let us leave our luggage at her place after check-out so we could explore the city without having to worry about our suitcases and she even dried my towel that I put over my suitcase to air-dry!! So thoughtful. (She also offers you towels by the way)

She helped us reach our next AirBnB and let us call from her phone so we wouldn't have to use ours (cause it's very expensive calling someone in England from a German phone). She was thoughtful and caring the whole time and we would stay with her again any time! :)

We only had problems at our arrival since we made an arrangement that we'd call her when we arrive at East Croydon station so she could tell us how to get to the AirBnB but we couldn't reach her, which ended up in us walking around East Croydon for an hour at night, asking every person we could find to tell us the way until we met a lovely lady who helped us out with Google Maps on her phone. A couple minutes after we reached the street (we didn't know the house number) Adelaide called us back. We thought we'd have to stay on the street but luckily it all went well and I can tell you for sure that she'd never let anyone stay on the street! :D Then she welcomed us so so so so friendly even though it was already 11pm. In the end this was just a minor hiccup and she definitely made up for it with her personality and willingness to help.

East Croydon station is only 15 minute walk (if you know the way!!) away from Adelaide's house. From there you can take the train straight to Victoria Station (London) which takes about 20-25 minutes. It's very convenient. Just make sure you leave a little earlier to find the station the first time and have in mind that the trains are PACKED with people on peak-time & that you might not get in to the train & have to wait for the next one. You could also take the bus straight to London if you'd like but it takes a little longer.

We would immediately stay with her again and we were sad having to leave after one night because the other AirBnB we stayed in after that wasn't even close to welcoming and caring as Adelaide was. :)

Cheers
Maraike & Berenice

Adeleide was a verry nice and hulpfull lady (looking very young for her respectable age). The room was ok. It was clear that Adeleide had just started her B&B. The breakfast was "help-yourselve" in the filled kitchen.
The kitchen could use some cleaning.
Adelaide is a very nice and warm host. She made us feel very welcome. There is private parking right in front  of the house which is very convenient for us.
Amazing hosts. They made me feel so welcome and at home from the time off arrival to departure. I will be staying again on my next trip to London. ❤️❤️

Max and Billie were a great to deal with. The location is amazing - a two minute walk to the Notting Hill Gate station, and very close to Kensington Gardens.

That being said, the wifi was very spotty in the apartment and often cut out. Additionally, there were minor issues with the toilet not working properly and loose tiles in bathroom. That being said they just took over the building and you could see that they were actively working at improving the state of the building.

Max and Billie were always very quick to reply to us with whatever queries we had and were really flexible with our arrival time, even offering to look after our luggage until the room became available (as we arrived very early). The flat was in a beautiful location, was accessible and very modern and chic - plus an incredibly comfortable bed. Thanks so much!
Great location and perfect space for what we needed. Would recommend.
Fin lejlighed, god placering. Informering frem mod opholdet kunne være bedre.
Great little flat. We enjoyed our stay very much.

Not a pleasant experience. Had to contact host to get check in login code 2 days prior to arrival. Non existant wifi despite it being listed as having it. Contacted Billie - no response not even an apology. Good location but the studio is very tired and dusty. Bathroom was dirty. Despite what they mention in the description (family feel etc), there is no care for the place or their guest. I will be contacting air bnb regarding this terrible experience

Very good location and easy to find. And very clean and cozy.
But I couldn't use wifi while I stayed. And you would feel hard to communicate with host.
无语了 .估计我住的最不好的一间，热水要争分夺秒的去冲凉，每天如此。床上卫生也一样不干净，家里一点wifi都没有。我后悔了
The studio is highly recommended for its perfect location, where it's easy and convenient for you to find everything around. I would like to say that I may still choose it next time I visit London.

We had a great stay at the flat. It is located perfect next to Notting hill gate (tube station). The even arranged for an extra mattress for our son of three. Because of the split level you have enough space. Furthermore the flat is light and clean.
Really nice neighborhood, just 1min from underground. Notting Hill is lovely as well Max and Billie place! They help us a lot with the check-out, they were wonderful with us!

Super friendly people and quite possibly the most perfect location for us (my fiancee and I stayed in one of their studios in Notting Hill Gate).
Absolute dream to deal with and if we visit London again we will most probably want to stay with them again)

Max and Billie were really flexible about picking the keys up and let us store our luggage in their office while we explored london for the day. The studio was exactly how it was on the photos and there were absolutely no surprises. Max and Billie even left us some welcome chocolates! We had a lovely time staying in this studio and the location is perfect for an authentic London experience.
Perfect location for the carnival!

Max and Billie were wonderful frm the start! - They communicated quickly and kindly; their instructions on where to get the keys from were clear and I knew that if I got lost or misunderstood anything that they would be right there to communicate with and help me. The flat was immaculate. It has a beautiful window seat that creates such a cosy and relaxing atmosphere. The bed is wonderfully comfortable and the bedding delightful - I could go and just stay there to stay in bed for a couple days! The location of the flat is ideal - you can walk through Hyde Park to Oxford Street or hop on a bus or take the tube in just 2 minutes walk from the apartment. At the same time, the flat feels far from the rush of central London because it is tucked away on a lovely quiet street :) This for me is some of the highest praise you can give a city center apartment - to almost feel the peace of teh countryside when you close the door after a day in a city!And last but not least, Portobello Road and Westbourne Grove are a 5 minute walk from the apartment! AI would hopt to stay here if I ever was going to be in London again; Maxand Billie thank you :)

Neighbourhood was great and directions and communication were really good.
I asked them to change a flat as my daughter could not go up there with a ladder balancing on a log! (Which I now see it in the picture but nobody notices).
They couldn't, but somehow tried to help.
It was late we were so tired, the last thing I wished was to have problems with the flat. And I am generally very flexible.
This (Ladder-log thing)MUST change

Location: incredible. Perhaps one of the best located places I've ever stayed in London. Check-in was quick, easy, and I was soon on my way to exploring London. Place is perfect for a couple who is fine with a smaller room, and the loft bed is wicked comfortable. We had a couple issues with cleanliness, but Billie was very quick to stay in contact with me about it. Nothing that prohibited me from enjoying my stay, but I still appreciated how responsive they were.

Billie couldn't have been more helpful, very quick at replying to messages and answering any questions. The apartment is small and simple but does the job and has great transport links. Perfect for a trip to London for a few nights.
llegamos una hora antes,y el encargado muy amable,se comunico por telefono con Max y nos autorizaron a pasar al depto,nos ayudo con las valijas. El barrio muy lindo y tranquilo.
Cozy place and Billie was great at helping out and responding very quickly, thank you!!
Exactly as described, simple and modern studio flat. Very close to Notting Hill Gate tube station. Host made check in as smooth as possible. Would stay again.
Lovely room, great location. Thanks

Fantastic little studio in London. Perfect as having as a hub for your travels - especially if you don't intend on spending much time in the apartment.

Flawless location - so close to the tube station but close enough to most areas to walk.
This is a beautiful studio in an amazing location. We couldn't have asked for more, and the recommendations in Max ane Billie's guidebook were great.
Great place but quite noisy as our apartment was at the back of the building.

Nous sommes arrivés à l'appartement, ni Max ni Billie n'étaient présents... Nous avons trouvé les clés dans une boite sécurisée dont les hôtes nous avaient au préalable indiqué le codes d'accès via airbnb. Visiblement le studio mais aussi l'ensemble de l'immeuble sont dédiés exclusivement à la location. C'est un peu dommage.
Le logement est situé au 4eme sans ascenseur, nous ne le savions pas.
Un livret contenant des recommandations sur le lieu de vie et le quartier était mis à disposition, cela nous a aidé.
L'appartement est assez agréable, propre, en revanche certaines installations un peu vieillissantes (toilettes, douche, convecteur).

Billie was very responsive re key arrangements and flat amenities beforehand. The space is indeed a small studio but they have outfitted it very comfortably!  Great soft and big towels, comfy and warm bed great for 2.  Good refridge.  Bathroom best of all - all new, nice warm shower and good fan.  Good overall storage space. Nice windows to green in back yard.  It IS on the 4th floor of a walk up so you have to be physically fit!  Notting Hill Gate isn't as nice as we thought it would be - but it was fine and very centrally located (that counts for a lot!)

Just what I was looking for. Great location with easy access to buses and underground. Extremely convenient. Property is well looked after. Communication, arrival and departure very smooth. The apartment was just right for me ... Clean bright and airy. Everything working just fine. Would certainly stay here again.
Accurate listing, hosts very helpful and gave all information in advance.
I have stayed a number of time with max &a Billie always the perfect hosts
Very comfortable room , great stay would recommend. Ideal as was visiting friends in the area. Nice neighbourhood.

Diana was a lovely host. I was a bit late getting to the place but she was very understanding. She showed through the place explaining everything in detail. The place itself was perfect. She also left some fruits and breakfast which was totally unexpected and a very pleasant surprise. All in all a great experience.
Very welcoming and accommodating.

Diana's place is simply great. Very clean and neat. The bed is very comfortable and the area really peaceful. We had a fridge, kettle and a few essentials such as milk, tea, coffee, energy bars, fresh fruit, etc. Diana is a great and flexible host - she provided us with clear instructions which made it so much easier to find the place. In all a wonderful and peaceful stay. Will be coming back.

Diana met us when we arrived, showed us the (very clean) apartment and made us feel very welcome.   Very comfortable lodgings and we would have no hesitation in recommending this to others.  We are planning on returning when next in this area.

This was such a lovely place to stay after a long day at work.   Everything about the place was cozy and inviting.   Diana really thought about the little things that make you feel welcome and at home.  On top of that, the place was immaculate. I hope I am in the area again on business and that I can come back.
The hosts are very kind and helpfull. The room is a jewel, clean and beautiful.
Everything was perfect. what does show the host's kindness better than that she came out for us onto the railway station after we were late and astray. :)

La estancia en esta propiedad fue muy agradable, Diana y su marido son una pareja muy amables, hicieron todo lo posible para que nuestra estancia fuese comoda.  La casa esta situada en una zona muy bonita y tiene dos estaciones de tren a poca distancia.  Fue una experiencia positiva y la recomendaria a cualquier persona,  es mas, quizas repita la experiencia yo misma.
Great stay and host. Very comfortable and easy! Recommend to all!

Right at the heart of Soho.
The place is comfortable, well equipped and beautifully designed.
The apartment is very central to the busy Soho area, but being on a pedestrian street it's surprisingly quiet during all hours.
Many restaurants and bars within a walking distance, as well as theaters, cinemas and art galleries.
Rachel is awesome, hospitable and very accomodating.
Thank you, we had a great time!
Rachel人很好。

Her place is so great!
Nice and clean. My wife and myself had a wonderful time.

The place was a dream come true!

It's newly renovated, stylish, clean, ergonomic, even with flowers!
Ideal for 2 traveling, ok for 3 people, but 4 people might be a little bit to much, because of a micro small bathroom.

The only minus is that it's quite noisy (until 11 p.m.) - but who wants to sleep before that time when you are staying in Soho!
The host was lovely and helpful - thank you Rachel.

This was an excellent apartment. Very clean, well equipped and the location is very good. Particularly I appreciated the little extra touch with water and a praline by the bed side and tea available on arrival. The neighborhood gets busy and noisy during the weekend but it didn't disturb me. Recommended !
If you're looking for a unique, artsy flat with a bit of history, this is the place to stay!  Also, the bed is one of the most comfortable I've slept in in a long time!

We had a really great stay in Rachel's central apartment. Clean and well equipped, and there was plenty of space for 4 of us. She was very easy to communicate and getting in and out of the apartment was very easy. The street is noisy at night, but it is only an issue if you decide to use the air mattresses in the main room.
Excellent experience. Cosy, bright flat, very well equipped. First morning  we found a problem with the shower drainage...  and by lunchtime it had been solved.
Rachel's apartment is a rare find. In the middle of busy Soho but on a quiet walking street. Roomy, comfortable and very tasteful with interesting art and lots of light. Great place.
Rachel we had a wonderful time in your apartment, perfect location and very nice. If we return to london we will repeat!!!thanks for eveything.

Everything nice
Hosted and Studio and palace I loved
We will come again to it
Excellent room in top location with everything I needed

Nice and close to good tube lines and a cosy little place to stay in Notting Hill. Plenty of great places nearby to eat and drink. Max and Billie were very helpful with recommendations and with check-in as well. Great stay for solo traveller or young couple.

My husband and I stayed in this flat while visiting London during the first few days of our honeymoon. From the very beginning Max and Billie were helpful, friendly, and prompt with their responses. Both arrival and departure were made incredibly flawless with their super easy system. The street where the flat is located is picturesque and peaceful. The flat itself is very small and simple, definitely not anything plush or luxurious, but exactly as described and quite clean. The bed was comfortable, and the room is quite dark and quiet at night, which made for a lovely restful hub during a busy time in London. Our favourite part was the amazing location! Not only are there so many fantastic restaurants, cafes, parks, shops and pubs all within a short walking distance (they even provide a suggestion booklet which was very helpful), but its proximity to major tube and bus stops made for seamless travel around the city. We would definitely stay here again and would certainly recommend it to anyone spending a short time in London.

Emplacement parfait pour nos besoins, à 2min de marche de la station Notting Hill Gate. Près de plusieurs magasins, épiceries, restaurants et autres commodités. Appartement était bien organisé. J'y retournerais sans problème.

Great location as it was close to public transportation. The apartment was easy to find and the check in process was seamless. The apartment is small but was perfect for two people. I would stay here again and recommend this place to anyone.

I was in London for an over night stay for work and enjoyed my time at this lovely studio. The pictures and description are very accurate, it is tiny, but everything you need is there and the location is tremendous.

The studio is simply perfectly located, close to the tube station Notting Hill, in the middle of everywhere and still calm and quiet. The conversation with Max and Billie was easy and fast, and there are always people from the staff to help if there are any questions. Recommendable for 2 persons.
Superbe petit studio, très bien situé mais dans une rue très calme.

The Studio looks exactly like on the picture. And the Bed upstairs is very confurtable to sleep. The kitchen is not the biggest but enough to cock little meals.
Nothing Hill is a very nice neigborehood, with the Hyde Park nearby.
When I'm again in London i would stay there again.

Max and Billie have been very friendly and helpful!

The studio was very cute and the location absolutely amazing :) !

Our stay was great, nice studio, perfect location, only five minutes walking from Notting Hill Gate Station and lots of restaurants around. Great walk to Kensington Gardens just ten minutes  from the studio. Billie and Max were really helpful and always comunicative and available.
Great experience. The app was perfect, very clean and comfortable. Check in and out was easy.

The location of the apartment is perfect. The tube is within walking distance. As is the Portobello road and a few nice breakfast spots.
The studio itself is located in a beautiful and calm neighbourhood. It is pretty small but you will find everything you need. It's not the cosiest apartment but I would still recommend staying there if you are looking for a base from where to explore London rather than spending your majority of the time inside.
Max and Billie were friendly and offered us to leave our luggage in there office after check out which was really convenient for us.

The house was exactly like in the photos.
A little small but very comfortable and cleany.
Very good communicated with underground and buses.
The zone was very quiet and calm.
Excellent to spend a days visiting London.
Take care with the stairs leading the bed. :)
Great experience!!
Great studio and prime location.
Good area with many places to eat. Nice house. Appartement OK for short stay with 2 persons.
I booked this place last minute and Max and Billie were so accommodating. Great location and great links to London. Has everything you need. Definitely recommend. Thanks
Ottima

The studio was accurate. Fantastic location. I would add that for central London the neighborhood has a quiet, upper class, feel. So much better then my previous nearby Bayswater stays.
They also quickly came to our rescue when I did a silly thing with the keys.
Fantastic cosy central apartment - a terrific find close to shops, transport and all the fun London has to offer.
Bon quartier. Acceuil simple: juste ouvereture de porte par femme de chambre. J'ai apprécié l'effort qui a été fait pour m'ouvrir la porte à 14h30 au lieu de 15h
Everything was has expected. The studio was clean and quiet and had everyting I needed. Billie and Max were very helpfull and communicative. Would definitely stay there again.

The apartment was clean, simple, and perfectly situated! When our early flight meant we might be lugging our heavy luggage around until check-in, Max and Billie arranged for us to drop off our bags at their secure office so that we could enjoy London unencumbered. Great service!
The only bit of trouble we had was that wifi was a little spotty during our stay. However this was minor.
Would definitely stay with Max and Billie again!

Le logement est très bien placé, à deux minutes du métro et du bus.
L'appartement correspondait aux photos et max et billie on toujours très bien répondu à mes messages.
Je vous recommande cet appart si vous devez séjourner sur Londres :)
Very Nice place. Perfect localization.
The location of this apartment can't be beat. It was so easy to get around the city. We had a great time in the space.

Our hosts were amazing to deal with! We were able to store our luggage at their office since we were early for check-in, so that was a really nice option. We thought this space was a great location for walking to Hyde Park and getting to the tube. We didn't spend much time here but it was a good price for our short stay. I would definitely recommend it!
It was absolutely lovely to stay their place. Very convinrent but quiet and cozy. Only, wifi didn't work well but we loved the room.
Great location, central and close to underground and places to eat but still in quiet street.
Good apartment (images provided are accurate), very nice area. Amazing, very helpful hosts
Merci pour  tout

PROs:
Nice neighborhood
Easy to reach
Quite a few pubs and shops (both OK for day and night).
CONs:
Gotta have a good pair of legs if your studio is by the top floor
Still gotta work on the heating (just one radiator for the whole studio clearly isn't enough)
Double window would better isolate you both from the weather and the noise.

Max and Billie's flat is in a great neighborhood, very close to the tube and a great coffee shop on the corner. There are many antique stores and restaurants all within walking distance. We were surprised when we arrived to find that the flat was on the fifth floor and didn't have a lift. This was a clear challenge with suitcases. It is a small studio, and might not be the best place to hangout in, but if you are looking for a place that is just a bed and a shower, it would be great.

I enjoyed a seamless stay at Max and Billy's place. Their apartment is in a prime location with a subway station, shops, cinemas and Hyde park all within walking distance - this is great in addition with the building being snugly tucked away on a quiet side street.
Thanks for an awesome stay :-)

This apartment is really cute and feels like home. It's location is great near Notting Hill Gate tube station and Kensington Gardens (great place for a morning walk). It was well cleaned but a bit chilly (but I guess that's the same anywhere in London at this time of year). Towels were clean and very big.
Apartment is situated in the top floor of the building at it takes 83 stairs to get in there. That's good to know before booking.
The whole building and the neighborhood was beautiful and quiet. This apartment has a window facing the street and that's why ambulances etc. made a bit noise.
Checking in was really easy. In fact we were a bit early and meet our host at the front door. There was candy waiting for us which was a nice surprise.
There's no reason I wouldn't stay there again. I was visiting London for 4 days with my sister and this place was great for that.
Thank you  Max and Billie we had a very nice stay at your studio apt.. just for guests with lots of bags, make sure to choose a ground or first floor room!
Posizione molto comoda in quartiere carino. Appartamentino/studio come da foto, pratico e completo. Attenzione che é al quarto piano senza scale

The neighborhood is great, the studio is very well situated and for London standards, that's value for money.
Even though we did not meet them, Billie and Max have been very helpful and all their instructions were clear and accurate. They also offered a space for us to leave our luggage between check-out and the time of our departure.

Great location!  Very clean studio, cosy but space enough for 2 persons and taken it is in the center of London. Max and Billie were easy to communicate with and quickly responded to our queries. Thanks!
Nice clean studio flat in great location. Perfect for short stay
Tutto perfetto.

Max and Billies place was a great place to stay in the heart of Notting Hill.  We went to The Portobello Star for a Gin experience and this little flat was the perfect place to return to, with everything you could need and all very clean. Billie let me know all the check in and check out details on advance and was very quick to respond to any of my questions... Thanks!

È andato tutto bene
Le chiavi Sono state trovate immediatamente.
L appartamento piccolo ma confortante
Collocato in una posizione ottimale per i vari collegamenti al centro città e agli aeroporti.
Spero di poter tornare

Me and my partner stayed during November at Max and Billie's. The apartment is just what you need if you are in London for a couple of days. It's about a 3 min walk from the underground! Shops and restaurants make this neighborhood very desirable.
The apartment itself is small but comfortable for 2 people. Looking foward to staying in it again next time I'm in London

Gutes, sauberes Studio in toller Lage. Schönes, typisch Britisches Haus. Perfekt an den öffentlichen Nahverkehr angebunden, Pubs, Restaurants, Supermärkte in wenigen Gehminuten zu erreichen. Kommunikation mit den Gastgebern war super, Ankunft und Schlüsselübergabe gut organisiert.
Toller Aufenthalt, vielen Dank!
Great location, easy check in, about 3 mins walk to notting hill gate station, great room for a couple. would not take kids.
Had a great stay. Small apartment but good enough for two people on a city trip. Nice restaurants closeby

Listing was accurate, communication with the host was pleasant and instructions/directions were clear. Location is great, close to the Notting Hill Gate tube stn which is served by the Circle and District line as well as the Central line, so getting into the heart of London was a breeze.

Portobello Market is just round the corner, which is great for exploring for vintage/antique items and Kensington Palace Gardens is just a quick stroll away.

El departamento de
Max y Billie es muy bonito. Tal cual lo muestran las fotos. El barrio tiene una excelente ubicación, es tranquilo y precioso. Cerca del subterráneo. Tiene escaleras. Volveríamos sin dudas.

Nice location, was a little annoying having to walk to check in and get a key and then 0.6 miles back to get into the apartment with luggage and everything.
But nice stay
Max and Billie have been super helpful and lovely!
I recommed the place. It is easy to commute. Max and Billie were very accessible.

El apartamento sin problema. Cabe decir que es una casa de 4 plantas con 3 apartamentos en cada una de ellas. Pese a ello, es silencioso. Sobre el espacio: la cama, en la PARTE ALTA, tiene poca altura y ni se puede estar de pie, pero tumbado perfecto. Y el colchón es cómodo, se duerme genial :P. Eso sí, ojo la gente de movilidad reducida, porque la escalera para subir es pequeña y complicada. SALÓN perfecto con TV, sofá incómodo pero bien y armario grande. El BAÑO también bien, salvo el asidero del papel que estaba roto. El BARRIO es un lujo, mucho nivel adquisitivo, y tiendas al lado para comprar, además del Metro a 5 minutos. Recomendable de verdad.
Del PROPIETARIO, su atención de los mensajes deja un poco que desear. Menos de 24 horas antes de iniciar la estancia seguíamos esperando respuesta, hasta la misma mañana no nos mandó las instrucciones para coger las llaves, y a lo largo de los 3 días no les vimos. De hecho, tuvimos un problema con la luz y tuvimos que arreglarlo por nuestra cuenta porque ni respondieron ni aparecieron.

Very convenient traffic.
Good place to stay

We were pleased with the place. The location is unbeatable. The neighbourhood is safe and well maintained. The studio is comfortable and  clean. Communication with the host fast and effective. They took care of  our luggage before the check-in.  at the Overall another good airbnb experience. Thanks.
The location is good and ideal for a young single person on a short trip.  There is no lift in the building and the bed is a ladder climb away.

La estancia fue genial. No vimos a los anfitriones ni al llegar ni al salir, pero la comunicación con ellos fue sencilla y rápida.
La casa se ajusta a la descripción del anuncio y la ubicación es perfecta!
El secador se calentaba muy rápido y dejaba de funcionar un rato, pero por lo demás todo genial!
Muchas gracias por todo!! Lo recomendamos 100% para pasar unos dias en Londres.
Quite spacious for it's size, excellent location, great host! Just what you need if you are exploring London

The place is in a fantastic neighbourhood, 2 minutes from Notting Hill station with access to the 24h central line. Too bad for the bed which is a bit uncomfortable to climb into, still definitely worth it

This is a large room with en suite bathroom in a beautiful home in the fun Whitechapel neighborhood of London. Jon and Ella were easy to communicate with both before and during our stay, and were very friendly and accommodating. Jon even prepared a delicious breakfast for us - an unexpected but welcome surprise! Thank you both! We would definitely stay here again.

I've stayed at quite a few Airbnbs al over and I must say that this was my favorite. the room was open and comfortable. There is a pull out dry rack, towel warmer in the bathroom, and everything was clean. What really made this stay was in fact that hosts. Ella and John made me feel welcome and comfortable right from the get go. They were eager to make sure that I had everything I needed and were both very kind. I would definitely recommend this Airbnb and I'm sure I'll be back (mostly for Johns homemade bread 😊).

John is very friendly, he was alone at home, but it was amazing. The house is better than we thought The room is very nice John helped us in whatever we needed. Even accompanied us to where we wanted to go.
Nice experience.

We can't say enough good things about Jon & Ella. They were superb hosts and made us feel very welcome in their home and city. The room is also very well kept and spacious with perhaps the most comfortable bed in history. Short walk to the tube in a diverse and vibrant neighborhood. Would highly recommend to anyone.

Een verblijf zoals het hoort te zijn: netjes, ruim, oog voor detail en een mooie uitvalsbasis voor een stedentrip. Ella en Jon zijn super aardig en laten je welkom voelen. Heerlijk ontbijt en interessante gesprekken.
We loved loved loved our stay! The room is lovely, the bed is big, the bathroom is perfect. And Jon and Ella are very warm people, you feel at home. Xxx

Jon and Ella are both really considerate and helpful. They let me leave my luggage at their place in the morning. The next day Jon made really nice breakfast. The room I stayed is just beautiful and spacious and and clean and elegantly decorated. And all the details just made it feels like home.
Most importantly we had a really fascinating conversation during breakfast. It is a fantastic experience and I would definitely stay there again !

對一個旅人而言，最幸運的莫過於能找到一個讓自己感到舒適和自在的住處，有不受干擾的空間 和適時溫暖的協助，Jon 和 Ella 的 B&B 就是這樣一個完美的住處 ，它有我這趟旅程中睡過最舒服的床和香軟的浴巾，明亮寬敞的私人大浴室，裡面甚至還有非常棒的化粧桌 。
但我最喜歡的還是 Jon 和 Ella 的廚房 ，尤其是那個很大的神奇爐子 ，我非常享受每天早上的早餐時間，可以不受打擾的享用自製麵包和好吃得不得了的 Jon的香蕉蛋糕 （ 我覺得他的香蕉蛋糕比巴黎甜點店賣的還好吃 ，就像小時候在祖母家吃到的，引起你鄉愁的滋味）。
我每天慢慢的吃著早餐 ，在他美麗的原木餐桌上 回覆 email ，寫寫東西 ，聆聽院子裡悅耳的鳥叫聲 ，看著門外，想像將來花園經過Jon改造後的模樣 。如果我早點下來吃早餐，就可以遇到Jon，和他有愉快的對話 ，Jon和Ella都是非常親切而且樂於分享的人。
我的倫敦行程因此而少去了許多景點 ，都是因爲Ella的房子實在是太舒服了 ，讓我完全不想出門。

This is a fantastic place! The place was beautifully decorated, with incredibly large rooms. The kitchen was stocked with food and drinks for us everyday, which was such a lovely addition. The beds were sooo comfortable, the washroom was massive and fully equipped with all amenities including a heated towel rack! The area was nice and quiet with a park right in front. It was a short walk to the main streets where there was restaurants and grocery stores. Overall, my brother and I had a phenomenal stay and would highly recommend it.
Ella and Jon were very friendly and open hosts. The room was even prettier than on the pictures. Besides we got breakfast every morning. We would visit Jon and Ella once again!
Great value in a great part of town. Mehmood was very accommodating and a nice guy.
Cozy place close  to the metro and highway
The place was great! Mehmood was really nice and friendly. The location was close to the city, and was easy to get in every day, by bike, bus or rail. Would definitely stay here again :)

Me and my wife booked this place just after Christmas and left just before the New Year's eve. The first thing that we liked about Mehmood's place was the location and the value for money. The flat is very conveniently located near two underground stations (West Kensington and Barons Court), there are a few shops (Co-op, Saynsburrys) and also coffee shops and pubs nearby. In addition there is a bus stop just in front of the flat which add even more options of public transportation from and to the flat. About the flat itself we have to say that we were impressed at the first sight. The room have a very good space and looked very clean. Mehmood provide us with towels, shower gel and shampoo, it was very nice. The only disappointing aspect of the bedroom was the bed itself. Firstly, the linens were turned upside down and there were some hair and dust under the duvet (probably leftover from the previous guest) suggesting that is was reused. Also, the bed was not very comfortable, as the bed colis seemed to be already not working properly. The bathroom and kitchen were very clean. The kitchen was reasonably well equipped, but as it is very small, there was space just for one seat. If you are travelling as a couple and intend to eat at Mehmood's kitchen you will need to stand while eating. Despite the few problems reported, I would recommend Mehmood's place as it was very good value for money and also as it is very well located.

Host was great! Our first air b&b and it was so welcoming! Perfect and central location right next to West Kensington tube with plenty of amenities within a short distance (literally next door). Cannot recommend enough :)

Extremely convenient location and very friendly, helpful hosts. They were very accommodating and helpful when we had to check in very late, and brought us chamomile tea and fresh lemons when we were sick! Would recommend their place and wish them all the best.
A great location right next to the tube. The flat, which we shared with other guests who we never saw, was clean and comfortable. Amira was very accommodating to us changing out check in time.
Super clean and tidy room! The landlord is also a easy going and friendly person~
The stay was very comfortable with a great location and for a good price.
A nice welcome. A good sized room. Clean apartment throughout. Good location close to tube. Highly recommended.

If you want to try the best English home (bed and breakfast ) living experience in London, this house is the right house! The neighborhood is quite and the area is safe, the house is close to Putney Bridge station (tube) and one can reach downtown in about 20 mins. The house has a typical old british style and it was lovely and cozy to stay here. It was extremly clean and well furnished. The bathroom was completely new and always clean.
Annie and Andrew were the perfect hosts, always nice and helpful. Their home cooked breakfast was amazing, everything that you can want in a complete english breakfast.
This experience was better than staying in a hotel, and surely my best experience with Airbnb, I can advice it for sure to my best friend!!!
Thanks a lot Annie and Andrew, see you soon,
Fabrizio

My partner and I needed to stay the night in west London as we were on a business/leisure trip.
Annie and Andrew's delightful home couldn't have suited our needs better.
Perfectly and so conveniently located, walkable to the Tube and buses, to shops, bars and restaurants, not to mention the Thames towpath just on the doorstep.
Given the extremely busy road just nearby we couldn't believe how quiet our room was, even with a window ajar at night. Our beautifully appointed overlooked their lovely garden. There is currently construction work next door but we were never disturbed by it.
The bed-linen is to die for, we had a wonderful night's sleep. The room is really spacious with plenty of storage and a sofa in it too.
The full English breakfast was sumptuous, home-made, generous with lots of choice too. We didn't need to eat again till the afternoon, it really set us up for the day (and we like to eat!!)
Thank you again Annie and Andrew, will definitely come again when the need arises :-)
PS A&A have 12 years of B&B experience so they really know how to do it well!

This is an amazing couple doing fantastic work with there home as a bed and breakfast.  We couldn't have  had a better stay. The attention to make us feel welcome, and special was apparent from the time we arrived! We can't complement the host and treatment of us enough! I would love to stay with this host or property again and again!

This house is absolutely stunning and in such a great location in London. It is very close to the Underground, local shops and lovely restaurants. The building and interior are beautiful and immaculately finished. Annie and Andrew were wonderful hosts, giving us a lovely warm welcome and lots of advice on what to do and where to go. The breakfast was spot on and set us up perfectly for the rest of the day. I'm sure we'll be back!

We had 2 lovely days in this luxurious b&b, and we will definitely want to stay here next time we go to London as well.
The house is a very convenient 3 minutes away from Putney Bridge station, and we used approximately 30 minutes to Central London. The area around the b&b is very charming and a lot quieter than Central London. Our room was just as lovely as in the pictures, and the bed was very comfortable.
All in all we are very happy we decided to book a room in Annie´s b&b rather than a hotel. The room was much nicer than hotels I have stayed at in London, and the bed was much more comfortable.
Thank you Annie for having us!

Annie, Andrew and their lovely dog, Stanley created an atmosphere of warmth and elegance.
The linens, the breakfast, and the decor of their home were in the best of taste only to be surpassed by their generous hospitality. We had a private section in the quaint and tastefully decorated house with our own bathroom to soak our weary feet after hours of site seeing through London. I would most definitely recommend and plan to stay there again.
Thank you Annie!

Beautifully furnished house in a safe, leafy, quiet part of London. The hosts Annie & Andrew are lovely, as is their gorgeous little Cockerpoo, Stanley (who we miss already!).
We were in the upper bedroom which is a really good size, tastefully decorated, with a very comfortable Queen-sized bed. As others have said the quality of the bedlinen is divine! The private bathroom is huge with a bath / shower, and the Penhaligon's & Molton Brown toiletries were a bonus (I love Penhaligon's fragrances so was in heaven!).
Breakfast was great - huge variety of cereals, muesli, toast and preserves, and a lovely cooked breakfast.
Tips: if the weather's nice spend a few hours exploring the churchyard a few steps away. This leads through to Bishop's Park and Fulham Palace, and be sure to stop for coffee and cake at the tea shop there. We ate at the Indian restaurant on the other side of the high street called 'Pure' (30 seconds walk) and had an amazing coconut venison curry. For info an Über taxi was only £13 from Paddington to the house.
Altogether a FANTASTIC first experience of Airbnb for us. Annie & Andrew's B&B definitely beats the overpriced London hotels and is sumptuous. Thanks so much - we'll definitely be back!
Mooi huis, Prima kamer, goede service, heel erg gastvrije mensen. Schoon, mooie buurt met leuke restaurantjes en goede verbinding met trein/metro

Annie and Andrew were brilliant hosts, the room was spacious and comfortable. The whole house had a nice relaxing feel. And the breakfast was beautiful, so is Stan their cockerpoo. Couldn't have chosen a better place to stay.

To everyone considerings staying at Annies place : I can highly recommend to do so! I couldn't think of another place I would prefer to stay in London.
My mum and me stayed for two nights in this lovely house and were more than satisfied. The room and the private bathroom are spacious, clean, very comfortable and just make you feel at home. Moreover, the design of the room makes it feel very unique and special. Annie provided us with towels, bathrobes, shampoo and everything we needed.
You can reach the centre of London/Westminster (Big Ben station) in around 20-25 minutes by tube without even changing tubes. Furthermore, the area around the house is lovely with a lot of little shops and restaurants. We can highly recommend "Pappa Ciccia" an Italian restaurant with original Italian cuisine and a cozy atmosphere. The house is located close to the river thames, which could be nice for walks as well.
Annie and her husband were very warm, welcoming and respectful hosts. They did everything they possibly could to make us feel welcome and comfortable. The breakfast was more than we could have asked for: musli, fruit, bread, egg, bacon, bread, juice and so much more. We didn't have to eat again until the afternoon. We were especially happy about the little dog Stanley. However, Annie and her husband would always stop him from coming to our floor and the breakfast room, as they were very respectful in case someone doesn't like to have a dog around.
All in all I can say that we would always come back to stay at Annies place as we felt at home. The location is not too far from the city centre, the house and the neigbourhood are lovely, the breakfast is amazing and Annie and her husband are very lovely hosts.

That is the best Airbnb I found. Annie's house is really beautiful. And the room looks like even better than the pictures. And we had a nice breakfast. It's really delicious. We already decide to come bake again, cus it is worth it.

I can't say enough good things about this home. Andrew and Annie were excellent hosts. Our room was so comfortable and cozy. The bed was so comfortable with my new favorite sheets. It really felt homey. Having a large bathroom with our room was great. So much bigger than the hotel bathrooms. Eveything was clean and tidy.
The location of the home was a 4 minute walk to the underground. Super convenient to any of the district lines to visit all the attractions. The neighborhood area is lovely, safe, and brimming with the best restaurants. I was traveling with my 10 year old son so Annie and Andrew were able to make great recommendations for visits to attractions that he would enjoy and restaurants as well.
Each morning we woke up to a wonderful breakfast! Fresh fruits, cereals, eggs, bacon, coffee, tea..All served beautifully in the dining room. It really doesn't get better than this. This place is truly special. I would not hesitate to return.
干净整洁 很棒的位置以及热情的主人

Of all our AirB&B experiences, this one ranks as memorable for the unique experience of being welcomed as a close friend of the family. Annie and Andrew welcomed us into their home to share their delightful period property situated in a little oasis in SW Fulham. The bedroom was beautifully laid out: a 5 star bed, Egyptian cotton sheets and down duvet with a brilliant bathroom that offers a bath for deep soaking and a separate shower. Andrew's magnificent cooked breakfast is taken in a delightful dining room. Stunning value for such quality of furnishings and consumables, but the jewels in the crown are Annie and Andrew themselves. We'll be back!

This is a lovely house, well located and Annie and Andrew are a delightful couple and Stanley their dog is equally delightful!
You will be well looked after .

The most charming and traditional town house, along with lovely hosts. Our room was very comfortable and cosy, real luxury, the en suite too!
The breakfast was delicious, a different variety of home made goodies and cooked breakfast was a real treat! Would recommend this place 100%! Thank you!

Annie's place is great value for money. the location is nice and there are good restos around. she also has a cute dog named stanley that is super super cute. the room was clean and the bed was comfy. overall, we had a lovely stay.
Veri special home

Annie and Andrew are experienced hosts in every aspect of providing a high quality BnB experience.  Their remodeled 1670 home is lovely and located in a vibrant neighborhood right across from Bishops Park, a real hidden gem.  Our large room felt very private and offered everything we needed plus many additional amenities such as bathrobes, thick towels, and Jasmine air freshener.  Breakfasts were a delicious feast served from 8:00-9:30.  Andrew even made us coffee and toast before we had to leave at 7:00 a.m. to catch a flight.  Annie was always available to help as needed and her restaurant recommendations, we walked to them, were excellent.  Our stay here was just what we needed to refuel after two weeks on the road.  It also served as a sanctuary after hectic days into London.

This was a truly beautiful room in a gorgeous old house, and Annie gave us the warmest welcome. We particularly loved the spacious bathroom, delicious breakfast and being greeted by Stanley the dog whenever we came downstairs (he's friendly but very well-behaved!). The location is perfect: plenty of restaurants, Tube station nearby, and Fulham Palace only a short walk away (with beautiful gardens and a very good cafe). We can't recommend this enough!

Really welcoming hosts and a lovely home. Very clean and tidy. Easy to get to and nice location/surroundings. Thank you so much to Sobia and her daughter for being so friendly and inviting. Will definitely recommend to others and hope to come back again!

This was my first Airbnb experience and it was excellent. Sobia (and her daughter) were exceptional hosts and I couldn't have been happier. Friendly, willing to help navigate and made me breakfast one morning which was very thoughtful. The room is as advertised and the bed was super comfortable. The walk to the Underground is less than ten minutes and was roughly 30 minutes to get into Zone 1 where most of the tourist attractions exist. The location is perfect if you want/need to be out by the Wembley Stadium Complex to attend a football match at the stadium or shows at the SSE Arena. Would absolutely stay with Sobia again.
I was impressed by the neatness, and elegance of the place. The host was an excellent communicator  as well.
Brilliant location for Wembley stadium, communication was fantastic, very clean and comfortable.
Sobia and her daughter are very nice.The house is very clean.
Cosy and very clean place. Bed very confortable. Sobia is a very nice host. She is very attentive and kind. I will come back to Sobia´s place if I return to London

Great arrival, the host made a real effort to accommodate my arrival time and show me around the property. Everything was comfortable and exactly as advertised. Id be happy to stay again or recommend to others.
The house is extraordinary clean and tidy with comfortable bed that ensures you a fast and sound sleep.
Beautiful host, lovely home, comfy bed, all facilities as stated. Very close to Tube and Wembley Stadium, highly recommended
Great place to stay and Sobia is a great host!

Great location!
The room and apartment are well kept and clean. Very friendly hosts and a perfect stay overall.

Fantastic host during stay! Flexible with check in and check out, and the complimentary gifts were much appreciated :)
Definitely recommend
Even though we were late for arranged check-in, Mehmood was very understanding and helpful throughout the stay! Would recommend the host!
It's a place in a good location.Mehmood is so nice, the time for check-in really convenient..anyway, nice for everything.

The flat is really Nice and close To everything ! Thanks TO Mehmood, a really kind host.
I recommand this flat
Very Nice et Thank you for your hospitality. Very close to the underground.

Communication with host was excellent - before and during our stay. The room was clean and well furnished. Shared with two other renters (who we didn't see). Shared facilities which were mostly clean and tidy. Fantastic location - 1 min from West Kensington tube station.
Nice place and clean. Really close to the underground station and communication with Mehmood was fluent and easy. Recommended place!!!

Good host and good location. The room is in the 4th floor apartment, the floor and kitchen and toilet is clean.
The place close by central , West Kensington and supermarket 2mins walk.
The Holland Park, High Street Kensington and the Museums 25-30mins walk.
Thanks Memood and recommend.

Appartamento vicinissimo alla metro, molto caldo e ospitale. L'host é disponibilissimo. Unica cosa, non sarete gli unici ospiti nella casa, nelle altre due stanze potreste trovare altri ospiti. Fortemente consigliato per la posizione e l'host.

Nice place and clean room, near by to bermondsey station, high recommended the location.
I will continue to stay for my next time trip to London.
Lynn is such a kind person, she helps you for any request. The flat is very near from every public transportation. the room is perfect for a weekend or a week.
lovely place, Lynn was very accommodating and it was a comfortable spot. Bermondsey tube is a few minute walk. All in all absolutely wonderful and would definitely stay here again for work.

The apartment is pleasant to live, the kitchen is well equipped and the mates in other rooms are easygoing with, but most importantly, the hostess Lynn is perfect! I got a really bad cold when I stayed at Lynn's, and she brought me soup cooked by the chef of her restaurant and some Lemsip in person at 22:00 in the night, literally beautiful and considerate lady. I will definitely recommend Lynn's apart to everyone coming to London.
Have a very pleasant stay here .

Lynn is an amazing and really funny host. She had welcome us very late and with the dinner!
She answer really fast and she does what she can for arrange your stay.
The flat is quiet good, well equiped and near of the London center/underground station.
Great!

Lynn was a wonderful host. Very caring and makes sure everything is perfect for her guests! The room was perfect and just as depicted. Location was great, close to the underground, and an easy walk to plenty of places! Definitely recommend staying here.

The room is small but very neat and clean. It is located in a great residential area close to the center of london. Tower bridge is just a 15min walk away.
You will be sharing the apartment with three roommates that work in Lynn's restaurant (which you shoulf definitley check out). They are usually quiet but if you're a light sleeper you might wake up when someone uses the bathroom ;).
The best thing about this place is the host itself, though. Lynn was just lovely. It was super easy to communicate with her and she does everything in her power to make your stay more comfortable. She even offered us some Indonesian food in her restaurant for free.
Definitely recommended!

Lynn's place is supercentral, it's 10 minutes to the Tower Bridge. When you come from Gatwik airport by train, it's only one stop by tube to Lynn's house or you can walk a bit. Place has everything you need, as described. It's a guesthouse of 4 rooms and common areas. My room was warm, bed was really comfortable.
Neighboorhood is very quet, Tesco is 2 minutes away.
Lynn was a great host, helped me a lot.
I stayed for two nights, but the place is good enough to spend a week or two there.
Lynn was a great guest. Excellent place. Super clean. Perfectly located.

The place is near bus stations that lead to everything, but far enough to be quiet. We enjoy staying at Adrian's place. It was clean, calm and they were really discreet. They provide stuff to make breakfast, wich is really nice.

Adrian and Stephanie are wonderful hosts. They took great care to make sure we had everything we needed to be comfortable and enjoy ourselves while in London.
Their place is located very close to the Pimlico underground station which offers easy access to the rest of the city.

My girlfriend and I had a lovely stay over, we were made to feel very welcome upon arrival and fully relaxed with a cup of tea in the kitchen.
The room was a generous size and bed very comfy.
Will definitely keep in mind for other overnights in London.

The house and our room were super tidy. The room had a really nice view of the London skyline. We could see the London eye, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, The Shard and more in the distance from our window. It's a 20 minute walk to Victoria station, 10 to Pimlico Station. They provided breakfast food should we want and a nice atmosphere. The shower was a bit tricky to work out but it was separated from the toilet which made waiting for one easier. There's a small lift by the stairwell that we utilized for luggage. Adrian was great with communication and worked with us to make sure they weren't hindering the bathroom/shower time for our schedule. We enjoyed out stay, thank you.
Great location great host!!

I stayed here during an 18 hour layover in London.  Adrian was very welcoming and accommodating with check-in. The room was very clean and pleasant.  It was very easy to get to and from Victoria station.  I just wish I could have stayed longer!
Almost everthing was perfect. I can recommend adrians Place!

The apartment is very comfortable and the location is great, especially if you're traveling through the Victoria station. The view from the bedroom window is phenomenal. Stephanie helped us get our bearings when we arrived and made sure we were comfortable the whole time. Thank you two for hosting us! We highly recommend!

Adrian and Stephanie were lovely hosts, and the whole flat is extremely clean! Having breakfast included was awesome, and although it is not right downtown, I think it only took us 25 minutes to walk to Big Ben area, and it's decently close to the Tube at Pimlico.
When our pulling adapter wasn't working, Stephanie graciously allowed us to use her plug to charge our phones overnight.
Overall a very lovely flat, with great hosts. Would definitely recommend.
Great little place. Very convenient for travel, Adrian is very responsive to queries, awesome view from the bedroom and fast wifi.
Good hosts, place is well-situated and offers easy access to Victoria line which gets you to all major routes. Would definitely consider booking again.

Adrian place is super nice! Close to city center, very clean and comfortable. They are very helpful and helped me a lot. Though I experienced something unpleasant in London, Adrian and Stephanie comforted me which made me feel quite moved... Thx a lot!!!
The place was tidy and clean and within easy reach from Victoria station. Hosts were wonderful.

Very accommodating hosts. Room was just what I needed.  Close enough to town. There are a couple places to get some food late within a block or two if you need it.  The map is accurate. But the house number is 66. 5th floor of the building. I would stay there again. Cheers!
The house was very clean and within walking distance to so many tourist locations. Both the hosts were very friendly and lovely to be around. Would definitely recommend and would stay here again.
The hosts were very friendly and made me feel at home. The room was clean and bright and perfect for a solo traveller. I would definitely stay again next time I am in the capital.
Все было отлично. Рекомендую всем, не пожалеете, в центре Лондона, около станции метро Пимлико, хозяева очень доброжелательные и готовы всегда помочь.
Ótimos anfitriões. Localização excelente. Bom café da manhã.Caca muito tranquila.

Apartamento com uma ótima localização.
Ambiente tranquilo, limpo e bem organizado.
Ótimo breakfast!
Eu recomendo para outros colegas que estiverem de passagem em Londres.
Quiet and welcoming.  Can help yourself to breakfast.  A bit difficult to find on foot.
Repetiría fijo en casa de Roger. Muy céntrico, hospitalidad magnífica. La cama una maravilla de lo cómoda.
Roger is a great host - he always answered promptly and made me feel at home.  The place was superb and well-worth the price.  Great location, clean and good breakfast options.
My friends were very pleased!

Relatively convenient location (close to the Canada Water Tube station and right around the corner from the Hawker House) in a quiet neighborhood. Since he was a newer host, we felt like we were taking a bit of a chance with Roger--but he passed with flying colors! A huge bedroom, clean bathroom, and even fresh breakfast items each morning. What more could you ask for?
Roger was very accommodating. He's a chilled out host and very nice.
Great place to stay . Clean comfortable and very easy to get into central london
Room as described, convenient location. Roger was a nice host who laid out breakfast for us in the morning too!

Roger is very nice
We come just for one night but he is very helpfull
The breakfast is good!
We enjoy our quick night 😁
The bed the room and the bathroom are perfect

Roger is a great Host. A lot offre kindness  and hospitality. The room is  Big and very clean and the bathroom too. Very good location, you are in the centre of London on 15 minutes. Thanks for all Roger !

Lovely big room, great welcome and very quiet night. Roger also let me park in front of his garage which was a relief after a bit of trek through the streets of London. my husband arrived by tube and said it was very well located and easy to get to and from Central London. We would certainly like to stay again if we need to be in the area.
It was a great place to spend a few days in London.  Close to King's Cross and maybe a 20-30 walk from the sights downtown.  The staff is available to answer any questions and is helpful.
Brilliant last minute accom and surprisingly quite for Kings X
Budget ´student' type place, that is well equipped and well located close to the mainline stations.  It isn't spotlessy clean or modernised, but is adequate
Even tho we could've not used the kitchen in our room, there was another kitchen. Center in the city so very convenient for traveling.

The location was excelent and contact with the owner was good. Although we did no see him he replied quick to my questions through mail and sms. It was nice that the room was a townhouse accomodation so we had some privacy and our own bathroom.
The showerroom needs a bit more cleaning and the matresses could be improved.

My room was separate from the main building, and looked like a compact, self-contained studio. Unfortunately the heating was not working on a very cold night. I messaged the host late in the evening but did not hear back until the morning. He was apologetic and I was sent a partial refund but I would have preferred a good night's sleep!
Also the hob didn't work (I followed the instructions by switching it on under the sink first), and the bedding and bathroom were not clean.
Otherwise, the place was very well organized and the host was friendly, so I assume this was just a one-off! It was also useful to have a place to store luggage before check in.

Decent room, that worked perfectly for our three nights stay. Nothing fancy, but I wasn't even looking for room to spend time in. Room had everything needed, location was really good and Zaeem was helpful the one time I contacted him. Overall, everything went smoothly.
This was exactly as listed. No complaints. Would stay again.

I stayed at Zaeem flat, it was great! It´s in a walking distance from king´s cross station, the place was clean and the check in was pretty easy. Also we had a late flight and he has a storage where we could leave our bags after the check out.

The place was good for the night! The room we were given was much larger and nicer than the photos. It had a nice kitchenette and it's own bathroom. Check in was easy and the lady who helped us was very kind. Compared to other prices in London I would recommend this.
Gabe was an excellent host who responded to all queries quickly. The room was clean and spacious in a lovely ground floor flat.

Bright, clean, spacious rooms. Very comfortable bed with crisp clean bedding. Bathrooms are shared, but there is a separate WC too. Kitchen is shared and completely clean. Quiet neighbourhood! Gabe is very obliging. Will def stay again if the opportunity arises.
Great location to Paddington Station.

Great exprienc, friendly host.
The location is also good its a 3 min walk to paddington station.
The place was clean
The room was very big, clean and quiet. Gabe was so nice and helped us a lot to make our visit in London perfect!
Dream location near everything. The host was great and the house was super clean.
位置非常好，步行到帕丁顿地铁站火车站只要2分钟，房间非常大，很安静，房东人很好，很热心的帮助我买火车票
Very good location, clean and very near the city centre. Gabe was a very good host, always there to help.
Nice place to stay close to London center.

Gabe's apartment is in a great location! Just walking distance from Paddington station and Hyde park, making all of London easily accessible. Gabe was great at providing check in instructions since he couldn't be there and the room was spacious and clean.

This was perfect ! Nice room, lot of space and everything you need. You have access to the kitchen and it makes you feel like home. Lynn is really nice and helpful, she'll be there if you need anything. Plus, her restaurant just below the flat is super good ! Thanks Lynn !

Lynn's place is perfect for a few nights in a very compelling part of London. The decor is lovely, and she's thought of all the little details (like providing toiletries, and little shelves to put your shoes on). There's a balcony too which is very pleasant in good weather.
On top of that, it's well worth trying the Indonesian delights available at the host's restaurant, Japindo,
located just downstairs. Some of the best Southeast Asian food I've had in London. Thanks again Lynn!
Great value for money, comfy bed, clean residence,l

Excelent room for 2 persons eith closet, tv, desk near to a market.
If i come to london im come back

This was the perfect place for our 3 day stay in London!! The room was cozy and we felt very welcome. The host's restaurant is also definitely worth trying, we ended up eating there twice!  Overall a great stay with helpful hosts. Would recommend if you're in London for a few days!! :)

A great spot! Lynn was very helpful, the room was nice & tidy and fast internet. Super close to the tube and great Thames river pubs, The Angel & Mayflower. I recommend the restaurant too where I enjoyed a really good value meal -  a hidden gem off the high street.

Had a great night's sleep in the comfy bed in this well organised, clean and tidy space. Though I didn't meet Lynn, the staff from the restaurant downstairs were there for check in and were most welcoming. The room itself is accurately described and represents good value in a convenient, quiet and safe area - very handy for the tube or bus. Added bonus was being able to enjoy delicious food (there's a Japanese, and an Indonesian menu) in the restaurant downstairs - recommended!
