Just as described in posting. Friendly hosts. Quick to respond. Quiet area. Perfect for solo traveller. Near tube station. Enjoyed my stay!

Lynn apartment is well located! It was easy to communicate with Lynn also. Everything was great but it is important to note that it is a share flat with others guests! (quite ok but waiting for bathroom and toilet, doors noise etc). It is not such a big deal, so we recommand the flat !
Great location, 2 minute walk from the station. Lynn was great, replied super quick whenever I needed help. Would definitely stay here again
Rishi was very helpful, and the hotel was new and extremely clean.

This place is perfect for a short stay in Croydon, 10 min walk from east Croydon station in a simple direction.
It's new,immaculate and has everything you could possibly want!
Rishi was a perfect gentleman. We would stay here again anytime
Thanks
Great place, friendly staff . Would recommend and stay again 👍
Really nice place to stay. There is everything you need.
Fantastic stay, highly recommended.
Very new, clean and everything that you need for a comfortable stay. I would stay again
You get what you pay for, stylish, spacious and easy to get around :)

Great location, excellent amenities and stylish space. It’s a great idea - somewhere in between a hotel and a serviced apartment. Might be worth checking google to see if you can get a cheaper deal elsewhere because it’s also listed on other booking websites.
Value for money, great customer service, very good hygiene standards.
Great place to stay for a short trip. Everything needed was provided.  Clean, tidy and modern place.

Really great host! The guest home was very clean and comfortable. Vishal checked in with us numerous times before our stay and made sure we were all set. Very nice people. 10/10 property would for sure stay there again.

We really enjoyed our stay. Vishal and his family were excellent hosts and were really friendly and helpful. The accommodation was brilliant and very spacious and comfortable. We would definitely stay here again if we are in the London area.
Lovely studio with two huge sofa beds. Very clean as well. Had an amazing stay at Vishal's.

Vishal and his family were great. My boyfriend and I didn't get into town until very late, but Vishal offered to wait for us well past 10pm. When we got settled, Vishal walked with us to help us find somewhere where we could grab a quick bite, as we were insanely hungry. Not only that, but Vishal went completely out of his way the next morning to come with us on the bus and tube to Soho because we had never been to London before. Vishal is definitely an amazing host, but clearly an overall crazy nice guy. I have no idea how long it would've taken us to figure out how to travel on our own.
The space itself is quite nice, stocked with dishes, towels, and even tea. The sheets and comforters all appeared very clean, and the bathroom was tidy as well.
We definitely enjoyed this space for the night, and we definitely appreciate how amazing our host was.

The place was removed from big streets but easy to find. There were multiple bus stations very close by and small shops around. The room itself was very spacious with two beds, kitchen, bathroom, fridge, and TV. The hosts were incredibly friendly and accommodating. I highly recommend this place!!
A great place that is spacious, comfortable, and clean, in a great neighborhood and close to the airport and other public transportation. I would highly recommend Vishal's flat!

Our stay with Vishal and his family was just what the doctor ordered after a long flight from Asia. Information given was good and the whole family were welcoming and helpful. Vishal's wife even gave us a lift up to the bus stop as we were tired and in a hurry to get to an appointment due to late arrival of our flight in London.
The accommodation is adequate, clean and includes a small kitchen, where tea, coffee, milk and breakfast cereals were provided. The mattress on the sofa-bed was a little soft for my liking, but then, I do like a firmer mattress than most people; it didn't stop me sleeping like a baby!
The reasonable price of the accommodation and the close proximity to bus routes to and from Heathrow, Hayes & Harlington train station and Hounslow West underground made this a perfect place for us to stay, and we will certainly look to staying here again when we need a room near Heathrow again.

The apartment has two uncomfortable sofa beds for sleeping. Hence I and my family could not sleep the entire night. The apartment had dust everywhere and the bathroom was dirty with visible urine stains on the floor. There were no towels, shampoo or basic toiletries available.
However, the worst thing was the noise from the jets flying over the apartment in the morning; At 6 am London Heathrow opens for traffic and at that time the noise of jets every 2 minutes is unbearable. We decided to check out around 7 am and took a room at a hotel for a few hours of peace.
Lovely and friendly, we felt very welcomed and comfortable. Incredibly accommodating and helpful.
Vishal and his mother were extemely friendly and helpful. Had to fly out of Heathrow and this was the perfect airbnb. Very close to public transit and the airport! I Highly recommend!
This is an amazing apartment, I will definitely be back.  FIVE STARS

Fabulous apartment , lovely host , completely perfect stay.
Thanks so much

A short walk from this apartment and you have an excellent bus service to Greenwich.
It provides a good base for Excel and Canary Wharf.
I arrived quite late on the first night but this was not an issue for the host.
The apartment is a great place with plenty of room.
I will use again.
Awesome place!!!! Very nice. Very spacious. Amazing host. Great communication - and at very short notice.

This really is a rare, one of a kind find. Such an awesome space and will be recommending to anyone who is looking for somewhere to stay in south London! Friendly easy to contact host, with lots of thoughtful touches. Perfect that the space has its own entrance so you feel you're not disturbing anyone.
Everything was perfect, thank you so much! Had a great time and would recommend Clairs place to anyone! Would come here again anytime!

We really enjoyed our stay at Clair's studio. It was perfectly located between Greenwich and the O2 arena - only around 10mins walk to Greenwich park. The studio was very stylish and quirky, and check in was super easy. The bed was so comfy and the little extra touches and breakfast bits made our stay just perfect. It's very quiet with no street noise either and in a nice neighbourhood. Would certainly recommend!

A really amazing flat with great facilities. Beautifully furnished and decorated, and great location - well connected with the trains and buses to central London and North Greenwich etc. 10/10, couldn't recommend it highly enough.
Excellent quality for the price
Beautiful accommodation, lovely area - so friendly and welcoming.

Really nice couple of nights on the studio.
Very clean, nice bathroom and a fantastic central location in London.
Only lacks a bit of space since it is a very small studio.
With that said, I absolutely recommend it!
Fabulous place that was quiet & perfect for our stay in London. Would stay again happily!
Wonderful little apartment in an absolutely ideal location, very clean and tidy, with all the amenities that make for a comfortable stay! Will definitely be returning!
Leyla was great. The location was absolutely perfect and everything was easy and convenient.
The location was great, close to the train station. Grocery store right down stairs was nice and convenient as well as restaurants. The apartment was clean and decorated nicely. Would stay again:)
Lovely quiet area, 5 mins from plenty of amenities and a short trip on the tube away from the tourist sights. A hop on hop off bus tour is literally beside the nearest tube station.

Great stay, great apartment. All very easy to access. Very clean and tidy with everything you need. If you're looking for an affordable stay in Chelsea you won't do much better.  Easy walk to Kings Road, and really recommend the Japanese restaurant next door.  Great experience all round.
Piso muy confortable y funcional,  muy bien ubicado. Muy buena la atención de Leyla cuando lo necesitamos. Recomendable!

The flat was cozy and comfortable. It was clean and looked just like the photos. Perfect for a single traveler or couple. It was close to the Underground, restaurants, and shopping. Great location! I was traveling from the States and would stay there again.

Great space for one or two people max. Sweet cozy studio, very close to the tube, about a five min walk. Also walking distance to major sights like Buckingham Palace if you would prefer that over taking the tube.
Very high fashion area with loads of fancy shops if you can afford them.
I was only there the night but felt safe and secure as a woman traveling on my own. Would stay again.
Fab, big room in a lovely house! Very comfortable & well catered for stay, great hosts & relaxed feel.

We were really excited to arrive in this appartment for a 4 days trip. We were even more excited when we discovered the bedroom and bathroom! Everything was super clean and cosy. I liked the complete flexibility I had with my own keys and access to all common areas as well.
I didn't use the kitchen much, but it was functional and well equipped.
The apartment is shared with two cats, so if you're scared or allergic, this may not be a place for you. They are very curious and intelligent, so provided a good source of entertainment for the nights spend out on the balcony, watching them playing and chasing flies.
Overall, it has been a great time for me and I will gladly be back for another stay.

The cats are really curious and they can open your door if you don't lock it. I found one next to my sleeping Son after I got back from my shower. They're curious but friendly though.
I would highly recommand the place!
Great location for breakfast at e5 bakehouse and Amy was really thorough and great with comma.

The room was clean. Amy was accommodative and flexible. We got our privacy and were never disturbed by the hosts. The room felt a bit stuffy and if the window is left open you could hear the noises from the train during its operation hours.

Have two lovely cats

room is very clean and very comfort.

So quiet, despite being on a busy road in leafy muswell hill with all the amenities you might need right at the door step. A spacious  bathroom located right next to the room. Fantastic place to stay in beautiful Muswell Hill, wonderful and most interesting host.  One hundred percent spot on place, 10 stars for Yvonne.
Yvonne is friendly and a good host. Very bright and clean space. Nice to have met.

I had such a lovely stay in Yvonne's place - the bedroom is just great - stylish decor, a super comfy bed and there is a fantastic view across London too! The room is very quiet, despite overlooking the Broadway.
Muswell Hill Broadway is full of great cafes, restaurants and many other interesting shops, all within a few minutes walk of the flat. It's a very charming area; full of history and handsome buildings.
Yvonne is incredibly warm and welcoming and is a very thoughtful and gentle host - I enjoyed my stay very much. Thanks Yvonne!
Wonderful welcome, Yvonne is so kind, the room is perfect and well place for all amenities.

Yvonne's place is everything you could want from a home-stay and more. She makes you completely at your ease, being friendly and welcoming. The guest bedroom is large, immaculate and beautiful, everything very clean. The bathroom is extremely clean too. I felt like I was staying with a friend and will definitely stay with Yvonne again when I come to London.

We had a really nice stay at Yvonne's place! It was very clean, bed was comfortable and check-in was problem-free.
Public transport is really close with one bus going directly to Camden. This place is also perfect if you are going to an evet at Alexandra Palace as it's only about a 10-20 minute walk and you don't have to walk up any hill which is good if you have lazy legs like we do.
Would definetly recommend this Airbnb!
Wonderfully warm welcome - a perfect host and beautiful room, well situated

Really nice, clean and well equipped apartment close to Kings Cross underground. It's a perfect base to visit the city centre. Check-in/check-out are easy and Lisa is really quick to perfectly answer any question. I strongly recommend it, unless your sleep is light: underground trains pass regularly below the apartment and noice and vibration can be annoying.
Great place, well located, walkable from King’s Cross. Spacious appartment. 2 big bedrooms and a big living to chill/get work done. I recommend.

Estuve en el piso de Lisa con mi familia 4 días. Eramos 4 y estuvimos muy cómodos. El piso está a 10-15 minutos andando de Kings Cross por lo que está bien comunicado con muchas líneas de metro evitándote transbordos. Nosotros no lo usamos, pero tambíen hay una parada de bus a escasos metros de la casa. La llegada fue fácil y el piso estaba en perfectas condiciones. El apartamento parece recién renovado, todos los muebles son nuevos, está decorado con gusto, las camas son cómodas y la ducha es buena. Lisa contestó rápido todas mis dudas. Mi padre se puso enfermo durante la estancia y Lisa nos dejó retrasar la hora de salida, detalle que nos salvó la vida. El ruido del metro se siente (una cosa bastante común en el centro de londres) pero ni es molesto ni te impide dormir por las noches ni mucho menos. Llegamos en uno de los fines de semana más fríos de Londres por lo que agradecimos que el agua y la calefacción funcionaran a la perfeccón. Repetiría sin dudar.
I stayed for 4 days with my family. We were 4 and we were very comfortable. The flat is 10-15 minutes walk from Kings Cross so it is well connected with many subway lines avoiding transfers. We do not use it, but there is also a bus stop a few meters away from the house. The arrival was easy and the apartment was in perfect condition. The apartment is newly renovated, all furniture is new, it is decorated with taste, the beds are comfortable and the shower is good. Lisa answered quickly to all my doubts. My father became ill during the stay and Lisa let us delay the departure time, a detail that saved our lives. You can feel the tube (a common thing in the center of London) but it is not annoying nor bothers you in your sleeping at night, much less. We arrived on one of the coldest weekends in London, so we appreciated that the water and heating worked perfectly. I would repeat without hesitation

Lovely stay in Lisa’s apartment.
You can find everything you need in this flat, spacious for stay of 3. The location is just 10 mins away from King Cross, easy access by walk or by bus which is just stopped outside apartment with 10 steps.
The flat does not have elevator, but just a short ladder to reach the flat.
Thanks Lisa to let me put down my luggage earlier than scheduled, best to fit the heavy rain out there.
Thanks Lisa for the prompt reply all the times. I will recommend this lovely flat to all of London travelers :)

This flat, about a 10 minute walk from Kings Cross Station, was just delightful. It is newly furnished and decorated and was perfect for my son and I for the week we spent in London. We wanted a flexible space that would allow us to have our daughter and her friends over (she is studying in London this semester and her dorm has very little space). The bedrooms are adequately sized, well lit, and have plenty of storage for you to unpack during your stay. The bathroom is small but well appointed and the shower is a bigger-than-average size. There is a dishwasher, and a washer and dryer as well, all of which we used. The WiFi is excellent!
The large couch converts to a bed and there is a table for 4 in the kitchen. We actually hosted a dinner for 7 and had plenty of room and dishes for that, as well as all the cookware to prepare the dinner.
Lisa was very accomodating, answering all my questions prior to arrival. She supplied us with a place to stow our luggage as we arrived prior to check in, which allowed us to start touring the city right away.
This was my first experience with AirBnB, but it will not be my last.

L'host è stata gentilissima e disponibile a variazioni di orario di check in e check out e in ogni caso ci era stato detto che se non fosse stato possibile occupare la casa più a lungo è presente un deposito bagagli.
La casa è bellissima, ogni cosa è curata nel dettaglio e tutto è arredato con cura e attenzione: lo stile è quello tipico londinese.
Ringraziamo davvero tantissimo Lisa per la sua gentilezza, la sua disponibilità, i suoi consigli, ... tutto ha contribuito a rendere il nostro soggiorno a Londra ancora più indimenticabile.
Se state cercando un appartamento accogliente e vicino alla metro per raggiungere le attrazioni più importanti, ma anche camminare un po' per raggiungere le vie principali, l'appartamento di Lisa è quello che vi consigliamo!!
Very good communication, excellent public transport via bus 63 or metro from Kings Cross to all London interesting places.

We liked everything about the flat except the constant and distracting train noise/physical rumble. Oh, also I was worried that the huge wardrobes weren't secured into the wall so we didn't let our kids in the bedrooms at all except to sleep - it would be nice if they were secured & a note told us that.
Lisa was great with communication and replied quickly to emails.
We loved having a secure closet to drop our bags off early.

Appartement impeccable tout neuf. Nickel.
Lisa tres serviable. Ponctuelle
Je recommande
très bon emplacement, logement petit mais agréable. Storage room pour arrivée et départ, un plus!

Lisa's place was great - She was super attentive and responsive as this was a last minute reservation and she accommodated an early check in for us which was so amazing! The apartment is literally right beside the borough tube station which makes traveling around the city super easy. The place was perfect - Everything was brand new and all the essentials that you needed were provided. Great place and great location. Thanks Lisa.
This apartment was spotless, the beds were very comfortable, and it was very close to the tube, making travel to and from there very easy.  I would stay again!
Cute little apartment. Has everything you would need. Very clean and bright. Very central to great markets, transport, pubs and restaurants. Great stay

Super séjour!! Hôte très réactive et l'emplacement et l'appartement sont top!
Merci!!
I am really impressed with the location. The apartment in itself is fine, but can be abit too small with 4 adults. However, it’s worth it at its price and location. Will definetly stay her again.

Well located flat for underground and London sights. Flat is immaculate, perfect as a base for a break. Good communication for accessing.
It is up four flights of stairs so no good if you have any mobility problems.
Otherwise would highly recommend.
Very clean.

The flat is cute, comfortable, clean, and well-stocked. Amenities include a washer, dryer, fridge, and stovetop - all in good condition. Located right off the subway, it is well located to travel anywhere in London. Highly recommend.
Wonderful place. Lisa was very prompt and helpful.

We really enjoyed our stay here. The location was fantastic, located right next door to Borough Station which connects you to the rest of London. It was also very close to the Borough Markets and London Bridge. Lisa was helpful and very prompt in her responses. Would recommend!

I had a great stay! Claire was so accommodating and very helpful with directions. She has a great knowledge of the area and was there for all of my queries. The house is lovely and homely, and just a short walk from Charlton station. I’d recommend to anyone needed to stay in the area!

Claire est une personne tres ouverte et gentille qui sait vous mettre a l aise.
Beau quartier et belle maison.
Pas evident a trouver quand on est en transport

Claire is a sweetheart, and I loved staying with her. She was kind and helpful. Her house is beautiful with interesting design elements. She has wonderful taste. The house is a little off the beaten path, but I liked that. It is in a cozy neighborhood close to North Greenwich, so it is quite accessible to Central London.
It’s a perfect place for watching Charlton matches!!! The landlord is really nice & the cats are quite lovely
Claire was a fantastic host from start to finish. Great communication, friendly chat, house is beautiful and so clean, will definitely be booking my next stay with her😊

Claire was a lovely host with a beautiful home in a quite area. Cosy room on the floor above with a comfortable bed. Had a nice chat over a cup of tea in the morning. Will definitely stay again if in the area.
Claire's place is lovely, clean, great location and value.
10/10 - Claire was a super host and I had a great stay over, thank you!

Lovely clean newly refurbished rooms in a quiet family house. Great hospitality. Fairly small bedroom, but use of an excellent bathroom. Easy access to mainline station to London, City Airport & walking distance to Charlton Athletic stadium. Free on street parking too.
This was a fantastic place to stay

The best value you can find in central London; Definitely worth spending money. The house is spotless - Clean and modern.
It's probably not the cheapest option you have in the area, but it must be the nicest I would say. The hosts are also really friendly and caring. 5 stars no doubt

Superb location with convenient transportation and fantastic cafes nearby! Lots of shops and stores since it’s just near Oxford Circus and Soho area. The bed is amazingly comfortable, and the flat is modernly designed. Suggestion: bring earplugs if you don’t have deep sleep since there is just a pub near the flat which could be a little disturbing. However, considering the hectic and convenient shopping area there, everything is still great!
Our stay was perfect, easy, clean and just right for our needs.

Best place in London! Klaudija and Jack are great host. They showed me all facilities at home and they replied me all questions promptly.
The place is located at center of London, easy to travel most of the sightseeing spots in London. Just few minutes walk to restaurants or supermarkets.
The apartment is clean and tidy with good condition electronic appliances. (As same as photos in Airbnb website)

This is a great location for a weekend in central London. Round the corner from Oxford street and everything is within walking distance. Lovely hosts who were on hand to assist when needed. Will definitely be staying again.
It's a great location, a lot of restaurants around here, a lot of busstation，Oxford circle。The house is clean and tidy.Jack is friendly，always in time when needed。
Perfect location to enjoy London

They are a really nice couple and very great hosts. It was much better than expected. I was able to check-in earlier and they gave me many tips. I felt very welcomed. The room is very beautiful and the location is perfect, close to many shopping streets and restaurants, and of course many sightseeings. It was definitely one of my best Airbnb experiences so far. Thanks for everything!
Very clean room, super convenient location
Great location and a lovely place to stay

You can tell Ray is a real pro! Everything you need to know, from the wifi code to the hour to get in, is all very well detailed in the confirmation email. Ray is hospitable, well prepared, and kind. The house is very clean and in a nice quiet neighborhood.
La localisation est parfaite proche des stations de métro et au calme . La chambre est propre et petite attention de Ray : bouilloire, thé... une très bonne adresse , je recommande !
Great place. Close to two tube stations. Clean, cosy place. Friendly host. Come and go as you please. Just what we needed 👍🏼

Ray’s home is absolutely gorgeous! It’s more of an actual B&B than just a room in someone’s home - the amount of detail and consideration Ray puts in takes it to a whole new level!
The shower was wonderful, the towels were very luxurious, the bed very comfy and the house very quiet - and it was such a lovely touch for Ray to leave a plate of Oreos in my room to welcome me.
I didn’t get to enjoy the garden much as I was out each day till late, which was a shame (especially as it was during the hottest-days-of-the-year-so-far).
If you need somewhere to stay and feel like treating yourself, then definitely stay here. And if you like Thai food, the nearby pub The Woodbine does the best Thai food I’ve had in a very long time.

Ray was a great host! Very polite and helpful.
The place was easy to check in and find from the station. Had great open air spaces as well as lovely space inside too. Recommend checking out the roof terrace which was an amazing space to be this summer!
Room was clean and towels and tea and coffee was provided which was very kind.
All round a very pleasant stay - thanks so much!
Great value for London. Comfy little home with access to Victoria line and Finsbury Park services. For the brief moment we saw Ray, he was very welcoming. Would happily stay again.

Very comfortable and smart accommodation, just a few minutes walk from Arsenal tube and an easy walk to pubs, restaurants and the centre of Finsbury Park.  Ray is a great host and all communication/arrangements etc were spot-on.
Great location and great value. A  nice bright room with all I needed for my short stay. Ray was very welcoming; the perfect host. I would have no hesitation in booking again.
Amazing place to stay!
Lovely clean room close to the tube. Excellent hospitality and communication. Would recommend!
r
Colin was a fantastic host that was extremely accommodating to our needs. The room was extremely functional and finished to a high standard. We’ll definitely stay here again.

Colin is very kind and helpful, we felt at home in his tidy and clean house.

Position was good and not too far from tube station or bus stop. It's about 30/40 minutes from the centre.
We had a very great time during our week in London!
Perfect, cosy and quiet place to stay! Everything was as expected and even better! Colin is a really great host! We highly recommend this place.

This is a fantastic place to stay! The bedroom and bathroom were not only clean and private, but also very stylish and well laid out. I was also pleased to find a hairdryer in the drawer as it wasn’t listed as an amenity! Colin is lovely and has lots of helpful tips and information about London- and the breakfast was a nice bonus too! The walk to the train station is very quick and easy. Colin is a thoughtful host with a fabulous space to stay in.
Just want to stay huge thank you to Colin and his hospitality. Had a wonderful time at his beautiful place! Everything was spectacular! Really lovely meeting such a great host! Warmest regards.

Had a great time no doubt! I highly recommend Colin’s place. Nice and quiet neighborhoud, it’s near the train sation, shops are also just a few minutes walk. Sparkling clean bedroom and toilet and plus breakfast is also available. Colin is a great host and very easy to talk to. We would love to stay here again!
Thanks so much Colin!

Colin very attentive and pleasant owner.
The room is very comfortable and clean, it has everything you need. The area is quiet, calm. The nearest subway is 10-15 minutes, the bus stops are also nearby. Not far there is not a big market, working around the clock. Thanks for the hospitality!

The place was exactly as described and super warm, which was lovely in winter. We had a loft room and bathroom next door, which was private. It's in a great location with food nearby, and the overground. Colin had a lot of tips that were very useful and he was great. Just a perfect stay overall.

Perfect cleanliness, everything is thought out to the smallest detail, a very cozy room and a comfortable private bathroom. Feels attention and care in detail. Thank you Colin for the hospitality! We were only one night, but would gladly have stayed more. Highly recommend to all for comfortable accommodation in London.

A hidden gem in the centre of London. Beautiful & stylish newly renovated en suite double room with own private entrance. House is tucked away in private mews so it is quiet but only a 2 minute walk to Hyde Park and Bayswater, and Paddington also very close by. Every amenity just a few streets away. Compared with other places, this is a great deal, and you also get to meet the charming owner and her lovely daughter and their gorgeous greyhound - who has his own space so will not intrude on yours. And he doesn't bark! I would highly recommend.

Sans apartment is well located and just a couple minutes away from  Hyde Park. The area offers everything you may desire (cafes, restaurants, shops...) San is very kind, welcoming and helpful. We also met her lovely daughter and greyhound. We definitely recommend staying here.
Sweet stay.  We'll go back.  And the morning walk at Hide Park around the corner cannot be missed.
A lovely quiet space. Perfect for 2 nights. Great location. San was very helpful and let us leave our bags even after we checked out so we could walk around. We would stay there again! Thank you San.

San was a lovely host, very friendly and willing to help at all times with fantastic local knowledge.
The room itself was very cosy, the bed in particular and black out blinds were a nice touch. Awesome location with lots of shops nearby, with excellent walking access to London parks and the central line on tube, would definitely stay there again!

San's place was located just minutes away from Kensington Palace. Ample cafes and local stores if you need to grab anything. Two underground stations located nearby which was convenient to get to any place around the city. Overall its a good place to put up.
Very convenient location, comfortable and clean.  Delightful polite host

This was the perfect room to stay for a few nights. It's located very centrally and nearby lots of transportation options. Strolling around Kensington palace (just steps away!) was a highlight of our trip. Thanks, San!

San ist a very friendly and helpful host. She arranged the check-in and the check-out perfectly for us. She also provided us with all the relevant information for our stay in advance. During our stay she was always available for every question we had.
The location of her place is just perfect and in the middle of everything.
San's place is PERFECT. Don't hesitate:)
Su was a great host. She provided a nice, clean room and conveniently located near the airport. Would recommend this space to other guests.

Just would like to say that my stay at Su’s was a fantastic, Su made me feel so comfortable from the moment I rang her bell.
And I would recommend Su’s home to anyone who’s looking to fly from Heathrow! In fact to anyone who’s wanting accommodation for any reason.
You won’t go wrong at Su’s.

I loved every minute in Su’s home and company was brilliant.

I have been very lucky with AirB&B with the hosts ! My accommodation’s just keep getting better and better!

11/10 would definitely stay here again if I ever need somewhere to sleep in London again! Very quick at responding , super convenient getting to and from the airport. su很有礼貌很nice，su家的狗狗和猫咪超级可爱 很乖 很安静。位置在机场附近走路大概7分钟。很推荐 也十分干净。
Great host and wonderful space :)

Su’s place is really nice and cozy. Very close to Heathrow airport, took me a 10 minute walk from terminal 4. The room is clean and the bed is comfortable. Also had a really nice chat with Su and met her lovely dog.

I enjoyed my stay greatly, Su and her family, including the dog and cats, all treated my like a friend. That was a specially warm experience on the last day of my travel in the UK. The room is small and cozy and everything’s good and ready in the kitchen and the bathroom. The location was good, it’s about 15 mins walk from the Hatton Cross station where you can take a bus to the terminals for free. This is one of the few times with Airbnb that I wish I could have stayed longer. :)

Su is a warm, intelligent and up lifting host. The room is perfect,  the day before a trip to the airport- as it’s only about a 10 minute taxi from terminal 2. The bedroom is cozy and the mattress is very comfortable - it was my best sleep through my stay at the UK. Su, thank you for allowing me to stay with such short notice. Also, thanks for having a choice of breakfast options.
If you looking for a layover or even a place in London to stay.. stay with su.. shes very hospitable and sweet.. the place is perfect and I wish I could have stayed longer..
Brilliant host. Excellent communication and superb room. Very clean and great location. Will definitely use again! Thank you
Staying at Amy's place was a pleasure, felt welcomed, great communication, lovely room, and plenty of towels. would defiantly stay again :)

We needed a place to stay at short notice and Amy totally saved us! The studio is gorgeous, brand new, and the hosts very welcoming with super helpful communication.  Our favourite thing were the two amazing cats <3

An amazing clean and stylish space with more than enough room to feel just at home. Friendly and loveable cats. Close to transportation and surrounded by great food. Lovely area to walk around and explore on your own or with friends. Plus the view of the sunset from the balcony is breathtaking.
great space, great location, great value.
Logement bien situé.
Very comfortable place, I highly recommend it
great cats

In a great location. Stan was really helpful an very knowledgeable about the area, would definitely recommend!

It was really nice experience staying in Amy's house. Especially because of situation near the Broadway market street with interesting shops and lot of pubs :) We had all we needed and had no problems with our room. It has welcoming and comfortable atmosphere there :) Thanks

It’s a really nice apartment,and Lisa is so friendly.It’s near the King’s Across Station,just take 7 minutes to walk.The appliances are rally good,dish washer and. Coffee machine.All the bedrooms are cozy and clean.highly recommend.

Lisa is very nice. Her house is clean and has a good location. It is near to the Kings Cross and British Museum.
Lisa's place is beautiful and incredibly clean. I highly recommend it!

Lisa’s apartment is beautiful, clean, comfortable, all of the things you’d want in a home! The price is very affordable if you split it with a few friends, which you can because it’s got 4 true bedrooms! Loved it and would absolutely come back.

Outstanding Host! Communicated throughout our visit and ensured our comfort was met.  Was able to answer any questions we had and make recommendations for us.  We thoroughly enjoyed our visit and highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a place to stay while in the area.  (The underground transportation wasn't a big deal to us.  We noticed it but it did not effect our stay)

We had a wonderful stay in the apartment. It was great to be provided with amenities such as soap, toilet paper, towels, coffee and sugar.

Drawbacks: it’s noisy during the night since the train and underground are very close. Some of the bedrooms in lower floors are worse to sleep in at night. For further stays I’d take earplugs.
Overall, thank you very much for being a really helpful guest.
It was my first stay of airbnb and really good to stay at your aprtment. Beautiful and comfortable place. closed to kings cross station. If I have chance to visit london again, I wanna stay again :)

Wonderfully friendly and helpful host. Very very clean home. Facilities were good. There is Netflix on the SmartTV, which was great for us. Very clean towels. Beds were comfortable. Great hospitality, really friendly people. Comfortable environment described as seen. The bedroom we stayed in was really nice and relaxing with lots of windows. The area was safe & had local  shops. The train station is a 10 minute walk. Very good experience, value for money.
lovely family and great hosts...made sure i had everything i needed. highly recommended!

Close to station, supermarkets and restaurants. The room was clean and spacious, and the host was very friendly and communicated clearly from the start. Would certainly recommend this Air BnB
Nice location close to Heathrow airport with easy access to 24 hr bus. The room is basic but clean and Shahid is helpful. I would stay there again specially if flying from Heathrow.

Nous avons passé un séjour de 5 nuits chez Shahid. Un hôte à l’écoute et très serviable avant même notre arrivée. Il a su nous guider et nous conseiller du début à la fin. Spacious and bright room. Great value for money. I would stay here again.

L’appartement est idéalement placé près de la tamise, avec de nombreux commerce, restos et bars.

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié.

Super !!!

Ótimo apartamento. Limpo, espaçoso, muito bem dividido e equipado. Boas camas e toalhas.

Lisa foi muito receptiva e prestativa. Sempre respondeu as mensagens rapidamente.
Foi minha primeira experiência no Airbnb. Recomendo o local e anfitriã.
Excellent location and also close to a tube line. The apartment is very clean and the beds are super cosy! Will definitely stay again.

Lisa’s place was perfect for our family. We really enjoyed the convenience of a lockbox checkin since we arrived so late and did not want to inconvenience anyone by having to wait up for us. We LOVED that it was right next to the Borough Station. Super convenient! Lisa gave lots of useful tips and suggestions for things to see. We would definitely stay here again.
Very nice apartment in a super convenient location. Beds were so comfortable, and the kitchen was nice for making a few meals in. Loved our stay here!

Great location for Heathrow and the M4. The room is actually a self contained and  private space in the garden. It's very spacious and looks like it has been recently been built. Both Mandip and his son were super friendly and ensured I got in and was settled.

Great host! Lovely room and en-suite, ideal breakfast and even dinner offered! Exactly what I needed. Good communication through the app making the stay stress free. Friendly and polite accommodating people! And easy parking right outside the door.

spent two nights here and loved it! such a cute place which felt like home. the host was extremely helpful and made my stay so comfortable. would highly recommend.
Lovely place! All brand new

Everything was just as descriped, neat, clean, central.
Definitely a recommendation.

Absolutely adored this unit. Modern and comfortable, we didn't see a single human yet it was the warmest of our stays, with Bob's support on top of everything, always incredibly responsive and friendly, and the studio apartment filled with a million thoughtful little details. Could not recommend it more.
Awesome place

Out of all the amazing apartments I've found via AirBnB, this one has to be my favorite. Every square inch of this loft is meticulously designed by someone who clearly has an eye for detail, the perfect mix of rustic coziness with a more raw industrial core. The view of Table Mountain from the dining room table is phenomenal. The loft's location is in the heart of the city, the city's best restaurants and bars and just a short (and safe) walk down the block.
Alan was an incredibly accommodating and responsive host. Any questions we had were responded to in minutes. He went out of his way to make sure we were comfortable during our stay, and his field guide to the city (left for us on the table along with a very thoughtful welcome pack) proved to be a far better guide to what Cape Town has to offer than any of our guide books.
We couldn't have asked for a better apartment or a better host. Thanks Alan!

Alan deserves to win the 'host of the year' prize - if there is one. From the first moment of contact he was responsive, helpful, personable. Basically, he wanted to make my stay the best it could be. I've used Airbnb a number of times over the past 2 years and Alan is far and away the best host I've experienced. (not only did he prepare personalised recommendations and do research into questions I asked, he picked me up at the airport and brought me straight to the property: really above and beyond expected or necessary!).
The apartment was exactly as described and photographed - even better actually, with a breath-taking view of Table Mountain from the roof terrace.
Being smack in the town centre, the noise from adjacent buildings was present, but not a setback.
A great apartment in a fantastically central location with the perfect host. What more can one ask for?

Our stay in Cape Town was made perfect from the word go...
Alan very generously picked us up from the airport (for our honeymoon gift) and then personally took us up to the apartment and went through things we needed to know. He wrote us a very detailed and descriptive guide for the area ranging from cafes for breakfast/brunch to bars to markets on during our stay and even laundry spots and best places to shop! The loft apartment really was amazing, upon arrival there was fresh fruit, rusks, milk, fresh juice all supplied by Alan. Even sticky notes were placed around the apartment showing us where certain specific things were, even beach towels, a picnic basket set and beach umbrella were left for our use for a beach day. The location of the apartment made traveling around Cape Town very convenient, we basically walked everywhere we went, to the V & A waterfront, shopping around the CBD and lots of cool restaurants not even a few blocks away. With taxi's easily to get around the city and were also very cheap if walking isnt your thing! Was also felt totally safe everywhere we went, not one drama/hassle at all during our stay, even when walking back after dinner at dark! Very friendly and helpful people everywhere we went!
The apartment building had an elevator as well so being a loft apartment on the top floor made taking our luggage to the room not a hassle. Alan really was the best host we have had so far when booking apartments through Air BnB, very attentive and available during our stay if needed. Even texting us a few times throughout our week stay to make sure everything was going okay and or if there was anything he could do for us etc
Strongly recommend this apartment if you are wanting to spend time in Cape Town, stay in a cool/trendy apartment and in an un-touristy area making you feel like a real local! Would definitely stay here again and hope if/when we visit Cape Town again some time it will be available again.
Thanks again Alan

Regards,
Nate & Georgia

p.s. hope you liked the craft beers we left for you

Alan is a fantastic host who made me feel welcome and at home right from the start and attended to my every need. His friendly, very engaging personality and superb list of suggestions were highly appreciated.
If you want to be smack down in the middle of the most lively area of the city of Cape Town, there is no better apartment then this! Within a single minute walking distance you have an amazing choice of excellent Restaurants, Coffee-Shops, Bars, Museums, Groceries, Supermarkets and Clubs. With a safe covered parking spot just around the corner, you can start your exploration of the wider Cape-Town area with ease.
If you stay in Town and had a long night out on the buzzing Bree, Loop, Kloof or Longstreet you can just safely walk back home and enjoy the excellent comfort of this charming Loft and comfortable bed.
The flat is very spacious and wonderfully designed. It provides all the amenities for a short or extended stay including a perfect view from the balcony on Table Mountain where you hone your weather forecasting skills. (But be careful, even long time Capetonians don't always get it right;)
If you have friends over, there is enough space on sleepers and chairs to make them feel comfortable. Great cooking facilities, a nice bathroom and a washing machine make this my flat of choice the next time I visit this fantastic city again.

After my initial stay at Alan's flat for 5 days which made me feel so at home and comfortable I was very fortunate to extend my stay which I did without a second thought.
I would have stayed even longer! Alas this fantastic Loft is in high demand which speaks for its charm.
You will not regret staying here. Alan as a Host, the Location and everything this City has to offer will make this into an awesome experience. For more details, please read my first review about the flat.

We had a wonderful time in Alan's flat. The appartment is very well  decorated and fully furnished as well. The flat looks even nicer than in the pictures, as you have a lovely view on the mountain from the little terrace. The location is also very central. Alan has been a perfect host : very helpful and available. He even arranged a  breakfast for us. Un appartement de style au coeur du Cap que nous recommandons vivement !
Great location, great space. We had the best time, thank you Alan!

Awesome location and great host!
Would highly recommend to stay here as the apartment is totally fancy.
Thank you for your hospitality Alan.

We had a great time staying in the loft - the place is really interesting and well designed. The loft is in a great part of town and is surrounded by nice restaurants and cafés. Alan was a very kind host and was on hand for advice on anything we needed. The bubbly (it was our honeymoon) and Easter eggs was a nice surprise.
2nd stay at Alan's accommodation was as good as the first one - thank you :-)
Had an amazing stay at the Camps Bay Guesthouse! Michaeljon is great and accommodating host. The house is beautiful and in a great location. Close to the beach and shops. Would highly recommend!

One thing upfront: MJ and Emma were the best hosts ever. They made us feel welcome and at home welcome at any time. The property is beautifully situated on the hills over Camps Bay and especially one of the bedrooms & one bathroom are literally "state of the art". The apartment is well equiped and has everything you need for an enjoyable stay.

Our experience in Michaeljon's house is absolutely fabulous!!! Mj is a perfect landlord, gave us assistance since we arrived in the airport. The house is awesome, great location, wide and charming  rooms, completed furnished as described in the website. In addition there is a really professional concierge service  who helped us to arrange an amazing wine tour. We strongly recommend this accommodation.

Very beautiful guesthouse on private premises, but with your own privacy, centrally located in Camps Bay up the hill. Everything is clean and beautiful, the house has 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, the latter is very convenient and practical. The kitchen is fully equipped, you will find everything from a wine cooler to a toaster and various coffee makers! There is room to park your car in front of the house. Michaeljohn was very friendly and welcoming, we could not wísh for better host. Overall we had a great experience and can highly recommend the geusthouse!

We had an amazing stay at The Camps Bay Guesthouse. Michaeljon was a great host and made us feel very welcome in a beautiful, private location just a short walk away from the beaches and restaurants of Camps Bay. We would definitely stay here again on future trips.
Beautiful house in a fantastic location & Michaeljon couldn't have done any more to make us feel welcome. A fantastic experience.
Beautiful house, perfect location, walk to the beach and a host that can't do enough for you. The perfect holiday experience.

I stayed at Michaeljon's lovely guest house with my parents, and it was perfect for us. There are two very private and comfortable bedrooms, as well as two bathrooms. It was the ideal set up for an adult child and parents, or a family, or two couples.

The location of the guest house is also ideal. Just a short work (in a lovely residential neighborhood) from the beachside strip in Camp's Bay.

Michaeljon was so helpful and accommodating. He made sure we were comfortable, and gave us his tips for safety and enjoyment in the city. I would recommend his guesthouse to anyone going to Cape Town.

Micheljon gave us a warm welkome upon arrival and was very flexible about our time of arrival and departure. We had a very late fight and he allowed us to stay as long as we wanted the day of departure.
Appartement was clean with enough towels and linnen.
Appartement is very stylish and modern.

The apartment was perfect for what we wanted-a short walk down to camps bay and drive into town. It was huge so plenty of space for us to spread out. The only thing that would've made it better would having a private pool!
Very Nice room, in a cute place, near botanical garden.

We highly recommend this venue! Beverley and her husband are wonderful and concerning people who cared for us our entire trip to Cape Town.

We had the chance to stay on their to confortable rooms and we aprove both!

Futhermore, they are very good placed and you will have the Table mountain as background for your breakfast. Also not very far from downtown, only a 15min bus drive.

Do not hesitate on booking it!

I had a great experience while staying at Beverly's lovely home. It was actually a privilege to get to know her. She is a very skilled, generous and considerate host. She certainly understand the needs of her guests. She and her husband, Alan are a very special team. The studio is in a beautiful garden setting, well equipped and very comfortable. I needed internet access for professional reasons, and it was such a  relief to find a fast and reliable connection.  I would certainly not hesitate to return to, or to recommend Beverly's place to anyone.

Our stay at Beverley's guest suite was an absolute joy. Excellent facilities in a very quiet leafy street indeed. Beverley is a well of knowledge on the restaurants and bars in the area and made some excellent suggestions for dinner and breakfast.
We'll be back!
A lovely place, quiet and well-organized - we enjoyed our stay and would certainly recommend it!
We enjoyed our stay so much! The room was beautiful and comfortable, and Bev was a wonderful hostess.  Many thanks, Miki and Johan

Largo guest suite is situated in a beautiful, quiet part of Cape Town, yet close to al the amenities one might need in the city, transport and some of the main sights. The suite is well appointed and very comfortable.

Beverley was a wonderful host...and made more than sure that we were well stocked with breakfast ingredients every day.

The accommodation was exactly as expected and perfect for not only an overnight stay (like we did), but also for a longer stay. The room is elegant and squeaky clean; very comfortable bed and plenty on offer for the continental breakfast. Beverley is a gracious host and communication with her was speedy and easy. She very kindly dropped us at Newlands rugby stadium and it was a nice, vigorous walk back to their place afterwards. We will stay here again.

Claire's apartment was fantastic. It overlooks the mountain, lion's head, and the most beautiful neighborhood in all of Cape Town - Bo-kaap. It is situated just outside the city center, which makes it walkable both to the stadium, and to anything in the city.

The apartment is very comfortable and the balcony is perfect for sitting outside during nice days. The apartment gets a lot of light and has many nice fixtures in it.

Claire and the management team were very responsive to every need I had during the long stay. The front desk staff were great, I developed a friendly relationship with a number of the guys. The apartment is across the street from some of the best coffee in the city (Truth) and mexican (San Julian's).

All in all a great stay, a beautiful building, well located, with a pool for those going there during the warmer seasons. Highly recommend and would book again.

We stayed for two nights at the largo guesthouse where we enjoyded the most hospitable welcome. Beverley was very friendly And gave us Some Nice do's And don't 's for our visit to capetown. Very clean room with everything you need. We even had a private parking lot wich ment We didn't have to worry About leaving our rental car. Overall a very positive expierience!!!
Lovely accommodation with great view, close to nature but also short way to city center. Beverly was a lovely host. Would definitely recommend to family & friends. Thank you!
Très bel appartement, vue splendide, bonne situation, aménagement de qualité; il manque seulement la connexion wifi

This clean, modern apartment has impressive views of Table Mountain and the colourful houses of Cape Town's Bo Kaap from the gorgeous balcony window. An awe-inspiring place to watch the sunset! We had an incredibly comfortable stay with everything we needed provided to a high standard. It's part of a modern build with a friendly central reception desk and located a short walk/drive from all the prime sites of interest you'd wish to see. There's a great little coffee place at Prestwich memorial just around the corner too. Claire was a perfect host with great local knowledge and had a warm and friendly welcome for us. This was much appreciated after a 12 hour flight from London!

Wouldn't hesitate to recommend to friends and family!
Great room, fully equipped apartment, great mountain view, friendly host, fast internet, highly recommended

The loft has a wonderful view of Bo Kaap and the Table Mountain. It is very comfortable, a lovely large bed and soft pillows and clean. The weather was hot when we were there and we were able to open the doors to allow a breeze through and use the fans during the night, air con not necessary even for us Brits! Claire's communication was excellent; she is rightly enthusiastic about Cape Town and the surrounding area. Her information folder is detailed and useful, one of the recommended restaurants was a fabulous experience, really special. We had a wonderful stay in every respect, thanks for everything, Claire..
Amazing apartment, photos and description are 100% accurate. Absolute ideal location in Cape Town, almost everything is within walking distance and the view is amazing.

It was my first time booking a flat with Airbnb, I have never been to Cape Town and took my time to search for an apartment. I wanted to make sure I am in a safe neighbourhood, that there is public transport to get around, that there are nice places to eat and go out and that the flat is functional and stylish. All of those criteria were met by Claire’s apartment! It is amazingly stylish, has everything one needs for comfortable living (including iron, hair dryer, dish washer etc) . One of the apartment’s walls is literally a huge window. The view is so phenomenal that one does not want to leave the flat, but merely stay on the balcony and enjoy a glass of South African wine every night while watching the sunset over the Table mountain. The flat is extremely central – to the point I could walk to work and other locations! Last but not least – Claire is the most amazing host you could ever get – she gave me a neighbourhood tour as I arrived with plenty of tips, drove me to Cape Point and around, asked whether I was missing smth in the apartment and always cared for everything I might need! I could not be happier with my choice and will definitely book this apartment if I were to come back to Cape Town again!
Great Host! Flat as described on site.

A great experience. The flat is great (as per the pictures) with a lovely view and a good location.

Claire is a perfect host: available, very nice and provided a lot of good recommendations plus a local cell phone to ease our life here!

Would definitely go back.

We had an amazing time in Clairs's apartment. The apartment looks exactly like in the photos and is actually even much nicer once you are in. It is a very beautiful loft-style apartment located on the fifth floor that is just perfect for two persons and has everything you need: fully equipped kitchen, nice bathroom, balcony with a beautiful view towards the table mountain and lions head, located very central and a very comfy bed. The apartment is in a very secure complex with guards 24/7 and a parking space in the garage. And the most important thing, the apartment and especially the bathroom is perfectly clean.

Clair is just an amazing host. She is very caring and tries to do everything to make your stay perfect, which she achieved in our case 10000000percent.

I can only recommend staying at her place. You will not regret it. To put it straight: It is an amazing loft- style apartment owned by an even more amazing host.
Thank you very much Claire.

Best,
Karla and Aurelio
We had a wonderfull stay with a very hostile family. We can recommend The African Sun as a nice and pleasant B&B

I couldn't have imagined more welcoming, helpful, accomodating hosts than what I had at African Sun. Don and Patricia are fantastic people, in addition to the fact that the apartment is a wonderful, quiet place from which to base your exploration of the Cape Peninsula. I can't endorse this rental enough.

Rich and I really enjoyed our stay at African Sun B and B. Don and his wife are very welcoming, warm and interesting people filled with valuable knowledge about Cape Town and South Africa. The attached private room is very comfortable and clean. It's close to the city centre and quite for a good nights sleep. We used the outdoor shower daily which was a very nice addition to the accommodation.  I know where we will be staying next time we are in Cape Town! Thanks again for the great stay!

We had a wonderful time at "African Sun". Fully equipped place in a lovely and safe neighbourhood, an easy 15-20 min. stroll into downtown.
Don is a very helpful host. We can absolutely recommend this place.
top!top!top!

Great unit with big bathroom and kitchen. No problem checking in and they left me a healthy bread, cheese, butter, jam, fresh fruit, coffee, tea and milk for snacks and breakfast. Fast wifi, privacy and secure parking. All I needed and then some. I will definitely return.
Very nice accommodation! The shower outside is beautiful, everything was clean. Thanks a lot!

So, what can I say?!  My trip to Cape Town was fantastic, and the hosts, Don & Patricia, were so wonderful.  First of all, the apartment is much larger than what the pictures show.  The hosts were ever so kind in offering suggestions of where to go and what to see, and even let us extend our trip a couple extra days.  One of the best parts was mountain biking on Table Mountain with Don!  But truly, the best part was getting engaged to my boyfriend during my stay in Cape Town.  What a memorable experience!

So, what can I say?! My trip to Cape Town was fantastic, and the hosts, Don & Patricia, were so wonderful. First of all, the apartment is much larger than what the pictures show. The hosts were ever so kind in offering suggestions of where to go and what to see, and even let us extend our trip a couple extra days. One of the best parts was mountain biking on Table Mountain with Don! But truly, the best part was getting engaged to my boyfriend during my stay in Cape Town. What a memorable experience!

This is one of those cases where staying with an airbnb host cannot possibly compare with any other type of accommodation, because no other accommodation comes with a couple of intellectual, thoughtful, experienced in life people who can talk to you about their country, their city, their experience, their thoughts about the history and the future. As first time visitors to South Africa, we appreciated that tremendously. Don and his wife were also helpful in every way. The accommodation itself is quite nice and comfortable, complete with secure parking, your own entryway and very tasty bread and jam waiting for us in the kitchen when we arrived. We had wonderful stay.
The only, very minor word of caution - the sound carries between your accommodation and the part of the house where the hosts live - only a problem if you're in need of total privacy and isolation sound-wise.

Fantastic Studio Apartment. Very light with a fantastic kitchen and facilities. Nice big bedroom, lots of natural light with a brilliant bathroom with shower. Overall very happy and would definitely recommend. WIll be sure to remember this place for my revisit.

The apartment was in a great location and was perfect for our needs. It was modern, clean and easily accessible as it was separate from the main house. Carol was attentive  and any problem we had was easily resolved. We had a great stay.

I stayed in the modern and clean apartment for more than 3 weeks in December. All furniture is new and the kitchen is perfectly equipped. The location is just perfect, in the middle of one of the best areas around Cape Town. It is in a quite and save neighborhood but only a few blocks to restaurants, bars and the beach. Carol is a very warm, friendly and helpful host. She was always reachable, gave me lots of good advice for activities in the area, and even gave me a ride to Table Mountain. I will definitely stay here again, if and when I shall return to Cape Town.

Amazing location in the middle of Camps Bay. The apartment is in great condition, extremely well maintained and clean, Carol is a lovely host and it’s only a 5 min walk to the beach front. It has a big kitchen (fully equipped incl washing machine), separate bedroom and bathroom, was safe and we will definitely book it again for our next Cape Town visit. We can only recommend it!

Carol was very accommodating from the get go and was very friendly upon meeting and ensured that I had everything I needed to be comfortable. The studio was as I expected and is very secure, comfortable and has easy access to the beaches of Camps Bay. I would highly recommend this great value for money accommodation to any friends and business visitors. I will most likely be using it again.

Great studio, perfectly located in Camps Bay. Our host Carol was so friendly and kind and helped us with everything we asked for!
And even with things we didn't ask for such as wine, food in the refrigerator etc.
We can only recommend this studio!

The place was lovely and as described - just 5 mins walk from the beach. It was spotless and even came with a bottle of wine in the fridge. Carol was a great host - helped us when we first landed and even helped us in securing a rental car last minute, not to mention the lift to pick it up! We wouldn't have made the safari without you Carol! My only negative feeling towards my stay was the guilt in forgetting to put a fresh bottle in the fridge before we left to say thanks.

Carol was a lovely lovely host, so kind and welcoming and the studio is a great little space in Camps Bay. We had a fabulous meal at the Roundhouse restaurant which she recommended - and even very kindly gave us a lift to as well. The studio is tucked under the house next to a driveway with stacks of storage space and a well equipped kitchen, great wifi. It was just a 10 minutes or so walk down to the beachfront for cafes, restaurants etc.

Amazing location in a lovely neighborhood, just a short walk to the beach front and the nice cafes and restaurants there. Carol was a wonderful host and helped us with everything we needed. We'll definitely be back some time!

Carol was an amazing host. Awesome spot, stunning apartment. Perfect for what we needed. Beautiful location. Great for exploring camps bay and surrounding areas. Will definitely be recommending to all friends and family. Will definitely be back!
We had a great time at Kevin's flat. New, clean, with all comforts you may need a great terrace with a great sunset view. Kevin is a very caring host. I would indeed recommend him and his flat

Kevin's place is awesome. Modern, new, and a great location. He's a great host who thought of a lot of little things that we didn't expect. Thanks for the great weekend. We hope to stay with you again soon.
Kevin was the perfect host, we had everything that we needed. The apartment was immaculate and very clean. The best holiday and stay we have ever had.

We had an absolutely amazing time at Kevin's beautiful apartment.
The apartment was everything we had hoped for, for having the best time in Cape Town. The location is perfect, who isn't familiar with the CT area, it is in one of the nicest areas close to the best beaches, restaurants and has a perfect view. The apartment is equipped with everything one needs, we loved the nespresso machine, comfy beds and the amazing rain shower :) It truly felt like a home away from home.
Kevin was the perfect host and the communication before and after our visit was superb.
Being in CT every year this was definitely the best stay and highly recommendable to everyone visiting CT.
The area is beautiful and in an quiet street.
The terrace was perfect for the astonishing sundowners one has in CT when coming home after a busy day.
Thank you Kevin, for providing us with the perfect stay and we hope to stay with you again.

Best Rgds, Elli, Gerhard & Lisa
Our family really enjoyed staying at Kevin's place in Camp's Bay. Beautiful apartment in great area. Kevin was very welcoming. Would definitely recommend!

Unfortunately Kevin home was flooded so we couldn't stay. However Kevin arranged alternative accommodation at a lovely apartment in Clifton nearby. He was really helpful and made sure we were well looked after!

We have just returned to London following an incredible holiday in Cape Town. We stayed at Minoan Heights in Camps Bay.
If you are looking for:
- a beautiful, modern 2 bedroom apartment
- clean & safe
- walking distance to the beach
- and excellent value for money
then I would definitely recommend this apartment.
Thanks Kevin and hopefully see you next year!
Regards
Jan

Great apartment, and we had a lovely stay. Beautiful view, and only a 15 min walk to the beach, which we loved! Very nice area, safe and we enjoyed beautiful weather! Kevin was a great host, as key pick up and all the little details upon arrival where very easily handed over. Thanks again.
Everything was great! The apartment is lovely and we had a great time!! Thanks a lot, Kevin!

My husband and I had a lovely stay at Minoan Heights for 3 nights. The property is exactly as described on the website - it is a great space for 2 people, well-maintained, clean and bright. We appreciated the warm welcome by the property manager, and the thoughtful welcome package of coffee capsules and a bottle of wine. The kitchen/diner area is well-appointed and I could imagine it works well for 2 adults + 2 kids. There is some light building work taking place across the road which was noticeable but not disruptive.

Waouh ! the house is just amazing, it is simply the best we had with AirBnB (and we traveled for 8 months around the world with our two kids !). The location is fantastic, with direct private access to the beach directly from the garden, and less than a 100 meters from a great surf spot.
The house itself is amazing : everything is brand new, perfectly well equipped (incredible flat screen TV, great kitchen, top level beds), all the rooms are spacious and have sea views, the terraces (two !) are great. And last, but not least, the permanent staff comes every day to take care of cleaning, laundry, fireplaces, swimming pool, etc.
In fact, the experience is that of a luxurious palace, but even better because it feels like home. We simply loved everything about this house, and warmly recommend it !

The house and surrounding was absolutely stunning and ideal for relaxation.  Waking up to that view was priceless. There is a surfers beach just right outside and very local vibe with neighbors walking their dogs. I even met one who turned out to be a massage therapist and I arranged one at the house. The host and staff were also very nice and responsive. The kitchen was fully equipped and the house had very tasteful decor including candles which light up the place beautifully in the evening. Perfect for a romantic getaway or to spend with friends. I plan to return:).

Great location, perfect logistics (we were greeted by the parents of the owner), amazing view and a good surf spot 100m down the beach. Fantastic base to explore Cape Town. All this was helped by the great weather (which gave us the opportunity to enjoy very nice sunsets from the garden). Highly recommended

What a stunning spot! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We celebrated our son's 3 year old birthday and the kids  had a ball of a time. To be right on the beach was such a treat. The accommodation lived up to what was advertised. The rooms were spacious and the scenery just spectacular; the views from the lounge were simply magnificent. The hosts were also very welcoming. We will definitely be back!

Our stay at Villa Ondine was nothing short of spectacular. Tim response time was fantastic and the booking was seamless. From the time we arrived we were taken care of and the service we received from Calm and Nombini was over the top, they took care of everything. The house is amazing with spectacular views, extremely spacious not to mention the private access to a stunning beach. We cannot rave enough about this place. Thanks for everything.

We loved the house! The house is incredibly comfortable and well-stocked and Tim's dad was very helpful through our stay. But the real star of the house is the amazing view and the beach right at your doorstep. We enjoyed the braai immensely -- grilled something every night we were there. It was a perfect (although too short!) break.

This property is truly amazing--it's style is simple and functional yet the layout invites you to be part of the landscape--which is breathtaking. We will definitely return and highly recommend it to others. The local shops added charm to our stay as well. Very well attended to with any question or concerns. Thanks for the memories.

This is an absolutely lovely home with gorgeous views! The photos don't do it justice. It is in a great location, walking distance to Long Beach (expansive beach with a surf break), the lighthouse and coffee/restaurants. The hosts were wonderful and incredibly attentive to every need. If you are looking for a relaxing location - it's perfect!

It was lovely arriving and being hit by the most gorgeous view in the world.  Tims two hosts were amazing and made us feel comfortable. Cooked with herbs from the yard, ate crayfish from the house beach front, took a long walk all the way to the long beach. Even though the water was cold we were able to swim in the warm pool. We also ordered our food online in advance and it was delivered at the house.

I would highly recommend Villa Ondine, and are already looking at when we go back! The most incredible views of the surrounding ocean, it was so peaceful, yet close enough to the city to be able to drive. Tim was away when we arrived, but his parents were really friendly and helpful. The staff were incredible as well. Love Love Love!

We had an incredible relaxed and comfortable stay with Brett.  The location was ideal to take in the west coast beach sunsets,  with a few steps away from direct access to the beach.  The facilities were extremely neat and tidy and felt like home away from home.  The location is centrally located and there is easy access to the city and V & A Waterfront.  The century city mall is a few minutes drive away to stock the well equipped kitchen. The host Brett Syndercombe was an absolute gem... thank you Brett for wonderful hospitality!!

Brett, was an awesome host. He was available at anytime that we required assistance. The place is exactly as the pictures describe. Its very centrally located, easy to get around and the unit has all the facilities that you would need. Great place and a great host !

That place is absolutely stunning. Right at the beach, perfect for windsurfing and super for loooong beachwalks. The hotel complex can be used at all times, breakfast and all kind of meals available. Also nice to relax at the 3 pools. Even the Spa can be used as well.
Brett is very friendly, helpful and super relaxed, also with children!!
5* from our site!!

Brett is great!
He does everything to make it 'smooth sailing' for you.
And I love his flexible and relaxt attitude.
Fantastic pls e for a family stay. Many thanks Brett!
We had a wonderful stay at Brett's place. He was very friendly and helpful with everything. And the apartment was very nice as well, especially the views!

We had the BEST time here as a family. The apartment is privately and independently owned but part of the ONLY hotel in Cape Town with direct beach access. Having the beach right there was a dream. Its uncrowded and soul refreshing. Our stay was for 8 nights with little kids end of March time. Its a fabulous place for a family: the apartment is uncluttered but still cozy, its on the ground floor so kids can really run outside, its pretty sound proof. We heard the roaring ocean but not much else and didn't feel we had to keep shushing our kids for the neighbors. There are 3 pools to choose from, one has a huge shallow area that us just a lot more "little kid friendly" than any pool we have ever enjoyed and its a quick walk from the apartment. Also the lagoon forms each day so even this beach is one of the most "kid friendly" in Cape Town, forming a bit of little splash pool each day. You can put your feet in the sand or in the pool in about 50 meters. That's not exact, just to give you a sense of how close it is. You have access also to the restaurants on site, the spa, poolside food and drinks. (The gym is no longer available since Jan 2015 which is fine we did long walks on the beach instead). The hotel vibe and staff never made us feel lesser for being there with kids. We actually met lots of other families on our stay. We felt taken care of when anything broke (which was totally out of the hosts control and unavoidable). Brett was a text or call away and handles things same day. The apartment is super clean, sheets hotel quality, well stocked kitchen, good plentiful pillows (that matters!) And we were impressed with our fist AirBNB experience to walk into a place and feel it was even better than the photos. If you are looking for a great on the beach holiday experience with your family, where you can really relax and not pack up everytime you want to get out to the ocean, this is it! Fantastic value. Great Host. Incredible location. We hope to be back next year.

We stayed at Brett's for the first two weeks of April with our 6 year old son and had a FANTASTIC holiday. We agree with all the positive reviews listed here. These reviews initially helped us decide to book the place and now we would love to add ours. Brett was very helpful throughout the holiday. We stayed there for 12 nights and Brett was kind enough to let us borrow the cleaning lady to come with a small fee which was helpful. We had access to all the Lagoon Beach Hotel facilities (all the taxi drivers know which hotel it is so no explanation needed) and we particularly found their travel desk at the entrance useful for hiring cars, asking information about tours,etc. Everyone working at the hotel/apartment was very friendly and professional. They have a free shuttle service to V&A Water Front a few times a day. As the apartment was located on ground level and has a direct access to the beach, meaning anyone can access to the property if they want to, I was a bit worried about the security for the first couple of nights but we saw hotel security people patrolling around and we felt completely safe and comfortable throughout our stay. Other apartments' tenants walk though the garden to the beach in and out, but thanks to the patio area, our privacy was maintained. Another plus to the apartment was that it is just around the corner from the hotel pool and bar which overlooks, but is separate from, the beach. This was an excellent plus and we spent a number of days lounging at the pool with a brilliant view of table mountain and the ocean. Overall, we had a lovely time and would love to come back to Brett's in the future again.

We had a lovely stay at Brett's apartment. It is perfectly located with beautiful views. Brett was very helpful throughout our stay and even accommodated our very late check in. The apartment was perfectly clean with great beds/pillows and linen. I will definitely recommend Brett's apartment and hopefully stay there again on my next visit to Cape Town.
The apartment was very nice and clean and the beach was really nearby.  The Waterfront and CBD were close enough and reachable within a 10 minutes drive.

lovely apartment in a safe location. there is a security guard at the entrance 24/7 & building is located centrally. rees and haja are great hosts - very friendly and helpful - they let me know about the weather before i even started my trip, lent me a backpack for my hike up table mountain. would definetly stay with them again.

I think this is one of my Best Airbnb experiences. Staying with Rees and Haja felt like reuniting with long lost friends. Their apartment is very modern and cozy with an amazing view of the Cape Town Harbor. It's close to everywhere you need to be around the Cape Town CBD, walking distance to long street, waterfront and all the key sights of Cape Town. You can take a cab ride to most places for about R50. Rees made delicious dinner on the first day and Haja made Brunch on the second day. We had interesting conversations which will stay with me for a long time.  Thanks Guys! I definitely will stay with you guys again!

Was only the second time we used Airbnb and we were definitely not disappointed! Last minute booking and Rees was very helpful with very prompt replies.
Amazing place, better than described. Located a very short walk to anywhere in the city and during the night we didn't pay more than R50 to get back by taxi. Very secure place.
As we only were there for a short time we spent most of our time out of the house, so only got to meet Rees and Haja for a very short time but found them to both be very friendly and helpful.
Would highly recommend if staying in Cape Town!
Rees & Haja were nothing short of spectacular, They were friendly and accommodating, Their place is absolutely stunning  and I would most definitely recommend them to everyone!

Rees and Haja was so friendly, helpful and great to stay with. We had a nice dinner the first night and decided right away to stay there one more period at the end of our trip. The apartment is huge, so nice and with the best view of town. Walking distance to Long street and the Waterfront. Completely safe. Our own bathroom. Looking forward to see you again soon guys. We would definitely recommend staying here.
Rees and Haja were wonderful hosts! They were very friendly, helpful and welcoming. Their apartment is very clean and has a great view over the city. We would definetely recommend this place.

Excellent option for Cape Town travellers!  I just returned from an 8 day stay in Cape Town, with Rees as my generous host.  As a first-timer on Air BNB, he made me feel completely at home, offering me tea/ coffee / water, and even offered to make me breakfast a couple of times.  The room was perfect for my needs, and I have fond memories of the trip.  A class act and a new friend.  I'm truly grateful that this place was an option and available.
