Rees was a real nice host. The location is perfect to discover the city. Everything is just like in the pictures. Rees helpes me with numbers for taxis and other stuff. High recommendation.

Rees was one of the best hosts and made us feel very welcome the minute we arrived..  Our accommodation was clean and the view was breath taking.  My BF and I loved every minute of the time spent in this Rees stunning home.

Excellent room with en suite private bathroom inside an apartment located in Cape Town’s CBD. The room is on the 17th floor and has very nice views over the City’s CBD and the harbour.  The room also provides balcony to enjoy the good views. Reese was a really nice host to us and made our stay comfortable. Would definitely recommend to stay here if returning to Cape Town.

We had a very pleasant stay at Andrew's house. He's a great host, always there to help and makes you feel at home right away. The house is beautifully decorated, clean and has a great roof top terrace to have breakfast on. It's location couldn't be better and it's definitely the perfect place to stay in Cape Town!

Absolutely enjoyed my 1-week-stay with Andrew! He's super nice and makes you feel at home right away. Also he offers all kinds of local advice on where to go and what to do. The location is perfectly central so you can walk pretty much everywhere in town, bus stop would be also very close. The house and the room are very pretty decorated and super clean and tidy. Plus: you have a great rooftop terrace! Definitely recommend staying here!

Andrew is the best! He took me in when I was desperately looking for a place, even though the room wasn't done yet. He worked long nights to get it ready, even took me shopping so I could help decide what we look good in the room. He has an amazing attitude, makes you feel at home and goes out of his make to make your stay as good as possible! The house is very central, looks amazing and has a very cool and relaxed vibe.

Andrew isn't in it for the money, he likes to meet new people and help them discover the beauty of Cape Town. The house is very artful and spatial which I liked a lot. The common areas are well kept and Andrew makes sure all the guests see eye to eye.

Had an awesome stay here and when I go back, I'm definitely staying with him again!
Andrew is a great host. He made my stay in his beautiful, comfortable apartment in CT, amazing!

Andrew is absolutely amazing! He really took care of me and went far beyond than a host is expected to do. Gave me the best advices about Cape Town and even Showed me the most beautiful places. I Couldn't be happier to have found him! The room is even prettier then it's airbnb pics and the apartment lovely. I wish Andrew all the best wishes and much much luck for all his project!

It's a shame that I did not get to spend more time hanging out with Andrew during my stay. He seems like a fun guy and a good source of advice on what to do / where to go while in Cape Town.

He was out when I arrived, but made arrangements to leave a key nearby. Very easy finding the place and making myself at home. The flat is spacious and was just what I needed after a bit of a crazy work week. Would definitely recommend.

I had a wonderful stay at Andrews place.Andrew was very helpful when I arrived and also during the stay! He even offered his bike to me to explore the city better. The area is a very cool and colorful, in a very short distance to long street, where everything takes place! I can totally recommend his place!

Andrew war ein super Gastgeber! Er hat sich sehr viel Mühe gegeben und es hat mir wirklich an nichts gefehlt! Das Zimmer und die gesamte Wohnung waren super schön und total günstig gelegen.
Was mir besonders gute gefallen hat, war sein riesen Fernseher, auf dem man gerne abends Filme gucken konnte und seine Fahrräder, die man sich ausleihen konnte.
Andrew war sehr freundlich, hilfsbereit und hat sich auch Zeit genommen, was mit mir zu unternehmen. Wir sind zun Beispiel morgens auf den Lions´s head zum Sonnenaufgang gefahren.
Ich kann ihn als Gastgeber nur weiterempfehlen und es waren ein paar sehr schöne Tage bei ihm!
nice, quaint and beautifully decorated place. Andrew is easygoing and helpful.
A great house in a great location with a great host. We would definitely reccomend this AirBnB.

Wir haben zu viert (2 Paare) eine Woche in Wades und Kates Haus verbracht und es war wirklich perfekt. Vielen Dank für die tolle Gastfreundschaft!

Das Haus liegt in einer ruhigen und sicheren Wohngegend mit Blick aufs Meer und den Tafelberg. Supermarkt, Bäcker und einige Cafes/Restaurants sind zu Fuß gut zu erreichen. Mit dem Auto kann man die Sehenswürdigkeiten unproblematisch und in kurzer Zeit erreichen (z.B. die Waterfront oder zur Tafelberg Cable Station in ca. 15 Minuten). Es gibt auch eine Busstation zu Fuß ca. 5 Minuten entfernt. Da wir einen Mietwagen hatten, haben wir das Kapstädter Bussystem aber nicht ausprobiert.

Das Haus selbst ist ein Traum, der Wohnraum über zwei Ebenen ist großzügig, hell und modern eingerichtet. Die Küche ist sehr gut ausgestattet, dass man auch gut selbst kochen kann. Und die Terrasse war unser Lieblingsplatz zum Frühstücken! Auch die beiden Schlafzimmer mit je einem Doppelbett sind super eingerichtet. Waschmaschine und Trockner gibt es auch noch. Also zusammenfassend: Wir fanden das Haus wirklich perfekt und können es wärmstens weiterempfehlen!

Unsere Woche bei Kate und Wade war einfach wunderbar. Die Wohnung ist noch schöner und liebevoller eingerichtet, als man es sich durch die Fotos vorstellen kann. Alle Zimmer sind super sauber und hochwertig eingerichtet. Es war der perfekte Ort, um vor und nach dem Trubel der Stadt zu entspannen. Wir haben uns wie zu hause gefühlt.
Kate und Wade sind die besten Gastgeber, die man sich vorstellen kann. Sie haben uns schon vor unserer Ankunft mit nützlichen Informationen geholfen und uns jede Frage schnell und super nett beantwortet. Am Abend unserer Ankunft waren beide in der Wohnung, um uns zu begrüßen und alles genau zu erklären (die Alarmanlagen der Häuser in Kapstadt bedürfen einer Einweisung:)). Der Kühlschrank war liebevoll bestückt und mit dem Sekt, den die beiden uns zur Begrüßung mitgebracht haben, konnten wir beim Sonnenuntergang auf der herrlichen Terrasse mit Blick über die ganze Stadt, den Tafelberg und den Lionshead anstoßen.
Die beiden haben uns außerdem mit einem selbst zusammengestellten Heft versorgt, in dem nützliche Tipps zu Restaurants uns must-sees und -dos in der Stadt aufgeführt sind.
Vredehoek ist eins der sichersten Viertel in Kapstadt und wir konnten zum Abendessen in einem der vielen netten Restaurants in der Umgebung stets zu Fuß gehen.
Wir hätten uns keine bessere Unterkunft vorstellen können.
Vielen lieben Dank für die schöne Woche in Eurem Zuhause!
Liebste Grüße von Ilka, Bastien, Klaas und Alina

The Vredehoerk home was just fantastic. The setting, the view, the house itself is exactly as shown on the pictures - simply beautiful. The owners - Kate and Wade - were great hosts. Before the vist, both provided us with advice and support for our trip and when we arrived they made us feel immediately welcome. It's a place where one feels instantly at home.  Thank you!

Wir waren über Weihnachten und es war fantastisch. Der Blick auf den Tafelberg, das Meer, den Hafen. Vredehoek liegt hervorragend um alle Hotspots der Umgebung in kürzester Zeit zu erreichen. Ich habe mich sehr sicher gefühlt. Das Haus ist supergepflegt und sauber, schön eingerichtet und die Terrasse ist ein Traum. Kate und Wade haben uns im Vorfeld Tipps gegeben und waren immer ansprechbar. Gerade die Alarmanlagen sind nicht leicht zu verstehen. Wir hatten einen vollen Kühlschrank als wir ankamen, eine wunderbare Maid, die jeden zweiten Tag kam. Die Aufteilung des Hauses war prima, wir waren zu dritt. Ich denke, dass einzige, was ich mir wünschen würde, wären Sonnenliegen und ein größeres Bett. Aber das kommt noch. Es war einfach Top!

Translation: It was fantastic, we love it so much. the house is wonderfull, the host are wonderfull. the location and the view more than we expect. thank you so much. we will come back.

Staying at Wade and Kate's home was one of the best airbnb experiences we have had! The house is beautiful and immaculate, with stunning views, and convenient location. What made the stay truly amazing, was the kindness, generosity and helpfulness of the hosts. Kate and Wade went out of their way to help us feel welcomed and at home. Although we arrived late in the evening (10:30 PM), Wade and Kate were waiting for us at the house. They showed us around the home, and explained how everything worked. In addition, they left a guide in the kitchen with information on everything from recommended places to eat and visit, to phone numbers for local doctors! They also had a box full of maps and brochures which we found very helpful; and had fruit, cheese, crackers and juice ready for us!! They made themselves available to us throughout (and even after) our stay, for questions and recommendations. And, as if this weren't already enough, they even had a gift basket waiting when we arrived in honor of my daughter's birthday.

I only wish we had had more time to spend at the house, and with Kate and Wade!

I cannot recommend Kate and Wade's home highly enough!!

Thank you Kate and Wade for an amazing and memorable stay!!

I loved this calm, modern, clean and in all detail elaborated place! Wade and Kate have created a wonderful place to stay and to explore the City. The view from the terrace is spectecular and you can even see the table mountain from the bed. There is whatever you can think about in the kitchen in case you want to compete with a first class chef. They even had a startet kit prepared for me (jam, grapes, wine and champagne milk, coffee as well as some crackers). I can only but recommend the place, Vredehoek and of course Wade and Kate. Communication was easy and although my plane was delayed they waited for me. Vredehoek is a lovely part of cape town with little restaurant/bars and a Spar to buy whatever you need. I will come back soon and If there is a chance to stay at Wade and Kate's flat or meet them for a coffee I will be more than happy. Thanks for making me feel home and safe. XO Dorothee

The listing description was definitely accurate! The minor details of the home were more beautiful than the listing could have described though! Example: The house was newly renovated and had so many wonderful candles, mists, books, magazines and little extras throughout the home that made it a perfect stay in Cape Town! There was a sim card left to put in your phone, directions to shops/restaurants, WIFI available, nibbles & champagne put in the fridge for us, beautiful/ all new kitchenware and lovely new linen on the beds. The lounge in the main room was a beautiful spot to relax, with such an airy feeling and gorgeous deck and mountains to look out upon! The host, Wade, was fabulous. He was so very flexible and helpful with check in/ check out times and prompt with his responses from our initial request! We would highly recommend a stay at the beautiful Vredehoek home! We booked 4 nights but wished we had stayed 5 or 6 nights. Many thanks to Wade for his amazing hospitality and kindness.

Wade and Kate's house in Vredehoek is just as lovely as it looks in the pictures at the Airbnb site.
The house is modern and has all the equipment and facilities you can ask for (and more). The outside area is lovely!
The neighborhood is peaceful and safe, and there is a well functioning alarm system in the house just to make you feel 100% safe. There are a few restaurants and a grocery store very close to the house, the sidewalk cafe became our favorite.
The city is within walking distance (at least downhill), but there is also a well functioning bus-service and taxis are easy to use (Wade introduced us to Uber and that really works!)
Wade and Kate are the perfect hosts, and couldn't have done a better job in making our stay just perfect.

We enjoyed our stay very much. Unfortunately 5nights are to short.
Everything was like in the discprition. Very friendly welcome which a bottle of Champagner, some cheese and jam in the refrigderator and flowers on the table. Pretty nice view over the city, the station, the table mountain and the beaches north of captown.
We´ll came back again.
Andrea, Oswald and Renate, Andi

We spent the first nights of our 3 week vacation in Kate's and Wade's lovely home. It was a great time - the house is clean and decorated in a very nice and stylish way- the neighbourhood is safe and it is very close to the city centre. Thanks to Kate and Wade, their warm welcome and all the helpful tips, this made it a perfect start for our vacation.

Glenda is a generous host, we had wonderful conversations, and the flat is a beautifully tranquil space that is thoughtfully prepared for guests. The gorgeous garden is a real treat, built around a stream coming directly off the mountain. I would gladly stay here again for the pleasant atmosphere and convenience of the location, and recommend to friends looking for a quiet place to unwind.

Glenda and Gavin were the best hosts we could have imagined. We felt very welcomed in their house from the moment we arrived. Glenda waited for us at the airport to pick us up which was very sweet, and when we got to the house she was very welcoming and offered us some tea. Glenda and Gavin are very social and friendly, they were so nice to invite us for wine and a lovely dinner and even a braai with their friends. Since we had some trouble finding a flat, they were so helpful in so many different ways. They also gave us plenty of really nice tips on where to eat, which markets are nice and much more. The room we stayed in is really cozy and nice and has everything one might need: blow dryer, heater, big cupboards, desk, books, Wi-Fi… etc. the garden is like a botanical garden and perfect to relax. Newlands itself is a very nice area, with lots or greenery and natural beauty. Just up the street is Table Mountain where it is beautiful to go for a walk or run. Within walking distance there are nice restaurants and pubs and Cavendish Square is also close where u can get everything u might need. To the city center is just 10 minutes with the car. We can definitely recommend Glenda & Gavin’s house and we really hope to meet them again. Thanks a lot to a really wonderful family!

Staying at Glenda's place has been absolutely wonderfull! The garden is really beautiful, peacefull and quiet with a nice view of tablemountain. Glenda and Gavin gave us a very warm welcome and were very helpfull and gezellig! I would recommend this amazing place to anyone.

I felt very welcome here. Glenda and her husband were warm, welcoming, and always ensuring I had everything I needed, including delicious and varied breakfasts. They were also not intrusive, which I appreciated, enabling me to get my work done and live my life there on my own terms. I felt very comfortable, trusted and trusting.

The flat is as advertised. Comfortable, quiet, etc. The house and surroundings are gorgeous. The neighborhood is attractive, friendly and as secure as anywhere in Cape Town. I like it, because I can walk to the shops, to restaurants, to the University and on the Mountain.

Glendas house is a unique beauty. Situated in the leafy Newlands of Cape Town. I can easily say the garden is one of the best i have ever seen. A double bed with two bathrooms (interior of which is wonderfully decorated) is offered in a separate garden flat of the property which i also used as an artist / work studio. Surrounded by plenty of art work and sunny views into the garden. We felt very treated to have been able to stay there.

We booked Glendas accommodation last minute. Even though me and my friend arrived very late due to flight delays Glenda was extremely welcoming. Breakfast was laid every morning which i though was very generous.

If I was to visit Cape Town again i wouldn't hesitate to contact Glenda.

Rose

Great house in a lovely neighborhood with an added bonus of fantastic hosts! We love modern architecture and the studio is a real gem hidden in a lush garden. The artworks on display around the studio,house and the garden were stunning. Apart from the accommodation being simply stunning it was also very comfortable with, among others, own kitchen, dinning area, 2 bathrooms and an outside sitting area. The least not last was the company - we enjoyed so much sipping wine with Glenda and long conversations we had until late in the night. Glenda, thank you and your family for making us so welcome. I'm sure we will see eachother again soon - either in Cape Town or in Europe!

Glenda and Gavin's home is really a little gem.
Having wanted to experience Cape Town as a local as opposed to a tourist, for a change, their little garden hideout created the most perfect environment to get away from the bustling city; at a tiny 15 minute drive.
The cottage itself provides the perfect amount of privacy , while also providing an opportunity to socialize with the main home. We were surrounded by beautiful art pieces and books, set in a most modern cottage with a clean and spacious Japanese feel; So neat and compact. And then ofcourse one of the most spectacular things about their home is its location. With a stream feeding a luscious garden on the property, and a 2 minute walk to various hiking trails up the newlands forest, the location and natural environment created the perfect backdrop for a peaceful stay.
Lastly but certainly not least, the entire Younge Family were the highlight. They were so hospitable, warm, and just a pleasure to bump into on every occasion we did.
We look forward to maintaining a great relationship with the Younges and hope to meet soon over yet another glass of wine ;) xxx M & J

Nossa experiência com a Glenda foi muito positiva desde o primeiro momento, ainda pelo site, e permaneceu assim até o último momento de nossa estada. Sempre disponíveis para esclarecer dúvidas e apoiar, Glenda e Gavin foram muito amáveis, dando dicas para desfrutarmos a maravilhosa Cape Town e nos ajudando com outras atividades que buscamos além do turismo.
Houve um equilíbrio perfeito entre ter um espaço privativo e uma convivência quase familiar. Na verdade, saímos com a sensação de ter desenvolvido uma nova amizade com o casal.
O studio é espaçoso, confortável, decorado de forma clean e agradável, correspondendo ao que as fotos no site mostram. Está integrado à casa e a um belo jardim com riacho, de uma forma que nos surpreendeu.
O café da manhã foi todos os dias cuidadosamente preparado, de acordo com nossas preferências. Excelente.
Newlands é um excelente, tranquilo e belíssimo bairro. De lá podíamos ir ao centro em apenas 10/15 min e fazer a maioria dos passeios em menos de 30 min de carro.
A experiência superou nossas expectativas. Recomendamos, claro!!!

My husband and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay here. The house is centrally located, the accommodations are more than adequate and their garden is quite impressive! They were both terrific hosts and very helpful.
Lovely stay at Gelda's beautiful place. Great location and she is ever so helpful and friendly. Thank you so much! We recommend it!

Le vacanze a Everview Bungalow in Cape Town sono state fantastiche. La casa è come la presentano, bella, arredata di modo semplice ma con gusto, comoda e la posizione è perfetta. Vicino al mare (si raggiunge la spiaggia di Camps Bay a piedi), silenziosa e molto luminosa. E' vicino a Cape Town (15 minuti in macchina) questo ci ha permesso di muoverci facilmente. Noi eravamo in 4 (2 bambini e due adulti) e tutti ci siamo goduti molto lo spazio, le camere sono molto grandi e con bagni privati. La casa è arredata con cura ed è molto pulita.
Michelle e il suo staff, Florence e Alpheus sono stati sempre disponibili e gentili con noi. Consiglio vivamente questa casa Everview Bungalow, perché dal momento che aprirete la porta vi sentirete in vacanza.

Carmen

We had a great stay and would highly recomend this fantastic place!
Location: perfect! Very spacious modern, tastefully decorated, high quality and top design in everything from kitchen knives to beach towels. I loved the windows and doors, the light, the lamps, the tiles in the bathroom- so many nice details.Huge outdoor balcony to eat or relax in comfort. We got a very warm welcome and the very best service during our whole stay from the house manager: thank you!!! We hope we can stay here next time we come to Cape Town as well.

WOW!! What an amazing place (just like the photos) and absolutely perfect host! Lance was more than inviting and made our stay so easy. He was even kind enough to invite us downstairs to have a BBQ when he had his friends over. His place is unbelievable, perfectly situated and has the most epic views. I will stay at this place every time I visit Cape Town and you should too. Just perfect!!

Sehr zu empfehlen!!
Lage, Sicht und Räumlichkeit des Apartments sind super.
Man ist sehr zentral, zugleich aber auch in einer ruhigen Strasse, mit einem tollen Blick.
Ich hab mich dort sehr wohl gefühlt.
Lance ist ein sehr zuvorkommender Gastgeber und easy.
Ein idealer Ort für ein paar Tage Cape Town.
Lance was amazing. He had everything ready for our stay and I would stay there again in the future. Great personality and we felt right at home upon arrival. Everything worked and looked as stated.

Lance is a wonderful, friendly host and made me feel welcome and at home in this beautiful studio apartment. The apartment is located above the main house, with a separate set of stairs up, so offering the right amount of privacy and options for contact with the owner if any issues. As a person travelling on my own for this trip,this was an ideal set up. I felt completely safe. The sea views from the balcony are amazing and the apartment was spotlessly clean and well designed for a great stay in Cape Town.  The area is a short walk to the vibrant Seapoint main road and within easy reach of the local MyCity bus transport if needed. I highly recommend the apartment for a memorable stay in the Mother City.
Studio has a perfect few, great location, very clean and private parking. Lance was very helpful and with good tips. Had a great stay, would really recommend and love to come back.

Lance's studio was exactly as described and pictured... And what an unbelievable view! It was very safe and easy to walk around and down to the beach. The studio was clean and Lance provided plenty of fresh towels, toiletries, coffees and teas. Lance was super friendly and accommodating. We wished we could've stayed longer, but will definitely stay there again should we ever return to Cape Town!
We had an amazing time and would recommend it to anyone. Lance is a great host and the apartment perfectly located

Wonderful little apartment with amazing views! Very recommendable!!
Lance was also very friendly and helpful and tried to made our stay the best as possible.
Thanks :-))

I had an amazing time in Cape Town and a large part of that was having such a great place to stay. Close to everything and a cool apartment in itself, it's a great place to base yourself. Moreover the scenery from the balcony is just stunnig. Lance was very accommodating and we would strongly recommend this apartment to anyone!
Tanks Lance to make me feel home.
It was a beautiful week in Cape Town and having a nice, neat apartment in such a good location made it all the better!

Absolutely amazing apartment, wonderfully designed and decorated, with fantastic views of the ocean and the mountains. Michelle was a great host, making us feel very welcome, and providing everything we needed to make our stay even more comfortable. I'd love to stay again!

We had a WONDERFUL stay in the Everview Bungalow. Our hosts Michelle and Bernhard were outstanding and very helpful with suggestions. Also a very safe area.
It was exactly as pictured and described. We were 3 adults and had 2 bedrooms with 2 full bathrooms. Newly renovated, open concept, big windows. A huge deck gave us magnificent views of Camps Bay and also a portion of the 12 apostles mountain range. The location is walking distance to the beach (camps bay main restaurant strip) and a local convenience store. We even used the BBQ a few times. Alpheus the assistant was very helpful. We would definetly use Everview on our next trip again. Much nicer than staying in a hotel!
p.s. William and Daniel (the two young sons) are great. They love chocolate!
We are from Canada and Austria

Gorgeous 2-bedroom apartment overlooking the water in Camps Bay. Large sheltered porch with separate dining and seating areas to enjoy the view. 5-minute walk to the best bistro in Camps Bay. 5-minute drive to Camps Bay Beach and restaurants.
Michelle was the perfect hostess. The refrigerator was stocked with provisions which made us feel right at home.
A convenient location for exploring Table Mountain, Camps Bay Beach, and downtown Cape Town. We would definitely stay here again if we ever get back to Cape Town.

Michelle is the best! She made moving into the place quick and easy and gave us the best eating out tips. The apartment is beautiful, breathtakng view from the amazing terrace, clean, tidy and had everything that is needed. We will definitely look to stay again on our return to Cape Town!

Michelle nous a reçu elle-meme et nous a fait faire le tour de son magnifique appartement. Dans la cuisine, elle avait laissé tout pour un premier petit-déjeuner (lait, oeufs, fromage, café, fruits, pain fait maison...).

What a great apartment!  Michelle was really helpful and allowed us to drop our bags off early and also to leave late on our departure date.  She also recommended some good restaurants nearby which were great.  Camps bay is a lovely area in Cape Town and a reprieve away from the craziness of the city centre.  The apartment itself is beautifully decorated and feels like a home away from home.  Nice touches with some wine and fruit in the fridge when we arrived.
We loved this beautiful apartment in Campsbay and Michelle was the best! Very clean, spacious en nicely decorated. Would def recommend!

We stayed here for four nights and had a wonderful time! We were greeted promptly along with a bottle of wine and fresh, warm bread. Michelle had even shuffled around other bookings so that our timing (which was rather constricted due to other travel) could work. The deck, views, and accommodation did not disappoint!

We were able to walk to Codfather and taxi rides were only about R120 to downtown.

A great relaxing stay!

Highly recommended

Everview is located in Camps Bay, 10 minutes from Cape Town center. I booked the place for a few days only but ended up extending my stay because the apartment really was to my liking.

The place is ideal if you are traveling alone or with two. It's been renovated recently and feels quite new, the bathroom is very comfortable and so is the kitchen. It has a big balcony with ocean view, and the balcony is sun-covered most of the day, with two nice chairs to relax in after a long day of kitesurfing... :).

The hosts (Bernard and Michelle and their assistant Apheuze) did everything to make my stay as comfortable as possible. The place was tidied up every day which made my stay even better.

I definately hope to be able to stay here again in the future!

I loved my stay at the Everview Studio and highly recommend it! I found it to be comfortable and cozy, and I really appreciated having the deck with a gorgeous view! Michelle and Bernhard are really lovely people, too. They just recently renovated and equipped the space, so there were a few little things I asked about (like a wastebasket near the bed and ice trays), and they responded immediately and cheerfully, and seemed to appreciate hearing my suggestions.

I liked it so much I've already booked my next stay! :-)

Het appartement was heel comfortabel en een goed uitgangspunt om de Kaap te gaan zien en omgeving.

Ook het balkon, waar je heerlijk kon zitten, met uitzicht op de oceaan was aangenaam.

Vriendelijke verhuurders, het was een keurig, schoon appartement, waar alles op en aan zat.

Een echte aanrader dus.

Hallo Michelle,

vielen Dank an Dich und Deine Familie und natürlich an Alpheus. Wir haben die Zeit in Eurem wunderschönen Zuhause genossen. Wir würden immer wieder in Camps Bay wohnen wollen - und das mit dieser genialen Aussicht - wow! Die Bilder die ihr im Internet veröffentlich habt sind gut - aber die Realität ist definitiv besser!!!! Wir würden immer wieder bei Euch buchen und definitiv an unsere Freunde und Familie empfehlen. Wer mit einer größeren Gruppe reise, der kann problemlos das Appartement zusätzlich buchen und hat dann 4 Schlafzimmer mit bis zu 8 Schlafmöglichkeiten. Zu Begrüßung gab es frisches Obst, Kaffee, Mich und Käse - danke dafür.

Wir würden uns freuen Euch bald wieder sehen zu können - gerne auch ich Deutschland.

Vielen Dank und liebe Grüße

Marcus & Familie

We stayed four nights at Everview Studio and had a great time. The location of the accomodation is amazing in one of the nicest areas of Cape Town and around 10 minutes away from a small beach. There is a supermarket closeby as well as a nice steakhouse. The studio includes a fully equiped kitchen, which is perfect to prepare breakfast or cook meals, a small but nice bathroom and a seperated sleeping area. Furthermore we had a terrace with an amazing view of the Atlantic Ocean, where you can drink some of the nice South African wines in the evening. Our host Michelle was very kind and helpful. She introduced us to everything at the first day and provided us with a bottle of wine as well as everything you need for a first breakfast in the morning. Her assistant, Alpheuze was always there for us and helped us when planning trips in and around Cape Town.
When staying in Cape Town I definitely recommend Everview Studio and would always go there again.

Me and my friend stayed in Everview Studio for 6 nights, and found it to be the perfect location. Michelle and everybody else we met there were very helpfull and sweet, the studio is nice and clean, and the terrace and the view was worth every rand! It was very good accomodation for the money, and we would love to come back!

Michelle's studio was perfect for our trip to Cape Town. It had a beautiful deck that looked onto the Atlantic. Inside was everything you could need including a well stocked kitchen. Michelle had left us homemade bread, butter, eggs etc so we didn't need to go to the shops when we arrived. There was even a bottle of wine to enjoy on the terrace which was great as you need to go into Cape Town to buy booze.
The location was great only a 10-15 min walk into camps bay which we did quite happily at night. And on the bus route into Cape Town.
Michelle and alpheus were so friendly and helpful. If you are in Cape Town definitely stay with them.

We had a great time at Everview Studio. The apartment is located in Camps Bay, a perfectly safe area of Cape Town with nice restaurants and bars in walking distance. The apartment is nicely furnished and looks exactly like on the pictures and has a beautiful spacious deck with ocean view. Michelle and her crew are super nice and reliable. I can highly recommend renting Michelle's properties.
Lovely place in Bakoven. Close to the Table Mountain and beautiful view from the terrace. Michelle and Bernhard are terrific hosts. We felt very welcome and they helped us with everything we needed.

Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt, das Studio ist wunderbar und sehr praktisch und gemütlich eingerichtet. Es gibt dort alles was man braucht und mehr eine fantastische Aussicht. Wir wurden mit selbstgebackenem Brot und Früchten begrüßt, der Kühlschrank war gefüllt, alles war sehr nett und schön.

We had a great time at Michelle and Reinhard's place. They were great hosts and even though they weren't around fr most of our stay, they were very responsive on the first day to make sure we had everything we needed. The place has a very beautiful view - large open windows that look out onto the ocean. And on the other side, a great view of the apostles.

We found some practical inconveniences such as the relatively small (and combined) shower/toilets in two of the bedrooms. Using the shower tended to make the whole place wet. While the design of the apartment is very beautiful, it could do with a few homely touches.

Overall a wonderful place to stay and we'd love to go back and stay there again.

We fell in love with Michelle's place and her hospitality. And in result, we extended our stay. We definitely would like to visit Cape Town again some time and her place will be the first we will check for availability.

Where to begin?  I've stayed all over Camps Bay and this apartment is the finest in which I've stayed.  It literally blows away the competitors.  The appointments are superb right down to the Nespresso coffee maker, the kitchen equipment, and the well stocked pantry.  The space is brand new, wonderfully designed and plentiful.  The pictures do it justice.  Michelle is a gracious host and was helpful in every way.  The location is also ideal - just the right distance from the main drag but a quick jaunt down to my favorites such as the Codfather.  Quite simply put: stay here if you can!

Amazing first time experience in Cape Town thanks to Michelle. She was very professional and attended to all of our needs. Will highly recommend anyone visiting Cape Town to stay at this gorgeous place.

Everview is a very nice place in a great, quiet location in Camps Bay. Michelle was quite accommodating and ensured our stay was very comfortable. Next time I'm in Cape Town, this will be on my short list of places to stay.

Michelle is a pleasure to deal with and the listing exceeded expectations.
We particularly enjoyed the view form the rooms/main living area and balcony. We loved the Fireplace, Braai, the awsome flooring, Nespresso and kitchen facilities.

I did tons of research before deciding on this listing and think it's by far the best option in the price range.

Had a lovely stay.

We had a wonderful experience at Michelle's beautiful apartment overlooking the ocean in Camp Bay. Not surprisingly with a newly renovated space, we had a couple of small issues that Michelle took care of immediately.  The photos of this space do not do it justice. It is absolutely beautiful, spacious bedrooms and bathrooms, plenty of kitchen-ware, comfortable "hanging out" living room space, scenic outdoor space on a beautiful, spacious deck. The beds were very comfortable, plenty of storage and clothes hanging space, water pressure for showers was excellent. We highly recommend this location if you are visiting Cape Town, but don't want to stay downtown.

The apartment is incredible, but you can see that for yourself from the pictures. But what is harder to tell from the pictures is the fantastic service we received from the hosts. Everything from booking a babysitter for us, to giving us a bottle of their own wine for dinner when we struggled to find somewhere that sells any. Would really recommend this place for anyone staying in camps bay. Great service, lovely apartment, and a spectacular view.

Michelle made us really feel welcome, and the apartment is excellent!  The view is so great your don't want to go to bed! (we had it with a super moon)  Its very well designed and furnished to a very high standard.  Highly recommended for anyone visiting Cape Town.

We stayed at the Everview Suite for 10 days and it was amazing! Although Cape Town is one of the most beautifulst city, we loved spending time on the terrace with an awesome view. You had the ocean, Lion's Head, the Table Mountain and the 12 Apostel. Spectecular! And the pictures uploaded on Airbnb really meet your exceptations and are even better!
We arrived in the evening and we were welcomed hearty by Michelle. She also provided us wine, fruits, bread, etc. for our basic needs. As we had questions or were asking for some recommendations she was always endeavour to give us the best answer. We felt very comfortable with her and her family!
Thank you for a wonderful stay, we hope we will see you again!
Wonderful place. Friendly host. Highly recommended.
Candy's place has a beautiful view!We loved our stay there. Great place for a peaceful and relaxed holiday. The Candy and her fiancée were great hosts! Definitely would recommend!

This was one of the best views I've woken up to!  The flat had everything we needed.  Candy and Jason were really fast, very friendly and attentive.  Would go back without doubt.  The location might be a little far from the hustle and bustle of Cape Town, but that was exactly what we were looking for.  Its an epic spot.  Thanks Candy for sharing it with us..
Had a wonderful stay. Apartment had everything we needed. Fantastic view and Candy and her husband the best hosts. Loved it.

We were welcomed personally by Candy and Jason. The place was awesome with a breathtaking view. Jason showed us around and was very helpful with any question. The apartment itself was lovely furnished.  It was clean, comfortable and well equipped (full equipped kitchen, washing machine and dryer)We had a great time and would return anytime. Thank you for the wonderful stay.
We LOVED this place!! Aside from the amazing location (that view is incredible) the apartment was perfect - relaxed and well equipped - and our hosts were friendly and helpful. We'll be back :)

The place was lovely and Candy's fionce Jason was a very good host. All in all, I would recommend it to anyone wanting to have an astonishing view over the South african scenery and just to chill out, I would love to come again.

What a stunning destination stay! The accommodation and surrounding area are places of beauty! Our hosts made us feel completely at home and relaxed. I would definitely recommend this to anyone wanting to escape the madness of city life and would love to visit myself again! Thank you!

That place you want to come see again and again !

Jason and Candy have settled in a very refreshing, relaxing and enjoyable place. Not only did they host us in a cosy and well decorated house, but they dedicated time and effort to make our journey a little honeymoon.

The view outside of the flat is simply stunning ! The sunset from the beach few minutes away from the flat was lovely.

As if their warm welcome was not enough, we felt privileged when dropped off at the airport on our way back.

Candy, Jason, do expect us back soon ! And many thanks again for the lovely weekend.

First of all, Candy and Jason rocks and are super helpful! You should really consider their advices as they have been a huge help for our last-minute trip! Although, they were kind enough offering to pick us up from the Airport, we were advised to rent a car. We were in Cape Town to explore, so that was the best option!
The apartment is located in a very laid-back and safe neighborhood, with a super stunning view! There is a shop, cafe, restaurant and beach which are all walking distance. House is fully equipped with almost everything one needs.
Thanks, Jason and Candy, we will definitely come back!

Di was an incredible host! Nice, thoughtful, friendly and caring. She made our stay perfect with many dedicated attentions, advice and care.
The place is really quite, clean and comfortable. It is exactly as it is in the photos: stylish and comfortable with a great attention to detail! The room is privately located and with a separate access gate so that you are free to come and go as you please.
We felt so welcomed and so “at home”!
The location is conveniently placed in a nice residential area, quite near the Claremont train station (on the way to the cape and the best beaches!) and near the Clavendish shopping centre.
I can highly recommend it! Definitely a good choice.
Thank you Di!

I will definitely recommend this place which is very comfortable, we felt immediately at home and it is separate from the main house with a separate gate. Di, is a lovely person, welcome us very well.
I will definitely go back there as soon as I can.
We enjoyed our stay with Di. She is kind, helpful and relaxed, and was always quick and generous in coming our assistance over all our queries and problems.
Very cute bedsit in a lovely area and Di was an amazing host, so accommodating and helpful! Would definitely stay again.

Jól éreztük magunkat és mindenkinek csak ajánlani tudjuk a helyet, aki szeretne Cape Townban megszállni, kellemes és barátságos környezetben, reális áron. Di rendkívül kedves, figyelmes házigazda. A szeparált házrész pedig bár aprócska, de nagyon bájos, tiszta, szép, kényelmes, ízlésesen berendezett, és minden megvan benne, ami kell. Egy rövid összefoglalót is kaptunk, egyfajta használati utasítást a házhoz, a kapukhoz. A sűrűre sikeredett programjaink miatt túl sok időnk nem volt ismerkedésre, de e rövid idő alatt is egy nagyon barátságos és segítőkész házigazdát ismertünk meg Di személyében. Köszönjük! :)
(Egyedül talán a wifi nem működött mindig tökéletesen, de ez minket különösebben nem hátráltatott e pár napban.)
Great nights stay over, Di is a wonderful person who we spoke to briefly but her warmth was instantly apparent. Clean, cosy and comfortable flat with own access. Thanks Di!
Clean and immaculately decorated accommodation, in a lovely central location. Di is an attentive and helpful host.

El apartamento es absolutamente encantador. Y Di una magnífica anfitriona, desde el primer contacto hizo todo lo posible por ayudarnos, resolver nuestras dudas y facilitar tanto nuestra llegada como nuestra estancia. El primer día aún no teníamos vehículo propio y ella misma se ofreció a llevarnos en su coche al mercado para hacer la compra. La habitación tiene el tamaño perfecto y está equipada con todo lo necesario para hacer la estancia cómoda.
Destacamos la limpieza de la habitación y el baño, ¡5 estrellas! El barrio es tranquilo pero al mismo tiempo tiene todos los servicios cerca. Lo recomendamos 100%.

Our host Di was friendly, welcoming and helpfull. She even assisted with some urgent laundry. The room was great, exactly as described and we were able to unwind.  Location also great would stay again. Thanks Di.

Goed bereikbare en veilige plek om te verblijven. De B&B ligt op ongeveer een 3 kwartier rijden van de V&A Waterfront (busje is 8 Rand per persoon en taxi kost ca. 200 Rand). De kamer, met eigen ingang, is smaakvol ingericht en compleet voorzien van alle benodigdheden. De kamer en badkamer zijn perfect schoon gemaakt door de lieve Rosie, de rechterhand van eigenares Di. We werden door Rosie zeer gastvrij ontvangen. Het bed slaapt uitstekend en de veiligheid is perfect. Kortom, we hebben er een prima en relatief scherp geprijsd verblijf gehad. De volgende morgen kennis gemaakt met Di, een hardwerkende dokter. Ze is een lieve vrouw met het hart op de goede plek. Wij kunnen iedereen deze plek van harte aanbevelen. Ga zorgvuldig om met de mooie inrichting, want wij willen er volgend jaar weer van genieten.

Great location and beautiful apartment. Very clean and wonderfully spacious and the deck is the best part, quiet and off the street. Lance was extremely helpful prior to my check in and has great suggestions for things to do while you are here, everything from dining to sites. 100% recommend staying here.

Lance made it all easy moving in. Even though our hours were a little off. He is easy to reach, quick to reply and happy to help with whatever you may need. If you have a car, parking is free and always easy to find.
I was in Cape Town for two months and Green point is definitely the best area for me. It's safe, close to restaurants, beach and city center.

I booked this apartment for my parents when they came to visit us in Cape Town. This was what they had to say:

This apartment is wonderfully located, in walking distance from Main Street (where lots of restaurants can be found) as well as from the V&A Waterfront. Lance is incredibly friendly, helpful and attentive. The flat is spacious, with a large kitchen going onto a deck where you can have a private barbeque /braai. It is clean and wonderfully equipped, even with a washing machine. It is very safe with a security gate.
Note there is no parking off street, only on street. Our car was however fine as long as you don't leave anything inside the car.
Our stay was too short! We will be back.
Great apartment. Actually more cosy as expected from pictures!

Lance is a great guy that made us feel very welcome for the 2 weeks that stayed in the apartment. It has plenty of space, is very well presented and has a great out door space that gets the sun all day.

The location in Capetown is central to everything you need - Town, beaches, Lions Head, Table Mntn and walking distance to many great restaurants and its very safe.

We would certainly consider staying here again on our next trip to SA.

Absolutely wonderful experience! It was our first time using Airbnb and this place exceeded our expectations! The apartment was very clean, solid & safe. Bigger then we thought looking at the photos - the kitchen & bedroom are separated with the bathroom between them (via a hall). The shower pressure was strong and the bed and linen was good quality. Parking right out the front was always available for our rental. It was our first time to Cape Town and we really didn't understand the layout of the city looking at the map, however after a day this apartment is in a great location! We were apprehensive about renting an apartment as we usually stay at hotels, and we had just spent time at a exceptional private game reserve, but I can honestly say for the tariff this experience made our time in Cape Town very memorable. Lance is a brilliant host. We arrived welcomed at ease at midnight! Recommending restaurants and places to visit which was priceless and saved us so much time! We ate so well, shopped at places he recommended knowing what we required, knew which gym to hit & saw some of the most beautiful scenery in the world. Also, he is a huge car buff which was a bonus. He is easily approachable or will allow you space to have your own time. Great Cape Town base, wonderful host and now a airbnb promoter!

We very much enjoyed our stay. Lance is a great host, communicative and super accommodating with regard to check in time, questions, etc. The space is quiet, comfortable and has a nice outdoor patio to enjoy!

I cannot wait to come back and stay at this property. Not only is this place beautiful and convenient to many restaurants and shops, the hosts are extremely gracious and available in a pinch!  Lance went above and beyond as a host to make sure I was taken care of and happy with my stay. He even took the liberty of showing me around and giving me insights on what to visit and what I should avoid. Great advice and would recommend this property and host 110%! I traveled alone on this trip and he made it safe and fun! Thank you Lance!
As always, an excellent host! Would definitely stay here again

We had a great stay at the apartment. The location is really good and close to the V&A waterfront and other sightseeing points are at most an hour drive. The apartment itself is bigger than what we expected from the pictures and complete with all necessary equipment. The car can be parked in front of the apartment on the street for free (and it's safe). Lance is a great host who answers quickly and is really helpful. With other words, a great stay for a great holiday in Cape Town.

Amelia was an amazing host! She has the perfect location for walking to restaurants along Main Road in Greenpoint, to the Stadium, to the promenade and Greenpoint Park! Her apartment is beautiful, clean and perfect for a holiday in Cape Town! I'd definitely recommend staying at her place :)

Amelia was a charming and attentive host. She stayed in touch before and throughout the visit, dropped by to say hello and dealt with a couple of requests quickly and effectively.

Her apartment in Cape Town is absolutely lovely. It's been beautifully and carefully furnished and very clean (the interiors may look even better than some of the listing pics). She even provided some snacks/munchies on the table and cooking supplies like oil/spices. The fridge was stocked with juice, cola and wine!

The pool & pool deck upstairs were extremely clean and inviting as well - an excellent place to relax in the evenings.

All the information on the listing is accurate. The apartment is very well located, a 5-10 minute walk from lots of restaurants/café/pubs + 2 supermarkets (Woolworth Food & KwikSpar). The Greenpoint park and the Beach promenade/Lighthouse are a 10-15minute walk in one direction and the V&A waterfront is a 20-25 minute walk in the other.

Also Greenpoint being very central in the CBD area, it is well-connected for buses and the MyCitibus stop is directly in front of the apartment building. There were also no problems at all getting a radio-cab to and from Amelia's place at all times of the day and night.

The building has 24 hour security/ concierge and the apartment comes with a secure parking space within the complex which is great.

In short - the place is nicer, more stylish and much more comfortable than any hotel/B&B, but with all the security and conveniences of one. Getting a bite to eat or shopping for self-catering supplies can be done in very close proximity.

It would be great to stay at Amelia's apartment again on any future trips to the Mother City - and this listing is highly recommended!

Amelia-May has been a pleasure to correspond with and did  a magnificent job of organising the various logistics before and during our stay. The apartment  is an absolute pleasure - and we're missing it already...

Amelia is lovely which is exactly what the apartment reflects. A very light, nice, clean and tastefully decorated place! Amelia made me feel extra welcome with all kinds of small details (heart chocolate, magazines etc). The one thing is that I had bad luck staying while the building was reconstructed, but then also Amelia followed up with them and made sure everything went as quick as possible just as she followed up everything that was needed. The bright side; probably there won't be any reconstructions going on during next stays ;) I would definitely recommend staying here. It's a very comfortable and cozy stay!
Really great host who was very accommodating and helpful. Quick to respond to all queries and very welcoming with chocolate and wine in the apartment.

Wir haben uns bei Amelia sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Wohnung ist sehr sauber und schön eingerichtet. Der Pool und die Dachterasse sind auch super. Amelia ist sehr hilfsbereit und hat uns mit guten Informationen versorgt. Vielen Dank!
We really enjoyed our stay in the apartment which was very comfortable and met our needs perfectly. We would certainly recommend the apartment, location and Amelia as a host.
Amelia place is everything it was advised to be in the listing. It's modern and centrally located. Amelia is a great and helpful host and we would come back again if given the opportunity.

un message d'accueil personnalisé nous attendait ainsi que plusieurs attentions (chocolats, corbeille de fruits, boissons, etc) et a envoyé plusieurs mails pour savoir si on avait besoin de quelque chose.
Le logement est très bien situé, proche de commerces, restaurants, parc pour la promenade.

Amelia's apartment was everything that we hoped it would be - clean, well appointed, and well located for exploring Cape Town. Not to mention, having the pool was a great bonus! She was a wonderful host and very responsive in terms of communication, and was kind enough to leave us a bottle of sparkling wine to celebrate our honeymoon. We would not hesitate to stay here again in the future. Thanks Amelia!

Dale was a superb host, the apartment looks exactly as shown in the pictures: wonderful! Well decorated, well equipped and comfortable.
See you soon!!!!!!
Outstanding!

My stay at Dale's beautiful place was even nicer than I expected. Although the photos are beautiful they don't do this wonderful apartment justice. Everything is so thought through and tasteful! It's extremely well kept and modern. The bed is better than in most of the 5-star hotels I visited. And you couldn't ask for a warmer welcome than the one I received from Dale! What a great host! I arrived much later than expected but he still took the time to greet me and explain everything. There was a bowl of delicious fruit awaiting me and fresh flowers on the table. I would have loved to have stayed longer and will definitely be back. Thank you for everything !

We stayed for a weekend in Cape Town and loved Dale's apartment!! The furnishing was exceptional with a lot of love for details. The fully equipped kitchen had all what you need for preparing a propper meal. The apartment contained even a washing machine and a dryer.
In addition to this, the location was perfect. Green Point offers all you need: restaurants, supermarkets, an excellent Italian deli (Giovanni's) and bus stops for 3 different lines.
Dale was very friendly and provided us with all informtion that we needed.
Thanks a lot Dale - we will definitely recommend Brynterion and would book it again when we are back in Cape Town!

Great place to stay in with everything you'd want and need. Walking distance to great restaurants.

Dale was super welcoming and made the stay perfect. The little touches like having milk in the fridge and fresh fruit on arrival make you feel welcome.

The fact that you have your own secure parking is a great bonus!
We had an excellent stay at Dale's place! Really beautiful apt. Close to shopping, the Promenade, the beach and city center. We loved it and look forward to returning again one day!

My sister and I stayed at Dale's wonderful cottage for a period of four nights, and loved every second of our stay. Dale is an incredible host, whom made us feel at home from the moment we've arrived. Not only is the cottage is secured, modern and extremely well equipt, but its also situated close by several local stores, restaurants, and a easy four minute drive to the Victoria & Alfred Waterfront premiss. I will without a doubt return again, and highly recommend it for anyone considering staying there. JP

We really loved staying at Brynterion Guest Cottage. It was wonderfully decorated and had everything you could need for a short stay in the city. Really conveniently located in the heart of Cape Town - close to lots of cool places. Having a safe parking spot was a real bonus for us too.
Would definitely stay there again :)

We felt very comfortable at Dale's place. Dale helped us with every issue and was a very nice host. The apartment is even better as on the picture. We really had everything we needed! Plus, the apartment was very clean! Thanks, Dale!

Dales cottage is very cute, well equipped and in a super convenient area with Cape Town. It's quiet too.
Each day I walked down to the waterfront where there are many great shops and restaurants... It's a 15min walk.

Lisa and John were great hosts, they went out of their way to make me feel at home ....I did very much feel at home with them.
The house is as described and very well furnished, clean and all was newly fitted. The kitchen is complete with all accessories for cooking even though I didn't need to. Very comfortable bed, good bathroom and a nice garden in front of the house with a view of the harbour and mountains. Good English breakfast in the morning with stunning views. I would highly reccomend the accomodation, perfect for a couple or a single comfortable person like me :) , it is very secluded and with a private entrance.
Excellent value and close to city centre and beaches.

The property is really lovely -- open and spacious and well-furnished with everything necessary. The outdoor space is also very nice, with great views and a nice patio area. The hosts were very welcoming, but the flat also felt very independent as well.

Our stay in Cape Town was very short, but we really enjoyed the stay with John (and Lisa). The space was clean, comfortable and safe. Its central location made it very easy to get around town, by car or taxi. Access to the cottage and property was convenient we felt quite at home coming and going as our schedule required. The host was friendly and a pleasure to interact with. It was a bit difficult getting hold of the John on our day of travel, which was stressful as we arrived in Cape Town around 11pm. But when we got to the apartment he was there waiting for us. The views from the apartment was stunning and overall we had a lovely stay.

У Лисы прекрасное место. В вашем распоряжении пристройка к дому хозяев, в которой и кухня со всем нужным и своя гостиная и даже свой газон, где можно замечательно провести время с видом на Столовую гору. Общественным транспортом мы не пользовались, так как такси сравнительно дешевые. Но лучше арендовать машину. Это тоже совсем не дорого. Одним словом - место замечательное!
Our stay with Lisa was great,the apartment is very neat with everything we needed and more. I'd recommend Lisa's place to anyone wanting to visit Cape Town and all that the inner city has to offer.

A very enjoyable experience. The location is perfect and is situated at the base of table mountain with stunning views all around. Lisa is very friendly and accommodating to out requests. Will definitely be staying there again.

This apartment was perfect for my husband and I.  Clean, secluded and peaceful but close to the city with great views (and a comfortable bed). Parking was no problem.  Lisa was easy to work with and very helpful with information on the city and area.

It was great staying at the apartment adjacent to the main house. The unit was clean, spacious and well equipped. My only issue was the hot water getting finished a little sooner than expected - I guess it was a cold day.

Lisa was lovely and very responsive throughout the booking process and my stay. The apartment was great—beautiful views, safe and quiet neighborhood, what feels like a private garden right outside, clean and bright space with everything you'd need for a comfortable stay. And Angel, the outdoor cat, is the sweetest cat ever.

Like a previous Airbnb-er mentioned, the only surprise was the hot water cutting out mid-shower on the first morning. I notified Lisa and she had plumber come in to fix the issue the next day.

We had such a fabulous time staying in this apartment, situated nice and close to the centre city in a lovely suburb. We would highly recommend this to any other couple (or single) wishing to stay in beautiful Cape Town! Just down the road (2 min drive/10 min walk) is the Sidewalk cafe- an absolute must for breakfast/lunch/dinner. Lisa and John were most welcoming and happy to offer tips for sightseeing. Sunset views over table mountain were stunning. We hope to stay here again!

Nous avons été séduits par cette maison en bois
Très bien décorée (on s'y sent chez soi)
Très bien équipée
Très bien située pour effectuer toutes les visites aux alentours
Très bon accueil
Hôte à l'écoute et discret et de bons conseils
Endroit calme, entouré de verdure avec une vue magnifique et idéalement situé on y retournerait avec grand plaisir
Nous y étions 2 adultes et 2 enfants de 2 ans et 6 ans

The Cabin was wonderful! Colette has an amazing touch and seriously knows what she's doing! I would highly recommend! It is situated in the perfect little spot over looking the mountains and a short drive from Hout Bay. Spacious rooms and beautiful pool.

Not that great of an experience. Wifi did not work the first twenty four hours that we were at the cabin and our call to Colette to ask for assistance was answered with a rather smug response that it has worked for everyone else.  Only on a second call the next day did she reveal that it needed to be reset which of course solved the problem. So I guess it works for everyone if she bothers to take the time to explain how to reboot the system for you. Hot water disappeared halfway through our stay at the cabin and our calls to the caretaker for assistance were met with bewildering answers which never really explained why we were not getting hot water. One toilet stopped filling with water after being flushed. By then we had stopped calling for any help as none was ever given without a struggle. Remote didn't work to the television. If these amenities are advertised as being offered with your stay, then I expect them to work. The location is not convenient to anything. There is absolutely nothing nearby.

Amazing place! A perfect get away for rest and relaxation. Collette and Warren were friendly and kind host- even leaning some breakfast in the apartment for us since we arrived late at night. Would love to come back and stay! Beautiful views and poolside!
Heerlijk huis met een geweldig uitzicht. We dachten dat we een deel van het huis huurde maar het was het gehele huis. Mooie tuin spannende oprit. Een aanrader.
Wir waren 5 Nächte hier, und uns hat es sehr gut gefallen. Schöne Lage, die Einrichtung hat Charme und der Ausblick ins Tal ist toll. Warren und Colette fanden wir sehr sympathisch.

The views from this cabin are wonderful, especially sunset—great for sundowners and a braai (barbecue). The interior is typical log cabin style: comfortable and welcoming. The house is a convenient drive to restaurants, supermarkets and Cape Peninsula attractions. One of the bathrooms, including wc, are located in the main bedroom but the view from the tub quickly dispels any initial reservations. The second bathroom is a more private affair with a lovely shower and another pleasant view. Overall we had a great time and hope to go back for another visit.

superbe maison en bois dans les arbres et la nature
grandes chambres , belle pièce de vie, avec une vue incroyable
2 belles terrasses pour se relaxer et une petite piscine dans la nature
beaucoup d'équipement mise à notre disposition
Colette , hôte très agréable
je recommande cette maison exceptionnelle

Colette & Warren were such friendly & helpful hosts. My parents had an amazing stay and were really sad to leave this dream of an accomodation. Such a pieceful and scenery location. Colette prepared the house with beautiful flowers and a delicous red wine. Warren offered to light the fire for our arrival and made it so nice.
The wifi connection was better than anywhere else.
The accomodation super clean. The view incredible! 5 Stars for 5 Star hosts.
We will definitely come back.
Best regards
Alissa

Perfect location for those wishing to visit Cape Town. The house is in a quiet and close to tourist places. The children feel good (room, swimming pool wifi)
 The photos do not lie. We will come back, for sure.
Colette advised us very well both on restaurants and travel documents for our children. Thank you for being available even during your own vacation!
Sabine is very nice and made our stay as comfortable as possible! We spent a lovely evening together. Everything was clean and cosy.

We highly recommend her on Airbnb !!!!
Que dire de Sabine ... Un très court moment passé avec elle (arrivée tardive pour une seule nuit) mais une très belle rencontre...qui s est poursuivie par des échanges au delà de notre séjour. Sabine est très accueillante, agréable et sympathique, tout comme ses enfants, spécialement Dillon qui nous a chaleureusement accueilli. La maison est grande, la chambre est confortable avec une salle de bain privative. Sabine connaît très bien son pays et sait donner les bonnes infos ;). Nous la recommandons fortement sur Airbnb et n hésiterons pas à retourner la voir!
So many things to say about Sabine! We stayed with her just one night but reallly appreciated all the moments we spent with her... even after we left. She is nice, kind and friendly, and so are her children, specially Dillon who warmly welcomed us. The house is big and the room is comfortable with a private bathroom.
Sabine is helpfull and knows her country very well.

Sabine is a perfect host! She just cares for everything! She even provided us with informations about the sourroundings when we already were gone, which was lovely. We felt very compfortable in here house. She has a lovely Family. We would come back any time. We highly recommend this Place! Thanks You Sabine!

We had a great stay at Sabine's home. It is a big family house in a very nice neigberhood. Sabine was very welcoming and helpful and really made us feel at home and part of the family. The amazing Noodhoek beach is just 10 minutes away and shops are also around the corner. The bed is a bit small for two but of good quality. Would definetly reccomend staying here for a few nights to explore the amazing Cape Penninsula.
Easy going and caring host. Sabine welcomed us very warmly and showed us around as well as gave us some tips for Cape Point. The room is perfect and the house is cozy and beautiful.
Sabine was very welcoming and friendly. It's a quaint neighborhood and had lovely surroundings.

We had a great stay at Sabine's home! We felt welcome and the family was very helpful.
The room is cozy and the house is beautiful. We had a private bathroom.
The location is nearby Cape Point, Cape of Good Hope and other nice places.
The room/house is in Sun Valley, nearby Simon's Town. Where you can spot whales in the bay.

I had a great time with Sabine and Dylan. They made us feel home right away. My 6 year old son also had a blast.
Wonderful people, highly recommended!!

We had such a lovely time in Sabine's home. She was quick with our inquiry and phone messages and replied just a few hours after our booking. Very comfortable home and 2 beautiful loving cats which we fell in love with. Cosy room and very nice shower!! Close to everything, noordhoek beach, shops, restaurants. It was such an easy stay..thank you so much Sabine!
I received a friendly welcome from Sabine's son upon arrival and enjoyed a nice plunge in the pool. I loved that I was able to get up early the next morning and have a good stroll along the beach.

Our weekend in Charmaine's apartment was wonderful! It looks just like the photos and it is absolutely beautiful. The apartment is perfectly situated in town, close to almost everything and in walking distance of public transport. Charmaine was a wonderful host, she had lovely suggestions for the weekend and complimentary snacks when we arrived. We will definitely recommend this to anyone and hope to stay there again in the future.
Beautiful apartment with amazing view of table mountain, with great host. Would recommend this place to all.

My wife and I spent almost a month traveling in SA and Charmaine's apartment exceeded our expectation and was truly a gem during our trip. From the minute we stepped into this apartment, we were delighted by every detail that a wonderful accommodation has to offer. You will find everything you can think of that enhances the level of comfort and enjoyment - the highly secured building management, the stylish modem décor, quiet, the table mountain view, the high quality linen, the organic bath set, the high speed Internet, the secure basement parking, the proximity to attractions ...etc. It really gave us the feeling of a home and we would have stayed longer if the availability allowed. It was such a pleasure for us to meet Charmaine at check-out and she is a lovely lady!! I highly recommend this apartment as it combined a top quality accommodation and a best value for money. We look forward to staying there again in our next trip to SA in the future.
The apartment was beautiful and clean!  Charmaine was the perfect hostess.  The pictures don't do the view justice.

During our Cape Town visit, we stayed 3 times at this stunning city centre apartment. With a central location, great views, 24 security, secure underground parking and a beautifully designed interior, this luxury apartment really made our stay special.
Unlike many apartments in Cape Town, this property is privately owned and managed, so you are looked after as a real guest. We enjoyed meeting Charmaine who gave us a very warm welcome. Personal touches included fruit, chocolate and wine left in the apartment. Charmaine also gave us some great insider tips of places to visit in Cape Town.
The apartment is decorated with great taste and creativity with a calming colour palate using natural materials and tones.
The bed is really comfortable, dressed with high quality linens, including a deep mattress topper. The bathroom is spacious, and includes a large bath tub as well as the walk-in shower. Soaps, shampoos and even Charlotte Rhys bath oil was provided; together with plenty of good quality towels.
The kitchen had everything we needed including a washer/dryer and was also equipped with fresh coffee for the percolator, hot chocolate, gourmet teas as well as cereals, fresh milk and water.
We really recommend this property – superb value, wonderful attention to detail and it feels like a luxury home

This was my first trip to Cape Town and I couldn't have found myself staying in a better apartment.  Beautifully turned out, centrally located with great amenities, lovely views and a truly wonderful hostess, who went above and beyond to make me feel welcomed and at home.  Without doubt my best AirBnB experience to date.  I look forward to returning to stay here on my next Cape Town visit.

Es war alles wie beschrieben...wirklich eine Wohnung zum wohlfühlen...mitten in der Stadt...alles wirklich sehr gut...und Charmaine sehr nett. Freu mich schon Charmaine wiederzusehen :) Ich kann die Wohnung wirklich nur weiterempfehlen.

The City Apartment was really good! Although I only was there for two nights, during a business trip, I really enjoyed it and felt at home. Charmaine has a high level of hospitality and really looks after you to ensure you feel comfortable and have everything that you might need. The location is great in Cape Town, the pictures of the apartment really represent what you step into and the view on the table mountain is magnificent. The apartment is clean, very well maintained and done with a good feeling for style. The bed is very comfortable as well as the well equipped bathroom and kitchen. Coffee and different kind of teas are there and the wifi worked well! I will definitely try to come back again! Thanks!
We had an amazing stay! A great location in the city. The apartment was perfect. We would definitely stay here again.

The apartment was very nice, clean and in a perfect location in central Cape Town and we enjoyed our stay immensely.  Checking in to the apartment was easy and Charmaine was responsive to other questions that we had. We appreciated the attention to detail and the 'little extras' provided upon arrival.  The apartment has everything you'll need for a comfortable stay in the city.

Daniel's flat is great. He's a very gracious host, and made every effort to ensure I was comfortable and that my needs were met. While this flat is attached to his house, its is very private, and I never felt intruded on, nor that I was being intrusive.
The location is great for those wanting to stay in a quiet part of Sea Point, but one can easily get to the action quickly from here by car/Uber/taxi, or even by foot. His WiFi was fast as well :) It is secluded from the street, which happens to be a very safe neighborhood.
Thanks again Daniel!
Daniel is a reasonable and accommodative host. It was a pleasure doing business with him.

Daniel fue un anfitrión estupendo: nos respondió rápidamente y estuvo atento a todas nuestras peticiones. En el apartamento, nos recibieron dos botellas de vino de la zona y algo de fruta. Un detalle que apreciamos mucho aunque finalmente no hicimos uso de ello porque ya teníamos. El loft tiene casi todo lo necesario y, aunque no tiene vistas directas al mar, está muy cerca. Genial para una visita a Cape Town en su vertiente más playera y relax.

Daniel is a welcoming and excellent host. We had a lovely stay in the flatlet which has everything one could ask for - Daniel's attention to detail and accommodating nature was evident throughout. It is perfectly situated for walks on the sea point promenade and lions head. We would definitely like to stay there again.

Daniel was a very friendly host. Unfortunately we haven't met in person but he arranged everything for us so that we had a great stay in Cape Town. The appartment was absolutely clean and had everything you need. We werde allowed to park our car in his garage and had our Owen private entrance to the appartment. Er will definetely stay there again if we come back to Cape Town again. It couldn't have been better, thank you very much!

Daniel was most accommodating and very friendly. The room was perfect for our weekend in Cape Town and very pleasant to stay in. The neighbourhood was quiet and felt very safe, a short walk from the beach and ten minute's drive from the city centre. All in all just what we needed!
Daniel has a great flat in a safe and central neighbourhood. I really enjoyed my time there. Daniel is also a excellent host and always willing to assist.

Daniel accommodated us very well during our 4-5 day stay this winter. The room was nice an tidy with everything that we needed and were greeted by the nanny/maid when we arrived who gave us the keys and towels for our stay. This is situated in a very nice location about 10-15 min walk from many nice restaurants and about 5-10 minutes from the beachfront. We would definitely stay here again in the future.

This was seriously an awesome place to stay in. It was in a very nice suburb of CapeTown, safety shouldn't be a problem. It's also super accessible, we had a car but still it was SO CLOSE to the majority of the touristy things you're going to come to CT to do anyways.
We had a few hiccups with our stay, but nothing would prevent us from staying here again. Those small things: the host not being present because he was on holiday, needing to message the nanny every day to let her know what time we were planning to be back in the flat, as well as a broken toilet paper holder and hard to open front door.
Overall, the place was a win. :)

The flat was in a good central location however a bit noisy early morning etc we were underneath the family home. Curtains were mouldy as was the ceiling. Apartment could do with daily clean like other air bnbs in similar set up South Africa. Daniel was a good host via email and the cost was fair for the location.

We had a wonderful stay with Martine, René & their lovely children!
They were very helpful with all our questions & needs. We really enjoyed their company. They also recommended us a beautiful hike with amazing views, thanks for the tip! ;)
The cottage is perfectly located, beautifully decorated (high quality!) & very clean. We enjoyed the comfy bed & double shower, especially after a long day hiking.
We have been traveling a lot & this was our best experience in a bnb! We will certainly come back!

The description is accurate! These wonderful hosts have really made me feel at home in the Western Cape. The cottage is a beautifully designed dwelling. I was by myself but there was ample space for three more.  René took the time to insure that I knew the area well and loaned me his map. The location is perfect. It's situated between Cape Town and  all of the natural wonders of the National Park. I hope to return in the near future. This must be one of the best Airbnb's I had the pleasure to stay (and a great value).

Martine and Rene were brilliant hosts. We arrived to a warm welcome and they made every effort to make sure we got the most out of our stay in capetown.
The house was very well situated in Hout Bay and was only 20 mins drive from the centre of capetown.
The scenery around the house is outstanding! And the fires on the mountains only added to our excitement as we were ensured by Rene that they wouldn't reach us while we slept comfortably in the excellent accomodation
Rene & Martine were fantastic hosts. The accommodation was very comfortable and modern. I will recommend them to anyone needing a break away!
We had a really pleasant stay in Hout Bay. The cottage is fantastic, ideally located and Martine and René are excellent hosts ! Highly recommended

It was a real stunning location to spend two nights at.
Thanx once again for being very helpful towards all our queries about tourist information, roads to travel on, where to have great meals and more.
The welcoming committee was a great surprise - thanx to oliver and sabien for sharing their beautiful smiles.
It is such a joy to have seen their enthusiasm being kids that explore nature, enjoying privileges living against the slopes of your mountain.

We loved knowing that we were extra safe 24/7.
We loved the clean freshness of these facilities.
We loved the very quiet suburb where people treasure and respect good values.
We loved seeing and smelling indigenous fynbos in this luscious area.

Have a good time hosting many people for many years to come.

Na 2 weken in de woestijn te hebben gebivakkeerd was het aankomen bij rene en martine een extra groot feest! Een schoon bed, koude wijn en een prachtige (warme!) douche... Attent en lief, ontzettend fijn verblijf!

Martine en Rene are great people and very enthousiastic air bnb hosts (as are their kids). They were extremely helpful and their house and the converted airbnb cottage are lovely. Thanks for taking such good care of us! Much recommended.
Lovely and beautiful cottage, great area, nice hosts, you cannot go wrong at this place! They even had stuff in place to survive during load shedding;) Highly recommended!
Great location, very helpful hosts.. very clean and neat cottage, safe and quiet, modern and most recommendable.

A very nice place and confortable to visit other place of Cape Town.
Clean and neat.
I love here too

The flat was absolutely beautiful and looked brand new!  We arrived and were greeted by Brigid (who had waited around for us because we were delayed) who gave us a layout of the apartment, the building, and the neighborhood.  Not only that, but they had brochures of local attractions, a city map, coffee, tea, and even chocolate for us!  The flat was clean, quiet, and has an excellent view from the balcony.  Within walking distance from a bus stop, good restaurants, cafes, and craft markets, I will absolutely be staying here again!

I loved it here, I ended up extending my stay twice. It is a cozy and comfortable, I particularly loved the large comfy bed. You can see the top half of Table Mountain out the window. Amenities are all modern, nice bathroom, good pressure and hot water. I assume it was recently renovated, because the place is in perfect condition. They include a lot of thoughtful extras from shower gel and shampoo to laundry detergent to extra blankets to tea and chocolate to a tourist booklet. Good laundry machine, but no dryer, but lots of hangers and clothespins provided. Basic satellite TV and WiFi included.

The building's bottom floors are commercial. This place is on the lowest residential floor, I never heard any noise from below or above. It is a secure and safe building, security person in the lobby, card swipe onto the floor and double deadbolts into the apartment.

The location is great. Just off of Greenmarket Square, the City Siteseeing bus is literally a stone's throw away. All the downtown city attractions and Bo Kaap are within a 10 minute walking distance. The waterfront is about an hour walk or 50 rand taxi.
