Great restaurants (Chef's Warehouse is a top TripAdvisor-rated restaurant that serves great tapas and is just a few blocks away) all around the area and all the food, drink and energy of Long and Kloof street are right there. If you don't want to take a taxi, the Muni goes up and down Long Street, can take it to the base of Table Mountain, or a 5 minute walk away can catch the bus to Sea Point and the beaches beyond.

Being on Long Street, at night there are some beggars who will persist asking for food and/or money (even the car guards have approached me a couple of times), so if you're alone, be aware of that if you're out at night. You do hear the vendors starting to set up in Greenmarket Square in the morning (starting around 5 or 6am), but it's fairly easy to tune the noise out, but late rising sensitive sleepers may want to use ear plugs. The WiFi was really fast (like 2MB ADSL fast) for me the first couple of days, but then got really slow (like average hostel/hotel slow), I'm told by other locals that internet is not great in South Africa.

This apartment is professionally managed by Brigid (and her father Alex when she's away), who keeps on top of things. She's quick to respond to booking requests/changes (I remembered my arrival date into Cape Town wrong and she kindly accepted the change at no charge just a few days prior). Both of them are very friendly and they respond quickly to any issues (I read the WiFi password wrong).

Great studio apartment well located in CBD just off Long Street! Had everything a casual traveller needed with a finger on the pulse of the city. I never met with Lorin but she had made arrangements for me to be checked in and out of the apartment without any hassle. I had no problems during my stay. The apartment was clean, comfortable, secure and modern and had a stunning view of Table Mountain. Noise was a minor issue - the market-people on Greenmarket Square begin setting up stalls early in the morning, and some noise from Long street filters in on weekend nights - although this is hardly unique to this apartment in this area.

I was met at the apartment and shown around. There was Rooibos tea and chocolate on the counter and brochures about things to do in Cape Town on the table as well as a MyCiti which I accidentally took with me when I left - I'm so sorry :-(  The location was perfect - close to everything and with great food and coffee right downstairs. Communication through AirBnB and phone was very easy and quick. Highly recommended!

Didn't manage to meet Lorin or Brigid (the manager) on my first day as it was a late check-in, but they've been really helpful with answering my questions prior to arrival and made sure I could get the keys to the apartment. Though the elevators to get up to the unit were sometimes cranky, I was pleasantly surprised with the studio apartment. It was neat and clean, much needed since I arrived at night. There was a load shedding i.e. power shutdown on my second night from 6pm to midnight. Excellent location which is next to Greenmarket Square, and within walking distance to the Long Street City Sightseeing Bus Tour Office, where it's possible to book yourself on tours. It may get a little noisy at night due to the bars around the area, and also early in the morning as sellers of African curios come to set up shop on the Greenmarket Square, though these didn't bother me much. There's also a good view of the Table Mountain from the balcony. Overall a positive experience, will choose this place again if I return to Cape Town!

Great apartment, excellent location and everything we needed. Had no problems checking in or out (despite being late and then early!) and the host was very responsive to e-mails. The door staff were also super helpful and friendly! Too busy to use the pool but bet it was great!
Nice welcome. Location was great, right beside the very cool Long street.

Wir haben Lorin selbst nicht getroffen. Alex der Vermittler hat uns freundlich empfangen und uns viele Tipps für die Stadt gegeben. Die Kommunikation war jederzeit super. Die Wohnung liegt direkt am greenmarket square, sodass alle wichtigen Punkte der Stadt fußläufig zu erreichen sind. Auch Busverbindungen zum table Mountain sind schnell erreichbar. Die Wohnung selbst hatte alles was man braucht. Alles in allem sehr angenehme Location. Würden jederzeit wieder kommen.

Alex was a great host. He was flexible and gracious. the studio is great for someone who wants to experience Capetown! the location is great, the studio is clean and not noisy considering its proximity to Long Street! Highly recommended!!
I booked Elmari's place for my friend that came to visit me, and the place is a true home away from home. Very cozy inside and spacious. I will definitely recommend.
Amazing hospitality and such a great place to stay, such a nice feeling waking up in such a tranquil environment. Would suggest it to anyone who wants to feel like they are in a home away from home
Perfect location and great value for money. Romantic comfortable cottage with easy access to restaurants and shops.

This is a home away from home; without a doubt. This cosy little cottage is located in such a beautiful setting with breathtaking Table Mountain views.

Lovely coffee shops and cafe's are just a short 2X minute walk up from your home; with easy access to public transportations; and a very unique mall a short 10x minute ride away from Kenilworth; in an area called Claremont - Cavendish Square.

The hostess is very loving and caring and their household help; Joyce is a real ray of Sunshine.

I highly recommend this priceless gem - it met my needs to the T.

Elmari's little gem of a cottage deserved 10 out of 10 and I highly recommend her to you.
The accommodation is just perfect if you are looking for comfort and privacy. The L shaped room is perched on a patio overlooking a beautiful garden and pool. The gentle sound of the fountain and the birdsong are the only sounds in an otherwise very quiet space.
I delighted in the companionship of her two dogs who were extremely polite and waited for me to want to be friends.
Joyce, the housekeeper, kept the laundry flowing and helps to keep this home from home impeccable.
Attention to detail and loving care is evident everywhere, from the delicate paper mobile above the bed to the little iron warthog outside the patio double doors.
This is a very harmonious and well run home and a wonderful example of South African hospitality at its best.
I was sad to leave and will certainly ask to stay again on my next visit to Capetown.
(I must also mention that Jakes restaurant is a stones throw away and they too felt like family by the time I left. Pick and Pay and 7/11 is 3 minutes walk away. )

This cottage was a wonderful place to stay. Elmari and her husband were great hosts. Their house is close to a few great restaurants and shops in Kenilworth, close enough to Cape Town and the Peninsula to start an adventurous day, yet the quiet neighborhood offers a tranquil and relaxing break from the big city. The flat has a comfy bed, tea, coffee, and a great patio with a wonderful garden to enjoy the morning light. I would certainly stay here again.

Our host made us feel most at home as though part of their family. It was a truly home away from home experience for us. We are most happy to recommend this place to any people seeking quality and reasonably priced short term accommodation. The host even allowed use of her housekeeper.
Elmari was a very good host, me n my wife felt at home during the stay at BnB

Elmari was welcoming and made sure that may stay was memorable one. She was willing to assist at any given time and provided me with places to visit. Thanks indeed for your hospitality. And I did notice the fresh flowers

Elmari's place was lovely. A brilliant and easy to find location with bars shops and restaurants just a walk away. It's q great base for exploring Cape Town and really close to the metro line so it's easy to get around. Elmari was a really helpful host and made us feel really welcome. Would definitely recommend this place!!
Everything was great.  Awesome place with a great location. Both Tanya and Nick went above and beyond to make our stay more comfortable. They even greeted us with two bottles of wine.
Great apartment with awesome views.  Located 5 min drive to Kite beach and table view beaches, making it perfect place to stay on a beach holiday.
Nick and Tanya were amazing hosts. They were very welcoming and helpful. The apartment looked exactly as the pictures. The view was stunning.

It's a very comfortable and nice stay in the apartment. The apartment is very clean, tidy, and with beautiful view. Tanya and Nick are very helpful, they shared useful tips for what to do, where to visit, etc, things are well prepared and organized by them. They are very nice, they were in the apartment waiting for us to arrive, and they even give me a ride to the airport. I wish I am staying longer there.

We had a great time. Apartment is great and views are absolutely amazing. Nick and Tanya were wonderful hosts. I would go back and stay here in a heartbeat. The apartment also has a great location, close enough to the city and nice beaches.
Excellent accommodations. Clean and pristine. The view was out of this world. Can't wait to come back.

This was our first experience with Air BnB and Nick and Tanya truly set the bar extremely high! They were beyond accommodating:
-Our flight into Cape Town arrived very late in the evening and they waited up to provide us with a key
-We were welcomed with flowers, champagne and a perfect guide book highlighting top attractions
-We called/texted them at all hours of the day (and night..and early morning!) with questions and were never left feeling like an inconvenience!
-Most importantly, their passion for Cape Town is very apparent and VERY contagious!

The apartment is absolutely beautiful-even more stunning than the pictures suggest. Large floor to ceiling windows give you an impeccable view of Table Mountain, Lion's Head and the ocean!

The location was great-easy access to the airport and downtown Cape Town. We were pleased to find there is a mini Spar supermarket just around the corner as well as a pharmacy.

A perfect stay! We only wish we had more time in Cape Town!!

Really good communication from the time of booking and text messages on our arrival day. Tanya met us and showed us around the apartment which is stunning. The views are amazing and travel into the centre of Cape Town was an easy drive. The apartment was spotlessly clean, a lovely welcome bottle of wine and milk for tea and coffee. Good selection of DVDs to chill out to after a hectic day seeing the sights. Really enjoyed our stay and would definitely consider again if I was in CT.
Thanks to Nick and Tanya

Tanya and Nick were kind enough to meet my friend and I late one night when we flew into Cape Town.  They even ordered a taxi for us to meet us at the airport (we paid them back but it was wonderful not to have to think about that after a long flight).  The apartment is as beautiful as the photos reveal.  The views are stunning and the cross breeze when the windows are opened was wonderful.  I will definitely stay with them again, even if I stay alone.  This is the perfect location if you love scenery and open spaces and relaxation.

My daughter and I had a great stay at Tanya and Nick's apartment. The unit is just as pictured: clean and comfortable with all needed amenities. The view of Table Mountain is spectacular. Nick and Tanya met us at the apartment upon our arrival and were easily accessible to answer any questions we had during our stay. If I ever return to Cape Town, I will surely book another stay with Nick and Tanya.

A beautiful apartment!  Very comfortably furnished, amazing views of Table Bay and Table Mountain. Walking distance to tons of good restaurants, shops, and a grocery store. Lots of room, a well appointed kitchen and a clothes washer made it a great place to stay with small kids.  The perfect place to stay in Cape Town. Alex is a wonderful host.
The house is brilliant, we had a fantastic time. Thank you!

Excellent flat... open and airy, with great views.
Location is central and includes secure parking. And Alex is a friendly host :)

Loved our stay in Alex's apartment. Great area, filled with funky boutiques, restaurants and coffee shops in the heart of the hustle and bustle of the Mother City.

Well-equipped and well fitted apartment - very comfy and a great stay.

Will definitely be back!

Lovely spacious apartment in a peaceful neighbourhood. Alex welcomed us and we immediately felt like we had a home away from home. All the major attractions are within 5 minutes drive all around the apartment. I really enjoyed my stay there.

What an amazing view we had from the apartment. Cape Town is a very Windy City and it can get pretty loud with doors banging all the time (especially at night)
The apartment is perfectly located in walking distance from some amazing cafes and supermarkets. Will probably book it again next time we are in the city!
Todo conforme a lo esperado. El apartamento se ajusta a su descripción. Recomendable.
We spent one great week in Alex' Apartment in Cape Town. You see the photos and everything is exactly the same. We enjoyed Kloof Street and the whole area. Alex was a nice and extremely helpful host.

We much enjoyed staying in Alex's apartment. It was comfortable, clean, well equipped, spacious enough for three people, with great views and plenty of light. Alex was helpful and welcoming. secure off-street parking too, and though the neighbourhood is buzzy, the apartment remained quiet at night. Highly recommended.
The apartment is great, perfect location, amazing views, we would definitely visit again!

Anfangs November waren wir 4 Nächte Mieterinnen von Amma Cottage. Yvan und Lisa haben das Cottage erst kürzlich fertiggebaut und wir waren die zweiten Mieterinnen. Wunderschön gelegen am Rande von Scarborough kann man vom Bett aus das Meer sehen und hören.
Beeindruckt hat uns wie schön und mit viel liebe für Details das Haus gebaut wurde. Die Komposttoilette funktioniert prima und befindet sich mit der Dusche im Untergeschoss.
Ivan hat sich sehr um uns gekümmert und uns sogar mit frischen Lebenmitteln und Eiern ausgeholfen. Fehlende Stühle und ein kleiner Tisch hat er uns sofort gegeben. Auch ist er ein Expert für Wanderungen.
Leider gibt es noch keine Einkaufsmöglichkeit in Scarborough. Das wird sich aber bald ändern...bitte Ivan kontaktieren.
Wir können Ammas Cottage allen empfehlen die nicht den Luxus dafür ästhetische Einfachheit und Natur pur suchen.
Vielen Dank lieber Ivan und Lisa

We spent one week in Lisa and Ivan's cabin, the cute cabin has everything you need. You have a wonderful point of view from the bed, on the wild around and on the beach, you can by the way access the beach very easily from the cabin. We recommend this cabin to nature's lovers. Thanks to Ivan and Lisa for their hospitality it was a great week! Laëtitia & JB

We had an amazing stay in the Amma cottage. The surrounding is beautiful and peaceful and the cottage itself is incredible. Beautiful made by the owners and very cosey yet practical. Lisa and Ivan are very welcoming people. When you're there for a visit stop by at the earth store for a great breakfast. We hope we'll have the pleasure of coming back again.

What a wonderful little cottage for a romantic get-away! We spontaneously decided to have a short honeymoon away from all the family and friends that were still staying at our home after our wedding. Lisa made it extra special for us by arranging flowers and sparkling wine to be ready on our arrival. She also assisted with lending us a few items that we forgot at home... We can highly recommend this small neat little cottage surrounded by natural fynbos fauna overlooking the Cape Point national park! A real gem hidden in the fynbos and a nature lover's dream.

Great place. Small, but comfy and sturdy wooden cabin. On the edge of Cape Point reserve and a couple minutes walk to the beach. The place is as advertised; parking, wifi, privacy, quiet, good shower, etc...
Hardly saw the hosts at all except when they greeted me on arrival. Would definitely look them up again if in the area.

We had a wonderful weekend at the Amma Cottage. It is private, well-equipped, quaint and charming and the walk to the beach is exquisite. Sunday lunch under the indigenous trees was delightful. We didn't want to leave. Ivan was very welcoming and friendly. We can't wait to go back!
Amma Cottage is a delightful little place with a beautiful view.  It is a small village and is very walkable.  Ivan and Lisa are welcoming and everything you need is in the cottage!
This is a beautiful and rustic cottage a short walk to the beach. Small it may be, but we felt very comfortable and safe beneath a passing storm. Ivan was very welcoming and friendly.

Lisa greeted us at the cottage - the map she drew was much more helpful than my GPS! It was a beautiful little place - perfect size, bright natural light, beautiful view of the ocean. Lisa, partners with the local grocery store owner, kindly arranged for us to buy groceries after the shop had closed. The compost toilet was a bit strange but there was no odor and I got used to it quickly. I hope very much to return one day - in fact I want to live in Scarborough for most of my life.

Ein wunderschöner Ort, um seine Zeit zu geniessen. Ich habe die Natur sehr genossen, nebenan gleich der national park und der Strand ist auch nur ein Katzensprung entfernt, nicht zu vergessen sind der farbige Sonnenuntergang und der unvergessliche Sternhimmel. Ivan und Lisa sind zudem sehr gelassene Gastgeber. Good Living.

We were CRAZY about the place, and very sad to leave. My husband and I were so happy to have chosen this magical apartment, what a luck!! We were warmly welcomed by the owner, Lisa and right away she made us feel completely at home. The apartment had everything we needed. It was clean and comfortable, and so quiet up there, almost hard to believe we were just a few minutes from the city centre. The kitchen had everything we needed (including views of Table Mountain) so we ate most meals there. Although we had one dinner out at a charming place down the road which Lisa recommended. A very romantic apartment and can't imagine a place with better views, we could see practically every aspect of Cape Town you would want to see.

We'll definitely be back. We're going to book our relatives in here in Feb, for a week as I know they will be well looked after by Lisa and they will love it there too.

An exceptionally good stay. A Room with a View lives up to it's name with the best possible view of Cape Town's cityscape and Table Bay. The penthouse-like studio atop a quaint old house with a private entrance was very spacious and comfortable offering a totally private room with a lounge area, kitchen and bathroom and a long, very sunny balcony. The studio is elegantly decorated with lovely old furniture and fittings giving a truly unhotel-like home from home feeling. Just a 2 minute walk to a supermarket and bus stop and extremely close to the city centre. The quiet yet delightful host Lisa was a great source of suggestions for restaurants in Cape Town. Will definitely stay there again!

The listing description was accurate and the neighborhood seemed friendly and it had a general family orientated feel about it. The convenience of the Supermarket Spar, Laundromat and a choice of different cuisine restaurants was an added luxury . Lisa is warm, calm and friendly, one instantly felt welcome. She greeted us with her entourage of dogs that sniffed at us enthusiastically. The studio space is comfortable and has everything you need, the panoramic views from all the windows are uniquely spectacular. The shower and toilet is clean and a good size. Careful deliberation has been taken to marry old with new from the brass fittings in the bathroom to the elegant curtain drops that flank the glass panel doors overlooking the city.  The balcony is perfect for that romantic sundowner. The space is private and my husband and I enjoyed an uninterrupted, safe and pleasant wedding anniversary. We are so glad that we made the choice to stay at 'A Room with a View' and will hopefully stay again soon.

It's not often that accommodation turns out to be even more attractive than it appears in the on-line photos, but 'A Room With a View' is truly stunning: beautifully decorated and with views that will knock your socks off.  Lisa was a warm and gracious host, though very low-key and unobtrusive --exactly what we were looking for.  A bottle of wine was waiting for us in the studio apartment. Everything was spotless and neat, the bed and sofa deliciously comfortable. The dogs downstairs had a lot to say when we came and went, but they seemed friendly enough and we never actually made contact with them.  Other than that it was perfectly peaceful throughout our stay.  The apartment is ideally situated amidst the little parks of Devil's Peak.  There are charming coffee shops and a great Spar market just around the corner.  And did I mention the breathtaking views?   Unforgettable. We'll be back soon.

The flat is really comfortable and the view is truly magnificent. Lisa was easy to deal with, un-intrusive, helpful and welcoming. It was nice to have the dogs around (although I told Lisa I liked dogs, I think she would have kept them out of the entrance way if I hadn't!). I would highly recommend this studio.

Room With a View is incredible. The sweeping vistas of Cape Town from right under Table Mountain are simply stunning, and the nearby area of Devil's Peak Estate has all modern conveniences (supermarket, cafes, etc) a short walk away. It's a cool part of town that is a nice escape from the hustle-bustle of Camps and the traffic of downtown. It's great value for money and Lisa was on top of everything we required (she even did a load of washing for us).

My wife and I also appreciated the decor - Lisa has a good eye for design and the furnishings had a warm, rustic tone.

We highly recommend Room With a View to any couples or singles looking for cosy & welcoming retreat after a hearty day of exploring the city. It's also not a bad view to wake up to!

This was our second stay at 'A Room With a View'.  Once again, Lisa was there to greet us warmly. The apartment was in perfect condition and as spectacular as ever. There was fresh fruit and basics for cooking, all much appreciated. This time, we were subjected to the infamous 'Cape Doctor' -- unrelenting, high-velocity southeasterly winds -- throughout our five night stay.  It took some getting used to, but the apartment endured the buffeting remarkably well. On the last night, however, a huge fire below Devil's Peak crept perilously close and, uncertain about the potential danger as firefighters and helicopters moved in, we decided to decamp to a hotel for the night.  The apartment is very convenient to food shopping at the excellent Spar, to excellent restaurants and to the MyCiti Bus, which goes straight downtown every half hour.  We'll certainly come back again.

Ich komme seit vielen Jahren im Winter nach Kapstadt, habe bisher ungefähr ein dutzend verschiedene Wohnungen/ Apartments gebucht: Das Loft von Lisa war bisher das schönste.
Für mich eine perfekte Lage, ruhig und mit einem fantastischen Blick über den City Bowl von Kapstadt.
Lisa ist eine charmante und relaxte Gastgeberin die immer ein offenes Ohr bei Fragen hat.
Türen und Fenster können (zumindest solange der South-Eastern nicht weht) Tag und Nacht geöffnet bleiben da Lisa vier Hunde hat die das Haus sehr gut bewachen.
Wunderbare Terrasse mit Grill und auch bei Wind ohne Einschränkungen nutzbar.

Ich habe die Wohnung für den Winter 2016/ 2017 gerne wieder gebucht und freue mich jetzt schon. Großes Dankeschön an Lisa:)

We had a wonderful stay at A Room With A View. Our main 'like' about the accommodation was basically everything! the views, the location, the facilities, & the studio decor looked great. We'd hired a car as needed later in our trip but not essential as a well stocked Spar shop, bus stop less than 5mins walk away & some great local restaurants. There are bbq facilities to use safely on the balcony which we would definitely recommend 1night. Uber is in Cape Town & the open top bus tours can take you around the Peninsula.  Lisa was the perfect host, available if you needed but never intrusive, & her gorgeous dogs were loved. Thanks Lisa for great stay will definitely stay again.

Wonderful! Lisa was not only an amazing host, her home with a view was spectacular! The room was open, beautifully decorated, and cozy. Not to mention the view was just perfect. Also the neighborhood is cute and safe. We came to Cape Town for holiday and thanks to Lisa and her accommodations, we will for sure be coming back asap! Highly recommend!

We had a great stay at this beautiful apartment. Marius welcomed us warmly. He went out of his way to make sure we had the best experience in his appartment. We could always call him for questions and inquirmies. The location was perfect and the apartment was really beautiful and clean. We really enjoyed our stay and we would defenitly come back if we were in Cape Town.

Ruim voordat wij naar Kaapstad kwamen, kreeg ik regelmatig een berichtje van Marius met tips en vragen of hij ons ergens mee kon helpen. Hij informeerde of we een auto wilden huren, zodat hij een beschermde parkeerplaats vrij kon houden.
Het appartement ligt in de wijk Bo-Kaap, een prachtige wijk met mooie gekleurde huisjes. Als we de straat uitliepen waren we zo in het centrum van Kaapstad. Het ligt heel centraal. De straat loopt wel heel stijl omhoog. We hebben ons niet onveilig gevoeld in de buurt. In Bo-Kaap wonen veel moslims en dat betekent dat er veel moskeeën zijn, waaronder een naast het appartement. Daarover had Marius ons ook geïnformeerd. Alleen de oproep om 4 u 's nachts is storend, maar het duurt maar 2 minuten. Het appartement is ruim; heeft 2 slaapkamers en is voorzien van ruim voldoende en prima keukenvoorraad. Fijn dat er ook een wasmachine is. Als je wat mist, zorgt Marius direct dat dat wordt aangeschaft. Heel gastvrij. We hebben een ontzettend fijn verblijf gehad.

Marius was a terrific host. We stayed in the apartment for an entire month, Marius was very attentive to our needs and helpful in regards to suggestions for places to visit during our stay. Very sad to leave, was a great experience.
We had a lovely time in Marius's central appartment in Bo-Kaap. Marius was a perfect host, helping with advice and suggestions on where to go and what to see. We recommend staying in this appartment!

Had an amazing week staying in this beautiful apartment in the middle of the city. The balcony has a beautiful view, the atmosphere in the apartment is so nice and you feel very comfortable from the first second. Marius was so helpful and even came to help us when we had a problem with one of the doors late in the evening. Great service! Would definitely recommend this place to anyone considering coming to Cape Town. It is close to several restaurants and shops, and is a perfect place to stay if you want to stay in the city but still want to stay in a quiet and cozy area.

This place was fantastic! While beautifully decorated, it was also functional and child friendly. The location was perfect for exploring Cape Town with parking but also walking distance to a lot. The hosts were amazing. They welcomed us with a bottle of wine and knowing that we would arrive without food, they stocked the kitchen with yogurt and museli. They also went out of their way to show us the neighborhood. The apartment was well stocked; everything we needed was there. Next time we go to Cape Town, we will definitely stay here again.

Five of us stayed at Marius' flat in Bo Kaap and found it both very comfortable and very well located. Marius himself was a great host, he gave us a lot of useful tips about what to do in town and in the neighbourhood. Would definitely recommend it!

Marius is a great host. He even picked us up from the airport and given us a short guided tour of the surroundings! He's very friendly and helpful. The apartment is very nice, well furnished, and decorated. The location is just perfect and the view of the Tableau Mountain is simply stunning!

Many thanks to Marius for his very warm welcome, which helped in making out stay in Cape Town an unforgettable experience.

The apartment is very cosy and comfortable. Above all, it is extremely well located. It's in the heart of multicultural and vibrant Bo Kaap, and a few minutes away on foot from the nice shops, bars and restaurants in the busy city centre. It's also very conveniently placed to get in and out of the city for day trips to the beaches and vineyard areas.

For parents, it's good to know that there is a playground next to the house, on the very same street.

Marius and Jolanda were amazing hosts. They came to pick us up at the airport, recommended best places to eat and even brought a heater when temperature got colder. The apartment was cozy and comfortable, perfectly located if you are looking for a local feeling. We would definitely recommend this place for a stay in Cape Town!

The Penthouse was wonderful.  Nice view and nice wirlpool on the top. 10 min by car to the City Center. We really enjoyed our stay.  Gabriel was very helpful. When we have contact him,  he answered immediately.  We can really recommend this Penthouse.

We stayed 9 days in Gabriel's lovely, very secure apartment.
Even before booking it and during our stay he answered our queries very promptly.
The apartment has amazing 360 degree views of Table Mountain, Lions Head and the Harbour.
The kitchen is modern and clean with all the necessaries to make a longer stay comfortable.
Big flat screen tv in the lounge with satellite channels but we had issues getting all the channels.
The bedroom was cosy, with air conditioning but very bright in the mornings. Recommend taking an eye mask with you if light rooms bother you.
The bedroom leads onto the open planned bathroom with a nice huge shower.
The shower room needs some TLC.
There is a separate guest loo too with a washing machine that is perfect for longer stays.
The top level is the best bit.
Lovely sitting there every evening with a drink just watching the view. Small splash pool in the corner is perfect to cool yourself down after a busy sightseeing day.
Unfortunately we could not use the pool as there was few issues with it which Gabrielle was actively trying to sort out.
The apartment has its own garage and a separate parking space that was really handy.
Overall, I would recommend staying here.
Gabriel and the apartment is new to the rental scene and therefore I am sure he will go from strength to strength.
Really stunning place! Views forever. Rooftop area simply amazing! Gabriel was super responsive and helpful - thanks a lot!

We LOVED this place!! It's neat, beautiful and perfect! It even has a well filled fridge :) (of course, you pay for what you use) We didn't meet Gabriel, but all contact with him was very easy, on every message he responded promptly. We had an internet issue (not working) which he solved and he kept us updated about it. He was very helpful in finding a solution for our luggage after check out, he even brought it to his own house where we could collect it at the end of the day! The rooftop terrace is amazing and the pool makes it even better.
One thing, the ad says 'sleeps 3', but the apartment has three floors, all open to each other (beautifully done!) and has only 1 bedroom with a double bed in it. They can only accommodate 3 people if you let them know in advance so they can get an inflatable mattress, which will be in the same space as the double bed.
Still, no doubt, stay here!

What a great place to stay! The apartment was everything we had hoped it would be & the views are spectacular. Gabriel was an excellent host responding to all our needs with the greatest efficiency. Thank you!
Fantastic home with all the comforts! Stunning views and spa on roof!

Logement bien situé, vue magnifique sur la ville du Cap, le logement est très fonctionnelle et sécurisé !!

J'enlève cependant une étoile car pas de table/chaises extérieur malgré les 2 superbe terrasses (donc on ne peut pas en profiter), il est dommage d'avoir un barbecue et de devoir descendre les deux étages pour manger à l'intérieur.
Attention également l'appartement est sur exposé au soleil, ce qui est formidable pour la vue mais beaucoup moins le matin car les stores ne sont pas occultant !!

La piscine n'est pas un critère de sélection pour cette location, en effet cette dernière (comme quasiment partout dans le pays) est très froide et vite sale.

Reste que l'appartement est très agréable, le secteur très calme. La voiture est en sécurité à l'intérieur de la résidence. Je recommande donc cette location pour les couples qui souhaite passer quelques jours au Cap

A fabulous and unique find - set on three levels with an amazing view out over the city and to the sea. Enjoyed sundowners from the pool on the roof and then the comfortable bed afterwards! Small but more than enough for two people. Thanks for the great hospitality Gabriel.
We loved our stay in the appartment. Incredible views, clean, functional, ideal for a couple. We definitely recommend the place!

Gabriel is an excellent host who made the experience all the more memorable. The panoramic views that this apartment has is unparalleled. It's very well located nestled in a suburb just off the city centre.  The apartment is modern and clean. A worthwhile experience staying there!

Gareth was a great host and welcomed us with a generous welcome pack of goodies. There was great attention to detail, the house was absolutely spectacular. Amazing views, from every room, lovely balconies for catching a few rays as well as a covered area with sofas to relax on. Close to Kalk Bay and Simon's Town, with lots of nice restaurants and cafes and lovely vibes. Don't miss Noordhoek beach which is beautiful. I can't recommend Surfwstch highly enough, we didn't want to leave!
Would certainly return again.

Out stay at Surfwatch was incredible. The property is beautifully decorated and very peaceful. The views are exquisite and we miss them already! Gareth was very accommodating and responded quickly to all questions prior to our arrival and during our stay. A well-stocked arrangement of essential food items had been kindly left for us which was very thoughtful. We miss Surfwatch and would happily return and recommend to others. We have already spread the word amongst friends and family.

Just in one word : WONDERFUL ! Gareth is a charming host , welcoming and very caring for us. The house is really very nice, very well decorated, the rooms spacious and the view...amazing !
It was a a pleasure to stay at Surfwatch.

Surfwatch - a piece of paradise. Arrival in Fish Hoek could not have been more welcoming. Garreth truly made us feel right at home from the first moment giving us a tour around the house and emphasising to enjoy and relax during our stay.
The appartment has everything one needs, and more. Perfect location, beautifully furnished and decorated and practical with several bedrooms and bathrooms. The view to the ocean is beautiful and the terrace area with a wind-covered area and a grill is absolutely wonderful.
Garreth (+family) is a great host providing us with lots of information and tips. His generosity and relaxed approach contributed majorly on our holiday mode since we did enjoy Surfwatch to the fullest!

Great locatiob with a stunning view on the Fish Hoeck beach and as well on Nord Hoeck. We had a great time and Gareth, our host, welcomed us very nicely and had prepared a lot of good advice to make sure our stay will be perfect.
To be able to benefit from the view and to be able to walk to the beach is fantastic.

The house is amazing - view exactly as the pictures, very well furnished and decorated. It has all you need. I already miss waking up to the sun and the ocean and having breakfast in the beautiful terrace. Plenty to do nearby. Do not miss Boulders beach, Nordhoek and of course, Cape Town (an easy 40 minutes drive away). If you travel with a child, a blackout blind is essential (the house has so much light and sun) and maybe pack a warm pyjama for children as the nights can be chilly because of the wind. Gareth and his wife were always available and very, very nice and the cleaner Cristina is great! Loved it!

Surfwatch is even better than I could have imagined. Every room is beautiful and has incredible views of the beautiful beach. Gareth was exceptionally welcoming and helpful in every sense. It is the perfect place for a stay in Cape Town.

Surfwatch is a paradise! The view is fantastic, the apartment very well equipped and decorated, and the two floors with the beautiful dining room, the veranda and three bedrooms with bathrooms gives everybody enough liberty.
The atmosphere is warm and lovely and Gareth a very good and helpful host. Everything for the first evening was well prepared. Highly recommendable - we miss it just now and will come back next year.

Enjoyable and perfect stay !
great host, lovely house, nice view and a beautiful golf course nearby for amateurs.

We stayed for two nights with Rob and Hazel. It has been a very good stay, which exceeded all of our expectations.
The house is spectacular with an amazing view on False Bay. It's located closely to Simon's Town and Kalk Bay.
Rob and Hazel are absolutely fantastic and have done everything to help us having a great time.
If we will ever come back to South Africa - sure we will - we'll definitely stay with Rob and Hazel again.
Excellent! Loved it.. Beautiful views.
Beautiful house and very friendly hosts. We stayed for one night and would have loved to stay longer. Warmest recommendations to fellow Airbnb renters.

Rob's place is like heaven. We really enjoyed with our stay. The location is perfect for to discover the other part of Cape Town. The room was very clean and stylish. Rob and Hazel were very helpful and nice. Highly recomended!
Thank you Rob and Hazel for sharing your beautiful home with us! Such a peaceful stay - exactly what we needed! We shall be back x

Rob and Hazel were wonderful hosts.  We had use of the kitchen and the room was  perfect.  You can't get a much better view of the bay than from the deck...LOVED it!!  When the wind kicked up it was nice to be able to sit in one of the living areas and look out the huge picture window.  I really wish we had been able to stay more than one night to enjoy the relaxation of just watching the ocean from above.

Rob & Hazel were very friendly and welcoming. Had a lovely time with and awesome view. Eventhough it was a bit difficult with our toddler due to the house having 3 levels but they were very accommodating with her!

The house is incredibly lovely ! The view is spectacular. The pictures illustrate perfectly its beauty and its charming atmosphere . The hosts were more than nice and gave us some tips to have a great time in the area . Highly recommended ! It's a chance to stay in this house :)

very friendly and helpful hosts
The room was really great , with a wonderful view .
simply super
Rob and Hazel are super accommodating and very nice people.

Heino and Christo were the best hosts you could hope for. We were their first air bnb guests but you certainly couldn't tell. They took so much care in making us feel comfortable, answered any questions quickly and their home is absolutely stunning. It is very spacious and well stocked with lovely outdoor space too. As you can see from the photos, they have impeccable taste! We had a fantastic stay in Cape Town thanks to Heino and Christo and can't wait to come back.

Nous avons passé 4 nuits dans cette maison idéalement située (à 2 pas de la plage, quelques minutes de Camps Bay et du centre ville) au charme dingue (conforme aux photos / décoration soignée et kitsch) et au confort irréprochable (le lit est fait tous les matins et la literie est digne d'un hôtel 4 étoiles). Le jacuzzi est la cerise sur le gâteau. Quant à Heino et Christo : ils sont adorables. Un grand merci pour leur accueil chaleureux.
Justine et Romain

Heino&Christo's place inn Seapoint is just perfect! Whether you want beachlife, nightlife, to climb Lions Head before sunrise, or just stay in and enjoy the flamboyantly decorated house with its ample rooms, roof top terrace and sunset views. We were warmly welcomed by Christo who lives just next door, so response on any questions was immediate. Our kids loved Tarzan and Jane (C&H's sweet dogs) , the Jacuzzi and the garden.
The area is nice and quiet with no obvious safety issues. Would come back anytime :-)

Heino and Christo place is just perfect if you are looking for a best vacation in your life. Situated in Sea Front close to restaurants and fantastic promenade. Uber will take you to CBD for just ~30.
Christo was a fantastic host. Always in time and always helpfull. House was just a superb and always cleen. Lovely cleaning lady they got there.
We never wanted to leave this place. Many of best wishes to you guys and hope to see you next year;)

This place is a gem. Heino and Christo are the best hosts one could want. Warm, welcoming, and great people to be around. The accommodation is just as nice-  fantastically decorated, nice outdoor space and perfectly equipped for a fantastic stay. Would book over and over again.

We thank Heino and Christo for there hospitality which started with a warm welcome and good introduction into the very stylish and unusual Appartement and his facilities. It's very well equipped with everything you need in a high standard. Our hosts did surprise us with provided water, wine and a bowl of fruits. They been very helpful with restaurants recommendations and guidance about Cape Town and his opportunities to enjoy our self. The Appartement is very well located in Sea Point and all major spots around town are easy to access. We've been thrilled about the cosy and very nice Appartement, appreciated the friendly and open  attitude of our hosts and their two lovely dogs. When ever we come back to spend a few days in CPT again, we would choose the Villa Penzance to stay. Thanks again for the lovely time we really enjoyed it.

Amazing apartment with good location. Great decoration and sense of style. Heino and Christo were fantastic hosts, very helpful and nice. We were 2 couples and this was absolutely the best value for money you can get from Cape Town!

Staying with Heine & Christo was absolutely great! They offer a spacious well located house (its actually not an apartment but a house) with very unique furniture. The bedrooms are nice and very comfortable and both bathrooms are beautiful. The living room and kitchen is well equipped and spacious.
There is a nice terrace where we had breakfast in the sun everyday and an awesome rooftop with a jacuzzi...

The hosts are very helpful and available whenever needed and also a lot of fun to have drinks with :)
The three of us very much enjoyed our stay and absolutely loved their house...

We spent 2 weeks in Villa Pencence. We felt very welcome and felt like home immediately. Heino and Christo were the perfect hosts and did everything to make our stay comfortable.
The apartment is as the pictures promises - very nicely decorated, spacious and well equipped. The outside space is great, too - we especially appreciated the gas grill and the sun loungers on the roof terrace. Safe residential area and all cape town attractions and go to areas easy to reach. Can definitely recommend the place and would come back! Martin & Steven

Our hosts Heino and Christo made us feel incredibly welcome.  Together with their dogs Tarzan and Jane they make the perfect hosts.  We loved the personal touches of wine and fruit on arrival!  It made it so easy to settle in without having to rush off to the shops immediately.  The decor is exactly as per their air bnb page and is really stunning.  The beds were extremely comfortable and we felt very safe. The apartment is very well thought out in terms of use of space.  We unfortunately never got around to trying out the Jacuzzi but the views from the terrace are just lovely.  The uber option in Cape Town made it super easy to get around. All in all this was a fantastic air bnb experience and I would definitely recommend Heino and Christo's apartment to anyone travelling to Cape Town

Amazing space, lovely apartment, I requested a few changes to bedding arrangements, Sally was very accomodating, her manager Peter was amazing and made me and my friend feel extremely welcome. I later found out that I was sally 2nd guest, so all things considered, for 2nd guest, they got it right. Neighbourhood was stunning with hout bay and surrounding area's all very close. I would stay again without a moments thought!!!!m highly recommended!!!!!

Sally and her dearest family were wonderfully warm and welcoming. They more than radiate that famous Capetonian charm and hospitality: they were always on hand to assist at whatever time. Breakfast was a delight, our bed fantastically comfy and our room had magnificent stretching views. Their resident dogs Molly and Suzie also gave us hours of endless fun. Thank you Sally, we will be back if you will have us!

If you are looking to stay a little bit outside of the busy city and want to capitalize on some of the most gorgeous views of the valley end of help pay, this is the place for you.  Sally (the owner) and Peter (the house manager) were the perfect hosts.  You are in a private gated community up on the side of a hill with a national Park in the background. The views of the patio where the pool is in the valley or just breathtaking. All of the doors from the room open clean to the wall so you can open up the entire space to the outside and you truly feel the inside/ outside living.  It is a very relaxing and absolutely stunning view. Parking is easy and the drive to camps bay or Cape town is also easy and brings you through some of the most picturesque parts of town. Peter is around each day and available for anything you might need from refreshing coffee and drinks in the room to doing laundry or to showing you how to get through their back gates into the park to climb the mountain that is literally 100 feet away from you.  The space is large and open concept with a huge table, comfortable bed, great entertaining space. We will definitely be back and we just can't say enough about how special of a location this is.  The only thing I would say is don't let the steep angle of the driveway to scare you, I promise you that even tiny little cars with almost 0 hp can make it up the gradient.
Sally was helping in accommodating our special needs. Peter, who lives on the property, is very helpful. It has an amazing view and the flat has pretty much anything you need.

Sally's exquisite eye for detail and art makes her home an outstanding choice to rent with AirBnB.  The cleanliness, the laundry, the decor, and the way she made us feel like family sold me! She even had Peter wash AND IRON my clothes before departing.  Her family is so sweet, and so are the pets.  If you have any questions about Sally please contact me; yasminechapman2008@gmail.com and I'll give you all the details.

Sally is a wonderful host with a hugely warm welcome. Sally's place is beautiful and so much more than we expected. We were blown away by the personal touches and helpful information available to explore the Cape Town area. Nothing was too much trouble, and there was always someone around if we had any questions. This gorgeous place is very spacious and so well though through, everything was perfect. Sally and her family really made our stay so special.
Thank you!
Claire and James x
One of the best value for money Air BNB we have stayed at. Spectacular view , amazing hosts ....... what more can I say but thank you Sally, Dale, Peter, Lily and Souz

Absolutely beautiful place, outside and inside! Comfy, clean and has everything you need. We even stayed extra night :) Sally was wonderful host and very informative. Don't skip breakfast-it's perfect (also you eat while looking at the amazing view). Thank you Sally.

Sally's place has a wonderful view, and lots of space. Sally is a really wonderful host, she made it special for us, giving us nice traveling tips and even offering herself to pick us at a picnic place, so that I could drink some of the local wine!
It is a good idea to ask Sally for breakfast, she prepares a variety of fruits and great cheese!
We would definetly return to her place!

Thank you for the hospitality, the warm welcome and friendly treatment from the hosts. The apartment is clean, spacious and has an amazing view. With the host’s knowledge of Cape Town you don’t have to worry about any activities nor directions (Mr Dale “Host” is a navigator on his own). The response from the hosts every time you you request assistance, is faster than the blink of an eye. Lastly the back yard scenery was the highlight of my stay in Cape Town.

Yvonne was very friendly and welcoming when checking in and all communication up to check in was great. The apartment was very clean and all necessities were provided. The apartment is in a fantastic location with shops and restaurants within walking distance. A comfortable bed and more than enough room for two people to stay there. I highly recommend Yvonne and her apartment to anyone looking for a nice clean and affordable place to stay in a fantastic location.

Yvonne's place is great we did a last minute booking and she responded swiftly which was great.  Clean, Great Location with the beach on your doorstep and wonderful fluffy white towels. We will be back.

Yvonne was delightful and her home was SO well located! The flat is exactly as pictured and right across the street from the Sea Point pools which made my daughter super happy. I was also able to walk to several restaurants and to a really great fitness center.

Yvonne was a great host, very responsive and friendly. I would absolutely recommend this property and I would definitely stay here again.

Yvonne is a perfect host with attention to detail. Yvonne sets up her apartment as if you are a treasured family member or friend.
I would highly recommend the experience
Yvonne welcomed us downstairs for us to check in and was helpful from booking to checkout. Great hostess! The apartment was great and so was our stay there!

Yvonne is the perfect host. Not only she is very accommodating with check in/check out hours, but she also makes sure you have a pleasant stay by taking care of small details, such as leaving toiletries, water bottles and even sweet treats for you. The apartment is lovely, just as in the pictures, and the neighborhood is great. Would definitely recommend it!

We were very happy with the place. It was very clean & had everything we needed. Yvonne was a gracious host. Very helpful about the neighborhood. We arrived with a load of dirty clothes & she allowed us to use her washer!
The condo is across from the ocean & in a wonderful neighborhood with lots of interesting restaurants. We definitely recommend this place & would stay there again!
Thank you, Yvonne!

A very pleasant apartment to stay in everything was well stocked, neat and tidy, the host Yvonne was very welcoming and ensured I knew where everything was in case I needed to use any of it. The apartment is situated very close to the sea point promenade and various restaurants and coffee shops which I found very convenient. All in all I enjoyed my stay and will recommend this to anyone looking to stay in the Seapoint area.

The host was very friendly and helpful.
We felt at home and everything was very clean and tidy. Location was perfect, close to restaurants too.
Accommodation is warm and cosy and the host left some healthy snacks.
Great location and a nice and modern apartment. Yvonne is a great host, super friendly and always available for questions or advice.

Betina made us feel very welcome, and her flat is absolutely stunning. The view and the balcony are amazing!! You're far away enough from the city that you don't feel the hustle and bustle but close enough to that getting around is very convenient. You're super close to the Kirstenbosch garedens! The balcony was fabulous!

All I can say is perfect. Fantastic location, apartment and host. The apartment has everything one needs and more. Very picturesque and located in a very quaint suburb within walking distance of shops. Betina was very responsive to all all our queries. Thank you so much for a great and memorable stay. We'll definitely visit again.
The flat is really beautiful and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay.  We loved the beautiful balcony, inviting fireplace and tasteful decor.  We would highly recommend it xx

Betina was extremely welcoming. The space is beautiful with a direct view of table mountain. The flat is centrally located to many different areas in Captetown, uber is quick to arrive for pickups and you can get anywhere in a short amount of time and cost. There were many good food options a short walk away.

The listing was accurate and the apartment was beautiful, worthy of hotel status. The area was also fantastic, a lovely suburb with lots of shops and restaurants nearby.

Our host was away at the time of our booking so, unfortunately we did not meet her.

From start to finish, Betina was helpful and efficient. The loft is beautifully furnished and extremely comfortable with lovely mountain views and very easily accessible to all hotspots of Cape Town. A fantastic stay to be recommended on to all! Thank you!
The place was superb and such a great setting you just had to feel relaxed. Everything was just great. Will stay there again for sure.

Such a pity we could only stay for one night! The studio apartment is wonderful with an amazing view of the mountain looming overhead. We took a long walk through Fernwood to Kirstenbosch on Sunday, stopping for oversized icecream cones at The Creamery on the way back. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and Betina was incredibly accommodating (even letting us store our bags at the house until our flight in the late afternoon). We will definitely be back!

Thanks again Betina!

Rgds

Bon & Matt

Our host made us feel very welcome indeed, especially being spoiled with a vase of fresh cut flowers. The room was absolutely stunning, our favourite was the private terrace looking out onto the mountain. The flat is exceptionally tactfully furnished and the xl double bed very comfortable. AND the fireplace was the cherry on top! Thoroughly enjoyed ourselves. Will definitely visit again!

We didn't get to meet Betina for various reasons, but she made sure that we were met on arrival and there was someone there as we left as well. We loved the apartment, spotlessly clean, extremely comfortable bed and altogether a very pleasant stay indeed. We were only there for one night for a doctor's visit but would very happily stay there again.

Betina very kindly left yogurt, fruit, and milk in the apartment for us, as well as tea and coffee, it was much appreciated.

Chris was a very nice host, always available for us and very thanksfull. My friend Chloe and I were welcoming with some beers in the fridge ;) And he has helped us a lot for booking the Robben Island tour and even droped us to the Waterfront.
Our pretty lodge was in his garden witch was as a "little Eden Garden "... but we should still aware being in Cap Town.
Whatever, we have really enjoyed our journey by Chris. We recommend this peacefully place for a couple of days

Chris and Anton were perfect hosts and the small stable was a lovely home for me for 9 days while exploring Cape Town and researching at UCT. The house is located within walking distance of all the restaurants, shops, and bars in Obs, which is a great town and community. It is also a quick ride away from all the other neighborhoods, sites, and activities. As a solo traveler, Chris and Anton made me feel welcome and cared for. They also provided great recommendations for art, cultural events, and restaurants that I otherwise would not have found on my own. I highly recommend.

Chris is a warm, welcoming host. Die Klein Stal is compact but very comfortable, with an exquisite bathroom overlooking the garden. The garden makes this accommodation exceptional - it is tranquil, secluded and a wonderful place to rest after a busy day.
Wonderful place and hosts. Its nicely located in a residental area, not too far from downtown and not too far from table mountain. I had a short and refreshing stay after a long fly.

I stayed at Chris' just for a night but I enjoyed it very much. Room was clean and very comfortable, hidden in beautiful garden with small swimming pool. Masters of the house were very nice and helpfull. I can sincerely recommend to anyone who wants to visit Cape Town and see all its parts.
Die Klein Stal is a wonderful little cottage garden cottage, perfect for a sleep-and-go arrangement. 15 minute Uber ride into the City, ideal for exploring Cape Town.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Chris and his partner were excellent hosts. The setting is very peaceful and quiet- perfect for a relaxed getaway!!
Thank you!
Chris was a lovely host and this is truly a hidden gem of Cape Town. A verdant, beautiful garden in the city. Highly recommended!!

Such a lovely place to stay. Chris and his partner are really hospitable and had loads of good recommendations for us to do in Cape Town. Really nothing to complain about. At arrival, the fridge was equipped with wine and juices. Very clean bathroom, spacious shower and a comfortable bed. I highly recommend this place to stay!
Chris communicated very well. He even gave us free beer, wine and fruit. Beautiful garden in the middle of Observatory. Very good value for money. Thanks Chris.

A lovely cottage perched on the top of the slope with direct access to the mountain yet still the only thing you can hear at night is the ocean.
Peaceful and welcoming host. Thanks Justin.

We had a great time! Nice House, friendly neighbours, perfect view and the location was good to get everywere soon.
Justin was helpful und nice! Thanks for all

Justin was very welcoming and helpful if we needed anything. The area was beautiful and the house exactly as described, a lovely rustic getaway. Listing was accurate. Really enjoyed the gorgeous views.

Wonderful little cottage, small and a bit rustic but charming... and just what we were looking for. Lovely sunset views surroundings. Cottage had everything we needed and everything worked. Bath was tiny for me (6ft 4) but never ran out of hot water. Justin was very accommodating - getting a key to us-  and we experienced no problems other than getting out luggage and shopping bags up the steep rocky path (not actually a driveway) to the house. If you go out or return at night you will need a torch as the path needs a light. There or no real grocery/food  shops nearby and even Simonstown and Kommetjie are inadequate, so pick up your provisions in Sun Valley or Fishhoek. Thank you Justin we had a wonderful time.

Thanks to Justin and his lovely family for letting us stay in their cottage! We truly had a wonderful stay. We felt very safe in the neighbourhood and enjoyed the stroll down to the beach and climbing the mountain behind the cottage. This is the perfect setting for a short getaway if you live in the Cape Metropole, since you feel like you are a million miles away from everything, yet it is a relatively short drive. We found the house, although being quite rustic, to be very charming and more than sufficient for what we needed. Looking forward to visiting this gem again very soon!

Scarborough is a little village (conservation village) with a beach and a wonderful view of the ocean. It is about 40 minutes south of Cape Town and 25 minutes from Cape Point. There are a few places to eat and a small village hub with supplies, but there is a big supermarket in Sunnydale 15 minutes away. An excellent place to visit many places on the Cape. The host gives very detailed information how to get there as well as many tips for walking and visiting.

It was an amazing stay. The cabin is secluded and out of the way and has great views of the surroundings. Everything was clean and taken care of well. I would like to go there more often if I could. Loved the little restaurant and cafe in the town. The town is very centrally located to everything in the area. Thanks for a lovely stay.

Great location - close to the beach and great local shops.  Accomodation was basic but charming.  Justin was very helpful with tips for things to do.  Really enjoyed picking and cooking mussels from the beach.

The cottage was set right up at the very top of the village, outside my backdoor was a gorgeous mountain with wild but safe hikes. I was lucky to have a forest of blooming aloes to welcome me outback too. The views were sublime; the sea, the sunsets, the vegetation and the birdlife were all encompassing. I had the perfect break. Affordable and delightful, I'll be back as soon as I can.

Awesome little rustic place. Found it perfect for a weekend away from the city. It's set against the mountain, so you walk out the back onto mountain paths and is also a short stroll down to the town and beach.

The place is really simple, a narrow path up to the cottage, outside area under the tree out bag with a slightly old table and a weber, inside has a nice kitchen with all the equipment we needed, nice lounge area. The bedrooms were as described and the porch looking out is great.

Justin was also really easy to communicate with and made sure that we had all the info we needed to enjoy the cottage and Scarborough.

We had an absolutely amazing stay with James and Liesel. The area is very beautiful and their space too. We felt so spoiled for choice and they provided everything we needed and even more. James was great in communicating with us and everyone was friendly, even the dog. The room was big and spacious and our only complaint is that we wish we could have stayed longer...
What a great find, and perfect location in Constantia! The room was beautiful and comfortable and the hosts were very welcoming and gracious. We only wish we could have stayed longer!

The place was lovely. It is beautifully decorated with an extremely comfortable bed and a lovely big bath. We were provided with an array of breakfast items, tea, coffee, milk, fruit, cereals and rusks for the morning.  Such a lovely thought and so nicely presented, we really appreciated this! I can't recommend this place more highly we will definitely be back.

James and Liesel are very nice and communicative Hosts. I recomande a stay with them. The Location, the room is nice, clean and generous. A save seperate entrance. I fell like home in that house. It would be nice to be back again! Thank you very much - and notice: House Nr 2A!!
The room was very tidy and luxurious; set in a fantastic, quiet and leafy suburb. Hosts were friendly and very welcoming. A great time was had.
Really enjoyed my stay! Very centrally located and extremely comfortable. The hosts took great care of me during my stay making sure I had everything I needed.

Very nice spacious and comfortable suite in the heart of Constantia. Close to Constantia Village. Beautiful garden and surrounds. The hosts are extremely accommodating and  pleasant and I would definitely stay here again.

My stay at James' guesthouse was really great! The bedroom and bathroom are extremely spacious. The minifridge also contained fresh fruits and yoghurt which was a really nice surprise! James and his wife were great hosts and super helpful, also when we had some trouble getting a taxi. Would definitely stay here again 100%!

I had the most amazing stay and wish I could have stayed longer! I loved the thoughtful touches that made my stay in this luxiourious and clean room so comfortable. The hosts were friendly and respected privacy while meeting all needs. The room and bathroom were clean and I really appreciated the thoughtful chocolates on the pillow, the feather duvet, the spacious bathroom, the fresh milk and yogurt and water in the fridge and the delicious coffee and Fresh fruit in the fridge and cereal as well as variety of teas. Thanks so much! And I wish I had more time there to watch the variety of Netflix shows provided as the room was so comfortable!

What makes this an excellent getaway space is the level of attention to detail combined with privacy and serenity. We arrived late in the evening, all disorientated. Luckily our hosts were understanding, thoughtful and highly attentive. We were provided with a beautiful, healthy breakfast spread and luxury bathroom basics. What more can a couple ask for! You should experience all the 'special touches' of this room for yourself. We've been to many places but this one will remain a sweet memory.

The apartment was as described - no disappointments or frustrations. Clean, spacious and comfortable. Great location.

Enrico was very helpful and accommodating - met us at the entrance and checkout was very easy.

Very good
Enrico, was very helpful
Enrico was helpful on short notice. The apartment is beautiful, brand new and walking distance to De Waterkant shops & restaurants. Parking in the building as well which is a great help in the city!
Great apartment, convenient, beautiful location and all the necessary comforts. Wish I could have stayed longer.
Apartment exactly as described - fantastic location and well-maintained. Enrico was a fantastic host - a comfortable and recommendable stay.
Enrico's place was great! Exactly as advertised and perfectly situated in a quiet, secure apartment complex.  Check-in and check-out were smooth and easy.

Superbe l appartement
il y a tout. Enrico nous a bien reçu. On était à l aise

Enrico was a wonderful host with a great apartment. The place is very conveniently located and has great views of Table Mountain and the surrounding area. The couch was really cool (I want one like that!) and everything else was as expected, if not better. It was especially nice of Enrico to wait for me outside based on my approximate arrival time as I did not have access to a phone in which to communicate my exact arrival time. The espresso machine came in very handy, as did the internet and parking garage. While others might take taxis to some of the bars and restaurants in the area, I had no issue walking to them as they were only a handful of blocks away. Thanks for the great stay!

Enrico was incredibly accommodation of my change in arrival time and met with with a smile and much enthusiasm.
The apartment was perfect!

Enrico was warm and pleasant.I enjoyed staying in the apartment and the view of the mountain and city from the balcony was perfect.
Looking forward to rebooking for my next visit to Capetown.
Love!

Vincent and Dwayne were fabulous hosts. Everything was perfect, from the coffee waiting for us upon arrival to the wonderful peppermint crisp (and recipe). The location was fantastic, right on the water with a wonderful tide pool to swim in or just explore. This is the perfect spot for discovering the quaint towns along the coast. Everything was incredibly clean and tidy. Would definitely stay here again. Thank you both for your wonderful hospitality.
-Andrew and Lee

Me and my girlfriend stayed at Vincent's for two days and it was a wonderful experience, he is a fabulous host.
Since day 1 he did everything to make us fell comfortable and at home, from lovely chocolates, delicious coffee pods, a very comfortable bed, fluffy towels and to it even more special he sent us on the new year's eve a tray with some fruits and a delicious sparkling wine.
The bedroom has an amazing view to the ocean and it is gorgeous! The house is close to Muizenberg beach, Boulders beach, Cape Point, Chapmans peak, etc. Perfect location to explore Cape Town's coast.

we loved staying with Vincent. they helped towards a lovely romantic night away by leaving us ice for our champers and wine, chocolates and bubble bath. that was very sweet and thoughtful and not necessary.
they helped us with any queries or directions.
lovely people!!!

Staying at Vicent's was the best experience we had in Airbnb.
The room is exactly like in the pictures, with a beautiful view to the sea. The bed had lots of pillows (which my husband loved) and was very comfortable. They also kindly provided some coffee. It was very clean and incredibly comfortable. Sometimes it was even hard to wake up!
The location is next to Boulders Beach (where you can find penguins), Cape Point & Cape of Good Hope, Chapman's Peak and Kalk Bay. There is a train station just in front of the house, which makes it easy going to Cape Town downtown.
The hosts were very attentive. They were always concerned about helping us, giving us tips on what to do and where to go.
Thank you for the hospitality and we hope to see you soon!

Vincent's apartments was exactly as described in the pictures, really clean and comfortable. It has a small set of kitchen appliances which was enough to cook quick meals. Also the view in the morning was amazing!
The location is good if you want to explore that part of the city as it is quite far from downtown. If you have a car it wont be a problem.
The neighborhood seemed safe and calm.
Have no words to describe how Vincent welcomed us and gave us as much help, tips and attention as possible always doing his best to improve and maximize our stay there.
Would recommend his place to anyone that goes to Cape Town!

This place is so amazing that I almost don't want to leave a review because once people find out about it there will be no open bookings!!! The entire experience was totally amazing. Vincent is truly  an exceptional host who caters above and beyond your needs! We will be back!
This place is really good value for money! It's clean, has a Nice interior and above all Vincent & Dwayne are fantastic & commited hosts. Thanks Guys!
Vincent was a fantastic host; he is kind, generous, and flexible. Vincent's house has a beautiful view  over the water and is close to restaurants and the beach. Highly recommended.

By going through the pics of the listing, if you feel this is good, you are wrong. THIS IS BEST.
This was the best stay I ever made in airbnb. Vincent is the best host i have ever met. He knows what is the need of the guest. He makes preparations accordingly. This is how the host should be. He sets a standard.
He was flexible. He did many things more than required by the host to do. Since we were new to the country, he helped us to make an itinerary.
If I ever come back here, I would prefer staying at the same place.
The house was very clean, Vincent and Dwayne were very welcoming and gave me nice recommendations for the area

Craig was very helpful and communicative. He dropped off keys in person and checked in during our stay to see if everything was in order.
The apartment was exactly as per the listing and a comfortable, affordable spot in a beautiful location.

I felt very welcome and communication was easy. The apartment has recently been refurbished to high modern standard. It was very clean and a nice place to be. It's a few minutes walk from seapoint pool and shops are nearby too. At the moment no Wifi but I think this is planned. Highly recommended.

Very nice clean apartment in ideal location. Close to swimming pool and with shops etc nearby. Super comfortable bed which was nice! We didn't have internet or washing machine for our stay, but I understand it is on the way very soon.
Place was exactly as described. Beautiful views of the ocean and the mountains. Craig was easy to get in touch with and helpful! Will definitely stay here again!
The apartment was lovely! Very modern and clean. Will definitely be back when we visit Cape Town again.
Everything was great and as described. The location is perfect. We would come back any time!

Lovely stay in Seapoint! Apartment was exactly as shown. Great location! Right between the Seapoint pools and The Point shopping centre. Management went out of their way to ensure our stay was great! Note of caution to Uber users - when entering the address, use the building name rather than the physical street address. Uber dropped off at the wrong place because the GPS directs you down the street even though the address is correct. Management came and picked me from there! So kind.
Beautiful apartment. Very modern and clean. The views were fantastic as well. My wife and I had some great evenings eating in with the doors wide open. Great location.

I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at the apartment! It's stylish and modern, in a great location and the view is absolutely stunning. Craig was very accommodating and made sure that we had a great stay. I definitely recommend!

I really enjoyed staying at this cool, modern apartment. Craig and Kathy were really helpful. I will definitely be coming back in summer as the location is perfect as it is just right across from the swimming pools.

What a fantastic host, Steph & Nick were so helpful while I'm staying. The property was just listed in the website, the location was awesome and easy access to the beach and the restaurants and bars.
Really thanks them again :)

What a fantastic place! The Ezulwini Clifton apartment is in an absolutely stunning location looking out over the ocean and every detail had been thought of to make our stay perfect.  Nick & Steph were excellent hosts with plenty of useful tips on places to eat, drink and enjoy Cape town.  They also took the time to get us settled in and made us feel welcome throughout our stay. Thanks again for a wonderful stay.

Amazingly beautiful place with great views. Well equipped, very modern. Loved the bath tub in the bedroom. Access to the beach is just across the road. Parking can be tricky on a beautiful beach day and people walking past can see into the apartment, but then the full glass front gives you the great views.

I'll start of by saying WOW WOW WOW! Ezulwini Clifton Apartment is absolutely stunning, even more beautiful in real life than the images. With its calm, but modern decor and that unbelievable view!

Nick and Steph were just amazing! We arrived a week earlier in Cape Town and just made contact with them, Steph was quick on responding, friendly and helpful.

On arrival, Nick met us and also introduced us to the house manager Magnolia (just the sweetest & friendliest person). Nick and Steph were staying in another apartment on the property and were available to help at anytime, as well as Magnolia. They had a cleaning service that came in every morning and also a laundry service available.

One of the best locations - 5 minutes drive or 15 minutes walk from Camps bay, just above Clifton 2nd beach which is accessible by stairs in front of apartment and loads of street parking in front of the apartment.

Our stay was super relaxing and the sunset's surreal!

I am giving our experience, stay, the apartment and our host 6 stars and we will definitely be back! Thank so much Nick, Steph & Magnolia; we absolutely enjoyed every minute of our stay in your beautiful place!!

See you soon ;)

Stunning apartment with the most amazing view. Nick and Steph were great hosts and made sure we are were well looked after. Perfect location for the beach and a short walk to camps bay.  Would love to come and stay again!

Very beautiful and luxurieus appartement with nice details, such as the small porthole-windows and the big glass-facade. This appartement has a beautiful view over the ocean. Nick en steph are very helpfull when you ask for things to do or a good restaurant. The ladies of the housekeeping were also very friendly and the appartement was always cleaned when we came back.
Everything was more than expected.
Incredible and luxurious apartment, everything imaginable is taken care of. Scenic beach views! Great communication with Nick.

Un appartement plein de charme et de clarte. Excellent standing. Emplacement impeccable pour aller a la plage Clifton no2 qui est super jolie. Steph et Nick sont super sympas et attentifs. Un tres tres bon endroit pour explorer et passer de bons moments au Cap

A great place full of charm and light. Amazing specs. Great location to go to the Clifton #2 beach which is super nice. Steph and Nick are super kind and caring. A very good place to discover Cape town from

Absolutely amazing!  We were visiting South Africa as part of our honeymoon and this was the most amazing place to stay.  The listing describes the place perfectly, with a fantastic location across the road from the beach, close to beach walks, restaurants and cafes and only a short drive to the city centre.  Breathe taking views from everywhere in the apartment and is fully equipped with everything you may need.  We had an absolute blast staying here and Nick and Steph were fantastic hosts, so welcoming and friendly.  Highly recommend and would most definitely love to stay again when we return to SA.

Great stay - thanks. Clean, well-kept and modern apartment with all the amenities one can require, and then some - even Nespresso machine with pods, iPod with speaker-system and Netflix! Uber is readily available in this area. The surrounding area also offers a rich and rewarding food/wine/drink experience. There are blinds that can close the entire front glass facade and allow you to sleep late (on a fantastic bed). Spectacular views and close to the beach. Vehicles passing in the street below can be a bit noisy during peak times although it did not both us city-folk. Will definitely stay here again to enjoy the spectacular sunsets over the ocean. Hosts were very friendly and yet mindful for our privacy.

Nick is a great and friendly host.Nick personally welcomed us upon arrival and even helped us with our baggages.Magnolia did a fantastic housekeeping job making sure everything was cleaned and tidy while we were out for sightsee.This penthouse is very beautiful and it's located at one of the prime area of Cape Town.The sunset view from this house is gorgeous. I love the tanning deck at the balcony and especially the glass ceiling where I could lay in bed comfortably at night and do a star gazing.Best property I've ever stayed with airbnb...
Great spot with helpful staff.
The perfect start to our trip to SA. Wow!! The apartment was amazing, what views! Very well equipped, we loved lounging by the pool. Would definitely stay again and recommend to all. Thanks
Perfect in every way. Tasteful, beautif and so comfortable. Nick & Steph have thought of everything. And they chose the best location. The views are an absolute treat. You cannot go wrong.

Apartamento incrível !!
Decoração muito legal , muito bem equipado e com uma localização privilegiada ( o por do sol era sensacional). A comunicação com o Nick e sua equipe foi ótima .
Recomendo a todos !

Nick's home is an amazing place to stay in Clifton Beach! I'm not sure if this review is showing up for the one-bedroom unit on the property or for the main house, but my wife and I ended up staying in the main house, which was truly incredible. The house is incredibly stylish and well-appointed, and it is a brief stroll down to all the beautiful people at Clifton Beach #2. Don't eat a big meal before heading down to the beach, or you'll feel like a whale!
