There's also a lovely pool facing the ocean (and sunsets!) and you feel like a movie star when the tour buses roll by. It feels like you are a world away from Cape Town's downtown (in a good way), but it is only a quick 15 minute drive to Kloof Street, Bree Street, District 6, etc., and even closer to the Table Mountain gondola. I could go on and on, but know that if you stay at Ezulwini, you will not be disappointed!

Wow wow wow what an experience! I’ve decided to extend its so magical! I feel like I’ve landed in paradise in the middle of Clifton with a view and a magical garden
Nicks place is exceptional! Thanks to his wonderful team who are just so lovely and this apartment makes you feel like you are in a villa in the south of france or Italy
It’s sensational!!!! Just blown away!

Couldn’t have been happier! Woke up feeling like I was in heaven! Everything was incredible and on point! The staff are beyond wonderful. The bed is a dream and the view is like nothing I’ve ever experienced before! I never want to leave Izelweni! ✨✨

The Top apartment is pure class! You feel like you in an Italian Villa. The garden is magical and an absolute treat to wake up to. What a special place. Love everything about this place, the location, the decor the ambiance

The top apartment is TOPS!!! Super impressed with EVERYTHING
Absolutely blown away by the architect and design right in the heart of Clifton with superb views and a garden and pool! Simply divine! I never want to leave! The fire place is a real highlight for me! Lying on the bean bag is just a treat reading my book! Happy memories of the top apartment
Comfortable, clean, lovely accommodation in a beautiful and friendly family home.

Alexandra is a fantastic host.
We felt welcomed as if long-lost family. We were spoilt with breakfast and the personal attention / concern was simply great.
Happy guests that shared a happy home.
Alexandra was a fantastic host. The room was quiet, clean and very comfortable. A great place for anyone looking to spend a few days in Cape Town outside of the city.

Alexandra was an amazing hostess, always making sure we were comfortable and happy. The room was well maintained, and offered a quiet space to relax.
The room was clean and well presented, had all the major necessities, including WiFi and heated towel rail, which was an added bonus.
All in all i would highly recommend staying here

OVERALL: 5-star: 10 days. PROS: Alexandra wanted to ensure their guest had a very comfortable stay and took care of any queries promptly. Excellent communication. Stunning home and garden with pool and outside seating and lounge areas. Full DSTV access, Wi-Fi, very peaceful and secure location.  Very comfortable bed and the private room and bathroom very clean. If you are a foodie and interested in wine you are near to two best restaurants in the Western Cape and in close proximity to the Constantia wine region. Highly recommended. CONS: None.

Great Host. Lovely area. Little remote.
Easy access to Muizenberg. Hout Bay and Kirstenbosch

Alexandras home is in a nice and quiet area of Constantia's famous wineyards. Alexandra and her husband are both extremen y welcoming and helped us with lots of suggestions. When the kitchen for the guestroom is ready, it'll be a perfect place to spend some relaxing days in this beautiful wine area.
Very nice room in a beautiful house! Comfy, very clean and very secure. The alarm system can get a little stressful but at least you will be safe!
Wonderful attention to detail, very well catered, great people, beautiful location, super comfortable bed and stunning skylights to fall asleep under. I will book this one again for certain.

We had a great time at Alexandra’s accommodation! She’s a perfect host, very generous and friendly. In addition to that, she is very approachable if you need some help or recommendations. The room is as described as in the pictures and the small breakfast is also a nice add-on! We loved staying at her place!

Delightful loft apartment with a truly magnificent view of Table Mountain from the giant windows. Well-fitted and comfortable, and  great position in central Cape Town; easy access to restaurants, coffee bars, etc. Security excellent with onsite parking. Public passageways a little grubby, but apartment spotless. Friendly hosts who greeted is with an excellent bottle of local wine. Everything worked as promised...we'll be back!

Very welcoming hosts, and absolutely beautiful apartment! Looks exactly how it appears in the photos. Very clean and well-kept. My travel plans changed a few times, and Nick and Tanya were flexible and easygoing. Even though it's in a very vibrant part of the city it was still quiet once in the apartment. Stunning views of table mountain as well. Choose this apartment!!
What an amazing experience in one of the most beautiful places in Cape Town. Friendliest host with the upmost attention to detail. Will definitely be going back!

Nick and Tanya were the ultimate hosts, at one of the sweetest spots in which one could ask, and in an amazing city. A+ and a 10. Thank you for making my daughter's and my visit to Cape Town spectacular.

Although we didnt get meet Nick and Tanya in person due to late travel times, they were great hosts to rent from. They were very friendly and always easy to contact and very helpful/prompt with their responses. The apartment was in an amazing location with the best view and was really a highlight of our trip. It was close to all the great coffee shops and resteraunts for when we went out but also had everything we could need it we decided to stay in! Would definitely recommed to stay here and  will definitly stay here again the next time we are in Cape Town!

Absolutely Amazing views, great trendy NY style loft apartment and location was in a convenient and safe place. Centrally located to nice restaurants and cafes. Hosts were available and very responsive to all requests. They also helped us with booking an early morning airport taxi. Would recommend this place.

My husband and I had SUCH a great stay at Nick and Tanya's place! The loft is absolutely lovely and even more charming in person than in the photos. It's in a great location, close to lots of cafes and restaurants and in a perfect central spot for seeing the whole city. Also an awesome view of table mountain! It has a private parking garage and building security which were great to have in any unfamiliar city. We felt safe and comfortable! Nick met us upon arrival and check in was very easy. He gave us lots of suggestions for restaurants and activities which were so helpful. I 100% recommend staying here on your visit to Cape Town!
It's was nice location and vibe
Nick & Tanya are perfect hosts. The apartment has great location & vand architecturally interesting.
The view is wonderfull from The big window. Modern and cozy loft with everything is necessary. Nick and Tanya very well coming and we give you all information you need ti visit Cape Town.

Great location, neat as a pin with everything that one needs. Nick & Tanya were extremely hospitable and met us at the apartment. Their communication with us was prompt. I will truly recommend staying with Nick & Tanya.
Nick met us when we arrived to show us the apartment and give us some tips / things to do in the area. Really lovely place, enjoyed our stay and would definitely recommend!

We found the flat very central to all the spots around Cape Town.
Clean and very comfortable. We would certainly consider staying there again.

Nick's place is a first class stay in Green Point. The place has beautiful and stunning views from the lounge and the bedroom of table mountain.
It is spacious , airy , spotlessly clean and has a vintage unique style.
Nick was helpfull from day one and he was quick to respond to our booking since it was a last minute booking.
Local bus stop close by , the place is a few mins walk to the beautiful cape town stadium ,waterfront, abundant bars , eating places , coffee shops and grocery store.
This was the best location and will be back again.
Thanks Nick & Tanya!

We had a fabulous stay in Cape Town in this flat. The location is perfect. It is a 10 minute walk to the V&A waterfront or a similar walk into the city centre. Nick and Tanya were wonderful hosts. I had a text when we landed inviting us to check in early so that we did not have to hang around, this was just what we needed after a long flight. Nick was there on time and showed us everything we needed to know. Everything was really hassle free and simple and the guide book which Tanya has put together was our bible during the stay. Would recommend this place for its location, comfort and hosts. Will be visiting again. Thank you for a lovely stay.
Tom and Emily

The apartment is as good and better than a large hotel suite.   Everything was impecably clean, and bed linen was of a high quality.  The unit is also very secure with overall high security in the apartment block.    The building cleanliness outside of the apartment is also of a high standard.
I really liked it! Clean and well located :)
We felt very comfortable ..the location was great, we just thought it was closer to the waterfront...lovely bottle of wine

The apartment is in perfect location
a lot of restaurants in the area and very close to the waterfront
the place was very spacious and comfortable and got you need
nick and tanya have been wonderful hosts and help us with everything from day one.
we would definitely recommend

Enjoyed our two night stay. Clean and well appointed apartment with all the mod cons. Very convenient to the waterfront and nearly restaurants with Woolworths Food close by. Secure parking and good security. Will definitely use again.

Very nice stay. The apartment was brilliant in a superb location with beautiful views. Nick and Tanya were the perfect hosts: kind, flexible and always ready to help.

Thank you

Arrived on a Wednesday afternoon for a four night stay.  Nick and Tanya met us at the front gate with a bottle of wine.  The flat was as advertised.  Clean, up to date furnishings.  The neighborhood felt safe and it was only a short walk to the V&A waterfront with plenty of options for dining out and shopping.   Nick and Tanya gave us the tour of the flat and explained how everything worked.  They also loaded us up with some free WIFI data!  We had a very pleasant experience with the hosts and Cape Town.  Looking forward to going back!

The apartment is definitely better than the pictures. You can smell the fresh ocean from the apartment. This is not something the pictures can tell. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. The apartment is within walking distance to most restaurants and is very secure. The hosts Nic and Tanya were very super friendly. Its the perfect apartment from which to explore Cape Town.  Will definitely be back.

Top marks to Nick and Tanya for providing us one of the nicest guest experiences on AirBNB. The apartment was as pictured, very sunny and handsomely outfitted but done with such care that you could actually live here rather than just visit. Nick is a charming host. He met us with a bottle of wine and ensured that everything we needed was there. And it was. The bed was just right, the pillows just right, the shower pressure excellent, and the kitchen completely equipped in the event you decide to have a night in at home. Unlike a lot of places on AirBNB there was ample drawer and hanging closet space. (I cant' tell you the number of otherwise excellent AirBNB apartments we've visited with either no drawers for clothing or little or no hanging space.) The location couldn't be better, within easy reach of everything. And a big bonus is to have a private underground garage with remote controlled garage door. Wifi excellent, although it is capped and you'll need to top up if you have a serious amount of work to do.  We loved the place and hope to visit again. Thanks Nick and Tanya!

This trip was our first time to South Africa and our first time using Airbnb. We were not disappointed on either. Nick and Tanya welcomed us to South Africa with a bottle of wine. Their place was close to great cafes/restaurants and food markets. Being away for a week, it was nice to be able to get some things at the market and be able to cook at "home." The apartment is also a very short walk away from the V&A Waterfront area with a huge mall, many more restaurants, and the Two Oceans Aquarium. There is also a hop-on/hop-off bus stop right in front of the aquarium that takes you all over Cape Town. You can't beat the location!
The apartment is exactly how it looks in pictures. It's very cozy and feels like a home away from home. The bed and couches are comfortable. All of the appliances work perfectly. We just had two minor issues. The wifi is over a mobile hotspot. When we arrived the data had run out. But Nick was quick to reload! We also had an issue with the prepaid electric running out on our last night. Again, Nick had it fixed in no time. Nick was very helpful answering our questions about the area and fixing our technical problems. The apartment building is also very safe. There is a guard in the lobby and plenty of police walking the streets. I never felt unsafe.
We loved South Africa so much we're already planning a trip back... Where we will stay at Nick and Tanya's again.

Small and cozy apartment just as described here. Great location for Cape town, you can just walk or take a uber easily! Nick and Tanya are very caring and attentive, left us a bottle of wine and gave us great recommendations about what to do in the city. We were on our honeymoon, and after travelling around and staying at 3 different hotels, Nick and Tanya's apartment just felt very homey on our last stop before going home. Thanks a lof for everything! :)

Clara & Felipe

This is an absolutely wonderful apartment. Even flowers on the table when we arrived and the sun that streamed into the apartment. It was so great to be in a bright, airy space. Nick and Tanya were absolutely amazing. Tanya met us on arrival and went out of her way to make sure we were comfortable and knew where everything was. On top of it, they organised the weather :-) I hate leaving home; our stay at in this wonderful space made the trip so worthwhile and enjoyable. Just as well we'll be visiting again in September.

Excellent place to stay well equipped so handy to the Water Front and City and safe.
Super Market and deli really close with great wine selection also good restaurants nearby Mano's especially good.
Enjoyed every minute spent in Cape Town a fantastic City.
Really lovely little place. Clean, beautifully decorated and perfect for a couple who want to be centrally located. Would definitely stay again. Thank you :)

Nick and Tanya saved us. We arrived with lost baggage,  and they both helped us in every way they could from start to finish.  Solid people,  solid apartment,  would recommend to anyone looking to stay near the waterfront. I would definitely recommend keeping your luggage tags if your going to visit the area though :)

Thank you so much to Barry and Moira. They have a lovely apartment in an amazing location with fantastic views of sunrise through the mountains and sunsets over the sea. Lovely and knowledgable hosts and If ever I'm back in Cape Town I would hope to be able to book with them again.

Dear Moira and Barry,

Thomas and I were so happy to stay at the Tree Tops. You both are amazing hosts and we felt absolutley wellcome.

The apartment is wonderful, it's cosy, everything was as it was in the descrition and more. Looks on table montain, lions head and the seaview...
It was our home and we enjoyed every minute. We already miss you both, to chat with you and have a glas of wine, and we already miss the apartment.

Thanks again and we definitly meet again

Thomas and Haakon

En dépit d'un temps froid et pluvieux de l'hiver austral, deux agréables nuits passées à Camps Bay dans l'appartement haut perché, confortable, lumineux et bénéficiant d'une vie superbe de Barry et Moira. Ces derniers se sont montrés discrets mais attentionnés et présents quand nous avons eu besoin d'eux.
Une très bonne adresse dans une ambiance de vacances (la plage, les commerces à moins de 5 minutes à pieds) à proximité du centre ville du Cap.

This was the perfect place for us to stay at the end of a long trip through Southern Africa. The apartment is in an extremely convenient location. It is safe and close to everything in Camps Bay. Beautiful ocean views. Getting in to Cape Town is also very convenient (close to city tour bus route). Barry and Moira were extremely pleasant -- perfect hosts! The apartment is clean and charming. It has everything you'll need. We highly recommend staying here.

Drew and Cheryl

Quel merveilleux séjour !! Barry et Moira sont adorables et très serviables. Ils nous ont donnés pleins de conseils sur le quartier et la ville. L'appartement est très jolis, bien placés et fonctionnels. Nous ne pouvions pas rêver mieux pour notre dernier logement de tour du monde.

I really enjoyed staying at the Tree Tops with my family. I love the windows everywhere and certainly in the bedroom where you really feel into the tree top while enjoying magical sun down in the ocean... Barry and Moira were very lovable. Close to the beach and the restaurants as well as close to the city center. I really recommend ! Thanks !! And thank you to let us stay two more days so easily, even though we decided on the last moment!!!!

We spent a wonderful week at this lovely apartment. The views are simply stunning. You can see the ocean, lions head and table mountain. We felt save and Barry & Moira took very good care of us. There are also plenty of great restaurants within easy walking distance. You must go to Codfather for their seafood. We'd definitely recommend staying at this place. Also Camps Bay was our favorite neighborhood in Cape Town.

Barry and Moria were excellent hosts! They were very helpful throughout our stay and very welcoming. We accidentally left our keys in an uber and they were very helpful in providing us with an extra copy until we could track down the uber driver.

The apartment is exactly as described and shown in the photos. It's located in an excellent and very safe neighborhood with amazing views of the ocean and Table Mountain. And it's just 2 minutes walking distance from the beach and restaurants.

What amazing hosts! We didn't get to meet Moira, but spoke with her on the phone & what lovely people! We where running a little late for our check in & Barry is very patient, he was there to welcome us & show us around their beautiful loft.
It's exactly like the photos! Perfect location, good view & has that homey relax feeling :)
I would recommend it to anyone who is looking to holiday in CT.

Tree Tops was exactly what I expected but even more than I hoped for.  It was an absolutely lovely, light, airy home away from home.  The location was perfectly convenient being just off the main road but so close to the beach, shops, and restaurants as well as the bus stops.  I felt really special every time I opened the private gate to come home from my adventures and I couldn't have asked for a more delightful space to relax in.  Also, Barry was incredibly sweet and kind and I really appreciate his discreet checking in and friendly/fatherly advice.  This was the perfect combination of feeling like I was at a fancy spa and a dear friend's home and it was easy to call it my own for a week!

This place was a joy to stay at. *Amazing* bed, perfect location (easy walk to all of Green Point's offerings), and safe, doorman-protected building. Nick is a great communicator and welcomed us in person. Super cheerful, awesome guy. Book it!

We had a lovely stay at Nick and Tanya's apartment. Clean, homey and modern apartment. They gave us a warm welcome and had a lovely chilled bottle of wine waiting for us. We were provided with all the basics like tea, sugar etc. They had lovely recommendations ready for us like things to do, must see and where to eat. After an unfortunate incident, they were immediately available to assist us and was very understanding. They are lovely hosts and the apartment is a must stay.

Had a lovely time at Nick and Tanya's flat. Great location close to the Waterfront, grocery store, restaurants, and the bus stop.  They were so welcoming, made sure I had everything I need, and readily made themselves available if I had any questions or needed anything.  Definitely my top choice in accommodation next time I'm in Cape Town.  Stay here and you won't regret it.

My girlfriend and I had a great stay here! Nick was super friendly and helpful and the place was exactly what we were looking for. The bed was insanely comfortable and we had our own assigned parking spot which was amazing since we decided to rent a car. It was also only a 5 minute walk to Woolworths Food so we stocked up the kitchen with some groceries. It's also very close to the V&A Waterfront which was so nice. This was my first Air bnb experience and it could not have gone better.

Nick and Tanya are amazing hosts! My boyfriend and I recently stayed at their place during our trip to Cape Town and had a wonderful experience. The place is adorable, comfortable, in a great neighborhood, and has all the comforts of home. I also appreciated that Nick and Tanya met us in person to give us the keys and show us around the apartment. They even gave us a bottle of SA wine and a guide with sights/activities in Cape Town! I can't say enough good things about this place and Nick and Tanya. Highly recommend.

Nick and Tanya were so kind and helpful with check-in. Once there, they gave me helpful tips about the neighborhood (Green Point)--which has plenty of cool restaurants, cafés and shops. Everything was less than 5 minutes away on foot - you can't beat that for location. For exploration to other parts of Cape Town, Uber cars were always less than a couple of minutes away and made exploring Cape Town quite simple.

The place is super nice and exactly as described and depicted in the photos. I felt very much at home and comfortable. The kitchen was well-equipped and shopping from the Woolworths or Spar a few steps down the Main Rd was easier than doing shopping even at home.

Nick and Tanya went above and beyond being excellent hosts. They were so nice to greet me despite my late evening arrival. They even made sure that the washer and dryer was working properly, sending a technician to make sure it worked the next morning so that after a few weeks in African bush, my clothes were clean for Cape Town.

As I told Nick and Tanya, this will be my first pick when I am next in Cape Town. Recommended++++.

The apartment has everything you need to feel like home. It's conveniently located; in a quiet area but very close to Waterfront, where you can walk. Very close there are supermarkets and restaurants.
Nick&Tania attended us very well.

We had an amazing time at Nick and Tanya's apartment. Great location, very clean, very comfortable bed. Everything we needed was there! Giovanni's deli around the corner was an added bonus. Nick and Tanya were so helpful. They responded quickly to our messages and offered great suggestions for things to do on our vacation. Thank you, Nick and Tanya for being such great hosts!

Nick & Tanya were great hosts. The apartment was very well appointed modern, clean and simple, with every convenience taken care of!  Wonderful comfy bed and fluffy white towels:) within walking distance of shops and restaurants. My husband and I had a wonders stay!

Nick welcomed us with a bottle of wine and made an effort to ensure we had everything we needed. The location was incredibly convenient for shops, restaurants and movies as well as outdoor activities like running and cycling. a great stay and will definitely try and book it again when in Cape Town
Fantastic stay in this inner city apartment, will definitely be back! Thank you so much for the convenience and hospitality Charmaine, had a wonderful time.
The apartment was really nice and the host was really accommodating. It's worth noting that the indoor pool in the apartment block is not heated making winter dips for the daring only!

This apartment is AMAZING!!! The photos don't do the apartment or location justice at all. The apartment is incredibly clean, modern and comfortable, with beautiful decor and all you need to have a wonderful air BnB experience. The entire apartment complex is very secure and exclusive, conveniently located in the heart of this beautiful city. It is very easy to explore it on foot or by uber, the car park is very easy to access and safe too. Charmaine also provides a house keeping service during the week as part of the stay which is an added bonus. She was a wonderful host and great to communicate with. Our best air BnB experience yet!

The Cartwright Building is stunning its Views of Table Mountian from the kitchen and living room is amazing,The feel of the appartment is so nice we felt like we lived there.  Plus it gets the sunrise threw the CBD buildings as you wake up. I love it and will def be back and stay in the same appartment. Charmine suggested some amazing cafes for us to visit stayinmg in the heart of Capetown is so cool and when your walking around you can see the building peeking above the skyline so its easy to find your way back.

l'appartement est idéalement situé en plein coeur de la ville avec une imprenable sur le city center. l'appartement est meublé avec goût et bénéficie de petites attentions pour les voyageurs bien appréciable. félicitation en tant moi meme hôte air bnb (garden riad Marrakech medina) je recommande vivement cet endroit!
I can't recommend it enough! It's perfect. She's the epitome of an exceptional and considerate hostess.

Absolutely amazing experience! Charmaine made us feel incredibly welcome and at home. The apartment was beautiful, comfortable and conveniently located. Most everything we wanted to do was in walking distance or a short drive away. Fantastic experience! One we hope to enjoy again!
Once again, I can't say enough good things.

Our host, Charmaine, was wonderful. Once we entered the apartment, there was a bottle of wine, chocolates, and a rock with the South African flag and my name on it, along with one that stated, "Welcome to Cape Town.". :)  We arrived in late afternoon after two days of traveling. It was cold and rainy. We needed to shower and were too tired to walk to a restaurant for dinner. All the nearby grocery stores had closed at 6pm. Charmaine came down to meet us with a large bowl of homemade tomato soup and slices of warm bread and butter. This was so thoughtful and definitely made our night!

If you want to treat yourself to something special then book this AirBnB! A great,  safe and embracing place. Spotless clean, all looked like new. So nicely and arty decorated and with many little extras. Loved my stay here.
Dave was a great host! He responded to all my messages promptly and went out of his way to make us feel at home. The apartment was exactly as advertised, very clean and neat.

We had a really nice stay, our beds were super comfortable, the rooms were really beautiful, and the apartment is very nice. Our hosts were friendly, although we barely saw them while we were there since we were out wandering the town all day! The area is perfect, very close to Waterfront. What a nice spot! I totally recommend staying here. :)

The apartment was clean and comfortable. Very beautiful and equipped as well. The apartment is quiet and at the same time in very good location near good restaurants, It really is the best place to stay in Cape Town.
Dave since the beginning was very kind and helpful. Dave and his friend were always concerned about our well-being.
Wonderful experience for my first time in Cape Town.

Over the course of six nights the apartment became like a second home. The listing looks just like the pictures shown. One of my favorite thing about the apartment was the location. The waterfront was only a short walk away and we saved money on taxis by being able to walk. The host was welcoming and made sure our entire stay was problem-free.

Dave's flat was the best flat I have ever stayed via Airbnb. The flat is exactly the same as described in his profile. The flat's location is very central, 10-15 mins to waterfront,a couple of mins to bars and restaurants also supermarkets. Most important think is the safety in Capetown. This is my 5th travel to capetown and I really felt safe in Dave's apart for the first time. Also Dave was really helpful when we need any help before and during our stay. He was so kind, he welcomed us with a bottle of red wine and from towel to shampoo we found anything at dave's flat. For my next holiday in capetown dave's house will be our first choice. I highly recommend dave's flat.

Fantastic host; friendly and on hand with advice... Willing to go the extra mile.
Great location. Unit as advertised

Dave was approachable, easily contactable and flexible. The flat is great; very clean, comfortable beds, fully equipped kitchen. We love the location in the De Waterkant area as well, with great places to eat nearby and the waterfront in safe walking distance. We had a great time, thanks Dave!

Staying at Dave's place was a very nice experience. The apartment is bright and spacious, two sleeping rooms are at your availability. He couldn't be there for the check-in, but his friend took over and it all went very smoothly. The place is nicely located close to Waterkant night life and restaurants.

I highly recommend that apartment, De Waterkant is such a nice neighborhood with shops, supermarket and many services. The apartment offers a nice view. Waterfront is only 10 minutes from the apartment by foot. The apartment was clean when we arrived. Last but not least The host were friendly and gave us many tips.

Such a lovely flat with everything you'll need. We spent most of our time out and enjoying what the City is known for thus really only slept there.  A real lock-up and go! Easy to find,  great area and sooo quite!  Didn't even feel like we were in the middle of city life.  Thanks for sharing this little gem with us!
Great host was made very welcome.   Given good suggestions where to visit and where to eat.
Craig and Karen were great hosts. The flat was extremely comfortable with everything that I needed. I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for accommodation in Cape Town.

Craig and Karen are very welcoming hosts and make one feel at home.  They were very good about early arrival which made life much easier for me.  The place is very modern, neat and clean with decent linen, towels etc.  It is located in a safe residential neighbourhood very conveniently placed for easy access to the university of Cape Town, and surrounds, plus easy access to the highway to downtown and to the airport.  There is off street parking which is a plus.  All in all a very pleasant stay.

Modern, clean and comfortable accommodation in a peaceful neighbourhood. I also appareciated the extra touches like the milk and beers in the fridge, for example. Very easy to find, with secure off-street parking. Craig was very friendly and hospitable. I would definitely recommend staying here!

The place is easily accessible, and is within close proximity to places such as UCT and Cavendish Square when taking an Uber. The images are accurate , and Craig and Karen were always willing to help when we needed them. Lovely place!
We had a great stay at Craig and Karen's Rondebosch cottage! It has everything you need for a short stay, cooking equipment, desk, outdoor coffee table etc. And fantastic hosts!! Highly recommended!
A very clean , comfortable stay that was conveniently situated for easy access to the city and Rondebosch/Newlands area

Very accessible from major routes
nice quiet area and the flatlet is totally private
Enjoyed the clever use of space to get a good number of appliances in.
definitely over-delivered in the important categories- location cleanliness. very solid spot this.
Great, clean accommodation. Completely separate from the main house. Craig could not have been more accommodating. Will definitely stay again when we're in CT!

Nick and Tanya's place is an absolute gem in Cape Town. It's beautifully appointed, perched at the top of Bloem St with a wonderful view of Signal Hill, and within a quick walk of all the fun & restaurants on Long St. I enjoyed a long bath in the bedroom tub and found the bed one of the most comfortable out there. This loft is sheer elegance, and Nick and Tanya were super easy to communicate with and went out of their way to ensure I had everything I needed. Can't recommend them highly enough. Go book it!

Really lovely, modern apartment in the centre of the CBD.  Exactly like the pics.  Great views of the Bo Kaap and within walking distance of Rose's for Sunday morning koesisters!!  We felt safe and secure.  Very hospitable hosts, we recommend staying at Westside Studios.

Beautiful apartment, comfortable and stylishly decorated with everything you could need for your stay.
Great location near the bars, restaurants and bakeries of Bree Street.
Highly recommended!
Nick and Tanya were great hosts and provided lots of useful information on the local area.

We've just landed back in Europa after two weeks in Cape Town at Tanya's and Nick's apartment. It was so sad to leave yesterday. We felt totally at home and made new friends (especially with Jason Bakery with amazing Flat White just around the corner)

We loved that the apartment was so bright during the day with the big window and it's very well equipped :)

Nick & Tanya's warm hospitality began well before I set foot in Cape Town for the first time.  They sent me emails and a visitor's guide before I arrived and answered any questions I had.  I was met on arrival and given a tour of the place.  The apartment is beautifully furnished and just as advertised with all amenities and very comfortable bed.  For me it was a great first home to begin by time here.  As it is centrally located it is easy to walk to local restaurants/cafes or drive to the beaches.  As I will be here for an extended period of time Nick & Tanya provided much helpful information.  I would highly recommend them as hosts and this loft in particular.

Our experience at Nick and Tanya's loft was amazing!
The location is very central and great for anyone wanting to explore the city and surrounds. Moreover if traveling by car, there is secure private underground parking. The apartment is just as it looks in the photos, if not better! All amenities are provided. The apartment was spotless and full of beautiful natural light. Tanya welcomed us on arrival, left us a great bottle of wine and a variety of suggestions on what to do in Cape Town! It was perfect and we hope to stay there again when we return!
Nick and Tanya are absolutely lovely. The place is immaculate and excellent located to discover Capetown. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend this place to anybody. 5+ stars!

This was the most awesome experience from the relaxed approached of the owners and the set up of their stunning loft which was beautifully appointed and as per the description the area is awesome with a large dinning options a short walk away all in all made our weekend absolutely amazing

My host Nick met me at the apartment at my convenience and was extremely helpful in explaining everything related to the apartment and the surrounding area.

This apartment is at the perfect city location close to the best restaurants and bars. This was great value for money and I will definitely book this apartment again
Extremely nice place with everything you may need. Very clean and great location. Have breakfast at one of the two places at the corner of Bree St!

Peter's place is great. centrally located, fully furnished and with a incredibly comfortable sofa! we stayed two nights and thoroughly enjoyed our time. Peter is very friendly and will go out of his way to help you and give suggestions of things to do and places to see.
We had a wonderful time! A very clean and tidy house with a lovely pool and everything you needed for a comfortable stay. Peter is a great host! We will definitely use this property again.
The cottage was perfect for our short stay, centrally located and private. The pool and garden were thoroughly enjoyed by all and the host was friendly and helpful. A lovely spot.

Myself, my husband & 3 boys had a great stay at Peter's cottage! The house was lovely & clean & very comfortable, the boys especially loved the table football,  dartboard & the pool. Peter was very welcoming & helpful during our stay.

Peter is a great host who showed his hospitality during our stay. We chat a lot right after we met and lots of information we got from him for our travel in CT. the cottage has everything  we need. The kitchen is even somewhere you want to  spend time at because it is so clean and well organized.  a shopping center Is just 200 meter away giving us the convenience for grocery. generally Peter offered me a great stay and I will definitely consider stay at his place again next time I visit cape town.

Good property in a quiet/safe location with choice of shops and restaurants nearby or 20 mins drive to city centre so a hiring a car pretty much essential.
We stayed for 13 night during which Peter was an attentive host, resolving any issues promptly.

Our stay at Peters house was great, everything went easy and the house was clean and cozy. Last but not least, Peter had answers for everything and showed us kindness and hospitality beyond usual. We really appreciate that and will be back!

Lovely little place with everything and more that you need, close proximity to anywhere and anything in and around town... I would most definitely recommend Peter's place to whomever might be considering staying there in the future.

Nice place, clean and fine location in the suburbs. Peter is a good and friendly host. Safe neighborhood and close to shopping centres. The place is very well equipped and there is a supermarket in 250 meters . Excelent choice

Peter's place in Claremont was really nice. It had everything we needed and the pool, dartboard and fooseball table kept the the kids entertained. Malls and supermarkets 5 minutes walk away as well as a few restaurants close by. Peter was a great guy and very helpful. Would stay there again.

Here is the detailed review of my stay at this beautiful place with the most amazing hosts.
If you are looking for a quite, peaceful, independent apartment to stay in one of the best localities in cape town please look no further and book this venue. I was the first ever guest at this place. On ringing the door bell you will find an ever smiling lady (rojeanne) and two dogs (nina and lollie) welcoming you. If you love dogs then this is the place to be, if you don't like dogs still this is the place to be at as you will fall in love with them in no time span.
About the house- It is a single room + attached bathroom apartment in the backyard garden. You will feel the aroma as soon as you enter this beautiful apartment.There is a microwave, fridge, coffee machine for your use. The apartment is equipped with a heater and electronic blanket since it gets cold in the night.
Entry/Exit- you will get a remote key to the main door, the same path privately leads to your apartment. You can get in and out of house as per your own convenience without disturbing the hosts.
About the host- Rojeanne is very kind and helpful. You must spend initial one hour with her to share your interests and she will help you with places you would love to visit.
Do feel free to interact more with Rojeanne, her husband and two little princess (Annabelle and Jeanny). They will make you feel at home. If you are lucky enough you may get to have delicious breakfast on a weekend with the family.
Service- the apartment is serviced everyday on weekdays. If you need something on weekends you may ask Rojeanne for her help.
I hope this summarizes all. Happy stay. Enjoy Cape Town.

Rojeanne's place is exactly as shown on the photos. A lovely private, cosy room with ensuite. It is located very close to the water and a good walk from v&a waterfront. It is the perfect place to come back to after a long and busy day. There are several restaurants close by, they recommended several and we managed to try two of them, Mykonos and Posticino... very good recommendations :) we would definitely recommend staying here, especially if you want a beautiful and quite place to come back to every evening.

If you are visiting Cape Town on vacation this is certainly the place to stay!!! We've travelled to quite a few Airbnb places all around the world and this is by far the most amazing place yet! Rojeanne has a sweet family and is always there to help as much as possible. She was willing to sit with us and discuss any questions we had about Cape Town and always cared to make sure we had an amazing travel in her city! The room is very clean and homey (exactly as presented in the photos). She asked right away if we wanted to be left alone during our travel then she had no problem giving us all the privacy we wanted. If you are unfamiliar with Cape Town on what to do or where to eat just take the advice of Rojeanne and her husband, you surly won't be disappointed. They have two dogs that can be intimidating by their bark but you will quickly find out that it's all a bluff and they are as friendly as can be.

Our stay at the garden appartment was really great. We arrived in the afternoon and were welcomed by the sweetest possible lady Pam, the housekeeper. Afterwards we met Rojeane and her husband Hein who were just as friendly as Pam. You immediately get the feeling you are at home! Rojeane helps you along with nice local restaurants and things to see. There are also maps and info available in the appartment. In terms of location, the appartment is close to the city center (about 20 min walk) and very close to the sea side. If we decide to ever go back to Cape Town we hope we can stay with them again!
Rojeanne was a great host, her cottage is beautiful and clean and we had a lovely stay!

Pam met us on arrival and welcomed us into our room, lovely and easy. Rojeanne wasn't there at that point but came and introduced herself later on. Extremely warm and welcoming. Very helpful with delicious places to eat in the area and further afield. The house is absolutely gorgeous, and you cannot help but relax! Fresh interior design. Rojeanne keeps in touch with you throughout your stay, which is very reassuring and the extra effort is appreciated. Thank you for hosting us at your lovely place. We will be back when we are next in Cape Town for sure!
Brilliant spot, fabulous hosts and great location. The room was perfect for us and rosjeanne and her family were super welcoming. Highly recommend

Wir haben uns von Anfang an wohl gefühlt! Rojeanne hat sicher gestellt, dass sie zuhause ist, um uns in Empfang zu nehmen. Das Appartement war fertig vorbereitet und entsprach genau den Beschreibungen und Bildern, vielleicht etwas klein.
Rojeanne stand uns während des gesamten Aufenthaltes mit Rat und Tat zu Seite. Es war auch bereits eine Liste mit Restaurants, Tätigkeiten etc. vorbereitet.
Die Lage der Unterkunft ist sehr gut. 2 Minuten entfernt ist ein Einkausladen und beginnt eine Restaurantmeile. Auch zum Waterfront ist es nicht weit.
Auch die Hunde sind sehr süß.
Alles in allem war es ein sehr gelungener Aufenthalt und durchaus weiter zu empfehlen!
Wir kommen definitiv wieder :)
Very good cost benefit! Rojeanne was very kind and generouse with us. We loved the coffee and cookies provided. Appartment clean, confortable and with a very pleasent garden!

Rojeanne and Hein are the most amazing hosts we ever had. Their hospitality is unbelievable. Not only were we supplied with tips for places to go out or things to do - Hein organized Rugby Tickets for us and we were welcomed with a delicious bottle of South African Wine. But most important, Rojeanne and Hein make you feel home. The place is very cozy and stylish at the same time. It is seperated from the rest of the house which gives you privacy. The fact that there is no kitchen was not a problem at all. In Cape Town there are thousands of opportunities for eating out. We are glad we stayed with Rojeanne and Hein. They give you the feeling of staying with friends. We had a splendid time!!!

Richenda! We cannot thank you enough for your kind hospitality! Your flat was incredible, and looked just like your photos! And the way you set everything up for us was exquisite. From the little snacks, to the lovely bottle of wine in the fridge. Nespresso with pods, juice and milk. Thank you for meeting us at 12am because our flight was delayed!
I would recommend you to any of my friends and family, and I think the airbnb community is lucky to have you. Thanks again!

The third time my parents stayed at one of Richenda's studio apartments. She is an excellent host and a warm welcome from her. She was very responsive to our messages. Studio is perfectly located. Very tidy and clean. Exactly as showed on pictures. Studio is not too small. Also a view of the ocean and Robbin Island. Will definitely recommend to all travelers.
Our stay at Richenda's unit was excellent. Perfect communication, clean unit, super comfy bed, nice shower and all the kitchen essentials we could need. Couldn't fault it :)

I have stayed in a lot of air bnb's and I think this would have to be my favourite.
Richenda was very easy to communicate with and came and met us to give us the key and the low down on the apartment even though we were running a little late from what we had originally planned and it was after 8pm.
The apartment is a perfect size for a couple, really well laid out, feels very spacious for a studio. Great location, very central to everything we wanted to do in Cape Town.
It was really the little touches that made this apartment so great.... The heated towel rack, the my Citi bus cards which Richenda left with a note that they were already topped up with a small amount plus some info on local activities and good places to eat/drink, a couple of provisions in the kitchen, water juice, milk and a few snacks.
We LOVED our stay, only problem is that we wish we could have stayed longer.
Highly recommended and I would definitely go back over and over again.
Thank you again for having us Richenda.

Staying at Richenda's apartment was perfect. Location, decor and host were all impeccable. Felt so at home, I could quite easily imagine never leaving. Will definitely be my first choice to book when I visit CT again.
Me encanto

Richenda's apartment was the perfect place to spend our week in Cape Town. The location was brilliant - very close to many restaurants and shops. The actual apartment was immaculate. From the decor to the equipment, the place didn't lack anything. Richenda herself was an amazing host as well. She was very accommodating, and made herself very available to any queries we might have had. Apart from the apartment being very clean, it was also modern and beautiful. I would highly recommend this apartment for anyone looking to stay in Cape Town.

Richenda was a terrific host. She met us at our convenience to check us in and greeted us with personalized recommendations of where to go in the area (as I requested). She lives nearby and was always just an SMS away. As my wife says, she really thought of everything in the studio, from a seemingly professional interior decoration to great bath products to a little treat and yogurt in the fridge. Location-wise, it was a relatively long walk or 3-5 min away from Clifton and Camps bay and 10 min drive away from city center.
Great place to stay! Would defenetely stsy here again!

Dear Richenda!
Thank you for a wonderful time in your apartment. I enjoyed the stay very much. Your attention to all details, the design of the apartment and your service was wonderful and perfect. I felt like I was at home! I will come back.
Many thanks for everything!!!
Ben
Great place! We would definitely recommend staying here- Lawrence and the whole staff at the complex were wonderful.

Central Location - Great Place - beautifully designed flat - lots of awesome and individual art. Lawrence is a an excellent host - whenever you need support or help : he is available anytime .
Thank you so much , A + C
Amazing stay in Lawrence s appartment, perfectly located, good decoration and a very welcoming host with good tips on how to best enjoy CT. Thank you Lawrence
Great place on the very popular Long Street in Cape Town.  Easy access to many attractions.  Courteous and flexible host.

Highly recommendable modern, stylish and cozy apartment centrally located on Long Street where planty of restaurants, bars, clubs are located. Although located close to the nightlife, the apartment is very quiet and safe. We felt at home from the beginning and Lawrence is the perfect host! THANKS!!!

Brilliant location with good restaurants (great recommendations from Lawrence) and close to main attractions. We walked back to the flat from Table Mountain quite easily - the other direction, all uphill, we took an Uber.  Super clean and well appointed. Very comfortable. Attentive and responsive but not intrusive host. A great place to stay.
Lawrence was waiting for us when we arrived and served us tasty gin and tonics! We were very happy with the entire stay of 3 days.

Highly recommendable, very clean, comfortable and cozy appartment. Centrally located close to plenty of restaurants, cafes and main attractions. Parking garage is a big plus. Lawrence is the perfect host and makes you feel home right from the start. Thank you very much for having us!

Excellent position between the extremely alive Long Street and Kloof street. The place was very nice , clean and fully furnished. We did not miss anything. For sure a place I could come back with pleasure
Excellent apartment, host, location. Couldn't be better for a stay in Cape Town.

Can't find a better place. Just as picturesque as the photos with spectacular view of the harbor with Cafes, Restaurants and Delis nearby. Also only 5 minutes drive to the V&A waterfront. We have young kids so the lack of things to break was a relief (tho watch out for the open kitchen and semi open bathroom in the master bedroom). Front window have plastic bars on them to prevent kids climbing out and ventilation slots in the back means constant fresh air flowing through. Sunset views are also spectacular, just the kind of sunset that inspires great masterpieces.

the area is of a leisure type, very secured by the sea. The apt is front to the sea, big windows, we enjoyed its location very much.
Georgi and her father were in contact with us as needed, very nice people.

This beautiful apartment is as described, with beautiful views from both bedrooms and the living room.   It is very newly modernized so is very clean and fresh, without any kind of clutter.   It is beautifully positioned for both business and leisure.   Is is possibly not suited to you if your idea of a holiday is to sit around a braai (barbecue) but with a modern kitchen which also enjoys a view, and every type of imaginable restaurant within walking distance, this is a fabulous spot for modern convenience.

Georgi made me feel very welcome, and this place is fantastic. Modern, clean and right on the water front. I couldn't have been happier with the place and can recommend it highly. Hopefully I can return before too long.
The apartment is beautiful, clean, modern and unique. Breathtaking views with an air of luxury! Highly recommend.
Lovely apartment, perfect location. New, clean and modern.
Great location, great view! Georgi was quick to respond to any messages.

kommunikation war super.
lage sehr gut, und sicher. lokale in unmittelbarer nähe. wohnung sehr schön.
pool etwas enttäuschend.
Beautiful views and a lovely place to stay at. Will be back.

Lovely beach house.
Cozy house.
Loved the view.
Georgi was extremely helpful.

This is a great spot across the street from the ocean and centrally located! A lovely apartment with clean design but still quite cozy and comfortable.
Jana was very easy to communicate with and very accommodating. A super star host!
I would definitely recommend this to any visitor of Cape Town!

We (two friends and I) loved this modern and clean apartement. The location is within walking distance of the waterfront and some nice restaurant. The sea is just on the opposite site.
Jana was a perfect host and answered to all our messages and questions within minutes.

Very easy to communicate with Jana.  The property was even better than the photos.  Everything you need is catered for.  Quiet area, and yet in the middle of everything you need and need to go to. You can not get a better location.

We stayed for almost 10 days at Jana's very nicely renovated apt. in mouille point, Cape Town. The apt. is exactly as descried and shown in the photos. modern, very clean, nicely renovated, fully equipped. We enjoyed ourselves a lot there. The location is great, mouille point is a nice area of Cape Town, few mins walking from the famous  V&A Waterfront, few mins driving from the great Cape Town beaches as Clifton and Camp's Bay, few mins driving from the city Centre too. very central indeed. The area is also very safe and parking is very easy. As for the host, Jana is a very nice person, very helpful and always there if you need anything. She makes sure that things are fine and checks if we need any help. she is ALWAYS available on her phone for any tips or requests. She is awesome. I'm sure we'll stay at her place again when coming back to Cape Town :) I strongly recommend staying at her place.
The apartment is conveniently located and an exact replica of the photos posted, if not better!!
Very good location and spotlessly clean.
Our stay in Jana's Flat was just perfect!
Modern, clean and beautifully located. Everything is carefully arranged to make one stay as comfortable as possible.

Great location within walking distance from the waterfront.  Super modern super clean apartment with great decor and all amenities and Jana is very friendly and welcoming.  It's thumbs up all around 👍
Amazing place, really enjoyed it. Will stay there again.

As previous residents of Hout Bay we were so happy to be back and Colettes cottage met our expectations. We really are thankful for coming across her listing! The design of the cottage is well-thought and spacious. So happy with our stay we have extended it to another few days. Colette has been willing to accommodate us with any queries. Thanks so much.

Colletes place is worth visiting. Beautiful mountain views and quiet neighborhood.
Host is helpful, responsive and very friendly. Sending my best wishes to Collete and saying big thank you for amazing time at her studio :)

Everything about Blackwood is exceptional - the studio itself, which is beautiful; the welcome from Colette; the view...oh my word the view...I just adored it and I will never stay anywhere else in Cape Town ever again (if it's available that is!).

My advice to you all: you will have the best time at Blackwood. It's an absolute beauty. And enjoy the shower ;-)

We had wonderful stay in the wooden cottage in a quiet neighbourhood in Hout Bay. Nice mountain views from the sundeck. Table mountain, Kirstenbosch Botanical Garden, Constantia vinyards and V&A waterfront are easy to reach by car. Highly recommended!

The cabin is great -- not too far from anything, save and easy. It's a little tucked away up a hill, so finding it for the first time can be a little tricky or for uber drivers but has great views and is everything you need.
What a wonderful little piece of heaven! The cabin was so beautiful and we really loved the quietness and beautiful views!
Highly recommended and we will defs be back :)

The studio is beautifully designed and with an incredible view. So relaxing to come back to after a day of adventuring. It is very well stocked with all cutlery and with a very clean and new kitchen.
Colette was very helpful and friendly, and offered us excellent advice for Cape Town and the rest of our trip.
We couldn't imagine a better base from which to explore the Cape Town area.

Die Blackwood Hütte war sehr schön um die Abende ruhig zu entspannen. Genauso haben wir uns das vorgestellt. Abends in der Badewanne mit ein, zwei Weingläsern sitzen und einfach die Ruhe auf sich wirken lassen. Morgens mit einem unglaublichen Blick auf die Rückseite des Tafelberg Mountain Parks. Sehr, sehr schön!
Alles ist sehr sicher und man fühlt sich nicht eine Sekunde beobachtet. Alles ist sehr ruhig gelegen. Die Kommunikation mit Colette erfolgt ausschließlich über Airbnb oder WhatsApp, was aber für uns kein Problem ist, weil wir gerne die Zweisamkeit genießen. Der "Housekeeper", den wir zur Schlüsselübergabe kennenlernen könnten wirkte sehr schüchtern, aber überaus sympathisch. Im Großen und Ganzen war es sehr schön! Volle Punktzahl! 5 Sterne!

Appartement sublime, avec une vue superbe. Entre la vie, le charme intérieur et la baignoire encastrée, on peut en profiter ! On est déçus de n'y être restes que 2 nuits!
Le logement est bien indépendant, et Colette répond par téléphone,SMS ou mail.
Et le prix est top

Saul was very welcoming, we immediately felt at home at his place. There was enough privacy and space for us during our one week stay. We really loved Sea Point, Saul's place is near the beach and great places to eat. We loved the fact that we could make use of the pool in the garden and the braai! The bed was a bit small, which wasn't a problem for us, but could be for people who need their space while sleeping :). We couldn't have had a better host or place to stay to round up our 3 weeks in South Africa.
Saul was a very welcoming host. We had a great stay. The place is very well stocked for holiday makers, beach toys inclusive. He also had a bus card we could borrow which saved us some money.

Saul made us feel very welcome from the get-go. Yet, he was able to be so discreet and give us all the privacy we needed. The accomodation was really comfortable, and Saul has whatever you need for self catering and kicking back to relax. The accomodation is just off Beach Road and a few minutes walk from the beautiful Atlantic seaboard. I would certainly go back again!

Saul was a fantastic host, made us feel right at home in SA! Location is amazing- block away from the ocean and 15 min or so walk to Clifton Beach. House has everything you need (beach towels, coffee). The cottage was very clean and updated. Saul was super responsive and a wonderful host! We would 100 percent book this airbnb again and recommend it to anyone visiting cape town.

We had a very good time at Saul's place. The cottage is located next to the main house. The Location is excellent (near to the sea and near to the Shops at Main Road). Saul is a nice guy, very helpful and easy-going. It's absolutely recommendable to stay at thias place if you are in cape town.

Great place to stay with close access to the city and main areas.Very comfortable and accurate description of the place. Saul went above what is expected and we were welcomed with two bottles of wine which was much needed after our flight and also provided two mycity bus cards which was very useful.Overal great stay.

Ideal for a solo traveler or couple. The cottage is clean, sunlit and quiet. It's location could not be better. 50 meters from the beach and steps away from cool cafes, restaurants and shopping centers in seapoint.
Saul is incredibly friendly helpful and responsive. He thought of everything. The flat is fully equipped, from shampoo to groceries to cleaning products.
The cottage is located behind the main house which has a pool and garden.

We have spent 5 incredible days at Sauls place, really enjoying it.
The location spot within the area of Seapoint is just perfect. It is right next to the beach and close to plenty of restaurants, supermarkets and nice cafe's.
Next to the House is a Bus stop for the Red Touri Bus, which takes you through the whole Peninsula area. Normal transportation like the MyCity Bus is also closely available on the main road.

The location itself is exactly like on the pictures, very clean, filled with everything that you need including Beach equipment. Saul is a very kind, helpful and cool host, who takes good care of his guests.
Highly recommendable !

Saul ist ein grandioser Gastgeber. Die Unterkunft ist ein idealer Ausgangspunkt um Capetown u Umgebung zu erkunden. Wenige Schritte und man hat Alles vor Ort für den täglichen Bedarf oder auch den großartigen Sunset in Seapoint. Das Cottage liegt geschützt von der Straße u definitiv waren die Möwen zu hören - eben Seapoint ... absolut zu empfehlen.
Saul is a great host. The flat is very nice and we loved his two cats tiger and bella :)

What an awesome awesome awesome place. It's so intimate, and that view has to hands down be the best way to wake up!
Jani was such a great host. The room was so clean, well stocked, and just perfect. She mentioned a problem with the WiFi, but as I didn't need it, or DSTV, I was extremely satisfied. I had such a lovely time!
Jani was incredibly accommodating and hospitable! Allowed me to drop my bag off early and had a nice little spread of fruits and sweets waiting for me when I arrived

We found the host very kind and helpful. The room was impeccably cleaned, and the fridge had yummy snacks including a bottle of wine.
However, the place is too small for self-catering. We advise anybody who goes there, not to take any heavy luggage, as there are a few stairs to climb.
The studio is small, but has a very beautiful view and is well situated. Jani is a great host! It was very easy to arrange things with her and she was very helpful. I will definitely be back!
Love this place with an amazing view and super service by the hosts. Reccomend to everyone

Jani and Paddy were wonderful - so kind and welcoming and attentive. The location could not be better - restaurants and shops nearby, an easy walk to town, buses to the beaches, and an easy drive to get further afield. And waking up each morning to the views of Lions Head made this an unforgettable experience. Thank you!

We had a great stay at Jani's place! When you open the front door of the building, you are literally on Cape Town's doorstep. The views are spectacular and even though the space is small, it has everything you might need. It is clean, welcoming and we even had the cats come round to say hi!
Perfectly located for exploring Cape Town. Beautiful view.
Great place. Highly recommend
The home is beautiful. Breathtaking view. Warmest of hosts. More than I anticipated. Highly recommend. I'm returning to it for the rest of my stay.

A truly wonderful spot. Breathtaking views, charming and a warm and hospitable host. More beach shack than hotel but if you're looking to swing in a hammock whilst you take in some of the best views in false bay, this is the spot.

Awesome, Cosy, romantic little cottage with sea views that take your breath away and send you into dream land. If you looking for the perfect getaway then this is a must! We will be back again and again!!!

A beautiful location, view & experience. Quaint, simple cottage nestled on the cliff face .... crazy views .... amazing sunrises....close to kalk bay restaurants & fishhoek beach. will definitely visit again.....

This is the perfect couples getaway. You'll feel like you're a million miles from civilization, surrounded by sea views and the sound of the ocean. The cabin itself is well looked after and has everything you need. Utah was an amazing host, super friendly and always available when needed.
Great spot for a weekend getaway. The views are incredible. The stairs take some getting used to but it's worth it for the view.
Amaaaazing, the view is breathtaking, you should just GO !!!

Wonderful view and the long walk down the stairs really helps to make it feel quite remote. Could do with a couple more creature comforts (not geared for cooking up a storm) but a cosy stay for 2. Lovely walk to the beach for a swim.
Great place if you want to stay in what feels like a secluded house to relax in. The walk down to the house is quite steep and long so pack two smaller bags instead of one large bag.
This place is such a gem! If you have come across this house on Airbnb, your decision should be made. Out of a dream!!!!
Lovely cottage with fantastic views.  Cosy and very nice seating areas inside and out where you can see the sea. Lots of steep steps but this is a small price to pay for the view.

Paul est L' hôte parfait : prévenant, disponible, convivial!
Il avait tout prévu pour notre arrivée : boissons, fruits, gâteaux...des petites attentions qui font toute la différence. De plus, la maison est très sympa, décorée avec goût avec des vues époustouflantes sur la mer et la montagne. Superbe séjour!

We spent eight nights at the Mountain House and it was a memorable experience. The property is truly unique – beautifully decorated, equipped well beyond expectation and with remarkable views of both the coast and mountains of Cape Town. The Mountain House is also perfectly located to enjoy the very best of the city, whether that be the bustle of Camps Bay or the trails of Table Mountain just behind the house. It’s also the ideal place too to relax around the pool and the perfect setting for ‘sundowners’. Paul was a fantastic host throughout, answering any questions we had in advance, and we cannot wait to return to the Mountain House soon.

Paul has hands down, created the best Airbnb experience I've ever seen. The place is amazing, and he is an incredible host:
Paul was quick in getting back and super accommodating to any requests and questions before and after our arrival.
The house was fully stacked including wine, some fruit, cookies and organic South African shower products.
The mountain house itself is tastefully decorated, with a lot attention to detail. The view is breathtaking and out of this world, it feels like you are in real life photoshop. We've seen the endless ocean, the stars at night, the sun going down right in front of us, the 12 apostles to the left and the table mountain und lion's head to the right, an entire rainbow (from one end to another basically), a cloud below us covering the shore beneath us - so yeah, it was pretty much out of this world. I can't imagine a better place to stay when you are visiting Cape Town!
The House was amazing and Paul was very friendly! I need to come back soon.
An awesome home away from home. Fantastic view, warm welcome and looking forward to visiting again very soon!

This is truly the mountain house!! I've never seen views and a sunset quite like what we experienced here... To be seen to be believed!
The decor is luxurious and very comfortable.
This place is full of cape town's magic in every way - wrapped in mountains and ocean... We'll never forget it!

The views really are as spectacular as on the listing. Very nice deck with pool. House is spacious and well equipped in all aspects incl kitchen and laundry. The loft bedroom was a favorite.
Convenient location to both Camps Bay Strip and Kloof Street restaurants (about 15 minutes by Uber).
Mountain House owner runs a restaurant on Kloof Street that is highly recommended for food and atmosphere.
The driveway is quite steep but can and should be tackled in a compact car. Would not recommend for families with very young children due to the balcony and pool. Adults and teens no problem.

This house has a view that is unreal - Table Mountain and the ocean below. Paul has decorated it in a funky, electic style.  The pool is lovely, and we enjoyed eating sinner out on the terrace one night under the stars.  Paul was very helpful before and during our stay.

Paul was the perfect host, great communicator and the house is simply stunning - the pics are great but don't do it justice. Stunning views, easy to get around into town and the house has everything you need for a perfect stay. Would definitely stay here again!!

Amazing house and host! Paul gave us a lot tips to what to do and where to eat! The only thing it is really trick the driveway but besides that the house is so beautiful and cozy, we didn't wanna leave.
We felt very welcome!
Kevin and Liesel, thank you for such a wonderful weekend stay. What a beautiful quite spot you have got. The sunsets are amazing from this entire apartment. Definitely worth a visit!

Kevin was a great host, he offered us the breakfast and was very easy to communicate with. The housing was cosy, convenient and the view was great. I could recommend it to anyone. Suitable for 2 ou 3 persons.
Very nice and clean place. We can definitely recommend! Kevin is a very friendly and helpful host.

Liesel and Kevin were fantastic hosts. They gave us the exact amount of privacy coupled with caring and non intrusive help and hospitality.

Their spot has everything you need for a relaxed get away and we particularity enjoyed our braai's on the deck every night. What we also must commend them on is their conscious living philosophy - we could recycle our waste, feed the chickens our organic matter and pick fresh herbs from their garden.

We already miss the sunsets and the comfy bed which is a treat to nap on with the doors wide open and the cool Kommetjie air blowing through,
Comfy, beautiful scenery from room & great awesome helpful hosts!
Very friendly hosts. Didn't get to see them a lot because we were out most of the time, but very friendly.

If youre looking for a quiet retreat away from the city but not too far from everything else, this is the perfect location. Liesel was friendly, caring and lovely! She gave us great advices on what was around and what we should do during our two days stay. The place is actually a part of their home but you will have your own gate with a parking place for your car and you are in no way disturbed by the family's daily activities. It is very quiet, its only residential around. Clean, the host really puts attention to the details to what you'd need during your stay with coffee/tea/homemade biscuit/spring water/towels etc. It is the perfect location if youre thinking about driving to the cape of good hope and boulders beach. There is Noordhoek village nearby where we had excellent tapas, we went there for dinner.. and breakfast!!! On thursdays, there is cape vineyard market which is a must go! I think ive pretty much said everything, so dont hesitate to book ;) !
Absolutely beautiful place to stay, great communication which made check in easy and Liesel took the time to provide helpful recommendations and directions for things in the local area.

Best place for a glass of wine at the bbq watching sunset from the decking.
What a stunning little place.
Definitely worth revisiting.
our holiday was made perfect thanks to an incredible host and the most AMAZING, romantic, Cosy cottage with views that take your breath away! We will be back again and again! x
A wonderful place, with a view to die for. Close enough to get to the shops, secluded enough for peace and tranquility. Highly recommended!!

A rustic wooden cottage perched on the side of a hill overlooking the sea. Bedroom has a double bed and linen with cupboards and shelving for your clothes. The availability of a washing machine, iron and ironing board was nice. The upstairs loft has two single mattresses on the floor - so more for children than adults. Mattresses are in the very very firm category. There is an open-plan lounge/dining/kitchen area with a comfortable sofa and cushioned window-seats overlooking the ocean. Very relaxing but a bit scarey when the wind got up! The bathroom has a small shower cubicle with amazing pressure - what a pleasure. The kitchen is adequately outfitted with gas/electric cooker, small microwave, fridge/freezer, pots and pans, cutlery, crockery and glasses - so no need to bring anything extra. Because of the situation, I feel the cottage is only for the reasonably fit with strong nerves - steep climb down ( and back up!) with very little in the way of handrails. Not for small children. Not for the elderly. Not for anyone with vertigo. We loved our stay.

We had an amazing week in Fish Hoek & Cape Peninsula and loved Uta's place. It was closed enough to center and far  enough to have a quiet, relaxing holiday. House has an amazing view and especially if you are fan of waking up early and watching the sun rise, words are not enough!!! Beautiful, comfortable and family friendly, transportation is easy via train and taxis are OK. Location is ideal if you like the country side, swimming and close to beautiful villages like Muizenberg and Simons Town. I would highly recommend to families with kids.
Amazing find! The view is fantastic! Great place to unwind

we had a wonderful time at the cottage and enjoyed both staying home and the trips to cape town and the beaches. the view is the most beautiful i know, just water whatever window you look out. there is a train but i think you shout have a car when you stay at this place. we went with our 5 year old who loved it a lot too. 100% recommended!

Geweldig beachhouse. Fantastisch uitzicht. Niet geschikt voor gezinnen met kleine kinderen of ouderen, die slecht ter been zijn. Er is namelijk een behoorlijke trap naar beneden..., maar dat maakt de locatie niet minder bijzonder!!!

It was just perfect.
It's an oasis to relax and Rita is super friendly.
Amazing

Wunderschönes, ruhig gelegenes Haus mit einem traumhaften Ausblick!!
Richtig gut zum entspannen!
Wundervoll wenn man vorm einschlafen das Meeresrauschen hören kann !!
Würden sehr gerne wieder kommen!
We only stayed for one night, but the place made us want to stay longer. Wonderful view and the house made us relax immediately. We will for sure go back.
Confort cosy and amazing view from the balcony !
The place was sensational. Safe, secure, and a view to die for. Very large terrace overlooking the best beaches Africa has to offer! Our host was very accommodating and helpful.
Great place and amazing views of the beautiful clifton beaches. Superb location. Lovely hosts
Great place with an amazing view!

It’s an amazing , very cute penthouse apartment in a prime Clifton location with stunning views on the beach and the ocean with amazing sunsets!!
Will definitely come back to this place when I am in Capetown next time !!!

Great location! Steps to Clifton beaches. Beautiful ocean views from every part of the apartment. It’s a bit on the small size but the patio and bedroom are good size with a king bed. Xiaoyu was a great host and showed us around and also provided some great tips for the area. Oh and be prepared to carry your luggage up some narrow stairs.
Couples paradise NOW engaged

Xiaoyu is the most amazing, thoughtful, responsive host there is. As for the apartment, there is only one word: wow. It is everything you see in the pictures and even more. Get ready for a mindblowing 360-degree view over all Clifton beaches and Lion's Head, probably the best view you could have in all of the neighborhood. We will keep the memory of that view forever.
The place itself was perfect, spotlessly clean, with unobstructed ocean views from every window, and the sound of the waves to rock you to sleep.
Also, having a parking spot is a huge plus, since parking is an absolute nightmare in the area.
We really hope to be back in Cape Town and if we do, we will most definitely ask to stay in this apartment again! Thank you again, Xiaoyu.
Xiaos apartment has a stunning View with easy access to the beach. The apartment is quite small but lovely with an amazing balcony with a nice BBQ. Xiao was a lovely host!
We loved this place!!!!

Joshua's probably the epitome of what an Air BnB Host can possibly be - Great house, Great service and much much more. Joshua got us breakfast while we waited to be checked in. Him and Lin, gave us the best suggestions of places to go out - we knew from the second we had walked into the house and met the lovely hosts that we got so god damn lucky. A friend of mine had even left a few things at the flat and they mailed it back to us. The flat is super modern and a perfect place for travellers of any kind.
Would definitely be back to Cape Town, and would 100% stay at this place.

Throughout our travels this has to be the best accommodation and value for money by far. Joshua's hospitality goes beyond and he is such a phenomenal host, constantly checking up and making sure that everything is going smoothly. No shortcuts have been taken from architecture to finishes in this apartment - only the best is supplied, truly making it a 5 star experience! I would highly recommend this apartment as it is central and very secure. You cannot go wrong with a host like Joshua.

Very well equipped flat in a great location. It's an ideal base from which to explore the restaurants and bars of Long St and Bree St. The place had everything we needed and the host was friendly and very helpful. Thanks, Joshua!

The accommodation was fantastic.  It was well equipped and Joshua has thought of just about everything to make your stay luxurious and enjoyable.  Restaurants and night life are within walking distance and catching an Uber from outside was quick and easy.

This place is exquisite. My sister and I stayed here for 8 nights and did not want to leave - it actually made our stay in Cape Town better. Joshua's place is as described and seen in the pictures. All the rooms are beautiful. With it being recently renovated, everything is brand new and high-end. The flat is extremely modern and luxurious - like something out of a magazine. It's super spacious and comfortable. The location is ideal - central to all restaurants, cafes and nightlife - yet very quiet and peaceful, thanks to the double-glazed windows. We both slept like babies our entire stay. The host Joshua went out of his way to be helpful and accommodating - we had a late check-in, but he waited up for us to show us around in person, and explain how everything worked and where to park in our private bay etc. He was extremely helpful and quick to respond whenever we needed anything. We asked for a couple of items, and he immediately went out and bought them, and delivered them straight to the flat that night. The cleaner, Velmar, was brilliant. She cleaned the place beautifully and washed and pressed our clothes whenever required. Overall I could not recommend this place highly enough. It's extremely good value for money. I'm back in Cape Town at some point this year and will look no further than this place. I can't wait to return.

We had an amazing stay in this modern, central and stunning apartment. The apartment is even more amazing and beautiful than the pictures show! Joshua was a very helpful host and only a phone call away, no matter what time of the day it was. He made sure that we had a pleasant stay and had good contact with us throughout our week. The housekeeper did an amazing job as well and was also extremely helpful. The apartment was well equipped  and of very high class. Every detail was carefully thought out. The building is located in the city centre of Cape Town, close to everything. Will surely return when coming back to Cape Town.
