Joshua is a fantastic host - very passionate about providing a high-quality experience and very attentive to detail. I traveled with a group of four, and we highly enjoyed our staff due in no small part to our fantastic host, reliable Wi-Fi, and full scale kitchen. I highly recommend.

The stay at the flat was amazing! The flat is exactly like this in the photos, new, stylish and comfortable. Joshua is the best host I could wish for, extremely polite and solicitous, always ready to help us with directions to programs and restaurants in Capetown. Sure, when I get back to Capetown, I'll be staying at Joshua's flat. Highly recommend

The only word to describe this apartment is immaculate! The best appliances & furniture,  quality bed & linens,it's perfection. The location was perfect, easy safe strolls to Loop & Bree Streets, Company Gardens & amenities such as pharmacy & groceries. The building is modern & very secure. Nothing was a problem for Joshua who was super easy to communicate with. Will be staying here again for sure!
Joshua's place is super clean and at a very convenient location.  Not only the place is great but the host is beyond our expectations.  He is kind and caring which made us feel so special.
For my first AirBnB,, this was absolutely perfect, the location, the building, the finishes and ofcourse the host ensured my stay was excellent and comfortable👌🏾

O Craig foi super atencioso e amigável. A localização é perfeita para quem quer ficar no city centre, a rua tem bares e restaurantes excelentes, Da pra fazer tudo a pé, é uma ótima opção.
Os principais pontos turísticos são Greemarket, e o Museu Iziko que tem um jardim incrível. E ao lado do studio estão as casinhas coloridas super conhecidas (Boo-Kap).A vista da sacada que da para a Table Montain é linda o estádio é super confortável e tem tudo o que você precisa para sua acomodação.. Super recomendo!
Highly recommend this location in the future! Really great communication and friendliness.

Great location and great top floor flat with a good view of table mountain. The flat is designed beautifully with a touch of minimalism. Craig is a great host, he is very responsive and provided very clear instructions for check in and house rules. This is a little gem in the central where many bars and restaurants are close by. Highly recommended.
This apartment was fantastic for our time in Cape Town.  It is centrally located with great restaurants and bars nearby.  The apartment was exactly as pictured and the view is amazing!

Craig's is awesome. Perfect & central location. As people who lived in Cape Town for 3yrs and now only visit we could not ask for a better location in Cape Town. Will definitely make use of it again. Communication & check-in was effortless.

Well located apartment. Very convenient to discover th city, close to Bo Kaap and Long Street. Friendly and helpful staff in the building. Craig was really easy to reach and answered our questions in a very short time ! The flat is beautiful, with very modern equipments and a great view to Table Mountain. Would definitely recommend staying there.
Just as advertised, perfect one-room apartment as central as can be. Very enjoyable, good communication and flexible host.
The place was awesome, has a spectacular view, and is central to everything you would want to do. It was perfect and would definitely be our choice for lodging next time we are in Cape Town.
Forget One&Only Resort& every other place. This apartment is just stunning. Clean, stylish and contemporary. Location is perfect full of restaurants and activities. Enjoy CPT

Very quiet and comfortable. Sit on the patio and watch the sunset. Martin was very accommodating and helpful!
Highly recommended!
Great location, clean apartment with amazing views into Camps Bay. Communication with the owner was good for any teething problems...

This apartment is awesome; spacious and perfect for a getaway in beautiful Camps Bay. It is a lovely 10-15 minute walk down to the beach and shops or grab an Uber if you want to be quicker. Martin is a super host and will look after you! Thanks again Martin for a great week away!

Apartment is spacious and secure.  Very comfortable to relax after a day of hiking, or watching a sunset on the porch.  Great value in a great location and can't wait to come back next year!  Thanks so much!

Martin and Katja did a very good job. The appartement is in walking distance to the Camps Bay beach. The kitchen could be much better equipped compared to other houses or appartements. No coffee machine!

This location was key! Very safe, close to all adventures, an amazing view and just a pleasant home. Martin communicated very efficiently and also suggested great activities for me and my friends, very personable- I wish he can host all my Airbnb stays! Overall, one of my favorite experiences with Airbnb.
Awesome place. Very well maintained. Great view from the balcony. Loved our stay. Will come back definitely.
Value for money, magnificent view, well communication

The place is fantastic. Close to the beach (a bit of exercise on the way back if you walk down - an opportunity I definitely took) and shops. The view from the balcony is awesome. Martin and Katja, thanks for the restaurants and attractions tips. We really enjoyed our stay. A place I would definitely recommend.
A beautiful scenic  place .Views of mountains at one side and ocean at other was breath taking.Our host was very sweet .Hope to visit again .

A hidden gem not too far from the city. Tranquil little cabin in a stunning setting overlooking the vineyards. The perfect little retreat for two - with no distractions (no TV etc) besides the sights and sounds of nature. A great host and quaint well-equipped accommodation! Loved that it is so central to Constantia with east access to local wine farms and great restaurants.
What an amazing gem in the heart of Cape Town. Absolutely amazing♡♡♡

What a stunning little getaway spot! Hosted by the farm manages of Buitenverwachting who lived on the estate for over 20 years, the welcome and background stories of their family home memories are awesome! A perfect little nested wooden hut, incredible views and in the heart of the Constantia wine route. We'll be back very soon. Thanks for hospitality Daniela and family.

It's a nice cozy cottage. Can experience the real wine farm life. Highly recommended and will come again if have chance.
地方非常不错，虽然小但是该有的都有了。很干净。可以看到酒庄里工人生活的日常。
I love the stay. The host was so nice and open and we had this amazing view among the wine farms and the city definitely come back here :-)
The cottage is lovely and the hosts are very, very friendly. I had a great time.
Absolutely love this spot♡♡♡
A very cute, cozy and clean little spot with lovely hosts and magic views.

What a beautiful setting and a beautiful space. We felt like we were transported to the land of vineyards and we loved it! Peter, Sharon and Daniela were all so friendly and showed us around which was particularly lovely. The coffee at the local roastery was delicious... as well as the wine!! Will definitely be coming back and recommending to friends and family!
Faultless with a fantastic location and extremely thoughtful.
This is an incredible spot. The place is beautifully laid out, and the hospitality is perfect. A great place to relax and unwind. A sleepy town with incredible scenery!

Great option if you're seeking a reserved and 'away from the crowds' place to stay in Cape Town. Highly recommended.
Cottage is beautiful, perfect to accomodate a couple with a baby.
Fantastic clean modern apartment, with nice stylish touches and all the mod cons you would need.Highly recommended.

Lovely, tastefully equipped little gem. Everything as described, really safe, very good communication.
Close to the beach and perfect for starting some tours through the southern cape peninsula.
Highly recommend this place.
Empfehlenswert
Chanel’s place was great. Her local tips really made the trip and she was so responsive to all my small continuous queries!

This cottage is a perfect place to sit back and relax. Situated in Klein Slangkop and just a minutes walk to the beach, it offers everything if you're looking for a spot close to natural conditions.
The cottage is beautifully designed and Chanel was a great host, also offering us the possibility of a late check-out which allowed us to enjoy even more of the cape region.
We definitely recommend this place and would be more than happy to go back someday! Thank you, Chanel!
We had a great time and can’t wait to come back!
Lovely relaxing weekend away
Loved our stay at Chanel’s place! Beautifully (and functionally!) designed and furnished. Safe and friendly neighbourhood, very close to the beach. Would definitely stay here again! X
Betina was great and accomadation to our needs. Great host.

I only met Betina once, since she had to go abroad. But she took all the time I needed to help me get aquatinted. After that her husband Wynand was a big help and always available when I needed help.
It is a wonderful neighbourhood with one of the loveliest breakfast places right around the corner. I will definitely stay here next time I visit Cape Town. The area is beautiful, the apartment wonderful and it is really close to the city. If you want a peaceful and quiet place with good access to the city, this is the place to stay in.

The apartment is very clean, cosy and comfortable - perfect for one or for a couple. The location is very good and there are some nice restaurants and cafes quite near (try Melissa's). Whilst I did not meet Betina in person her communication was excellent. Her husband greeted me and was available for any questions etc. The housekeeper was also on hand and was a very sweet lady! All in all this is indeed a gem of a place!
Betina is a wonderful host and her apartment is lovely. We enjoyed our stay.
Betinas place was perfect! It was much better than i expected and her family were so kind and nice:)
Betina est une hôte agréable et disponible. Très bon séjour. Petites attentions agréables. / Betina is a great and nice person. There were nice attentions.
Great accommodation, easy private access to the apartment, stylishly designed, in beautiful Newlands. Fast wifi and all hotel amenities(Coffee machine, fridge, aircon,..) one needs for a trip.
The whole experience was amazing. Did not manage to talk to Betina as much but she was very welcoming and helpful. A great host and would love to come again.

Great place to stay in Cape Town - very centrally located with some really good restaurants in the vicinity. We didn't meet Betina but everything was very well organised. We particularly appreciated the little extras - a bowl of fruit, great coffee machine and the very yummy oat biscuits!

Perfect location, perfect accommodation, superb attention to detail, the fruit, milk and nesspreso coffee was very much welcome. If your looking for a clean very comfortable excellent value  stay in the newlands area then you've found the right place
Great place to stay in a lovely quiet area. Very warm host. Makes for a pleasant and cozy stay.

We do stay a lot in AirBnBs - but Pam's place is an outstanding one. It is said to be a room only but it is almost like a lil apartment with kitchen and private bathroom - and a private entrance. We had to work quite a lot so we did not see each other much, but Pam and her family were super welcoming and nice, even offered us a beer. And we loved the dogs <3 we would stay again and recommend everyone to do so.
Our stay at Pam´s Flat was awesome! Pam is such a lovely person and we had a wonderful time there. We would anytime come back to that place.

A wonderful and fully equipped, secluded flat! Pam provided us with all the essentials and the space was lovely and clean. The neighborhood is close to many restaurants, grocery stores, and a nice park. We had a great stay!
Pam's place was lovely and neat exactly what we saw on the site was what we got. We highly recommend it.
Writing on behalf of my mom who stayed there. She said she had a lovely experience. The place was well located, the room was comfortable and clean. Pam was a great host. Thanks Pam!

Kind and welcoming hosts! We loved staying at Pam & Fraser's airbnb. Felt like a small flat, with all the essentials included and a gorgeous view of Table Mountain to wake up to each morning! Comfortable bed and plenty of space for two people. Would highly recommend.

Pam and Fraser were wonderful hosts. They were very helpful in all possible ways and even managed to find a place for me to practice the piano ! Couldn't possibly expect more!
Their studio is very nice and comfortable, and the area they live in is very nice and quiet.
It's a perfect spot to enjoy Capetown to its best, as long as you have a car to go downtown and visit around.
I strongly recommend them!
Just what I needed for a few nights in Cape Town
This gem is exactly what you see in the photos - neat, stylish, and very central location. Definitely recommended!

This is a great airbnb apartment and the apartment looks just like the pictures. It was fully stocked and a perfect place to stay for my trip. There was parking in building and the apartment is walking distance to restaurants and nightlife in Waterkant. Definitely recommended.

Michael was great, he met me at the garage and showed me our parking place inside the building. The security is good so its unlikely anybody not connected with the houses at the complex will get in.
The apartment matches the picture exactly and for 1 person on business for a few days it was ideal.
A no brainer if you are looking for a place to stay in central CT
Place was great! Very central, clean and well appointed. Michael was very responsive and considerate. Will definitely stay here again!
Michael's flat is fantastic. Really well equipped and in an ideal location. His communication was great with prompt responses to my questions. Highly recommended.
I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at Michaels place. The attention to detail, cleanliness and more. Everything was perfect and more than required. I will certainly look to stay there again
Clean, convenient, spacious and beautifully styled place.  Nespresso machine with capsules, need I say more!  Michael was exceptional in immediate communication, will definitely be back.
Great modern apartment, super central and close to both beaches and restaurants! Everything I need for a quick business stay!
This is a beautiful and comfortable apartment in an excellent location. The amenities are excellent with attention paid to all the small details.
Very secure and fantastically equipped, we'd stay here again in a heartbeat.
Amazing place nearby the waterfront. The place is really comfortable and cozy, and Michael is a great host! Totally recommended for any traveller
This is the most amazing place and you won't regret staying there. Nice person she is and amazing room :)
Absolutely amazing place with great hosts 👏🏼
Beautiful spacious very nice and clean room.
Awesome experience , beautiful views and lovely people
great place, neat and clean. Will definitely stay there again
Awesome Place to Be!! Will definitely recommend it! 5 Stars!!
Great place to stay. Lynn is a very friendly and helpful host.

The room is very spacious, and everything is of high quality. Wish we could have stayed longer to enjoy the view of the gholf course though. Maybe next time because this is a keeper we will definitely be back.
Great place to stay. Would recommend.
Beautiful modern, spacious room. Great place to stay
Perfect Bnb and a great host
Jo-Anne appartment was awesome.  Everything was according our needs and Jo-Anne is kind and so much helpful person.

Jo-Anne's place was perfect for us. It was quaint and made us feel right at home as it was nestled in a quiet neighborhood. Yet, it was still walking distance to town and beaches! Jo-Anne made check in and departure very simple, provided great nearby recommendations for activities and dining and was supremely friendly. She was so organized that there was a print out of instructions and nearby activities that was nicer than most hotels! She also stocked the refrigerator with milk, yogurt and muesli which made for a perfect breakfast before departing. Wish we could have stayed longer and would certainly plan to stay there again!

Un accueil très chaleureux, Jo-Anne a vraiment été disponible lorsqu'on en avait besoin. Le logement est super, propre petit mais très confortable et avec tout ce dont on peut avoir besoin dont des petits bonus (café, lait, thé, fruits, céréales, yahourt...) et aussi cartes, guides (réalisés par notre hôte) sur les incontournables des alentours de Simon's Town . Nous avons passé un agréable séjour, l'endroit est très calme et en plus nous avons pu voir des pingouins (grâce aux conseils de Jo-Anne) près de chez elle. Merci beaucoup Jo-Anne et aussi à son compagnon (qui parle un peu Français). Nous vous conseillons ce logement à 100% et qui est très bien situé pour visiter le Cap!
Perfect location and lovely place! Our best stop yet!

Perfect little place to stay to see Simon's Town. Short/safe walk to all of the wonderful restaurants the town has to offer. Only met Jo-Anne briefly as she was working, but Fred, her husband, checked us in and made sure we had everything, as well as giving us tips of where to go out and where to see. A perfect stay all round. Couldn't have asked for more for the price we paid. Thanks guys!!

Jo-Anne's place was an incredible gateway from the busy city center of Cape Town. Simons town is a lovely location and staying at Jo-Anne made it even better. Boulders beach is right down the road and there is always something to do. The hospitality was incredible and she and her husband were always willing to help us out. I really enjoyed my stay with them.

I highly recommend a stay here at Jo-anne's place. It is beautifully located, clean and comfortable. Jo-anne is an excellent host, very helpful and kind, giving wonderful advice on​ what to do in the area. Her place is stunning, easy to find and very functional. If we stay in Cape Town again we will be staying here! Thank you again to Jo-anne, and to future guests, enjoy!
Jo-Anne was very friendly and we enjoyed our stay in Simonstown!

Jo-Ann is very friendly and welcoming. She really makes an effort to ensure that you are comfortable. She also provides a booklet with some tips and useful information about Simonstown and she makes herself available whenever she is needed. The room is very cozy and warm. We had a great stay. It's definitely great value for money.

We had such a fabulous time, the apartment is absolutely stunning. It's very close to the waterfront, public transport and is very central to shops and markets. It's well-secured and located down a quiet street. There were some really fantastic restaurants located just opposite our apartment, this included one of the top African restaurants 'Gold' which was located just around the corner. I highly recommend this apartment for anyone. We look forward to returning

We had an amazing stay at Andre's place.
Such a cool and cozy apartment. The decor is exactly as per the photos.
Very clean and has all the amenities one could need.
Fast internet and Netflix was a bonus.
Centrally located and very safe.
Thanks!

Andre was an excellent host. He made sure that we had everything we needed and were ok at all times. The loft is beautiful, a bit chilly in winter, but the bedroom get a nice and cosy. It's centrally located and safe  so we easily walked to restaurants and anything else we needed.
Awesome spot
L'appartement était parfait et André a aussi été très bien niveau communication. Il se déplace en personne et prend le temps de tout nous expliquer.

Lovely and stylish apartment centrally located in Cape Town. The apartment was close to shops and restaurants and very convenient to walk to Long Street and the waterfront. The apartment was secure and set back from Somerset Street. Great place from which to explore Cape Town.

The apartment is conveniently close to V&A Waterfront. The amazing Beluga restaurant is just across the road! The apartment is modern with a spacious feel due to the elevated ceilings. There is a Nespresso machine, small fridge, oven/stovetop in the kitchen. However, there is not a microwave. Overall an amazing place with great hosts that communicate effectively.

This place was perfect! Beautiful and great value and there was great communication with the hosts.   It's on a quiet street and very well located with walking distance both to the cbd and the waterfront.  Highly recommended!

Our stay here was amazing!!! Andre was very accommodating to our check in and check out situations which was amazing and took the stress out of our travels.
The apartment is in a great location, only 5 minutes walk to the waterfront which was amazing and we went there everyday as there was lots to do! It is also a beautiful apartment, exactly like the photos
Such a beautiful place and such a great host! Would definitely recommend to anyone and everyone. Thanks Andre!!

Awesome apartment in Cape Town! Well designed, clean, equipped and in a great location. The place is very safe, with a private parking and 24hr security. Andre was very much available to assist us with every question.

Hi Julie and Andrew. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay...really convenient! Felt very secure and private. Great to be so centrally situated in Cape Town. Clean, new, contemporary decor and modern appliances.  We are assuming we may have been first of plenty guests to enjoy staying at your cottage!

This was truly one of the nicest places, we have ever stayed at!
100% private, incredibly cosy apartment, with numerous appliances and very comfy furniture, both upstairs and downstairs. The bed felt like a little piece of heaven and I also appreciated the variety in Twinging's Tea.
Wifi is slightly on the slower side, but they provide a premium DSTV experience, with tv's in both the bedroom and living room areas.
I would recommend to anyone!
Beautiful location, perfect for a couple and it truly felt like a second home.
You will definitely be seeing us again!

This is a gem of a place - tucked away in a quiet corner of Cape Town - it has boutique styling with all the latest mod cons. Beautifully presented throughout, the modern and stylish interior makes it the perfect place for a Cape Town getaway. It's also got the most comfortable bed I've ever slept in!
Julie and her family were the perfect hosts and only too ready to help. Can't recommend this apartment highly enough: pricing a stylish and contemporary place to stay while exploring everything that Cape Town has to offer
Beautiful place with a lot of greens. The cottage is very clean and safe. Julie and Andrew are also very friendly.
Perfect location for a visit to Cape Town. Beautifully decorated and furnished. Private and safe. We would highly recommend this to anyone!

The most gorgeous cottage, beautifully kitted out and perfectly situated for us. The actual by far exceeded the photos on the site and Julie is warm, efficient and open to any assistance required. Most comfortable bed ever and we won't be staying ANYWHERE else when we come to Cape Town again!!
Beautiful place; very modern and well ecquipped in a quiet and very scenic part of CapeTown. We loved our stay there and we'd love to go back.
It's a beautiful little cottage. Save place and good location to visit everything around capetown.
Convenient location, clean and comfortable. Highly recommended for visitors to Cape Town.

We absolutely loved staying in this flat!! Check-in was brilliant and efficient. Julie is very friendly and had organised everything perfectly, from tea to extra blankets for the bed.
The cottage itself is very modern, clean and the bed is extremely comfortable. It's located behind their house and in a lovely neighbourhood - very safe, quiet and convenient!!
You have your own driveway and entrance so you have complete privacy. I highly, highly recommend!!!

The flat is just the way it seems in the pictures: beautiful, large, minimalistic. In addition, it is very comfortable and close to everything you need: stores, pharmacy, coffee shops, banks, train, sightseeing bus stop, bookstores... after 18 h, the place is very quiet. It is safe, as there is a security person in the building and some public security people in the street. You can have your laundry done, if you want. Joshua, the host, is the nicest ever. He is constantly in attention to make your stay in Cape Town great! I totally recommend staying in this flat while visiting Cape Town.

Joshua is great and really nice. We gave us detailled information about how to reach the flat, was always available for phone calls and Whatsapp messages. He's ambitious to make your stay as comfortable as possible, I really appreciate that! The flat is just amazing, spacy, nice style, clean and at a perfect place. I didn't expect a laundry service, so that was great to have, too. I can highly recommend Joshua and his rooms. Top!

Since inception, Joshua was efficient and friendly in his interaction with us. On arrival, we had a warm reception and handover.
The apartment is a gem in the midst of the city with all the luxuries you can expect of a 5 star stay. This can be seen in every detail of the design and decor. The kitchen is kitted with every appliance you can think of and well stocked with good quality crockery and utensils. So too, the bedrooms and bathrooms provide good quality linen for ultimate comfort.
And if this is not enough, the everyday cleaning and laundry service is a plus.
This is definitely my go to place for a city stay in Cape Town.
Amazing place, really loved it!!! I would definitely recommend people to stay at Joshua's. The help was also very lovely and kind. Great place!!! Will definitely be going there again.

My daughters and I had a great time staying at Joshua's flat.  It was centerally located, safe, beautifully decorated and spacious.  Great showers and comfortable beds.  Joshua could not have been more helpful and very attentive even tho he was on the other side of the world.  It was nice having a housekeeper too!  I can't wait to come back to Cape Town and hope Joshua's flat is available then.

Best AirBnB I've ever stayed in.
Joshua's hospitality and kindness to my family and I was genuinely amazing. We were given detailed instructions on how to reach his place and a tour of the flat, which included him explaining how to use several things. The flat looked exactly as the pictures indicated, perhaps even better. It was spacious and beautifully designed. All facilities were top notch and running smoothly. Whenever we needed something, Joshua would immediately attend to it.
It's location is also very helpful, it's close to places to shop and eat. I certainly recommend his place, it's a 10/10. Thanks for everything, Joshua.

Wir haben zu fünft eine wunderbare Zeit in Joshuas Wohnung verbracht.
Das Appartement ist neu renoviert und sehr hochwertig ausgestattet. Man spürt, dass Joshua die Wohnung mit viel Liebe und Blick fürs Detail eingerichtet hat. Die tägliche Reinigung der Wohnung inkl. Wäscheservice war absoluter Luxus.
Die Lage ist ausgesprochen zentral und alle Sehenswürdigkeiten sowie Einkaufsmöglichkeiten und Restaurants sind leicht erreichbar.
Joshua ist ein wunderbarer Gastgeber, der sich sehr bemüht hat, uns den Aufenthalt so angenehm wie möglich zu gestalten - von der Anreise bis zum Ende unseres Aufenthalts war alles perfekt.
Dear Joshua, once again many thanks for the great time in your amazing flat!
Amazing apartment that is very well decorated and an absolute winner in my opinion. Area of town a little to be desired

Joshua was just perfect. Even before we get at the the flat he was, alrealdy, taking care of us. What a great guy, with so good tips, an amazing flat on a great location! His daughter is so lovely ♥️ Our experience was just amazing! Thanks Joshua, for everything. Fernanda, Danillo e Camyla.

Amazing apartment right in the heart of Cape Town. Very modern, fresh, and clean, with everything we needed and more.
Joshua was very accommodating with our unexpected schedule changes and made sure our stay was enjoyable from beginning to end.
We'll definitely try to stay here if we're in Cape Town again. Thanks Joshua!
Awesum place and would definatly return.
Phenomenal spot, really great views, and fantastic host!
Lovely home in camps bay with great views.
Appartement splendide avec une vue incroyable sur camps bay notamment au coucher de soleil. Nous avons été accueillis chaleureusement et nous sommes sentis très à l'aise.
Fantastic home in a great area. Would recommend to any travelers wanting to experience Cape Town or camps bay. Unbeatable views and hospitality
Maryke's place was stunning very central and we felt at home. Definately recommended for a great stay.
Everything was fantastic. Lovely and quiet place, great view and very kind hosts!
Goed

Camps Bay and Maryke’s home especially are just amazing. We felt like home - the host, the room and the location - it was perfect at every minute of our stay. We can definitely recommend it and will come back again.

The location of the apartment with the quiet surroundings and the unique view of the lion's head and the sea are simply indescribably beautiful. Lovingly and high quality furnishings. Maryke was a great host with great communication. Simply the perfect hostess! So Airbnb is fun!
Beautiful property. Spotlessly clean and well cared for. Ciska was a great host and highly recommend booking this property

This apartment is beautiful with quality finishes.  Has a lovely view and is the perfect position to enjoy Cape Town and the Waterfront.  The parking was situated on the same floor which was an added bonus as had direct access to the apartment.  A wonderful place!

Ciska's place is perfectly located within easy walking distance of the buzz of the V&A Waterfront yet peaceful enough to snooze on the balcony soaking up the tranquility of the scenic canal. The stylish apartment is very well equipped and is situated in a high security complex with its own amenities.  Ciska's place doesn't disappoint and is highly recommended.

Thumbs up for Ciska, a great host who attends to all queries. As we travelled with small kids and had frequent spills on clothes was pleased to have a washing machine and drier in the apartment.
The complex has 24 hr security and is a 10 min walk from the Waterfront shopping mall.

A nice, well-appointed apartment in a fantastic location in Cape Town.  Parking is secure, the host is communicative, and it has Fiber internet, which is a big plus! I've stayed here several times and look forward to the next visit.

Ciska was an excellent host, very attentive to details and supportive host from the moment I booked the apartment. The apartment is excellent, cleaned and in an excellent location in the Marina canal close to great amenities in V&A and 8 to 10 min walking distance to V&A Shopping Centre.
Great little spot in the Waterfront. Beautiful apartment, nice and quiet but close to everything you need.  Has all the mod cons you would have at home and just has a “feel good” factor. Stay there!

Sehr schönes Apartment mit 2 Schlafzimmern, guten Matratzen und sehr großem Balkon mit Kanalblick. Die Klimaanlage lässt sich nicht abschalten. Ein Parkplatz unmittelbar vor der Tür, der zweite ist dauerhaft belegt. In der Küche müssen, um dem Preis der Unterkunft gerecht zu werden, einige Utensilien erneuert werden, etwa das zerbrochene Schneidbrett oder die stumpfen Messer; ein Milchkännchen fehlt. Pools sind sehr klein und das Wasser schmeckt salzig und schäumt. Ein größerer Pool beim Gym kostet dann unerwartet doch Eintritt. WiFi hat nur etwas über 2 Mbit/s. Die Mall ist fußläufig erreichbar, mit dem Schlüssel ist stets ein Elektronikchip mitzuführen, der Aus- und Zugang sowie Aus- und Zufahrt zur Wohnanlage ermöglicht. Das Apartment selbst ist nur durch ein Schloss gesichert. Die Wasserhähne in den beiden Badezimmern sind zu kurz, dadurch überschwemmt stets der Waschtisch - eine Fehlkonstruktion. Es gibt aufgrund anhaltender Dürre strikte Wasser-Einschränkungen in Cape Town. Das Wasser läuft hier im Gegensatz zu anderen Locations aber regelmäßig. Man sollte mit Duschen und Wäsche dennoch zurückhaltend sein. Late Check-out war möglich, jedoch war das Hausmädchen dann bereits ab 9:30 Uhr bis zur Abreise mit uns im Apartment und hat mit der Reinigung und der Wäsche begonnen. Irgendwie unbehaglich und Duschen dadurch nicht mehr möglich.
Great location. Good communication. Any problem was immediately attended to. A very open plan master bathroom with just a half glass door. So not really practical. The most amazing showers.

The Apartment at the Marina is well situated, modern and comfortable. It’s secure, quiet and spacious.
The welcome and hospitality of the hosts is friendly and accommodating. The communication from start to end was excellent.
My family and I enjoyed our stay.
My thanks and gratitude.

What a fantastic place in a gorgeous setting. So beautifully decorated and spacious, with incredible sea views from almost every window, including the bathroom. Everything is brand new, and every last detail has been thought through. We will definitely be back and can highly recommend it to anyone else. Great location as well.
Un couple adorable, un appartement juste... PARFAIT ! propre, joli, bien situé et une vue à couper le souffle. Bref allez y sans aucune hésitation
Amazing ocean views and beautiful home. Very clean and private. Enjoyed the complimentary bottle of wine on the terrace overlooking the bay. Definitely will be back!
风景绝佳，房间非常整洁，很大，很安静，可以看日出

Firstly: the photos on here don't do any justice! Amazing communication from the day we booked the place until we left. The apartment is WOW, it really puts you in holiday mode and ALL views will take your breath away! We didn't want to leave and can't stop talking about the apartment and host. I can recommend this to anyone and everyone; Wendy's apartment caters for a single person to a big family. You can't go wrong here!

A wonderful location run by lovely people. We got welcome with a brilliant bottle of rose - then by a couple of playing whales we could observe from the balcony. Tastefully decorated, the flat is very spacious and comfortable, with a great sense of details too. We much enjoyed our stay and will definitely be back. Oh yes, and we all loved the subtle vanilla ambience scent.
Still my favorite AirBnb out of many in this area. For the comfort, the warmth of Wendy & Keith's hospitality and the fab' scenery. Thank you both! Will be back soon.

If we could rate this place more than 5 stars we would!! The photos don’t even begin to tell how amazing this place is. We took our two young boys with us to explore Simon’s Town and we found the most perfect home in Wendy and Keith’s place. Spotless and homely, wish we could have stayed longer!
Truly amazing, it's a perfect experience staying with Wendy.

I have to recommend this place in particular to anyone looking to stay in Simonstown. Don't even have second thoughts about it, just book. Wendy and her husband were incredibly welcoming. The bottle of wine, the booklet with all the  different places to visit in the area. Even the artwork makes you truly feel welcome.  The views are just divine. Waking up to a magnificent sunrise in far horizon over the ocean with whales doing their thing was just perfect. Not to mention the gorgeous mountain behind the house. Just book already!!

This place is even more beautiful in person. Michael is very accommodating and very much wants you to enjoy your stay in Cape Town. He and his wife are so helpful. The place is clean, well-decorated and you can hear the waves break as you fall asleep. It was one of my favorite airbnb experiences. Highly recommend!

This room was super nice and trendy. Very neat and well setup with a coffee station, microwave and fridge. The lounge area made it so much nicer to hang-out after a full day out. There is a separate entrance to the room from the streets, which makes it easier to come and go without being a disturbance to the host. The room is walking distance from the main beach and Campsbay attractions. The host Michael was very friendly and welcoming.
We will definitely be back!
Thank you soo much!

This place is great if you want to be in a silence place with lovely guesthouse owners.
The room was very clean (no insects, nice smell) very well decorated. In the time that I stayed it was a little bit cold outside, but there was an electric blanket a heater and some extra blankets to make it very comfortable. The bathroom is small but the shower is great. The bathroom is extended with all kinds of shampoo, tissues, hair dryer and other make-up stuff, so you don't need to worry if you forgot something in your luggage, even though for electric plugs from other countries.
The bed and couch where fine, big television and fridge and enough space in the closets.
Michael and his wife were like a mom and dad for me. I felt safe, they helped me with everything and I also did a nice trip in Camps Bay with Michael and his dogs, to let them out. The dogs are very sweet to guests and won't come in the apartment.
I would advise to everyone who will come to Cape Town and want to stay near a nice beach on a quiet place about 15 minutes driving from the city center, to stay here.
Michael is a very friendly and helpful host. We had a really good stay at his place. Thank you so much again!

Elegant, very beautiful view of camps bay beach. Very private pool room suite. Hospitality, top notch. Michael and Veronica have the best personalities and will definitely welcome you in their home like you family. My partner and I would go there over and over again.
Awesome place! They have thought of everything to make you comfortable, from different types of tea, biscuits, films, books, everything! I could check in whenever I needed. I will certainly be back.

This was the best Airbnb we have stayed at. From the start Michael was very friendly and accommodating and insisted on meeting us and giving us a tour. He also was great with communication and gave us many great recommendations for restaurants in the area, etc. The room was very well decorated, exceptionally clean, very comfortable bed and had everything we needed and more. It also had its own entrance to the property and room so we wouldn't worry about being a disturbance. Would absolutely stay here again! Highly recommend!!
Great stay - comfortable, well equipped, private and quiet. Recommended unreservedly.

I stayed at Michael's place for 3 nights and it was fantastic. The room was a short walk to Camps Bay promenade and beach, up a fairly steep hill but after a lazy day relaxing on the beach or an evening at one of the many excellent restaurants, it was actually good to get the heart rate up a little! If you aren't keen on the walk there are always plenty Ubers within a few minutes away and it costs around ZAR20.
The room had so many thoughtful touches; a fridge with milk and chilled water, lots of fluffy white towels, an electric blanket, tea/coffee, adaptor plug, fruit and leaflets/maps of Cape Tow (just to name a few).
Michael was the perfect host too. Really easy to communicate with and helpful, ensuring I had everything I needed for my stay.
I loved this property and would really recommend it as a good base for exploring Cape Town.

We spent one week at Michael's and it's been a perfect place, in a beautiful location and with a great host.
I highly recommend this place to anyone who want to spend a few days in the beautiful city of Cape Town.
Great value. Perfect for business people working in the area or someone like us visiting family
Large room, friendly and helpful host. Great location and value for money.
Thank you Sue for a lovely stay.
Sue's place was perfect  - quiet, friendly & comfortable. I'll definitely be back.
Sue's stay is first class in terms of comfort (bed, kitchenette & bathroom), cleanliness, location, security and cost effectiveness. I will definitely make use of her place when next in  the area.
Wonderful host, lovely accommodation. Can recommend 100%!!
Had a nice time....cosy and peaceful.

Clean, neat, comfortable and private - excellent value for money.
Sue was very friendly and helpful.
A wide choice of shops, and restaurants within a 5 minute drive.
Recommended.
Great place for a short stay
Sue's place is perfect for a quiet relaxing getaway! It is private, quiet and peaceful. Sue is very helpful and friendly.I would definitely recommend and would definitely go back again.

Light and bright. Expansively laid out but cozy at the same time. This apartment is perfect. With every convenience expected and unexpected. Even a washing machine if you need. The location is just perfect. Slight sea views out the windows entice you enough to go outside and it is literally a 30 second walk onto the promenade. I was lucky to be the first to stay in Julie's place and I cannot rate her and it highly enough. Absolutely 10/10.
Julie was an amazing host and her place is beautiful! Clean, modern and equipped with everything you could need. I loved my stay. Will definitely stay at Julie's place again 😊

Julie was such an amazing host . She was so sweet and helpful with everything we needed . Her place is central and extremely close to sea point promenade.It was a beautiful home! And will definitely be staying  there the next time in CT!

5/5 apartment!
Clean, fresh and stylish accommodation.
Julie was great in meeting me on time and she presented the apartment very well.
I'll be back.

The location is golden, you can walk for miles along a beautiful seaside boardwalk, fabulous cafes and restaurants everywhere. The wifi is at the speed of light, so if you are working or studying, you will never have a problem. Amount of daylight and the view from the flat is really nice. Area is safe and people are friendly, Mojo Market and life band  music is a two minute walk from Julie's, City buses, money exchanges, atm machines and supermarkets are all a stone throw away from Julie's.  Now the best part, Julie was waiting for me when I arrived, helped me with my luggage, gave me  a summary on how things work. After, she gave me a tour of the neighborhood and treated to a drink! How fabulous is that! Thank you Julie.  SC
Julie's place is lovely and central. It's spacious and they little homely touches she added really made the stay wonderful. It was like being in a home away from home.
Julie is an amazing host. The apartment is perfectly located and I would definitely be back!

I had a great time at Julies apartment where I stayed for 4 weeks. The flat is spacious and modern and has everything you need to really feel comfortable.... a fully equipped kitchen, a modern bathroom, a very nice living room with a huge sofa and a bedroom with an extremely comfortable bed... I slept like a baby! Everything in this fancy apartment is so clean and spotless.
The area is safe and couldn´t be better... lots of supermarkets, bars, restaurants, cafés etc. within walking distance. The city centre is just 5-10 minutes by car... Camps Bay and Clifton as well.
The house is just opposite Sea Point Pavilion, so it´s the ideal place to start or end your day with a nice jogging tour on the sea promenade.
In case you need anything or might have some questions, magic Julie will answer within MINUTES and can always help! I couldn´t think of a better host. My stay was unforgettable and this place will definitely be my first choice for my next trip to Cape Town. Don´t look for any other apartments... Julie has got the best place to stay - either for one person or a couple!

Julie's apartment is everything I hoped for - beautifully clean and comfy with lots of sunlight, I loved it! Communication was first class and chatting with Julie was a lovely way to pass the time :) Thank you for hosting me I had a wonderful few days, and look forward to coming back again soon!
The place is fantastic, modern and clean, great location and overall beautiful. We would recommend this space to anyone and look forward to staying there again.
A wonderful experience in the heart of Cape Town.

I don't write many reviews however, this one is worth the mention... What a truly amazing stay and place. We had a great time and everything in the apartment was better than perfect!! Even though the apartment is in the middle of town, it was super quiet inside, very impressive. O yes, THE most comfortable bed I have ever slept on..(: I loved the fact that that the apartment is so central to everything, we could literally not make up our mind on where to go, there were so so many choices around the area... Cape Town is such a buzzing city...Elana, trust me we WILL be back soon!!!... Thank you once more!!

I had an incredible stay here!! The flat is amazing, fully equipped, beautiful decor, everything incredible new and more than perfect, it feels like you are staying at your own home. This place couldn’t be in a better location to explore the city; lots of restaurants, bars and public transport really close.
Also thank you to Elana’s husband, Peter! He speaks spanish and that was really helpful for us, he gave us a lot of recommendations and tips about what to do and where to go around the city.
Thank you so so much again and I'll definitely come back!! :)

Really our enjoyed our stay at the apartment and Elana was an amazing host. The apartment is centrally located and you can see the special touches added by Elana to make the apriment as comfortable as can be.

What a lovely apartment and so central. Beautifully finished and Elana's personal touch makes you fell right at home. If you want the city experience this is the place to stay. Elana is a great host and very attentive to her guests

Absolutely amazing.
I am an avid user of airbnb and I can comfortably say this is one of the best homes I have had the pleasure to stay in. The location was great. In the lively CDB, although the apartment was extremely quiet in comparison.
Beautiful decor and all the comforts of home.
Elana is an amazing host and was extremely helpful and accommodating and easy to talk to.
I can go on and on, but I recommend booking this apartment and I will definitely be back.
Thank you :-)

Elana is a great person and a super host! She has taken care of all the details prior and during our stay in order to make it comfortable and nice to us. The apartment is amazing, so nice decorated, new, with a king size bed (we have slept so good!!) and plenty of details. She has kindly brought us some things for breakfast as a present when we have asked about where to buy them. She has also given us very good travel tips. We will come back, for sure!!

Amazing secure apartment as beautiful as the photos with excellent position right on green market square and walking distance to good restaurants and coffee shops.  The double glazing on the windows ensures that you are not bothered with noise at all.  The hop on hop off bus stops right outside the apartment and if you come with a car there is secure parking.  Can highly recommend Elana's apartment and she is a wonderful friendly host

L'appartement est exactement comme sur les photos. Les espaces sont top. L'emplacement est génial. L'appartement donne sur une rue personne et les transports sont a 5 pas. Petit plus, station de taxi. La cerise sur le gâteau, la gentillesse et la disponibilité d'Elana. Je le recommande à 100%.

Elana is a fantastic host and went out of her way to make my stay as comfortable as possible. The apartment is clean and modern located at the heart of the City. You literally have everything at your footsteps.

The hosts are very kind, attentive and funny. They made check in a breeze! The first things we noticed was the building has stunning views of Table mountain and Lions Head ( both great places to hike and adventure!). Not a single high rise building stands in the way to block our view. Upon entering the building we were shown how to use our electronic security keys. There are two security check points before you can even enter the elevators and there's always a security guard at the front dest, we felt very safe right off the bat not to mention it's quick and easy. The swipe of your electronic key gets you through the two points. Walking into the flat we could tell the entire place had been renovated from floor to ceiling. Very clean, crisp and beautiful. Not only was everything very beautiful but also so comfortable (best couch ever!). The flat had everything we needed and more. The surrounding areas were great as well! Short walks to the gardens, shops, fantastic restaurants and "the best coffee in the world", to which I would absolutely agree. This flat became our home away from home and we will definitely be back to stay here upon our next Cape Town adventure.
Clean, cozy place. Close to everything. Even though on the 3rd floor it still had a breathtaking view. Enjoyed the snack left for us and the communication was clear and straightforward

We had a wonderful stay at Clive's place, his apartment was perfect for our stay. Although I never met him in person, he was available whenever we had a question which made everything very easy. The apartment itself is as modern and comfortable as it looks, with stunning views on sunny days, and well located if you are interested in trendy cafes, gallerys and the like. All in all, a great experience.

Clive's apartment is perfect for a stay in cape town. The flat is very stylish and nicely decorated. Additionally you have an amazing view on the table mountain. It's close to the city Center. You will have an own parking spot and due to security you feel very safe in the building.  Even though we didn't met Clive the communication was always easy. Wonderful experience and highly recommended!

This is an amazing place to stay if you are exploring Cape Town city! Great location, secure building, ridiculously beautiful views.
A real gorgeous flat in impeccable shape. Clive was very attentive and quick to communicate pre check in, and went the extra mile with an incredibly helpful and informative book in the flat.
This is without a doubt the best feeling place I've stayed in Cape Town, and I've stayed in many throughout Town and the suburbs.
Thank you Clive!!
Clean, comfortable, nicely decorated apartment with a great view of table mountain. Close to attractions. Stocked with the basics.
Fantastic place. Very clean, great location. I’m from Cape Town and this place is on point. You won’t be disappointed.

Clive was the perfect AirBNB host and provided us with beautiful accommodation in the heart of Cape Town. Celebrating our honeymoon in Cape Town, we were treated to the highest level of hospitality as champagne and freshly made sandwiches were awaiting us upon arrival! We were provided with accurate and simple instructions that made our check-in more simple than if we were staying at a hotel.
The apartment was clean, modern and had everything we needed for our overnight visit. The morning glow on Table Mountain was a real treat as we drank our morning coffee in the living room. If we ever make it back to Cape Town from the US, we will be sure to seek out Clive's place again!
Place is gorgeous and has exceptional views!
Absolutely amazing place to stay. So clean!! All amenities are really well setup.
Everything was simply perfect: The accommodation with everthing that was needed and a very friendly hosts.
Absolutely perfect stay in a very convenient and pretty part of the Southern suburbs of Cape Town! Janet is a kind host and communicated easily. Looking forward to stay here again! Thank you Janet
A central location, very private accommodation and spacious space with its own outdoor area with BBQ. A great find, I'll be back!

Possibly one of the best places I've stayed! Clean, really comfortable and would definitely stay again without hesitation.
I felt safe and the host was extremely helpful throughout the stay.

Newlands Garden Cottage is a gem beneath Table Mountain. It is tastefully furnished, a lovely size for 2 people, and careful attention paid to small details like linen and appliances. We had a perfect stay, thanks Janet
A second stay at this wonderful find in very central Newlands!
Janet's place is absolutely lovely; clean and chic; private yet Janet is available for any queries or suggestions. Brilliant location too. I highly recommend Janet's place!

Janet’s garden cottage is set in a residential area and is very quite. What you see in the pictures doesn’t do justice to what you will experience when you get there. The place is beautiful and the bed is very comfortable and the whole place is clean. The property is nested under the magnificent shadows of the Table Mountain. I recommend it highly for a couple. It also has all the memories you will need while on holiday.

We loved our two day stay at this charming self-catering cottage in Newlands. Everything is brand new, sparkling clean and very well designed. The kitchen has great amenities including a beautiful gas oven and fridge. The sitting room has a relaxed TV viewing area. The queen size bed is extremely comfortable with crisp percale linen. The shower room and bathroom is both modern and sleek. Janet and Mike were perfect hosts and eager to accommodate us in every way. The cottage is very central to schools, shopping centres and UCT.  The area is quiet and residential and close to the Newlands forest. We even had a resident squirrel munching some greenery on the fence outside the cottage! All in all, a great experience!
We had an amazing stay at Janet's cottage! Absolutely stunning! Highly recommended!

We booked at Barry at the last minute.Barry and family welcomed us into their home.Very good reception.Place well equipped and spotlessly cleaning.Cottage situated with an amazing view ,looking into the sea.Loads of attractions nearby.My husband,brothers and Barry enjoyed playing pool at Barry place and were offered drinks.Barry very kindly offered to wash our car for us.Excellent home ,would reccommend.
A really beautiful place to stay, see view from front door, home away from home
Amazing place and very clean. Host is very accomadating and helpfull.
Close to the beach and has the most beautiful view.  Very clean and tidy, it was just perfect. Just has a noise restriction but otherwise I would most definitely recommend it  !!
Stunning spacious apartment with everything needed for a quality family holiday! Saw whales like never before! Loved our stay, certainly coming again!
Excellent place to stay with beautiful views over False Bay. Would have loved to have stayed much longer if we had the time. Felt very safe and the place was immaculate. Easy check in.
Barry ist ein super Gastgeber und die Unterkunft ist einfach traumhaft!

We are sorry we did not have more time to spend here.Barry is a great host and the apartment is exceptional. Great view, comfortable and clean.
Thoroughly recommended

Barry's place is the perfect getaway, beautiful views, great porch where we spent most of our time. He kept us up to speed all the time, and he even gave us some of his spectacular cellar wine to enjoy. Will definitely return.
Stunning view and Accommodation. Plenty of space and would definitely recommend a longer stay

The name for this apartment is extremely appropriate as the views are nothing but spectacular! I loved spending time on the spacious deck and looking out over the suburb of Green Point, the ocean and the Cape Town Stadium. Sunsets from this vantage point cannot be beaten! The interior of the unit is modern and super stylish, yet still very comfortable. It is clear that a lot of thought has gone into designing and equipping the place. Lance was a great host - very welcoming and knowledgeable about the area. All in all, the apartment is simply stunning and therefore I would highly recommend this listing to anyone who is visiting Cape Town.

Two things you will notice right away:
1. Lance is a very warm, welcoming and attentive host.
2. He is not kidding about the spectacular view. The ocean view is the centerpiece of this apartment. You will love it!
My daughter and I enjoyed a very comfortable week-long stay here. The apartment is clean, light, well-situated, and of course has a wonderful view of the ocean. Highly recommended.

Great place with simple stylish interior and everything that you would need for a comfortable and easy stay in Cape Town. Location is very convenient. Lance was very organised and there were no major issues. Everything is as advertised.  Will be back...
The appartement’s very near to good restaurant et café, supermarket, it have big terrace and a BBQ , very quietly and safe.

Lance has created a vista oasis in the upper Green point hills! If you want to wake every morning to inspiring views of the waterfront and ocean, do not miss an opportunity to book this place. The open concept design that extends onto the wrap around terrace makes the apartment feel very spacious. Braais while watching the sunset were a super treat. Many luxurious details topped off a fantastic stay.

Best place ever, fantastic views, pristine clean, nothing was too much trouble, good info, wi be recommending this place to many the location is fantastic. Lance is a wonderful host. Hope we see you again. Thanks

The apartment is perfect. Great interior, very comfortable and stylish. Super accessorised, super comfortable beds, good quality linen and towels.
The outside space is outstanding together with the view!
Lance is very friendly and his response time to any queries is immediate.
Highly recommended!!!
10 out of 10 !
Great place.
Excellent place on the main road in a great neighborhood of Green Point. Brand new appliances and fixtures and amazing view of the stadium and harbor. Great place to explore the city from!
Wonderful apartment with great views
Beautiful space with beautiful views
The
Amazing place, fantastic hosts, I couldn't have asked for more!
Great hosts. Great place and the cutest dogs we've encountered for while.

Der „Leuchtturm“ von Rob & Hazel ist top. Die Wohnung ist neu renoviert und bietet alles was man braucht und als kleines extra gibts den grandiosen Blick aufs Meer. Ich kann diese Unterkunft nur weiterempfehlen.

A pretty cabin overlooking the beach, with absolutely perfect sunrise views and a lovely sea breeze. Easy communications with Rob and Hazel, who were very accommodative to changes in our arrival timing. We were welcomed by 2 friendly dogs and a bowl of fruits and nuts, which was a pleasant treat.
Main door of cabin is a glass door, but the entrance tucked away, so there are no issues with privacy.
Light starts to shine in as soon as the sun rises, which is fine if you’re an early riser or unaffected by light in your sleep.
Overall an excellent place to stay when visiting the Cape peninsula, would totally recommend this place!
Beautiful space with an amazing view. Very clean and nice touches in the space. Will stay here again for sure!
Awesome place. Great view. Rob and Hazel are the right hosts. They are there if you need them and provide privacy if you want to. The cabin is clean and very well decorated. Conclusion: great!
We had a lovely stay. The apartment was clean, comfortable and has an amazing view. Rob was a very helpful host.
Stunning views, right from the bedroom. Very nice and cozy place. Perfect for a couple.
Amazing, clean, stylish, great views, fantastic all Round, Secure, Good hospitality, private .

I was super impressed by my experience here. The attention to detail in terms of design, fixtures and fittings is equal to some luxury hotels; from the complimentary wine and bar to the express machine. Super clean good vibe!
Host is top!
Newt time in Kaap I sleep there again!!!
