I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. The suite was luxurious with a meticulous attention to detail. Frankie was an attentive host who went over and above to welcome and ensured comfort throughout my stay. As a frequent business traveller I will be sure to stay with Frankie again.

We had such a lovely short stay at the oh so heavenly guest suit this weekend. Such friendly and accommodating service from the owners. The suite was lovely decorated and comfortable. We will definitely be back.
Ein außerordentlich tolles modernes und super sauberes Appartement. Für jeden zu empfehlen. Frank ist ein sehr netter und zuverlässiger Gastgeber. Nur zum empfehlen.
A nice place with an amazing view. Loved it.

The apartment is so lovely! It's stylish, with detail and very high recommendable. Frankie is really nice and do his best for the guest.
Oranjezicht is a little bit away from the city bowl but the view makes it worth! If we come back to CT we would try to get this accommodation again :).

L'appartement est extrêmement propre, très bien agencé et décoré. La vue depuis la terrasse est vraiment top. Le quartier est très tranquille, ce que nous cherchions mais une voiture est nécessaire pour se déplacer. Frankie et sa copine nous ont superbement bien accueillis, vraiment top.
Spent 5 days at OSH before moving onto a 5* boutique hotel. Hope the accommodation there is at least to the same standard as OSH. PS it is.
Beautiful apartment and perfect location. Walking distance to lots of good restaurants and things to do. Derek was also flexible with check-in and check-out. Would stay here again!
perfekt located place! we’ll be back soon! super nice new appartment with parking. elevator, view, spacy, nice fully equiped kitchen, sunprotection, balcony all perfect! good wifi!

I almost didn't see the rest of Capetown because I'd the beautiful view from within the unit!
I definitely recommend this beautiful space to anyone traveling to Capetown!
Comfortable bed, secure building and great amenities!

My friends and I stayed here for 6 nights and absolutely loved it!  Starting with the excellent communication where he answered all my questions to the check in process, it could not have been smoother. Derek’s place is super clean with all the amenities fully provided and has a pretty awesome view of table mountain and the city. The apartment could not be better located with an easy access to restaurants/cafes and the most scenic places Cape Town could offer and we felt very safe during our stay. I highly recommend Derek’s apartment for a great experience in Cape Town!

Beautiful, spacious apartment apartment with breathtaking
views of Table Mountain. It's in a great part of Cape Town with a wonderful variety of cafes and restaurants, all within walking distance. There's even a supermarket across the road and a friendly pharmacy if you need it. We loved the convenience of the location for walking around and it was within a 5-10 minute drive to Cape Towns best spots, like the Waterfront, beaches etc. The apartment has WIFI, dstv, and all other amenities to make you feel at HOME. It was also very safe and we had parking which was definitely
an added bonus. We will most certainly Derek's place when we return to Cape Town.

We stayed at this apartment for two weeks with our two little kids (4&1). Perfectly located if you like to try all the restaurants kloof street has on offer!!! Dereks place is a nice spot in a very good location with a breath taking view on table mountain. The apartment is well equipped, all you need for a comfy stay. Derek is very friendly and welcomed us with fruits and some milk. He even helped us with our heavy luggage and was very flexible with check-in and check-out.
We felt very safe during our stay.
Awesome apartment. Extremely central, stylish and amazing views!
Clean and new Apartment in best Location, we will come again
Derek's apartment is located in a great and very safe part of town with lots of bars and restaurants. Also the view of table mountain is stunning. Communication was easy and relaxed. Perfect stay!

Beautiful apartment in the right neighborhood (close to shops, Woolworths, restaurants etc. ). Everything in this apartment is new and fresh with beautiful furniture and decoration. Very comfortable beds.

I would recommend this lovely,cozy and homely place to anyone. Sue really went out of her way to make me feel at home. Loved every moment there. Great view, great conversation. Great everything.
I'm definitely staying there again when in Cape Town. Thank you Sue.

Stunning little apartment in Blouberg. Exactly as is on the ad. My husband and I felt very much at home during our stay. The apartment has DSTV, Wifi and has everything we needed. We would definitely recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a home-away-from-home.
Schönes Apartement alles vorhanden liebevoll eingerichted und sehr sauber

From arrival to departure we were at home . Comfortable , clean, cozy and secluded ! Everything you need for a great hideaway !!!! The location provides everything you need within walking distance. The hospitality of Sue and Simon made this a truly unforgettable stay..... Sure to be back;-)
Out of this world facilities. True warmth in a windy city. Perfect home away from home and travellers paradise.
The neatness and the views... Oooh! And the wine👌👌👌👌

Sue's is a great cosy place to stay outside the city right by the beach in blougerstrand.close to shops and  restaurants. Great sunsets and views of table mountain from the beach!Sue's a great host made us feel welcome and couldn't do enough to help if back in cape town will defo stay again!
The place was perfect for a couple like us. Just the right amount of space. We loved the privacy and the convenient location was perfect. We truly recommend!
Sue is a great and very friendly host. The place is really beautiful, clean and everything u want. Great location and views. Highly recommend it.
Beautiful location!

Great stay! pictures cannot do justice to the views which are spectacular. great location, the biscuits, chocolates, kitchen and toiletry items were a great touch.
great hospitality throughout the stay. very private space, i would stay here again,
Gareth is a fantastic host . The house is beautiful with an amazing view . We had a wonderful week and would love to return sometime. Highly recommended.
Absolutely stunning apartment with outstanding views.  Highly recommended

Even if it‘s hard to believe but the view and the whole setting of Gareth‘s house are even more spectacular than the pictures show. It’s a very safe place to stay and it’s perfectly situated for discovering the Cape. You can walk to Fish Hoek Beach and Kalk Bay and to Cape Town City it is a 25‘ drive. Gareth is a great host and very easy to communicate with. We can highly recommend the place for an amazing holiday!
Beautifull house with beautifull view to the beach...

The perfect beach house! Extremely clean, newly renovated, and full of all necessities to make for the perfect accommodation. The view speaks for itself! Loved that you could see the view from any room and bedroom of the home. Very safe neighborhood, but appreciated the availability of the house security system. Gareth was so helpful! Excellent communication. Also appreciate the local suggestions for favorite restaurants, wine estates, and beach spots.
Thank you Gareth! We hope to stay again in the future when we are visiting from the States
Stunning apartment with breath taking views. We didn't want to leave! We stayed as 2 families (4 adults, 3 toddlers) and had a fantastic few days, would highly recommend.

We had an amazing time at Gareth‘s place. The house is so beautiful with love to details. The view is simply amazing and even better than on the pictures. The house was also well equipped and we missed nothing. Gareth even bought a baby bed for us on the day of arrival so that our little one could sleep in there. He was very kind, nice and we could always contact him and he responded quickly. At the day of arrival someone also helped us carry our bags down to the house and in the kitchen were some welcome presents, which was very kind. We really enjoyed the stay and would always come back to this beautiful house.

Gareth offers excellent accommodation in an immaculate home. We loved the attention to detail and all of the thoughtful touches. The view from the deck was spectacular, and the house was fully equipped with everything we could have needed. Would highly recommend this place if you are looking to stay in this area.

Beautiful place very recently remodeled. Exceeded our expectations. The one time we accidentally triggered the alarm, Gareth called us in matter of seconds to see if everything is fine. We felt very safe and loved the place with its gorgeous views. Since we stayed in the house with two couples we especially enjoyed the big open kitchen/living area and the fact that the bedrooms are spread over the two floors. Lots of privacy. We can definitely recommend the place.

Being high on mountainside makes for breathtaking views albeit at the price of 3 flights of stairs from parking to facility. Lots of nearby affordable places to eat out. Pretty easy access by road to the greater neighbourhoodincluding numerous wine routes.  A lovely abode suitable for a reasonably fit couple who appreciate nature’s beauty. Inspirational geography. Allow at least a few days.
A perfect getaway for a couple, beautiful view too!!
This is a stunning luxury suite with mind-blowing veiws!! The host is down to earth, quick to respond and very hospitable. I highly recommend staying for longer than a week!!
Beautiful place with a gorgeous view! Will stay here again
We will visit Trevor's place again in the future. Close to the beach, great view, clean and neat apartment
Highly recommend staying here. Amazing place. Clean with amazing views of Gordan's Bay.
Its an awesome space to go and relax
Great hospitality from a warm and friendly host. Indescribably beautiful views from the slope of the mountain, with a fresh sea breeze and sound of waves to wake up to. We had a great stay!
Very nice and clean and a terrific view over the whole bay!

Trevor is a great host -- very responsive and available. The view from the apartment is truly breathtaking and we got to indulge in it for almost 2 weeks. The space is well set up, light and airy and a fabulous base to explore the surrounds or take a quick drive to the beach. The stairs on the property are worth it for the view. I highly recommend a stay at The Suite.

The place is centrally located in Cape Town. All the bars are walking distance, V&A Waterfront is 10 mins away. A great place for two people. Our host Simon was very helpful and came in personally to help us get acquainted.

The stay I had here was far beyond expectation. The host was extremely well organized and responsive. The apartment was clean, well finished, and quiet in the perfect location. The block in which the apartment is in, is well managed and secure. I will definitely be back here.

Great apartment in CBD which is central and the block has a vida and food lovers! (Bonus) Newly renovated/modern apartment with everything you need including fast Wi-Fi  Simon was such a great host. There was water in the fridge, some almond milk and champers.  Will definitely be back as my husband and I love the Icon building.

My boyfriend and I spent two nights in Simons apartment. Simon is very flexible and fast in his response, som Im happy with the communication. The apartment is very clean, new and comfortable. There was a parking spot in the garage. Felt safe to be there. The location is great and within walking distance to restaurants, Bree street, Waterfront, Cape Quarter etc. Simon also made his personal touch in his way of welcoming us with leaving some treats on the table which was very nice. Thank you Simon, we highly recommend this place and we would definately choose to stay here again.
Beautiful apartment with modern deco.
Awesome stay! Highly recommend!!!

Simon is a great host: it was easy to plan the check-in/out, he was flexible and helpful with all my questions. The apartment is great too! It's new, stylish, has all possible appliances and in reality is even nicer than the pics. There is security and concierge desk downstairs and they were always ready to assist. You'll find a nice supermarket/ready-food stalls in the same building. In Long and Bree streets you get plenty of restaurants and bars to go out and there is a big Spar supermarket open till 21:00 just 10min away. Waterfront is 20min walk along the channels or a short uber ride away. Bo-Kaap, Greenmarket square and Company's gardens with all the museums are also in the walking distance. I really enjoyed my stay and hope to be back some time soon:)
Really good apartment, super host and I will definitely come back!

Simon is an excellent host and his apartment is very stylish, with a good gym all with a super central location.  Got a lot of use out of the kitchen and the security for the building was very comforting.
Simon made sure we were comfortable on arrival and everything went superbly, the apartment was beautiful and we loved the views from the place.

We stayed in Jo's comfortable and beautiful cottage for a week. The position is brilliant for early morning mountain walks. We enjoyed the incredible sunset from the deck every evening. The cottage is well designed and has everything you need to make your stay comfortable. Short walk to my city bus and in close proximity to CBD, Sea Point and Camps Bay for exploring and plenty restaurant options.

My wife and I spent two nights at Jo's apartment and our only regret is that we did not book for longer. The unit is beautifully nestled between Table Mountain behind us and a green belt in front. Views of the ocean, Lions Head and the Twelve Apostles are spectacular. Finishes and furnishings are exquisite. We arrived on a very hot day and the unit was delightfully and naturally cool and our charming host, Jo, pulled out all the stops to make our stay as comfortable as possible.   We will be back.

What an absolute gem!!! Stunning ocean views and sunsets, beautifully designed and the highlight of the trip was Jo! She went out of her way to make sure we had a fantastic stay going over and above! We had lovely fruit, teas, coffee, milk and wine on arrival and the apartment is fully equipped with everything you need down to the tiniest details!
Thank you so much Jo for such a wonderful stay, we will definitely be back!

Lovely place to stay all you could need and more. The view is incredible and Jo the host (and her two lovely dogs) couldn't have been better ! I couldn't fault our stay there and would be back in a heartbeat. Thanks again

We loved our stay in Jo’s beautiful apartment. The view is immense & the flat itself is a lovely space. Jo was really helpful before and during our stay, giving us tips and suggestions for things to do & places to eat. Location was perfect, driving into town was quick & easy, and beautiful views along the way. There was also a garage to park to the car rental. Hoping we’ll be back in Cape Town one day, & this would easily be our first choice of where to stay.

Jo’s place is in a nice and secure suburb in camps bay. Everything is within 15-20 minutes of a drive. You can actually see the table mountain and lions head from the room. The house is very clean and well maintained with a lot of personal touches. Do listen to jo’s Suggestions for restaurants. She had some really good ones. The house is well equipped and she welcomes you with many basic items like milk, juice, wine and some munchies. We had a lovely start to our holiday. Thanks Jo.

Jo s place is even better than on the pictures .
What sold it to us was the view from the studio and it was fabulous, especially at sunset but what we didn't expect was Jo's hospitality.
All the personal touches such as wine in the fridge and all the essentials ( milk, butter, jam bread fresh fruit) so we wouldn't have to rush to the shops upon arrival .
She was also very flexible with our arrival/departure time and gave us a warm welcome and a full tour of the studio as well as as loads of useful tips regarding walks and where to catch the best views for a romantic sunset.
The place is spotless, lovely decorated and everything is there if you need to use the kitchen.
She went the extra mile to make our stay the best ever and we can never thank her enough for all what she did for us and we are very sorry to hear that she had to cancel April and May bookings due to the current water situation in the Cap Region.
It didn't affect us so much , we did our best to save the water but we are aware that the situation is very precarious at the moment.
We we can only highly recommend Jo s place and will definitely be back.
So thank you again Jo for a lovely stay and hope you get some rain soon.

Jo's place is really beyond words. The location is perfect, calm with a great view over camps bay. The interior is on point, nothing I would change! Jo even bought everything you need for a small breakfast. Thank you very much for this unforgettable end of our dream holidays!

Jo‘s Studio on here property was the most exiting location I ever booked on Airbnb. I could relax there for a whole month enjoying Jo‘s hospitality and services and got really great tips beside the touristic mainstream from a cultural insider. Thanks to Jo and her wonderful housekeeper Frank for a great time. I always felted as welcome guest and will come back as soon as possible.

We really had a great time at Jo's place. We didn't meet in person as Jo was on vacation but we were in good hands of Jessica and Simon.
We really enjoyed the place. The view is stunning (even more than on the pictures) and the room was perfectly clean and equipped with everything we needed.
We can definately recommend a stay without any doubts. If you decide to stay here as well and are looking for good food in cape town, be sure to ask for recommendations. We sure didn't regret to check them out.
Thank you again Jo, Jessica and Simon. It was a pleasure.
Top locatie, heel toeristisch, supermarkt op 5 minuten afstand. Ook een restaurant en kapper in de buurt. Schoon en ruim.
A well appointed stylish home . Situated in a convenient location with easy access to city , waterfront and beaches.
Very central, luxury apartment. Loved our stay.
Beautiful, modern apartment in a great location. Comfortable and spacious with amazing views of the Atlantic. Great amenities. Would definitely recommend this place!

Good security and secure parking. Stylish and clean. Very well stocked kitchen. Veranda can be bit noisy from traffic but once doors closed its quieter.
Extremely central. Recommended.
Fantastic location and overall a great apartment (plenty of room, 2 bedrooms both with double/queen beds and both with ensuite bathrooms - excellent value for money).
Super place, Super host!
Great spot close to the hustle of Green Point. Spacious, safe and clean. Has all the amenities you could possibly need. Will definitely be back!
The apartment is beautiful and very spacious, exactly like in the pictures; TV with Netflix, cabo, etc.; very clean, great location. I'd certainly stay there again.

Jonathan was super host, helped when my reservation needed to be changed and communicated clearly. The apartment was stunning and so neat. It had everything we needed and more. Would definitely stay here again.
Great hosts, in a quiet area but in walking distance from shops. Clean and stylish accommodation.

What you see on the pictures is exactly what you get if not more.  She and her husband Alf are great hosts who afford you their time and yours. The cleanliness and her personal touch far exceeded my expectations.  I am happy to return to Beyer if I must return to Durbanville or contact the hosts just to say Hello.

Everything was clean and neat and really beautiful.
We enjoyed our stay a lot.
Great host!

Very central to our needs.
Room large and comfortable and very clean

Was there for about 2 weeks with my girlfriend and it was perfect! Very nice and uncomplicated people who give you a taste of their Africa, if you want. They know to respect your privacy. very safe place, good WLAN connection, very clean rooms, daily room service, fridge refill (yoghurt, muesli, water, beer, and customized of what you like). we had a really good time! If i ever need a host in Cape Town again, thats my address!
Amazing plek lekker rustig en als wat mens nodig het. Baie gemaklike bed

This place is definitely worth the visit. Fantastic hosts that go above and beyond to make you feel right at home. Great amenities and wifi fast. Lovely modern place and away from the rush of the city. Definitely will stay there again.
We loved this little place because it is so welcoming and has everything you need. We cant wait to go back again :-)
Perfect for our needs... thank you very much
Lovely host

My partner and I stayed for 4 nights and 5 days. The flat is located in central Cape Town with a beautiful view of Bo Kaap and the rest of the city. It is walking distance to some the some of the  best restaurants, shops, and bars in CPT. The flat was beautiful and spotless! Sally was a wonderful host, very friendly and easy to communicate with.
Lovely place, good value for money, centrally located. We loved our stay and will go there again.
The place was super clean, the view is beautiful. We had the best time. The host is very nice and friendly 😊.
Thanks for being a great host Sally. The accommodation was amazing and best views of the city and waterfront. I will definitely be returning. Such a warm and clean environment and so central.
Excellent airbnb! The location is really great! Everything were really clean, super modern apart. And the security was really nice! We recommend for sure!
It was an amazing stay! Great view from the apartment to wake up to as well
Great place to stay!
Sally's place was amazing. Location was great! Would definately book again!

The place was amazing and it truly has "  view for DAYZZZZZ"! And the best part, it was close to everything. The pictures of the apartment is 101% as it is and you truly feel at home. Definitely returning and big thumbs up to Sally as the place had everything we needed! I would recommend to any couple..🙌🙌🍺🍻🍾

You seriously can’t ask for a better host than Sally! She’s so nice, responsive and accommodating! Stay at her studio if you want a beautifully furnished, insta-worthy luxe apt;
with free WiFi and friendly 24-7 security/doormen;
stunning views;
in walking distance of great restaurants;
where it takes 3min or less for an uber pickup;
Trust me I could go on, but you get the point - this studio is excellent value for your money!
It was an amazing time at Sally and Dale's beautiful apartment. Both of them are such lovely people and we loved to stay there.

Sally's accommodation is incredibly fantastic! It is perfectly and very stylish equipped and the patio-view is so wonderful! It's an absolutely secure neighbourhood  in the best location up in the Hills of Hout Bay. Sally is a great and amicable person and she was always there, when we needed any information or help. Thank you so much, Sally - we will definitely come back :).

The flat is very clean and situated in a nice surrounding. Sally and Dale will help you, whenever you need something or got questions.
It was a pleasure to stay there, especially with the nice view.

Sally und ihre Familie sind großartige Gastgeber. Wir durften den ersten Weihnachtsfeiertag mit Ihnen zusammen feiern und es war eine sehr gesellige Runde. Die Location ist wunderschön, die Ausblicke vom Bett aus beim Sonnenaufgang sind genial. Die Tipps zu Kapstadt und Umgebung waren sehr hilfreich und der kurze Hike zum Little Lions Head hinter dem Haus lohnt auf jeden Fall. Es war ein toller Auftakt zu unserem Südafrikatrip und wir würden jederzeit wieder hierher kommen. Danke für den schönen Aufenthalt!
Very special place with a breathtaking view. Highly recommend to stay here for holidays.
This is the best airbnb we have ever been. We loved the place. The room is spacious and elegantly decorated. The view to the Hout Bey Valley is fantastic. Sally and Dale are great hosts.
sally is great!

Excellent standard of accommodation, wonderful location, beautiful apartment in a great setting on the mountainside above Hout Bay. Fitted kitchen with most of what you need for cooking. Outdoor patio with a private entertaining space with gas braai and table (and views). Can be a bit windy on windy days. Apartment is clean and fully serviced every day. Private entrance, and the apartment is separate from the main house, only the driveway is shared.

Sally & Dale’s place exceeded my expectation. Beautifully nestled in the hills of Hout Bay, you will find yourself surrounded by tranquility. A perfect getaway for anyone wanting to escape the hustle and bustle of the city, a wonderful ‘home away from home’. Other than the simplicity of the beautiful decor and excellent service, being able to watch the sunrise from the bed was really priceless. I would definitely recommend this gem to anyone looking for comfort, great service or a tranquil environment for rest & relaxation.
This place is wonderful! The floor to ceiling windows open to reveal an incredible view. The hosts are LOVELY and GRACIOUS and went above and beyond to make our stay incredible. Thanks!

Upon arrival for our wedding anniversary getaway we were welcomed with chocolate freshly baked muffins and a beautiful card by our very sweet and thoughtful host. The apartment was squeaky clean and the pictures accurate. The host was exceptional, very thoughtful, accommodating and readily available. The space comfortable and the view absolutely breathtaking. The neighbourhood quiet and one could enjoy the sun sea and catch up on much needed sleep.  I will definately be visiting again soon and would recommend it to anyone who would love value for money and a well deserved break.

Cornelia's place was immaculately beautiful. The perfect home away from home. The 360 degree view of the mountain and beach were picturesque to say the least. As a host, Cornelia was friendly and so helpful. The best stay I've had through Airbnb thus far

Definitivamente la casa de Cornelia es una de las mejores en las que me he alojado en Sudáfrica. Unas vistas increíbles, un barrio tranquilo y una casa con mucho estilo. Y por supuesto ella es una mujer encantadora.
Only the best.
Top!

We absolutely loved our stay! Cornelia is a wonderful host, so kind and welcoming. The view is splendid, and the interior is finished to a very high standard. It was spotless and so comfortable. Cornelia has thought of everything - from the milk, biscuits and rusks, to the beautiful mugs and wine glasses. We will definitely be back!

Wonderful experience, with an even better host!
Claudia has delivered over&above expectations with Quality of Everything in the appartment!!!
This truely added memories to a very special time in our lives.
Highly recommended for anyone who wants great friendly service, clean, high quality accommodation & one of the best sea views!!!

Spectacular views, outstanding cleanliness.. Great hospitality l!
Loved the special touches, and anniversary chocolates ❤️ first time using airbnb and will definitely recommend staying @Cornelia
First time in Cape Town loved every moment!

We had a splendid time at Cornelia’s place. The apartment is spacious and the sea views are incredible. Her hospitality was great, and we felt right at home.
I would strongly recommend a coastal holiday here!

Der Aufenthalt bei Cornelia war toll. Das Apartement ist sehr modern, ausgesprochen sauber und der Ausblick auf das Meer ist traumhaft. Nicht weit entfernt befindet sich ein Einkaufszentrum inkl Restaurants. Cornelia ist eine zuvorkommende Gastgeberin und wir würden definitiv wiederkommen.

Just AMAZING!
Me, my boyfriend and our baby stayed for four days in the house of Cornelia and Bryan and everything was just amazing! Their hospitality is overwhelming. They gave us tipps what to visit, showed us around and just were perfect hosts.
Any time, we come back to Simon s Town, we will stay in this flat. The view from the flat over the ocean and Simon's Town is amazing and you can reach a shopping center and the ocean within a short walk.
That was definitely the best flat we could imagine.
Cornelia and Bryan: Thanks so much for everything!

We couldn't have chosen a more perfect apartment than the one of Cornelia! It was an absolute delight to stay in one of her apartments. Sparkling clean and tidy, with only the best quality, from bed linen, cutlery, thoughful little cupcakes on our arrival and a nicely stocked little coffee station! The views from upstairs are breathtaking and the apartment is just around the corner from the mall, ocean and many other attractions.  I highly recommend staying with Cornelia, she is very friendly and helpful, when we left it felt like we had known her for years! When we are in the area again, we will definitely be making use of her beautiful little apartment! I wish I could stay there forever. Thank you for everything!
house owner very kindly

Staying at Cornelia's place in Cape Town is nothing less than living in a dream :)
It's stunningly beautiful place with heavenly views and wind that blows a new life into your lungs and heart.
Cornelia is a wonderful woman with a herat of gold and she literally looked after me and made sure that I am comfortable and well provided. She even drove me down to the mall and helped me buy things that came super handy during my stay there.
I am recommending Cornelia's home to every one who is that side of Cape!!!
You will thank yourself for having made a good decision.
The views are fantastic. The beach is beautiful and calm. The people around are friendly and everything about the place is just perfect
i will be here again next time

I would go back to this apartment in a heart bear! beautiful views and a modern clean apartment with very special touches (we loved the little cakes)
Cornelia is a wonderful woman and went above and beyond to ensure we had a lovely time at her apartment!
photographs dont do justice to this beautiful suite ..The ambiance is amazing...Tranquillity when you need it with all the necessities around the corner.

Clean, comfortable and well equipped apartment, a downside would be the lack of privacy because of the shared balcony and the next apartment walks past your open sitting room. But Cornea was a great host.

Cornelia’s place is so amazing, it was so neat than I expected and the views are just amazing. My friends and I felt so much comfortable with the help from our host. They helped us by suggesting what we can do for fun. We also loved the cakes she left us. It was our little paradise for the weekend.
if you love a place with not just a lovely indoor setting but also outdoor, then this is the place to go to and make sure you stay for at least two days coz trust me one day won't be enough

Stunning is the right word here. Also four stars are the truth. We had only one night, but we fell in love with this airbnb. The apartment is spacious, very clean and perfectly equipped! Herbert and Simon were very welcoming and easy to chat with. We could even use the Weber BBQ and their small boat to have a tour. Go to the beach by car. In the Marina you can not swim. We would always come back! Thank you!

This was one of the best Airbnb’s I have stayed in yet. The place was amazing and even better than the pictures . The hosts were excellent in terms of everything. I needed a last minute adjustment and the hosts were so willing to help and even exceeded my expectations in helping. I would thoroughly suggest this place to anyone . Excellent !!
good

Apartment was amazing! Herbert offered much more than normally Airbnb hosts do (for example bathrobes, many different kind of drinks and snacks.) Apartment was stylish and spotless. Location next to the Lake was perfect. Short drive to Muizenberg, Constantia etc... Herbert answered to all our questions quickly and was a best host ever! I would defintely recommend apartment to all of my friends and want to come back again soon!

We had a lovely time.  Great host, so helpfull and kind.  The frige was fulled with refreshments and everything you need.  Very beautiful inside and outside!  We went on the little boat outside, and the suroundings was absolutly stunning! I wish we could stay there longer!
It was absolutely a amazing place! Couldnt ask for a better one. Everything was made to feel ourselve at home. Herbert, thank you for everything ! Hope we can come back one day XX

We were delighted with the accommodation and the care and attention provided by Herbert which was superb.
The property was gleaming and was filled with many detail touches which made it feel like a home from home - thanks must also go to Megan and Simon for their friendly welcome and local knowledge.
We would not hesitate to recommend this property the whole experience was excellent.

This cottage was excellent. From the location to the hosts.  Simon/Herbert made extra effort because it was for a honeymoon couple and kept us informed with all information and activities. Thank you very much for that. Everything was clean and so inviting and very well equipped. We will definitely use this when ever we visit Cape Town again.

This apartment is gorgeous, it has all the amenities you could think of and more, including Netflix. The view and location are perfect. It’s quiet and serene. A perfect slice of heaven, feels like a beach house but has a much better price tag. Herbert and Simon were very welcoming and friendly, they respond very quickly and are happy to help. Would stay here again in a heartbeat.
Beautiful flat! Amazing view :)
Amazing spot
It was a great apartment! We loved the interior and beautiful view!

Charmaine’s flat is easily one of the most beautiful in central Cape Town, stunning views of table Mountain and lions head. The stunning decor really makes you feel at home. Checking in and out was hassle free. Charmaine was responsive and attentive. Parking was convenient too. We had an amazing time here! Thank you!
Really lovely view and super clean

We had a great time at Charmaine's place. The communication was super easy and quick and the place looks exactly like it does on the pictures. The neighborhood is very conveniently located and although it’s a lively neighborhood the apartment is very quiet! Would absolutely recommend staying there!
Very clean, beautifully decorated apartment.  very comfortable with lovely mountain and city views.  quiet block

This is the most beautiful and stylish place with so many thoughtful touches and a view that will truly take your breath away. Hubby and I were pleasantly surprised that there was a housekeeping service that made the bed and washed the dishes while we were out at breakfast. From the finishing touches to considerate amenities I cannot recommend this place enough. It’s so spacious and everything is brand new and high quality.
Great location and a beautiful place. I must stay!!
Everything was perfekt:)
Everything is ok and the view from the room is fantastic !
Awesome stay at your place. It was very beautiful as this apartment was directly located at the marina. If I will go surfing again at Muizenberg I wouldn’t hesitate to book your place again.
A great place.
Stunning flat in a great location and perfect view to relax at the waterfront. Gary was the perfect host. Would highly recommend anyone wishing to stay.
Great place , love the water on your doorstep

Awesome place, great amenities, incredible views!
I'll be back!
impeccable place in super quiet spot, yet near the beach. loved it
Very lovely
It was really awesome, the staff was lovely and the view amazing. I would come back
gary is a wonderful person and his home is like a house in fairy tales :) would definitely recommend.
Beautifully styled and decorated, very secure and easy location, lovely responsive and caring host

Looks exaclty like in the pictures, stylish, vintage and decorated with taste. Very cosy place and quite at night. The apartment is ideally situated in the heart of de Waterkant and easy access to the places we wanted to visit. We had issues with the windows but as we  had not planned to stay long we decided to let it go. Else the experience was good thnks to the hosts
Very safe location, something that worried me vs booking a hotel. Gated complex with security and parking. Also very convenient location too! Flat is very stylish and comfortable 😊
Nice place. I would go again.

Dean and his cohost Damion were both very easy to work with and helpful. They made our first trip to Cape Town go smoothly. My husband and I had a few questions for them after we checked into the space and they quickly responded to us—Very attentive hosts. The location is fantastic, walking distance to coffee shops, the waterfront and city center.
Been looking for the place I’d stay every time I visit Cape Town. This is it!  Loved the decor, the location, great security. A lovely space !
Thanks for the lovely stay! Everything was great and as described except the tv/Netflix not working. Otherwise fantastic !
Amazing place. Amazing location. Amazing communication. This is how every Airbnb should be run!
Great location!

Great host and place!
5 out of 5

Carin’s place is nestled at the top of a beautiful, peaceful road. The location is the perfect tranquil escape from the hustle and bustle of the city down below. The room is quite literally squeaky clean and ultra comfortable. We needed to check in early (at a moment’s notice) - and  Carin didn’t hesitate to help and welcomed us with a beaming smile. This was honestly one of the best air bnb experiences we’ve had. Will be back!
As good as it gets. The place is a lovely, clean and stylish house set across several floors on a hillside. Carin gave us soooo much local knowledge and help. Massive thanks. Book it people!
Carin's space is really comfortable, in a great location - easy to get out into town, yet really quiet in the evenings. Lovely finishes, super accommodating host. We would definitely stay here again.

Was super happy to stay at Carin’s place, both in terms of the boutique style room, lovely view from your bed, excess to your own balcony, and the great location (close to shops and restaurants but in quiet area). Finally Carin is easy and nice to communicate with.

The mountain views and close proximity to the city bowl made this place really central and ideal for exploring Cape Town’s many attractions. Very stylish and modern room, super clean and Carin was an excellent host!

Spotless bedroom and bathroom!
Very welcoming and attentive host :)
Great location for getting to meetings quickly.
Nice and quiet road with a great view of Table Mountain! If you want a bigger room as for room number 3 at the end, it was lovely!
Wunderschönes Zimmer, sehr sauber und alles sehr stilvoll eingerichtet! Ich komme auf jeden Fall wieder! 😊
We had no idea that there were accommodations like this in Cape Town centre. Quiet, modern, stylish, clean. Amazing views. Committed hosts. We will be back.

This place is amazing. Very clean and modern room. Location is excellent and very safe. Blue Cafe nearby for breakfast. Many restaurants ( Kloof Street) within walking distance. Carin provided us with a lot of helpfull information. Thanks for this lovely stay

Lovely room with a great bathroom, bed and balcony! A lot of attention for detail too. Carin is a wonderful and helpful host! She was there from the beginning till the end to make sure we had a good stay.  Last but not least the view on Table Mountain is stunning.

I spent 3 wonderful days at this beautiful house. Gordon and Lynn are very lovely, friendly and generous persons. The room is very clean and excellently equipped. I can only recommend it to anyone and I will definitely come back again! Thanks for everything Gordon & Lynn!
Great 👍🏻 just great 👍🏻

Gordon and Lynette are amazing people, let alone hosts. Our stay was nothing short of wonderful and we were really sad to be leaving. The Room is very stylish and comfortable. The wet room ( not a bathroom) is absolutely stunning and was very exciting to use. The bed is amazing and so comfortable. They are both knowledgeable people that you can have engaging conversation with. Lynette is determined, ambitious and very funny whilst Gordon is an expert and engaging in all topics.
The place is situated very close to the beach and all amenities are a 15min walk away.
They are also LGBT+ friendly and accommodating to people from all walks of life.
Rosie and Jennie -the dogs- are also absolute sweethearts and completely harmless.
Their home is the warmest place in all of Hout Bay.

an incredible stay. the house is a gem, stylish and easy to feel comfortable in. gordon and his wife lynette a great hosts, for me gordon extended the breakfast offer time and their dogs kissed my feet. great surrounding in hout bay, cant imagine a better place to calm down in the whole western cape arrea. thank you for everything!
Neat and clean accommodation. Nice and private. Gordon is a very friendly and welcoming host. Lovely setting, so close to the beach.
Great hospitality, a nice and clean room,  exellent breakfasts and a perfect location i Haut Bay.
Great stay and an awesome host. Easily accessible and comfortable. Amazing shower room!!! Worth every cent

Gordon & Linette are wonderful people. Living by the sea in Houtbay a bauetiful area to stay. Gordon knows a lot about nature, history , Zuid Afrika you can ask him anything you want he can answer your questions.
The room, bathroom are nice, very clean and we sleep very well in a good bed. We love to come back and meet are friends again. Thank you so much. An & Dieter
Everything was perfect.

Visitors will find Lynette and Gordon to be very hospitable hosts who make the visitor feel most welcome. They provide helpful information about the Cape Town area which is very useful to have. I enjoyed my stay with them.

We had a wonderful stay at Carins accommodation. The room was really neat and has a wonderful view on Table Mountain. It was fully equipped and had everything you need. Carin is a super friendly host, who is always there if you need something. We can highly recommend her accommodation!
It was a wonderful stay, Carin and her husband are such welcoming hosts and the room we booked was so cozy and tastefully decorated. We will definitely come back!

We had a great time staying in cul de sac! Late checkin was no problem and the communication with Carin was really nice and easy. She provided us with good tips for food and activities. The place itself is in a really nice and convenient location. We would definitely stay again!
Modern and clean apartment with one of the finest views on table mountain. Great amenities. Carin is a very welcoming and helpful host who makes her guests feel at home.
New modern Apartment at quiet location with great view on table mountain. Easy communication and very helpful host.
We can definitely recommend this room with private bathroom! Everything was very clean and nicely decorated. Modern and so new. The communication was very good as well :) Thanks for everything again

We had a wonderful time at the Woodside House! The guest suite is beautifully furnished, spotlessly clean and very comfortable. The peaceful surrounding and the breathtaking views of Table Mountain made our stay most enjoyable! Carin truly is a superhost, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere and being extremely helpful. Thank you Carin, looking forward to seeing you again!

All perfect! If you go to Cape Town you need to live in this district and then Carins rooms are your perfect choice! Brand new, super clean, nice architecture and few on table mountain from bed!! Carin is a lovely host who gives great recommendations and helps whenever she can!

Carin was an absolute dream of a host and her accommodations were incredible - they were clean, conveniently located, and had incredible views of Table Mountain. She consistently checked in on me to make sure I was alright and provided tips for the best Cape Town experience, which was extremely helpful as I was traveling solo. Overall she helped make my trip better than I could’ve ever expected!
Great AirBnB, would stay there again. Walking distance from great restaurants. Carin is an excellent host and her place is sparkling clean. Highly recommended!

Hier kann man sich nur wohl fühlen. Angefangen bei Vanessa der bezaubernden, aufmerksamen Gastgeberin, die einem jeden Wunsch von den Lippen abliest, bis zur wunderschönen Einrichtung des Appartements. Das Frühstück war der Hammer. Jeden Morgen gab es frisches Obst, Käse, Wurst und Ei nach Wunsch. Wir haben uns so wohl gefühlt, dass wir gerne länger geblieben wären. Vanessa ist sehr nett und hatte sehr gute Tipps. Wir werden uns immer an die Zeit bei ihr erinnern und hoffentlich bald wieder kommen.
A lovely retreat, perfectly located for privacy, stunning views, amazing hosts and a fantastic breakfast spread.

Vanessa is a great and caring host. Very flexible and helped us with our trip.
Excellent breakfast!

We had a wonderful stay at Vanessa's place! The apartement itself is loveley furnished and decorated, very clean and you can enjoy the beautiful garden right in front and listen to the birds singing in the morning. The house is located in a safe and very nice area. We didn't meet Vanessa in person but her parents-in-law and her fiancé took very good care of us and served us the most delicious breakfast in the garden every morning. Even on our last day the packed us a little breakfast for our journey home because we had to leave early in the morning. We highly recommend this place and would love to stay there again soon!

Vanessa's accommodation is very nice: well located, furnished lovely & modern, sparkling clean and has a great little garden right in front of the room. The hospitality was very warm, and the tips great. Thank you for the great accommodation, we will recommend you!

It was really awesome. The accommodation was well thought out and clean right down to the smallest detail.
Vanessa made a delicious and healthy breakfast every day. Really tasty.
I recommend their accommodation for every visitor in Cape Town.

Vanessa’s guest unit is gorgeously and thoughtfully finished, with all kinds of small touches that make the space stand out from other places.
It’s perfect for tourists and business travellers alike that enjoy a bit of extra luxury and the included breakfast is lovely (though I only had the chance to use it once because of my schedule).
The internet is a bit patchy though so if you need to make important calls (as opposed to just browsing or general usage) you might experience some dead spots.
The location at the bottom of the sand dune to Sandy Bay is also a bonus for those who enjoy the outdoors and stunning sunsets.
I hope to be back soon!

I loved this space. The location was simply dreamy. Hout Bay is a quieter area than more central CpT-yet Cpt is a beautiful and easy 25 minute away: driving options are along the stunning cliffs overlooking the water, or winding through the forests of Constantia past Kirstenbosch. Both beautiful options. The home was gorgeous and looks just like the pictures. The bed was one of the most comfortable beds I've ever stayed on! If you want to visit Cpt, yet are looking to stay in a beautiful, calm, nature setting, yet close to everything Cpt has to offer, stay here! The hosts were responsive, kind, generous, offered great tips and were chilled. I loved staying here.
This house is amazing!! so beautiful and the view is incredible. Vanessa did everything to make our stay comfortable and easy. 100% recommend to anyone looking for a little time away 💞

Vanessa is the most outstanding host! I don’t think I’ve ever felt so at home and spoilt whilst travelling! Her place is beautifully designed and decorated and sparking clean, you need look no further for your home away from home in Hout Bay! Every morning Vanessa put on a delicious healthy breakfast with an incredible view of Table Mountain. Unfortunately I had to cut my trip a few days short but my partner was enjoying it so much that she stayed behind. Vanessa took such good care of her and we are both so grateful, thank you again Vanessa.

Charmaine was so accommodating and answered every question very quickly before we even booked. It was very refreshing and made our last night in Cape Town stress-free. Our flight schedule threw us some curveballs and Charmaine was so helpful and understanding. The condo was very hip, extremely clean and had every amenity we could've asked for. She thought of every detail for a perfect stay, she even left a very tasty granola snack that we indulged in. The location was perfect and just a short uber ride away from anywhere you might want to go. We felt so safe with the key fob and lobby security which was huge for us traveling alone as two young women. The elevator was also a game changer seeing that we had four huge luggage bags to carry around. We were actually bummed we couldn't stay longer because the place was so nice and we got amazing sleep on the very comfortable bed.
Amazing apartment and great location. The apartment is beautifully decorated with everything you need for a short or longer stay. Thank you Charmaine!
Beautiful modern apartment. Very clean and well equipped.
Tolle, moderne, sehr zentral gelegene Unterkunft. Sehr grosszügige und hilfsbereite Gastgeberin. Wie würden auf jeden fall wieder kommen.
Wonderful place

This place is outstanding, stylish and in a great location. An Uber away to the V&A Waterfront. Charmaine has thought of everything, I literally mean  Everything! The attention to detail was so impressive I completely understand why she is a “super host” . There were bathrobes, luxury soaps, sanitary items, a sewing kit and much more. Highly recommend Charmaine’s as a host and her place in Cape Town. Thanks again, we will be back.
Clean and stylish in the CBD. Beautiful city view.  Easy check in. Quality linens and towels.

The apartment is welcoming and well kept. Perfect location. It has the home away from home feel with almost all the basics that one needs for breakfast (cereal, milk, coffee, ginger snaps, olive oil, spices etc). Everything is of high quality, from crockery to bathroom towels, morning robes, etc. I felt secured and at home.
Charmaine's place is beautiful and right at the centre of the city. Perfectly clean, beautifully styled, with so many extra amenities and touches.
My favorite space in town to stay!

The apartment was wonderful! The decor is amazing. The bed was super comfortable and the apartment had sufficient heating as the weather was rather chilly. Location is amazing... 5 min walk to the shops and waterfront.
I would highly recommend staying at Deans apartment

Dean’s place is a well designed and decorated double volume loft style apartment. Located in a very safe area, literally down the road from a Police Station and many upmarket restaurants are directly opposite the entrance of the Gated Apartment block.
V&A Waterfront is walking distance (5 to 10 mins) and getting an Uber to pretty much any location on the Cape Town coast is very easy and cost effective due to the central location of the apartment.
Dean’s Pre check-in welcome message with all the nearest tourist hotspots and also his personal favorites was a great touch and a warm welcome into the city after a long day of Post-Call traveling from Durban.
Well stocked, clean and neat - and there are little areas all over the loft like the Vespa bar and the hanging Bicycle which give the space so much character and sets a great vibe for a trip to Cape Town.

This unit is delightful and very trendy. Conveniently located, close to the best restaurants and 5 minutes drive to Cticc and the Waterfront. Communication was clear and the  instructions were easy to follow. I would definitley recommend this spacious and comfortable  apartment.
our stay was very convenience, the place is very safe and has a great location. The host is amazing.

As a couple travelling through South Africa, Cape Town was our last stop and we really wanted a place to call our own for the week, which was central and stylish. That’s exactly what we got here and we can’t write a more positive review.
The space was impeccably clean, had everything you could need to settle in (including a lovely bottle of wine thank you!), and is only a short walk from shops and activities.
Check-in was super simple with everything send both on the AirBnB app but also via WhatsApp which really helped.
The space is beautifully decorated and small touches like scented room fresheners give it a real home-feel.
Fast internet and a home entertainment system is perfect for relaxing nights in, which we made the most of after our month of travelling.
100% recommend this space 👍

Comfortable, safe and convenient.
I can’t express how content I was with this choice of lodging. The location allows you to get to many parts of Cape Town very easily, if you don’t know what to do while here plenty of suggestions are given at check in. All the while you have the safety and comfort of home. Great place and great value. No place I’d rather stay while visiting Cape Town.
Damion was extremely helpful and communicative. The place was lovely - excellent location, very safe. Would happily stay again.
Expect a lovely home with all the convenience you can imagine. Great host
Perfect host. Perfect space. Perfect location . Will definitely be back!

I am caught between giving the rave review the place deserves and not telling anyone about it so I can stay there every time I am in CT.  Jokes aside, this has been my best AirBNB experience to date - I booked very late but was met with a swift and kind response, everything was sorted in minutes, the directions to the location through to explanation on how everything works was perfect. Not only that but the place is in tip top condition, stylish, clean and well equipped. The guards at the gate are super friendly and the area is super central. A great stay indeed!
Great place!

We had a great experience at this Dalebrook apartment! Would highly recommend booking here if you are looking for a comfortable and convenient place to stay while in Kalk Bay. Shari is quick to respond and very helpful. We will be back for a long weekend soon!
Amazing gem, conveniently located. Such a welcoming space that we struggled to leave! Thank you, Shari.
This a lovely apartment, I highly recommend

Great location, beautiful modern home
Wonderful service

I almost dont want other people to find out about this gem so I can have it all for myself! What a stunning apartment, right on the beach and above a very vibey cafe/lunch spot. You are also only a very short walk away from Kalkbay centre with all its shops and restaurants. The two bedrooms are so sunny, you can't help but to feel like you are on holiday.  Also sparkly clean and very tastefully decorated.  Derickson, the host's helper is a really nice guy - carried all our luggage and baby's pram up the one flight of stairs. I will definitely recommend this place to anyone!
Excellent location with great views from the balcony. Would come back anytime!

Gorgeous apartment. Impeccably and stylishly furnished and very comfortable. Great location - the cafe downstairs does a mean breakfast - and super views from the little balcony. Shari was available and responsive to questions and Derickson super helpful on-site when we needed things at check-out. Would definitely recommend.

Our stay at Shari's place came to an end too fast. The place is spotless and very modern decor. Shari created a space where friends find it easy to socialize and enjoy sun downers on the balcony,  with a gorgeous view of the ocean. Great location as we walked almost everywhere we wanted to be, and the local coffee shop and bakery in front was a gem.
Great place in a great location.

Fantastic apartment in an amazing location. Stunning view of table mountain from the balcony. Felt very safe here with 24hr security on reception and underground parking. Can’t do much better in Cape Town than stay here!
Great new appartment with infinity rooftop pool and barbecue area. Great hospitality with coffee, milk, water and cookies. Would definetely stay there again.
The pictures aren't doing the place any justice because wow it is beautiful! We had the best stay ever and they are really nice and friendly too. It is so close to almost everything.
Amazing Views, convenient location, superb communication turnaround times, neat and clean!! An overall great place!
This apartment is cozy but beautiful.  You have an amazing view and it's very conveniently located. The host were quick to respond and very helpful.

Hi Jayson , the property is well situated & appointed. New modern building. The apartment is clean , well maintained. Sufficient cupboard space for 2 people. Well equipped kitchen. I was on my own. I am please that the weather was such that did not require aircon. Sunday afternoon when I checked in, the living room was very hot and humid. The bedroom's aircon unit did not cope with cooling the entire property. Your listing indicates that the property is air conditioned. The bathroom's illumination sensor switches on the light and the air extractor every time one walks by the bathroom's door. Annoying. The bed in the bedroom is way too big for the space it is situated in.
There is no dining desk/top or table.
Parking bay. 2 levels lower than the elevator' reach For tenants with luggage (me) it was a surprise.
One last thing. The wind on Tuesday night blew away the furniture on the balcony and banged the hanging seat against the window. I thought is was an attempted break-in. Would like to thank Eloise and Natalia for assisting me with the non functioning main door's lock.
Jayson's place is well located and comfortable. the best is having breakfast with a view to table mountain! Nice place to stay between CBD and the Waterfront
Saubere schöne Wohnung mit direktem Blick auf den Tafelberg. Wir haben uns Wohlgefühlt gerne wieder.

Great place to stay, very safe and secure. Easy checkin and lovely flat. Great pool facilities on the rooftop area and the balcony is great for all meals overlooking Table Mountain. About a 5-10 minute walk to the V&A water front area - mostly along the waterways which are very safe.  Well equipped kitchen to eat in if you needed. Overall we had a great stay.

Melhor Airbnb que já fiquei. O apto é lindo, tudo novinho e de muito bom gosto.  Eloise e Natalia são pessoas incríveis, sempre acessíveis e dispostas a ajudar. A localização é ótima, perto de tudo. Super recomendo, e quando voltar à CPT, é lá que quero ficar ! AMEI

Was our best Air B&B experience by far!
Lovely luxury cottage with the most thoughtful and warming hosts!
A real gem!

I don't even know where to begin. Nathalie is an amazing host, very nice and welcoming. The cottage is outstanding, modern, stunning and very clean. You have your own privacy as there is a separate entrance to the cottage that has a  bulcany overseeing the garden. It is exactly as the pictures you see. Kitchen is well furnished with everything you need. I enjoyed my stay so much . A home away from home. Definitely recommending this place, you won't regret it ❤️
Friendly, warm, welcoming and stylish
Amazing host, went the extra mile to help. Id go back any day
Nathalie welcomed us into her lovely cottage, it is very stylish and modern. I enjoyed my stay

This is a fabulous place to stay. Beautifully decorated with quality furnishings, appliances, crockery, pots and pans. It's sparkling clean and filled with light. Anything you can think of is there, including breakfast goodies, tea/coffee, spices, olive oil. Even in the bathroom there is absolutely nothing more one could wish for.
Nathalie is a remarkable host who leaves no stone unturned to make your stay totally enjoyable.
A definite must-do!

Nathalie’s Cottage was amazing! Very modern and exceptionally clean. The location is quiet and very close to the US Embassy. Very thoughtful touches with different types of Coffee and teas, and lots of different choices for cereal. Full kitchen is also great for home cooking. The reception by Nathalie and her husband were stellar and they were very friendly. Best part about the Cottage is the outside deck to relax and unwind. Definitely my new go to place in Cape Town!

Kai cottage was perfect, great location for our purposes, spacious and airy, well equipped, spotless and Nathalie is a wonderful host.
This is why we use AirB&B !

The place was absolutely incredible. Beautiful and stylish set up, the comfiest bed I’ve ever slept in!! Great hospitality. I honestly can’t say enough nice things about the place, I had such a lovely stay.
Absolutely beautiful

The pictures in the ad are great to build excitement but this place and the view will still take your breath away upon arrival. Our stay at the Strathmore was a dream and just what we needed to get a quick retreat from two very tough schedules.
Robyn & Bianca were incredible hosts. So willing to go the extra mile and ensure the best possible stay.
The apartment is beautiful and curated to create a seamless, relaxing holiday. Lots of small touches and facilities that add to a holistic, fruitful stay that allow you to do pretty much anything you wish in the heart of Camps Bay.
What a treat! I hope we can become regular guests at the Strathmore.

I had a fantastic experience staying at Robyn’s place! There’s really not enough I can say, one of my top Airbnb experiences. To start with the apartment is really nice, clean, bright, the view over the beach and mountains is beautiful and the sun deck wonderful. The layout was really great for me and my friend staying there. The location is outstanding, just a short walk from the beach in Camps Bay with restaurants, grocery store, bus, etc. Robyn was an excellent host, going above and beyond to make me feel welcome, she was  very responsive and helpful with everything I needed. I had a wonderful stay and would love to come back again and/or recommend to a friend!

We highly recommend this accommodation. We stayed here for 2 nights (way to short!). Fantastic place with amazing view at Camps Bay and also good starting point to discover the city and its sights. Robyn is layed-back and was always available  to support us. Would definitely book again.
A great place to stay in Camps Bay thanks to Robyns hospitality. It's a beautiful and tastefully decorated apartment with great location.
Everything is like described.  Very stylish appartment with a great view over the ocean. We really can enjoyed our stay and really can recommend it.

The place is as you see in the pictures breathtakingly beautiful. The absolute plus is the patio.
And Robyn and - let‘s say - her team. As she was not there we had two others to take care of us. All 3 were always available via phone. The 2 checked in on us regularly giving us the feeing that they are just a shout away for all our needs.
When we arrived we fould little snacks and dinner for us and also bread for breakfast the next day. As I had a cold when I arrived it was perfect so we did nit have to leave the apartment.
The tipps we got were perfect with our 11 months baby.
Camps Bay beach is in front of the door.
Place itself is tastefully decorated and you find everything you need!
We absolutely loved Robyn‘s place!
By far the most glorious place on earth! Thank you, Robyn. We will definitely be back.

This apartment has stunning views and an incredible location: just five minutes’ walk to the beach and the beachside restaurants, but fully quiet enough to feel secluded. Robyn and her team went the extra mile for us, and it was greatly appreciated. If we’re ever back in Cape Town, we would definitely stay there again!
Awesome host, great stay. Thank you Robyn!
Amazing hospitality, one of the best places you could ever be.
Nice, clean, calm although close to a larger road, a lot of attention by the hosts while respecting carefully your privacy.
A defenite yes from me

Stunning place to stay in. Excellent location close to the beach and restaurants. Could hear the waves all night long. Great host - José was very thoughtful and efficient with our check-in. Would definitely recommend the place.
What a awesome host 😁 lovely place to stay !!!
It was lovely stay! Close to kite beach! Thank you Jose 🤙
Excelent ! Great hospitality, clean and beautiful.
Lovely room and outside area. Walking distance to the beach
Lovely location if you require room only.
The location is ideal and the view from the patio is amazing. Place was clean and smelt great. José was welcoming and very helpful. You will feel right at home
An excellent place to be at

The room is super lovely. It is stylish and super clean. And even though I was the first guest, everything was already so perfect. Jessica is such a lovely person, and does everything to make your stay the best it can be. The views and the location are great as well. And of course the pool is awesome. Highly recommended this place to others!

It was a pleasure staying with Jess, Dewet, Bob and the dogs! They are all so lovely and I would say it was one of my best Airbnb experiences. The apartment is really clean and comfortable. Green Point is also a great location to stay at while in Cape Town.
I would highly recommend Jess' place! :-)

Location - 5 Star
View - 5 Star
Interior and Cleanliness - 5 Star
Everything about the place and the host is fabulous. We had a pleasantly good time. Host is thoughtful and social. You will not regret your stay here! 👌🏽

Amazing place with the best hosts!
Jessica‘s place is just perfect for anyone who wants to explore Cape Town. We loved the view from terrace and slept very well in the big, comfy bed. Everything is clean and very stylish. Jessica is the nicest host we‘ve ever met, she is there whenever you need her and has some good tips for anything you have in mind. Thank you so much for our lovely stay.
Will definitely recommend this place to our friends!

Jessica’s place is just lovely. The room was spacious and bright, it was sparkling clean, and had special touches. Jessica is a great host, very reliable and the communication extremely efficient. It was a space the held our time in Cape Town beautiful. Would definitely recommend it.
Amazing place and host. Nice location, stunning view of the city and ocean.

An absolute gem of an AirBnB in Greenpoint. Everything as you see in the photos.
Spotlessly clean, generous hospitality and stunning views from a fabulous contemporary house.
Fantastic place and great host. Clean, well located and very helpful host. We love this place!

Jessica's place has a great view over Greenpoint, a balcony to relax on and a deck with a pool. What else to wish for? The room was cleaned on a daily basis, including fresh towels and drinks where needed. Jessica is always available and more than happy to help you. If not, there's still Bob who's very kind and polite.
You can walk to the main road or easily grab an Uber and within no time you're at the Waterfront, Clifton, Kloof Street or the many other places to see in Capetown.
Anyway, would definitely recommend this AirBnB if you're looking for a place to stay in CPT! Thanks again Jessica and hopefully till next time!

Wir waren für fünf Nächte bei Jessica. Es war unglaublich und wir empfehlen es zu 100%.
Jessica und ihr Freund waren so gastfreundlich und haben ihr ganzes Haus mit uns geteilt. Wir durften den Pool mitbenutzen, es gab jeden Tag Kaffee und Bob hat uns, sofern wir wollten, das Zimmer gemacht.
Besser geht es nicht und es war eine völlig neue Erfahrung in einem Airbnb!

Loved the interior design, and the ocean view. Working while listening to the sound of the waves was so relaxing, even though there was load shedding during the evening, I could sit in the living room and look at the amazing night sky it really made my day!
The whole apartment is sparkling clean and had basically everything I needed. 6 star accommodation for 4 star price, it’s really worth it.
You can smell the host wasn’t lying it is definitely newly refurbished haha, it’s not very bad, you can’t really smell it if you leave the windows open, but if the smells were gone, it would be perfect!
Amy was such a sweet host, and she brought me candles during load shedding.
Very pleasant stay. Well located and every detail was thought through when designing the apartment to make the holiday extra special. Amy Li was a very good host.
It was great staying at Amy Li's place.

This is an amazing apartment ,decor is first class everything brand new stylish, apartment is on top floor with most amazing sea views like no other u seen before the host is also amazing will definitely recommend  for future guests
Amy’s place is OUTSTANDING!! Very modern and extremely beautiful! The view is amazing! It completely surpassed my expectations! Definitely worth the money!
A wonderful place
The place was amazing

This apartment is just so beautiful, outstanding! It's pricey but I would definitely recommend it. Getting around with the MyCiti Bus is no problem. It's out of town, but everything you need is closeby. I loved my stay with Amy, everything was perfect :)

Beautiful apartment, and views of the City Bowl!  Quick response from Allen, and Jess.Thoughtful note and sweet treats. Highly recommended!

This place was great. Will stay again next time we are in Cape Town.
