Lovely host! Very stylish and comfortable unit with everything that you need. Would highly recommend it!
A wonderful serene place with a great host.

This is hands down one of the best stays we have ever experienced. The place is absolutely beautiful and the views are to die for. It was raining hard for most of the stay but the place did not lose its charm (which is pretty phenomenal). The way its structured gives complete privacy so you'll never feel like you're intruding. There is a fully functional kitchen if you prefer making your own meals and a comprehensive guide with suggestions from previous guests if you would rather eat out. So many thoughtful touches like an umbrella by the door (I suppose it's for the beach but it really helped). The host was very helpful and warned us of loadshedding (a lamp and candles had already been provided). She also helped us get back something of great sentimental value we had forgotten. We are absolutely floored! If you're in Simonstown and need a place this is the place!

I had the most wonderful stay. Jessie is an attentive and gracious host. I arrived in the midst of one of Cape Town’s legendary storms and hunkered down till it passed. Jessie has thought of absolutely everything in the loft. The loft is situated walking distance from the town’s center and I could not have asked for a more perfect place to wind down. The views over False Bay are simply breathtaking. It was a solo trip and I will be returning with my husband as soon as the travel ban is lifted.
We had a fantastic stay at this beautiful loft! The views are incredible! Couldn’t recommend it enough!
Stunning apartment. Absolutely incredible views.

This place is absolutely amazing!! The view was spectacular, probably one of the best views in Simonstown. The loft was super clean, well equipped and just the perfect getaway. My husband is quite tall so lofts are generally not his first choice, but the layout and design of this loft was done so well he loved it. The parking is next to the loft which works really well. And the check-in was so flexible and easy. We can’t wait to come again.
Stylish and comfortable apartment with gorgeous views. Attention to little details makes this space extra special and it's ideally located for a weekend away in the South.

I had a wonderful stay in this loft, and I would highly recommend it to anyone. The view is spectacular, the loft is sparkling clean, and has so many thoughtful touches including a small collection of books to enjoy while you’re there. The host is delightful, and provides a comprehensive list of restaurants, and activities you can do while in Simon’s Town which I found very helpful! All in all, it was a great stay.

This space is even better than the photographs. It has incredible views and is an amazing break away from everything. Jessie was a very attentive and thoughtful host and made sure to I had everything I needed. It's a great spot, good location, and really good value for money.
A beautiful stay at a beautiful loft. A stunning little place. Tranquil. Clean. Great attention to detail. Highly recommend. Jessie is great at communicating and a wonderful host.

We had a wonderful stay at The Loft. Very tidy and beautiful views. Jessie is a great host - friendly, accommodating and quick to respond to any questions we had. The loft was clean, modern and had all the amenities needed for a few nights stay.

Matt's apartment is absolutely incredible! 3 reasons why we loved the experience:
1. You'll get stay in the most sought after street in Cape Town with magnificent views and cool restaurants within walking distance.
2. The modern + minimal interior with personal touches that made us feel at home. Great coffee, monopoly + netflix, happy plants, etc.
3. Matt is a friendly, accommodating host who's quick on the response and went the extra mile to make our stay better than we could've imagined.
100% would stay here again in the future.

Matt's place is sparkling clean and stylishly done with special welcome touches all over the apartment. Once you take in the view of Cape Town below and Table Mountain above you understand where the name "lookout" comes from....its spectacular. The best thing is when you wake up in the morning, look to the right and see the mountain from the comfort of the large queen bed. Matt went above and beyond to make us feel welcome and taken care of, his communication was quick and clear and he even helped me get into the apartment when i was separated form the keys one afternoon Thanks Matt, you will be a superhost in no time and we will be back. Peet.

Wonderful place, full of light, high ceilings, beautiful furnishing, comfortable bed, secure building, safe neighborhood, the most amazing shower, convenient kitchen, excellent communication with Matt......Our stay at The Lookout could not have been any better! We felt right at home when we walked in and despite our fear of the street noise we actually slept really well and weren't bothered by it at all. Matt is a wonderful host and was very accommodating at all times. We will definitely return!
This is a stylish apartment in an iconic building in a central trendy neighborhood. All the designer touches and close to many vibey spots...

Matt's apartment in Capetown was a real home away from home, and perfect place for a stay in the city.   Matt was a great host, and super helpful at the check in and throughout the entire stay.   The apartment is clean, and looks even better than the photos, with some of the most amazing views of the city and Table Mountain!  Highly recommend, and looking forward to staying again on another trip to Capetown.  Thanks Matt!!!

I cannot recommend this place enough, I was genuinely sad to leave. The place is carefully curated and includes everything you need for a lengthy stay.  It is centrally located in a prime position for someone who wants to explore Cape Town on foot, close to all the Kloof street restaurants, bars and shops. The flat also has a 360 degree view which is really hard to beat. Matt was a gracious host, and a pleasure to deal with. I will definitely be back!
We enjoyed staying at the Look out and would recommend this place to anyone. This is the most convenient and close to the best spots in Cape Town.

10/10 would recommend. The apartment is cozy with lots of thoughtful touches, and the views are really something special. Matt was an attentive host, and made us feel at home. If you're in doubt and reading this review, go for it!
Matt’s place is so stunning and well designed. It was furnished with beautiful touches and is super central. Would definitely stay here again

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would highly recommend to future travelers. We worked remotely for part of our stay and the incredible view from the sun room was a great backdrop to our remote 'office'. Internet works well too. We hope to go back some day!

The perfect location for a single person or couple wanting to explore Cape Town, it was incredibly easy to get around town and the Vida e cafe at the corner of the building was a nice treat in the mornings. The apartment has everything you will need with added luxury. Do yourself a favour and check out the rooftop view, unobstructed views of both Green Point stadium and Table Mountain. Highly recommend.
The place is really convenient and minutes away from everything. i loved my Cape Town experience, it was amazing, thanks to Anthea.
An awesome apartment in a very central location. It was very neat, modern and clean with great amenities (WiFi, Netflix, modern kitchen appliances) which made our stay much more comfortable.
Everything is perfect i am definitely coming back

Perfectly located.
Awesome host!
Safe, clean, modern.
You will not regret booking here.
The perfect location for a little break. Space is beautifully furnished and Anthea is a great host.
This apartment had it all! Great location, stylish space, safe and secure building. My wife and I stayed for a month and Anthea went out of her way to ensure our stay was perfect. Highly recommend!
Place is clean with modern interior. Safe and a walking distance to the shops.
Anthea's place far exceeded my expectations. Stunning little apartment with exceptional amenities.  The coffee is superb, too!

This place was neat and stylish. Absolutely clean and quite comfortable. We enjoyed the quick responses recieved from the host. I would highly recommend to people that don't enjoy hotels but still want the feel.
Anthea's place is a real Gem, book a break here, you wont regret it :)

Anthea was a really attentive host who made us feel at home away from home. Everything was as advertised and some things were even better in person. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay and we will be sure to recommend it to anybody who wants to stay anywhere near the V&A and/or city bowl. A++

Outstanding!!
The review is a bit lengthy but it’s worth the read.
I will begin at the entrance of the building:
The security guards were so polite and helpful. They greeted us with a smile; I have never felt so welcome. The greeting was genuine and not forced. We had to leave our luggage because we arrived earlier than the check-in time. They logged in my details and check-in our bags into the storage it was so quick and effortless. When we returned to check-in, the check-in process was so quick and efficient. They were able to explain where to find the apartment and all the facilities that were available to us.
The elevator was spotless and had a sanitiser dispenser inside which we appreciated.
I cannot begin to explain how clean and sophisticated the apartment is. The pictures do not do any justice to the apartment. The layout alone is just beautiful and the attention to detail throughout the apartment is really rare to find. The apartment is on the 3rd floor but you can see the city clearly.
Anthea’s communication was just outstanding; I believe she responded to all my enquiries in 30min, even before I booked the apartment. She would take the liberty of checking on us every day we were there and that was appreciated.
The bedding and towels were clean, and are of exceptional quality. There were extra towels and a big blanket/throw.
As for amenities, there was everything you could need and ask for and more. There is a convenient cafeé downstairs (next to the entrance), swimming pool, bbq/braai area on the top floor which is well kept with an incredible view of the table mountain and the V&A Waterfront.
The apartment is located perfectly, at least for our needs. I Strongly, strongly recommend Anthea’s beautiful apartment.
This place is so beautiful, clean and also situated 2 minutes away from Waterfront, great value for money

Tastefully furnished place.  Great rooftop clubhouse with a pool and sea views. Loved the big screen TV with Netflix and high speed WiFi. Nice patio with mountain views. Good location. Value for money. Friendly and helpful host. Enjoyed my stay.

Great host, great place. Very clean and modern apartment. Great view and very central. Easy check in and check out. Luggage storage service available if your flight is much later than the 10pm check out time. Anthea is very quick with her responses.
The space was every bit what I needed & my experience was very positive.
It was a beautiful stay. Everything was up to standard and more.  And Anthea was a petty awesome host who was very thoughtful..
Stylish apartment. A lot of effort made to make guests feel welcome
Excellent stay ! Would recommend to anyone .
If you looking for tranquility this is the perfect place to go to.  QT overload.

Cabin in the woods Hout Bay is as it is portrayed exactly that, a tranquil and secluded lodge high up on the mountain side making up part of the Table Mountain Reserve overlooking the magnificent Orange Kloof Reserve.  While rustic the rooms reflect the style of a log cabin and I had the opportunity of taking advantage of the owner Sven to have dinner which was on offer and was superbly delicious.  All in all an unusual find in the middle of Cape Town.  A real get away from it all.  Great also if you love to hike as you step out straight onto mountain trails.  I will be back!

We had a lovely break away from the city here. The place was stylish and clean, with a stunning view of the mountains.. the photos don’t do justice. Sven was a great host and cook too! Would definitely recommended to anyone!

Review:
An incredible place to relax in - this beautiful cabin in the woods is surrounded by nature and has the most amazing views of the surrounding mountains. Sven is an amazing host who guided us around the area and Maxine the super friendly guard dog guided us on a mountain walk. In the evening we popped upstairs and Sven cooked us the best Thai chicken curry we’ve ever had.

Thank you !
An incredible Treehouse feeling home. Beautiful bedrooms and hikes. Sven has so accommodating and even had a menu of divine food one can order. He is a cook and lives upstairs with his doggo Max.
100% recommend booking here. What a treat.
Had a lovely time here. Definitely recommend if you need a place to get away from everything and relax.

Sven’s cottage is a hidden gem! The tranquility you feel upon arrival would be enough then add his kind and welcoming personality on top of a cozy cabin and you have a perfect stay. I HIGHLY recommend having him cook dinner and breakfast for you! The food is outstanding! I can’t say enough great things about the space! We will definitely be back!

Sven's beautiful wooden cottage was built by a master craftsman and is situated up a steep mountain track in a forest of tall trees. The breathtaking views of the valley and mountains are visible from the many windows and balconies. Sven is an engaging host with many interesting stories. The cottage is well equipped with good wifi if you need to work or want
to stream movies. The beds are warm, cosy and comfortable. This is a lovely cottage to cocoon for a few days or if you want to be active and explore the mountain trails. We loved our stay!

We loved our stay at Cabin in the Woods! The views and scenery are beautiful. Sven's hospitality was incredible- he drove us up the dirt path in his Land Rover (it is possible to drive up yourself in smaller cars too) , showed us the hiking trails around the cabin, and even came to the rescue when we were struggling to make a fire because the wood was a bit wet. The dog, Max, is very friendly and led the way on our hike for a bit. Gorgeous location with so much to do- right across from the Clay Cafe, close to Hout Bay Harbour, Llandudno Beach, etc.

What a great experience!! If it’s available take it. The drive up to the house was more exciting than we expected but we made it up quite easily in a Hyundai i10, and the second time was a breeze. The views were very calming and it is a wonderful space. The location is great for traveling either to Cape Town or for a sight seeing trip south. Sven was a gracious host and the dinner he made us was spectacular and a must when you stay here.

Bridget's place is very near and very close to restaurants and coffee shops. Also, close to the V&A Waterfront (we walked there in 25 minutes) an beautiful park is across the road and the views are lovely. Overall a nice place to spend a few nights. Bridget and Oscar were very helpful with the check in and we really had a lovely time.
Excellent location friendly hosts stylish spaces- who could ask for more ! Definitely recommend and will stay again
Lovely space with great park views. Very pleasant couple of days.

I can highly recommend this property. Beautiful apartment with fantastic amenities, stunning views of the city and table mountain and in the heart of Cape Town. Better than than the pictures!

Amazing views, I enjoyed my stay with my partner. Value for money!

The host is always around and goes an extra mile in terms of helping out and hey this is home away from home. Definitely my favorite place, keep up with the good service.

Fabulously decorated and modern  well appointed spot in the city. Excellent security. Extremely convenient to all the great restaurants in Bree Street and a hop away from the Waterfront. World class accommodation in Africa. Amazing view. Great hosts.
We had the best time at the place. The apartment is beautiful with beautiful  and very modern finishes. You have the best view of Cape Town from the place. The host is very friendly and very helpful.

Great stay in the heart of Cape Town CBD! it's a great place to stay in the heart of the city, very close to everything you need ...

We loved our stay at the Flamingo. Such a beautifully decorated and comfortable apartment. Very well thought out. The kitchenette was well equipped and the beds and linen super cosy. Incredibly good value. Would highly recommend.

We absolutely loved staying at this super stylish gem.
Our apartment was immaculate and had amazing views of Lions Head.
The area - Gardens - has easy access to the water front, great restaurants and bars in the city, and spectacular beaches just over the hill.
Would definitely stay again.
Had a great stay. The host was very accommodating and the unit was immaculate and clean. It is also very central within the city area which makes it easy to get around.
I highly recommend a short stay here for its clean and beautiful surroundings.

Had an amazing stay at Flamingo on Hope. It is a nice place to relax after a long day of work. When I misplaced one of my items, the gentleman at reception went above and beyond to return it to me. The staff are warm and welcoming.
The scenery was beautiful. The place was easy to find, clear instructions, and simple check-in and check-out process.
I even got a call from the Host to ensure that I had settled in well. I felt comfortable and cozy. What a bargain! I hope to return soon.
